title: Pork Chops And Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Place cut up potatoes in casserole.
Pour about 1/4 cup milk over potatoes.
Salt and pepper.
Place pork chops on top of potatoes and salt and pepper.
Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops And Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: pork chops, potatoes. Instructions: Place cut up potatoes in casserole. Pour about 1/4 cup milk over potatoes. Salt and pepper. Place pork chops on top of potatoes and salt and pepper. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Hash Brown Potato Casserole
instructions: Mix together soup, milk, sour cream and cheese.
Add the frozen potatoes.
Mix well.
Toss in the cubed ham.
Place in a greased shallow pan.
Bake at 350° for 50 minutes or until brown.
text: Recipe: Hash Brown Potato Casserole. Ingredients: frozen hash brown potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, milk, sour cream, shredded cheese, ham. Instructions: Mix together soup, milk, sour cream and cheese. Add the frozen potatoes. Mix well. Toss in the cubed ham. Place in a greased shallow pan. Bake at 350° for 50 minutes or until brown.

title: Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Cook in crock-pot.
Cook all on high for 4 or 5 hours except Velveeta.
Add Velveeta cheese chunks 1/2 hour before serving. Stir and serve.
text: Recipe: Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, garlic salt, cream of mushroom soup, ham chunks, butter. Instructions: Cook in crock-pot. Cook all on high for 4 or 5 hours except Velveeta. Add Velveeta cheese chunks 1/2 hour before serving. Stir and serve.

title: Creamy Potato Casserole
instructions: Clean and boil potatoes whole with skins, leave firm, 15 minutes.
Peel potatoes while still hot.
Put in plastic bag. Seal and refrigerate overnight.
Butter casserole; grate potatoes. Put grated potatoes in buttered casserole with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour 1 3/4 cups heavy cream into casserole.
Bake 1 hour at 350° uncovered.
text: Recipe: Creamy Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, heavy cream. Instructions: Clean and boil potatoes whole with skins, leave firm, 15 minutes. Peel potatoes while still hot. Put in plastic bag. Seal and refrigerate overnight. Butter casserole; grate potatoes. Put grated potatoes in buttered casserole with salt and pepper to taste. Pour 1 3/4 cups heavy cream into casserole. Bake 1 hour at 350° uncovered.

title: Quick Cheesy Potatoes(Microwave)
instructions: In a 9 x 13-inch casserole dish, cook potatoes on High in microwave until tender.
Add remaining ingredients; cook until heated all the way through and cheese is melted.
Makes 12 to 16 servings.
text: Recipe: Quick Cheesy Potatoes(Microwave)  . Ingredients: frozen hash brown potatoes, green onions, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, butter, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: In a 9 x 13-inch casserole dish, cook potatoes on High in microwave until tender. Add remaining ingredients; cook until heated all the way through and cheese is melted. Makes 12 to 16 servings.

title: Sausage, Egg And Cheese Strata
instructions: Cube the bread to fit a 13 x 9-inch pan.
On top of bread, layer the cheese and crumbled sausage patties.
Repeat.
Beat eggs in milk and pour over layers.
Refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.
Bake at 350° for 20 to 30 minutes.
Will be puffy. Serve hot.
text: Recipe: Sausage, Egg And Cheese Strata. Ingredients: bread, eggs, sausage patties, milk, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Cube the bread to fit a 13 x 9-inch pan. On top of bread, layer the cheese and crumbled sausage patties. Repeat. Beat eggs in milk and pour over layers. Refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight. Bake at 350° for 20 to 30 minutes. Will be puffy. Serve hot.

title: Ham And Onion Wrap-Ups
instructions: Spread about 2 tablespoons of cream cheese onto each slice of ham.
Place trimmed green onion (approximately 4 inches long) on cream cheese.
Roll tightly.
This is a great party snack!
text: Recipe: Ham And Onion Wrap-Ups. Ingredients: green onions, ham, cream cheese. Instructions: Spread about 2 tablespoons of cream cheese onto each slice of ham. Place trimmed green onion (approximately 4 inches long) on cream cheese. Roll tightly. This is a great party snack!

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a frying pan. Make sandwiches, using 2 slices of bread and 1 piece of cheese for each. Place sandwich in pan and fry until lightly brown; turn over and brown on other side. Fry on medium heat.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: bread, American cheese, butter. Instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a frying pan. Make sandwiches, using 2 slices of bread and 1 piece of cheese for each. Place sandwich in pan and fry until lightly brown; turn over and brown on other side. Fry on medium heat.

title: Ham And Cheesy Potatoes
instructions: Slice potatoes and cube cheese. Mix soup and milk until creamy. Layer potatoes, cheese, ham and onion in a greased 9 x 13 inch pan. Pour half the soup over and repeat the layers. Dot with butter. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cheesy Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, ham, Velveeta cheese, milk, sweet onion. Instructions: Slice potatoes and cube cheese. Mix soup and milk until creamy. Layer potatoes, cheese, ham and onion in a greased 9 x 13 inch pan. Pour half the soup over and repeat the layers. Dot with butter. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender.

title: Hash Brown Potato Casserole
instructions: Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan with margarine.
Add hash brown potatoes (slightly thawed by rinsing with water in colander). Pour 1/4 cup melted butter over potatoes.
Sprinkle with onions. Mix together soup, sour cream and milk.
Pour over potatoes.
Top with cheese.
Melt 1/4 cup butter in saucepan and mix in bread cubes.
Spoon over cheese.
Bake, uncovered, at 375° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Hash Brown Potato Casserole. Ingredients: hash brown potatoes, butter, onion, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, milk, sharp cheese, white bread, butter. Instructions: Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan with margarine. Add hash brown potatoes (slightly thawed by rinsing with water in colander). Pour 1/4 cup melted butter over potatoes. Sprinkle with onions. Mix together soup, sour cream and milk. Pour over potatoes. Top with cheese. Melt 1/4 cup butter in saucepan and mix in bread cubes. Spoon over cheese. Bake, uncovered, at 375° for 1 hour.

title: Onion Pork Chops
instructions: Place chops in 9 x 9-inch baking dish.
Sprinkle onion soup mix over chops.
Add 1/4 cup water and bake in 425° oven for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Onion Pork Chops. Ingredients: lean pork chops, onion soup. Instructions: Place chops in 9 x 9-inch baking dish. Sprinkle onion soup mix over chops. Add 1/4 cup water and bake in 425° oven for 1 hour.

title: Zesty Mozzarella Chicken
instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine egg white and milk.
In another bowl, combine the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese and seasonings. Dip each chicken breast in the egg white mixture, then in the bread crumb mixture.
Melt butter in skillet; brown chicken on both sides until no longer pink and juice runs clear.
text: Recipe: Zesty Mozzarella Chicken. Ingredients: egg, milk, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, salt, chicken, butter, tomato sauce, basil, Mozzarella cheese. Instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine egg white and milk. In another bowl, combine the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese and seasonings. Dip each chicken breast in the egg white mixture, then in the bread crumb mixture. Melt butter in skillet; brown chicken on both sides until no longer pink and juice runs clear.

title: Chicken And Noodles
instructions: Boil breasts in water (couple of cups) in which you have dissolved 1 bouillon cube.
Save broth.
Dice chicken when cool; set aside.
Heat cream of chicken soup with saved broth until smooth.
Prepare package dried chicken noodle soup according to directions.
Boil 1/2 bag egg noodles in 4 cups water in which you have dissolved 2 chicken bouillon cubes; drain.
Add all ingredients together.
If too thin, thicken with cornstarch.
If too thick, add some of the noodle water.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Noodles. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, egg noodles, chicken. Instructions: Boil breasts in water (couple of cups) in which you have dissolved 1 bouillon cube. Save broth. Dice chicken when cool; set aside. Heat cream of chicken soup with saved broth until smooth. Prepare package dried chicken noodle soup according to directions. Boil 1/2 bag egg noodles in 4 cups water in which you have dissolved 2 chicken bouillon cubes; drain. Add all ingredients together. If too thin, thicken with cornstarch. If too thick, add some of the noodle water.

title: Hot Ham And Cheese Balls
instructions: Mix all ingredients together except 1/2 cup bread crumbs.
Roll mixture into 1-inch balls.
Roll each ball in the reserved 1/2 cup bread crumbs.
Deep fry in 350° deep fryer, just until lightly browned.
text: Recipe: Hot Ham And Cheese Balls. Ingredients: ground ham, bread crumbs, eggs, Parmesan cheese, parsley, onions. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together except 1/2 cup bread crumbs. Roll mixture into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in the reserved 1/2 cup bread crumbs. Deep fry in 350° deep fryer, just until lightly browned.

title: Zesty Mozzarella Chicken
instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine egg white and milk.
In another bowl, combine the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese and seasonings. Dip each chicken breast in the egg white mixture, then in the crumb mixture.
text: Recipe: Zesty Mozzarella Chicken. Ingredients: egg, milk, bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, salt, chicken, butter, tomato sauce, basil, Mozzarella cheese. Instructions: In a shallow bowl, combine egg white and milk. In another bowl, combine the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese and seasonings. Dip each chicken breast in the egg white mixture, then in the crumb mixture.

title: Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Alternate layers of ham and potatoes, onions and cheese in crock-pot.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Top with can of mushroom soup.
Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
text: Recipe: Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: leftover ham, potatoes, onions, grated cheese, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: Alternate layers of ham and potatoes, onions and cheese in crock-pot. Salt and pepper to taste. Top with can of mushroom soup. Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.

title: Gnocchi Pi Ricotta(Cheese Dumplings)
instructions: Mix flour and Ricotta cheese. Add egg. On a lightly floured board, roll out with palm of hand a small amount to form a rope. Cut into bite size pieces. (Add more flour as needed.) Cook in salted, boiling water until gnocchi rise to the top. Drain well and serve with favorite sauce.
text: Recipe: Gnocchi Pi Ricotta(Cheese Dumplings)  . Ingredients: Ricotta cheese, flour, egg. Instructions: Mix flour and Ricotta cheese. Add egg. On a lightly floured board, roll out with palm of hand a small amount to form a rope. Cut into bite size pieces. (Add more flour as needed.) Cook in salted, boiling water until gnocchi rise to the top. Drain well and serve with favorite sauce.

title: Sour Cream Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Combine the first 5 ingredients in a saucepan and cook until heated through, approximately 10 to 15 minutes.
Add sour cream and blend.
text: Recipe: Sour Cream Chicken Enchiladas. Ingredients: chicken, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, Ro-Tel tomatoes, flour tortillas, sour cream, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Combine the first 5 ingredients in a saucepan and cook until heated through, approximately 10 to 15 minutes. Add sour cream and blend.

title: Peggy'S Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Cut skinned potatoes into thin slices.
Pour soup and milk over layered potatoes in a deep baking dish.
Place dabs of butter and bake for 1 hour to 1 hour and 15 minutes.
(Cover pan with foil.)
text: Recipe: Peggy'S Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, milk, dabs of butter, baking potatoes. Instructions: Cut skinned potatoes into thin slices. Pour soup and milk over layered potatoes in a deep baking dish. Place dabs of butter and bake for 1 hour to 1 hour and 15 minutes. (Cover pan with foil.)

title: Chicken Corn Chowder
instructions: In saucepan, blend cream of chicken soup and milk.
Add remaining ingredients.
Heat.
Stir occasionally.
Makes about 7 cups.
Serve with crispy bread.
text: Recipe: Chicken Corn Chowder. Ingredients: condensed cream, milk, condensed chicken, cream-style corn, white chicken. Instructions: In saucepan, blend cream of chicken soup and milk. Add remaining ingredients. Heat. Stir occasionally. Makes about 7 cups. Serve with crispy bread.

title: Ham And Cheese Spread
instructions: Allow cheese to soften.
Mix cheese, onions and ham thoroughly.
Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cheese Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, green onions, shaved ham. Instructions: Allow cheese to soften. Mix cheese, onions and ham thoroughly. Enjoy.

title: Onion-Roasted Potatoes(1993 Taster'S Luncheon)
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°.
In a large plastic bag or bowl, add all ingredients.
Close bag and shake or toss in bowl until potatoes are evenly coated. Empty potatoes into shallow baking or roasting pan.
Discard bag.
Bake, stirring occasionally, 40 minutes or until potatoes are tender and golden brown. Garnish, if desired, with chopped fresh parsley.
Makes 8 servings.
text: Recipe: Onion-Roasted Potatoes(1993 Taster'S Luncheon)  . Ingredients: onion-mushroom, all-purpose potatoes, extra light olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. In a large plastic bag or bowl, add all ingredients. Close bag and shake or toss in bowl until potatoes are evenly coated. Empty potatoes into shallow baking or roasting pan. Discard bag. Bake, stirring occasionally, 40 minutes or until potatoes are tender and golden brown. Garnish, if desired, with chopped fresh parsley. Makes 8 servings.

title: Potato Dumplings
instructions: Boil potatoes and let stand for a few hours or overnight, still in their jackets.
Peel potatoes and mash them or put through a ricer, then add the eggs and flour.
Roll the mixture into little balls.
Chill in refrigerator for about an hour before cooking.
Cook in lightly salted water that is just under the boiling point.
When dumplings are done, will rise to top.
Serve hot with melted brown butter and crumbs.
text: Recipe: Potato Dumplings. Ingredients: potatoes, eggs, flour, buttered crumbs. Instructions: Boil potatoes and let stand for a few hours or overnight, still in their jackets. Peel potatoes and mash them or put through a ricer, then add the eggs and flour. Roll the mixture into little balls. Chill in refrigerator for about an hour before cooking. Cook in lightly salted water that is just under the boiling point. When dumplings are done, will rise to top. Serve hot with melted brown butter and crumbs.

title: Rice Lasagna
instructions: Heat oven to 350°.
Spray a 9 x 13-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
In medium skillet, brown beef and onion; drain. Stir in spaghetti sauce; mix well.
In small bowl, combine Ricotta cheese, Mozzarella cheese and egg whites; mix well.
In the prepared pan, spread 1/3 of meat sauce, 1/2 of rice and 1/2 of Ricotta cheese mixture; repeat layers.
Spread remaining sauce on top; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Yields 8 servings.
text: Recipe: Rice Lasagna. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, cottage cheese, Mozzarella cheese, egg whites, long grain rice, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 350°. Spray a 9 x 13-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray. In medium skillet, brown beef and onion; drain. Stir in spaghetti sauce; mix well. In small bowl, combine Ricotta cheese, Mozzarella cheese and egg whites; mix well. In the prepared pan, spread 1/3 of meat sauce, 1/2 of rice and 1/2 of Ricotta cheese mixture; repeat layers. Spread remaining sauce on top; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving. Yields 8 servings.

title: Pork Chops And Potatoes
instructions: Place cubed potatoes in baking dish.
Add enough to cover bottom of pan.
Sprinkle with chopped onion.
Sprinkle 1/2 package of Lipton soup mix.
Put pork chops on top of mixture.
Sprinkle chops with rest of soup mix.
In saucepan, heat mushroom soup and milk until warm.
Pour over pork chops and potatoes.
Cover with foil; bake for approximately 1 to 1 1/2 hours in a preheated oven at 300°.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops And Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, pork chops, onion soup mix, cream of mushroom soup, milk. Instructions: Place cubed potatoes in baking dish. Add enough to cover bottom of pan. Sprinkle with chopped onion. Sprinkle 1/2 package of Lipton soup mix. Put pork chops on top of mixture. Sprinkle chops with rest of soup mix. In saucepan, heat mushroom soup and milk until warm. Pour over pork chops and potatoes. Cover with foil; bake for approximately 1 to 1 1/2 hours in a preheated oven at 300°.

title: Party Rye Pizzas(Great For Snacks Or A Party!!)
instructions: Brown ground beef and sausage until done.
Drain; add seasonings.
Combine with melted Velveeta cheese and spread on party rye bread.
Top with Mozzarella cheese and bake on cookie sheet for 10 minutes at 400°.
text: Recipe: Party Rye Pizzas(Great For Snacks Or A Party!!)  . Ingredients: ground beef, bulk sausage, Velveeta cheese, garlic salt, onion salt, party rye bread, Mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Brown ground beef and sausage until done. Drain; add seasonings. Combine with melted Velveeta cheese and spread on party rye bread. Top with Mozzarella cheese and bake on cookie sheet for 10 minutes at 400°.

title: Sour Bread - Starter
instructions: Mix milk with flour.
Let stand, uncovered, in a warm (preferably sunny) place.
When mixture begins to bubble and has a sour odor, it is ready.
text: Recipe: Sour Bread - Starter. Ingredients: milk, rye flour. Instructions: Mix milk with flour. Let stand, uncovered, in a warm (preferably sunny) place. When mixture begins to bubble and has a sour odor, it is ready.

title: Cheesy Chicken Chowder
instructions: Combine first five ingredients in a large saucepan.
Cover and cook over medium heat until vegetables are tender.
Melt butter in Dutch oven over low heat; add flour stirring until smooth.
Cook 1 minute stirring constantly.
Gradually stir in milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick and bubbly.
Gradually stir in vegetable mixture, soy sauce, cheese and chicken.
Cook until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Chicken Chowder. Ingredients: chicken broth, potatoes, celery, carrots, onion, butter, flour, milk, soy sauce, process cheese, chicken. Instructions: Combine first five ingredients in a large saucepan. Cover and cook over medium heat until vegetables are tender. Melt butter in Dutch oven over low heat; add flour stirring until smooth. Cook 1 minute stirring constantly. Gradually stir in milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick and bubbly. Gradually stir in vegetable mixture, soy sauce, cheese and chicken. Cook until cheese melts.

title: Quick Pasta Dish
instructions: In a bowl, mix pasta (cooked) of your choice with mixture and serve immediately.
Top with grated cheese.
text: Recipe: Quick Pasta Dish. Ingredients: garlic, fresh tomatoes, Mozzarella, basil, olive oil, pasta. Instructions: In a bowl, mix pasta (cooked) of your choice with mixture and serve immediately. Top with grated cheese.

title: Pork Chop-Potato Casserole
instructions: Layer pork chops in casserole dish.
Peel potatoes; slice in half, layer on chops.
Slice onion.
Lay around over potatoes. Pour tomato soup on top.
Cover with foil.
Cook 1 hour in 400° oven.
text: Recipe: Pork Chop-Potato Casserole. Ingredients: pork chops, potatoes, onion, tomato soup. Instructions: Layer pork chops in casserole dish. Peel potatoes; slice in half, layer on chops. Slice onion. Lay around over potatoes. Pour tomato soup on top. Cover with foil. Cook 1 hour in 400° oven.

title: Microwave Sliced Bake Potatoes
instructions: Peel potatoes if skin is tough.
Cut potatoes into thin slices but
not
all
the way through.
Put in microwave-safe dish
and sprinkle with melted butter and parsley.
Microwave on
High power 10 minutes; rearrange potatoes after 5 minutes. Let
rest
for
5 minutes.
Sprinkle with Cheddar and Parmesan cheese.
Microwave
4 to
6 minutes on High until cheeses are melted and potatoes are soft.
text: Recipe: Microwave Sliced Bake Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, butter, parsley, Cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Peel potatoes if skin is tough. Cut potatoes into thin slices but not all the way through. Put in microwave-safe dish and sprinkle with melted butter and parsley. Microwave on High power 10 minutes; rearrange potatoes after 5 minutes. Let rest for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with Cheddar and Parmesan cheese. Microwave 4 to 6 minutes on High until cheeses are melted and potatoes are soft.

title: Leftover Meat And Potatoes
instructions: Brown beef and onion in butter.
Mix in other ingredients. Place in casserole and bake 30 to 40 minutes.
Use your imagination and add leftover vegetables, too.
text: Recipe: Leftover Meat And Potatoes. Ingredients: beef, onion, butter, cream of celery soup, shredded cheese, potatoes. Instructions: Brown beef and onion in butter. Mix in other ingredients. Place in casserole and bake 30 to 40 minutes. Use your imagination and add leftover vegetables, too.

title: Hash Brown Potato Casserole
instructions: Combine potatoes, 1/2 cup butter (melted), onion, soup, sour cream and cheese; stir well.
Spoon into a greased 2 1/2-quart casserole.
Pour remaining butter over top.
Sprinkle with grated cheese.
Bake at 350° for 45 to 50 minutes.
Yields 10 to 12 servings.
text: Recipe: Hash Brown Potato Casserole. Ingredients: frozen hash brown potatoes, butter, onion, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, shredded cheese. Instructions: Combine potatoes, 1/2 cup butter (melted), onion, soup, sour cream and cheese; stir well. Spoon into a greased 2 1/2-quart casserole. Pour remaining butter over top. Sprinkle with grated cheese. Bake at 350° for 45 to 50 minutes. Yields 10 to 12 servings.

title: Chicken Noodles
instructions: Boil chicken; take meat off bones.
Cook egg noodles.
Mix chicken and noodles in baking dish with cream of mushroom soup. Put shredded Cheddar cheese on top.
Bake at 375° until cheese melts or is hot.
Serve with mashed potatoes and corn.
text: Recipe: Chicken Noodles. Ingredients: chicken, cream of mushroom soup, egg noodles, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Boil chicken; take meat off bones. Cook egg noodles. Mix chicken and noodles in baking dish with cream of mushroom soup. Put shredded Cheddar cheese on top. Bake at 375° until cheese melts or is hot. Serve with mashed potatoes and corn.

title: Potatoes Au Gratin With Sausage
instructions: Slice potatoes and sausage into 1/4-inch round pieces.
Place potatoes in a 9 x 13-inch baking pan. Cover with thinly sliced pieces of margarine.
Place sliced sausage on top of layered potatoes.
Add sliced cheese to cover sausage. Repeat, ending with cheese as top layer.
Pour milk evenly over mixture. Cover with foil. Bake at 350° for approximately 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Potatoes Au Gratin With Sausage. Ingredients: potatoes, sausage, Velveeta cheese, milk. Instructions: Slice potatoes and sausage into 1/4-inch round pieces. Place potatoes in a 9 x 13-inch baking pan. Cover with thinly sliced pieces of margarine. Place sliced sausage on top of layered potatoes. Add sliced cheese to cover sausage. Repeat, ending with cheese as top layer. Pour milk evenly over mixture. Cover with foil. Bake at 350° for approximately 1 hour.

title: Savory Tomato Butter
instructions: Saute the onion over medium heat in the 2 teaspoons of butter until it just begins to color, 3 to 4 minutes.
Add the tomato puree; bring to a boil.
Turn the heat down to a simmer; cook for about 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a fine strainer, pressing to get out most of the liquid.
Put the liquid in a clean saucepan.
Bring to a boil over medium-low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced to 2 or 3 tablespoons, about 30 minutes.
During the last 10 minutes or so, take care to keep it from scorching.
Let it cool.
Beat the reduction into the remaining butter.
Refrigerate until ready to use.
Makes about 3/4 cup.
text: Recipe: Savory Tomato Butter. Ingredients: onion, unsalted butter, tomatoes. Instructions: Saute the onion over medium heat in the 2 teaspoons of butter until it just begins to color, 3 to 4 minutes. Add the tomato puree; bring to a boil. Turn the heat down to a simmer; cook for about 5 minutes. Strain the mixture through a fine strainer, pressing to get out most of the liquid. Put the liquid in a clean saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium-low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced to 2 or 3 tablespoons, about 30 minutes. During the last 10 minutes or so, take care to keep it from scorching. Let it cool. Beat the reduction into the remaining butter. Refrigerate until ready to use. Makes about 3/4 cup.

title: Corn Chowder
instructions: Cook potatoes and onions in 6 cups of water until done (soft). Add corn and half and half cream.
Add butter.
Serve hot with biscuits.
text: Recipe: Corn Chowder. Ingredients: potatoes, onions, cream-style, butter. Instructions: Cook potatoes and onions in 6 cups of water until done (soft). Add corn and half and half cream. Add butter. Serve hot with biscuits.

title: Barbecue Onion Bake(Side Dish)
instructions: Remove outside skin of onion.
Cut a hole in top of onion. Put 1 teaspoon of butter and 1 beef bouillon cube in hole.
Wrap onion in aluminum foil.
Place on grill.
Cook until onion becomes soft.
Can be cooked in oven.
text: Recipe: Barbecue Onion Bake(Side Dish)  . Ingredients: onion, butter. Instructions: Remove outside skin of onion. Cut a hole in top of onion. Put 1 teaspoon of butter and 1 beef bouillon cube in hole. Wrap onion in aluminum foil. Place on grill. Cook until onion becomes soft. Can be cooked in oven.

title: Scalloped Potatoes And Ham
instructions: Put 1/2 potatoes in pan.
Add 1/2 ham.
Sprinkle 1/2 onions over.
Add 1/2 butter.
Sprinkle 1/2 flour over all.
Add 1/2 cheese.
Repeat process.
Pour milk in pan until you can see it halfway up the pan.
Cover.
Bake on 425° until done (about 1 hour).
text: Recipe: Scalloped Potatoes And Ham. Ingredients: potatoes, Velveeta cheese, onion, ham chunks, flour, butter, milk. Instructions: Put 1/2 potatoes in pan. Add 1/2 ham. Sprinkle 1/2 onions over. Add 1/2 butter. Sprinkle 1/2 flour over all. Add 1/2 cheese. Repeat process. Pour milk in pan until you can see it halfway up the pan. Cover. Bake on 425° until done (about 1 hour).

title: Sourdough Starter
instructions: Put milk in a shallow pan, covered with screen or cheesecloth and let stand at room temperature for 24 hours.
Place in quart jar and stir in flour.
Let stand at room temperature (warm) for 2 to 5 days until very bubbly.
When it has a good sour aroma and bubbles subside, it is ready for use.
You may wish to catch another wild yeast if your first one is not active enough or to get a slightly different flavor.
It may be kept ready for use in the refrigerator for several weeks before it is necessary to use it and refresh it.
text: Recipe: Sourdough Starter. Ingredients: milk, flour. Instructions: Put milk in a shallow pan, covered with screen or cheesecloth and let stand at room temperature for 24 hours. Place in quart jar and stir in flour. Let stand at room temperature (warm) for 2 to 5 days until very bubbly. When it has a good sour aroma and bubbles subside, it is ready for use. You may wish to catch another wild yeast if your first one is not active enough or to get a slightly different flavor. It may be kept ready for use in the refrigerator for several weeks before it is necessary to use it and refresh it.

title: Sausage, Potatoes And Tomatoes
instructions: Fry sausage in pan while loosening it with 2 forks to make clumps (or use your hands).
Fry until browned.
Add diced potatoes and stewed tomatoes.
Stir periodically on low flame until potatoes are cooked.
text: Recipe: Sausage, Potatoes And Tomatoes. Ingredients: loose sausage, potatoes, tomatoes. Instructions: Fry sausage in pan while loosening it with 2 forks to make clumps (or use your hands). Fry until browned. Add diced potatoes and stewed tomatoes. Stir periodically on low flame until potatoes are cooked.

title: Raw Potato Hot Dish
instructions: Brown beef and onion. Drain fat. Add raw potatoes, celery and soup.
Place in 3-quart casserole and cover. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Raw Potato Hot Dish. Ingredients: ground beef, potatoes, celery, onion, chicken rice soup, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Brown beef and onion. Drain fat. Add raw potatoes, celery and soup. Place in 3-quart casserole and cover. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.

title: Amish Stewing Noodles
instructions: Make a soft dough by combining all ingredients (add more milk if necessary).
Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead until well worked.
Roll dough out as thin as possible and cut into strips about 1/2-inch wide and 2 inches long.
Let dry about 1 hour.
These noodles are great in soups and stews or great as dumplings.
text: Recipe: Amish Stewing Noodles. Ingredients: flour, egg, milk. Instructions: Make a soft dough by combining all ingredients (add more milk if necessary). Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead until well worked. Roll dough out as thin as possible and cut into strips about 1/2-inch wide and 2 inches long. Let dry about 1 hour. These noodles are great in soups and stews or great as dumplings.

title: Chicken And Noodles
instructions: Boil chicken until tender.
Take chicken off the bone.
Mix flour, butter and eggs together.
Roll out and cut into strips. Put chicken and strips of noodles into pot together.
Fill with water until all is covered.
Cook until noodles are soft.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Noodles. Ingredients: chicken, Flour, Butter, eggs. Instructions: Boil chicken until tender. Take chicken off the bone. Mix flour, butter and eggs together. Roll out and cut into strips. Put chicken and strips of noodles into pot together. Fill with water until all is covered. Cook until noodles are soft.

title: Creamed Chipped Beef Over Hot Baked Potatoes
instructions: Prepare potatoes as usual for baking in conventional oven. Bake at 425° for 15 minutes, then pierce 2 to 3 times with a fork. Continue baking an additional 30 to 40 minutes, until done.
text: Recipe: Creamed Chipped Beef Over Hot Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, Stouffer's creamed, green onion, egg. Instructions: Prepare potatoes as usual for baking in conventional oven. Bake at 425° for 15 minutes, then pierce 2 to 3 times with a fork. Continue baking an additional 30 to 40 minutes, until done.

title: Cheese Biscuits With Sausage
instructions: Mix thoroughly.
Roll into small balls and place on cookie sheet.
Bake in 350° oven about 10 minutes or until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Cheese Biscuits With Sausage. Ingredients: sharp cheese, hot sausage, Bisquick flour. Instructions: Mix thoroughly. Roll into small balls and place on cookie sheet. Bake in 350° oven about 10 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Almost French Fried Onion Rings
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°.
Separate onion slices into rings.
Dip each ring in egg white, then in bread crumbs.
Place on nonstick cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Almost French Fried Onion Rings. Ingredients: Italian bread crumbs, onion, egg. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Separate onion slices into rings. Dip each ring in egg white, then in bread crumbs. Place on nonstick cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes.

title: Fried Onion Rings
instructions: Dip onions after sliced in a small bowl of milk, then dip in flour.
French fry until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Fried Onion Rings. Ingredients: onions, milk, flour. Instructions: Dip onions after sliced in a small bowl of milk, then dip in flour. French fry until golden brown.

title: Beef And Onion Cheese Ball
instructions: Mix together cream cheese and chopped corned beef.
Add chopped onion and onion powder. Form into ball and chill.
For larger ball, double ingredients.
text: Recipe: Beef And Onion Cheese Ball. Ingredients: cream cheese, beef, onion, onion. Instructions: Mix together cream cheese and chopped corned beef. Add chopped onion and onion powder. Form into ball and chill. For larger ball, double ingredients.

title: Potato Dumplings
instructions: Mash potatoes well in egg and 1 cup
flour.
Drop
into broth by	tablespoonfuls	(chicken,
beef
and
pork
broth). Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
These are very good and quick.
text: Recipe: Potato Dumplings. Ingredients: potatoes, eggs, flour. Instructions: Mash potatoes well in egg and 1 cup flour. Drop into broth by	tablespoonfuls	(chicken, beef and pork broth). Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes. These are very good and quick.

title: Sausage Cheese Balls
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°.
Shred cheese and mix all ingredients. Form into 1-inch balls.
Bake 15 minutes on ungreased cookie sheet until golden brown.
For a firmer texture, add an extra 3 c. of biscuit mix and an extra 2 c. of cheese to above listed ingredients.
Makes about 6 doz. and can be frozen if uncooked.
text: Recipe: Sausage Cheese Balls. Ingredients: sausage, cheddar cheese, onion, celery, garlic powder. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Shred cheese and mix all ingredients. Form into 1-inch balls. Bake 15 minutes on ungreased cookie sheet until golden brown. For a firmer texture, add an extra 3 c. of biscuit mix and an extra 2 c. of cheese to above listed ingredients. Makes about 6 doz. and can be frozen if uncooked.

title: Potato Dumplings
instructions: Roll out and cut.
Drop into boiling broth.
Cook until done.
text: Recipe: Potato Dumplings. Ingredients: potato, egg, chicken broth, flour. Instructions: Roll out and cut. Drop into boiling broth. Cook until done.

title: Penne Pasta Bake
instructions: Brown ground beef in skillet. Drain off fat. Cook pasta in large saucepan; drain and return to pan. Add ground beef, spaghetti sauce, and 1/2 parmesan cheese. Mix well and pour into ungreased 13 x 9 inch baking pan. Top with 1/4 cup parmesan cheese and 2 cups mozzarella cheese. Bake at 300° for 15 minutes or until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Penne Pasta Bake. Ingredients: ground beef, spaghetti sauce, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, penne pasta. Instructions: Brown ground beef in skillet. Drain off fat. Cook pasta in large saucepan; drain and return to pan. Add ground beef, spaghetti sauce, and 1/2 parmesan cheese. Mix well and pour into ungreased 13 x 9 inch baking pan. Top with 1/4 cup parmesan cheese and 2 cups mozzarella cheese. Bake at 300° for 15 minutes or until cheese is melted.

title: Party Rye Slices
instructions: Brown the sausage and hamburger separately.
Add the cheese and garlic salt.
Stir until cheese is melted.
Roll up in a long roll.
Refrigerate.
Slice and place on small 3 x 3-inch party rye slices.
Broil until brown.
text: Recipe: Party Rye Slices. Ingredients: sausage, hamburger, Velveeta cheese, garlic. Instructions: Brown the sausage and hamburger separately. Add the cheese and garlic salt. Stir until cheese is melted. Roll up in a long roll. Refrigerate. Slice and place on small 3 x 3-inch party rye slices. Broil until brown.

title: Sausage Zucchini Bake
instructions: Brown sausage, breaking into small pieces.
Drain.
Toss with 1 tablespoon of flour.
Spread on the bottom of a baking dish.
text: Recipe: Sausage Zucchini Bake. Ingredients: Italian sausage, flour, zucchini, onions, butter, cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, eggs, garlic powder, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage, breaking into small pieces. Drain. Toss with 1 tablespoon of flour. Spread on the bottom of a baking dish.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Heat butter in skillet.
Put cheese in between bread.
Put in pan.
Cook until nice and brown.
Then eat it.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: butter, bread, cheese. Instructions: Heat butter in skillet. Put cheese in between bread. Put in pan. Cook until nice and brown. Then eat it.

title: Beef And Potato Casserole
instructions: Brown meat and onion together.
Place in a 9 x 13 inch cake pan.
Top with generous amount of potato rounds, sliced about 1/2 inch thick.
Add 1 can of water to the 2 cans of mushroom soup and mix well; pour over potatoes.
Salt generously and bake, covered, 1 hour at 375°.
text: Recipe: Beef And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: hamburger, cream of mushroom soup, onion, potatoes. Instructions: Brown meat and onion together. Place in a 9 x 13 inch cake pan. Top with generous amount of potato rounds, sliced about 1/2 inch thick. Add 1 can of water to the 2 cans of mushroom soup and mix well; pour over potatoes. Salt generously and bake, covered, 1 hour at 375°.

title: Hot Cheese Chowder
instructions: Saute celery, onion and green pepper in butter in Dutch oven until tender.
Add chicken broth, potato and carrot; bring to a boil.
Cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
text: Recipe: Hot Cheese Chowder. Ingredients: celery, onion, green pepper, butter, chicken broth, potato, carrot, flour, milk, cheese, fresh parsley. Instructions: Saute celery, onion and green pepper in butter in Dutch oven until tender. Add chicken broth, potato and carrot; bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.

title: Cheese And Egg Sandwiches
instructions: Cut sandwiches into small triangles or into fancy shapes with cookie cutters or make open faces and cut in fancy shapes.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Egg Sandwiches. Ingredients: breads. Instructions: Cut sandwiches into small triangles or into fancy shapes with cookie cutters or make open faces and cut in fancy shapes.

title: Starter For Sourdough Bread
instructions: You will need a large glass jar and cheesecloth.
text: Recipe: Starter For Sourdough Bread. Ingredients: milk, flour. Instructions: You will need a large glass jar and cheesecloth.

title: Sausage Gravy And Biscuits
instructions: Brown in heavy skillet 1 pound sausage.
Leave some bits to stick to bottom of skillet and brown.
This gives good flavor and color to gravy.
Remove browned sausage to plate.
Leave about 1/4 cup of drippings in skillet.
(If too lean, add margarine to make 1/4 cup.)
text: Recipe: Sausage Gravy And Biscuits. Ingredients: bulk sausage, flour, cold milk. Instructions: Brown in heavy skillet 1 pound sausage. Leave some bits to stick to bottom of skillet and brown. This gives good flavor and color to gravy. Remove browned sausage to plate. Leave about 1/4 cup of drippings in skillet. (If too lean, add margarine to make 1/4 cup.)

title: Creamy Pork Chops And Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Place potatoes and onion in an 8 x 8-inch casserole dish.
Mix soup and milk.
Pour into casserole. Top with pork chops.
Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Creamy Pork Chops And Potatoes. Ingredients: pork chops, baking potatoes, onion, cream of mushroom soup, milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place potatoes and onion in an 8 x 8-inch casserole dish. Mix soup and milk. Pour into casserole. Top with pork chops. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour and 15 minutes.

title: New England Corn Chowder
instructions: Chop salt and pork.
Strain fat into soup pot. Discard rendered scraps. Add onions and saute until tender.
Add flour, mixing well.
Cook without browning 3 to 4 minutes.
Add chicken stock slowly, stirring until smooth.
Add corn.
Cook potatoes separately. Drain and add to chowder. Add hot milk and cream. Season to taste.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: New England Corn Chowder. Ingredients: salt pork, onions, flour, chicken stock, cream-style corn, potatoes, hot milk, cream. Instructions: Chop salt and pork. Strain fat into soup pot. Discard rendered scraps. Add onions and saute until tender. Add flour, mixing well. Cook without browning 3 to 4 minutes. Add chicken stock slowly, stirring until smooth. Add corn. Cook potatoes separately. Drain and add to chowder. Add hot milk and cream. Season to taste. Enjoy!

title: Brunswick Stew(Serve With Barbecue Or Seafood)
instructions: Place meat in large, heavy pot.
Season with salt and pepper. Add onions and cover with water.
Cook until meat falls from bones (several hours).
Remove from heat and allow to cool.
Tear meat into shreds and return to stock.
text: Recipe: Brunswick Stew(Serve With Barbecue Or Seafood)  . Ingredients: chicken, lean beef, lean pork, onions. Instructions: Place meat in large, heavy pot. Season with salt and pepper. Add onions and cover with water. Cook until meat falls from bones (several hours). Remove from heat and allow to cool. Tear meat into shreds and return to stock.

title: Ham And Cheese Dream Sandwich
instructions: You will need 1 (18 x 26 x 1-inch) sheet pan.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cheese Dream Sandwich. Ingredients: eggs, cheese, ham, bread, tomato, cheese. Instructions: You will need 1 (18 x 26 x 1-inch) sheet pan.

title: Fried Rice
instructions: Brown together sausage
and onion, then add rice.
Pour enough water over this to cover.
Simmer until rice is cooked. You may have to add
more
water
until
rice
is
cooked, but simmer down until all liquid is gone.
Put this over chow-mein noodles, sprinkle with soy sauce.
text: Recipe: Fried Rice. Ingredients: sausage, onion, rice. Instructions: Brown together sausage and onion, then add rice. Pour enough water over this to cover. Simmer until rice is cooked. You may have to add more water until rice is cooked, but simmer down until all liquid is gone. Put this over chow-mein noodles, sprinkle with soy sauce.

title: Sausage Ring
instructions: Set oven at 350°.
Lightly butter 9-inch ring mold.
Mix all ingredients and pack into mold.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Pour off excess fat and then cool 20 minutes more.
text: Recipe: Sausage Ring. Ingredients: sausage, eggs, onion, bread crumbs, parsley. Instructions: Set oven at 350°. Lightly butter 9-inch ring mold. Mix all ingredients and pack into mold. Bake for 20 minutes. Pour off excess fat and then cool 20 minutes more.

title: Cauliflower And Broccoli Dish
instructions: Mix until melted and thickened.
Heat oven to 350° and bake for 30 to 40 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cauliflower And Broccoli Dish. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, American cheese, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix until melted and thickened. Heat oven to 350° and bake for 30 to 40 minutes.

title: Butterfinger Pie
instructions: Mix Cool Whip with crushed Butterfingers.
Pour in pie shell and enjoy.
Has to be kept in refrigerator until serving time.
text: Recipe: Butterfinger Pie. Ingredients: king size Butterfingers, graham cracker pie shell. Instructions: Mix Cool Whip with crushed Butterfingers. Pour in pie shell and enjoy. Has to be kept in refrigerator until serving time.

title: Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Butter 2-quart casserole.
Add cubed ham, cheese, sauteed onion and butter; stir.
Then mix flour and milk and heat.
Pour over potato and ham mixture; salt and pepper to taste.
Stir thoroughly; sprinkle lightly with bread crumbs (Italian flavored are best).
Bake at 350° for about 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, ham, onion, flour, milk, shredded cheese, bread crumbs. Instructions: Butter 2-quart casserole. Add cubed ham, cheese, sauteed onion and butter; stir. Then mix flour and milk and heat. Pour over potato and ham mixture; salt and pepper to taste. Stir thoroughly; sprinkle lightly with bread crumbs (Italian flavored are best). Bake at 350° for about 1 hour.

title: Potato Hamburger Casserole
instructions: Brown hamburger and onion.
Drain. Heat milk and soup until smooth.
Put hamburger and potatoes in casserole.
Pour soup mixture on top.
Put onion rings on top.
Bake at 375° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Potato Hamburger Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, hamburger, cream of mushroom soup, milk, onion, onion rings. Instructions: Brown hamburger and onion. Drain. Heat milk and soup until smooth. Put hamburger and potatoes in casserole. Pour soup mixture on top. Put onion rings on top. Bake at 375° for 1 hour.

title: Hamburger And Potato Hot Dish
instructions: In a casserole or small roaster, place hamburger.
Add potatoes and soups.
Bake at 350° about 1 hour until potatoes are done.
text: Recipe: Hamburger And Potato Hot Dish. Ingredients: hamburger, potatoes, vegetable beef soup, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: In a casserole or small roaster, place hamburger. Add potatoes and soups. Bake at 350° about 1 hour until potatoes are done.

title: Herbed Potato Wedges
instructions: Scrub potatoes, then cut into 8 wedges.
Using an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish, melt the butter in microwave, using full power 45 to 60 seconds.
Stir in herbs and salt to taste.
Add potatoes, coat with mixture.
Cover with plastic wrap.
Cook on High 8 to 10 minutes or until tender.
Season to taste.
text: Recipe: Herbed Potato Wedges. Ingredients: potatoes, butter, dried basil, onion. Instructions: Scrub potatoes, then cut into 8 wedges. Using an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish, melt the butter in microwave, using full power 45 to 60 seconds. Stir in herbs and salt to taste. Add potatoes, coat with mixture. Cover with plastic wrap. Cook on High 8 to 10 minutes or until tender. Season to taste.

title: Beef And Potato Casserole
instructions: Brown meat; season. Peel and slice potatoes thin. In a casserole, put a layer of beef, then layer of potatoes.
Sprinkle onions and cheese; repeat layers. Pour soup over all. Bake at 400° (high) until potatoes are done.
text: Recipe: Beef And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: ground beef, potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, grated cheese, onion. Instructions: Brown meat; season. Peel and slice potatoes thin. In a casserole, put a layer of beef, then layer of potatoes. Sprinkle onions and cheese; repeat layers. Pour soup over all. Bake at 400° (high) until potatoes are done.

title: Cheese Sausage Ball
instructions: Melt cheese in a double boiler; add sausage and mix well. Pour into a large mixing bowl; add Bisquick (mix well with hands if needed).
Roll into small balls (3/4-inch diameter).
Bake at 350° for 15 to 20 minutes.
Serves 12.
text: Recipe: Cheese Sausage Ball. Ingredients: Cheddar cheese, hot sausage, buttermilk Bisquick. Instructions: Melt cheese in a double boiler; add sausage and mix well. Pour into a large mixing bowl; add Bisquick (mix well with hands if needed). Roll into small balls (3/4-inch diameter). Bake at 350° for 15 to 20 minutes. Serves 12.

title: Zucchini Sausage Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°.
In large skillet, brown sausage, breaking into small pieces.
Drain.
Toss with 1 tablespoon flour; spread on bottom of 11 x 7-inch baking dish.
In same skillet, cook zucchini and onion in butter until tender, but not brown. Remove from heat; toss with remaining flour.
Spoon half the zucchini mixture over meat.
text: Recipe: Zucchini Sausage Bake. Ingredients: Italian sausage, flour, zucchini, onion, butter, cottage cheese, Parmesan and Romano cheese, eggs, garlic salt, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. In large skillet, brown sausage, breaking into small pieces. Drain. Toss with 1 tablespoon flour; spread on bottom of 11 x 7-inch baking dish. In same skillet, cook zucchini and onion in butter until tender, but not brown. Remove from heat; toss with remaining flour. Spoon half the zucchini mixture over meat.

title: Potato Gratin With Boursin Cheese
instructions: Butter a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
Stir cream and cheese in large saucepan over medium heat until melted and smooth. Arrange 1/2 of potatoes in overlapping rows.
Season with salt and pepper.
Pour over 1/2 of the cheese mixture.
Arrange rest of potatoes; season with salt and pepper and rest of cheese.
Bake at 400° for 1 hour until top is golden and potatoes are tender. Sprinkle with parsley.
Makes 8 servings.
text: Recipe: Potato Gratin With Boursin Cheese. Ingredients: whipping cream, Boursin cheese with herbs, red new potatoes, parsley. Instructions: Butter a 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Stir cream and cheese in large saucepan over medium heat until melted and smooth. Arrange 1/2 of potatoes in overlapping rows. Season with salt and pepper. Pour over 1/2 of the cheese mixture. Arrange rest of potatoes; season with salt and pepper and rest of cheese. Bake at 400° for 1 hour until top is golden and potatoes are tender. Sprinkle with parsley. Makes 8 servings.

title: Easy Rice Dish
instructions: Mix; bake in casserole dish at 350° until done.
text: Recipe: Easy Rice Dish. Ingredients: Campbell's onion soup, beef bouillon, rice, butter. Instructions: Mix; bake in casserole dish at 350° until done.

title: Creamy Cheesy Potatoes
instructions: Mix the ingredients and place in a large casserole dish.
Bake at 375° for 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Creamy Cheesy Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, butter, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix the ingredients and place in a large casserole dish. Bake at 375° for 45 minutes.

title: Herbed Potato Crackers With Cheese(Yields 8 Servings)
instructions: Heat oven to 375°.
Brush baking sheet with some melted butter.
With a very sharp knife or a mandoline slicer, thinly cut one unpeeled potato lengthwise into about 24 (1/16-inch thick) slices.
Arrange potato slices on buttered baking sheet and brush top of each with some melted butter.
Place one or two parsley leaves on each potato slice.
Thinly slice remaining potato; place one slice to cover parsley.
Brush top with melted butter.
Bake potato crackers 10 minutes; turn over and bake until golden brown and crisp, about 10 minutes longer.
Arrange crackers on serving plates.
Top each with some goat cheese or cottage cheese spread and serve.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Herbed Potato Crackers With Cheese(Yields 8 Servings)  . Ingredients: butter, baking potatoes, flat-leaf Italian parsley, goat cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 375°. Brush baking sheet with some melted butter. With a very sharp knife or a mandoline slicer, thinly cut one unpeeled potato lengthwise into about 24 (1/16-inch thick) slices. Arrange potato slices on buttered baking sheet and brush top of each with some melted butter. Place one or two parsley leaves on each potato slice. Thinly slice remaining potato; place one slice to cover parsley. Brush top with melted butter. Bake potato crackers 10 minutes; turn over and bake until golden brown and crisp, about 10 minutes longer. Arrange crackers on serving plates. Top each with some goat cheese or cottage cheese spread and serve. Enjoy!

title: Rice Krispy Treats
instructions: In large bowl, microwave butterscotch morsels for 1 1/2 minutes.
Turn bowl and microwave for 1 more minute.
Stir softened morsels and add peanut butter.
When thoroughly mixed, add Rice Krispies gradually.
Press into a 9 x 13-inch pan and refrigerate for about an hour.
Cut into 2-inch squares.
text: Recipe: Rice Krispy Treats. Ingredients: butterscotch morsels, peanut butter, Rice Krispies. Instructions: In large bowl, microwave butterscotch morsels for 1 1/2 minutes. Turn bowl and microwave for 1 more minute. Stir softened morsels and add peanut butter. When thoroughly mixed, add Rice Krispies gradually. Press into a 9 x 13-inch pan and refrigerate for about an hour. Cut into 2-inch squares.

title: Chicken-Rice Oven Dish
instructions: Mix soups and rice; spread in large, flat pan or glass dish. Melt
butter.
Dip chicken in butter; lay on top of rice mixture. Dribble remaining butter on top.
Bake 2 hours in 350° oven.
text: Recipe: Chicken-Rice Oven Dish. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, cream of celery soup, long cooking rice, chicken, butter. Instructions: Mix soups and rice; spread in large, flat pan or glass dish. Melt butter. Dip chicken in butter; lay on top of rice mixture. Dribble remaining butter on top. Bake 2 hours in 350° oven.

title: Green Onion-Cheese Spread
instructions: Beat cream cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth; gradually add milk, beating until light and fluffy.
Stir in green onions.
Cover and chill up to 2 days.
Serve with crackers.
Yields 2 1/2 cups.
text: Recipe: Green Onion-Cheese Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, milk, green onions. Instructions: Beat cream cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth; gradually add milk, beating until light and fluffy. Stir in green onions. Cover and chill up to 2 days. Serve with crackers. Yields 2 1/2 cups.

title: Croutons Or Bread Crumbs
instructions: Cut bread into cubes.
Place in a single layer on paper towel in microwave.
Heat uncovered in microwave 1 to 2 minutes on High. Rearrange once.
Let stand 5 minutes.
During standing time, bread will completely dry.
text: Recipe: Croutons Or Bread Crumbs. Ingredients: bread. Instructions: Cut bread into cubes. Place in a single layer on paper towel in microwave. Heat uncovered in microwave 1 to 2 minutes on High. Rearrange once. Let stand 5 minutes. During standing time, bread will completely dry.

title: Chicken Broccoli Casserole
instructions: Wash and season chicken breast and place in a long rectangular baking dish.
Lay onions on top of chicken, mix soups together and spread on top and add cheese.
Prepare stuffing as per directions and lay on
top (layer everything).
Bake in a 325° oven for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Chicken Broccoli Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breast, onion, cream of broccoli soup, cream of chicken soup, Cheddar cheese, milk. Instructions: Wash and season chicken breast and place in a long rectangular baking dish. Lay onions on top of chicken, mix soups together and spread on top and add cheese. Prepare stuffing as per directions and lay on top (layer everything). Bake in a 325° oven for 45 minutes to 1 hour. Enjoy.

title: Aunt Beatrice'S Dumplings
instructions: Mix flour and eggs with enough milk to make a stiff dough. Knead a few times and roll dough very thin.
Cut into strips and break into small pieces when dropping into broth.
Cook until tender.
text: Recipe: Aunt Beatrice'S Dumplings. Ingredients: flour, eggs, milk. Instructions: Mix flour and eggs with enough milk to make a stiff dough. Knead a few times and roll dough very thin. Cut into strips and break into small pieces when dropping into broth. Cook until tender.

title: Hot Cheese Puffs
instructions: Cream the cheese spread, margarine and egg with a mixer.
Cut small circles of bread with 2-inch biscuit cutter.
(You'll have 70 circles.)
Spread cheese on bottom circle, then place second circle of bread on top and spread it with cheese mixture.
Brown at 350° for 10 minutes.
Delicious!!
text: Recipe: Hot Cheese Puffs. Ingredients: English cheese spread, butter, egg, white bread. Instructions: Cream the cheese spread, margarine and egg with a mixer. Cut small circles of bread with 2-inch biscuit cutter. (You'll have 70 circles.) Spread cheese on bottom circle, then place second circle of bread on top and spread it with cheese mixture. Brown at 350° for 10 minutes. Delicious!!

title: Ham And Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Cut ham and cheese in small pieces about the size of roll. Use about 3 packages of ready to serve rolls of 24 to a package.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: ham, Swiss cheese. Instructions: Cut ham and cheese in small pieces about the size of roll. Use about 3 packages of ready to serve rolls of 24 to a package.

title: Chicken And Noodles
instructions: Stew chicken and debone, reserving broth.
Cook noodles in broth to which soup has been added (undiluted), according to directions on package.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Noodles. Ingredients: chicken, cream of chicken soup, egg noodles. Instructions: Stew chicken and debone, reserving broth. Cook noodles in broth to which soup has been added (undiluted), according to directions on package.

title: Carol'S Chicken Casserole
instructions: Combine
soups and broth; set aside.
Place 1 box of dry stuffing mix in bottom of 9 x 13-inch casserole dish. Place
half the cubed chicken and half the soup/broth mixture. Repeat. Bake until bubbly, about 45 minutes in a 375° oven. Suitable for large group as it serves several.
text: Recipe: Carol'S Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, Campbell's cream, Campbell's cream, chicken broth, chicken-flavored. Instructions: Combine soups and broth; set aside. Place 1 box of dry stuffing mix in bottom of 9 x 13-inch casserole dish. Place half the cubed chicken and half the soup/broth mixture. Repeat. Bake until bubbly, about 45 minutes in a 375° oven. Suitable for large group as it serves several.

title: Ham Cheese Ball
instructions: Chop onions and ham.
Put to the side. Work cream cheese well. Add onions, ham and garlic salt.
Mix real well. The block cheese will make a ball better.
Mold the mixture into a ball and refrigerate.
Serve as a snack or appetizer with crackers or chips.
text: Recipe: Ham Cheese Ball. Ingredients: cream cheese, ham, green onions, garlic salt. Instructions: Chop onions and ham. Put to the side. Work cream cheese well. Add onions, ham and garlic salt. Mix real well. The block cheese will make a ball better. Mold the mixture into a ball and refrigerate. Serve as a snack or appetizer with crackers or chips.

title: Creamy Green Onion Spread
instructions: Mix all ingredients together and serve with crackers.
text: Recipe: Creamy Green Onion Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, milk, green onions. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together and serve with crackers.

title: Cheddar Or Mozzarella Cheese Bread
instructions: Thaw the white bread; spread it out.
Put cheese, garlic and onion evenly over the bread.
Roll it up.
Butter the top; sprinkle with Romano cheese.
Bake at 350° for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheddar Or Mozzarella Cheese Bread. Ingredients: white bread, either cheese, onion salt, garlic, Romano cheese. Instructions: Thaw the white bread; spread it out. Put cheese, garlic and onion evenly over the bread. Roll it up. Butter the top; sprinkle with Romano cheese. Bake at 350° for 20 minutes.

title: Brauer'S Sausage Cakes(A Southern Recipe)
instructions: Take approximately 1/2 loaf of white bread and break into pieces.
Take 3/4 of the package of sausage and tear into small pieces.
Take the eggs, crack and put in mixing bowl.
Add the bread and hunks of sausage and mix.
Add some milk every so often. Form into 4 to 5 cakes (looks like large hamburgers) and fry in large skillet with butter until golden brown.
Serve with fresh applesauce and cinnamon rolls.
text: Recipe: Brauer'S Sausage Cakes(A Southern Recipe)  . Ingredients: milk, country sausage, eggs, sweet butter, white bread. Instructions: Take approximately 1/2 loaf of white bread and break into pieces. Take 3/4 of the package of sausage and tear into small pieces. Take the eggs, crack and put in mixing bowl. Add the bread and hunks of sausage and mix. Add some milk every so often. Form into 4 to 5 cakes (looks like large hamburgers) and fry in large skillet with butter until golden brown. Serve with fresh applesauce and cinnamon rolls.

title: Easy Chicken Corn Chowder
instructions: In a large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Lower heat and simmer briefly. Makes four servings.
text: Recipe: Easy Chicken Corn Chowder. Ingredients: cream of potato soup, cream-style, chicken, milk, chicken bouillon cube. Instructions: In a large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Lower heat and simmer briefly. Makes four servings.

title: Ham And Cheese Roll Ups
instructions: Spread cream cheese on ham slices.
Roll ham up; cut diagonally into 1-1/2 inch sections.
Secure with toothpicks.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cheese Roll Ups. Ingredients: ham slices, cream cheese. Instructions: Spread cream cheese on ham slices. Roll ham up; cut diagonally into 1-1/2 inch sections. Secure with toothpicks.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Take 2 slices bread and butter one side of each.
Put one piece of the bread buttered side down onto a hot griddle.
Put a slice of cheese on top of bread and put the other piece of bread, buttered side up, on top of cheese.
Let bottom get light or golden brown.
Turn and do the same to other side.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: cheese, bread, butter. Instructions: Take 2 slices bread and butter one side of each. Put one piece of the bread buttered side down onto a hot griddle. Put a slice of cheese on top of bread and put the other piece of bread, buttered side up, on top of cheese. Let bottom get light or golden brown. Turn and do the same to other side.

title: Chicken Potato Corn Chowder
instructions: In large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to boil over medium heat.
Stir occasionally.
Makes 4 servings; contains 281 calories per serving.
text: Recipe: Chicken Potato Corn Chowder. Ingredients: cream of potato soup, chicken, milk, cream-style, chicken bouillon. Instructions: In large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to boil over medium heat. Stir occasionally. Makes 4 servings; contains 281 calories per serving.

title: Onion Cheese Casserole
instructions: Saute onions in butter until transparent.
Place in buttered casserole; sprinkle with cheese.
Do not mix.
Mix soup with milk; pour over cheeses and onions.
May stick buttered slices of French bread around sides.
Bake at 350° for 30 to 40 minutes.
text: Recipe: Onion Cheese Casserole. Ingredients: red onions, butter, grated cheese, grated cheese, cream of chicken soup, milk. Instructions: Saute onions in butter until transparent. Place in buttered casserole; sprinkle with cheese. Do not mix. Mix soup with milk; pour over cheeses and onions. May stick buttered slices of French bread around sides. Bake at 350° for 30 to 40 minutes.

title: Spinach Cheese Pie
instructions: Combine ingredients.
Put in pie crust shell (Pillsbury preformed sheets are excellent for the top; deep dish shell for bottom).
Prepare crust top with design of choice (we make leaves with trimmings), being sure to cut out a center hole and other cuts for steam release.
Baste the entire shell top with egg yolk.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour (plus 15 minutes, depending upon oven temperature).
Rebaste after 45 minutes.
Serve cool.
Yields 12 average servings.
text: Recipe: Spinach Cheese Pie. Ingredients: eggs, Mozzarella, Ricotta, hot Italian sausage, garlic, egg yolk. Instructions: Combine ingredients. Put in pie crust shell (Pillsbury preformed sheets are excellent for the top; deep dish shell for bottom). Prepare crust top with design of choice (we make leaves with trimmings), being sure to cut out a center hole and other cuts for steam release. Baste the entire shell top with egg yolk. Bake at 350° for 1 hour (plus 15 minutes, depending upon oven temperature). Rebaste after 45 minutes. Serve cool. Yields 12 average servings.

title: Fried Green Tomatoes Or Eggplant
instructions: Peel eggplant or cut off ends of green tomatoes; cut into thin slices.
Soak eggplant for 10 minutes in salted water.
Dip in egg; roll in flour.
Fry in hot oil in skillet until brown.
Drain on absorbent paper; serve.
text: Recipe: Fried Green Tomatoes Or Eggplant. Ingredients: green tomatoes, egg, flour. Instructions: Peel eggplant or cut off ends of green tomatoes; cut into thin slices. Soak eggplant for 10 minutes in salted water. Dip in egg; roll in flour. Fry in hot oil in skillet until brown. Drain on absorbent paper; serve.

title: Hot Ham And Cheese Spread
instructions: Mix cream cheese, Cheddar cheese and ham until well blended. Spoon into ovenproof crock or bowl. Bake at 350° for 20 to 25 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned. Serve warm as a spread with crackers. Makes 2 cups.
text: Recipe: Hot Ham And Cheese Spread. Ingredients: Philadelphia cream cheese, Cheddar cheese, ham. Instructions: Mix cream cheese, Cheddar cheese and ham until well blended. Spoon into ovenproof crock or bowl. Bake at 350° for 20 to 25 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned. Serve warm as a spread with crackers. Makes 2 cups.

title: Sliced Baked Potatoes(Microwave)
instructions: Slice potatoes 3/4 way through.
text: Recipe: Sliced Baked Potatoes(Microwave)  . Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter, parsley, grated cheese. Instructions: Slice potatoes 3/4 way through.

title: French Onion Drop Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Combine flour, butter, dip, and milk.
Mix well and drop from tablespoon onto greased baking sheet.
Bake about 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Immediately after removing biscuits from oven, brush tops with butter.
text: Recipe: French Onion Drop Biscuits. Ingredients: flour, butter, onion, milk, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Combine flour, butter, dip, and milk. Mix well and drop from tablespoon onto greased baking sheet. Bake about 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Immediately after removing biscuits from oven, brush tops with butter.

title: Potato Cheese Puffs
instructions: Mix potatoes, egg, onion and flour well.
Spoon out enough mixture for a 3/4-inch ball; place a 3/8-inch cube of cheese inside and work into a ball. Use extra flour to keep outside smooth.
Deep fry until golden brown; drain on paper towels and serve.
text: Recipe: Potato Cheese Puffs. Ingredients: leftover mashed potatoes, egg, onion, cheese, flour. Instructions: Mix potatoes, egg, onion and flour well. Spoon out enough mixture for a 3/4-inch ball; place a 3/8-inch cube of cheese inside and work into a ball. Use extra flour to keep outside smooth. Deep fry until golden brown; drain on paper towels and serve.

title: Barbecued Meatballs
instructions: Mix and shape ingredients into balls, then brown on all sides in a large skillet.
Place meatballs in foil lined pan and pour the following sauce over them.
text: Recipe: Barbecued Meatballs. Ingredients: hamburger, onion, hamburger, eggs. Instructions: Mix and shape ingredients into balls, then brown on all sides in a large skillet. Place meatballs in foil lined pan and pour the following sauce over them.

title: Breakfast Fried Rice(Serves 4)
instructions: Fry corned beef in a large frying pan over medium heat, stirring occasionally until all fat nodules disappear.
Then remove from pan.
Saute garlic and green onions in the corned beef liquid until all onion is glossy, then remove and add to corned beef.
Add butter/oil to the pan, then scramble the eggs in the butter/oil. Then, when cooked to your taste, remove from the pan.
text: Recipe: Breakfast Fried Rice(Serves 4)  . Ingredients: rice, green onions, garlic, butter, corned beef, eggs, onion. Instructions: Fry corned beef in a large frying pan over medium heat, stirring occasionally until all fat nodules disappear. Then remove from pan. Saute garlic and green onions in the corned beef liquid until all onion is glossy, then remove and add to corned beef. Add butter/oil to the pan, then scramble the eggs in the butter/oil. Then, when cooked to your taste, remove from the pan.

title: Pork Sausage Topping For Baked Potato
instructions: Cook meat and onion until browned.
Drain.
Add remaining ingredients and heat thoroughly.
text: Recipe: Pork Sausage Topping For Baked Potato. Ingredients: ground pork sausage, ground pork, onion, cream cheese, milk. Instructions: Cook meat and onion until browned. Drain. Add remaining ingredients and heat thoroughly.

title: Hamburger And Potato Casserole
instructions: Brown hamburger.
Add soup and desired amount of potatoes. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are done.
text: Recipe: Hamburger And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: hamburger, potatoes, vegetable beef soup. Instructions: Brown hamburger. Add soup and desired amount of potatoes. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are done.

title: Deviled Ham Cheese Ball
instructions: Cream together Philadelphia cream cheese, celery and garlic salt, parsley flakes and deviled ham.
Stir in Cheddar cheese.
Set in refrigerator until almost hard.
Shape into ball or use mold. If mold is used, grease pan and line with pecans.
Spoon mixture in, then refrigerate until firm.
If shaped into ball, roll the ball into chopped nuts.
text: Recipe: Deviled Ham Cheese Ball. Ingredients: Philadelphia cream cheese, ham, onion, garlic salt, celery salt, parsley flakes, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Cream together Philadelphia cream cheese, celery and garlic salt, parsley flakes and deviled ham. Stir in Cheddar cheese. Set in refrigerator until almost hard. Shape into ball or use mold. If mold is used, grease pan and line with pecans. Spoon mixture in, then refrigerate until firm. If shaped into ball, roll the ball into chopped nuts.

title: Sausage Gravy And Biscuits
instructions: Saute the sausage; crumble.
Drain all fat.
Make a white sauce of the butter or margarine, flour and milk.
Combine with sausage; heat together.
Add more milk for a thinner sauce.
Bake the prepared biscuit dough according to package.
Break biscuits open; put sausage gravy on top.
Serve with spiced peaches on side.
text: Recipe: Sausage Gravy And Biscuits. Ingredients: sausage, butter, flour, milk. Instructions: Saute the sausage; crumble. Drain all fat. Make a white sauce of the butter or margarine, flour and milk. Combine with sausage; heat together. Add more milk for a thinner sauce. Bake the prepared biscuit dough according to package. Break biscuits open; put sausage gravy on top. Serve with spiced peaches on side.

title: Cheese Potato Casserole
instructions: Boil potatoes with skins on.
Cool, peel and dice; set aside. In large pan, melt butter.
Turn off heat.
Add green onions, sour cream, chicken soup and grated cheese; mix well.
Add potatoes. Put in a 2 1/2-quart baking dish.
Top with crushed potato chips. Bake at 350° for 25 to 30 minutes, until hot throughout.
Can be made a day ahead and kept in refrigerator.
Serves 8 to 10.
text: Recipe: Cheese Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, green onions, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, grated cheese, butter, potato chips. Instructions: Boil potatoes with skins on. Cool, peel and dice; set aside. In large pan, melt butter. Turn off heat. Add green onions, sour cream, chicken soup and grated cheese; mix well. Add potatoes. Put in a 2 1/2-quart baking dish. Top with crushed potato chips. Bake at 350° for 25 to 30 minutes, until hot throughout. Can be made a day ahead and kept in refrigerator. Serves 8 to 10.

title: Sausage And Potato Casserole
instructions: Boil potatoes until tender; peel and slice.
Cut cheese into 1-inch cubes.
In casserole dish, put layer of potatoes, sausage and cheese until all ingredients are used, ending with cheese. Pour 1/2 cup of milk over casserole.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, sausage, Velveeta cheese, milk. Instructions: Boil potatoes until tender; peel and slice. Cut cheese into 1-inch cubes. In casserole dish, put layer of potatoes, sausage and cheese until all ingredients are used, ending with cheese. Pour 1/2 cup of milk over casserole. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Crab Cheese Ball
instructions: Mix ingredients together and refrigerate for 1/2 hour.
text: Recipe: Crab Cheese Ball. Ingredients: Cream Cheese. Instructions: Mix ingredients together and refrigerate for 1/2 hour.

title: Potato Dumplings (Potet Klub)
instructions: Mix grated potato well with flour and salt.
They may turn dark, but that's okay.
Brown or cook meat and onion.
Mix well.
text: Recipe: Potato Dumplings (Potet Klub). Ingredients: potatoes, onion, flour, ham. Instructions: Mix grated potato well with flour and salt. They may turn dark, but that's okay. Brown or cook meat and onion. Mix well.

title: Pork Chop And Potato Casserole
instructions: Slice potatoes and onions.
Place a layer of potatoes, then a layer of onions.
Continue alternating layers until desired amount is needed.
Lay the pork chops on the top layer.
Spread cream of chicken soup directly from can over top of pork chops.
Cook for 1 hour at 400°.
(Preheat oven.)
text: Recipe: Pork Chop And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, onions, pork chops, Campbell's cream. Instructions: Slice potatoes and onions. Place a layer of potatoes, then a layer of onions. Continue alternating layers until desired amount is needed. Lay the pork chops on the top layer. Spread cream of chicken soup directly from can over top of pork chops. Cook for 1 hour at 400°. (Preheat oven.)

title: Cheese-Eggplant Casserole
instructions: Peel eggplant; cut into 1-inch cubes.
Cook in boiling salted water for 5 minutes; drain.
Add cheese; mix gently until cheese melts.
Add butter; mix, then add rest of ingredients.
Place in a greased baking dish.
Bake for 30 minutes at 350°.
text: Recipe: Cheese-Eggplant Casserole. Ingredients: eggplant, egg, tomatoes, butter, onion, bread crumbs, grated cheese. Instructions: Peel eggplant; cut into 1-inch cubes. Cook in boiling salted water for 5 minutes; drain. Add cheese; mix gently until cheese melts. Add butter; mix, then add rest of ingredients. Place in a greased baking dish. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°.

title: Party Meat Ball (Barbecue)
instructions: Mix all together.
Form small meat balls.
Bake on cookie sheet at 375° for 25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Party Meat Ball (Barbecue). Ingredients: ground beef, bread crumbs, milk, onion soup mix, eggs. Instructions: Mix all together. Form small meat balls. Bake on cookie sheet at 375° for 25 minutes.

title: Chicken And Potato Casserole
instructions: Place thinly sliced
potatoes
in greased square baking pan. Top with chicken
and
onion.
Combine soup and milk and pour in baking pan.
Cover
and
bake
at 375° for 45 minutes. Remove cover and bake another 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, chicken, onion, cream of mushroom soup, milk. Instructions: Place thinly sliced potatoes in greased square baking pan. Top with chicken and onion. Combine soup and milk and pour in baking pan. Cover and bake at 375° for 45 minutes. Remove cover and bake another 15 minutes.

title: Grilled Cheese Loaf
instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and butter.
Add cheese, onions, garlic salt; mix well.
Spread on both sides of each slice of bread.
Wrap loaf in a large piece of heavy duty foil.
Seal tightly.
Grill, covered over medium coals for 8 - 10 minutes turning once.
Unwrap foil; grill 5 minutes longer.
Yield 10 -12 servings.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Loaf. Ingredients: cream cheese, butter, mozzarella cheese, green onion, garlic, bread. Instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and butter. Add cheese, onions, garlic salt; mix well. Spread on both sides of each slice of bread. Wrap loaf in a large piece of heavy duty foil. Seal tightly. Grill, covered over medium coals for 8 - 10 minutes turning once. Unwrap foil; grill 5 minutes longer. Yield 10 -12 servings.

title: Swiss Chicken Casserole
instructions: Arrange chicken breasts in a lightly greased 12 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
Top with cheese slices.
Combine soup and milk; stir well.
Spoon sauce over chicken; sprinkle with stuffing mix. Drizzle butter over crumbs.
Cover and bake at 350° for 50 minutes.
Yield: 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Swiss Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, Swiss cheese, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, milk, butter. Instructions: Arrange chicken breasts in a lightly greased 12 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish. Top with cheese slices. Combine soup and milk; stir well. Spoon sauce over chicken; sprinkle with stuffing mix. Drizzle butter over crumbs. Cover and bake at 350° for 50 minutes. Yield: 6 servings.

title: Sausage-Potato Casserole
instructions: Mix potatoes according to boxes and put together in one 9 x 13-inch pan (ungreased).
Add sausages and bake according to box. Let set 5 minutes to thicken and serve.
text: Recipe: Sausage-Potato Casserole. Ingredients: gratin potatoes, potatoes, sausage mini. Instructions: Mix potatoes according to boxes and put together in one 9 x 13-inch pan (ungreased). Add sausages and bake according to box. Let set 5 minutes to thicken and serve.

title: Sausage Cheese Balls
instructions: Mix Bisquick flour and shredded cheese together until well blended.
Add sausage to mixture; mix well.
Make teaspoon size balls.
Place them on an ungreased sheet pan.
Bake for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
Soak with paper towels, then serve.
text: Recipe: Sausage Cheese Balls. Ingredients: Bisquick flour, shredded cheese, pork sausage. Instructions: Mix Bisquick flour and shredded cheese together until well blended. Add sausage to mixture; mix well. Make teaspoon size balls. Place them on an ungreased sheet pan. Bake for 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Soak with paper towels, then serve.

title: Cheesy Tomato Chicken Breasts
instructions: Melt 3 tablespoons butter.
Put chicken in baking pan, turning to coat chicken with butter.
Mix onion, tomatoes, paste, basil and garlic.
Pour over chicken and bake at 350° for 40 minutes. Mix bread crumbs, parsley, 3 tablespoons butter and cheese.
Pour the cheese mixture over the chicken and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Tomato Chicken Breasts. Ingredients: butter, onion, tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, garlic, chicken breasts, bread crumbs, fresh parsley, butter, Mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Melt 3 tablespoons butter. Put chicken in baking pan, turning to coat chicken with butter. Mix onion, tomatoes, paste, basil and garlic. Pour over chicken and bake at 350° for 40 minutes. Mix bread crumbs, parsley, 3 tablespoons butter and cheese. Pour the cheese mixture over the chicken and bake for an additional 5 minutes.

title: Egg, Cheese, Potato Casserole
instructions: Boil eggs and potatoes until done.
Peel the skin off of the potatoes.
Take the shells off the eggs.
Slice eggs and potatoes. Make a layer of potatoes, then a layer of eggs, then a layer of cheese.
Keep doing this until the casserole dish is full.
Pour white sauce made of butter, flour and milk over dish.
Bake in oven at 350° until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Egg, Cheese, Potato Casserole. Ingredients: eggs, potatoes, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Boil eggs and potatoes until done. Peel the skin off of the potatoes. Take the shells off the eggs. Slice eggs and potatoes. Make a layer of potatoes, then a layer of eggs, then a layer of cheese. Keep doing this until the casserole dish is full. Pour white sauce made of butter, flour and milk over dish. Bake in oven at 350° until cheese is melted.

title: Sour Cream Potato Casserole
instructions: Saute onion in melted butter.
Add soup, sour cream and cheese.
Stir in potatoes and top with bread crumbs.
Bake 45 minutes at 350°.
text: Recipe: Sour Cream Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, green onions, butter, sour cream, Cheddar cheese, buttered bread crumbs. Instructions: Saute onion in melted butter. Add soup, sour cream and cheese. Stir in potatoes and top with bread crumbs. Bake 45 minutes at 350°.

title: Stuffed Meat Loaf Squares And Parmesan Potatoes
instructions: Heat oven to 375°.
Have two 8-inch square baking dishes ready.
Mix beef, bread crumbs, 1/3 of the ketchup, the milk and egg in a large bowl until blended.
Pat 1/2 of the mixture into the bottom of one baking dish.
Sprinkle with layer of spinach, then cheese.
Pat remaining meat mixture on top, then add the rest of the ketchup.
Meanwhile, put butter in the other baking dish and place in oven, 1 to 2 minutes until melted.
