Remove from oven. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise.
Dip cut side of potatoes into butter, then press into Parmesan.
Place cheese side up in baking dish.
Bake meat loaf and potatoes, side by side, 30 to 35 minutes until meat is no longer pink near center and potatoes are tender and golden brown on top.
Cut meat loaf into four squares.
text: Recipe: Stuffed Meat Loaf Squares And Parmesan Potatoes. Ingredients: lean ground beef, bread crumbs, tomato ketchup, milk, egg, spinach, Cheddar cheese, Parmesan potatoes, butter, baking potatoes, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 375°. Have two 8-inch square baking dishes ready. Mix beef, bread crumbs, 1/3 of the ketchup, the milk and egg in a large bowl until blended. Pat 1/2 of the mixture into the bottom of one baking dish. Sprinkle with layer of spinach, then cheese. Pat remaining meat mixture on top, then add the rest of the ketchup. Meanwhile, put butter in the other baking dish and place in oven, 1 to 2 minutes until melted. Remove from oven. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Dip cut side of potatoes into butter, then press into Parmesan. Place cheese side up in baking dish. Bake meat loaf and potatoes, side by side, 30 to 35 minutes until meat is no longer pink near center and potatoes are tender and golden brown on top. Cut meat loaf into four squares.

title: Easy Creamy Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Heat soup and milk just until well blended.
Arrange potatoes, onions and soup in layers in buttered casserole.
Cover and bake at 375° for 1 hour.
Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Easy Creamy Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, milk, onion. Instructions: Heat soup and milk just until well blended. Arrange potatoes, onions and soup in layers in buttered casserole. Cover and bake at 375° for 1 hour. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes.

title: Pork Chop-Potato Bake
instructions: Cook pork chops in frying pan for 15 minutes in oil or Pam. Combine soup and milk; pour over hash brown potatoes in casserole dish.
Top with pork chops, then fried onions.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Pork Chop-Potato Bake. Ingredients: pork chops, cream of celery soup, milk, hash brown potatoes, onions. Instructions: Cook pork chops in frying pan for 15 minutes in oil or Pam. Combine soup and milk; pour over hash brown potatoes in casserole dish. Top with pork chops, then fried onions. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Cheese And Mushroom Potatoes
instructions: Quarter potatoes and cook until tender.
In a casserole dish, place
a
layer
of
potatoes,
then a layer of cheese. Squeeze butter over this.
Add another layer of potatoes, more cheese
and butter.
Pour can of soup over this.
Bake at 350° for 20 to 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Mushroom Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cheese, butter, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: Quarter potatoes and cook until tender. In a casserole dish, place a layer of potatoes, then a layer of cheese. Squeeze butter over this. Add another layer of potatoes, more cheese and butter. Pour can of soup over this. Bake at 350° for 20 to 30 minutes.

title: Beef And Potato Pie
ingredients: loose pack frozen hash brown potatoes
instructions: Prepare pie crust mix according to package directions; roll out for 2 crust (10-inch) pie.
Line pie plate with pastry. Combine meat and soups.
Lightly pat into pastry-lined plate.
Top with potatoes.
Place slices of cheese on top.
Add crust; seal. Flute edge.
Cut design in top pastry.
Bake at 350° oven for about 1 hour or until browned.
Serve with warm catsup, if desired.
text: Recipe: Beef And Potato Pie. Ingredients: ground beef, onion soup, cream of mushroom soup, loose pack frozen hash brown potatoes, American cheese. Instructions: Prepare pie crust mix according to package directions; roll out for 2 crust (10-inch) pie. Line pie plate with pastry. Combine meat and soups. Lightly pat into pastry-lined plate. Top with potatoes. Place slices of cheese on top. Add crust; seal. Flute edge. Cut design in top pastry. Bake at 350° oven for about 1 hour or until browned. Serve with warm catsup, if desired.

title: Ham And Green Onion Cheese Ball
instructions: Mix ingredients together.
Let chill for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Ham And Green Onion Cheese Ball. Ingredients: cream cheese, boiled ham, green onions. Instructions: Mix ingredients together. Let chill for 1 hour.

title: Carrot Hot Dish
instructions: Mix in order given (layer).
Bake for 1/2 hour at 325°, uncovered.
Fresh carrots take longer.
text: Recipe: Carrot Hot Dish. Ingredients: carrots, cream of chicken soup, Cheddar cheese, bread. Instructions: Mix in order given (layer). Bake for 1/2 hour at 325°, uncovered. Fresh carrots take longer.

title: Chicken Rice Dinner
instructions: Put cut up chicken in buttered pan.
Salt.
Pour rice over chicken.
Pour soups and water over chicken and rice.
Cook, covered, at 350° until chicken is done.
text: Recipe: Chicken Rice Dinner. Ingredients: rice, cream of chicken soup, chicken. Instructions: Put cut up chicken in buttered pan. Salt. Pour rice over chicken. Pour soups and water over chicken and rice. Cook, covered, at 350° until chicken is done.

title: Scalloped Cheese Potatoes
instructions: Slice potatoes and place in baking dish.
Place soup over top of potatoes.
Dice cheese and butter and place on top; add milk. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender.
To speed up process, you can boil potatoes for 15 minutes and add ingredients, then microwave for 10 to 15 minutes until tender.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Cheese Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, Velveeta cheese, butter, milk. Instructions: Slice potatoes and place in baking dish. Place soup over top of potatoes. Dice cheese and butter and place on top; add milk. Bake at 350° for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender. To speed up process, you can boil potatoes for 15 minutes and add ingredients, then microwave for 10 to 15 minutes until tender.

title: Aunt Pearl'S Meatballs
instructions: Mix first 3 ingredients and form into balls (approximately 15).
Place meatballs into a 2-quart saucepan.
Add soup and bring to a boil.
Lower heat, cover and simmer 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Aunt Pearl'S Meatballs. Ingredients: ground beef, rice, onion, tomato soup. Instructions: Mix first 3 ingredients and form into balls (approximately 15). Place meatballs into a 2-quart saucepan. Add soup and bring to a boil. Lower heat, cover and simmer 1 hour.

title: Shoestring Hot Dish
instructions: Brown hamburger and onion.
Drain off fat.
Blend soup and milk.
Mix everything in 4-quart casserole.
Cover and bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.
Remove cover last 10 to 15 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Shoestring Hot Dish. Ingredients: hamburger, onion, cream of mushroom soup, milk. Instructions: Brown hamburger and onion. Drain off fat. Blend soup and milk. Mix everything in 4-quart casserole. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours. Remove cover last 10 to 15 minutes. Makes 6 servings.

title: Microwaved Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Slice potatoes and put in casserole dish. Blend soup, milk, onion and butter and pour over potatoes. Cook on High 19 to 24 minutes. Stir every 4 to 5 minutes and last 2 minutes, put cheese on top to melt. Cook, covered, but remove lid when cheese is added. Standing time 5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Microwaved Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, onion, potatoes, Velveeta cheese, milk, butter. Instructions: Slice potatoes and put in casserole dish. Blend soup, milk, onion and butter and pour over potatoes. Cook on High 19 to 24 minutes. Stir every 4 to 5 minutes and last 2 minutes, put cheese on top to melt. Cook, covered, but remove lid when cheese is added. Standing time 5 minutes.

title: Steamed Chinese Sausage With Potatoes
instructions: Put sliced potatoes in a shallow dish. Add sliced Chinese sausages on top of potatoes.
Set dish on a rack in a pan.
Pour boiling water in the pan to within 1-inch of the rack.
Cover and bring to boiling and steam 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Steamed Chinese Sausage With Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes. Instructions: Put sliced potatoes in a shallow dish. Add sliced Chinese sausages on top of potatoes. Set dish on a rack in a pan. Pour boiling water in the pan to within 1-inch of the rack. Cover and bring to boiling and steam 45 minutes.

title: Sausage And Potato Mix
instructions: In a crock-pot, layer the ingredients.
Cook 6 to 8 hours on low or 4 to 5 hours on high.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Potato Mix. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, cream of mushroom soup, potatoes, onion, cream of mushroom soup, sausage. Instructions: In a crock-pot, layer the ingredients. Cook 6 to 8 hours on low or 4 to 5 hours on high.

title: Zucchini Cheese Casserole
instructions: Parboil zucchini; drain well.
Saute garlic and onion in 2 tablespoons oil.
Beat together eggs, cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, parsley, spinach, garlic and onions.
text: Recipe: Zucchini Cheese Casserole. Ingredients: zucchini, garlic, onion, eggs, cheese, Parmesan cheese, fresh parsley, Mozzarella cheese, spaghetti sauce, bread crumbs. Instructions: Parboil zucchini; drain well. Saute garlic and onion in 2 tablespoons oil. Beat together eggs, cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, parsley, spinach, garlic and onions.

title: Butterfinger Pie
instructions: Mix whipped cream and 3 crushed Butterfinger candy bars.
Pour into graham cracker crust and freeze overnight.
text: Recipe: Butterfinger Pie. Ingredients: cream, Butterfinger, graham cracker crust. Instructions: Mix whipped cream and 3 crushed Butterfinger candy bars. Pour into graham cracker crust and freeze overnight.

title: Sausage Cheese Breakfast Casserole
instructions: Place slices of bread in bottom of a large 9 x 13-inch pan. Brown sausage and spread on top of bread.
Mix eggs, sour cream and milk.
Pour over sausage.
Top with cheese and onions.
Let stand overnight.
Bake at 350° for 25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Sausage Cheese Breakfast Casserole. Ingredients: bread, sausage, eggs, sour cream, amount of milk, cheese, onion. Instructions: Place slices of bread in bottom of a large 9 x 13-inch pan. Brown sausage and spread on top of bread. Mix eggs, sour cream and milk. Pour over sausage. Top with cheese and onions. Let stand overnight. Bake at 350° for 25 minutes.

title: Chicken-Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: In casserole dish, mix potatoes, soup and milk until well coated. Bake at 350° for 1
1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Chicken-Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, milk. Instructions: In casserole dish, mix potatoes, soup and milk until well coated. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.

title: Bow Tie Pasta With Sausage, Tomatoes And Cream
instructions: Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sausage and pepper flakes and cook for 7 minutes, breaking up sausage while doing so.
Add onion and garlic and cook 7 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add tomatoes and cream and simmer over low heat for about 4 minutes.
text: Recipe: Bow Tie Pasta With Sausage, Tomatoes And Cream. Ingredients: olive oil, sweet Italian sausage, red pepper, onion, garlic, Italian plum tomatoes, heavy cream, pasta, parsley, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage and pepper flakes and cook for 7 minutes, breaking up sausage while doing so. Add onion and garlic and cook 7 more minutes, stirring occasionally. Add tomatoes and cream and simmer over low heat for about 4 minutes.

title: Carrot Custard(For Babies)
instructions: Put all ingredients into blender and cover.
Run or whip until smooth.
Pour mixture into 4 small custard cups.
Place cups in shallow pan of hot water and bake at 350° for 35 minutes or until it is set.
text: Recipe: Carrot Custard(For Babies)  . Ingredients: carrots, milk, eggs. Instructions: Put all ingredients into blender and cover. Run or whip until smooth. Pour mixture into 4 small custard cups. Place cups in shallow pan of hot water and bake at 350° for 35 minutes or until it is set.

title: Chicken Corn Chowder
instructions: In large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Ladle into bowls and sprinkle with parsley flakes.
Makes 4 servings.
text: Recipe: Chicken Corn Chowder. Ingredients: chicken, cream of potato soup, cream-style, milk, chicken bouillon, parsley. Instructions: In large saucepan, stir all ingredients until well blended. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Ladle into bowls and sprinkle with parsley flakes. Makes 4 servings.

title: Rice-A-Roni Chicken Hot Dish
instructions: Follow directions on package to cook Rice-a-Roni with onion. Stir in the soups and chicken.
Bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan at 350° for 45 minutes or until brown.
text: Recipe: Rice-A-Roni Chicken Hot Dish. Ingredients: chicken flavored Rice, onion, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, chicken. Instructions: Follow directions on package to cook Rice-a-Roni with onion. Stir in the soups and chicken. Bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan at 350° for 45 minutes or until brown.

title: Potato And Chicken Casserole
instructions: Place as many breasts as desired in casserole dish.
Slice potatoes over them.
Cover with cream of mushroom soup.
Sprinkle dry onion soup mix over top.
Cover and bake at 350° for about 50 minutes or until done.
text: Recipe: Potato And Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup. Instructions: Place as many breasts as desired in casserole dish. Slice potatoes over them. Cover with cream of mushroom soup. Sprinkle dry onion soup mix over top. Cover and bake at 350° for about 50 minutes or until done.

title: Chicken Cheese Ball
instructions: Mix together and form ball.
Can be rolled in chopped nuts.
text: Recipe: Chicken Cheese Ball. Ingredients: cream cheese, Hormel chicken, onion. Instructions: Mix together and form ball. Can be rolled in chopped nuts.

title: Crunchy Onion Chicken
instructions: Crush onion pieces with a rolling pin on a large flat surface. Dip the chicken in the egg/milk mixture, then firmly coat with the crushed onion pieces.
Place the chicken in an ungreased baking pan and bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes.
text: Recipe: Crunchy Onion Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, onion, egg. Instructions: Crush onion pieces with a rolling pin on a large flat surface. Dip the chicken in the egg/milk mixture, then firmly coat with the crushed onion pieces. Place the chicken in an ungreased baking pan and bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Heat frying pan to 350 degrees till golden brown.
Butter both sides of each slice of bread.
Put one slice in pan and put cheese on top, then put bread on top of that.
Brown on both sides.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: bread, butter, cheese. Instructions: Heat frying pan to 350 degrees till golden brown. Butter both sides of each slice of bread. Put one slice in pan and put cheese on top, then put bread on top of that. Brown on both sides.

title: Butterfinger Pie
instructions: Let ice cream set out for a few minutes.
Add Cool Whip and Butterfingers (that have been crumbed).
Mix together and add to crust and put in freezer.
text: Recipe: Butterfinger Pie. Ingredients: cream, Butterfingers, graham cracker crusts. Instructions: Let ice cream set out for a few minutes. Add Cool Whip and Butterfingers (that have been crumbed). Mix together and add to crust and put in freezer.

title: Hamburg Potato Bake
instructions: Brown meat and onion lightly.
Grease casserole.
Place layer of potatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper; then layer of meat and repeat.
Pour heated soup over top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° for about one hour or until potatoes are done.
Can also be done at 225° for 2 to 3 hours.
text: Recipe: Hamburg Potato Bake. Ingredients: hamburg, onion, potatoes, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Brown meat and onion lightly. Grease casserole. Place layer of potatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper; then layer of meat and repeat. Pour heated soup over top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake at 350° for about one hour or until potatoes are done. Can also be done at 225° for 2 to 3 hours.

title: Creamy Green Onion Spread
instructions: In a small bowl beat cream cheese and milk until smooth.
Stir in onions.
Serve with crackers.
Makes 1 cup.
text: Recipe: Creamy Green Onion Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, milk, green onions. Instructions: In a small bowl beat cream cheese and milk until smooth. Stir in onions. Serve with crackers. Makes 1 cup.

title: Tomato Creamed Chipped Beef(Dried Beef)
instructions: Brown beef in water; add flour until brown.
Add milk to make a thick gravy.
Add tomatoes.
Cook slowly until well blended. Add eggs and cheese.
Serve on biscuits or English muffins.
Makes wonderful brunch served with scrambled eggs and fried apples. Serves 8.
text: Recipe: Tomato Creamed Chipped Beef(Dried Beef)  . Ingredients: dried beef, butter, flour, milk, tomatoes, eggs, cheese. Instructions: Brown beef in water; add flour until brown. Add milk to make a thick gravy. Add tomatoes. Cook slowly until well blended. Add eggs and cheese. Serve on biscuits or English muffins. Makes wonderful brunch served with scrambled eggs and fried apples. Serves 8.

title: Shredded Potato And Ham Pie
instructions: In a bowl combine eggs, vegetables, ham, 1 cup cheese, milk and onion.
Set aside.
Combine shredded potatoes and the 1/2 cup shredded cheese, press into bottom and sides of an ungreased 9-inch pie plate.
Pour filling into potato-lined pie plate.
Bake in 350° oven for 45 to 50 minutes or until center is set.
Let stand 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
(Makes 6 servings.)
text: Recipe: Shredded Potato And Ham Pie. Ingredients: eggs, carrots, beef, Cheddar cheese, milk, onion, potatoes, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: In a bowl combine eggs, vegetables, ham, 1 cup cheese, milk and onion. Set aside. Combine shredded potatoes and the 1/2 cup shredded cheese, press into bottom and sides of an ungreased 9-inch pie plate. Pour filling into potato-lined pie plate. Bake in 350° oven for 45 to 50 minutes or until center is set. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes before serving. (Makes 6 servings.)

title: Hamburger Delight
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. On stove top, mix ground beef, seasoning, onion and

tomatoes. Cook thoroughly. In 9 x 13-inch baking dish, line bottom with Cheddar cheese. Pour in beef mixture and spread evenly. Sprinkle Mozzarella cheese over top. Bake at 350° until golden brown (about 45 minutes).
text: Recipe: Hamburger Delight. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, tomatoes, Cheddar cheese, Mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. On stove top, mix ground beef, seasoning, onion and tomatoes. Cook thoroughly. In 9 x 13-inch baking dish, line bottom with Cheddar cheese. Pour in beef mixture and spread evenly. Sprinkle Mozzarella cheese over top. Bake at 350° until golden brown (about 45 minutes).

title: Oven Fried Chicken And Potatoes
instructions: Brown chicken and put in casserole dish.
Place peeled potatoes over the chicken.
Mix all the remaining ingredients and pour over chicken and potatoes.
Place in oven at 300° for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Oven Fried Chicken And Potatoes. Ingredients: chicken, chicken gravy mix, cream of chicken soup, celery, onion, potatoes, grated cheese. Instructions: Brown chicken and put in casserole dish. Place peeled potatoes over the chicken. Mix all the remaining ingredients and pour over chicken and potatoes. Place in oven at 300° for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.

title: Beef Stew(Tomato Gravy)
instructions: Brown meat in oil, in pan you are going to cook stew in. Drain grease and add tomato sauce (plus 1 & 1/2 cans water), carrots, onion, & potatoes that have been cut into cubes. Salt & pepper. Cook with lid at medium temp. until tender.
text: Recipe: Beef Stew(Tomato Gravy)  . Ingredients: stew beef, potatoes, Carrots, onion, tomato sauce. Instructions: Brown meat in oil, in pan you are going to cook stew in. Drain grease and add tomato sauce (plus 1 & 1/2 cans water), carrots, onion, & potatoes that have been cut into cubes. Salt & pepper. Cook with lid at medium temp. until tender.

title: Meat-Cheese Potato Casserole
instructions: Heat oven to 350°.
In saucepan heat cheese and milk, stirring constantly until sauce is smooth and creamy.
Remove from heat. Stir in other ingredients.
Pour into greased casserole dish. Cover and bake until hot through.
text: Recipe: Meat-Cheese Potato Casserole. Ingredients: shredded cheese, milk, potatoes, hamburger. Instructions: Heat oven to 350°. In saucepan heat cheese and milk, stirring constantly until sauce is smooth and creamy. Remove from heat. Stir in other ingredients. Pour into greased casserole dish. Cover and bake until hot through.

title: Easy Corn Chowder
instructions: Peel and cut potatoes into chunks.
Boil about 15 minutes. While potatoes are cooking, saute onion in butter or margarine. Drain potatoes and add onion, cream-style corn, milk and salt and pepper to taste.
text: Recipe: Easy Corn Chowder. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, cream-style corn, milk. Instructions: Peel and cut potatoes into chunks. Boil about 15 minutes. While potatoes are cooking, saute onion in butter or margarine. Drain potatoes and add onion, cream-style corn, milk and salt and pepper to taste.

title: Cottage Cheese Salad
instructions: Mix all ingredients together.
Serve with crackers or eat as a salad.
text: Recipe: Cottage Cheese Salad. Ingredients: cheese, tomatoes, purple onion. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together. Serve with crackers or eat as a salad.

title: Cheese-N-Spinach Casserole
instructions: Cook noodles and drain.
Combine cheeses, spinach and eggs. Combine cooked noodles with spaghetti sauce and place half of the noodles on bottom of 3-quart casserole dish.
Top noodles with mixture; top with remaining noodles.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Cover and bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheese-N-Spinach Casserole. Ingredients: wide egg noodles, Ricotta cheese, eggs, spaghetti sauce. Instructions: Cook noodles and drain. Combine cheeses, spinach and eggs. Combine cooked noodles with spaghetti sauce and place half of the noodles on bottom of 3-quart casserole dish. Top noodles with mixture; top with remaining noodles. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Cover and bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes.

title: Sausage Potato Bake
instructions: Slice sausage into bite size pieces.
Place in bottom of baking dish.
Slice potatoes thinly.
Place on top of sausage.
Use as many potatoes as desired.
Add enough water to dish to just about cover sausage.
Cover dish with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 1 hour.
Discard any remaining water in dish before storing leftovers in refrigerator.
text: Recipe: Sausage Potato Bake. Ingredients: sausage, potatoes. Instructions: Slice sausage into bite size pieces. Place in bottom of baking dish. Slice potatoes thinly. Place on top of sausage. Use as many potatoes as desired. Add enough water to dish to just about cover sausage. Cover dish with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 1 hour. Discard any remaining water in dish before storing leftovers in refrigerator.

title: Chicken Noodles
instructions: Boil chicken and onion until done; remove chicken from broth to cool.
Add garlic powder and noodles to boiling broth.
Cook until done.
Add soups, cheese and chicken meat.
Can add extra cheese, if desired.
Boil until thickened.
text: Recipe: Chicken Noodles. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup, Cheddar cheese sauce, wide egg noodles, chicken, onion, garlic. Instructions: Boil chicken and onion until done; remove chicken from broth to cool. Add garlic powder and noodles to boiling broth. Cook until done. Add soups, cheese and chicken meat. Can add extra cheese, if desired. Boil until thickened.

title: Scalloped Ham And Potatoes
instructions: Peel potatoes and cube.
Cut ham.
Add onions to ham and potatoes.
Cream flour and butter and add to milk when it is warm. Boil until creamy, then add to ham, potatoes and onion.
Mix well.
Place in casserole; sprinkle with cheese.
Bake for 30 minutes in 350° oven.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Ham And Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, ham, onions, flour, butter, milk. Instructions: Peel potatoes and cube. Cut ham. Add onions to ham and potatoes. Cream flour and butter and add to milk when it is warm. Boil until creamy, then add to ham, potatoes and onion. Mix well. Place in casserole; sprinkle with cheese. Bake for 30 minutes in 350° oven.

title: Pork Noodles
instructions: Brown pork chops, then steam until tender.
Remove bones and cube.
Chop onion and eggs, then place in separate containers. Cook egg noodles.
Drain and add bouillon, heating thoroughly. Spoon noodles and bouillon into serving dishes.
Top with the cubed pork, chopped eggs and onion.
text: Recipe: Pork Noodles. Ingredients: pork chops, eggs, onion, beef broth bouillon, egg noodles. Instructions: Brown pork chops, then steam until tender. Remove bones and cube. Chop onion and eggs, then place in separate containers. Cook egg noodles. Drain and add bouillon, heating thoroughly. Spoon noodles and bouillon into serving dishes. Top with the cubed pork, chopped eggs and onion.

title: Cheesy Chicken And Rice Dinner
instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned. Remove chicken. Add broth, 1/2 cup water and broccoli, stir, heat to a boil. Stir in rice and Velveeta. Top with chicken, cover and cook on low heat about 5 minutes or until cooked through. Gently stir until Velveeta is melted.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Chicken And Rice Dinner. Ingredients: chicken breast halves, condensed chicken broth, White Rice, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned. Remove chicken. Add broth, 1/2 cup water and broccoli, stir, heat to a boil. Stir in rice and Velveeta. Top with chicken, cover and cook on low heat about 5 minutes or until cooked through. Gently stir until Velveeta is melted.

title: Grilled Potatoes(Easy And Great For Summer Picnics)
instructions: Wash and pat dry potatoes.
Slice potatoes crosswise until 1/4-inch from bottom.
Put generous amount of butter between slices.
Sprinkle between slices with garlic salt, parsley and cheese. Wrap tightly in tinfoil.
Place on grill for 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Grilled Potatoes(Easy And Great For Summer Picnics)  . Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter, garlic, parsley, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Wash and pat dry potatoes. Slice potatoes crosswise until 1/4-inch from bottom. Put generous amount of butter between slices. Sprinkle between slices with garlic salt, parsley and cheese. Wrap tightly in tinfoil. Place on grill for 45 minutes.

title: Lo-Cal Sliced Potato Casserole
instructions: Place all ingredients, except parsley, in a covered casserole dish and bake at 350° for 30 minutes or until tender.
Sprinkle with parsley flakes.
Makes 6 servings.
One serving equals 75 calories.
text: Recipe: Lo-Cal Sliced Potato Casserole. Ingredients: beef broth, stalks celery, parsley flakes, potatoes, onion. Instructions: Place all ingredients, except parsley, in a covered casserole dish and bake at 350° for 30 minutes or until tender. Sprinkle with parsley flakes. Makes 6 servings. One serving equals 75 calories.

title: Sausage And Hash Brown Casserole
instructions: Brown sausage; drain well.
Combine with other ingredients. Bake in 1 3/4-quart casserole dish at 350° for 30 to 40 minutes. If desired, top with mixture of 1/3 cup butter and 1 cup cornflakes (crushed) before baking.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Hash Brown Casserole. Ingredients: fresh ground sausage, potatoes O'Brien, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage; drain well. Combine with other ingredients. Bake in 1 3/4-quart casserole dish at 350° for 30 to 40 minutes. If desired, top with mixture of 1/3 cup butter and 1 cup cornflakes (crushed) before baking.

title: Creamy Mashed Potato Casserole
instructions: Cube potatoes and cook until done. Place in the large electric mixer bowl and mash. Add all other ingredients, except cheese, and blend until smooth on medium-high speed. Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 12 x 8-inch casserole dish. Cover and bake in a 325° oven for 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from oven. Uncover and sprinkle with cheese. Bake another 5 to 10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Serve. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
text: Recipe: Creamy Mashed Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, milk, cream cheese, sour cream, parsley flakes, garlic, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Cube potatoes and cook until done. Place in the large electric mixer bowl and mash. Add all other ingredients, except cheese, and blend until smooth on medium-high speed. Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 12 x 8-inch casserole dish. Cover and bake in a 325° oven for 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from oven. Uncover and sprinkle with cheese. Bake another 5 to 10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Serve. Makes 8 to 10 servings.

title: Pork Chops With Cheese
instructions: Brush pork chops with tomato paste.
Mix cheese with bread crumbs; pat into chops.
Pan-fry chops until brown; place in baking dish.
Add a small amount of water to prevent sticking. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
Serve with sauce.
Yield: 4 servings.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops With Cheese. Ingredients: lean pork chops, Parmesan cheese, tomato paste, bread crumbs. Instructions: Brush pork chops with tomato paste. Mix cheese with bread crumbs; pat into chops. Pan-fry chops until brown; place in baking dish. Add a small amount of water to prevent sticking. Bake at 350° for 1 hour. Serve with sauce. Yield: 4 servings.

title: Ham And Onion Rolls
instructions: Cut cream cheese into 8 pieces.
Pat dry ham slices and spread cream cheese on ham.
Roll up around an onion, refrigerate over night.
Slice into small pieces.
text: Recipe: Ham And Onion Rolls. Ingredients: ham, green onions, cream cheese. Instructions: Cut cream cheese into 8 pieces. Pat dry ham slices and spread cream cheese on ham. Roll up around an onion, refrigerate over night. Slice into small pieces.

title: Potato Pork Chop Casserole
instructions: Cover bottom of pan with margarine.
Layer onions, potatoes and pork chops.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake for 30 minutes at 350°, covered with tinfoil.
Uncover and bake until brown.
text: Recipe: Potato Pork Chop Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, pork chops, onion. Instructions: Cover bottom of pan with margarine. Layer onions, potatoes and pork chops. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°, covered with tinfoil. Uncover and bake until brown.

title: Sausage And Cheese Balls
instructions: Mix all together and form into 1-inch balls.
Place on cookie sheet.
Bake at 350° for 15 minutes.
Put in toothpicks to serve.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Cheese Balls. Ingredients: bulk sausage, Kraft cheese, onion, flour. Instructions: Mix all together and form into 1-inch balls. Place on cookie sheet. Bake at 350° for 15 minutes. Put in toothpicks to serve.

title: Potato Chip Ham Casserole
instructions: Make white sauce of butter, flour and milk.
Cook until smooth. Add ham and pour into greased casserole.
Top with thick layer of potato chips.
Bake in a 350° oven for 30 minutes.
Serve hot.
text: Recipe: Potato Chip Ham Casserole. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, potato chips, ham. Instructions: Make white sauce of butter, flour and milk. Cook until smooth. Add ham and pour into greased casserole. Top with thick layer of potato chips. Bake in a 350° oven for 30 minutes. Serve hot.

title: Cheese And Sausage Bake
instructions: Use a 9 x 11-inch baking dish, greased.
Cover bottom of pan with white bread.
Fry sausage, drain well and spread over bread layer.
Mix eggs and milk; spread over sausage layer.
Spread Cheddar cheese over egg mixture.
Bake at 375° for 40 or 45 minutes.
Ham may be used in place of sausage.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Sausage Bake. Ingredients: white bread, sausage, eggs, milk, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Use a 9 x 11-inch baking dish, greased. Cover bottom of pan with white bread. Fry sausage, drain well and spread over bread layer. Mix eggs and milk; spread over sausage layer. Spread Cheddar cheese over egg mixture. Bake at 375° for 40 or 45 minutes. Ham may be used in place of sausage.

title: Scalloped Cheese Potatoes
instructions: In a large bowl, combine potatoes and soup.

Layer half of the mixture in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish. Dot with half of the butter and sprinkle with half of the cheese. Repeat layers. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 60 to 70 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Yields 12 servings.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Cheese Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, condensed cream, butter, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: In a large bowl, combine potatoes and soup. Layer half of the mixture in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish. Dot with half of the butter and sprinkle with half of the cheese. Repeat layers. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 60 to 70 minutes or until the potatoes are tender. Yields 12 servings.

title: Swiss Chicken Casserole
instructions: Layer chicken, cheese, soup and milk.
Sprinkle with stuffing; drizzle with butter.
Cover and bake at 350° for 50 minutes.
text: Recipe: Swiss Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, Swiss cheese, cream of chicken soup, milk, butter. Instructions: Layer chicken, cheese, soup and milk. Sprinkle with stuffing; drizzle with butter. Cover and bake at 350° for 50 minutes.

title: One-Pot Sausage Jambalaya
instructions: Fry sausage down; let brown and remove excess grease.
Add about 1 cup water, onion soup mix and any other seasonings you wish.
Let cook for 30 to 45 minutes.
Add rice and about 2 to 2 1/2 cups water.
Cook approximately 30 minutes or until rice is done.
Then in another pot, add a little butter, then add green onions and yellow onions in the jambalaya after it is cooked.
text: Recipe: One-Pot Sausage Jambalaya. Ingredients: sausage, rice, onion soup mix. Instructions: Fry sausage down; let brown and remove excess grease. Add about 1 cup water, onion soup mix and any other seasonings you wish. Let cook for 30 to 45 minutes. Add rice and about 2 to 2 1/2 cups water. Cook approximately 30 minutes or until rice is done. Then in another pot, add a little butter, then add green onions and yellow onions in the jambalaya after it is cooked.

title: Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Put ham in chunks in bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan.
Layer potatoes on top.
Mix soups and sour cream.
Pour over potatoes. Grate cheese and top.
Bake at 350° for 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: ham, cheese, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, hash brown potatoes, sour cream. Instructions: Put ham in chunks in bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan. Layer potatoes on top. Mix soups and sour cream. Pour over potatoes. Grate cheese and top. Bake at 350° for 45 minutes.

title: Garlic Potatoes(Microwave)
instructions: Put potatoes in baking dish.
Sprinkle about 1/4 cup water over potatoes.
Pour melted butter with garlic over potatoes. Cover with waxed paper or plastic wrap.
Cook for 20 minutes on High.
Check to see if tender, continue cooking 5 minutes at a time until done to your liking.
May also be topped with cheese.
text: Recipe: Garlic Potatoes(Microwave)  . Ingredients: potato slices, butter, garlic salt. Instructions: Put potatoes in baking dish. Sprinkle about 1/4 cup water over potatoes. Pour melted butter with garlic over potatoes. Cover with waxed paper or plastic wrap. Cook for 20 minutes on High. Check to see if tender, continue cooking 5 minutes at a time until done to your liking. May also be topped with cheese.

title: Mushroom Onion Pot Roast
instructions: Heat oven to 350°.
Place large sheet of heavy-duty foil on bottom of pan.
Sprinkle with dry onion soup mix.
Spoon mushroom soup over it and seal all edges with foil.
Bake 3 hours.
text: Recipe: Mushroom Onion Pot Roast. Ingredients: boneless beef roast, onion soup, condensed cream. Instructions: Heat oven to 350°. Place large sheet of heavy-duty foil on bottom of pan. Sprinkle with dry onion soup mix. Spoon mushroom soup over it and seal all edges with foil. Bake 3 hours.

title: Chicken And Cheese Casserole
instructions: Boil egg noodles.
Crumble up chicken; add the cream of chicken soup and heat.
Pour in noodles.
Stir it up.
Add cheese and bake approximately 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Cheese Casserole. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, chicken breasts, broth off chicken, cheese, egg noodles. Instructions: Boil egg noodles. Crumble up chicken; add the cream of chicken soup and heat. Pour in noodles. Stir it up. Add cheese and bake approximately 1 hour.

title: Pork Chops And Noodles
instructions: Rub mustard on chops; brown in skillet.
Place in a baking dish.
Add the chicken noodle soup.
Bake for 1 hour at 375°.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops And Noodles. Ingredients: pork chops, Campbell's chicken. Instructions: Rub mustard on chops; brown in skillet. Place in a baking dish. Add the chicken noodle soup. Bake for 1 hour at 375°.

title: Curly Noodles With Gorgonzola And Tomatoes(Serves 4-6)
instructions: Saute onion and garlic in oil.
Stir in tomato and basil. Cook 20 minutes until thick.
text: Recipe: Curly Noodles With Gorgonzola And Tomatoes(Serves 4-6)  . Ingredients: olive oil, onion, garlic, tomatoes, basil, butter, Gorgonzola cheese, curly pasta, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Saute onion and garlic in oil. Stir in tomato and basil. Cook 20 minutes until thick.

title: Meat, Rice, Mushrooms
instructions: Line bottom of casserole dish with meat.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Cover meat with rice.
Mix mushroom soup with 1 can water and pour over rice.
Bake at 350° for approximately 1 hour. Serve with your choice of vegetables.
text: Recipe: Meat, Rice, Mushrooms. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, rice. Instructions: Line bottom of casserole dish with meat. Salt and pepper to taste. Cover meat with rice. Mix mushroom soup with 1 can water and pour over rice. Bake at 350° for approximately 1 hour. Serve with your choice of vegetables.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Prepare a medium size skillet with Pam cooking spray or butter. Heat skillet.
Lightly butter one side of each piece of bread.
Lay butter side down; place cheese on top, then place other slice of bread with butter facing up.
Cook on both sides until lightly browned.
Cut into strips or use your favorite cookie cutter for little fingers.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: bread, butter, sandwich cheese. Instructions: Prepare a medium size skillet with Pam cooking spray or butter. Heat skillet. Lightly butter one side of each piece of bread. Lay butter side down; place cheese on top, then place other slice of bread with butter facing up. Cook on both sides until lightly browned. Cut into strips or use your favorite cookie cutter for little fingers.

title: Potato Sour Cream Casserole
instructions: Place in buttered casserole dish.
Dot with 2 tablespoons butter.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Refrigerate overnight. Bake uncovered at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Potato Sour Cream Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, sour cream, onion salt. Instructions: Place in buttered casserole dish. Dot with 2 tablespoons butter. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Refrigerate overnight. Bake uncovered at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Butterfinger Pie
instructions: Mix Cool Whip and 2 crushed candy bars. Pour into crust. Top with other crushed candy bar and freeze for 2 hours.
text: Recipe: Butterfinger Pie. Ingredients: graham cracker crust, Butterfinger. Instructions: Mix Cool Whip and 2 crushed candy bars. Pour into crust. Top with other crushed candy bar and freeze for 2 hours.

title: Laura Osgood Bean'S Sourdough Starter
instructions: Pour milk into glass or ceramic bowl.
Cover with cheesecloth. Let stand outdoors for 1 day.
Stir in flour, re-cover and let stand outdoors for 2 days.
Bring indoors to sunny spot; let stand until mixture bubbles and starts to sour.
Spoon into quart jar with screw-top and store in refrigerator 1 day.
text: Recipe: Laura Osgood Bean'S Sourdough Starter. Ingredients: milk, flour. Instructions: Pour milk into glass or ceramic bowl. Cover with cheesecloth. Let stand outdoors for 1 day. Stir in flour, re-cover and let stand outdoors for 2 days. Bring indoors to sunny spot; let stand until mixture bubbles and starts to sour. Spoon into quart jar with screw-top and store in refrigerator 1 day.

title: Pork Chop Potato Bake
instructions: Blend potatoes, soup, milk, sour cream, 1/2 cup cheese and 1/2 can onions.
Pat mixture in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Lay browned pork chops on top.
Cover and bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.
Remove from oven; sprinkle top with remaining cheese and onions.
Bake, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Pork Chop Potato Bake. Ingredients: pork chops, potatoes O'Brien, cream of celery soup, milk, sour cream, Cheddar cheese, onions. Instructions: Blend potatoes, soup, milk, sour cream, 1/2 cup cheese and 1/2 can onions. Pat mixture in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Lay browned pork chops on top. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours. Remove from oven; sprinkle top with remaining cheese and onions. Bake, uncovered, for 10 minutes.

title: Ham And Cream Cheese Roll-Ups
instructions: Let cream cheese soften, then add the onion a little at a time until it is mixed well.
Spread a little of the mixture on a slice of ham until ham is covered well.
Then slowly roll the ham and then slice about 4 times; it looks like a circle.
Lay flat on serving tray and chill.
These go over very well for any party or shower.
text: Recipe: Ham And Cream Cheese Roll-Ups. Ingredients: cream cheese, onion, ham. Instructions: Let cream cheese soften, then add the onion a little at a time until it is mixed well. Spread a little of the mixture on a slice of ham until ham is covered well. Then slowly roll the ham and then slice about 4 times; it looks like a circle. Lay flat on serving tray and chill. These go over very well for any party or shower.

title: Potato-Polish Sausage And Cheese Dish
instructions: Boil potatoes (about 1 quart), cut in bite sizes.
Cook until tender, no salt added.
text: Recipe: Potato-Polish Sausage And Cheese Dish. Ingredients: potatoes, pasteurized cheese, sausages. Instructions: Boil potatoes (about 1 quart), cut in bite sizes. Cook until tender, no salt added.

title: Surprise Rice And Gravy
instructions: Cut the chicken and roast beef.
Stir it; put in rice.
Add some bread and cook for a while.
Yum!
text: Recipe: Surprise Rice And Gravy. Ingredients: rice, beef, chicken, bread. Instructions: Cut the chicken and roast beef. Stir it; put in rice. Add some bread and cook for a while. Yum!

title: Easy Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Boil potatoes in water until tender.
Layer in bottom of glass casserole.
Lay cheese slices on top, then onion slices and top with ham.
Cover and bake 10 to 15 minutes in a 350° oven.
text: Recipe: Easy Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, ham, sliced cheese. Instructions: Boil potatoes in water until tender. Layer in bottom of glass casserole. Lay cheese slices on top, then onion slices and top with ham. Cover and bake 10 to 15 minutes in a 350° oven.

title: Egg Noodles
instructions: Whip egg until frothy.
Mix flour in gradually.
Roll out in flour.
Slice and hang.
Cook in hot broth or soup.
text: Recipe: Egg Noodles. Ingredients: egg, flour. Instructions: Whip egg until frothy. Mix flour in gradually. Roll out in flour. Slice and hang. Cook in hot broth or soup.

title: Civil War Fried Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Peel and slice fresh sweet potatoes lengthwise and place in heated iron frying pan with 1/4 inch grease. Fry until golden brown and soft in the middle when poked with a fork. Goes good with sausage or bacon.
text: Recipe: Civil War Fried Sweet Potatoes. Ingredients: Sweet potatoes. Instructions: Peel and slice fresh sweet potatoes lengthwise and place in heated iron frying pan with 1/4 inch grease. Fry until golden brown and soft in the middle when poked with a fork. Goes good with sausage or bacon.

title: Creamy Chicken Broccoli Noodles
instructions: Cook noodles according to directions; drain off most of liquid.
Stir in soup and milk.
Add chicken and broccoli.
Heat through, then stir in tomatoes.
Good light meal.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken Broccoli Noodles. Ingredients: chicken flavor, cream of mushroom soup, milk, chicken, quartered cherry tomatoes. Instructions: Cook noodles according to directions; drain off most of liquid. Stir in soup and milk. Add chicken and broccoli. Heat through, then stir in tomatoes. Good light meal.

title: Vermont Corn Chowder
instructions: In saucepan, melt butter.
Saute onion and celery until tender.
Add potatoes, milk and corn.
Heat to serving temperature.
Remove from heat and stir in Cheddar cheese until melted.
If necessary, return to low heat to finish melting cheese.
text: Recipe: Vermont Corn Chowder. Ingredients: butter, onion, celery, potatoes, milk, cream-style, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: In saucepan, melt butter. Saute onion and celery until tender. Add potatoes, milk and corn. Heat to serving temperature. Remove from heat and stir in Cheddar cheese until melted. If necessary, return to low heat to finish melting cheese.

title: Potato Cheese Puff
instructions: Chop onion finely. Beat eggs.
Mix all ingredients and pour into baking pan. Bake at 375° for 50 minutes or until the blade of a knife sticks in the center and comes out clean. Serve at once. Makes 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Potato Cheese Puff. Ingredients: onion, eggs, milk, potatoes, cheese. Instructions: Chop onion finely. Beat eggs. Mix all ingredients and pour into baking pan. Bake at 375° for 50 minutes or until the blade of a knife sticks in the center and comes out clean. Serve at once. Makes 6 servings.

title: Chicken And Noodles
instructions: With mixer beat in enough flour until thick.
With spoon, add enough flour for a stiff dough.
(Use Pillsbury flour for easier rolling.)
Divide dough in small enough pieces to roll easy.
Roll out each piece as thin as possible.
Place on cloth until dough is partially dry.
Roll as jelly roll and cut very fine.
Cook chicken until tender, remove from bone and cut in pieces.
Add noodles to boiling broth; cook until tender.
Add chicken last.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Noodles. Ingredients: egg yolks, egg, milk. Instructions: With mixer beat in enough flour until thick. With spoon, add enough flour for a stiff dough. (Use Pillsbury flour for easier rolling.) Divide dough in small enough pieces to roll easy. Roll out each piece as thin as possible. Place on cloth until dough is partially dry. Roll as jelly roll and cut very fine. Cook chicken until tender, remove from bone and cut in pieces. Add noodles to boiling broth; cook until tender. Add chicken last.

title: Creamed Chicken Casserole
instructions: Roll chicken breast in flour to coat.
Brown in skillet in 1 tablespoon butter; put aside.
In small casserole dish, blend sour cream and soup.
Add chicken in and stir.
Bake at 350° for 45 minutes.
Pour over rice when baked.
text: Recipe: Creamed Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, butter, rice, flour. Instructions: Roll chicken breast in flour to coat. Brown in skillet in 1 tablespoon butter; put aside. In small casserole dish, blend sour cream and soup. Add chicken in and stir. Bake at 350° for 45 minutes. Pour over rice when baked.

title: Sausage Topped Potato Casserole
instructions: Combine soup, cheese, sour cream and milk.
Place one-half of the potatoes in a buttered 2-quart baking dish.
Cover with 1/2 of the soup mixture.
Repeat layers; brown link sausage in skillet. Drain; cut each in half.
Arrange sausage pieces on top of casserole and bake an additional 30 to 45 minutes or until potatoes are done.
Allow to stand 5 minutes before serving.
text: Recipe: Sausage Topped Potato Casserole. Ingredients: condensed cream, Cheddar cheese, sour cream, milk, baking potatoes, sausage. Instructions: Combine soup, cheese, sour cream and milk. Place one-half of the potatoes in a buttered 2-quart baking dish. Cover with 1/2 of the soup mixture. Repeat layers; brown link sausage in skillet. Drain; cut each in half. Arrange sausage pieces on top of casserole and bake an additional 30 to 45 minutes or until potatoes are done. Allow to stand 5 minutes before serving.

title: Egg In A Basket(Great Kids Dish)
instructions: Cut a 2-inch circle in center of bread using a jelly glass or juice glass. Place bread in hot, lightly greased skillet. Break egg in center of bread; fry until done. Use the center circle of the bread to toast in skillet. Serve with jelly.
text: Recipe: Egg In A Basket(Great Kids Dish)  . Ingredients: bread, egg. Instructions: Cut a 2-inch circle in center of bread using a jelly glass or juice glass. Place bread in hot, lightly greased skillet. Break egg in center of bread; fry until done. Use the center circle of the bread to toast in skillet. Serve with jelly.

title: Chicken And Cheese Enchiladas
instructions: Heat flour tortillas in microwave wrapped in paper towel.
Put chicken breasts and grated cheese in tortillas.
Mix soups and milk and pour over top of enchiladas.
Bake at 350° for about 30 to 40 minutes.
Top with more cheese on top and serve with sour cream.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Cheese Enchiladas. Ingredients: flour tortillas, chicken breasts, Cheddar cheese soup, cream of chicken soup, milk, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Heat flour tortillas in microwave wrapped in paper towel. Put chicken breasts and grated cheese in tortillas. Mix soups and milk and pour over top of enchiladas. Bake at 350° for about 30 to 40 minutes. Top with more cheese on top and serve with sour cream.

title: Chicken Cheese Ball
instructions: Cream the cream cheese and dressing mix until well mixed. Add drained chicken and blend well. Form a ball and roll into chopped nuts, some poppy seeds or sesame seeds and a little dill weed. Serve with crackers. Better next day.
text: Recipe: Chicken Cheese Ball. Ingredients: cream cheese, white chicken. Instructions: Cream the cream cheese and dressing mix until well mixed. Add drained chicken and blend well. Form a ball and roll into chopped nuts, some poppy seeds or sesame seeds and a little dill weed. Serve with crackers. Better next day.

title: Sausage Cheese Balls
instructions: Mix together; roll into small balls.
Bake at 325° for about 20 minutes.
Don't overbake, or they will be hard.
(Preheat oven.)
text: Recipe: Sausage Cheese Balls. Ingredients: Cheddar cheese, Bisquick flour, sausage. Instructions: Mix together; roll into small balls. Bake at 325° for about 20 minutes. Don't overbake, or they will be hard. (Preheat oven.)

title: Sausage And Cheese Appetizer
instructions: Brown and drain sausage.
Mix in Cheez Whiz.
Spread mixture onto bread and broil in oven until brown.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Cheese Appetizer. Ingredients: sausage, pumpernickel bread. Instructions: Brown and drain sausage. Mix in Cheez Whiz. Spread mixture onto bread and broil in oven until brown.

title: Microwave Potato Casserole
instructions: Alternate layers of potatoes and onion.
Pour can of cream of mushroom soup over potatoes and onion.
Cook for 10 minutes. Rotate dish and cook for 5 to 10 minutes, until done.
Sprinkle with grated cheese.
text: Recipe: Microwave Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, cream of mushroom soup, cheese. Instructions: Alternate layers of potatoes and onion. Pour can of cream of mushroom soup over potatoes and onion. Cook for 10 minutes. Rotate dish and cook for 5 to 10 minutes, until done. Sprinkle with grated cheese.

title: Baked Sliced Potatoes
instructions: Wash potatoes good.
Cut in rings with potato peel left on potatoes.
Place in a 9 x 13-inch pan (glass or aluminum).
Cut onion up in rings.
Break apart and place over potatoes (you can do this by layers if you want).
Then cut up butter in pieces; place on potatoes and onion.
Cover with foil and bake at 350° for 1 hour or until desired tenderness.
text: Recipe: Baked Sliced Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, butter. Instructions: Wash potatoes good. Cut in rings with potato peel left on potatoes. Place in a 9 x 13-inch pan (glass or aluminum). Cut onion up in rings. Break apart and place over potatoes (you can do this by layers if you want). Then cut up butter in pieces; place on potatoes and onion. Cover with foil and bake at 350° for 1 hour or until desired tenderness.

title: Fried Onion Chicken
instructions: Skin and bone chicken breasts.
Dip chicken in egg-milk mixture, then in onion rings.
Place in an 8-inch round glass dish; cover.
Cook in microwave on High for 6 1/2 to 10 minutes, rotating dish every 4 minutes.
Cut into bite size pieces before serving.
This dish can be assembled, but not cooked, ahead of time and store in the refrigerator until guests arrive.
Then just microwave and serve.
text: Recipe: Fried Onion Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg, milk, onion rings. Instructions: Skin and bone chicken breasts. Dip chicken in egg-milk mixture, then in onion rings. Place in an 8-inch round glass dish; cover. Cook in microwave on High for 6 1/2 to 10 minutes, rotating dish every 4 minutes. Cut into bite size pieces before serving. This dish can be assembled, but not cooked, ahead of time and store in the refrigerator until guests arrive. Then just microwave and serve.

title: Cheese And Sausage Omelet
instructions: In an 8 x 9-inch square pan, place bread on bottom.
Brown sausage and drain.
In a mixing bowl, beat eggs and cheese.
Add milk, sausage, salt and pepper.
Pour over bread.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Bake at 350° for 40 to 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Sausage Omelet. Ingredients: bread, pork sausage, eggs, Cheddar cheese, milk. Instructions: In an 8 x 9-inch square pan, place bread on bottom. Brown sausage and drain. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs and cheese. Add milk, sausage, salt and pepper. Pour over bread. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Bake at 350° for 40 to 45 minutes.

title: Sweet 'N Sour Ham Balls
instructions: Mix ingredients and make balls.
text: Recipe: Sweet 'N Sour Ham Balls. Ingredients: ground beef, ground ham, lean pork, eggs, milk, graham cracker crumbs. Instructions: Mix ingredients and make balls.

title: Quick Hot Ham And Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Toast bread in toaster or oven.
Place ham and cheese on bread.
Heat in microwave until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Quick Hot Ham And Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: bread, ham, cheese. Instructions: Toast bread in toaster or oven. Place ham and cheese on bread. Heat in microwave until cheese melts.

title: Scalloped Potatoes And Ham
instructions: Place half of the ham in bottom of a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover with half of the potatoes and half of the onion. Sprinkle half of the flour and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Repeat layering of ham, potatoes and onion.
Sprinkle with additional salt and pepper. Sift remaining flour on top.
Pour milk over all. Bake, covered, in a 350° oven for 1 to 1 1/4 hours until potatoes are nearly tender.
Uncover. Combine bread crumbs and melted butter. Sprinkle on casserole. Bake 15 minutes more.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Potatoes And Ham. Ingredients: fully cooked ham, potatoes, onion, flour, milk, bread crumbs, butter. Instructions: Place half of the ham in bottom of a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover with half of the potatoes and half of the onion. Sprinkle half of the flour and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Repeat layering of ham, potatoes and onion. Sprinkle with additional salt and pepper. Sift remaining flour on top. Pour milk over all. Bake, covered, in a 350° oven for 1 to 1 1/4 hours until potatoes are nearly tender. Uncover. Combine bread crumbs and melted butter. Sprinkle on casserole. Bake 15 minutes more.

title: Nana'S Meat Loaf
instructions: Mix all ingredients.
Form into loaf.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Nana'S Meat Loaf. Ingredients: ground beef, tomato sauce, egg, bread crumbs, onion soup. Instructions: Mix all ingredients. Form into loaf. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Roasted Garlic
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Remove the papery outer covering of whole garlic head, but do not seperate the cloves or peel them.
Place as many whole heads of garlic on a large square of heavy-duty aluminum foil as there are people to be served.
Fold up foil so that the cloves are completely wrapped.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour 15 minutes.
Serve each diner a head of garlic and some bread and butter.
Separate cloves.
Hold a clove over a piece of buttered bread and squeeze.
The garlic puree will pop out, like toothpaste from a tube.
Spread and eat.
GARLIC PUREE:
To make a batch of Garlic Puree for later use, let roasted heads of garlic cool, unwarapped for at least 5 minutes.
Gently separate the cloves and squeeze each one over a fine meshed sieve, so that the softened garlic pops into the sieve.
With wooden spatula or wooden spoon, rub garlic through the sieve into a small container or bowl.
Cover tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate the puree if needed.
QUICK PUREE:
If you are in a hurry, you may skip the refinement of the sieve.
Simply squeeze the cloves, one by one, over a bowl.
When they have all been squeezed, use a rubber spatula to push the puree into a neat mound cover tightly with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until needed.
It will keep for months.
To keep indefinitely, cover with a film of olive oil.
text: Recipe: Roasted Garlic. Ingredients: garlic, sweet butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Remove the papery outer covering of whole garlic head, but do not seperate the cloves or peel them. Place as many whole heads of garlic on a large square of heavy-duty aluminum foil as there are people to be served. Fold up foil so that the cloves are completely wrapped. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour 15 minutes. Serve each diner a head of garlic and some bread and butter. Separate cloves. Hold a clove over a piece of buttered bread and squeeze. The garlic puree will pop out, like toothpaste from a tube. Spread and eat. GARLIC PUREE: To make a batch of Garlic Puree for later use, let roasted heads of garlic cool, unwarapped for at least 5 minutes. Gently separate the cloves and squeeze each one over a fine meshed sieve, so that the softened garlic pops into the sieve. With wooden spatula or wooden spoon, rub garlic through the sieve into a small container or bowl. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate the puree if needed. QUICK PUREE: If you are in a hurry, you may skip the refinement of the sieve. Simply squeeze the cloves, one by one, over a bowl. When they have all been squeezed, use a rubber spatula to push the puree into a neat mound cover tightly with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until needed. It will keep for months. To keep indefinitely, cover with a film of olive oil.

title: Mornay Sauce
instructions: In the top of a double boiler melt the butter over simmering water. Add the flour with constant stirring until it is well blended in and the mixture is bubbly. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in the chicken stock and the cream. Return to the heat and quickly bring up to a boil, stirring constantly. Cook for 1-2 minutes while still stirring. Remove from heat and stir about 3 Tbs of the sauce into the 2 slightly beaten egg yolks, adding the sauce little by little. Add the egg yolk mixture to the remainder of the sauce off heat, stirring all the while. Cook over simmering water for 3-5 minutes, stirring slowly all the while. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and add the cheeses all at once and blend in until all of the cheeses have melted. Serve at once as suggested.
text: Recipe: Mornay Sauce. Ingredients: butter, flour, cold chicken broth, egg yolks, parmesan cheese, gruyere cheese, heavy cream. Instructions: In the top of a double boiler melt the butter over simmering water. Add the flour with constant stirring until it is well blended in and the mixture is bubbly. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in the chicken stock and the cream. Return to the heat and quickly bring up to a boil, stirring constantly. Cook for 1-2 minutes while still stirring. Remove from heat and stir about 3 Tbs of the sauce into the 2 slightly beaten egg yolks, adding the sauce little by little. Add the egg yolk mixture to the remainder of the sauce off heat, stirring all the while. Cook over simmering water for 3-5 minutes, stirring slowly all the while. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and add the cheeses all at once and blend in until all of the cheeses have melted. Serve at once as suggested.

title: Real Simple Lasagna
instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Spoon 1/3 of the sauce into a 9X13 inch baking dish. Place half the ravioli on top. Cover with all the spinach and half the mozzarella. Add the remaining ravioli then top with the remaining sauce, mozzarella and the parmesan. Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes. Uncover and bake until bubbly, another 5-10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Real Simple Lasagna. Ingredients: pasta sauce, cheese ravioli, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Spoon 1/3 of the sauce into a 9X13 inch baking dish. Place half the ravioli on top. Cover with all the spinach and half the mozzarella. Add the remaining ravioli then top with the remaining sauce, mozzarella and the parmesan. Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes. Uncover and bake until bubbly, another 5-10 minutes.

title: Sun-Dried Tomato And Basil Feta Spread
instructions: In food processor blend: Garlic Add milk and cream cheese until smooth Add feta untl smooth Lastly add sundried tomatoes and basil Mix until loose Chill about an hour then serve Serve with pita, crackers or vegetables.
text: Recipe: Sun-Dried Tomato And Basil Feta Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, feta cheese, milk, garlic, tomato, fresh basil. Instructions: In food processor blend: Garlic Add milk and cream cheese until smooth Add feta untl smooth Lastly add sundried tomatoes and basil Mix until loose Chill about an hour then serve Serve with pita, crackers or vegetables.

title: Four Cheese Pasta
instructions: Heat oven to 350°F Spray 13x9-inch glass baking dish with cooking spray.
Cook and drain pasta as directed on package.
Meanwhile, in 4-quart saucepan, melt 1/2 cup butter over low heat.
Add garlic; cook 30 seconds, stirring frequently.
With wire whisk, stir in flour and salt until smooth.
Increase heat to medium; cook, stirring constantly, until mixture is smooth and bubbly.
Gradually stir in milk.
Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
Boil and stir 1 minute. Stir in cheeses.
Cook until melted, stirring occasionally.
Stir pasta into cheese sauce.
Pour mixture into baking dish.
In 6-inch skillet, melt 1 tablespoon butter over medium-high heat; stir in bread crumbs.
Cook and stir until crumbs are golden brown. Sprinkle over pasta mixture.
Bake uncovered 20 to 25 minutes or until bubbly.
text: Recipe: Four Cheese Pasta. Ingredients: penne pasta, butter, garlic, flour, salt, milk, provolone cheese, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, swiss cheese, Italian bread. Instructions: Heat oven to 350°F Spray 13x9-inch glass baking dish with cooking spray. Cook and drain pasta as directed on package. Meanwhile, in 4-quart saucepan, melt 1/2 cup butter over low heat. Add garlic; cook 30 seconds, stirring frequently. With wire whisk, stir in flour and salt until smooth. Increase heat to medium; cook, stirring constantly, until mixture is smooth and bubbly. Gradually stir in milk. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir 1 minute. Stir in cheeses. Cook until melted, stirring occasionally. Stir pasta into cheese sauce. Pour mixture into baking dish. In 6-inch skillet, melt 1 tablespoon butter over medium-high heat; stir in bread crumbs. Cook and stir until crumbs are golden brown. Sprinkle over pasta mixture. Bake uncovered 20 to 25 minutes or until bubbly.

title: Perfect Runny Egg Over Toast (No Oil, Non-Stick Skillet)
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet (I use Wearever - The pan cannot be worn down or it will stick) over medium-low heat for 3-5 minutes (preheating on medium-low is important - the pan can't be too hot or too cold - I have a gas stove which heats quickly, so you may need to adjust to a longer preheat time for your burner).
Add raw egg to pan and cook for 3 minutes. (NOTE: Right when the egg hits the pan, the egg white portion of the egg should immediately start to turn white - if it doesn't, the pan is not hot enough).

The edges of the egg should look dry and lift easily with a spatula. Using a spatula large enough to scoop underneath the entire egg, carefully flip the egg and cook for 1 more minute. (NOTE: The bottom of the egg should have a very thin layer of nicely cooked skin that is easy to get underneath with the spatula - if the skin is thicker and darker than a very light cream color then the pan was too hot).

Using the spatula, carefully remove the egg from the pan and enjoy over a nice piece of your favorite healthy toast (or for the Celiac's out there, a 1/4 cup cooked rice works well too!). When you poke your fork into the yolk, it will run out and soak into your bread.
text: Recipe: Perfect Runny Egg Over Toast (No Oil, Non-Stick Skillet). Ingredients: egg, white rice. Instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet (I use Wearever - The pan cannot be worn down or it will stick) over medium-low heat for 3-5 minutes (preheating on medium-low is important - the pan can't be too hot or too cold - I have a gas stove which heats quickly, so you may need to adjust to a longer preheat time for your burner). Add raw egg to pan and cook for 3 minutes. (NOTE: Right when the egg hits the pan, the egg white portion of the egg should immediately start to turn white - if it doesn't, the pan is not hot enough). The edges of the egg should look dry and lift easily with a spatula. Using a spatula large enough to scoop underneath the entire egg, carefully flip the egg and cook for 1 more minute. (NOTE: The bottom of the egg should have a very thin layer of nicely cooked skin that is easy to get underneath with the spatula - if the skin is thicker and darker than a very light cream color then the pan was too hot). Using the spatula, carefully remove the egg from the pan and enjoy over a nice piece of your favorite healthy toast (or for the Celiac's out there, a 1/4 cup cooked rice works well too!). When you poke your fork into the yolk, it will run out and soak into your bread.

title: Ham Potato Puffs
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Spray a 12 count muffin tin with cooking spray.
Mold biscuits to the shape of each biscuit cup. You will need to snip a bit from each in order to get 12 altogether-the biscuits I buy only have 8 in them.
In a large bowl, combine the ham, potatoes, 3/4 cup cheese, parsley, and garlic powder if using and green onion if using.
Divide ham mixture between the 12 cups.
Bake for about 25 minutes, or until done. (Use a toothpick to check if biscuit is done, then use a spoon to see if underside is brown enough, if not bake longer).
Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup of cheese and continue baking until cheese on top melts. (I put a large cooking sheet underneath so that the melting cheese does not mess up my oven).
Serve warm.
Refrigerate leftovers, or freeze.
text: Recipe: Ham Potato Puffs. Ingredients: buttermilk, ham, potatoes, cheddar cheese, parsley flakes, garlic, green onion. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray a 12 count muffin tin with cooking spray. Mold biscuits to the shape of each biscuit cup. You will need to snip a bit from each in order to get 12 altogether-the biscuits I buy only have 8 in them. In a large bowl, combine the ham, potatoes, 3/4 cup cheese, parsley, and garlic powder if using and green onion if using. Divide ham mixture between the 12 cups. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until done. (Use a toothpick to check if biscuit is done, then use a spoon to see if underside is brown enough, if not bake longer). Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup of cheese and continue baking until cheese on top melts. (I put a large cooking sheet underneath so that the melting cheese does not mess up my oven). Serve warm. Refrigerate leftovers, or freeze.

title: Camp Doughnuts
instructions: (It's probably best to make these one at a time).
Cut bread into square quarters.
Place about 3/4 tsp of jam in the centre of the quarter of bread and fold bread over.
Seal the bread shut with a little beaten egg and coat the outside with a little egg as well.
Make sure the bread stays folded over by poking a skewer through the top corner.
Using the skewer, hold the doughnut over the embers of the fire until the egg is cooked and (hopefully) the bread stays stuck together.
Eat - remembering that it's full of hot jam :-).
Make as many as you have ingredients for.
text: Recipe: Camp Doughnuts. Ingredients: egg, bread. Instructions: (It's probably best to make these one at a time). Cut bread into square quarters. Place about 3/4 tsp of jam in the centre of the quarter of bread and fold bread over. Seal the bread shut with a little beaten egg and coat the outside with a little egg as well. Make sure the bread stays folded over by poking a skewer through the top corner. Using the skewer, hold the doughnut over the embers of the fire until the egg is cooked and (hopefully) the bread stays stuck together. Eat - remembering that it's full of hot jam :-). Make as many as you have ingredients for.

title: Thai Sticky Rice With Nam Pla And Coconut Milk
instructions: Rinse rice. Soak it in water to cover for at least 1 hr and up to 24.
Drain, then wrap in cheesecloth. Put in a steamer above boiling water. Steam for about 30 minutes until tender.
Toss cooked rice with coconut milk and nam pla. Rewrap and steam (or microwave) for 5 more minutes to reheat.
text: Recipe: Thai Sticky Rice With Nam Pla And Coconut Milk. Ingredients: sticky rice, coconut milk. Instructions: Rinse rice. Soak it in water to cover for at least 1 hr and up to 24. Drain, then wrap in cheesecloth. Put in a steamer above boiling water. Steam for about 30 minutes until tender. Toss cooked rice with coconut milk and nam pla. Rewrap and steam (or microwave) for 5 more minutes to reheat.

title: Chicken Meatballs (Kid Pleaser)
instructions: Combine all ingredients. Roll walnut sized pieces into balls.
Place on a lightly greased oven tray and bake at 200.C for 15 minutes, turn meatballs over and bake for a further 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Chicken Meatballs (Kid Pleaser). Ingredients: spring onions, carrot, flour, parsley, egg. Instructions: Combine all ingredients. Roll walnut sized pieces into balls. Place on a lightly greased oven tray and bake at 200.C for 15 minutes, turn meatballs over and bake for a further 10 minutes.

title: Simply Dirty Rice
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Brown sausage and onion in a large skillet.
Mix beef consume, mushroom soup, rice, and cooked sausage and onion in a dutch oven (cast iron is always best).
Slice the stick butter into thin slices and heavily layer on top of mixture.
Top the dish with all of the parsley.
Cover the dutch oven and bake for 1 hour. Fluff with a fork to check, but
**do not "stir" the rice until ready to serve**.
text: Recipe: Simply Dirty Rice. Ingredients: beef consomme, cream of mushroom soup, rice, sage sausage, sweet onion, butter, parsley. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Brown sausage and onion in a large skillet. Mix beef consume, mushroom soup, rice, and cooked sausage and onion in a dutch oven (cast iron is always best). Slice the stick butter into thin slices and heavily layer on top of mixture. Top the dish with all of the parsley. Cover the dutch oven and bake for 1 hour. Fluff with a fork to check, but **do not "stir" the rice until ready to serve**.

title: Sausage And 3-Cheese Mac And Cheese
instructions: Preheat broiler on high.
Place a large pot of water over high heat and bring up to a boil. Once boiling, add some salt and the pasta. Cook the pasta to al dente according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
While the water is coming up to a boil to cook the pasta, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.

Add the sausage and break it up it to little pieces as it starts to cook. Cook sausage until brown about 4-5 minutes. Remove sausage from the skillet and drain off all but about 3 tablespoons of the fat.
Return the skillet to the heat and add the onion and garlic, and season with a little salt and a lot of pepper.
Cook, stirring frequently, for 3-4 minutes or until the onions start to get soft. Sprinkle onions with the flour and continue to cook for about 1 minute.
Whisk in the chicken stock and milk, bring up to a simmer and season it with the nutmeg. Add the Asiago and provolone cheese, and stir until melted.
Add the drained pasta and cooked sausage to the cheese sauce. Stir to combine, then transfer to a baking dish.
In a bowl, combine the bread crumbs, melted butter, Parmigiano and chopped parsley. Toss to combine then sprinkle over the mac and cheese in the baking dish.
Place baking dish in the broiler and broil until the bread topping is nice and brown.
text: Recipe: Sausage And 3-Cheese Mac And Cheese. Ingredients: pasta, extra virgin olive oil, sweet Italian sausage, yellow onion, garlic, flour, chicken stock, milk, nutmeg, asiago cheese, provolone cheese, breadcrumbs, butter, parmigiano-reggiano cheese, flat leaf parsley. Instructions: Preheat broiler on high. Place a large pot of water over high heat and bring up to a boil. Once boiling, add some salt and the pasta. Cook the pasta to al dente according to package directions. Drain and set aside. While the water is coming up to a boil to cook the pasta, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add the sausage and break it up it to little pieces as it starts to cook. Cook sausage until brown about 4-5 minutes. Remove sausage from the skillet and drain off all but about 3 tablespoons of the fat. Return the skillet to the heat and add the onion and garlic, and season with a little salt and a lot of pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, for 3-4 minutes or until the onions start to get soft. Sprinkle onions with the flour and continue to cook for about 1 minute. Whisk in the chicken stock and milk, bring up to a simmer and season it with the nutmeg. Add the Asiago and provolone cheese, and stir until melted. Add the drained pasta and cooked sausage to the cheese sauce. Stir to combine, then transfer to a baking dish. In a bowl, combine the bread crumbs, melted butter, Parmigiano and chopped parsley. Toss to combine then sprinkle over the mac and cheese in the baking dish. Place baking dish in the broiler and broil until the bread topping is nice and brown.

title: Sloppy Joe Meatloaf
instructions: in a large bowl combine all ingredients-do not over work the mixture as you will have a tough meatloaf.
shape into a loaf and put in a deep baking dish.
put in a preheated 350 degree oven on middle rack for 60-90 minutes.
the center of the meat should reach 160 degrees on a meat thermometer.
text: Recipe: Sloppy Joe Meatloaf. Ingredients: ground beef, breadcrumbs, eggs, yellow onion. Instructions: in a large bowl combine all ingredients-do not over work the mixture as you will have a tough meatloaf. shape into a loaf and put in a deep baking dish. put in a preheated 350 degree oven on middle rack for 60-90 minutes. the center of the meat should reach 160 degrees on a meat thermometer.

title: Irish Potato Soup - My Way
instructions: 1. Melt Irish butter in pan. Thinly slice onion & potatoes and add to pan.
2. Add the chicken bouillion, celery, dried parsley, garlic, and season with salt & pepper.
3. Cover the pan, allowing the vegetables to soften under a low heat, do not let them brown.
4. Add milk and mix until soup becomes thick then stir in cheese until fully melted.
5. Serve piping hot with a few slices of buttered bread & enjoy.
6. Experiment with adding other ingredients.
text: Recipe: Irish Potato Soup - My Way. Ingredients: butter, onions, potatoes, chicken, milk, garlic, parsley, stalks celery, salt, low-fat cheese. Instructions: 1. Melt Irish butter in pan. Thinly slice onion & potatoes and add to pan. 2. Add the chicken bouillion, celery, dried parsley, garlic, and season with salt & pepper. 3. Cover the pan, allowing the vegetables to soften under a low heat, do not let them brown. 4. Add milk and mix until soup becomes thick then stir in cheese until fully melted. 5. Serve piping hot with a few slices of buttered bread & enjoy. 6. Experiment with adding other ingredients.

title: Gruyere Cheese Bread Ring
instructions: Preheat oven to 400*, then heat milk and butter to rolling boil.
Stir in flour.
Stir vigorously over low heat until mixture forms a ball - about 1 minute.
Remove from heat and beat in eggs all at once, continue beating until smooth.
Fold in 2/3 cups cheese.
Drop dough by tablespoons full onto a greased cookie sheet to form 8" ring.
Smooth with a spatula.
Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake 20- 25 minutes (or) until golden.
text: Recipe: Gruyere Cheese Bread Ring. Ingredients: milk, butter, flour, eggs, gruyere cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400*, then heat milk and butter to rolling boil. Stir in flour. Stir vigorously over low heat until mixture forms a ball - about 1 minute. Remove from heat and beat in eggs all at once, continue beating until smooth. Fold in 2/3 cups cheese. Drop dough by tablespoons full onto a greased cookie sheet to form 8" ring. Smooth with a spatula. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake 20- 25 minutes (or) until golden.

title: Marta Sgubin'S Mashed Potatoes For Jackie Kennedy Onassis
instructions: Peel the potatoes and place them in a large pot with cold water to cover.
Boil them for 40 minutes or until they are very soft. They are ready if they fall apart when poked with a fork. Drain in a colander.
Off the heat, put 12 tablespoons of the butter into the pot in which the potatoes were boiled.

When it begins to melt from the heat of the pot, fit a food mill with a fine blade over the pot and put the potatoes through it. They really have to be milled; if they are actually mashed, they will be lumpy.
Put the pot of potatoes back on the stove over VERY LOW heat. Stir with a whisk to incorporate the butter.

Little by litle, begin pouring in the hot milk. Stir a LOT as you pour so the potatoes get really fluffy. You may not need all of the milk; add enough so the potatoes get to the consistency of thick whipped cream.
Keep the potatoes over low heat and keep stirring. The potatoes have to be really stretched. If they get too thick, add more milk.
Just before serving, beat in the remaining 4 tablespoons of butter. Salt and pepper to taste.
text: Recipe: Marta Sgubin'S Mashed Potatoes For Jackie Kennedy Onassis. Ingredients: potatoes, kerry irish gold butter, milk. Instructions: Peel the potatoes and place them in a large pot with cold water to cover. Boil them for 40 minutes or until they are very soft. They are ready if they fall apart when poked with a fork. Drain in a colander. Off the heat, put 12 tablespoons of the butter into the pot in which the potatoes were boiled. When it begins to melt from the heat of the pot, fit a food mill with a fine blade over the pot and put the potatoes through it.
