When cool, add sausage, 3/4 cup of the breadcrumbs, cheese, rice, and egg. Mix very well with hands. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F and lightly oil a baking sheet. With hands, form into golf ball size pieces and coat them in the remaining breadcrumbs. Place rice balls on baking sheet. Bake at 400 degrees F for 20 minutes. Warm marinara sauce and drizzle over rice balls. Garnish with grated parmesan cheese.

title: No Roux White Sauce
instructions: Mix a little of the milk with the cornflour to form a smooth paste and mix into the rest of the milk.
Heat in a saucepan on a medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
text: Recipe: No Roux White Sauce. Ingredients: cornflour, milk. Instructions: Mix a little of the milk with the cornflour to form a smooth paste and mix into the rest of the milk. Heat in a saucepan on a medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.

title: Cambozola Scalloped Style Potatoes #Sp5
instructions: Mix flour with cream until smooth.
Add finely chopped parsley to mix.
Chop cambozola cheese into cubes.
Layer potatoes with cheese and flour/cream mixture (3-4 layers).
Bake at 375?F oven until thickened, bubbly and lightly browned on top.
text: Recipe: Cambozola Scalloped Style Potatoes #Sp5. Ingredients: Potatoes, cambozola cheese, Flour, parsley. Instructions: Mix flour with cream until smooth. Add finely chopped parsley to mix. Chop cambozola cheese into cubes. Layer potatoes with cheese and flour/cream mixture (3-4 layers). Bake at 375?F oven until thickened, bubbly and lightly browned on top.

title: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Spray both sides of each bread with cooking spray. Then place in toaster, toasted to your desire. Then place cheese slices between the toast and microwave for 15 seconds. Serve and eat!
text: Recipe: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: bread, cheese, butter. Instructions: Spray both sides of each bread with cooking spray. Then place in toaster, toasted to your desire. Then place cheese slices between the toast and microwave for 15 seconds. Serve and eat!

title: Cheese-Topped Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Combine sweet potato, onion, garlic & stock in a pan, cover & simmer until potato is tender, drain.
Placew sweet potato into a greased oven-proof dish.
Melt butter in a pan, stir in flour & stir over heat until bubbling.
Remove from heat and gradually stir in combined milk & extra stock.
Return to heat & stir until sauce boils & thickens, stir in thyme.
Pour sauce over sweet potato and top with breadcrumbs & cheese.
Bake at 180.C for approx 20 mins or until nicely browned.
text: Recipe: Cheese-Topped Sweet Potato Casserole. Ingredients: sweet potato, red onion, garlic, chicken stock, butter, flour, low-fat milk, chicken stock, thyme, whole wheat bread crumbs, cheese. Instructions: Combine sweet potato, onion, garlic & stock in a pan, cover & simmer until potato is tender, drain. Placew sweet potato into a greased oven-proof dish. Melt butter in a pan, stir in flour & stir over heat until bubbling. Remove from heat and gradually stir in combined milk & extra stock. Return to heat & stir until sauce boils & thickens, stir in thyme. Pour sauce over sweet potato and top with breadcrumbs & cheese. Bake at 180.C for approx 20 mins or until nicely browned.

title: Grilled Ham And Blue Cheese Sandwich - Croque Monsieur
instructions: Toast bread slice, and butter if desired.
Top with ham slices and cheese.
Grill until cheese has melted.
text: Recipe: Grilled Ham And Blue Cheese Sandwich - Croque Monsieur. Ingredients: bread, butter, ham slices, blue cheese. Instructions: Toast bread slice, and butter if desired. Top with ham slices and cheese. Grill until cheese has melted.

title: Chip Dip
instructions: Grate the cheese.
Mix the grated cheese in with the sour cream in a microwavable bowl.
Heat the mixture, stirring frequently, until the cheese is melted and the dip reaches the desired temperature.
text: Recipe: Chip Dip. Ingredients: sour cream, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Grate the cheese. Mix the grated cheese in with the sour cream in a microwavable bowl. Heat the mixture, stirring frequently, until the cheese is melted and the dip reaches the desired temperature.

title: Shahana'S Pan-Fried Asparagus With Onions
instructions: Melt first amount of butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Add asparagus and cook until bright green but still firm.
Stir in second amount of butter and the onion into the asparagus.
Sprinkle with onion powder.
Cook and stir until onion is softened and asparagus are crisp-tender.
text: Recipe: Shahana'S Pan-Fried Asparagus With Onions. Ingredients: butter, butter, onions, onion. Instructions: Melt first amount of butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add asparagus and cook until bright green but still firm. Stir in second amount of butter and the onion into the asparagus. Sprinkle with onion powder. Cook and stir until onion is softened and asparagus are crisp-tender.

title: Corn And Cheese Souffle
instructions: Lightly butter the bottom of a 2 quart souffle dish. Set aside.
Melt 1/3 cup butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat stirring constantly. gradually add milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
Add cheeses, stirring until melted.
Stir in corn, garlic powder, and red pepper.
Beat egg yolks at medium speed with an electric mixer until thick and pale.
Stir into corn mixture.
Combine egg whites and cream of tartar; beat at high speed until stiff peaks form; fold into souffle mixture.
Spoon into prepared dish.
Bake at 350F for 55 to 60 minutes.
Serve right away.
text: Recipe: Corn And Cheese Souffle. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, cheddar cheese, provolone cheese, cream-style, garlic, ground red pepper, eggs, cream of tartar. Instructions: Lightly butter the bottom of a 2 quart souffle dish. Set aside. Melt 1/3 cup butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat stirring constantly. gradually add milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. Add cheeses, stirring until melted. Stir in corn, garlic powder, and red pepper. Beat egg yolks at medium speed with an electric mixer until thick and pale. Stir into corn mixture. Combine egg whites and cream of tartar; beat at high speed until stiff peaks form; fold into souffle mixture. Spoon into prepared dish. Bake at 350F for 55 to 60 minutes. Serve right away.

title: Chicken Cordon Bleu (Bh&G)
instructions: Place a chicken breast half between 2 pieces of plastic wrap. Using the flat side of a meat mallet pound chicken lightly into a rectangle about 1/8 inch thick. Remove plastic wrap. Repeat with remaining chicken.
Place a slice of prosciutto and a slice of cheese on each chicken piece. Fold in the bottom and sides; roll up. Secure with wooden toothpicks.
In a medium skillet cook rolls in hot butter over medium-low heat for 20 to 25 minutes or until no longer pink (170 degrees F), turning to brown evenly. Remove toothpicks before serving.
text: Recipe: Chicken Cordon Bleu (Bh&G). Ingredients: chicken, ham, swiss cheese, butter. Instructions: Place a chicken breast half between 2 pieces of plastic wrap. Using the flat side of a meat mallet pound chicken lightly into a rectangle about 1/8 inch thick. Remove plastic wrap. Repeat with remaining chicken. Place a slice of prosciutto and a slice of cheese on each chicken piece. Fold in the bottom and sides; roll up. Secure with wooden toothpicks. In a medium skillet cook rolls in hot butter over medium-low heat for 20 to 25 minutes or until no longer pink (170 degrees F), turning to brown evenly. Remove toothpicks before serving.

title: Grilled Eggplant (Aubergine) Parmesan
instructions: Stir cheese mix, breadcrumbs, and 1/3 cup basil in medium bowl to blend.

Prepare barbecue (medium heat). Sprinkle eggplant and tomatoes with salt and pepper. Brush 1 side of eggplant slices with some oil. Grill, oiled side down, until bottom side is tender and grill marks appear, about 3 minutes. Brush second side of eggplant slices with more oil; turn over and top grilled side with tomatoes, then cheese mixture. Sprinkle with Parmesan. Drizzle with remaining oil. Cover and grill until tomatoes are tender and cheese melts, about 7 minutes. Transfer eggplant slices to plates. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons basil and serve.
text: Recipe: Grilled Eggplant (Aubergine) Parmesan. Ingredients: mozzarella cheese, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, fresh basil, fresh basil, eggplant, tomatoes, garlic, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Stir cheese mix, breadcrumbs, and 1/3 cup basil in medium bowl to blend. Prepare barbecue (medium heat). Sprinkle eggplant and tomatoes with salt and pepper. Brush 1 side of eggplant slices with some oil. Grill, oiled side down, until bottom side is tender and grill marks appear, about 3 minutes. Brush second side of eggplant slices with more oil; turn over and top grilled side with tomatoes, then cheese mixture. Sprinkle with Parmesan. Drizzle with remaining oil. Cover and grill until tomatoes are tender and cheese melts, about 7 minutes. Transfer eggplant slices to plates. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons basil and serve.

title: Stew Meat
instructions: Mix together french onion and cream of mushroom soups in a 2 1/2 qt casserole dish.
Add stew meat raw, making sure that all the meat is covered by the soup (it browns and cooks in the oven with the soups).
Cover and place in 350 degree oven for 3 hours.
Serve over steamed rice or noodles with a salad.
This recipe doubles or triples easily (just add one can of either soup per extra pound of meat).
I usually make extra and freeze it for another night.
text: Recipe: Stew Meat. Ingredients: beef stew meat, onion soup, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: Mix together french onion and cream of mushroom soups in a 2 1/2 qt casserole dish. Add stew meat raw, making sure that all the meat is covered by the soup (it browns and cooks in the oven with the soups). Cover and place in 350 degree oven for 3 hours. Serve over steamed rice or noodles with a salad. This recipe doubles or triples easily (just add one can of either soup per extra pound of meat). I usually make extra and freeze it for another night.

title: Onion Roasted Chicken And Vegetables
instructions: Preheat oven to 450.
In a large plastic bag or bowl, add all ingredients.
Close bag and shake, or toss in bowl, until chicken and vegetables are evenly coated.
Empty chicken, potatoes and carrots into large baking or roasting pan; discard bag.
Arrange chicken breast side up.
Bake uncovered, basting half way through, 45 minutes or until chicken and vegetables are done.
text: Recipe: Onion Roasted Chicken And Vegetables. Ingredients: onion soup, olive oil, garlic powder, chicken, potato, carrots. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450. In a large plastic bag or bowl, add all ingredients. Close bag and shake, or toss in bowl, until chicken and vegetables are evenly coated. Empty chicken, potatoes and carrots into large baking or roasting pan; discard bag. Arrange chicken breast side up. Bake uncovered, basting half way through, 45 minutes or until chicken and vegetables are done.

title: Italian Wedding Soup
instructions: In soup pot on med heat, bring broth to a boil.
In bowl mix beef, pork, 3 eggs, crumbs, basil, parsley, and 1/2 cup parmesan.
Mix well and form into tiny bite size balls.
Drop the balls into the broth.
Add escarole.
When meatballs rise to the top, they are cooked, (7-8 minutes).
When ecsarole is wilted it is done.
In another bowl, mix the remaining eggs with the remaining parmesan.
Add to soup, stirring continuously, until cooked through.
text: Recipe: Italian Wedding Soup. Ingredients: chicken broth, ground beef, ground pork, eggs, breadcrumbs, basil, parsley, parmesan cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: In soup pot on med heat, bring broth to a boil. In bowl mix beef, pork, 3 eggs, crumbs, basil, parsley, and 1/2 cup parmesan. Mix well and form into tiny bite size balls. Drop the balls into the broth. Add escarole. When meatballs rise to the top, they are cooked, (7-8 minutes). When ecsarole is wilted it is done. In another bowl, mix the remaining eggs with the remaining parmesan. Add to soup, stirring continuously, until cooked through.

title: Baked Creamed Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Spray 9 x 13 pan with non stick spray.
Place flour in bowl and dredge chicken and shake off excess.
Place in pan.
Sprinkle dry soup mix over all.
Empty canned soups into a 4 cup measuring bowl and mix well with enough milk to arrive at the 4 cup level.
Pour mixture over the chicken.
Bake uncovered 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Baked Creamed Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, flour, onion soup, cream of mushroom soup, milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray 9 x 13 pan with non stick spray. Place flour in bowl and dredge chicken and shake off excess. Place in pan. Sprinkle dry soup mix over all. Empty canned soups into a 4 cup measuring bowl and mix well with enough milk to arrive at the 4 cup level. Pour mixture over the chicken. Bake uncovered 1 hour.

title: Beer Bread Spread
instructions: Soften Cream Cheese.
Mix cheese in a mixer.
Add Garlic.
This is amazing on beer bread or everything bagels.
text: Recipe: Beer Bread Spread. Ingredients: cream cheese, English cheese spread, garlic powder. Instructions: Soften Cream Cheese. Mix cheese in a mixer. Add Garlic. This is amazing on beer bread or everything bagels.

title: Cottage Cheese Omelet
instructions: Beat together egg yolks, cottage cheese,cream and parsley. Add salt and pepper to taste. Fold in beaten egg whites. Heat butter in oven safe skillet, add the mixture and cook over low heat until bottom is set. Transfer the skillet to a 350 degree oven and bake for 15 minutes or until omelet is set and is lightly browned.
text: Recipe: Cottage Cheese Omelet. Ingredients: egg yolks, cottage cheese, light cream, parsley, egg whites, butter. Instructions: Beat together egg yolks, cottage cheese,cream and parsley. Add salt and pepper to taste. Fold in beaten egg whites. Heat butter in oven safe skillet, add the mixture and cook over low heat until bottom is set. Transfer the skillet to a 350 degree oven and bake for 15 minutes or until omelet is set and is lightly browned.

title: Mississippi Sin Dip - Low Fat - Weight Watcher Friendly
instructions: dice up ham then mix all ingredients together.
buy a loaf of round bread and clean it out to use as a bowl.
bake in bread bowl for 1 hour at 350 degrees. wrap it in tin foil when baking.
I serve this with the insides of the bread bowl and reduced fat wheat thins.
this is a weight watchers recipe and your family will never suspect.
text: Recipe: Mississippi Sin Dip - Low Fat - Weight Watcher Friendly. Ingredients: sour cream, onion, cheddar cheese, extra-lean ham, garlic, onion flakes. Instructions: dice up ham then mix all ingredients together. buy a loaf of round bread and clean it out to use as a bowl. bake in bread bowl for 1 hour at 350 degrees. wrap it in tin foil when baking. I serve this with the insides of the bread bowl and reduced fat wheat thins. this is a weight watchers recipe and your family will never suspect.

title: Grilled Cheese With Thousand Island Dressing
instructions: Cook the bacon in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 6-8 minutes. Remove and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
Heat the butter in the skillet over medium heat.
Add 2 bread slices. Top each with one-quarter of the cheese and 2 strips bacon.
Spread 2 bread slices with some of the dressing and press them on top of the sandwiches, dressing-side down.
Cook until the cheese melts and the bread is golden, 3 to 4 minutes per side.
Repeat to make 2 more sandwiches, adding more butter as needed.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese With Thousand Island Dressing. Ingredients: veggie bacon, unsalted butter, bread, cotswold cheese. Instructions: Cook the bacon in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 6-8 minutes. Remove and place on a paper towel-lined plate. Heat the butter in the skillet over medium heat. Add 2 bread slices. Top each with one-quarter of the cheese and 2 strips bacon. Spread 2 bread slices with some of the dressing and press them on top of the sandwiches, dressing-side down. Cook until the cheese melts and the bread is golden, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Repeat to make 2 more sandwiches, adding more butter as needed.

title: Rice Krispies Kugel
instructions: Combine Rice Krispies, eggs, cheese and soup powder and pour into a greased baking dish.
Top with onions.
Bake about 1 hour at medium heat.
text: Recipe: Rice Krispies Kugel. Ingredients: Rice Krispies, eggs, cottage cheese, onion soup mix, onion. Instructions: Combine Rice Krispies, eggs, cheese and soup powder and pour into a greased baking dish. Top with onions. Bake about 1 hour at medium heat.

title: Ravioli Stove Top Meal
instructions: Crumble beef into skillet.
Add onion and fry until brown.
Stir in 2 cans beef ravioli.
Heat until bubbly.
Add 1 1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese to top of meal.
Heat until melted.
Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Ravioli Stove Top Meal. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, beef ravioli, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Crumble beef into skillet. Add onion and fry until brown. Stir in 2 cans beef ravioli. Heat until bubbly. Add 1 1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese to top of meal. Heat until melted. Serve warm.

title: Quick Cream Cheese Pastry (Tart Shells)
instructions: Beat butter and cream cheese in a bowl until smooth. Add flour; beat just until a soft dough forms. Form into a ball and wrap in plastic wrap; chill for 1 hour or overnight.
Preheat oven to 425 degrees F/220°C.

Shape dough into 1"/2.5 cm balls. Place each ball of dough into cups of mini muffin pan. Dip Mini-Tart Shaper into flour; press into dough to form tart shells. Pierce shells with a fork. (If you don't have a Mini-Tart shaper just use your fingers and form into shells).
Bake 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool in pan for 5 minutes; carefully remove tart shells from pan. Cool completely. Fill as desired.
text: Recipe: Quick Cream Cheese Pastry (Tart Shells). Ingredients: butter, cream cheese, flour. Instructions: Beat butter and cream cheese in a bowl until smooth. Add flour; beat just until a soft dough forms. Form into a ball and wrap in plastic wrap; chill for 1 hour or overnight. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F/220°C. Shape dough into 1"/2.5 cm balls. Place each ball of dough into cups of mini muffin pan. Dip Mini-Tart Shaper into flour; press into dough to form tart shells. Pierce shells with a fork. (If you don't have a Mini-Tart shaper just use your fingers and form into shells). Bake 10-12 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool in pan for 5 minutes; carefully remove tart shells from pan. Cool completely. Fill as desired.

title: Parmesan Cream Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in sauce pan with cream cheese.
Add Whipping Cream mix well bring to a simmer.
Add 3/4°C of Parmesan Cheese.
Let simmer for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Cream Sauce. Ingredients: cream, cream cheese, butter, parmesan cheese, garlic. Instructions: Melt butter in sauce pan with cream cheese. Add Whipping Cream mix well bring to a simmer. Add 3/4°C of Parmesan Cheese. Let simmer for 30 minutes.

title: Liver Cake For Dog
instructions: Chop up liver and get it into food processor to make liver paste.
Separate the white and yolk of eggs and whisk white.
Add yolk and garlic ground to 1 and mix.
Add flour and mix bit by bit to 3.
Fold whisked white into 4.
Run 5 into mold.
Light the oven and set it at 180~200 degrees. Bake 40 minutes.
text: Recipe: Liver Cake For Dog. Ingredients: chicken livers, eggs, flour, garlic. Instructions: Chop up liver and get it into food processor to make liver paste. Separate the white and yolk of eggs and whisk white. Add yolk and garlic ground to 1 and mix. Add flour and mix bit by bit to 3. Fold whisked white into 4. Run 5 into mold. Light the oven and set it at 180~200 degrees. Bake 40 minutes.

title: Pork Chops With Cheesy Hash Browns Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a large skillet, brown pork chops in 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat, turning once to brown; set aside.
Add onions and garlic to pan and cook and stir over medium heat until crisp tender.
Add condensed soup and milk; cook and stir until bubbly.
Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
In 13x9" glass baking dish, combine potatoes and cheeses and toss to mix.
Add the soup/onion mixture and stir to combine.
Place the browned pork chops on top.
Bake casserole, uncovered, for 40 minutes.
Place sugar snap peas and 2 tablespoons olive oil in a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish; toss to coat and place in oven with potato/pork chop dish.
Bake 15-20 minutes longer or until pork chops are fully cooked, casserole is bubbling, and peas are hot and tender.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops With Cheesy Hash Browns Potatoes. Ingredients: pork loin chops, olive oil, onion, garlic, condensed cream, milk, sour cream, potatoes, swiss cheese, parmesan cheese, frozen sugar snap peas, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large skillet, brown pork chops in 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat, turning once to brown; set aside. Add onions and garlic to pan and cook and stir over medium heat until crisp tender. Add condensed soup and milk; cook and stir until bubbly. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream. In 13x9" glass baking dish, combine potatoes and cheeses and toss to mix. Add the soup/onion mixture and stir to combine. Place the browned pork chops on top. Bake casserole, uncovered, for 40 minutes. Place sugar snap peas and 2 tablespoons olive oil in a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish; toss to coat and place in oven with potato/pork chop dish. Bake 15-20 minutes longer or until pork chops are fully cooked, casserole is bubbling, and peas are hot and tender.

title: Chicken In Basil Cream Sauce
instructions: Heat olive oil in frying pan on medium heat.
Coat chicken in breadcrumbs, optionally with a milk or egg wash first.
Cook chicken approximately 4-5 minutes on each side, until done. Slice a bit of chicken to ensure doneness.
Remove chicken from pan, leaving behind any drippings and grease.
Deglaze pan with chicken broth.
Add heavy cream, basil,garlic, butter, tomatoes, and half the parmesan cheese.
Simmer, stirring often to prevent any burning and to incorporate chicken drippings.
Add remaining parmesan cheese as desired. Salt and pepper to taste.
When cream sauce has thickened, turn heat to low. A small amount of flour or corn starch can be used to thicken it faster if needed.
Serve chicken on top of pasta, covered in the cream sauce. Garnish with parsley and parmesan.
text: Recipe: Chicken In Basil Cream Sauce. Ingredients: penne pasta, chicken breasts, olive oil, breadcrumbs, chicken broth, heavy cream, fresh basil, butter, garlic, roma tomatoes, parmesan cheese, salt. Instructions: Heat olive oil in frying pan on medium heat. Coat chicken in breadcrumbs, optionally with a milk or egg wash first. Cook chicken approximately 4-5 minutes on each side, until done. Slice a bit of chicken to ensure doneness. Remove chicken from pan, leaving behind any drippings and grease. Deglaze pan with chicken broth. Add heavy cream, basil,garlic, butter, tomatoes, and half the parmesan cheese. Simmer, stirring often to prevent any burning and to incorporate chicken drippings. Add remaining parmesan cheese as desired. Salt and pepper to taste. When cream sauce has thickened, turn heat to low. A small amount of flour or corn starch can be used to thicken it faster if needed. Serve chicken on top of pasta, covered in the cream sauce. Garnish with parsley and parmesan.

title: Breakfast Bird'S Nest
instructions: Lay bread on the counter or a plate.
Using a wide topped glass, cut a circle out of the center of the bread.
Over medium heat, melt 1 tsp butter in a non-stick skillet.
When heated, lay both pieces of bread (the circle and the piece with the hole) in pan and reduce heat to low-medium.
When bread is very lightly browned on the bottom, drop 1 tsp butter into the hole.
When melted, crack the egg over the hole and allow egg to drop into and fill the hole.
Cook for 1- 2 minutes and then flip the bread with the egg and the bread circle over.
Cook for about 2- 3 minutes, until bread is lightly browned and egg is set.
Serve egg with the toasted bread circle for dipping.
text: Recipe: Breakfast Bird'S Nest. Ingredients: egg, bread, butter. Instructions: Lay bread on the counter or a plate. Using a wide topped glass, cut a circle out of the center of the bread. Over medium heat, melt 1 tsp butter in a non-stick skillet. When heated, lay both pieces of bread (the circle and the piece with the hole) in pan and reduce heat to low-medium. When bread is very lightly browned on the bottom, drop 1 tsp butter into the hole. When melted, crack the egg over the hole and allow egg to drop into and fill the hole. Cook for 1- 2 minutes and then flip the bread with the egg and the bread circle over. Cook for about 2- 3 minutes, until bread is lightly browned and egg is set. Serve egg with the toasted bread circle for dipping.

title: Baked Manicotti
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°.
In 13 x 9-inch baking dish, spread 1/2 of the Pasta Sauce.
Add manicotti, then top with remaining Pasta Sauce and sprinkle with cheeses.
Bake covered 20 minutes.
Remove cover and continue baking 5 minutes or until heated through.
text: Recipe: Baked Manicotti. Ingredients: world style pasta sauce, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. In 13 x 9-inch baking dish, spread 1/2 of the Pasta Sauce. Add manicotti, then top with remaining Pasta Sauce and sprinkle with cheeses. Bake covered 20 minutes. Remove cover and continue baking 5 minutes or until heated through.

title: Easy Cheeseburger Bread
instructions: Brown beef; combine beef & garlic powder; set aside.
Butter both halves of bread; place on an ungreased baking sheet.
Stir sour cream into beef mixture; spread onto bread.
Sprinkle with cheese.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until cheese melts; slice to serve.
text: Recipe: Easy Cheeseburger Bread. Ingredients: ground beef, garlic powder, butter, bread, sour cream, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Brown beef; combine beef & garlic powder; set aside. Butter both halves of bread; place on an ungreased baking sheet. Stir sour cream into beef mixture; spread onto bread. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until cheese melts; slice to serve.

title: Easiest, Best Buffalo Wings!
instructions: Preheat oven to 350.
Spread wing pieces in single layer in baking pan.
Bake 45 minutes if thawed, 1hr from frozen.
Melt butter in saucepan on stove until bubbly and just beginning to turn brown.
Remove from heat and whisk in the whole bottle of hot sauce. No other brand has quite the same flavor!
Pour sauce over wings and serve. There will be a lot of sauce!
text: Recipe: Easiest, Best Buffalo Wings!. Ingredients: chicken, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350. Spread wing pieces in single layer in baking pan. Bake 45 minutes if thawed, 1hr from frozen. Melt butter in saucepan on stove until bubbly and just beginning to turn brown. Remove from heat and whisk in the whole bottle of hot sauce. No other brand has quite the same flavor! Pour sauce over wings and serve. There will be a lot of sauce!

title: Hungry Girl Low Fat Cheese Sauce
instructions: Melt all three cheeses in a saucepan with the soymilk; stir to combine.
Best results for me on a low to medium heat, stirring constantly so it doesn't burn to the bottom of the pan.
text: Recipe: Hungry Girl Low Fat Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: light vanilla soymilk, cheddar cheese, Velveeta reduced fat cheese, cream cheese. Instructions: Melt all three cheeses in a saucepan with the soymilk; stir to combine. Best results for me on a low to medium heat, stirring constantly so it doesn't burn to the bottom of the pan.

title: Fred Harvey Cream Sauce
instructions: In a 2-qt saucepan make a roux using the butter and flour and bring to a light brown color.
Meanwhile in another pan combine the milk and stock and heat to just boiling.
Pour the milk mixture slowly into the roux whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Cook over low heat for 30 min.
text: Recipe: Fred Harvey Cream Sauce. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, chicken stock. Instructions: In a 2-qt saucepan make a roux using the butter and flour and bring to a light brown color. Meanwhile in another pan combine the milk and stock and heat to just boiling. Pour the milk mixture slowly into the roux whisking constantly to prevent lumps. Cook over low heat for 30 min.

title: Old Fashioned Mac And Cheese
instructions: preheat oven 375.
boil pasta as per package directions cut off about 4 mins cooking time.
while pasta cooks cube cheese set about half of one flavour cheese aside, I personally set aside about half of the mild cheese.
drain pasta when finished cooking.
in pan or large baking dish combine remaining cheese celery soup or cheddar cheese soup, milk, and pasta. Stir to combine well.
Place set aside cheese over top.
Place in oven about 45 mins or until cheese on top is a golden brown.
text: Recipe: Old Fashioned Mac And Cheese. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, cheddar cheese, condensed celery soup, milk, pasta. Instructions: preheat oven 375. boil pasta as per package directions cut off about 4 mins cooking time. while pasta cooks cube cheese set about half of one flavour cheese aside, I personally set aside about half of the mild cheese. drain pasta when finished cooking. in pan or large baking dish combine remaining cheese celery soup or cheddar cheese soup, milk, and pasta. Stir to combine well. Place set aside cheese over top. Place in oven about 45 mins or until cheese on top is a golden brown.

title: Eggs Rothko
instructions: Place oven rack in lowest position.
Preheat oven to broil.
Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat until it begins to foam.
Place brioche slices in the skillet, moving them around until well-buttered and browned.
Using a cookie cutter, biscuit cutter, or drinking glass, press a hole in the center of each bread slice; discard the cutout rounds.
Divide the remaining tablespoon of butter between the 2 holes in the bread.
When butter begins to foam, crack an egg into each hole.
Cook until the egg whites set about halfway up the sides of the yolks.
Flip the bread with a spatula and cook for another minute or so.
Remove bread from skillet and place onto a broiler pan.
Spread grated cheese thoroughly over the bread (covering as much surface area as possible to prevent the bread from burning).
Place pan under the broiler.
Remove as soon as the cheese melts.
Serve with broiled tomatoes or a simply dressed green salad BUT I would want some bacon and fruit added to feel well-fed. :-) .
text: Recipe: Eggs Rothko. Ingredients: butter, bread, eggs, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Place oven rack in lowest position. Preheat oven to broil. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat until it begins to foam. Place brioche slices in the skillet, moving them around until well-buttered and browned. Using a cookie cutter, biscuit cutter, or drinking glass, press a hole in the center of each bread slice; discard the cutout rounds. Divide the remaining tablespoon of butter between the 2 holes in the bread. When butter begins to foam, crack an egg into each hole. Cook until the egg whites set about halfway up the sides of the yolks. Flip the bread with a spatula and cook for another minute or so. Remove bread from skillet and place onto a broiler pan. Spread grated cheese thoroughly over the bread (covering as much surface area as possible to prevent the bread from burning). Place pan under the broiler. Remove as soon as the cheese melts. Serve with broiled tomatoes or a simply dressed green salad BUT I would want some bacon and fruit added to feel well-fed. :-) .

title: Alouette French Bread
instructions: Slice bread in half, lengthwise. Spread with cheese.Sprinkle with parmesan. Broil until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Alouette French Bread. Ingredients: bread, garlic, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Slice bread in half, lengthwise. Spread with cheese.Sprinkle with parmesan. Broil until cheese melts.

title: Classic Caramel Milkshake
instructions: Place milk, caramel syrup, and ice cream in blender container; cover.
Blend until smooth and thick.
Serve immediately!
text: Recipe: Classic Caramel Milkshake. Ingredients: cold milk, caramel ice cream topping, chocolate ice cream. Instructions: Place milk, caramel syrup, and ice cream in blender container; cover. Blend until smooth and thick. Serve immediately!

title: Pork Chops And Rice (Crock Pot)
instructions: Brown pork chops in olive oil, remove and set aside.
Add rice, onion, celery, and chilies to the pan; saute (stir-fry) for 2 minutes.
Add garlic saute another 2 minutes.
Add 1 cup stock to pan, scrape to deglaze.
Pour onion/rice mixture into the crock pot.
Add the 2 cans of soup add remaining 4 cups of stock to the crock pot; mix well.
Place the pork chops on the onion/rice.
Cook on high for 1 hour, then on low for 3 hours.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops And Rice (Crock Pot). Ingredients: olive oil, pork chops, white onions, stalks celery, jalapeno chile, garlic, basmati rice, cream of mushroom soup, cream of celery soup, chicken stock. Instructions: Brown pork chops in olive oil, remove and set aside. Add rice, onion, celery, and chilies to the pan; saute (stir-fry) for 2 minutes. Add garlic saute another 2 minutes. Add 1 cup stock to pan, scrape to deglaze. Pour onion/rice mixture into the crock pot. Add the 2 cans of soup add remaining 4 cups of stock to the crock pot; mix well. Place the pork chops on the onion/rice. Cook on high for 1 hour, then on low for 3 hours.

title: Butternut Pumpkin Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan, cook onion, stirring, until soft.
Stir in pumpkin and potato, cook, stirring, 5 minutes.
Stir in stock, bring to a boil, simmer, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until pumpkin is soft, stirring occasionally.
Blend or process soup, in batches, until pureed.
If desired, push through food mill or large sieve into a large clean saucepan.
Serve topped with a dollop of sour cream and a few chives (optional).
If adding cream:
Just before serving, add cream, stir over heat until soup is hot.
text: Recipe: Butternut Pumpkin Soup. Ingredients: butter, yellow onion, butternut pumpkin, potatoes, chicken, cream. Instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan, cook onion, stirring, until soft. Stir in pumpkin and potato, cook, stirring, 5 minutes. Stir in stock, bring to a boil, simmer, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until pumpkin is soft, stirring occasionally. Blend or process soup, in batches, until pureed. If desired, push through food mill or large sieve into a large clean saucepan. Serve topped with a dollop of sour cream and a few chives (optional). If adding cream: Just before serving, add cream, stir over heat until soup is hot.

title: Gooseberry Patch Salad Dressing
instructions: Combine oil and vinear together in a container with a tight fitting lid.
Shake well.
text: Recipe: Gooseberry Patch Salad Dressing. Ingredients: extra virgin olive oil, gourmet rice vinegar. Instructions: Combine oil and vinear together in a container with a tight fitting lid. Shake well.

title: Chicken Melt
instructions: Saute onion in half the butter till golden.
Set aside.
Heat non stick pan.
Spread butter on both slices of bread.
Place one slice of bread, buttered side down in pre-heated pan.
Put one slice of cheese, onions, chicken breast, one slice of cheese and then the remaining slice of bread with the buttered side up.
Continue to cook until bread on bottom is brown and toasty.
Turn the entire sandwich and toast the other side and wait for cheese to get melty.
SLice in half and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Chicken Melt. Ingredients: onion, rye bread, butter, chicken breast, swiss cheese. Instructions: Saute onion in half the butter till golden. Set aside. Heat non stick pan. Spread butter on both slices of bread. Place one slice of bread, buttered side down in pre-heated pan. Put one slice of cheese, onions, chicken breast, one slice of cheese and then the remaining slice of bread with the buttered side up. Continue to cook until bread on bottom is brown and toasty. Turn the entire sandwich and toast the other side and wait for cheese to get melty. SLice in half and enjoy.

title: Crock Pot Chicken Over Rice
instructions: mix cans of soup in crock pot/ slow cooker.
add chicken breasts to soup, mix until well covered.
cook on low for 6-8 hours.
boil brown rice.
pour chicken and soup over cooked rice.
serve and enjoy!
Great with Hawaiian sweet rolls or other dipping bread.
Serve with carrots, potatoes, cooked celery or other veggies!
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken Over Rice. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, chicken breasts, brown rice. Instructions: mix cans of soup in crock pot/ slow cooker. add chicken breasts to soup, mix until well covered. cook on low for 6-8 hours. boil brown rice. pour chicken and soup over cooked rice. serve and enjoy! Great with Hawaiian sweet rolls or other dipping bread. Serve with carrots, potatoes, cooked celery or other veggies!

title: Cream Of Mushroom Chicken
instructions: 1. Place chicken, soup, and a soup can full of water in a pan on stovetop.
2. Cook at a medium high temperature for approximately 20 minutes or until done.
text: Recipe: Cream Of Mushroom Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: 1. Place chicken, soup, and a soup can full of water in a pan on stovetop. 2. Cook at a medium high temperature for approximately 20 minutes or until done.

title: Paula Deen'S Chicken Nuggets
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
Spread the crushed potato chips in a shallow dish. Beat together the egg and milk in a shallow bowl. Dip the chicken cubes into the egg mixture and then dredge them in the chips.
Place the chicken nuggets on a baking sheet and drizzle with melted butter. Bake for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Paula Deen'S Chicken Nuggets. Ingredients: sour cream, egg, milk, chicken, butter. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Spread the crushed potato chips in a shallow dish. Beat together the egg and milk in a shallow bowl. Dip the chicken cubes into the egg mixture and then dredge them in the chips. Place the chicken nuggets on a baking sheet and drizzle with melted butter. Bake for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown.

title: Pesto Alfredo Sauce
instructions: Heat cream cheese, milk (or milk and cream), and garlic together in a small saucepan. Bring just barely to boiling.
Reduce heat and simmer, stirring frequently, until cream cheese is fully melted into the milk.
Stir in the pesto and reheat to just barely boiling again.
Stir in Parmesan and simmer a few moments until the sauce begins to thicken.
Remove from heat and serve over any pasta.
Note on Pesto: Best made with a pure basil pesto rather than a basil-and-spinach pesto. Homemade or commercial is fine.

Note on Parmesan: I freeze my homemade pesto without the cheese so I use the full 3/4 cup. If your pesto has a generous amount of cheese you will not need as much. Not that plenty of Parmesan is a bad thing. :D.
If you toss this together with pasta, chunks of cooked chicken, and broccoli florets then spread it in a baking pan with plenty of shredded Mozzarella on top you get a terrific casserole.
text: Recipe: Pesto Alfredo Sauce. Ingredients: milk, cream cheese, garlic, basil pesto, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat cream cheese, milk (or milk and cream), and garlic together in a small saucepan. Bring just barely to boiling. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring frequently, until cream cheese is fully melted into the milk. Stir in the pesto and reheat to just barely boiling again. Stir in Parmesan and simmer a few moments until the sauce begins to thicken. Remove from heat and serve over any pasta. Note on Pesto: Best made with a pure basil pesto rather than a basil-and-spinach pesto. Homemade or commercial is fine. Note on Parmesan: I freeze my homemade pesto without the cheese so I use the full 3/4 cup. If your pesto has a generous amount of cheese you will not need as much. Not that plenty of Parmesan is a bad thing. :D. If you toss this together with pasta, chunks of cooked chicken, and broccoli florets then spread it in a baking pan with plenty of shredded Mozzarella on top you get a terrific casserole.

title: Buttery Nipple
instructions: Add the butterscotch schnapps to a a chilled shot glass and layer the Irish Cream on top by pouring it over the back of a spoon.
text: Recipe: Buttery Nipple. Ingredients: butterscotch, irish cream. Instructions: Add the butterscotch schnapps to a a chilled shot glass and layer the Irish Cream on top by pouring it over the back of a spoon.

title: Easy Rotel Chicken With Stuffing
instructions: Place frozen chicken breasts in a 13 x 9 pyrex dish.
Pour rotel over the chicken.
Pour uncooked herbed stuffing over chicken and rotel.
Bake in oven at 350 degrees for approximately 1 hour 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Easy Rotel Chicken With Stuffing. Ingredients: chicken breasts. Instructions: Place frozen chicken breasts in a 13 x 9 pyrex dish. Pour rotel over the chicken. Pour uncooked herbed stuffing over chicken and rotel. Bake in oven at 350 degrees for approximately 1 hour 15 minutes.

title: Parmesan Crusted Smoked Cheddar Potato Cakes
instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Stir together the mashed potatoes and smoked cheddar then scoop about 1/4 Cup mashed potatoes and form into equal size small patties.
Combine parmesan cheese and flour into a shallow dish and press potato patties into mixture.
In batches, place patties into hot skillet and cook for 2-4 minutes per side or until golden brown. Transfer to a paper towel lined plate.
Serve warm with ranch dressing if desired.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Crusted Smoked Cheddar Potato Cakes. Ingredients: extra virgin olive oil, potatoes, cheddar cheese, parmesan cheese, flour. Instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Stir together the mashed potatoes and smoked cheddar then scoop about 1/4 Cup mashed potatoes and form into equal size small patties. Combine parmesan cheese and flour into a shallow dish and press potato patties into mixture. In batches, place patties into hot skillet and cook for 2-4 minutes per side or until golden brown. Transfer to a paper towel lined plate. Serve warm with ranch dressing if desired.

title: Cheesy Baked Garlic Bread Slices
instructions: Set oven to 350°F.
Prepare a 15 x 10-inch jelly-roll pan or baking sheet.
Slice the bread into about 1/2-inch slices.
In the microwave or stove top melt the butter with garlic powder.
Mix in the dried parsley.
Place the bread slices on the baking sheet.
Using a pastry brush generously coat the tops of each slice with the melted butter/garlic mixture.
Sprinkle tops of each slice lightly with Parmesan cheese.
Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly toasted.
Remove from heat then sprinkle shredded mozzarella or cheddar cheese onto each slice.
Return to oven and bake for another 3-5 minutes or until cheese has melted and the bread is lightly toasted.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Baked Garlic Bread Slices. Ingredients: Italian bread, butter, garlic, parsley, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Set oven to 350°F. Prepare a 15 x 10-inch jelly-roll pan or baking sheet. Slice the bread into about 1/2-inch slices. In the microwave or stove top melt the butter with garlic powder. Mix in the dried parsley. Place the bread slices on the baking sheet. Using a pastry brush generously coat the tops of each slice with the melted butter/garlic mixture. Sprinkle tops of each slice lightly with Parmesan cheese. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly toasted. Remove from heat then sprinkle shredded mozzarella or cheddar cheese onto each slice. Return to oven and bake for another 3-5 minutes or until cheese has melted and the bread is lightly toasted.

title: Microwave Tomato Risotto
instructions: Place stock in a saucepan and bring to boil on stove. You can use the stock cold if you can't be bothered doing this but the risotto will take longer to cook.
In a large microwave casserole dish, with a lid, cook onion in the oil for 2 mins on high.
Add rice and cook a further 2 minutes in microwave oven.
Add chicken stock and tomatoes and cook, covered, on high for about 15- 20 mins until liquid is almost absorbed.
Allow to stand for 5 mins then fold in the romano and butter.
Sprinkle extra romano on top to serve.
Note: If you wish you can substitute the canned tomatoes for fresh, skinned tomatoes,which gives a slightly different result.
text: Recipe: Microwave Tomato Risotto. Ingredients: olive oil, onion, arborio rice, chicken stock, tomatoes, romano cheese, butter, extra romano cheese. Instructions: Place stock in a saucepan and bring to boil on stove. You can use the stock cold if you can't be bothered doing this but the risotto will take longer to cook. In a large microwave casserole dish, with a lid, cook onion in the oil for 2 mins on high. Add rice and cook a further 2 minutes in microwave oven. Add chicken stock and tomatoes and cook, covered, on high for about 15- 20 mins until liquid is almost absorbed. Allow to stand for 5 mins then fold in the romano and butter. Sprinkle extra romano on top to serve. Note: If you wish you can substitute the canned tomatoes for fresh, skinned tomatoes,which gives a slightly different result.

title: Rye With Swiss And Corned Beef Appetizer
instructions: preheat oven to 400F.
Slice bread into 20 pieces. If using a 1.5 loaf, slice into 3/4" to 1" slices and cut those in half.
Mix all other ingredients in a bowl.
Place about 1 tablespoon of cheese mixture onto each piece of bread and place on a baking sheet either oiled or lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12 minutes or until cheese is lightly browned in spots. Broiling is good, also, but be careful not to burn or over brown.
Cool and serve.
text: Recipe: Rye With Swiss And Corned Beef Appetizer. Ingredients: rye bread, swiss cheese, beef, butter. Instructions: preheat oven to 400F. Slice bread into 20 pieces. If using a 1.5 loaf, slice into 3/4" to 1" slices and cut those in half. Mix all other ingredients in a bowl. Place about 1 tablespoon of cheese mixture onto each piece of bread and place on a baking sheet either oiled or lined with parchment paper. Bake for 12 minutes or until cheese is lightly browned in spots. Broiling is good, also, but be careful not to burn or over brown. Cool and serve.

title: Infallible Roast Meat
instructions: Place unseasoned meat on a large sheet of thick aluminium foil. (double if necessary).
Spread entire surface of meat with tomato paste, and then sprinkle over the soup mix.
Wrap it up securely in the foil so no juices can escape during the cooking time.
Place in uncovered roasting dish in a preheated 180 degrees celcius oven.
Cook for 3 hours and do not touch the entire time!.
When ready you can strain the gravy and pass it along separately.
text: Recipe: Infallible Roast Meat. Ingredients: beef roast, tomato paste, onion soup. Instructions: Place unseasoned meat on a large sheet of thick aluminium foil. (double if necessary). Spread entire surface of meat with tomato paste, and then sprinkle over the soup mix. Wrap it up securely in the foil so no juices can escape during the cooking time. Place in uncovered roasting dish in a preheated 180 degrees celcius oven. Cook for 3 hours and do not touch the entire time!. When ready you can strain the gravy and pass it along separately.

title: Spaghetti With Ham And Eggs
instructions: Cook spagetti.
Melt butter in skillet; add ham.
Drain spagetti; add to ham mixture.
Add the beaten eggs IMMEDIATELY; the heat from the spagetti will cook the eggs.
Add cream and Parmesan cheese; toss.
Put lid on skillet; let set for 5 minutes to fully cook the eggs.
text: Recipe: Spaghetti With Ham And Eggs. Ingredients: butter, ham, eggs, cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook spagetti. Melt butter in skillet; add ham. Drain spagetti; add to ham mixture. Add the beaten eggs IMMEDIATELY; the heat from the spagetti will cook the eggs. Add cream and Parmesan cheese; toss. Put lid on skillet; let set for 5 minutes to fully cook the eggs.

title: Chicken N Rice Casserole For Dummies
instructions: Cook rice according to package directions.
Cook brocolli according to package directions.
Preheat oven to 350.
Mix all the above ingredients, except the bread crumbs, in a large bowl.
Transfer to a large, greased glass baking dish.
Sprinkle top of casserole with bread crumbs. Spray top of casserole with cooking spray so the top gets crispy brown and bake for 20-25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Chicken N Rice Casserole For Dummies. Ingredients: four cheese, cheese sauce, chicken, cheddar cheese, onion powder, garlic, green onions, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Cook rice according to package directions. Cook brocolli according to package directions. Preheat oven to 350. Mix all the above ingredients, except the bread crumbs, in a large bowl. Transfer to a large, greased glass baking dish. Sprinkle top of casserole with bread crumbs. Spray top of casserole with cooking spray so the top gets crispy brown and bake for 20-25 minutes.

title: Mozzarella Topped Chicken With Roasted Tomato And Basil Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven 200c.
Combine tomatoes, garlic and oil in an ovenproof baking dish. Roast uncovered, about 20 Min's or until tomatoes soften. When garlic is cool enough to handle squeeze out flesh.
Cook chicken in a pan, until nicely browned and cooked through.
When chicken is close to being finished, blend or process garlic and all but 12 tomatoes until smooth.
Place in a medium saucepan with basil and cream and cook stirring over a low heat, until heated through. Keep sauce warm on stove.
Top each breast with a slice of mozzarella and place under grill until cheese melts.
To Serve: Place chicken on a plate top with sauce and garnish with tomatoes (3 per plate) and basil leaves if desired. I served mine with tri colour pasta.
text: Recipe: Mozzarella Topped Chicken With Roasted Tomato And Basil Sauce. Ingredients: garlic, olive oil, chicken breasts, fresh basil, cream, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven 200c. Combine tomatoes, garlic and oil in an ovenproof baking dish. Roast uncovered, about 20 Min's or until tomatoes soften. When garlic is cool enough to handle squeeze out flesh. Cook chicken in a pan, until nicely browned and cooked through. When chicken is close to being finished, blend or process garlic and all but 12 tomatoes until smooth. Place in a medium saucepan with basil and cream and cook stirring over a low heat, until heated through. Keep sauce warm on stove. Top each breast with a slice of mozzarella and place under grill until cheese melts. To Serve: Place chicken on a plate top with sauce and garnish with tomatoes (3 per plate) and basil leaves if desired. I served mine with tri colour pasta.

title: Pan Pork Chops
instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet on the stove.
Add green onions and garlic, sautee for about 1-2 minutes.
Add pork chops, cook 4-6 minutes on each side.
text: Recipe: Pan Pork Chops. Ingredients: butter, green onions, garlic, pork chops. Instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet on the stove. Add green onions and garlic, sautee for about 1-2 minutes. Add pork chops, cook 4-6 minutes on each side.

title: Infallible Rice
instructions: Melt butter in skillet.
Add onions and saute until soft.
Add any herbs or spices of choice (you don't have to add anything and it will still turn out well!) Put chicken broth, rice, and onion mixture into a a casserole dish.
Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 min to 1 hours. (Depending on the type of rice you use, this could only take 35 minutes so you should watch the liquid in this).
text: Recipe: Infallible Rice. Ingredients: chicken broth, white rice, onion, butter, parsley. Instructions: Melt butter in skillet. Add onions and saute until soft. Add any herbs or spices of choice (you don't have to add anything and it will still turn out well!) Put chicken broth, rice, and onion mixture into a a casserole dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 min to 1 hours. (Depending on the type of rice you use, this could only take 35 minutes so you should watch the liquid in this).

title: Jack In The Box Marshmallow Rice Krispie Shake
instructions: Combine the ice cream, milk and marshmallow fluff. When you get this to the consistency you desire, gently stir in the Rice Krispies.
text: Recipe: Jack In The Box Marshmallow Rice Krispie Shake. Ingredients: vanilla ice cream, milk, marshmallow cream, Rice Krispies. Instructions: Combine the ice cream, milk and marshmallow fluff. When you get this to the consistency you desire, gently stir in the Rice Krispies.

title: Finger Lickin' Cornbread
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
melt butter.
combine butter, eggs, cream cheese and onion.
Add to dry Jiffy mix.
Combine until fully incorporated and no lumps are visible.
Pour into greased 9 x 13 pan.
Bake for 30-35 minutes or until gold brown and center is done.
text: Recipe: Finger Lickin' Cornbread. Ingredients: cornbread mix, cream cheese, eggs, onion, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. melt butter. combine butter, eggs, cream cheese and onion. Add to dry Jiffy mix. Combine until fully incorporated and no lumps are visible. Pour into greased 9 x 13 pan. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until gold brown and center is done.

title: Crock Pot Cheesy Chicken And Rice
instructions: In crockpot, on low, for 6 hours, place in layers like this. Chicken breasts, soup, onions, cheese.
Prepare white rice.
Serve chicken and sauce over rice.
You can use up to 4 cups of cheese.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Cheesy Chicken And Rice. Ingredients: white rice, chicken breasts, cream of mushroom soup, white pearl onions, cheddar cheese. Instructions: In crockpot, on low, for 6 hours, place in layers like this. Chicken breasts, soup, onions, cheese. Prepare white rice. Serve chicken and sauce over rice. You can use up to 4 cups of cheese.

title: Sausage Ro-Tel Party Dip
instructions: Fry sausage until brown and drain.
Drain Ro-Tel and reserve 1/4 cup juice.
Mix together cooked sausage, cream cheese, Ro-Tel and 1/4 cup juice.
Place in a slightly greased 1 quart baking dish. Sprinkle cheese on top.
Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
Serve with corn chips or pita chips.
text: Recipe: Sausage Ro-Tel Party Dip. Ingredients: sausage, cream cheese, Tomatoes, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Fry sausage until brown and drain. Drain Ro-Tel and reserve 1/4 cup juice. Mix together cooked sausage, cream cheese, Ro-Tel and 1/4 cup juice. Place in a slightly greased 1 quart baking dish. Sprinkle cheese on top. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes. Serve with corn chips or pita chips.

title: Parmesan White Pizza Sauce
instructions: In 1-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic in butter about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft. Stir in flour until blended.
Gradually stir in broth, milk and basil. Cook about 3 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat; stir in cheese. Use immediately or store in refrigerator up to 1 week.
text: Recipe: Parmesan White Pizza Sauce. Ingredients: butter, onion, garlic, flour, chicken broth, milk, basil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: In 1-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic in butter about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft. Stir in flour until blended. Gradually stir in broth, milk and basil. Cook about 3 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat; stir in cheese. Use immediately or store in refrigerator up to 1 week.

title: Olive Oil With Herbs
instructions: Wash the herbs and dry them very well.
Add the herbs in the bottle and preseve in a dry place for at least 10 days.
The olive oil has been aromatized. It is better to remove the herbs from the bottle because they might spoil the aroma after some period.
text: Recipe: Olive Oil With Herbs. Ingredients: olive oil. Instructions: Wash the herbs and dry them very well. Add the herbs in the bottle and preseve in a dry place for at least 10 days. The olive oil has been aromatized. It is better to remove the herbs from the bottle because they might spoil the aroma after some period.

title: Instant Cheese Sauce
instructions: Heat creme fraiche until hot but not boiling.
Add cheese and stir until melted.
season to taste.
text: Recipe: Instant Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: cheddar cheese. Instructions: Heat creme fraiche until hot but not boiling. Add cheese and stir until melted. season to taste.

title: Chef Flower'S Cheat Chicken Parmigiana
instructions: Spray olive oil on a heated non-stick pan.
Place chicken on pan and panfry the pre-made chicken schnitzels until both sides are golden brown.
Once it is cooked place the cooked chicken schnitzel into an greased ovenproof dish and repeat steps until all the schnitzels are cooked.
Spread your favourite pasta sauce individually on to the chicken. (Make sure you cover the entire top section of the chicken. I normally spread it thickly).
Then sprinkle your chosen cheese on the chicken to cover the top of the chicken (Not to thick as it may melt over the pan).
Garnish it lightly it with a sprinkle of dried or fresh parsley.
Bake at 160 degrees celsius (320 fahrenheit) uncovered until cheese is melted and lightly browned (Between 20 to 30 minutes).
Serve with a green salad or seasonal vegetables and garlic bread.
text: Recipe: Chef Flower'S Cheat Chicken Parmigiana. Ingredients: olive oil, chicken, pasta sauce, cheese, parsley. Instructions: Spray olive oil on a heated non-stick pan. Place chicken on pan and panfry the pre-made chicken schnitzels until both sides are golden brown. Once it is cooked place the cooked chicken schnitzel into an greased ovenproof dish and repeat steps until all the schnitzels are cooked. Spread your favourite pasta sauce individually on to the chicken. (Make sure you cover the entire top section of the chicken. I normally spread it thickly). Then sprinkle your chosen cheese on the chicken to cover the top of the chicken (Not to thick as it may melt over the pan). Garnish it lightly it with a sprinkle of dried or fresh parsley. Bake at 160 degrees celsius (320 fahrenheit) uncovered until cheese is melted and lightly browned (Between 20 to 30 minutes). Serve with a green salad or seasonal vegetables and garlic bread.

title: Potatoes In Blankets
instructions: Scrub potatoes.
cut lengthwise in 4-5 slices almost to bottom, but not through.
Insert a slice of butter and sprinkle with garlic salt into each slice.
Wrap each potato in foil.
Bake over hot coals for 1 hour until soft, turning every 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Potatoes In Blankets. Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter, garlic. Instructions: Scrub potatoes. cut lengthwise in 4-5 slices almost to bottom, but not through. Insert a slice of butter and sprinkle with garlic salt into each slice. Wrap each potato in foil. Bake over hot coals for 1 hour until soft, turning every 15 minutes.

title: The Realtor'S Small Sized Garlic Pull Apart Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven according to the directions on your biscuits. They vary for some reason.

Spray a small bundt pan, springform or a regular loaf pan with non-stick spray. If using a springform, cover the outside bottom with foil because the butter will leak out and smoke in the oven (and smoke your WHOLE house up- this happened to me the first time I made it).
Melt the butter in the microwave in a bowl large enough to hold the biscuits.
Add all of the spices and cheese to the butter and stir.
Cut the biscuits up into 4-6 pieces and add to the butter mixture. Stir them up to coat them all real good. I always end up using my hands cause they stick together.
Put the biscuit pieces into the pan so they're lumpy, bumpy but spread out evenly and bake for approximately 25 minutes or until nicely browned and done in the middle.
Run to the table with everyone chasing you. If you don't run, they'll be gone before you get to the table!
text: Recipe: The Realtor'S Small Sized Garlic Pull Apart Bread. Ingredients: butter, garlic powder, onion powder, parsley, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven according to the directions on your biscuits. They vary for some reason. Spray a small bundt pan, springform or a regular loaf pan with non-stick spray. If using a springform, cover the outside bottom with foil because the butter will leak out and smoke in the oven (and smoke your WHOLE house up- this happened to me the first time I made it). Melt the butter in the microwave in a bowl large enough to hold the biscuits. Add all of the spices and cheese to the butter and stir. Cut the biscuits up into 4-6 pieces and add to the butter mixture. Stir them up to coat them all real good. I always end up using my hands cause they stick together. Put the biscuit pieces into the pan so they're lumpy, bumpy but spread out evenly and bake for approximately 25 minutes or until nicely browned and done in the middle. Run to the table with everyone chasing you. If you don't run, they'll be gone before you get to the table!

title: My "Famous" Shredded Chicken
instructions: Place chicken breasts in pan with broth (I have used frozen, as well as fresh- frozen adds to your cooking time).
Bring to a boil.
Turn heat to medium, and let simmer covered for 15-20 minutes (around 10 minutes if yours are defrosted), turning occasionally.
Then turn to medium low and let cook covered for another 60 min (or until shreds with a fork). You may need to add more broth during that hour if yours cooks down.
I have let it cook for even longer with great results.
Let rest in pan for at least 10 minutes, or until you can shred the meat without burning yourself.
If you are saving the chicken for later, place it in a ziplock with the excess broth from the pan.
Enjoy in any recipe that calls for shredded chicken.
You can also add spices/onion/garlic to the meat while cooking, but I like to make mine plain so it will go with any recipe.
text: Recipe: My "Famous" Shredded Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, chicken broth. Instructions: Place chicken breasts in pan with broth (I have used frozen, as well as fresh- frozen adds to your cooking time). Bring to a boil. Turn heat to medium, and let simmer covered for 15-20 minutes (around 10 minutes if yours are defrosted), turning occasionally. Then turn to medium low and let cook covered for another 60 min (or until shreds with a fork). You may need to add more broth during that hour if yours cooks down. I have let it cook for even longer with great results. Let rest in pan for at least 10 minutes, or until you can shred the meat without burning yourself. If you are saving the chicken for later, place it in a ziplock with the excess broth from the pan. Enjoy in any recipe that calls for shredded chicken. You can also add spices/onion/garlic to the meat while cooking, but I like to make mine plain so it will go with any recipe.

title: Baked Rigatoni With Four Cheeses
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish with butter.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large stock pot over medium-high heat.
Add the suasage and saute until crisp and golden brown, about 20 minutes. Remove sausage from pan and set aside.
If there is less than 1/4 cup drippings in the pan, add more oil. Reduce heat to medium.
Add garlic and saute until light brown.
Add the flour and stir for 2 minutes.
Gradually add in the milk, stirring with each addition. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce the heat and simmer until the sauce thickens slightly, whisking often, about 5 minutes.
Gradually whisk in all the cheeses.
Boil the rigatoni only about 7 minutes. Drain pasta well and add to the pot with the cheese sauce.
Add the parsley, basil, black pepper, and reserved sausage; toss well to completely coat the pasta.
Pour pasta mixture into the baking dish.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic powder, remaining parsley, and bread crumbs and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the bread crumbs over the pasta mixture. Drizzle the top with remaining olive oil and bake until the top is golden brown, about 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Baked Rigatoni With Four Cheeses. Ingredients: butter, extra virgin olive oil, Italian sausage, garlic, flour, milk, cheese, mozzarella cheese, romano cheese, provolone cheese, rigatoni pasta, parsley, basil, fresh ground black pepper, garlic powder, fresh breadcrumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish with butter. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large stock pot over medium-high heat. Add the suasage and saute until crisp and golden brown, about 20 minutes. Remove sausage from pan and set aside. If there is less than 1/4 cup drippings in the pan, add more oil. Reduce heat to medium. Add garlic and saute until light brown. Add the flour and stir for 2 minutes. Gradually add in the milk, stirring with each addition. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce the heat and simmer until the sauce thickens slightly, whisking often, about 5 minutes. Gradually whisk in all the cheeses. Boil the rigatoni only about 7 minutes. Drain pasta well and add to the pot with the cheese sauce. Add the parsley, basil, black pepper, and reserved sausage; toss well to completely coat the pasta. Pour pasta mixture into the baking dish. Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic powder, remaining parsley, and bread crumbs and toss to coat. Sprinkle the bread crumbs over the pasta mixture. Drizzle the top with remaining olive oil and bake until the top is golden brown, about 30 minutes.

title: Bleu Cheese Sauce For Meatballs
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in the flour and garlic and cook until blended and bubbly.
Gradually add half-and-half and broth. Cook, stirring, until thickened.
Crumble bleu cheese into the sauce and stir until blended. Taste and add salt if needed.
Add meatballs to sauce and cook as directed on package.
To serve: Spoon meatballs and sauce over the hot mashed potatoes. They are also good over hot cooked rice or noodles. Garnish with chopped parsley.

For appetizers: Use appetizer-sized frozen or homemade meatballs (about the size of large marbles). Prepare as above. Keep warm in a chafing dish. They may be garnished with cooked, crumbled bacon. Have picks nearby for spearing.
text: Recipe: Bleu Cheese Sauce For Meatballs. Ingredients: butter, flour, garlic, chicken broth, blue cheese, parsley, potatoes. Instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in the flour and garlic and cook until blended and bubbly. Gradually add half-and-half and broth. Cook, stirring, until thickened. Crumble bleu cheese into the sauce and stir until blended. Taste and add salt if needed. Add meatballs to sauce and cook as directed on package. To serve: Spoon meatballs and sauce over the hot mashed potatoes. They are also good over hot cooked rice or noodles. Garnish with chopped parsley. For appetizers: Use appetizer-sized frozen or homemade meatballs (about the size of large marbles). Prepare as above. Keep warm in a chafing dish. They may be garnished with cooked, crumbled bacon. Have picks nearby for spearing.

title: Ham And Potato Casserole
instructions: Place the ham and potatoes into a 1.5 qt baking dish. Set aside.
Melt 3 tbs butter in pan, add onion and cook till clear.
Blend in flour and milk and stir until thickened.
Pour over potatoes and ham.
Sprinkle with cheese and bread crumbs, and dot with butter.
Bake at 400* for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Ham And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: ham, potatoes, butter, onion, flour, milk, cheddar cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Place the ham and potatoes into a 1.5 qt baking dish. Set aside. Melt 3 tbs butter in pan, add onion and cook till clear. Blend in flour and milk and stir until thickened. Pour over potatoes and ham. Sprinkle with cheese and bread crumbs, and dot with butter. Bake at 400* for 20 minutes.

title: Cheese Nip Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Spray 9x13 glass pan or jelly roll pan (15.5 x 10.5) with cooking spray.
(I cut up the chicken into bite size pieces but the chicken can also be left in chicken tender sizes).
Mix crushed cheese nips and cheddar cheese in a bowl.
Combine egg, onion powder and garlic in a separate bowl.
Dip chicken into egg mixture, and drag through the cheese nip/cheddar cheese mixture.
Place chicken in single layer close together in glass pan.
Bake uncovered 10 to 12 minutes or until no longer pink in the center, and the coating is crispy.
Serve with barbecue sauce, ranch dressing or ketchup if desired,.
text: Recipe: Cheese Nip Chicken. Ingredients: chicken tenders, cheese nips, cheddar cheese, egg, onion, garlic. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Spray 9x13 glass pan or jelly roll pan (15.5 x 10.5) with cooking spray. (I cut up the chicken into bite size pieces but the chicken can also be left in chicken tender sizes). Mix crushed cheese nips and cheddar cheese in a bowl. Combine egg, onion powder and garlic in a separate bowl. Dip chicken into egg mixture, and drag through the cheese nip/cheddar cheese mixture. Place chicken in single layer close together in glass pan. Bake uncovered 10 to 12 minutes or until no longer pink in the center, and the coating is crispy. Serve with barbecue sauce, ranch dressing or ketchup if desired,.

title: Roasted Onions
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F degrees.
Slice across the stalk end to make a level surface.
Sprinkle boullion granules to cover exposed area.
Top with a thin slice of butter.
Stand onions in a baking dish and bake 60 minutes.
text: Recipe: Roasted Onions. Ingredients: onions, beef bouillon granules, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350F degrees. Slice across the stalk end to make a level surface. Sprinkle boullion granules to cover exposed area. Top with a thin slice of butter. Stand onions in a baking dish and bake 60 minutes.

title: Bbq Onions
instructions: Use indirect heat.
Peel outer layers of onion and slice off a section of one end of each onion (about 1/4 of onion) With a spoon scoop out a hole in the middle of each onion.
Place bouillon cube in hole and add some butter.
Replace top of onion and wrap in heavy foil.
With a closed grill cook for 1 hour or until tender.
Cut into bite size chunks and pour juices over top.
text: Recipe: Bbq Onions. Ingredients: onions, butter, chicken bouillon cubes. Instructions: Use indirect heat. Peel outer layers of onion and slice off a section of one end of each onion (about 1/4 of onion) With a spoon scoop out a hole in the middle of each onion. Place bouillon cube in hole and add some butter. Replace top of onion and wrap in heavy foil. With a closed grill cook for 1 hour or until tender. Cut into bite size chunks and pour juices over top.

title: Cheesy Stuffed Meatballs And Spaghetti
instructions: In medium bowl, combine ground beef, breadcrumbs and egg; shape into 12 meatballs. Press 1 cheese cube into each meatball, enclosing completely.
In 3 quart saucepan, bring pasta sauce to a boil over medium-high heat. Gently stir in uncooked meatballs.
Reduce heat to low and simmer covered, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes or until meatballs are done. Serve.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Stuffed Meatballs And Spaghetti. Ingredients: ground beef, Italian style breadcrumbs, egg, mozzarella cheese, world style pasta sauce. Instructions: In medium bowl, combine ground beef, breadcrumbs and egg; shape into 12 meatballs. Press 1 cheese cube into each meatball, enclosing completely. In 3 quart saucepan, bring pasta sauce to a boil over medium-high heat. Gently stir in uncooked meatballs. Reduce heat to low and simmer covered, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes or until meatballs are done. Serve.

title: Real Corn Cornbread (With Jiffy Mix)
instructions: Preheat oven to 425.
Beat eggs. Blend in milk and sour cream. Add cornbread mix and corn.
Bake in greased 9x9x2 dish or in muffin tins for 25 minutes.
**This recipe is very versatile, so you can add in just about any ingredient that you like, such as green onions, cheddar cheese, or jalapenos.
text: Recipe: Real Corn Cornbread (With Jiffy Mix). Ingredients: cornbread mix, eggs, milk, cream-style, sour cream. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425. Beat eggs. Blend in milk and sour cream. Add cornbread mix and corn. Bake in greased 9x9x2 dish or in muffin tins for 25 minutes. **This recipe is very versatile, so you can add in just about any ingredient that you like, such as green onions, cheddar cheese, or jalapenos.

title: Cheese And Prosciutto Manicotti Filling
instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat the ricotta until it is creamy.
add the eggs, prosciutto, grated romano, mozzarella and parsley, beat to combine.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Prosciutto Manicotti Filling. Ingredients: ricotta cheese, eggs, romano cheese, mozzarella cheese, fresh parsley. Instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat the ricotta until it is creamy. add the eggs, prosciutto, grated romano, mozzarella and parsley, beat to combine.

title: Feline Familia Food (Italian Cat Treats)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Put the cat food in a food processor or blender and grind to a coarse powder. I use my Magic Bullet.
In a mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients, mixing thoroughly.
Form the dough into marble-sized balls or create a large pancake-like object with the dough, flattening it out to an even 1/2" thickness.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the bottoms of the treats are golden brown.
Remove from the oven, let cool thoroughly. Break apart if necessary and store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
text: Recipe: Feline Familia Food (Italian Cat Treats). Ingredients: ground beef, carrot, parmesan cheese, egg, tomato paste. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Put the cat food in a food processor or blender and grind to a coarse powder. I use my Magic Bullet. In a mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients, mixing thoroughly. Form the dough into marble-sized balls or create a large pancake-like object with the dough, flattening it out to an even 1/2" thickness. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the bottoms of the treats are golden brown. Remove from the oven, let cool thoroughly. Break apart if necessary and store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

title: One Ingredient Soft Caramel
instructions: For an easy caramel topping or dip, simply heat Eagle Brand using the following directions. For safety reasons, heating the unopened can (an old cooking method) is NOT recommended. Instead use one of the following methods.

OVEN METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into 9 inch pie plate. Cover with aluminum foil; place in larger shallow pan. Fill larger pan with hot water. Bake at 425° for 1 1/2 hours or until thick and caramel colored.

STOVETOP METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into top of double boiler; place over boiling water. Over low heat, simmer 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until thick and caramel colored. Beat until smooth.

MICROWAVE METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into 2-quart glass measuring cup. Cook on 50% power (medium) 4 minutes, stirring briskly every 2 minutes until smooth. Cook on 30% power (medium-low) 20 to 26 minutes or until very thick and caramel-colored, stirring briskly every 4 minutes during the first 16 minutes and every 2 minutes the last 4 to 10 minutes.
CAUTION: NEVER HEAT UNOPENED CAN
NEVER let the water level get down to the top of the can (s), because this could cause the can (s) to explode.
text: Recipe: One Ingredient Soft Caramel. Ingredients: condensed milk. Instructions: For an easy caramel topping or dip, simply heat Eagle Brand using the following directions. For safety reasons, heating the unopened can (an old cooking method) is NOT recommended. Instead use one of the following methods. OVEN METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into 9 inch pie plate. Cover with aluminum foil; place in larger shallow pan. Fill larger pan with hot water. Bake at 425° for 1 1/2 hours or until thick and caramel colored. STOVETOP METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into top of double boiler; place over boiling water. Over low heat, simmer 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until thick and caramel colored. Beat until smooth. MICROWAVE METHOD; Pour 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk into 2-quart glass measuring cup. Cook on 50% power (medium) 4 minutes, stirring briskly every 2 minutes until smooth. Cook on 30% power (medium-low) 20 to 26 minutes or until very thick and caramel-colored, stirring briskly every 4 minutes during the first 16 minutes and every 2 minutes the last 4 to 10 minutes. CAUTION: NEVER HEAT UNOPENED CAN NEVER let the water level get down to the top of the can (s), because this could cause the can (s) to explode.

title: Scalloped Potatoes, Onions And Garlic
instructions: Wash and scrub the potatoes, towel dry and slice about 1/4 inch thick, best with a madolin.
Peel onions and slice about 1/4 inch thick with a mandolin.
Remove as much paper skin from garlic as possible with out taking apart, slice as a whole on mandolin, pick out the rest of the skin and the base of the bulb and discard.
Spray casserole with veggie spray and place a layer of potato slices on the bottom.
Mix the onion rings and the garlic slices to gether and place a layer on top of the potatoes.
Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
Sprinkle a few cubes of havarti cheese and a couple of slices of parmesan cheese and some butter cubes on top.
Repeat layers ending with cheese and butter on top.
Whisk together mushroom soup, milk and parsley, until combined.
Pour mixture carefully over top of potato onion layers.
Carefully lift layers to allow mixture through if necessary.
Place casserole on middle rack in 325f degree oven for 3 to 4 hours or until potatoes are tender and top is browned and crisp.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Potatoes, Onions And Garlic. Ingredients: potatoes, onions, garlic, havarti cheese, parmesan cheese, butter, salt, cream of mushroom soup, milk, parsley. Instructions: Wash and scrub the potatoes, towel dry and slice about 1/4 inch thick, best with a madolin. Peel onions and slice about 1/4 inch thick with a mandolin. Remove as much paper skin from garlic as possible with out taking apart, slice as a whole on mandolin, pick out the rest of the skin and the base of the bulb and discard. Spray casserole with veggie spray and place a layer of potato slices on the bottom. Mix the onion rings and the garlic slices to gether and place a layer on top of the potatoes. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper. Sprinkle a few cubes of havarti cheese and a couple of slices of parmesan cheese and some butter cubes on top. Repeat layers ending with cheese and butter on top. Whisk together mushroom soup, milk and parsley, until combined. Pour mixture carefully over top of potato onion layers. Carefully lift layers to allow mixture through if necessary. Place casserole on middle rack in 325f degree oven for 3 to 4 hours or until potatoes are tender and top is browned and crisp.

title: Easy Chicken Marinara With Artichokes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Rinse and pat dry chicken.
Spray pan (i use disposable) with cooking spray or spread a little olive oil on pan.
Place chicken in pan.
