Place bleu cheese dressing and breadcrumbs in separate, shallow containers. Dip chicken pieces in bleu cheese; then dredge in bread crumbs until thickly coated. Place in greased glass baking pan; pour any remaining bleu cheese dressing and bread crumbs over top. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.

title: Pasta Bake Made Easy
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a skillet; drain.
Stir in the spagetti sauce, parmesan cheese and pasta.
Spoon into 9 X 13 baking dish.
Top with mozzarella cheese.
Bake at 375 F for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Pasta Bake Made Easy. Ingredients: ground beef, spaghetti sauce, parmesan cheese, pasta, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Brown the ground beef in a skillet; drain. Stir in the spagetti sauce, parmesan cheese and pasta. Spoon into 9 X 13 baking dish. Top with mozzarella cheese. Bake at 375 F for 20 minutes.

title: Garlic Scapes Potatoes
instructions: Cook potatoes in salted boiling water until tender.
Melt butter& saute scapes for about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat& stir in cream.
Drain potatoes& mash.
Add garlic mixture& combine well.
text: Recipe: Garlic Scapes Potatoes. Ingredients: gold potatoes, butter, garlic scape, whipping cream. Instructions: Cook potatoes in salted boiling water until tender. Melt butter& saute scapes for about 5 minutes. Remove from heat& stir in cream. Drain potatoes& mash. Add garlic mixture& combine well.

title: Meat & Potato Patties For Dogs
instructions: Preheat oven to 350.
Puree the meat and carrots in a food processor until smooth.
Thoroughly mix all the ingredients together.
Roll into small balls, press into patties, and bake for 15 minutes or until firm.
The patties will keep for 2 weeks in the refrigerator. Freezing is not recommended.
text: Recipe: Meat & Potato Patties For Dogs. Ingredients: ground beef, carrot, powdered milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350. Puree the meat and carrots in a food processor until smooth. Thoroughly mix all the ingredients together. Roll into small balls, press into patties, and bake for 15 minutes or until firm. The patties will keep for 2 weeks in the refrigerator. Freezing is not recommended.

title: Parmesan Breadstick Candy Canes
instructions: Unroll breadstick dough; cut each strip in half lengthwise to make 16 breadsticks.
Dip each breadstick in butter, then cheese.
Twist slightly, shape into candy cane.
Bake on ungreased baking sheet 14-18 min at 350 or until golden.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Breadstick Candy Canes. Ingredients: butter, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Unroll breadstick dough; cut each strip in half lengthwise to make 16 breadsticks. Dip each breadstick in butter, then cheese. Twist slightly, shape into candy cane. Bake on ungreased baking sheet 14-18 min at 350 or until golden.

title: Penne Strascicate
instructions: In a heavy bottomed saucepan, saute the onion, carrot, celery in oil until soft. Add the meat, and cook until done. Season with salt and peper. Add wine and cook 10 minutes. Add the parsley, tomatoes and stock. Simmer for 30 minutes. Add cooked pasta and let cook for 2 minutes to let the sauce penetrate the pasta. Serve topped with grated cheese.
text: Recipe: Penne Strascicate. Ingredients: onion, carrot, celery, fresh parsley, extra virgin olive oil, lean ground beef, red wine, Italian tomatoes, beef stock, penne pasta, parmesan cheese. Instructions: In a heavy bottomed saucepan, saute the onion, carrot, celery in oil until soft. Add the meat, and cook until done. Season with salt and peper. Add wine and cook 10 minutes. Add the parsley, tomatoes and stock. Simmer for 30 minutes. Add cooked pasta and let cook for 2 minutes to let the sauce penetrate the pasta. Serve topped with grated cheese.

title: Chocolate Pasta With Light Cream Sauce
instructions: For the Chocolate Pasta:.

Sift flour and cocoa powder together and knead in the eggs and olive oil for 15 minutes. Rest for another fifteen minutes then roll and cut in a pasta machine. Heat up a pot of lightly salted water and boil pasta until al dente.
For the Parmesan Pasta Sauce:.

In a saucepan, melt butter and add flour as for a cream sauce. Stir for 1 minute and then add milk. Heat and whisk until sauce thickens slightly. Add parmesan cheese and salt to taste. Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Chocolate Pasta With Light Cream Sauce. Ingredients: Chocolate Pasta, flour, eggs, cocoa powder, olive oil, Parmesan Pasta Sauce, light butter, flour, milk, parmesan cheese. Instructions: For the Chocolate Pasta:. Sift flour and cocoa powder together and knead in the eggs and olive oil for 15 minutes. Rest for another fifteen minutes then roll and cut in a pasta machine. Heat up a pot of lightly salted water and boil pasta until al dente. For the Parmesan Pasta Sauce:. In a saucepan, melt butter and add flour as for a cream sauce. Stir for 1 minute and then add milk. Heat and whisk until sauce thickens slightly. Add parmesan cheese and salt to taste. Serve immediately.

title: Chicken Stuffed With Ham And Swiss
instructions: Slit chicken breasts to create a pocket.
Tear or cut cheese slices in half, tucking 2 halves into each breast.
Fill space between cheese with ham cubes.
Bake at 375 for 20-30 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
text: Recipe: Chicken Stuffed With Ham And Swiss. Ingredients: chicken breasts, low-fat ham, swiss cheese. Instructions: Slit chicken breasts to create a pocket. Tear or cut cheese slices in half, tucking 2 halves into each breast. Fill space between cheese with ham cubes. Bake at 375 for 20-30 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.

title: Crock Pot Pork Chops And Gravy
instructions: Place pork chops in the slow cooker.
Mix the onion soup mix, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, and pork gravy mix together in a bowl.
Pour mixture over the chops.
Cook on low 6 to 8 hours until they are VERY fork tender. If they still aren't falling apart, cook 30 minutes more and check again (continue until they are how you want them).
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Pork Chops And Gravy. Ingredients: pork chops, onion soup, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, pork gravy mix. Instructions: Place pork chops in the slow cooker. Mix the onion soup mix, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, and pork gravy mix together in a bowl. Pour mixture over the chops. Cook on low 6 to 8 hours until they are VERY fork tender. If they still aren't falling apart, cook 30 minutes more and check again (continue until they are how you want them).

title: Chicken Parmigiana
instructions: In 2-quart shallow baking dish arrange patties. Top each with 1/4 cup pasta sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan and mozzarella cheese.
Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until chicken is hot and cheese is melted.
Heat remaining sauce until hot. Serve sauce with chicken and spaghetti.
text: Recipe: Chicken Parmigiana. Ingredients: chicken patties, pasta sauce, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: In 2-quart shallow baking dish arrange patties. Top each with 1/4 cup pasta sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan and mozzarella cheese. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until chicken is hot and cheese is melted. Heat remaining sauce until hot. Serve sauce with chicken and spaghetti.

title: Pork Medallion Valdostana With Marsala Essence
instructions: Stuff pork with cheese slice and refrigerate for at least one hour.
Dust pork medalion with flour, dip in egg, repeat, and then dip in bread crumbs/parmesan mixture.
Sear in 1 oz olive oil, 3-4 minuts on both sides and finish in 350 degree oven for 15-20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Pork Medallion Valdostana With Marsala Essence. Ingredients: pork medallions, cheese, flour, eggs, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, olive oil. Instructions: Stuff pork with cheese slice and refrigerate for at least one hour. Dust pork medalion with flour, dip in egg, repeat, and then dip in bread crumbs/parmesan mixture. Sear in 1 oz olive oil, 3-4 minuts on both sides and finish in 350 degree oven for 15-20 minutes.

title: Caramelized Onions In Crock Pot
instructions: Cut onions in half; cut halves into 1/2-inch-thick slices.
Combine all ingredients in a 3 1/2 quart slow cooker.
Cook, covered, at HIGH 8 hours or until golden brown and very soft.
Store in an airtight container.
Refrigerate up to 2 weeks or freeze up to 2 months, if desired.
text: Recipe: Caramelized Onions In Crock Pot. Ingredients: sweet onions, chicken broth, butter. Instructions: Cut onions in half; cut halves into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Combine all ingredients in a 3 1/2 quart slow cooker. Cook, covered, at HIGH 8 hours or until golden brown and very soft. Store in an airtight container. Refrigerate up to 2 weeks or freeze up to 2 months, if desired.

title: Easy Lasagna
instructions: Brown sausage.
Boil pasta.
Add together pasta, sausage, ricotta, sauce, and 3/4 cheese.
Put in greased casserole dish.
Add last 1/4 cheese on top with some basil.
Cook at 350 for 30 minutes covered, 10 minutes uncovered.
text: Recipe: Easy Lasagna. Ingredients: pork sausage, penne pasta, pasta sauce, ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage. Boil pasta. Add together pasta, sausage, ricotta, sauce, and 3/4 cheese. Put in greased casserole dish. Add last 1/4 cheese on top with some basil. Cook at 350 for 30 minutes covered, 10 minutes uncovered.

title: Potato Flatbread (Kartofluflatbrauth)
instructions: Peel and mash potatoes.
When cool, knead rye flour into them.
How much rye flour you have to add depends on how soft the potatoes are, but knead until the dough does not stick to your hands.
With your hands make round balls, about the size of a tennis ball, flatten with a rolling pin until fairly thin, and prick with a fork. Bake on both sides on a hot cast-iron pan, using low flame.
Pile up and cover with a damp cloth to keep soft.
Serve warm or cold with butter and cheese and cold cuts.
text: Recipe: Potato Flatbread (Kartofluflatbrauth). Ingredients: potato, rye flour. Instructions: Peel and mash potatoes. When cool, knead rye flour into them. How much rye flour you have to add depends on how soft the potatoes are, but knead until the dough does not stick to your hands. With your hands make round balls, about the size of a tennis ball, flatten with a rolling pin until fairly thin, and prick with a fork. Bake on both sides on a hot cast-iron pan, using low flame. Pile up and cover with a damp cloth to keep soft. Serve warm or cold with butter and cheese and cold cuts.

title: Campfire Stew
instructions: Peel potatoes and boil until fork tender. Add milk and butter then mash.
Brown the ground beef and drain off excess fat.
Add alphabet soup to the skillet with the ground beef. Heat through.
Place a serving of mashed potatoes on a plate and make a well in the middle. Spoon in beef and soup mixture.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Campfire Stew. Ingredients: ground beef, alphabet pasta, potatoes, milk. Instructions: Peel potatoes and boil until fork tender. Add milk and butter then mash. Brown the ground beef and drain off excess fat. Add alphabet soup to the skillet with the ground beef. Heat through. Place a serving of mashed potatoes on a plate and make a well in the middle. Spoon in beef and soup mixture. Enjoy!

title: Cheese Souffle In Tomatoes
instructions: Cut top of tomatoes.
Scoop out flesh with spoon; reserve flesh for other use.
Drain tomatoes upside down on absorbent paper.
Melt butter in pan, add flour, cook stirring 1 minute.
Add milk gradually, stir over heat until mixture boils and thickens.
Remove from heat, stir in egg yolks, cheese and half the parmesan cheese.
Beat egg whites until soft peaks form, gently fold cheese between tomatoes, sprinkle top with remaining cheese.
Bake in moderate oven 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheese Souffle In Tomatoes. Ingredients: tomatoes, butter, flour, milk, eggs, grated cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cut top of tomatoes. Scoop out flesh with spoon; reserve flesh for other use. Drain tomatoes upside down on absorbent paper. Melt butter in pan, add flour, cook stirring 1 minute. Add milk gradually, stir over heat until mixture boils and thickens. Remove from heat, stir in egg yolks, cheese and half the parmesan cheese. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form, gently fold cheese between tomatoes, sprinkle top with remaining cheese. Bake in moderate oven 10 minutes.

title: P.R.Soup (Potato Rice Soup)
instructions: Heat oil in a pot and saute garlic until golden brown.
Add onion, potato, rice, broth, parsley, and 2 cups water.
Stir, bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
Add more water if soup appears too thick.
Stir in cheese and serve.
text: Recipe: P.R.Soup (Potato Rice Soup). Ingredients: garlic, olive oil, onion, potato, rice, chicken broth, fresh parsley, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oil in a pot and saute garlic until golden brown. Add onion, potato, rice, broth, parsley, and 2 cups water. Stir, bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. Add more water if soup appears too thick. Stir in cheese and serve.

title: Chicken And Rice Supreme
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Prepare chicken Rice-A-Roni, per package directions.
Spread rice evenly in buttered 9x13 baking dish.
Place uncooked, diced chicken breast on top of rice.
Mix whipping cream and chicken soup together, and pour on top of chicken and rice.
Baked, uncovered for 30-40 minutes, or until the juice of the chicken pieces runs clear.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Rice Supreme. Ingredients: chicken breasts, regular whipping cream, chicken rice, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Prepare chicken Rice-A-Roni, per package directions. Spread rice evenly in buttered 9x13 baking dish. Place uncooked, diced chicken breast on top of rice. Mix whipping cream and chicken soup together, and pour on top of chicken and rice. Baked, uncovered for 30-40 minutes, or until the juice of the chicken pieces runs clear.

title: Cheesy Sausage And Rice
instructions: Boil the rice.
In the meantime, brown up the sausage, drain and add the can of cream of chicken.
Put rice in a bowl scoop a spoonful or two of the sausage mixture over the rice.
Add cheese to your desire!
Eat!
text: Recipe: Cheesy Sausage And Rice. Ingredients: sausage, cream of chicken soup, white rice, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Boil the rice. In the meantime, brown up the sausage, drain and add the can of cream of chicken. Put rice in a bowl scoop a spoonful or two of the sausage mixture over the rice. Add cheese to your desire! Eat!

title: Rice Plate
instructions: Fry 4 patties until desired doneness.
While patties are frying, cook rice according to box instructions.
Heat gravy in a sauce pan.
Lay cooked rice on plate.
Then the patty.
Smother with gravy.
text: Recipe: Rice Plate. Ingredients: hamburger, white rice. Instructions: Fry 4 patties until desired doneness. While patties are frying, cook rice according to box instructions. Heat gravy in a sauce pan. Lay cooked rice on plate. Then the patty. Smother with gravy.

title: Cheesy Ham Hash Browns Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Lightly grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
In a large mixing bowl, combine potatoes, ham, potato soup, sour cream and cheddar cheese.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake in preheated oven until sauce is browned and top is browned, about 60 minutes.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Ham Hash Browns Casserole. Ingredients: brown potatoes, ham, cream of potato soup, sour cream, cheddar cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Lightly grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan. In a large mixing bowl, combine potatoes, ham, potato soup, sour cream and cheddar cheese. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake in preheated oven until sauce is browned and top is browned, about 60 minutes. Serve immediately.

title: "Garlic And Olive Oil Paste"
instructions: Add 4-5 heads of garlic (separate the cloves and peel them) see note above.
Add garlic to olive oil.
Let the garlic marinate for one week in glass container in refrigerator.
Using food processor, make garlic and olive oil to a paste.
Store the mixture in a jar or bottle in the refrigerator.
text: Recipe: "Garlic And Olive Oil Paste". Ingredients: garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Add 4-5 heads of garlic (separate the cloves and peel them) see note above. Add garlic to olive oil. Let the garlic marinate for one week in glass container in refrigerator. Using food processor, make garlic and olive oil to a paste. Store the mixture in a jar or bottle in the refrigerator.

title: Spreadable Roasted Garlic
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
With a sharp knife, cut off top 1/2 inch from garlic to expose cloves.
Place each head in the middle of a 6-inch square of aluminum foil.
Drizzle 1 teaspoon of olive oil over top of each.
Wrap garlic loosely in foil.
Set packets of garlic on a baking sheet and bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until garlic is soft enough to squeeze out of cloves to spread onto bread.
text: Recipe: Spreadable Roasted Garlic. Ingredients: garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. With a sharp knife, cut off top 1/2 inch from garlic to expose cloves. Place each head in the middle of a 6-inch square of aluminum foil. Drizzle 1 teaspoon of olive oil over top of each. Wrap garlic loosely in foil. Set packets of garlic on a baking sheet and bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until garlic is soft enough to squeeze out of cloves to spread onto bread.

title: Baby Food Soft Dog Treats
instructions: Preheat oven to 350. Grease cookie sheet.
Mix all ingredients.
Roll in small balls, place on cookie sheet, flatten slightly.
Bake for 15 minutes or until brown. Cool on rack.
Store in refrigerator or freeze.
text: Recipe: Baby Food Soft Dog Treats. Ingredients: powdered milk, cream of wheat. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350. Grease cookie sheet. Mix all ingredients. Roll in small balls, place on cookie sheet, flatten slightly. Bake for 15 minutes or until brown. Cool on rack. Store in refrigerator or freeze.

title: Vitello Pizzaiola
instructions: Heat 1 tb oil in saucepan over medium heat and add onion and cook for 2-3 mins or until it begins to soften.
Add 1/4 cup of the basil leaves and the tomatoes and cook, stirring often for 5-6 mins or until heated through.
Add the garlic and cook for 4-6 mins or until sauce thickens.
Season both sides of the veal with salt and pepper then lightly coat in flour, shaking off excess.
Heat remaining oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook in batches for 3-4 minutes each side (depending on thickeness - I cooked for 1/2 that time) until cooked to your liking.
Transfer to plates, top with cheese, tomato sauce and remaining basil.
text: Recipe: Vitello Pizzaiola. Ingredients: olive oil, red onion, basil, tomatoes, garlic, flour, provolone cheese. Instructions: Heat 1 tb oil in saucepan over medium heat and add onion and cook for 2-3 mins or until it begins to soften. Add 1/4 cup of the basil leaves and the tomatoes and cook, stirring often for 5-6 mins or until heated through. Add the garlic and cook for 4-6 mins or until sauce thickens. Season both sides of the veal with salt and pepper then lightly coat in flour, shaking off excess. Heat remaining oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook in batches for 3-4 minutes each side (depending on thickeness - I cooked for 1/2 that time) until cooked to your liking. Transfer to plates, top with cheese, tomato sauce and remaining basil.

title: Anytime Crepes
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a blender, or mix really well with a whisk. You don't want any lumps.

Spread thinly in HOT skillet (use olive oil). Use a cast iron or stainless steel frying pan that is really HOT. Then it won't stick and you won't need teflon. In fact, get rid of the teflon! It's so dangerous!
Cover with lid.
Flip.
Cover with lid.
Makes 3 pancakes - enough for one person. (Four if you use a smaller pan.) Multiply recipe accordingly.

Roll pancake with various fillings: butter, icing sugar, lemon juice / nutella and manderine orange or blueberries / sausage and applesauce / spinach, cherry toms, goat's milk feta, bit of shredded edam, pepper / syrup / ham & cheese / strawberries and sugar -- and the list goes on -----.
text: Recipe: Anytime Crepes. Ingredients: egg, milk, whole wheat flour. Instructions: Mix all ingredients in a blender, or mix really well with a whisk. You don't want any lumps. Spread thinly in HOT skillet (use olive oil). Use a cast iron or stainless steel frying pan that is really HOT. Then it won't stick and you won't need teflon. In fact, get rid of the teflon! It's so dangerous! Cover with lid. Flip. Cover with lid. Makes 3 pancakes - enough for one person. (Four if you use a smaller pan.) Multiply recipe accordingly. Roll pancake with various fillings: butter, icing sugar, lemon juice / nutella and manderine orange or blueberries / sausage and applesauce / spinach, cherry toms, goat's milk feta, bit of shredded edam, pepper / syrup / ham & cheese / strawberries and sugar -- and the list goes on -----.

title: Bachelor'S Lasagna
instructions: Spray a 9x12 baking dish with Pam.
Lay raviolis evenly across the bottom of the pan.
Spread 3/4 of the shredded cheese on top of pasta.
Pour meat sauce over the top.
Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 1/4 hours or until bubbly.
Top with remaining cheese the during the last 15 minutes of baking.
text: Recipe: Bachelor'S Lasagna. Ingredients: frozen cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Spray a 9x12 baking dish with Pam. Lay raviolis evenly across the bottom of the pan. Spread 3/4 of the shredded cheese on top of pasta. Pour meat sauce over the top. Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 1/4 hours or until bubbly. Top with remaining cheese the during the last 15 minutes of baking.

title: Roasted French Onion - Onion
instructions: Cut the ends off the onion, just enough that it will rest flat on its root end.
Peel off outer dry layers.
Cut into wedges leaving the root end intact.
Place on a square of heavy foil.
Top with boullion and butter.
Wrap securely, be sure that you do not poke holes in the foil-- you want the juices to stay in there with the onion.
Bake at 350 for 45 min to 1 hour.
Remove from foil into a serving bowl and top with cheese while HOT.
Enjoy with a piece of crusty french bread.
text: Recipe: Roasted French Onion - Onion. Ingredients: onion, beef bouillon granules, butter, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Cut the ends off the onion, just enough that it will rest flat on its root end. Peel off outer dry layers. Cut into wedges leaving the root end intact. Place on a square of heavy foil. Top with boullion and butter. Wrap securely, be sure that you do not poke holes in the foil-- you want the juices to stay in there with the onion. Bake at 350 for 45 min to 1 hour. Remove from foil into a serving bowl and top with cheese while HOT. Enjoy with a piece of crusty french bread.

title: Microwave Garlic Butter Potatoes
instructions: In microwave safe dish, combine all ingrediants.
Cook in microwave for 20 - 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir after first 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Microwave Garlic Butter Potatoes. Ingredients: russet potatoes, sweet onion, garlic salt, butter. Instructions: In microwave safe dish, combine all ingrediants. Cook in microwave for 20 - 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir after first 10 minutes.

title: London Broil (Crock Pot)
instructions: Mix soups together and pour into crock pot.
Brown london broil and place on top of soup.
Chop onions and place on top of meat.
Cook 8 hours on low.
text: Recipe: London Broil (Crock Pot). Ingredients: beef, cheddar cheese soup, cream of chicken soup, Fiesta nacho cheese soup, onions. Instructions: Mix soups together and pour into crock pot. Brown london broil and place on top of soup. Chop onions and place on top of meat. Cook 8 hours on low.

title: Chicken Spaghetti Casserole
instructions: Combine soups, cheese whiz, broth and milk in large microwave safe bowl. Mix and heat on high for 3 minutes, or til cheese melts. Stir then add noodles and chicken. Pour into greased 9 x 13 pan and top with grated cheese. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes or til set.
text: Recipe: Chicken Spaghetti Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup, chicken broth, milk, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Combine soups, cheese whiz, broth and milk in large microwave safe bowl. Mix and heat on high for 3 minutes, or til cheese melts. Stir then add noodles and chicken. Pour into greased 9 x 13 pan and top with grated cheese. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes or til set.

title: Baked Ranch Chicken
instructions: Mix breadcrumbs and ranch seasoning.
Melt about 3 T. butter, dip chicken in butter to coat, dredge in breadcrumb mixture.
Place in greased 9x13 pan, cut remaining butter and distribute evenly over chicken breasts.
Bake at 375 for 30-45 minutes
*Note, I don't put that much butter on top and it still tastes great*.
text: Recipe: Baked Ranch Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, breadcrumbs, butter. Instructions: Mix breadcrumbs and ranch seasoning. Melt about 3 T. butter, dip chicken in butter to coat, dredge in breadcrumb mixture. Place in greased 9x13 pan, cut remaining butter and distribute evenly over chicken breasts. Bake at 375 for 30-45 minutes *Note, I don't put that much butter on top and it still tastes great*.

title: Baked Ham And Cheese Rice Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 400.
Fill a pot with 3 qts of water and bring to a boil; add rice and stir well.
Cook covered for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until rice is cooked but still firm to the bite.
Drain and transfer to a mixing bowl. Toss the rice with a bit of butter to prevent grains from sticking together.
While the rice is cooking, make a bechamel sauce. Heat the milk till you can see steam rising (do not boil). Melt the 4 T butter in a heavy saucepan over medium low heat.
Add the flour and whisk till smooth. Add the hot milk a few tablespoons at a time at first, whisking till mixture is smooth before adding more milk.
It will likely be very thick at first, but will become thinner as you whisk in more milk. As it thins, you can mix in more milk at a time.
Cook, whisking constantly over medium low heat till sauce thickly coats the whisk. Season with salt and pepper and remove from heat.
Pour the bechamel sauce over the rice, reserving a few spoonfuls for the top of the casserole. Add the ham and all but 2 T of the parmigiano-reggiano.
Mix well and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Butter the bottom and sides of a 2 1/2 qt baking dish that is about 3 1/2 inches deep.
Pour in half the rice mixture. Slice the mozzarella about 1/8 inch thick and layer the slices over the rice.
Add the remaining rice mixture and smooth the surface with a spoon.
Spread the remaining bechamel over the top and sprinkle with the remaining 2 T parmegiano-reggiano.
Bake for 15 minutes. If after 15 minutes, the top is not speckled with brown, place the casserole under the broiler for 1-2 minutes, or till top begins to brown.
Remove from the oven and allow to settle for about 5 minutes before serving.
text: Recipe: Baked Ham And Cheese Rice Casserole. Ingredients: arborio rice, butter, milk, flour, ham, cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400. Fill a pot with 3 qts of water and bring to a boil; add rice and stir well. Cook covered for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until rice is cooked but still firm to the bite. Drain and transfer to a mixing bowl. Toss the rice with a bit of butter to prevent grains from sticking together. While the rice is cooking, make a bechamel sauce. Heat the milk till you can see steam rising (do not boil). Melt the 4 T butter in a heavy saucepan over medium low heat. Add the flour and whisk till smooth. Add the hot milk a few tablespoons at a time at first, whisking till mixture is smooth before adding more milk. It will likely be very thick at first, but will become thinner as you whisk in more milk. As it thins, you can mix in more milk at a time. Cook, whisking constantly over medium low heat till sauce thickly coats the whisk. Season with salt and pepper and remove from heat. Pour the bechamel sauce over the rice, reserving a few spoonfuls for the top of the casserole. Add the ham and all but 2 T of the parmigiano-reggiano. Mix well and season to taste with salt and pepper. Butter the bottom and sides of a 2 1/2 qt baking dish that is about 3 1/2 inches deep. Pour in half the rice mixture. Slice the mozzarella about 1/8 inch thick and layer the slices over the rice. Add the remaining rice mixture and smooth the surface with a spoon. Spread the remaining bechamel over the top and sprinkle with the remaining 2 T parmegiano-reggiano. Bake for 15 minutes. If after 15 minutes, the top is not speckled with brown, place the casserole under the broiler for 1-2 minutes, or till top begins to brown. Remove from the oven and allow to settle for about 5 minutes before serving.

title: Eggs And Ham Biscuits
instructions: Bake biscuits as directed on can.
In medium bowl, combine beaten eggs, ham, parsley and milk and mix well.
Melt butter over medium heat and add egg mixture.
Cook for 6 to 10 minutes or until egg mixture is set, stirring and turning occasionally.
Stir in cheese.
Split biscuits and spoon egg mixture evenly onto bottom halves.
Cover with top halves.
text: Recipe: Eggs And Ham Biscuits. Ingredients: buttermilk, eggs, parsley, milk, butter, American cheese. Instructions: Bake biscuits as directed on can. In medium bowl, combine beaten eggs, ham, parsley and milk and mix well. Melt butter over medium heat and add egg mixture. Cook for 6 to 10 minutes or until egg mixture is set, stirring and turning occasionally. Stir in cheese. Split biscuits and spoon egg mixture evenly onto bottom halves. Cover with top halves.

title: Corn Dog Muffins
instructions: Heat oven to 400. (I now have a convection oven and I cook these at 375 in the convection oven).
Mix the cornbread mix, eggs, milk and cheese until blended.
Cut each hot dog into about 15 pieces (or as big or as little as you like).
Spary muffin tins with cooking spray.
Fill tins about 2/3 full and cook for 14-18 minutes.
Eat immediately or cool and put in fridge or freezer for later.
If freezing let thaw and I like to heat them up in the microwave for about 30 seconds before eating.
text: Recipe: Corn Dog Muffins. Ingredients: cornbread mix, eggs, milk, cheddar cheese, beef. Instructions: Heat oven to 400. (I now have a convection oven and I cook these at 375 in the convection oven). Mix the cornbread mix, eggs, milk and cheese until blended. Cut each hot dog into about 15 pieces (or as big or as little as you like). Spary muffin tins with cooking spray. Fill tins about 2/3 full and cook for 14-18 minutes. Eat immediately or cool and put in fridge or freezer for later. If freezing let thaw and I like to heat them up in the microwave for about 30 seconds before eating.

title: Worstebroodjes (Dutch Pigs In A Blanket)
instructions: Put frozen dough in refrigerator overnight.
Let stand at room temperature until pliable. Cut into nine slices.
Divide meat into nine pieces and roll each into sausage shapes.
Butter hands and stretch dough. Wrap dough around the meat.
Place in greased pan about and inch apart.
Cover and let rise until not quite doubled in size.
Bake at 350F for 30 minutes. Butter the tops while still hot.
Makes nine servings.
text: Recipe: Worstebroodjes (Dutch Pigs In A Blanket). Ingredients: bread, sausage, butter. Instructions: Put frozen dough in refrigerator overnight. Let stand at room temperature until pliable. Cut into nine slices. Divide meat into nine pieces and roll each into sausage shapes. Butter hands and stretch dough. Wrap dough around the meat. Place in greased pan about and inch apart. Cover and let rise until not quite doubled in size. Bake at 350F for 30 minutes. Butter the tops while still hot. Makes nine servings.

title: Onion Roll Appetizers
instructions: Chop onions.
Place in frying pan with butter.
Fry for 20 minutes or until onions are limp.
Stir in cream cheese and grated swiss cheese.
Stir until melts.
Spread on tortillas.
Roll and refrigerate overnight.
To cook: Grease baking sheet.
Cut into 1" pieces.
Bake, upright, at 375 degrees for 10 minutes or until lightly brown.
text: Recipe: Onion Roll Appetizers. Ingredients: yellow onions, butter, cream cheese, swiss cheese, flour. Instructions: Chop onions. Place in frying pan with butter. Fry for 20 minutes or until onions are limp. Stir in cream cheese and grated swiss cheese. Stir until melts. Spread on tortillas. Roll and refrigerate overnight. To cook: Grease baking sheet. Cut into 1" pieces. Bake, upright, at 375 degrees for 10 minutes or until lightly brown.

title: Johnsonville Italian Meatballs
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a large bowl, combine the egg, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, milk and onion.
Remove sausage from casings. Add sausage to the bread crumb mixture and mix well. Shape into 20 meatballs.
Arrange meatballs on a shallow baking pan. Bake for 20 minutes or until meatballs are cooked through (160°F).
Serve with your favorite sauce and spaghetti.
text: Recipe: Johnsonville Italian Meatballs. Ingredients: Italian Sausages, egg, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, milk, onion. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, combine the egg, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, milk and onion. Remove sausage from casings. Add sausage to the bread crumb mixture and mix well. Shape into 20 meatballs. Arrange meatballs on a shallow baking pan. Bake for 20 minutes or until meatballs are cooked through (160°F). Serve with your favorite sauce and spaghetti.

title: Low-Fat French Onion Dip
instructions: Blend or process ingredients until smooth.
text: Recipe: Low-Fat French Onion Dip. Ingredients: cottage cheese, onion, onion soup. Instructions: Blend or process ingredients until smooth.

title: Hot Dog Egg Burritos
instructions: Cut hot dogs in thin slices.
Cook in small amount of butter until browned.
Stir in beaten eggs and cook the scrambled eggs as usual. Remove to plate.
Top with slices of cheese and melt in the microwave for about 20secs.
Roll up all ingredients in flour tortillas.
text: Recipe: Hot Dog Egg Burritos. Ingredients: eggs, American cheese, flour tortillas. Instructions: Cut hot dogs in thin slices. Cook in small amount of butter until browned. Stir in beaten eggs and cook the scrambled eggs as usual. Remove to plate. Top with slices of cheese and melt in the microwave for about 20secs. Roll up all ingredients in flour tortillas.

title: Ron'S Irish Cream Milkshake
instructions: Place ingredients into blender.
Mix until blended. Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Ron'S Irish Cream Milkshake. Ingredients: vanilla ice cream, milk, Irish Cream. Instructions: Place ingredients into blender. Mix until blended. Enjoy!

title: Simply Potatoes Potato Soup #5Fix
instructions: Put all ingredients except milk and butter in crock pot. Cover & cook on simmer for 1 hr on stove. Stir in last 2 ingredients the last 30 minutes before serving. Add salt & pepper to taste. Garnish with shredded cheese, sour cream & bacon.
text: Recipe: Simply Potatoes Potato Soup #5Fix. Ingredients: Potatoes, celery, chicken stock, butter, milk. Instructions: Put all ingredients except milk and butter in crock pot. Cover & cook on simmer for 1 hr on stove. Stir in last 2 ingredients the last 30 minutes before serving. Add salt & pepper to taste. Garnish with shredded cheese, sour cream & bacon.

title: Mexican Cheese Dip In Bread Bowl
instructions: In non-stick pan, saute onions in butter till softened.
Cube cheese and add.
Drain half of the tomato juice and mash tomatoes, add tomatoes and rest of juice.
Cook, stirring, til melted over low heat.
Set aside.
Cut top third off bread, cut top into bite-sized cubes.
Hollow out inside leaving a 1/2" shell. Cut inside pieces into bite-sized pieces.
Place bread bowl onto platter.
Place bread cubes around bread bowl for dipping.
Pour cheese sauce into bread bowl.
Serve!
*You can sub regular velveeta if desired.
text: Recipe: Mexican Cheese Dip In Bread Bowl. Ingredients: cheese, onion, butter, tomatoes, bread. Instructions: In non-stick pan, saute onions in butter till softened. Cube cheese and add. Drain half of the tomato juice and mash tomatoes, add tomatoes and rest of juice. Cook, stirring, til melted over low heat. Set aside. Cut top third off bread, cut top into bite-sized cubes. Hollow out inside leaving a 1/2" shell. Cut inside pieces into bite-sized pieces. Place bread bowl onto platter. Place bread cubes around bread bowl for dipping. Pour cheese sauce into bread bowl. Serve! *You can sub regular velveeta if desired.

title: Quick Garlic Parmesan Bread
instructions: Preheat broiler.
Cut bread in half lengthwise.
Mix remaining ingredients well.
Spread evenly on each side of the bread.
Place on baking sheet.
Broil 4-5 inches from heat until golden brown.

Spread evenly on each side of the bread. Place on baking sheet. Broil 4-5 inches from heat until golden brown.

title: Baked Potato Casserole
instructions: Put shredded potatoes in baking pan.
Mix sour cream with soup, pour on top of potatoes.
Arrange cheese over.
Dot with the butter.
Layer the crushed chips evenly over all.
Bake at 350F degrees for 55 minutes.
text: Recipe: Baked Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, cheddar cheese, butter, potato chips. Instructions: Put shredded potatoes in baking pan. Mix sour cream with soup, pour on top of potatoes. Arrange cheese over. Dot with the butter. Layer the crushed chips evenly over all. Bake at 350F degrees for 55 minutes.

title: Party Potato Appetizers
instructions: Heat 1 inch water to boiling in a medium sauce pan.
Add potatoes; cover and heat to boiling; reduce heat and simmer 20 to 25 minutes or until tender; drain and cool 30 minutes to an hour.
Cut potatoes in half and place on a serving tray cut side up (cut a thin slice from the bottom if necessary to help them stand upright).
Top each potato half with 1 teaspoon sour cream; garnish as desired.
Cover and chill until serving.
text: Recipe: Party Potato Appetizers. Ingredients: potatoes, sour cream. Instructions: Heat 1 inch water to boiling in a medium sauce pan. Add potatoes; cover and heat to boiling; reduce heat and simmer 20 to 25 minutes or until tender; drain and cool 30 minutes to an hour. Cut potatoes in half and place on a serving tray cut side up (cut a thin slice from the bottom if necessary to help them stand upright). Top each potato half with 1 teaspoon sour cream; garnish as desired. Cover and chill until serving.

title: Gravy Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a deep saucepan.
Add flour and stir well.
Cook over low heat until deep brown, stirring constantly.
Gradually add stock, stirring constantly.
Bring to a boil.
Cover and simmer over medium heat for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
Top with croutons and grated cheese.
text: Recipe: Gravy Soup. Ingredients: butter, flour, beef stock, buttered crouton, swiss cheese. Instructions: Melt butter in a deep saucepan. Add flour and stir well. Cook over low heat until deep brown, stirring constantly. Gradually add stock, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer over medium heat for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally. Top with croutons and grated cheese.

title: Low Carb Goat Cheese Gnocchi
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a gentle boil.

Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Use your hands and fingers to incorporate everything thoroughly into a dough ball. Break off a small handful of dough and place on a large wooden surface and roll it with both hands into a rope of about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick and about one foot long. With a small knife, cut the rope into one inch sections. Continue making the little gnudi dumplings until all the dough is used up. You should have about 172 gnudis. Place them onto a cookie sheet lined with wax paper or non-stick foil.

Place a batch of about 30 gnudi in the boiling water at a time. After about 2-3 minutes they will float to the surface. After they have floated for about 15 to 30 seconds, remove them with a strainer to a large platter or large bowl. Repeat until all gnudi have been cooked. Top with your favorite sauce.
text: Recipe: Low Carb Goat Cheese Gnocchi. Ingredients: soy flour, all-purpose flour, parmesan cheese, egg yolks, goat cheese, cream cheese. Instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a gentle boil. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Use your hands and fingers to incorporate everything thoroughly into a dough ball. Break off a small handful of dough and place on a large wooden surface and roll it with both hands into a rope of about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick and about one foot long. With a small knife, cut the rope into one inch sections. Continue making the little gnudi dumplings until all the dough is used up. You should have about 172 gnudis. Place them onto a cookie sheet lined with wax paper or non-stick foil. Place a batch of about 30 gnudi in the boiling water at a time. After about 2-3 minutes they will float to the surface. After they have floated for about 15 to 30 seconds, remove them with a strainer to a large platter or large bowl. Repeat until all gnudi have been cooked. Top with your favorite sauce.

title: Low Carb Mozzarella Sticks
instructions: Set stove top to about medium temp, put your oil in your pan.
Beat two eggs in a bowl. Mix grated Parmesan, garlic powder together.
Cut string cheese into halves.
Dip the string cheese into the egg mixture, then in your Parmesan mixture.
(Add the flour to the dry mixture.) Then repeat dipping in egg and cheese.
Fry the cheese for about 5 minutes or until golden brown and ENJOY!
text: Recipe: Low Carb Mozzarella Sticks. Ingredients: mozzarella string cheese, eggs, parmesan cheese, garlic powder, flour, olive oil. Instructions: Set stove top to about medium temp, put your oil in your pan. Beat two eggs in a bowl. Mix grated Parmesan, garlic powder together. Cut string cheese into halves. Dip the string cheese into the egg mixture, then in your Parmesan mixture. (Add the flour to the dry mixture.) Then repeat dipping in egg and cheese. Fry the cheese for about 5 minutes or until golden brown and ENJOY!

title: Instant Mashed Potatoes That Are Better Than Homemade!
instructions: In saucepan, combine chicken broth and butter.
Heat to a boil; remove from heat.
Add heavy whipping cream and then gently stir in potato flakes. That's it!
text: Recipe: Instant Mashed Potatoes That Are Better Than Homemade!. Ingredients: chicken broth, butter, heavy whipping cream. Instructions: In saucepan, combine chicken broth and butter. Heat to a boil; remove from heat. Add heavy whipping cream and then gently stir in potato flakes. That's it!

title: Belva St. Bishop'S Chicken
instructions: Place frozen chicken tenderloins in a large crockpot.
Mix cream cheese, soup, and sour cream together.
Pour mixture over chicken.
Cook on high for about 4 hours, stirring about half way through. (Time can be shortened to about 2 1/2 hours if the chicken is completely thawed.).
text: Recipe: Belva St. Bishop'S Chicken. Ingredients: cream cheese, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, tyson chicken. Instructions: Place frozen chicken tenderloins in a large crockpot. Mix cream cheese, soup, and sour cream together. Pour mixture over chicken. Cook on high for about 4 hours, stirring about half way through. (Time can be shortened to about 2 1/2 hours if the chicken is completely thawed.).

title: Irish Nut
instructions: Pour Bailey's in a shot glass and then pour in the Amaretto.
Drink.
text: Recipe: Irish Nut. Ingredients: Irish Cream. Instructions: Pour Bailey's in a shot glass and then pour in the Amaretto. Drink.

title: White Sauce Mix
instructions: Combine with pastry blender until it is the consistency of coarse corn meal.
Store in airtight jars in refrigerator.
Makes about 2 quarts medium sauce.
TO USE:
Measure mix into sauce pan; add water and cook until thickened, adding seasonings as desired.
For each 1 cup water, use:
Thin sauce: 1/4 c mix.
Medium sauce: 1/2 c mix.
Thick sauce: 3/4 c mix.
text: Recipe: White Sauce Mix. Ingredients: milk, flour, butter. Instructions: Combine with pastry blender until it is the consistency of coarse corn meal. Store in airtight jars in refrigerator. Makes about 2 quarts medium sauce. TO USE: Measure mix into sauce pan; add water and cook until thickened, adding seasonings as desired. For each 1 cup water, use: Thin sauce: 1/4 c mix. Medium sauce: 1/2 c mix. Thick sauce: 3/4 c mix.

title: Chicken Romano
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Combine bread crumbs, parsley and cheese.
Brush chicken with butter, then roll in crumb mixture.
Place meaty side up in ungreased, shallow baking pan.
Sprinkle remaining crumb mixture on top.
Bake, uncovered, for 40 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink.
Cover the chicken with foil if the crumbs begin to get too brown.
text: Recipe: Chicken Romano. Ingredients: chicken breasts, bread crumbs, parsley, fresh romano cheese, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Combine bread crumbs, parsley and cheese. Brush chicken with butter, then roll in crumb mixture. Place meaty side up in ungreased, shallow baking pan. Sprinkle remaining crumb mixture on top. Bake, uncovered, for 40 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. Cover the chicken with foil if the crumbs begin to get too brown.

title: Chicken With Mushrooms And Provolone
instructions: Dredge chicken cutlets first in flour, then dip in egg, and finally dredge in breadcrumbs.
Put on a baking pan and refrigerate for 15 minutes while you proceed with recipe.
In a non-stick saucepan, heat 1 tblsp of oil over high heat and add mushrooms and garlic.
Cook, stirring, until all the liquid the mushrooms have given off has evaporated.
Remove mushrooms from pan and set aside.
Preheat oven to 350F.
In same saucepan, heat remaining 2 tblsps of oil over medium-high heat and fry chicken cutlets until golden-brown, about 3 minutes per side.
Remove from pan and transfer to a glass baking dish, overlapping cutlets slightly to fit into the dish.
Lightly season cutlets with salt and pepper.
Distribute mushrooms over chicken and spoon tomato sauce over.
Drizzle with 1/2 cup heavy cream.
Cover with the cheeses and bake for 15 minutes, or until heated through and the cheeses have melted.
Note: If you haven't got seasoned breadcrumbs, use regular breadcrumbs to which you've added 3/4 tsp each of dried, crumbled oregano and basil.
text: Recipe: Chicken With Mushrooms And Provolone. Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg, flour, Italian breadcrumbs, garlic, olive oil, mushroom, tomato sauce, heavy cream, provolone cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Dredge chicken cutlets first in flour, then dip in egg, and finally dredge in breadcrumbs. Put on a baking pan and refrigerate for 15 minutes while you proceed with recipe. In a non-stick saucepan, heat 1 tblsp of oil over high heat and add mushrooms and garlic. Cook, stirring, until all the liquid the mushrooms have given off has evaporated. Remove mushrooms from pan and set aside. Preheat oven to 350F. In same saucepan, heat remaining 2 tblsps of oil over medium-high heat and fry chicken cutlets until golden-brown, about 3 minutes per side. Remove from pan and transfer to a glass baking dish, overlapping cutlets slightly to fit into the dish. Lightly season cutlets with salt and pepper. Distribute mushrooms over chicken and spoon tomato sauce over. Drizzle with 1/2 cup heavy cream. Cover with the cheeses and bake for 15 minutes, or until heated through and the cheeses have melted. Note: If you haven't got seasoned breadcrumbs, use regular breadcrumbs to which you've added 3/4 tsp each of dried, crumbled oregano and basil.

title: Potato Piglets
instructions: Scrub potatoes and using an apple corer, make a hole length wise in each potato.
Stuff the hot dog in the hole.
Bake in 400 degree oven until potatoes are tender, approx 45 nminutes.
When done, slice potatoes open and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Serve immediately.
Note: can be made on the campfire also, just wrap in foil and turn every 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Potato Piglets. Ingredients: potatoes, sausages, cheese. Instructions: Scrub potatoes and using an apple corer, make a hole length wise in each potato. Stuff the hot dog in the hole. Bake in 400 degree oven until potatoes are tender, approx 45 nminutes. When done, slice potatoes open and sprinkle with shredded cheese. Serve immediately. Note: can be made on the campfire also, just wrap in foil and turn every 15 minutes.

title: Low Carb Alfredo Sauce
instructions: combine all ingredients in med. sauce pan, stir over low heat until smooth, best used when warm.
text: Recipe: Low Carb Alfredo Sauce. Ingredients: cream cheese, parmesan cheese, butter, milk. Instructions: combine all ingredients in med. sauce pan, stir over low heat until smooth, best used when warm.

title: Caramelized Onion Pizza
instructions: In a medium saucepan cook the onions and garlic in hot olive oil over medium heat.
Cook, covered for 10-15 min or until the onion is very tender, stirring occasionally.
Set the onions aside.
Heat grill to medium heat.
Toast one side of each bread round directly over the heat for 1-2 minute.
Remove from the grill.
Top the toasted side of each bread round with the onion mixture, sliced tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, and Romano cheese.
Return bread rounds to the grill, over indirect heat.
Cover the girll and cook for 5-10 min or until the cheese is melted and toppings are heated through.
Remove from the grill and top with basil before serving.
text: Recipe: Caramelized Onion Pizza. Ingredients: red onion, garlic, olive oil, bread, tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, fresh basil leaf. Instructions: In a medium saucepan cook the onions and garlic in hot olive oil over medium heat. Cook, covered for 10-15 min or until the onion is very tender, stirring occasionally. Set the onions aside. Heat grill to medium heat. Toast one side of each bread round directly over the heat for 1-2 minute. Remove from the grill. Top the toasted side of each bread round with the onion mixture, sliced tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, and Romano cheese. Return bread rounds to the grill, over indirect heat. Cover the girll and cook for 5-10 min or until the cheese is melted and toppings are heated through. Remove from the grill and top with basil before serving.

title: Cheesy Bread Round
instructions: Slice bread from the top lengthwise and crosswise, stopping about 1/2 inch from the bottom, so you end up with a checkered loaf (there will be~1/2- 1 inch square"towers" of bread).
Insert cheese slices in between bread sections- this is where you get creative-- cut the cheese slices to fit so there is a bit of cheese in every open section of bread.
Mix the onions, garlic powder, and butter together- brush over the top of the loaf, drizzling between the bread sections as well.
Wrap loaf in foil, and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Remove from oven, and remove foil from the top of the loaf, but keep wrapped around the sides.
Return to the oven and bake uncovered for another 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese has melted.
To serve, place the whole loaf on a plate, and your guests can grab a fork and dive in!
text: Recipe: Cheesy Bread Round. Ingredients: bread, cheese, butter, green onion, garlic powder. title: Ranch Tetrazzini
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix spaghetti, chicken, broth, soup and ranch mix in a 2 quart casserole dish.
Sprinkle cheese and bread crumbs over the top.
Bake for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
text: Recipe: Ranch Tetrazzini. Ingredients: chicken, chicken broth, cream of mushroom soup, parmesan cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Mix spaghetti, chicken, broth, soup and ranch mix in a 2 quart casserole dish. Sprinkle cheese and bread crumbs over the top. Bake for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.

title: Ranch Chip Dip
instructions: Mix together and chill.
text: Recipe: Ranch Chip Dip. Ingredients: cottage cheese, sour cream. Instructions: Mix together and chill.

title: Cheesy Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Slice the cheese into tiny squares.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and mash them up with a fork.
(Be sure to wash the fork to prevent raw egg poisoning.) Put the butter on a pan on a stove-top set on high.
Let it melt and move it around until it covers the entire pan.
Pour the cheese and the eggs into the pan, and using a fork or something else, spread the eggs around, never letting them stay in one space too long.
Take the eggs out when you desire according to wether you like them hard or soft.
Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Scrambled Eggs. Ingredients: egg, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Slice the cheese into tiny squares. Crack the eggs into a bowl and mash them up with a fork. (Be sure to wash the fork to prevent raw egg poisoning.) Put the butter on a pan on a stove-top set on high. Let it melt and move it around until it covers the entire pan. Pour the cheese and the eggs into the pan, and using a fork or something else, spread the eggs around, never letting them stay in one space too long. Take the eggs out when you desire according to wether you like them hard or soft. Enjoy.

title: Creamy Ham & Potato Soup
instructions: Saute onion and celery in butter until tender.
In large kettle, put water, bullion, potatoes with onion.
Cover and cook until potatoes are tender.
Blend cream cheese and flour with 1 cup of milk until smooth.
Stir into potato mixture.
Add milk, ham, and can of potato soup.
Bring to boil and boil for 1 minute.
Let simmer until ready to serve.
text: Recipe: Creamy Ham & Potato Soup. Ingredients: onion, celery, butter, russet potatoes, ham, cream of potato soup, flour, chicken, water, cream cheese, milk. Instructions: Saute onion and celery in butter until tender. In large kettle, put water, bullion, potatoes with onion. Cover and cook until potatoes are tender. Blend cream cheese and flour with 1 cup of milk until smooth. Stir into potato mixture. Add milk, ham, and can of potato soup. Bring to boil and boil for 1 minute. Let simmer until ready to serve.

title: Church Supper Potatoes
instructions: Place the potatoes and garlic in a large saucepan; cover with water.
Cover and bring to boil; cook for 20-25 minutes or until very tender.
Drain well.
In a mixing bowl, mash potatoes and garlic with cream cheese and butter or margarine.
Add sour cream, 1 cup of cheddar cheese, garlic salt, onion salt and spinach.
Stir just until mixed.
Turn into greased 2 quart baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 30-35 minutes or until heated through.
Top with remaining cheese; bake 5 minutes longer or until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Church Supper Potatoes. Ingredients: russet potatoes, garlic, cream cheese, butter, sour cream, cheddar cheese, garlic salt, onion salt. Instructions: Place the potatoes and garlic in a large saucepan; cover with water. Cover and bring to boil; cook for 20-25 minutes or until very tender. Drain well. In a mixing bowl, mash potatoes and garlic with cream cheese and butter or margarine. Add sour cream, 1 cup of cheddar cheese, garlic salt, onion salt and spinach. Stir just until mixed. Turn into greased 2 quart baking dish. Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 30-35 minutes or until heated through. Top with remaining cheese; bake 5 minutes longer or until cheese is melted.

title: Sloppy Jerry'S
instructions: Cook meat, drain, then drain grease from pan, so your not eating something greasy. Put in velveeta so that the cheese melts with the hamburger, then add cream of mushroom and put on medium and stir the ingredients together.
Eat.
Servings depend on the pounds you use, you don't have to use 1 pound, you can double the recipe with the pound.
MAKES: 4 sandwiches.

title: Stuffed Pasta Shells
instructions: Combine cheeses and spinach; stuff into shells.
Arrange in a greased 13 inch x 9 inch x 2 inch baking dish.
Pour spaghetti sauce over the shells.
Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until heated through.
text: Recipe: Stuffed Pasta Shells. Ingredients: mozzarella cheese, ricotta cheese, jumbo pasta shells, spaghetti sauce. Instructions: Combine cheeses and spinach; stuff into shells. Arrange in a greased 13 inch x 9 inch x 2 inch baking dish. Pour spaghetti sauce over the shells. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until heated through.

title: French Bread With Green Onion Garlic Butter
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.

In a medium bowl stir together butter, green onions and garlic powder. Spread 2 T butter mixture on cut sides of bread. Press cut sides of bread together; wrap in aluminum foil and seal. Place bread on a baking sheet.
Bake until thoroughly heated, about 15 minutes. Cut into slices before serving. Serve with remaining butter mixture.
text: Recipe: French Bread With Green Onion Garlic Butter. Ingredients: butter, green onions, garlic powder, bread. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Place bread on a baking sheet. Bake until thoroughly heated, about 15 minutes. Cut into slices before serving. Serve with remaining butter mixture.

title: Crock Pot Tasty Tomato Chicken
instructions: Put chicken into crock pot, remove any skin first.
Pour 1 jar of sauce over chicken.
Cook 6-8 hours cooking time.
Optional: At the last hour of cooking time, sprinkle Uncle Ben's converted rice on top.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Tasty Tomato Chicken. Ingredients: chicken. Instructions: Put chicken into crock pot, remove any skin first. Pour 1 jar of sauce over chicken. Cook 6-8 hours cooking time. Optional: At the last hour of cooking time, sprinkle Uncle Ben's converted rice on top.

title: Cheesy Spinach Burgers
instructions: In a large bowl combine everything and shape into 8 patties.
Grill or broil.
Serve on buns with all your favorite hamburger things.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Spinach Burgers. Ingredients: recipe secrets garlic, ground beef, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: In a large bowl combine everything and shape into 8 patties. Grill or broil. Serve on buns with all your favorite hamburger things.

title: Comforting Chicken Rice Casserole
instructions: Combine can soups, milk and rice. Mix until well blended and place in 9x13 greased baking dish.
Place chicken on top of soup mixture.
Spoon a little bit of soup mixture over the chicken so that there is a small coat on top and then sprinkle onion soup packet on top of chicken.
Cover with foil and seal tightly. Bake 325 for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Comforting Chicken Rice Casserole. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, milk, instant rice, onion soup, chicken breasts. Spoon a little bit of soup mixture over the chicken so that there is a small coat on top and then sprinkle onion soup packet on top of chicken. Cover with foil and seal tightly. title: Easy Creamy Chicken Soup
instructions: Bring chicken broth to a boil.
Add egg noodles and boil til they are done.
Add chicken and cream of chicken soup.
Heat through.
Remove from heat.
Garnish with sour cream and parsley. (I always use sour cream, but not the parsley).
text: Recipe: Easy Creamy Chicken Soup. Ingredients: chicken broth, egg noodles, chicken, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, parsley. Instructions: Bring chicken broth to a boil. Add egg noodles and boil til they are done. Add chicken and cream of chicken soup. Heat through. Remove from heat. Garnish with sour cream and parsley. (I always use sour cream, but not the parsley).

title: Smoked Fattie
instructions: Roll out sausage to form a rectangle about 3/8 inch thick.
Spread the cheese over the sausage leaving a 1 inch border to prevent leakage while cooking.
Roll the sausage back into a log shape, sealing the seams and edges so as not to have cheese escape.
Place on a smoker or on a grill with indirect heat at 225F to 250F.
Cook until internal temperature is 165F to 170F.
Let cool to room temperature, slice and serve with crackers.
text: Recipe: Smoked Fattie. Ingredients: sausage, cheese. Instructions: Roll out sausage to form a rectangle about 3/8 inch thick. Spread the cheese over the sausage leaving a 1 inch border to prevent leakage while cooking. Roll the sausage back into a log shape, sealing the seams and edges so as not to have cheese escape. Place on a smoker or on a grill with indirect heat at 225F to 250F. Cook until internal temperature is 165F to 170F. Let cool to room temperature, slice and serve with crackers.

title: Lighter-Than-Air Buttermilk Biscuits (Southern Living)
instructions: Cut 1/3 cup butter into flour with a pastry blender until crumbly; add buttermilk, stirring just until ingredients are moistened.
Turn dough out on a lightly floured surface; knead 3 or 4 times.
Pat or roll dough to 3/4-inch thickness; cut with a 2 1/2-inch round cutter, and place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
Bake at 425* for 12 to 14 minutes. Brush biscuits with melted butter, if desired . Yield: 8 biscuits.
text: Recipe: Lighter-Than-Air Buttermilk Biscuits (Southern Living). Ingredients: butter, soft wheat flour, buttermilk, butter. Instructions: Cut 1/3 cup butter into flour with a pastry blender until crumbly; add buttermilk, stirring just until ingredients are moistened. title: Tomato, Basil Cheese Quesadillas
instructions: Heat fry pan over medium-high heat.
Add the butter and when it starts to melt add the tortilla.
Sprinkle cheese, tomatoes, garlic powder, basil and cook until bottom of tortilla is lightly browned.
Fold tortilla over and let the cheese finish melting.
text: Recipe: Tomato, Basil Cheese Quesadillas. Ingredients: flour tortilla, mozzarella cheese, tomatoes, garlic, butter, fresh basil leaf. Instructions: Heat fry pan over medium-high heat. Fold tortilla over and let the cheese finish melting.

title: Crispy Grilled Pita Bread
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high.
In a small bowl, combine oil, basil, and cheese; mix well.
Brush both sides of pita breads with oil mixture and place on grill.
Grill 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden.
Serve whole, or cut into wedges.

In a small bowl, combine oil, basil, and cheese; mix well. Brush both sides of pita breads with oil mixture and place on grill. Grill 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden. Serve whole, or cut into wedges.

title: Baked Carrots With Cheese Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 400. Butter baking dish.
Steam carrots until almost tender. Melt butter. Cook onion and celery. Mix with.
carrots.
Combine cheese and flour. Toss. Stir in cream. Combine with carrots/vegetables.
Sprinkle stuffing mix over top. Bake uncovered until bubbly, about 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Baked Carrots With Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: baby carrots, butter, onion, celery, cheddar cheese, flour, whipping cream, cornbread stuffing mix. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400. Butter baking dish. Steam carrots until almost tender. Melt butter. Cook onion and celery. Mix with. carrots. Combine cheese and flour. Toss. Stir in cream. Combine with carrots/vegetables. Sprinkle stuffing mix over top. Bake uncovered until bubbly, about 20 minutes.

title: Hot Chicken Sandwich
instructions: Mix together and cook in crock pot on low for 4-6 hours.
Serve on hamburger buns or bread.
May be frozen.
text: Recipe: Hot Chicken Sandwich. Ingredients: chicken, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup. Instructions: Mix together and cook in crock pot on low for 4-6 hours. Serve on hamburger buns or bread. May be frozen.

title: Texas Woodpecker Eggs
instructions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
Lightly spray a large baking pan with cooking spray.
Mix together the sausage (raw) and grated pepper Jack cheese.
Add biscuit mix in, 1/2 cup at a time, until all is thoroughly mixed.
This will make a very stiff dough, and should now be kneaded for about 3 minutes.
Pinch off pieces of the dough, almost the size of the eggs, and flatten out the piece into a "pancake", about 1/4 inch thick.
Place one boiled, peeled egg in the center of each "pancake" and roll the dough around each egg to cover it all the way around evenly.
Seal any edges together with your fingers.
Continue this until all of the eggs are covered in the dough.
Place the box of Shake' N Bake into a large shallow dish.
Crack the 3 additional raw eggs into a bowl; season with a pinch of salt and black pepper and beat.
Roll each egg in the Shake' N Bake, then in the egg wash, and back again through the Shake 'N Bake.
Lay each egg on the prepared baking sheet as it is done.
Bake at 300 degrees for 30 minutes.
The "Woodpecker Eggs" will seem soft to the touch when they first come out of the oven, but as they cool, they will "crust" nicely.
text: Recipe: Texas Woodpecker Eggs. Ingredients: eggs, monterey jack pepper cheese, ground pork, buttermilk biscuit mix, eggs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees. Lightly spray a large baking pan with cooking spray. Mix together the sausage (raw) and grated pepper Jack cheese. Add biscuit mix in, 1/2 cup at a time, until all is thoroughly mixed. This will make a very stiff dough, and should now be kneaded for about 3 minutes. Pinch off pieces of the dough, almost the size of the eggs, and flatten out the piece into a "pancake", about 1/4 inch thick. Place one boiled, peeled egg in the center of each "pancake" and roll the dough around each egg to cover it all the way around evenly. Seal any edges together with your fingers. Continue this until all of the eggs are covered in the dough. Place the box of Shake' N Bake into a large shallow dish. Crack the 3 additional raw eggs into a bowl; season with a pinch of salt and black pepper and beat. Roll each egg in the Shake' N Bake, then in the egg wash, and back again through the Shake 'N Bake. Lay each egg on the prepared baking sheet as it is done. Bake at 300 degrees for 30 minutes. The "Woodpecker Eggs" will seem soft to the touch when they first come out of the oven, but as they cool, they will "crust" nicely.

title: Carrot Patches
instructions: For each patch, spook about 3 tablespoons of hummus into each 3-ounce size plastic cup. (This can be done ahead of time before a party or taking as a classroom snack).
Before serving, poke a hole in the top of each baby carrot with a toothpick and insert a sprig of parsley into each hole.
Plant four carrots in each cup of hummus.
Place cups in mini terra-cotta pots -- a great party favor to be taken home with a package of seeds.
text: Recipe: Carrot Patches. Ingredients: carrots, parsley. Instructions: For each patch, spook about 3 tablespoons of hummus into each 3-ounce size plastic cup. (This can be done ahead of time before a party or taking as a classroom snack). Before serving, poke a hole in the top of each baby carrot with a toothpick and insert a sprig of parsley into each hole. Plant four carrots in each cup of hummus. Place cups in mini terra-cotta pots -- a great party favor to be taken home with a package of seeds.

title: Arroz Con Pollo With A Queso Kick
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Spray a baking dish with cooking spray.
Pour rice mix, the amount of water called for, and canned tomatoes into the dish, stirring together.
Cook the chicken in a skillet until the outsides are seared and starting to brown.
Place chicken over the rice mixture and cover with foil paper.
Place in an oven for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil.
Pour the cheese over the top of the chicken, not forgetting the exposed rice.
Place back in the oven for 15 minutes or until chicken is white all the way through.
text: Recipe: Arroz Con Pollo With A Queso Kick. Ingredients: chicken breasts, white cheese, Spanish rice. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray a baking dish with cooking spray. Pour rice mix, the amount of water called for, and canned tomatoes into the dish, stirring together. Cook the chicken in a skillet until the outsides are seared and starting to brown. Place chicken over the rice mixture and cover with foil paper. Place in an oven for 30 minutes. Remove the foil. Pour the cheese over the top of the chicken, not forgetting the exposed rice. Place back in the oven for 15 minutes or until chicken is white all the way through.

title: Creme Fraiche Homemade
instructions: Combine ingredients in a glass jar.
Stir to blend, then cover and let stand at room temperature for 12 to 24 hours, or until thickened.
Refrigerate until ready to use.
text: Recipe: Creme Fraiche Homemade. Ingredients: heavy cream, buttermilk. Instructions: Combine ingredients in a glass jar. Stir to blend, then cover and let stand at room temperature for 12 to 24 hours, or until thickened. Refrigerate until ready to use.

title: Tasty Taters (Aka Oven Roasted Potatoes)
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
Put potatoes, oil and soup mix in a plastic bag; close and shake until potatoes are coated.
Put coated potatoes in a 13x9 inch pan; bake uncovered for 40 minutes until potatoes are golden brown.
text: Recipe: Tasty Taters (Aka Oven Roasted Potatoes). Ingredients: onion soup, potatoes, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Put potatoes, oil and soup mix in a plastic bag; close and shake until potatoes are coated. Put coated potatoes in a 13x9 inch pan; bake uncovered for 40 minutes until potatoes are golden brown.

title: Passover Matzah (Matzo) Omelette
instructions: Pre-heat a wide frying pan over medium heat.
Break up the matzah into 4 pieces.
Lightly butter one side of each piece of matzah.
Place each piece of matzah butter-side down into the pan.
Allow to sizzle for a few minutes.
Crack the eggs into the pan over the matzah, breaking the yolks if desired.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
When one side of egg is mostly cooked, flip the entire contents of the pan over to cook the other side of the egg.
Place cheese and any other desired toppings onto one-half of the egg.
Flip in half like an omlette.
Serve with Ketchup or any other condiment.
Can also be made sweet by placing sugar, cinnamon, or whichever ingredits you like in place of the cheese.
text: Recipe: Passover Matzah (Matzo) Omelette. Ingredients: egg matzo, eggs, yellow cheese, butter. Instructions: Pre-heat a wide frying pan over medium heat. Break up the matzah into 4 pieces. Lightly butter one side of each piece of matzah. Place each piece of matzah butter-side down into the pan. Allow to sizzle for a few minutes. Crack the eggs into the pan over the matzah, breaking the yolks if desired. Add salt and pepper to taste. When one side of egg is mostly cooked, flip the entire contents of the pan over to cook the other side of the egg. Place cheese and any other desired toppings onto one-half of the egg. Flip in half like an omlette. Serve with Ketchup or any other condiment. Can also be made sweet by placing sugar, cinnamon, or whichever ingredits you like in place of the cheese.

title: Crock-Pot Shredded Chicken Sandwiches
instructions: Empty can of chicken into large bowl or even crockpot container, do NOT drain.
Open stuffing and can of cream of chicken, mix with large spoon or use clean hands to break up meat and throughly mix ingredients.
Place in crockpot. Cook on medium for approx 2 hours or until warmed thru, stir as needed.
Add and stir in the chicken broth as needed if mixture becomes a little dry. If preparing to bake in oven, add extra broth prior to baking in a greased casserole at 350.
text: Recipe: Crock-Pot Shredded Chicken Sandwiches. Ingredients: chicken, chicken flavor, cream of chicken soup, chicken broth. Instructions: Empty can of chicken into large bowl or even crockpot container, do NOT drain. Open stuffing and can of cream of chicken, mix with large spoon or use clean hands to break up meat and throughly mix ingredients. Place in crockpot. Cook on medium for approx 2 hours or until warmed thru, stir as needed. Add and stir in the chicken broth as needed if mixture becomes a little dry. If preparing to bake in oven, add extra broth prior to baking in a greased casserole at 350.

title: Rotel Chicken Casserole
instructions: Combine soups, rotel and chopped onion in a bowl, stir well.
Spray a 13x9 pan with pam and layer soup mixture, shredded chicken, grated cheese and crushed Doritos on top.
Bake at 350 for 30-35 minutes, until bubbly.
text: Recipe: Rotel Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, cream of onion soup, Tomatoes, onion, cheese, nacho cheese flavor. Instructions: Combine soups, rotel and chopped onion in a bowl, stir well. Spray a 13x9 pan with pam and layer soup mixture, shredded chicken, grated cheese and crushed Doritos on top. Bake at 350 for 30-35 minutes, until bubbly.

title: Seashell Hot Dog Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Prepare macaroni according to package directions; drain and set aside.
Meanwhile, in a large skillet cook onion and garlic in hot butter over medium heat until nearly tender.
Stir in hotdogs and cook until lightly browned.
Stir in spaghetti sauce and tomato.
Bring to boiling. Remove from heat.
Stir in sour cream and half of the cheeses.
Stir mixture into drained pasta.
Spoon into 2-quart casserole.
Cover and bake about 30 minutes or until hot.
Uncover and sprinkle with remaining cheeses. Bake, uncovered, 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Seashell Hot Dog Bake. Ingredients: pasta shells, onion, garlic, butter, spaghetti sauce, tomatoes, sour cream, provolone cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Prepare macaroni according to package directions; drain and set aside. Meanwhile, in a large skillet cook onion and garlic in hot butter over medium heat until nearly tender. Stir in hotdogs and cook until lightly browned. Stir in spaghetti sauce and tomato. Bring to boiling. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream and half of the cheeses. Stir mixture into drained pasta. Spoon into 2-quart casserole. Cover and bake about 30 minutes or until hot. Uncover and sprinkle with remaining cheeses. Bake, uncovered, 5 minutes or until cheese melts.

title: Leftover Chicken Sandwich
instructions: Spread one side of each slice of toast with cream cheese.
Cut grape tomatoes into thirds and arrange on one slice of toast.
Put diced chicken on second piece of toast.
Form a sandwich.
text: Recipe: Leftover Chicken Sandwich. Ingredients: bread, cream cheese, grape tomatoes, chicken. Instructions: Spread one side of each slice of toast with cream cheese. Cut grape tomatoes into thirds and arrange on one slice of toast. Put diced chicken on second piece of toast. Form a sandwich.

title: Horseradish Cheese Stuffed Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Spray a glass baking dish with non stick spray or line with foil for easy clean up.
Mix breadcrumbs and steak seasoning in a shallow dish.
Roll chicken in breadcrumb mixture.
Place 1 tbsp of cheese on each breast.
Roll chicken, tucking as you go and secure with toothpicks.
Reroll finished chicken in breadcrumbs before placing in dish if handling shook initial breadcrumbs free.
For cutlets, bake 30 minutes If you chose to use thicker breasts up the time to 40-50 minutes.
text: Recipe: Horseradish Cheese Stuffed Chicken. Ingredients: chicken cutlets, cheddar cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a glass baking dish with non stick spray or line with foil for easy clean up. Mix breadcrumbs and steak seasoning in a shallow dish. Roll chicken in breadcrumb mixture. Place 1 tbsp of cheese on each breast. Roll chicken, tucking as you go and secure with toothpicks. Reroll finished chicken in breadcrumbs before placing in dish if handling shook initial breadcrumbs free. For cutlets, bake 30 minutes If you chose to use thicker breasts up the time to 40-50 minutes.

title: Red Skin Potato Soup
instructions: Cut potatoes (do not peel) in 1/4 and simmer in water in large pot till tender, then drain and set aside.
In the same pot, melt 1 Tbl. butter, add onions and saute' till soft.
Mash flour with the rest of the butter, then add to pot, mix in the broth, stirring till it thickens (add about 1-2 more Tbls. of the flour if desired) mixture will not be very thick.
Mashed the potatoes until smooth, leaving some chunks.
Add to broth with chopped chicken. Stir till well mixed and simmer 20 minutes. Add sour cream, 1/2 & 1/2 and seasonings.
Simmer till heated. Before serving stir in grated cheese.
text: Recipe: Red Skin Potato Soup. Ingredients: red potatoes, butter, onions, flour, chicken breasts, chicken broth, sour cream, cream, cheddar cheese, salt. Instructions: Cut potatoes (do not peel) in 1/4 and simmer in water in large pot till tender, then drain and set aside. In the same pot, melt 1 Tbl. butter, add onions and saute' till soft. Mash flour with the rest of the butter, then add to pot, mix in the broth, stirring till it thickens (add about 1-2 more Tbls. of the flour if desired) mixture will not be very thick. Mashed the potatoes until smooth, leaving some chunks. Add to broth with chopped chicken. Stir till well mixed and simmer 20 minutes. Add sour cream, 1/2 & 1/2 and seasonings. Simmer till heated. Before serving stir in grated cheese.

title: Onion Bread
instructions: Saute onions in butter until limp and transparent, but not quite brown.
Set aside.
After dough has risen, roll out into rectangle, approx 18x22.
Add Parmesan cheese and parsley to onion mixture and stir to combine well.
Spread mixture over rolled out dough, to within 1 inch of edges.
Roll up, jelly roll style, moistening edge to seal.
Place seam side down, and bake at 350°F for approx 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Onion Bread. Ingredients: bread, butter, bermuda onion, parmesan cheese, parsley. Instructions: Saute onions in butter until limp and transparent, but not quite brown. Set aside. After dough has risen, roll out into rectangle, approx 18x22. Add Parmesan cheese and parsley to onion mixture and stir to combine well. Spread mixture over rolled out dough, to within 1 inch of edges. Roll up, jelly roll style, moistening edge to seal. Place seam side down, and bake at 350°F for approx 45 minutes.

title: Potato Deutscher
instructions: Grate the potatoes, rinse in cold water and press dry.
Soak bread in milk and beat in eggs and then stir in potatoes.
Pour into a greased baking dish.
Bake at 350 for 45min.
text: Recipe: Potato Deutscher. Ingredients: potatoes, bread, eggs, milk, sour cream. Instructions: Grate the potatoes, rinse in cold water and press dry. Soak bread in milk and beat in eggs and then stir in potatoes. Pour into a greased baking dish. Bake at 350 for 45min.

title: Chicken Breasts With Cheese Sauce
instructions: Combine the breadcrumbs and flour.
Lightly beat the egg whites with 8 teasp water.
Dip chicken in the egg white mix and then coat with the breadcrumb mix.
Heat a little oil in frying pan and brown chicken for about 5mins each side.
Place chicken in an oven proof dish and place in oven at 180'C or 350'F.
Bake for approx 15mins or until cooked through.
While chicken is in oven make sauce.
In a small saucepan melt butter and add flour.
Cook 1min.
over med heat.
Add milk and stir constantly until boiling.
Turn to low heat and simmer for 2mins still stirring.
Remove from heat and stir in 1/4cup cheese.
Place a chicken breast on each of 4 plates and pour over sauce.
Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Garnish with parsley or paprika.
text: Recipe: Chicken Breasts With Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg whites, flour, breadcrumbs, canola oil, butter, flour, milk, cheddar cheese, parsley. Instructions: Combine the breadcrumbs and flour. Lightly beat the egg whites with 8 teasp water. Dip chicken in the egg white mix and then coat with the breadcrumb mix.
