Heat a little oil in frying pan and brown chicken for about 5mins each side. Place chicken in an oven proof dish and place in oven at 180'C or 350'F. Bake for approx 15mins or until cooked through. While chicken is in oven make sauce. In a small saucepan melt butter and add flour. Cook 1min. over med heat. Add milk and stir constantly until boiling. Turn to low heat and simmer for 2mins still stirring. Remove from heat and stir in 1/4cup cheese. Place a chicken breast on each of 4 plates and pour over sauce. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Garnish with parsley or paprika.

title: Crock Pot Buffalo Chicken Soup
instructions: I used a 5 to 6 quart crockpot.
Make a roux with the flour and butter. I use the stove top. But you can use the microwave. Set aside.
Chop up the onion and celery, and dump it into your crockpot. Add the cooked chicken. Pour in the chicken broth and milk. Add Velveeta.
Stir in the flour and butter mixture. Add hot sauce.
Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours, or on high for 3-4. The soup is done when the celery and onion reach desired tenderness and the flavors have melded.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Buffalo Chicken Soup. Ingredients: chicken, yellow onion, stalks celery, butter, flour, milk, chicken, Velveeta cheese, buffalo wing sauce, celery, garlic powder. Instructions: I used a 5 to 6 quart crockpot. Make a roux with the flour and butter. I use the stove top. But you can use the microwave. Set aside. Chop up the onion and celery, and dump it into your crockpot. Add the cooked chicken. Pour in the chicken broth and milk. Add Velveeta. Stir in the flour and butter mixture. Add hot sauce. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours, or on high for 3-4. The soup is done when the celery and onion reach desired tenderness and the flavors have melded.

title: Potato Chip Pie Crust
instructions: Mix milk, sweetened condensed milk, egg, and butter in a bowl.
Pour the mixture over potato chips and toss periodically over the span of five minutes so that the potato chips have time to absorb some of the liquid.
Spray the bottom of a 9-inch pie pan with a non-stick cooking spray.
Remove the chips from the liquid and line the pan with the chips, going all the way up the sides of the pan.
Fill the pie with whatever pie filling you plan to use and bake according to the instructions for that pie recipe.
text: Recipe: Potato Chip Pie Crust. Ingredients: milk, condensed milk, condensed milk, egg, unsalted butter, potato chips. Instructions: Mix milk, sweetened condensed milk, egg, and butter in a bowl. Pour the mixture over potato chips and toss periodically over the span of five minutes so that the potato chips have time to absorb some of the liquid. Spray the bottom of a 9-inch pie pan with a non-stick cooking spray. Remove the chips from the liquid and line the pan with the chips, going all the way up the sides of the pan. Fill the pie with whatever pie filling you plan to use and bake according to the instructions for that pie recipe.

title: Easy Homemade Biscuits From Taste Of The South Magazine
instructions: Cut softened butter into flour with a pastry blender or 2 forks just until butter cubes are coated with flour. Using your hands, gently combine until mixture resembles small peas. Stir in buttermilk with a fork just until blended. (Mixture will be wet.).

Turn dough out onto a generously floured surface, and pat to 1/2 inch thickness with your hands. Don't use a rolling pin here. Cut dough with a well-floured 2-inch round cutter, and place on lightly greased baking sheets.
Bake at 450 degrees for 9-11 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and brush warm biscuits with melted butter. Serve immediately.
Easy Cheddar Biscuits: Add 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese to butter and flour mixture just before adding buttermilk. Proceed as directed.
text: Recipe: Easy Homemade Biscuits From Taste Of The South Magazine. Ingredients: butter, flour, buttermilk, butter. Instructions: Cut softened butter into flour with a pastry blender or 2 forks just until butter cubes are coated with flour. Using your hands, gently combine until mixture resembles small peas. Stir in buttermilk with a fork just until blended. (Mixture will be wet.). Turn dough out onto a generously floured surface, and pat to 1/2 inch thickness with your hands. Don't use a rolling pin here. Cut dough with a well-floured 2-inch round cutter, and place on lightly greased baking sheets. Bake at 450 degrees for 9-11 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and brush warm biscuits with melted butter. Serve immediately. Easy Cheddar Biscuits: Add 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese to butter and flour mixture just before adding buttermilk. Proceed as directed.

title: Low Gi Creamy Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Toast the granary bread to your desired browness.
In a sauce pan heat the butter until foamy.
Whisk the eggs with a fork to combine and then place in pan.
Stir the eggs until just setting and then add the cream cheese.
Continue to stir until the eggs have a porridge consistency.
Serve over the dry toast.
text: Recipe: Low Gi Creamy Scrambled Eggs. Ingredients: eggs, butter, low-fat cream cheese, bread. Instructions: Toast the granary bread to your desired browness. In a sauce pan heat the butter until foamy. Whisk the eggs with a fork to combine and then place in pan. Stir the eggs until just setting and then add the cream cheese. Continue to stir until the eggs have a porridge consistency. Serve over the dry toast.

title: Crockpot Chicken & Noodles
instructions: Place everything but noodles in a crock pot. (cut the chicken up if you like but not too small). Cook on low 5-6 hours.
Remove chicken and shred.
Return chicken to pot and add egg noodles. Cook 2 more hours.
You can add pepper for a little kick.
text: Recipe: Crockpot Chicken & Noodles. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, chicken broth, butter, egg noodles. Instructions: Place everything but noodles in a crock pot. (cut the chicken up if you like but not too small). Cook on low 5-6 hours. Remove chicken and shred. Return chicken to pot and add egg noodles. Cook 2 more hours. You can add pepper for a little kick.

title: Simple Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°.
Peel skin off potatoes.
Slice potatoes into thin potato chip like pieces.
Layer potatoes at bottom of small casserole baking dish until bottom of dish is covered.
Sprinkle with chopped onion.
Cut butter into thin slices and lay about five slices (spread out) over the onion and potatoes.
Repeat last three steps and continue layering potatoes, onion and butter until 3/4 of dish is full.
Add a cup of milk.
Bake at 400°F for approx 45 minute or until potatoes are tender and desired brownness.
text: Recipe: Simple Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, butter, milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Peel skin off potatoes. Slice potatoes into thin potato chip like pieces. Layer potatoes at bottom of small casserole baking dish until bottom of dish is covered. Sprinkle with chopped onion. Cut butter into thin slices and lay about five slices (spread out) over the onion and potatoes. Repeat last three steps and continue layering potatoes, onion and butter until 3/4 of dish is full. Add a cup of milk. Bake at 400°F for approx 45 minute or until potatoes are tender and desired brownness.

title: Potato Chip Chicken Nuggets ( Any Flavor)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Spread the crushed potato chips in shallow dish.
Beat together the egg & milk in a shallow bowl.
Dip the chicken cubes into egg mixture & then dredge them in the chips.
Place the chicken nuggets on a baking sheet & drizzle with melted butter.
Bake for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown.
The nuggets can be frozen after baking!
SERVE: (with your favorite sauce).
text: Recipe: Potato Chip Chicken Nuggets ( Any Flavor). Ingredients: onion, egg, milk, chicken, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spread the crushed potato chips in shallow dish. Beat together the egg & milk in a shallow bowl. Dip the chicken cubes into egg mixture & then dredge them in the chips. Place the chicken nuggets on a baking sheet & drizzle with melted butter. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown. The nuggets can be frozen after baking! SERVE: (with your favorite sauce).

title: Easy Mousse Cake Filling - Any Flavor!
instructions: In a chilled metal bowl, beat whipping cream on medium-high speed until it begins to thicken.
Gradually add in the instant pudding mix and continue to beat, just until thick.
If you'd like to add fruit filling, fold it into the cream after it's thickened.
text: Recipe: Easy Mousse Cake Filling - Any Flavor!. Ingredients: cream. Instructions: In a chilled metal bowl, beat whipping cream on medium-high speed until it begins to thicken. Gradually add in the instant pudding mix and continue to beat, just until thick. If you'd like to add fruit filling, fold it into the cream after it's thickened.

title: Garlic Bubble Bread
instructions: In a bowl, combined butter, parsley, garlic powder and garlic salt.
Cut dough into 1" pieces; dip into butter mixture.
Layer in a greased 9" x 5" x 3" loaf pan.
Cover and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Garlic Bubble Bread. Ingredients: butter, parsley flakes, garlic, garlic salt, bread. Instructions: In a bowl, combined butter, parsley, garlic powder and garlic salt. Cut dough into 1" pieces; dip into butter mixture. Layer in a greased 9" x 5" x 3" loaf pan. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Auntie Lori'S Swedish Meatballs Casserole
instructions: Mix the first 7 ingredients.
Roll into 1" balls and brown, they seem to stick, so you need to watch them closely. Place in a greased 9x13 pan.
Melt the butter in a saucepan, add flour and then the milk.
When the flour has dissolved into the milk, add the can of soup, heat through. Pour over the meatballs and bake uncovered at 325°F for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle with shredded cheese when removed from the oven.
text: Recipe: Auntie Lori'S Swedish Meatballs Casserole. Ingredients: hamburger, egg, breadcrumbs, carrots, potatoes, onion, salt, butter, flour, milk, cream of mushroom soup. Instructions: Mix the first 7 ingredients. Roll into 1" balls and brown, they seem to stick, so you need to watch them closely. Place in a greased 9x13 pan. Melt the butter in a saucepan, add flour and then the milk. When the flour has dissolved into the milk, add the can of soup, heat through. Pour over the meatballs and bake uncovered at 325°F for 30 minutes. Sprinkle with shredded cheese when removed from the oven.

title: Velveeta Ultimate Queso Dip
instructions: MIX VELVEETA and tomatoes in microwaveable bowl.
MICROWAVE on HIGH 5 minute or until VELVEETA is completely melted, stirring after 3 minute.
SERVE with assorted cut-up vegetables, WHEAT THINS Snack Crackers or tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Velveeta Ultimate Queso Dip. Ingredients: Velveeta cheese, tomatoes. Instructions: MIX VELVEETA and tomatoes in microwaveable bowl. MICROWAVE on HIGH 5 minute or until VELVEETA is completely melted, stirring after 3 minute. SERVE with assorted cut-up vegetables, WHEAT THINS Snack Crackers or tortilla chips.

title: 3 2 1 Sausage Dip
instructions: Combine all ingredients.
Microwave until heated through.
Or combine in crock pot to keep warm!
text: Recipe: 3 2 1 Sausage Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, tomatoes, sausage. Instructions: Combine all ingredients. Microwave until heated through. Or combine in crock pot to keep warm!

title: Bite-Sized Potatoes
instructions: Peel potato.
Cut potato into 1/2-inch cube pieces (I like to cut it into little triangles, but that's just me!).
Grease frying pan with butter.
Set stovetop to medium heat.
Add minced garlic.
Add potato bites.
Stir occasionally.
Cook until potatoes are soft and garlic is slightly browned (Cooking times will vary, I usually cook 20-30 minutes).
text: Recipe: Bite-Sized Potatoes. Ingredients: white potatoes, butter, garlic. Instructions: Peel potato. Cut potato into 1/2-inch cube pieces (I like to cut it into little triangles, but that's just me!). Grease frying pan with butter. Set stovetop to medium heat. Add minced garlic. Add potato bites. Stir occasionally. Cook until potatoes are soft and garlic is slightly browned (Cooking times will vary, I usually cook 20-30 minutes).

title: Bag N Season Pork Chops
instructions: follow directions on package.
text: Recipe: Bag N Season Pork Chops. Ingredients: pork chops. Instructions: follow directions on package.

title: Pork Chops On Rice
instructions: In skillet, brown pork chops on both sides.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Place rice in a greased 9X13 pan. Pour chicken broth over rice.
Arrange pork chops on top of rice.
Pour thinned can of cream of chicken soup over all.
Cover and bake 350 for 45 minutes.
Uncover and bake 10 minutes longer.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops On Rice. Ingredients: pork chops, chicken broth, rice, condensed cream. Instructions: In skillet, brown pork chops on both sides. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Place rice in a greased 9X13 pan. Pour chicken broth over rice. Arrange pork chops on top of rice. Pour thinned can of cream of chicken soup over all. Cover and bake 350 for 45 minutes. Uncover and bake 10 minutes longer.

title: Three Cheese Rigatoni
instructions: Heat oven to 375. Cook and drain pasta as directed on package.
Mix pasta and remaining ingredients except bread crumbs and butter. Place pasta mixture in ungreased 2-quart casserole. Mix bread crumbs and butter; sprinkle around edge of casserole.
Bake uncovered 25 to 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
text: Recipe: Three Cheese Rigatoni. Ingredients: rigatoni pasta, celery, carrot, sour cream, colby cheese, brick cheese, parmesan cheese, milk, fresh basil, bread, butter. Instructions: Heat oven to 375. Cook and drain pasta as directed on package. Mix pasta and remaining ingredients except bread crumbs and butter. Place pasta mixture in ungreased 2-quart casserole. Mix bread crumbs and butter; sprinkle around edge of casserole. Bake uncovered 25 to 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.

title: Chicken Parmesan Roll-Ups(Cook'S Country)
instructions: Adjust oven rack to upper-middle position and heat oven to 475 degrees. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in medium saucepan over medium heat until shimmering. Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add tomatoes and simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Off heat, stir in half of basil. Transfer half of sauce to 8-inch square baking dish.

Combine mozzarella and Parmesan in medium bowl; reserve 1/2 cup. Add remaining basil to remaining cheese. Pat cutlets dry with paper towels and season with salt and pepper. Top cutlets with basil-cheese mixture, leaving 1-inch border at bottom of cutlets. Roll up tightly and arrange, seam side down, in prepared baking dish.

Toss bread crumbs with remaining oil in small bowl. Top chicken with reserved cheese, remaining sauce, and bread-crumb mixture. Bake until chicken is cooked through and crumbs are golden, 15 to 20 minutes. Serve.
text: Recipe: Chicken Parmesan Roll-Ups(Cook'S Country). Ingredients: olive oil, onion, garlic, tomatoes, fresh basil, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, chicken cutlets, salt, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Adjust oven rack to upper-middle position and heat oven to 475 degrees. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in medium saucepan over medium heat until shimmering. Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add tomatoes and simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Off heat, stir in half of basil. Transfer half of sauce to 8-inch square baking dish. Combine mozzarella and Parmesan in medium bowl; reserve 1/2 cup. Add remaining basil to remaining cheese. Pat cutlets dry with paper towels and season with salt and pepper. Top cutlets with basil-cheese mixture, leaving 1-inch border at bottom of cutlets. Roll up tightly and arrange, seam side down, in prepared baking dish. Toss bread crumbs with remaining oil in small bowl. Top chicken with reserved cheese, remaining sauce, and bread-crumb mixture. Bake until chicken is cooked through and crumbs are golden, 15 to 20 minutes. Serve.

title: Crock-Pot Sunday Pot Roast
instructions: Place all ingredients in crock pot on low setting before going to bed.
Roast will be tender and ready for lunch next day!
text: Recipe: Crock-Pot Sunday Pot Roast. Ingredients: frozen beef roast, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup, potatoes, baby carrots. Instructions: Place all ingredients in crock pot on low setting before going to bed. Roast will be tender and ready for lunch next day!

title: Roasted Garlic Cheese Spread
instructions: Squeeze cloves of roasted garlic out and place it in a food processor with the softened cheese.
Pulse until smooth and creamy.
text: Recipe: Roasted Garlic Cheese Spread. Ingredients: head of garlic, cream cheese. Instructions: Squeeze cloves of roasted garlic out and place it in a food processor with the softened cheese. Pulse until smooth and creamy.

title: Super Easy Microwave Cheese Sauce For Lasagna
instructions: Melt butter for 40 secs on high.
Stir in flour & cook for 1 min on high.
Gradually stir in milk.
Cook for 4-6 mins on high, stirring every minute.
Stir in cheese.
text: Recipe: Super Easy Microwave Cheese Sauce For Lasagna. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Melt butter for 40 secs on high. Stir in flour & cook for 1 min on high. Gradually stir in milk. Cook for 4-6 mins on high, stirring every minute. Stir in cheese.

title: Low Carb-Spaghetti Squash Alfredo
instructions: Slice spaghetti squash in half lengthwise, scoop out seeds with a spoon; place squash cut side down in microwave safe dish with 1/3 cup water; Cook about 15 minutes or until tender when tested with a fork.

Scoop out the cooked squash from its skin, discard skin; Use a fork to fluff and separate the squash into"spaghetti"- like strands; you can use your hands; Reserve the cooked squash and heat in Microwave just before serving.

Melt half the butter in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat; add cream and reduce for about 2 minutes,then add garlic and cheese, WHISK QUICKLY, heating through;Stir in the rest of the butter and parsley.
Place spaghetti squash in a large serving bowl, and, pour Alfredo sauce over squash, Garnish with basil and tomatoes, serve and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Low Carb-Spaghetti Squash Alfredo. Ingredients: butter, heavy cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, parsley, fresh basil leaf, grape tomatoes. Instructions: Slice spaghetti squash in half lengthwise, scoop out seeds with a spoon; place squash cut side down in microwave safe dish with 1/3 cup water; Cook about 15 minutes or until tender when tested with a fork. Scoop out the cooked squash from its skin, discard skin; Use a fork to fluff and separate the squash into"spaghetti"- like strands; you can use your hands; Reserve the cooked squash and heat in Microwave just before serving. Melt half the butter in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat; add cream and reduce for about 2 minutes,then add garlic and cheese, WHISK QUICKLY, heating through;Stir in the rest of the butter and parsley. Place spaghetti squash in a large serving bowl, and, pour Alfredo sauce over squash, Garnish with basil and tomatoes, serve and enjoy.

title: Quick Gluten Free Scones
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Mix ingredients and very lightly knead to form a soft dough. It is important to only knead until the mixture is combined.
Roll dough out gentley, between two sheets of cling-wrap or baking paper. Roll to 2.5cm (1 inch) thickness. Cut with a scone or biscuit cutter into rounds.
Bake on lightly floured trays. Place scones fairly close together to assist rising. Brush tops of scones with milk. Bake 10 minutes or until cooked.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Quick Gluten Free Scones. Ingredients: bread, cream. Instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C. Mix ingredients and very lightly knead to form a soft dough. It is important to only knead until the mixture is combined. Roll dough out gentley, between two sheets of cling-wrap or baking paper. Roll to 2.5cm (1 inch) thickness. Cut with a scone or biscuit cutter into rounds. Bake on lightly floured trays. Place scones fairly close together to assist rising. Brush tops of scones with milk. Bake 10 minutes or until cooked. Enjoy!

title: Pinipig Balls
instructions: MIX everything in a bowl except 3 tablespoons of pinipig.
FORM mixture into balls.
ROLL balls in the remaining pinipig. Serve and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Pinipig Balls. Ingredients: graham cracker, powdered milk, condensed milk, Rice Krispies, Rice Krispies. Instructions: MIX everything in a bowl except 3 tablespoons of pinipig. FORM mixture into balls. ROLL balls in the remaining pinipig. Serve and enjoy.

title: Easy Hot Wings
instructions: Cut off wing tips. I save them for stewing later for chicken broth. You can cut the wings into half then if you want. Fry wings in hot oil. No seasoning, no batter, no dredging. Fry until crispy and done.

Meanwhile, take Funyuns and put in large zip lock bag and crush with rolling pin. I approximated 8 oz. bag. They have 99 cent bags and then BIG bags. You might like to munch on the Funyuns with the wings.
When wings are done, dump on paper towel lined pan for just a few seconds. Place fried wings into bag with crushed Funyuns. Shake to coat well. Remove and serve. Even good cold.
text: Recipe: Easy Hot Wings. Ingredients: chicken, Funyuns onion. Instructions: Cut off wing tips. I save them for stewing later for chicken broth. You can cut the wings into half then if you want. Fry wings in hot oil. No seasoning, no batter, no dredging. Fry until crispy and done. Meanwhile, take Funyuns and put in large zip lock bag and crush with rolling pin. I approximated 8 oz. bag. They have 99 cent bags and then BIG bags. You might like to munch on the Funyuns with the wings. When wings are done, dump on paper towel lined pan for just a few seconds. Place fried wings into bag with crushed Funyuns. Shake to coat well. Remove and serve. Even good cold.

title: Tomato And Cheese Egg Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles in salted water 7 to 8 minutes.
Drain noodles.
Return to saucepan and add butter, cheese and tomato sauce.
Heat over low until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Tomato And Cheese Egg Noodles. Ingredients: egg noodles, American cheese, tomato sauce, butter. Instructions: Boil noodles in salted water 7 to 8 minutes. Drain noodles. Return to saucepan and add butter, cheese and tomato sauce. Heat over low until cheese melts.

title: Easy Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff
instructions: Mix all ingredients together and put into crock pot.
Cook on low for about 6 hours, or until chicken is tender.
Serve over hot cooked egg noodles.
text: Recipe: Easy Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff. Ingredients: chicken breasts, sour cream, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together and put into crock pot. Cook on low for about 6 hours, or until chicken is tender. Serve over hot cooked egg noodles.

title: Easy Cheesy Breadsticks
instructions: Preheat oven to 375.
Cut biscuits in half.
Wrap 2 halves around one mozzarella stick.
Put butter and garlic salt on top of breadsticks(I use butter spray, but melted butter could be used instead.).
Place on aluminum covered cookie sheet and place in oven.
Bake for 15-17 minutes.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Easy Cheesy Breadsticks. Ingredients: string cheese, buttermilk, butter, garlic salt. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375. Cut biscuits in half. Wrap 2 halves around one mozzarella stick. Put butter and garlic salt on top of breadsticks(I use butter spray, but melted butter could be used instead.). Place on aluminum covered cookie sheet and place in oven. Bake for 15-17 minutes. Enjoy!

title: Garlic Butter Sauce
instructions: In a small saucepan, over medium heat, combine the garlic and broth.
Bring to a boil and reduce by half.
Whisk in the butter, 1 cube at a time, until all of the butter is incorporated and the sauce coats the back of a spoon.
Add the parsley and mix well.
text: Recipe: Garlic Butter Sauce. Ingredients: garlic, chicken broth, butter, parsley. Instructions: In a small saucepan, over medium heat, combine the garlic and broth. Bring to a boil and reduce by half. Whisk in the butter, 1 cube at a time, until all of the butter is incorporated and the sauce coats the back of a spoon. Add the parsley and mix well.

title: Creamy Chicken Casserole For A Crowd
instructions: Combine chicken, soup, and sour cream.
Spread into greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
Combine butter, crumbs, and celery seeds, then sprinkle over chicken mixture.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until bubbly.
OPTIONAL STEP: Add frozen peas, diced cooked carrots, and mushrooms (cooked or canned) to chicken mixture before baking.

If adding extras, you may need to increase the amount of soup by 1/2 to 1 can; mix vegetables in, and if it looks dry, add 1/2 can of soup-mix well, and if it still looks dry, add some sour cream or the rest of the soup.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken Casserole For A Crowd. Ingredients: chicken, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, butter, butter, celery. Instructions: Combine chicken, soup, and sour cream. Spread into greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish. Combine butter, crumbs, and celery seeds, then sprinkle over chicken mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until bubbly. OPTIONAL STEP: Add frozen peas, diced cooked carrots, and mushrooms (cooked or canned) to chicken mixture before baking. If adding extras, you may need to increase the amount of soup by 1/2 to 1 can; mix vegetables in, and if it looks dry, add 1/2 can of soup-mix well, and if it still looks dry, add some sour cream or the rest of the soup.

title: One Pot Andouille Sausage Skillet Pasta
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add garlic, onion and sausage, and cook, stirring frequently, until sausage is lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in chicken broth, tomatoes, milk and pasta; season with salt and pepper, to taste. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat and simmer until pasta is cooked through, about 12-14 minutes.
Remove from heat and top with cheese. Cover until cheese has melted, about 2 minutes.
Stir to mix in the cheese.
text: Recipe: One Pot Andouille Sausage Skillet Pasta. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, onion, sausages, chicken broth, tomatoes, milk, elbows pasta, kosher salt, shredded monterey jack pepper cheese. Instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add garlic, onion and sausage, and cook, stirring frequently, until sausage is lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes. Stir in chicken broth, tomatoes, milk and pasta; season with salt and pepper, to taste. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat and simmer until pasta is cooked through, about 12-14 minutes. Remove from heat and top with cheese. Cover until cheese has melted, about 2 minutes. Stir to mix in the cheese.

title: Eggplant (Aubergine) Tomato And Cheese Bake
instructions: Dip eggplant in flour, then egg and then in bread crumbs.
Heat 1/4 inch oil in skillet and cook eggplant in batches, until golden brown on both sides.
Place cooked eggplants on paper towels to drain and season with salt and pepper.
In bottom of baking dish alternate layers of tomatoes and eggplant, salt and pepper, grated Parmesan cheese and Mozzarella slices, ending with Mozzarella on top.
Bake in pre heated oven 350F degrees uncovered, for 60 minute.
text: Recipe: Eggplant (Aubergine) Tomato And Cheese Bake. Ingredients: eggplant, flour, bread crumbs, egg, garlic, tomatoes, olive oil, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, salt. Instructions: Dip eggplant in flour, then egg and then in bread crumbs. Heat 1/4 inch oil in skillet and cook eggplant in batches, until golden brown on both sides. Place cooked eggplants on paper towels to drain and season with salt and pepper. In bottom of baking dish alternate layers of tomatoes and eggplant, salt and pepper, grated Parmesan cheese and Mozzarella slices, ending with Mozzarella on top. Bake in pre heated oven 350F degrees uncovered, for 60 minute.

title: Scalloped Potatoes And Spinach
instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Coat a shallow 2-qt casserole dish with nonstick spray.
Put soup, spreadable cheese and milk in a large bowl; whisk together. Put spinach in a medium bowl; stir in 3/4 c soup mixture. Stir potatoes in remaining soup mixture.
Evenly spread 1/2 the potato mixture (about 3 cups) in the casserole dish. Layer with spinach mixture, then remaining potatoes. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake uncovered for 1 hour or until golden. For a crispier top, you can broil it for just a few minutes.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Potatoes And Spinach. Ingredients: condensed cream, spreadable cheese with garlic, milk, frozen hash brown potatoes, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Coat a shallow 2-qt casserole dish with nonstick spray. Put soup, spreadable cheese and milk in a large bowl; whisk together. Put spinach in a medium bowl; stir in 3/4 c soup mixture. Stir potatoes in remaining soup mixture. Evenly spread 1/2 the potato mixture (about 3 cups) in the casserole dish. Layer with spinach mixture, then remaining potatoes. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake uncovered for 1 hour or until golden. For a crispier top, you can broil it for just a few minutes.

title: Tomato Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F
Drain tomatoes, reserving liquid.
Pour tomato liquid into measuring cup adding water to measure 1 cup. Combine reserved liquid, potatoes and onion in large skillet, cover and cook 10 minutes or until tender.
Place potato mixture in 1-quart baking dish; top with tomatoes and cream. Sprinkle with cheeses.
Bake 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley, if desired.
text: Recipe: Tomato Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: tomatoes, red potatoes, onion, whipping cream, swiss cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F Drain tomatoes, reserving liquid. Pour tomato liquid into measuring cup adding water to measure 1 cup. Combine reserved liquid, potatoes and onion in large skillet, cover and cook 10 minutes or until tender. Place potato mixture in 1-quart baking dish; top with tomatoes and cream. Sprinkle with cheeses. Bake 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Sprinkle with chopped parsley, if desired.

title: Mock Devonshire Cream
instructions: Beat cream cheese and butter at high speed until fluffy.
Add whipped topping; beat at medium speed until blended.
Chill.
text: Recipe: Mock Devonshire Cream. Ingredients: cream cheese, unsalted butter. Instructions: Beat cream cheese and butter at high speed until fluffy. Add whipped topping; beat at medium speed until blended. Chill.

title: Crock Pot Chicken And Stuffing
instructions: Place all ingredients in your slow cooker.
Cover and cook on low for 8 to 9 hours.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken And Stuffing. Ingredients: chicken breasts, bread dressing, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, evaporated milk. Instructions: Place all ingredients in your slow cooker. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 9 hours.

title: Oven Fried Eggplant
instructions: Spray a baking sheet generously with cooking spray,.
Mix the bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, basil, and garlic salt together.
Peel eggplant and slice about 1/4" thick.
Dip in beaten egg whites and then in the crumb mixture.
Put on baking sheet.
Bake in a 400 degree oven for about 12-15 minutes or till done.
text: Recipe: Oven Fried Eggplant. Ingredients: eggplants, egg whites, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, basil, garlic. Instructions: Spray a baking sheet generously with cooking spray,. Mix the bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, basil, and garlic salt together. Peel eggplant and slice about 1/4" thick. Dip in beaten egg whites and then in the crumb mixture. Put on baking sheet. Bake in a 400 degree oven for about 12-15 minutes or till done.

title: Sun-Dried Tomato Dip
instructions: Put the cream cheese, tomatoes, garlic and 1 T oil in a blender.
Process just until the ingredients are blended, but not creamy as there should still be some small pieces of sun-dried tomatoes in the dip.
Serve with assorted vegetables, chips, crackers or seafood.
text: Recipe: Sun-Dried Tomato Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, tomatoes, garlic. Instructions: Put the cream cheese, tomatoes, garlic and 1 T oil in a blender. Process just until the ingredients are blended, but not creamy as there should still be some small pieces of sun-dried tomatoes in the dip. Serve with assorted vegetables, chips, crackers or seafood.

title: Parmesan Chicken With Garlic Butter
instructions: Dust the chicken with flour.
Whisk together the eggs.
In another bowl, combine the breadcrumbs with the parmesan.
Dip the chicken pieces, one at a time, into the egg , then roll in the breadcurm mixture to coat.
Heat a little oil in a frying pan.
Cook the chicken in batches for 1-2 minutes each side, until cooked through.
Melt the butter in a pan and add the garlic. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the parsley and season with salt and pepper.
Pour over the warm chicken.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Chicken With Garlic Butter. Ingredients: chicken, eggs, fresh breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, butter, garlic, parsley. Instructions: Dust the chicken with flour. Whisk together the eggs. In another bowl, combine the breadcrumbs with the parmesan. Dip the chicken pieces, one at a time, into the egg , then roll in the breadcurm mixture to coat. Heat a little oil in a frying pan. Cook the chicken in batches for 1-2 minutes each side, until cooked through. Melt the butter in a pan and add the garlic. Cook for 2-3 minutes. Add the parsley and season with salt and pepper. Pour over the warm chicken.

title: Sour Cream Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and spoon into 24 small or 12 large un-greased muffin tins. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Sour Cream Muffins. Ingredients: flour, butter, sour cream. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Combine all ingredients in a bowl and spoon into 24 small or 12 large un-greased muffin tins. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes.

title: Paula Deen'S Sour Cream Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix butter, flour and sour cream until JUST blended. Do Not Over mix.
Pour batter into muffin tins, 2/3 the way full to allow for biscuits to rise.
Bake for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Paula Deen'S Sour Cream Biscuits. Ingredients: butter, flour, sour cream. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix butter, flour and sour cream until JUST blended. Do Not Over mix. Pour batter into muffin tins, 2/3 the way full to allow for biscuits to rise. Bake for 20 minutes.

title: Smokie Link Potato Soup
instructions: Add just enough water to cubed potatoes to cover.
boil till tender DO NOT DRAIN.
Saute little smokies that have been cut in half with chopped onion and celery.
Combine all with cheeze whiz and cream of celery soup.
Heat slowly till hot.
text: Recipe: Smokie Link Potato Soup. Ingredients: potatoes, sausage, cream of celery soup, onion, celery. Instructions: Add just enough water to cubed potatoes to cover. boil till tender DO NOT DRAIN. Saute little smokies that have been cut in half with chopped onion and celery. Combine all with cheeze whiz and cream of celery soup. Heat slowly till hot.

title: Ranch Roasted Carrots
instructions: Cut carrots so they are the size of french fries, or a fat index finger.
Toss carrots in a bag with olive oil.
Next toss carrots in a bag with dressing mix.
Pour onto a baking sheet and roast at 400 F for 10 minutes, stir, then roast for ten minutes more.
text: Recipe: Ranch Roasted Carrots. Ingredients: carrot, olive oil. Instructions: Cut carrots so they are the size of french fries, or a fat index finger. Toss carrots in a bag with olive oil. Next toss carrots in a bag with dressing mix. Pour onto a baking sheet and roast at 400 F for 10 minutes, stir, then roast for ten minutes more.

title: Tomato Pesto
instructions: In food processor combine basil, garlic, and tomato.
Blend ingredients together until a smooth paste forms.
Adjust with salt to taste.
Transfer mixture to a bowl.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
text: Recipe: Tomato Pesto. Ingredients: basil, garlic, roma tomatoes. Instructions: In food processor combine basil, garlic, and tomato. Blend ingredients together until a smooth paste forms. Adjust with salt to taste. Transfer mixture to a bowl. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

title: Italian Wedding Soup
instructions: In medium bowl combine, meat, egg,bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, basil& onion powder; shape into 3/4" balls.
In large sauce pan, heat broth to boiling; stir in spinach, orzo, carrot& meatballs.
Return to boil;reduce heat to medium.
Cook at slow boil for 10 minutes or until orzo is tender.
Stir frequently to avoid sticking.
Serve with additional Parmesan cheese sprinkled on top.
text: Recipe: Italian Wedding Soup. Ingredients: lean ground beef, egg, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, dried basil, onion powder, chicken broth, chopped spinach, orzo pasta, carrot, parmesan cheese. Instructions: In medium bowl combine, meat, egg,bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, basil& onion powder; shape into 3/4" balls. In large sauce pan, heat broth to boiling; stir in spinach, orzo, carrot& meatballs. Return to boil;reduce heat to medium. Cook at slow boil for 10 minutes or until orzo is tender. Stir frequently to avoid sticking. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese sprinkled on top.

title: Baked Brie In Bread
instructions: In a medium bowl mix together the flour, butter and cream cheese until dough forms.
Shape into a ball and wrap tightly with plastic wrap.
Chill for 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Divide dough into 2 rounds and roll out.
Place brie on 1/2 of dough, cover with the other and crimp sides.
Brush with egg, place on a lightly greased pie pan and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove and let stand for 15 minutes.
Serve with crackers, firm bread cubes and sliced apples.
text: Recipe: Baked Brie In Bread. Ingredients: flour, butter, cream cheese, brie cheese, egg. Instructions: In a medium bowl mix together the flour, butter and cream cheese until dough forms. Shape into a ball and wrap tightly with plastic wrap. Chill for 1 hour. Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Divide dough into 2 rounds and roll out. Place brie on 1/2 of dough, cover with the other and crimp sides. Brush with egg, place on a lightly greased pie pan and bake for 20 minutes. Remove and let stand for 15 minutes. Serve with crackers, firm bread cubes and sliced apples.

title: Ranch Crispy Chicken
instructions: Mix the breadcrumbs and Dressing mix in a plastic bag.
Put chicken in the bag and shake until coated.
Bake in 375F oven for 50 minutes.
text: Recipe: Ranch Crispy Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Mix the breadcrumbs and Dressing mix in a plastic bag. Put chicken in the bag and shake until coated. Bake in 375F oven for 50 minutes.

title: Cheesy Vegetable Casserole
instructions: Cut the cheese into small cubes, and place in a saucepan with half the butter (1/4 cup).
Over medium heat, melt until smooth, stirring constantly.
Place the vegetables in a 1-quart casserole dish, and pour cheese mixture over.
Mix well, then spread evenly in dish.
Melt remaining butter, and combine with cracker crumbs; sprinkle over the top of casserole.
Bake, uncovered, at 350F for 20-25 minutes.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Vegetable Casserole. Ingredients: American cheese, butter, frozen broccoli carrots cauliflower, butter. Instructions: Cut the cheese into small cubes, and place in a saucepan with half the butter (1/4 cup). Over medium heat, melt until smooth, stirring constantly. Place the vegetables in a 1-quart casserole dish, and pour cheese mixture over. Mix well, then spread evenly in dish. Melt remaining butter, and combine with cracker crumbs; sprinkle over the top of casserole. Bake, uncovered, at 350F for 20-25 minutes. Serve immediately.

title: Cheese Garlic Bread
instructions: Spread butter on the cut sides of the bread.
Sprinkle with garlic and parsley.
Place on baking sheet and set under broiler and broil until lightly browned (watch it closely so it doesn't burn).
Sprinkle cheeses on the bread and return to the broiler and cook just a little while longer until the cheeses melt.
Cut into pieces and serve.
text: Recipe: Cheese Garlic Bread. Ingredients: bread, butter, garlic, parsley, freshly grated parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Spread butter on the cut sides of the bread. Sprinkle with garlic and parsley. Place on baking sheet and set under broiler and broil until lightly browned (watch it closely so it doesn't burn). Sprinkle cheeses on the bread and return to the broiler and cook just a little while longer until the cheeses melt. Cut into pieces and serve.

title: Creamy Tomato Basil Tortellini Soup
instructions: Coat soup pan with olive oil. Add onion and garlic and saute till soft.
Add canned diced tomatoes, basil, tomato soup and two cans milk. Stir till blended.
Add chicken broth and stir in tomato paste till blended.
Simmer for 20 minutes
Add light cream and parmesan cheese.
Add tortellini and cook till tender (at least 15 minutes).
text: Recipe: Creamy Tomato Basil Tortellini Soup. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, onion, tomatoes, campbell's, milk, basil, chicken broth, Italian-style tomato, light cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Coat soup pan with olive oil. Add onion and garlic and saute till soft. Add canned diced tomatoes, basil, tomato soup and two cans milk. Stir till blended. Add chicken broth and stir in tomato paste till blended. Simmer for 20 minutes Add light cream and parmesan cheese. Add tortellini and cook till tender (at least 15 minutes).

title: Eggs A La King
instructions: On medium high heat place the butter in sauce pan and melt.
Add flour and cook for few minutes. Do not brown.
Add soup mix to coat.

Mix in hot milk and bring to a low boil. Cook for aprox. 10-15 min, (stirring as to not get any lumps and doesn't stick to the bottom of the pot), or until you feel the noddles are cooked and sauce is thickened. If it gets to thick, add a bit more milk.
Slice the eggs and combine with the sauce.
We usually had this over toast or buns.
text: Recipe: Eggs A La King. Ingredients: butter, flour, hot milk, eggs. Instructions: On medium high heat place the butter in sauce pan and melt. Add flour and cook for few minutes. Do not brown. Add soup mix to coat. Mix in hot milk and bring to a low boil. Cook for aprox. 10-15 min, (stirring as to not get any lumps and doesn't stick to the bottom of the pot), or until you feel the noddles are cooked and sauce is thickened. If it gets to thick, add a bit more milk. Slice the eggs and combine with the sauce. We usually had this over toast or buns.

title: Caramelized Onions
instructions: Put the onions in the bowl with the fat or butter. Cover the bowl and microwave for 10 minutes on high.

Take off the cover, and stir the onions--there should be good bit of liquid in the bowl. Microwave (uncovered) for approximately 10 more minutes, but keep an eye on it. It should get brown around the edges, so stir it periodically.
Eventually it'll be a brown mass of onions. If you like them crispy, microwave them a bit longer but, again, keep an eye on them--it's a real short moment between crispy and burnt.

You can do this in a conventional oven too, but it takes longer; say around 20 minutes at 350°F with the cover on and another 20 min with the cover off, stirring periodically. Once again, keep an eye on it.
text: Recipe: Caramelized Onions. Ingredients: butter, onions. Instructions: Put the onions in the bowl with the fat or butter. Cover the bowl and microwave for 10 minutes on high. Take off the cover, and stir the onions--there should be good bit of liquid in the bowl. Microwave (uncovered) for approximately 10 more minutes, but keep an eye on it. It should get brown around the edges, so stir it periodically. Eventually it'll be a brown mass of onions. If you like them crispy, microwave them a bit longer but, again, keep an eye on them--it's a real short moment between crispy and burnt. You can do this in a conventional oven too, but it takes longer; say around 20 minutes at 350°F with the cover on and another 20 min with the cover off, stirring periodically. Once again, keep an eye on it.

title: Slow Cooked Teriyaki Meatballs Stew
instructions: Line bottom of slow cooker with baby carrots.
Spread the young potatoes next.
Spread the meatballs.
Pour in chicken broth.
Cook on Low setting for 8-10 hours.
text: Recipe: Slow Cooked Teriyaki Meatballs Stew. Ingredients: chicken, baby carrots, new potatoes, chicken broth. Instructions: Line bottom of slow cooker with baby carrots. Spread the young potatoes next. Spread the meatballs. Pour in chicken broth. Cook on Low setting for 8-10 hours.

title: Microwave Vidalia Onion
instructions: "Quarter" the onion by making an "X" cut - but do not slice all the way through. (Bottoms will still be attached.)
Place slivers of butter between the slices.
Microwave on high 3-5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Microwave Vidalia Onion. Ingredients: vidalia onion, butter. Instructions: "Quarter" the onion by making an "X" cut - but do not slice all the way through. (Bottoms will still be attached.) Place slivers of butter between the slices. Microwave on high 3-5 minutes.

title: Your Basic Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Preheat the skillet.
Coat each side of bread with butter, inside and out.
Place pieces of cheese in the middle.
Cook on a low heat until bread is toasty and cheese is melted, flipping often.
The secret to this is cooking over a low heat, and flipping the sandwich often.
text: Recipe: Your Basic Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: white bread, American cheese, butter. Instructions: Preheat the skillet. Coat each side of bread with butter, inside and out. Place pieces of cheese in the middle. Cook on a low heat until bread is toasty and cheese is melted, flipping often. The secret to this is cooking over a low heat, and flipping the sandwich often.

title: Holiday Dried Beef Cheese Ball
instructions: keep cheese out to soften, cut up green onion in small pieces and wash well, cut up beef in small pieces.
Mix all in a bowl and then shape into ball or other shape.
cover with foil and refrigerate for 1 hr or 2 before serving with crackers.
text: Recipe: Holiday Dried Beef Cheese Ball. Ingredients: packets cream cheese, green onion, beef. Instructions: keep cheese out to soften, cut up green onion in small pieces and wash well, cut up beef in small pieces. Mix all in a bowl and then shape into ball or other shape. cover with foil and refrigerate for 1 hr or 2 before serving with crackers.

title: Roasted Tomato Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 450.
Cut the tomatoes in half and dump them into a roasting pan or a baking sheet with sides.
Chop up half an onion and a few cloves of garlic per pan, or more if you like, and dump that in too.
Coarsely chop some fresh basil and add that.
Stir this all together and spread it out evenly; crowded is fine but no more than a single layer.
Drizzle on some olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Roast for 20 minutes or until the tomatoes collapse and the skins look browned and wrinkly. Let the pan cool and then scrape everything into a blender or food processor and puree. Use or freeze.
text: Recipe: Roasted Tomato Sauce. Ingredients: tomatoes, onion, garlic, fresh basil, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450. Cut the tomatoes in half and dump them into a roasting pan or a baking sheet with sides. Chop up half an onion and a few cloves of garlic per pan, or more if you like, and dump that in too. Coarsely chop some fresh basil and add that. Stir this all together and spread it out evenly; crowded is fine but no more than a single layer. Drizzle on some olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Roast for 20 minutes or until the tomatoes collapse and the skins look browned and wrinkly. Let the pan cool and then scrape everything into a blender or food processor and puree. Use or freeze.

title: Yummy French Onion Soup
instructions: Thinly slice onions(rings).
In 3 quart pot, melt butter.
saute onions until translucent.
add cans of broth and teriaki sauce.
bring to boil,simmer for 45 minutes.

Fill crock with hot soup, float a 1 inch slice of French bread, put 1 slice of each, swiss, provolone and munster cheese. (optional any cheese will do) put in a 400 degree oven until cheese is melted and soup is bubbly.
text: Recipe: Yummy French Onion Soup. Ingredients: onions, beef broth, beef broth, butter, bread, swiss cheese, provolone cheese, muenster cheese. Instructions: Thinly slice onions(rings). In 3 quart pot, melt butter. saute onions until translucent. add cans of broth and teriaki sauce. bring to boil,simmer for 45 minutes. Fill crock with hot soup, float a 1 inch slice of French bread, put 1 slice of each, swiss, provolone and munster cheese. (optional any cheese will do) put in a 400 degree oven until cheese is melted and soup is bubbly.

title: Judy'S Volcano Bread
instructions: Cut the top of the bread off and hollow out to resemble a bowl.
Reserve the bread chunks for dipping, and keep the top slice of bread which will be a "lid".
Mix the remaining ingredients until well combined.
Place the mixture into the bread bowl and place the "lid" back on.
Wrap in heavy duty foil and place on baking sheet.
Bake at 325F for about 2 hours.
Serve with bread cubes, crunchy bread stix or pita chips.
text: Recipe: Judy'S Volcano Bread. Ingredients: Italian bread, cream cheese, cheddar cheese, garlic. Instructions: Cut the top of the bread off and hollow out to resemble a bowl. Reserve the bread chunks for dipping, and keep the top slice of bread which will be a "lid". Mix the remaining ingredients until well combined. Place the mixture into the bread bowl and place the "lid" back on. Wrap in heavy duty foil and place on baking sheet. Bake at 325F for about 2 hours. Serve with bread cubes, crunchy bread stix or pita chips.

title: Cream Cheese, Capsicum And Parsley Dip
instructions: Remove the cream cheese from the fridge and allow it to soften a little- to make the dip easier to mix.
Finely chop the capsicum and parsley.
Mix all the ingredients together.
Serve with your favourite savoury biscuits.
text: Recipe: Cream Cheese, Capsicum And Parsley Dip. Ingredients: light cream cheese, parsley. Instructions: Remove the cream cheese from the fridge and allow it to soften a little- to make the dip easier to mix. Finely chop the capsicum and parsley. Mix all the ingredients together. Serve with your favourite savoury biscuits.

title: Ham & Cheese Omelette
instructions: Wash and chop spring onion.
Wash and slice the ham.
In a mixing bowl, combine eggs, ham, milk and onion. Beat well.
Heat a frying pan on medium and melt margarine.
Pour egg mixture into pan. As the omelette begins to set, lift up edges with egg flipper so uncooked portion of egg can flow under the cooked portion.
When eggs are set but the top is still moist, sprinkle 3/4 of the cheese over it.
Fold one edge of the omelette over the cheese, then sprinkle the remaining cheese over the top.
Slide omelette onto the plate and cut into portions.
text: Recipe: Ham & Cheese Omelette. Ingredients: eggs, soymilk, ham, onion, butter, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Wash and chop spring onion. Wash and slice the ham. In a mixing bowl, combine eggs, ham, milk and onion. Beat well. Heat a frying pan on medium and melt margarine. Pour egg mixture into pan. As the omelette begins to set, lift up edges with egg flipper so uncooked portion of egg can flow under the cooked portion. When eggs are set but the top is still moist, sprinkle 3/4 of the cheese over it. Fold one edge of the omelette over the cheese, then sprinkle the remaining cheese over the top. Slide omelette onto the plate and cut into portions.

title: Creamy Potluck Potatoes
instructions: In a large saucepan cook potatoes for 10 to 12 minutes or until tender.
Drain rinse with cold water.
Drain again.
In a large bowl stir together the soup sour cream cream cheese and butter.
Stir in 1/4 cup of the shredded cheese, 3 tbsp of the green onions, milk garlic salt and pepper.
Stir in potatoes.
Put in 2 quart baking dish.
Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until heated through.
Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese.
Let stand 5 minutes.
Sprinkle with remaining green onions.
text: Recipe: Creamy Potluck Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, cream cheese, butter, cheddar cheese, green onion, milk, garlic salt, pepper. Instructions: In a large saucepan cook potatoes for 10 to 12 minutes or until tender. Drain rinse with cold water. Drain again. In a large bowl stir together the soup sour cream cream cheese and butter. Stir in 1/4 cup of the shredded cheese, 3 tbsp of the green onions, milk garlic salt and pepper. Stir in potatoes. Put in 2 quart baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese. Let stand 5 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining green onions.

title: Angel Hair Soup
instructions: Bring the broth, tomato sauce and basil to a simmer over medium heat. Add the angel hair and cook until just al dente. Add the fresh basil and cook for one minute more.
Scoop into bowls and serve with a glug of olive oil and sprinkle of fresh Parmesan cheese.
text: Recipe: Angel Hair Soup. Ingredients: chicken broth, tomato sauce, angel hair pasta, basil, olive oil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Bring the broth, tomato sauce and basil to a simmer over medium heat. Add the angel hair and cook until just al dente. Add the fresh basil and cook for one minute more. Scoop into bowls and serve with a glug of olive oil and sprinkle of fresh Parmesan cheese.

title: Nigella Lawson Sticky Garlic Potatoes
instructions: Bring a pan of salted water to a boil, and cook the potatoes for 30 minutes. Drain, and put back into the dry pan.
Peel the garlic cloves and put them in the dry pan with the potatoes.
Mash the potatoes and garlic so they are cracked and split. They can be done ahead up to this point and left in the pan but leave the lid off, so they don't get watery.
Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F and slip a roasting pan in to heat up at the same time.
When the oven is hot, pour the oil into the pan and leave it to heat up for 10 minutes.
Carefully tip the potatoes and garlic into the hot oil and cook for 15 minutes.
Turn the potatoes over and cook another 15 minutes until browned and crispy. Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Nigella Lawson Sticky Garlic Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Bring a pan of salted water to a boil, and cook the potatoes for 30 minutes. Drain, and put back into the dry pan. Peel the garlic cloves and put them in the dry pan with the potatoes. Mash the potatoes and garlic so they are cracked and split. They can be done ahead up to this point and left in the pan but leave the lid off, so they don't get watery. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F and slip a roasting pan in to heat up at the same time. When the oven is hot, pour the oil into the pan and leave it to heat up for 10 minutes. Carefully tip the potatoes and garlic into the hot oil and cook for 15 minutes. Turn the potatoes over and cook another 15 minutes until browned and crispy. Serve immediately.

title: Easy Bruschetta Chicken
instructions: Pour 4 tablespoons of the dressing over chicken in resealable plastic bag and seal. Turn bag over several times to evenly coat chicken with dressing. Refrigerate 10 minutes to marinate.
While chicken is marinating, combine tomatoes, cheese, basil and remaining 2 tablespoons of dressing.
Remove chicken from marinade bag and place in baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
Spoon tomato mixture over chicken breasts and bake an additional ten minutes.
text: Recipe: Easy Bruschetta Chicken. Ingredients: tomato vinaigrette, chicken, tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Pour 4 tablespoons of the dressing over chicken in resealable plastic bag and seal. Turn bag over several times to evenly coat chicken with dressing. Refrigerate 10 minutes to marinate. While chicken is marinating, combine tomatoes, cheese, basil and remaining 2 tablespoons of dressing. Remove chicken from marinade bag and place in baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes. Spoon tomato mixture over chicken breasts and bake an additional ten minutes.

title: Milo Cake
instructions: add the milo and milk together into the coffee mug.
stir until it becomes a gooey mix.
place in the microwave on high for 30 secs.
text: Recipe: Milo Cake. Ingredients: milk. Instructions: add the milo and milk together into the coffee mug. stir until it becomes a gooey mix. place in the microwave on high for 30 secs.

title: Byron Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Scrub potatotes and pat dry.
Prick each one with a fork.
Cook directly on middle shelf for 1 hour 20 minutes.
Remove potatoes from oven and halve.
Place halves on baking sheet and make shallow dips in centre of each potato, raising potato up at edges.
Mix cheese and cream together and divide betwen potatoes.
Grill (broil) for 5 minutes until cheese has melted and started to bubble.
Serve hot, sprinkled with sea salt and black pepper.
text: Recipe: Byron Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, cheddar cheese, cream. Instructions: Preheat oven to 200 degrees Celsius. Scrub potatotes and pat dry. Prick each one with a fork. Cook directly on middle shelf for 1 hour 20 minutes. Remove potatoes from oven and halve. Place halves on baking sheet and make shallow dips in centre of each potato, raising potato up at edges. Mix cheese and cream together and divide betwen potatoes. Grill (broil) for 5 minutes until cheese has melted and started to bubble. Serve hot, sprinkled with sea salt and black pepper.

title: Grilled Ham And Brie Sandwiches
instructions: Butter one side of each slice of bread. Turn them butter down side on waxed paper,saran wrap or something on the counter.
Spread with mustard then layer with ham and Brie.
Top with a slice of sourdough, butter out.
Heat pan or griddle to medium heat and grill sandwiches.
When brown to your liking, turn them over and grill again.
text: Recipe: Grilled Ham And Brie Sandwiches. Ingredients: bread, champagne mustard, ham, brie cheese, butter. Instructions: Butter one side of each slice of bread. Turn them butter down side on waxed paper,saran wrap or something on the counter. Spread with mustard then layer with ham and Brie. Top with a slice of sourdough, butter out. Heat pan or griddle to medium heat and grill sandwiches. When brown to your liking, turn them over and grill again.

title: Chicken Parmigiana Jaffle
instructions: Plug in the sandwich maker to heat up.
In a small frypan fry chicken until cooked. Cut chicken into slices.
Spread butter onto one side of the bread and tomato paste onto the other.
Place 2 of these bread slices into the jaffle maker, butter side down. Top with chicken, cheese and ham.
Place remaining slices of bread on top, paste side facing into the chicken filling.
Cook in jaffle maker until browned to your liking.
text: Recipe: Chicken Parmigiana Jaffle. Ingredients: chicken breasts, tomato paste, bread, cheese, ham, butter. Instructions: Plug in the sandwich maker to heat up. In a small frypan fry chicken until cooked. Cut chicken into slices. Spread butter onto one side of the bread and tomato paste onto the other. Place 2 of these bread slices into the jaffle maker, butter side down. Top with chicken, cheese and ham. Place remaining slices of bread on top, paste side facing into the chicken filling. Cook in jaffle maker until browned to your liking.

title: Mom'S Seasoned Toast
instructions: Cut bread into 1/2" thick slices, spread with butter.
Place on baking sheet and sprinkle with spices (and Parmesan) and place under broiler until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
text: Recipe: Mom'S Seasoned Toast. Ingredients: Italian bread, butter, celery salt, onion powder, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cut bread into 1/2" thick slices, spread with butter. Place on baking sheet and sprinkle with spices (and Parmesan) and place under broiler until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.

title: 3 Step Fettuccine Alfredo
instructions: Pour butter over cooked noodles and stir.
Add cheese and cream, stir.
Let sit 5 minutes to thicken, stir and serve.
text: Recipe: 3 Step Fettuccine Alfredo. Ingredients: butter, parmesan cheese, heavy cream. Instructions: Pour butter over cooked noodles and stir. Add cheese and cream, stir. Let sit 5 minutes to thicken, stir and serve.

title: Mama’S Best Ever Spaghetti & Meatballs
instructions: Directions.
Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, eggs and 1/2 cup Sauce in medium bowl; shape into 18 meatballs.

Bring remaining Sauce to a boil over medium-high heat in 12-inch skillet. Gently stir in uncooked meatballs. Reduce heat to low and simmer covered, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes or until meatballs are done.
Serve over hot spaghetti.
text: Recipe: Mama’S Best Ever Spaghetti & Meatballs. Ingredients: lean ground beef, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, eggs, Garlic. Instructions: Directions. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, eggs and 1/2 cup Sauce in medium bowl; shape into 18 meatballs. Bring remaining Sauce to a boil over medium-high heat in 12-inch skillet. Gently stir in uncooked meatballs. Reduce heat to low and simmer covered, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes or until meatballs are done. Serve over hot spaghetti.

title: Tart Shells
instructions: Blend cream cheese and butter together.
Add flour and mix.
Chill for at least 30 minutes.
Divide into 24 balls and press into miniature muffin tins, pushing dough up the sides.
Spoon filling into pastry shells.
Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Tart Shells. Ingredients: cream cheese, butter, flour. Instructions: Blend cream cheese and butter together. Add flour and mix. Chill for at least 30 minutes. Divide into 24 balls and press into miniature muffin tins, pushing dough up the sides. Spoon filling into pastry shells. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.

title: Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff
instructions: Place chicken in bottom of crock pot.
Combine soup, sour cream and onion soup mix and pour over chicken.
Cook on low for 7 hours.
Serve over cooked rice or noodles.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff. Ingredients: chicken breasts, sour cream, Onion Soup Mix, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Place chicken in bottom of crock pot. Combine soup, sour cream and onion soup mix and pour over chicken. Cook on low for 7 hours. Serve over cooked rice or noodles.

title: Garlic Cheese Noodles
instructions: Put milk and garlic in a saute pan.
Cook on medium for 2 minutes.
Add the cheese and cook 5 minutes, or until.
the cheese is melted.
Add the butter and let it melt.
Put in the noodles.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Garlic Cheese Noodles. Ingredients: garlic, milk, monterey jack cheese, cheddar cheese, butter, angel hair pasta. Instructions: Put milk and garlic in a saute pan. Cook on medium for 2 minutes. Add the cheese and cook 5 minutes, or until. the cheese is melted. Add the butter and let it melt. Put in the noodles. Enjoy!

title: Carrots And Onions
instructions: Place butter in medium stockpan and melt.
add carrots and onions and bring to a boil reduce heat and cover and cook until carrots are tender, usually about 45 minutes.
enjoy.
text: Recipe: Carrots And Onions. Ingredients: carrot, butter, sweet onion. Instructions: Place butter in medium stockpan and melt. add carrots and onions and bring to a boil reduce heat and cover and cook until carrots are tender, usually about 45 minutes. enjoy.

title: Frank'S Cheesy Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
Combine cheeder cheese, parmesan, parsley, green onion.
Melt 1 stick butter in large frying pan.
Make a paste with dry garlic powder & add to butter.
Slice loaf of french bread into 4ths.
Add 1/2 loaf to butter with cut side down.
Let butter soak in and brush bottom of loaf with butter from pan.
Repeat with other half loaf.
Put bread on a baking sheet and spread with cheese mixture.
Heat bread in oven for 8-10 minutes or until edges are golden brown.
Broil quickly for about 2 minutes to make crispier.
Slice and serve.
text: Recipe: Frank'S Cheesy Garlic Bread. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, parmesan cheese, fresh parsley, green onions, butter, garlic, bread. Instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Combine cheeder cheese, parmesan, parsley, green onion. Melt 1 stick butter in large frying pan. Make a paste with dry garlic powder & add to butter. Slice loaf of french bread into 4ths. Add 1/2 loaf to butter with cut side down. Let butter soak in and brush bottom of loaf with butter from pan. Repeat with other half loaf. Put bread on a baking sheet and spread with cheese mixture. Heat bread in oven for 8-10 minutes or until edges are golden brown. Broil quickly for about 2 minutes to make crispier. Slice and serve.

title: Freezing Eggs
instructions: Items Needed:
Eggs.
Ziplock Bags, various sizes.
Permanent Markers.

Freezing eggs will allow you to keep them for up to 1 yr. But they must be taken out of the shell. When freezing the eggs they will no longer work for a Fried Egg - seems to take away the "pretty" shape.
Results are best when the eggs are beaten before freezing, allowing for a smoother product when thawed before use.
Personal Recommendations of freezing in groups of 2 - 3 - 6 & 12 eggs per bag. Instructions for freezing individually below.
Pre-made mixes such as cakes often call for 2 - 3 eggs.
Batters such as for pancakes, french toast, scrambled eggs, baked egg dishes often need 6 or more eggs.
The packages of 12 eggs would be for large families.
Label ziplock bags PRIOR to filling, making sure to mark the NUMBER of eggs in the bag along with the DATE. (Month & Year is fine).
Fill the bags with the number required, and carefully press out all the excess air possible.
Lay filled bags flat in deep tray and place in freezer. When frozen place individual bags of same amount into GALLON size or HUGE ziplock bags, to keep the amounts more organized.
Once the bags are frozen they will be easy to stand up side by side with zippers upright.
TO FREEZE 1 EGG AT TIME - Beat egg lightly and place in ice-cube trays sprayed slightly with non-stick spray. When frozen, pop out cube and place in ziplock bag.
TO USE:
Place the amount of eggs needed in the REFRIGERATOR 24-48 hours PRIOR to use.
NEVER THAW EGGS ON COUNTER TOP!
If there still appears to be thick "globs" in the egg, a quick spin in the blender will smooth them out, or a good whisk.
Use as you would normally from the shell.
*note*.

I have seen instructions stating that salt or sugar MUST be added when freezing eggs. I personally have NEVER done that, and after 15 yrs of using the above system MONTHLY, I have safely raised 7 children, not to mention several "strays" that chose to live with us for months at a time. There has NEVER been a problem at all!
Servings & Time to Make:
This will vary on how much you decide to put up. Once you have a smooth system, very little time is involved.

I have learned to use my Magic Bullet - ( THE best countertop equipment that I will ALWAYS have in my kitchen ) to give them a quick beat, and find the little spout great when pouring. I also place my ziplock bags upright in a BIG coffee cup so that it does not tip over!
--------- For those suffering from * S E Y F E W S *
(Separating Egg Yolks From Egg Whites Syndrome ).

Just mark the bags accordingly. Perhaps a good Meringue is just around the corner -- maybe you want a really extra rich yellow cake or toss the extra "whites" or "yolks" into the next giant omelette or pancake mix.
I have not tried it yet -- but I stumbled across recipe # 376260 Toasted Meringue Almond Clouds by Chef mariajane tonight, and that will be my next egg white usage!
