Take off the chicken and the onions and reserve the broth for later use in the recipe. Place in a casserole dish the onions cut them in large pieces. Then add feta crumbs,the parsley and the rice. Mix well. Put on top the chicken and 1.5 cup of chicken broth. Add the butter. Bake for 45 minutes at 200°C - (350F). Mix the eggs with the remaining chicken broth and add them to the casserole. Bake for 30 minutes more at the same temperature.

title: Hot Italian Tomato And Cream Cheese Dip
instructions: Heat stewed tomatoes till a bit bubbly and add the cream cheese.
Stir until well blended.
Remove from heat and serve in a nice serving bowl with tortilla chips or chunks of Italian bread.
I sometimes will cut out the center of a round bread, line the inside with foil and pour in the dip.
Cut up the center portion of the bread and use it to dip into the dip.

Caution: if you do the bread bowl idea -- make sure you line it well so the liquid doesn't have a chance to soak into the outside rim of the bowl -- I have done that by accident and it is not a pretty sight!
text: Recipe: Hot Italian Tomato And Cream Cheese Dip. Ingredients: tomatoes, cream cheese. Instructions: Heat stewed tomatoes till a bit bubbly and add the cream cheese. Stir until well blended. Remove from heat and serve in a nice serving bowl with tortilla chips or chunks of Italian bread. I sometimes will cut out the center of a round bread, line the inside with foil and pour in the dip. Cut up the center portion of the bread and use it to dip into the dip. Caution: if you do the bread bowl idea -- make sure you line it well so the liquid doesn't have a chance to soak into the outside rim of the bowl -- I have done that by accident and it is not a pretty sight!

title: Cheese Stuffed Italian Meatloaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a large bowl, stir together the egg, breadcrumbs (I whir herbed dry stuffing mix in my food processor to make these), garlic, and 1/2 cup pasta sauce until well-mixed.
Add remaining ingredients (except the garnish), and mix together well (I do the whole thing in my sturdy KitchenAid mixer, which works quite well).

Put into a large loaf pan, top/garnish with additional pasta sauce (I like a*lot* of sauce and so use about a half-cup, but three or four tablespoons would do, too), and bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour.
Serve with rice, spaghetti, or scalloped potatoes.
text: Recipe: Cheese Stuffed Italian Meatloaf. Ingredients: egg, bread, garlic, pasta sauce, onion, fresh basil, lean ground beef, hot Italian sausage, mozzarella cheese, additional pasta sauce. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, stir together the egg, breadcrumbs (I whir herbed dry stuffing mix in my food processor to make these), garlic, and 1/2 cup pasta sauce until well-mixed. Add remaining ingredients (except the garnish), and mix together well (I do the whole thing in my sturdy KitchenAid mixer, which works quite well). Put into a large loaf pan, top/garnish with additional pasta sauce (I like a*lot* of sauce and so use about a half-cup, but three or four tablespoons would do, too), and bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour. Serve with rice, spaghetti, or scalloped potatoes.

title: French Onion Rice (Rice Cooker)
instructions: Wash the cup of rice thoroughly - five times should do it to get the water clear. Don't skip this step! (Note: use a regular English measuring cup, not the plastic cup that comes with your rice cooker).

Put the rice and the soups in the rice cooker. Float the butter on top. Close the cooker. If using a fuzzy logic cooker press the regular rice menu option and start, or just press ON if using a kettle style cooker. It should take anywhere from 55 minutes to an hour to complete.
text: Recipe: French Onion Rice (Rice Cooker). Ingredients: long grain rice, condensed beef, condensed French onion soup, butter. Instructions: Wash the cup of rice thoroughly - five times should do it to get the water clear. Don't skip this step! (Note: use a regular English measuring cup, not the plastic cup that comes with your rice cooker). Put the rice and the soups in the rice cooker. Float the butter on top. Close the cooker. If using a fuzzy logic cooker press the regular rice menu option and start, or just press ON if using a kettle style cooker. It should take anywhere from 55 minutes to an hour to complete.

title: Chicken San Marco
instructions: Mix together basil, parmesan and breadcrumbs, set aside.
Pound out chicken breasts, coat with flour, dip in egg wash and then coat with parmesan mix.
In a skillet on med heat, add a little oil and saute chicken until golden brown on both sides.
To make sauce, saute the garlic in the butter on med heat for 1 min ( do not brown).
Then add the heavy cream and reduce until thickens, add salt and pepper.
text: Recipe: Chicken San Marco. Ingredients: chicken breasts, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, fresh basil, butter, heavy cream, garlic, flour, eggs, salt. Instructions: Mix together basil, parmesan and breadcrumbs, set aside. Pound out chicken breasts, coat with flour, dip in egg wash and then coat with parmesan mix. In a skillet on med heat, add a little oil and saute chicken until golden brown on both sides. To make sauce, saute the garlic in the butter on med heat for 1 min ( do not brown). Then add the heavy cream and reduce until thickens, add salt and pepper.

title: Baked Feta-Stuffed Tomatoes
instructions: Cut four large tomatoes in half.
Scoop out pulp from each tomato half, leaving shells intact; discard seeds, and then coarsely chop pulp.

In medium bowl, stir together tomato pulp, 4 ounces crumbled feta cheese, 1/4 cup fine, dry breadcrumbs; 2 tablespoons chopped green onions; 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley; and 2 tablespoons olive oil.
Spoon mixture evenly into tomato shells, and place in a 13x9-inch baking dish.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
Garnish with Italian parsley sprigs.
text: Recipe: Baked Feta-Stuffed Tomatoes. Ingredients: tomatoes, feta cheese, breadcrumb, green onions, parsley, olive oil. Instructions: Cut four large tomatoes in half. Scoop out pulp from each tomato half, leaving shells intact; discard seeds, and then coarsely chop pulp. In medium bowl, stir together tomato pulp, 4 ounces crumbled feta cheese, 1/4 cup fine, dry breadcrumbs; 2 tablespoons chopped green onions; 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley; and 2 tablespoons olive oil. Spoon mixture evenly into tomato shells, and place in a 13x9-inch baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. Garnish with Italian parsley sprigs.

title: Khubaz (Pita With Jelly)
instructions: Spread each pita lightly with butter.
Top with a layer of jelly.
Cut the pitas in half and serve.
Khubaz is usually served as an accompaniment to salads.
text: Recipe: Khubaz (Pita With Jelly). Ingredients: whole wheat pita breads, butter. Instructions: Spread each pita lightly with butter. Top with a layer of jelly. Cut the pitas in half and serve. Khubaz is usually served as an accompaniment to salads.

title: 7-Up Pork Chops
instructions: Put chops in shallow pan.
Pour 7-up over chops and sprinkle with onion soup mix.
Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: 7-Up Pork Chops. Ingredients: pork chops, onion soup mix. Instructions: Put chops in shallow pan. Pour 7-up over chops and sprinkle with onion soup mix. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

title: Quick And Easy Mediterranean Style Rice
instructions: cook the rice according to the package instructions.
and substitue chicken broth for water.
while the rice is cooking finely chop your Fresh Basil leaves.
half your grape tomatoes and finely crumble your feta.
when the rice has absorbed all the broth and is done add all of your.
chopped ingredients into the pan and gently mix till your feta melts and your basil wilts down at this point taste and decide if you think you would like it better with the garlic poweder or without.
text: Recipe: Quick And Easy Mediterranean Style Rice. Ingredients: chicken broth, instant rice, feta cheese, basil, grape tomatoes, garlic. Instructions: cook the rice according to the package instructions. and substitue chicken broth for water. while the rice is cooking finely chop your Fresh Basil leaves. half your grape tomatoes and finely crumble your feta. when the rice has absorbed all the broth and is done add all of your. chopped ingredients into the pan and gently mix till your feta melts and your basil wilts down at this point taste and decide if you think you would like it better with the garlic poweder or without.

title: Potato Chip Chicken
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Mix the potato chips, cheese, and garlic powder in a large ziploc bag.
Melt the butter or margarine in a shallow dish.
You can cut the chicken breasts into strips if you want to do this as chicken fingers.
Moisten the chicken pieces in the butter or margarine, then seal them in the ziploc bag, and shake to coat.
Lay the chicken out on a baking sheet (I always cover the sheet with foil for easy cleanup). If you want to, you can cover the chicken with the leftover coating.
Bake 40 minutes for whole breasts, 30 minutes for strips.
text: Recipe: Potato Chip Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, potato chips, parmesan cheese, garlic, butter. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Mix the potato chips, cheese, and garlic powder in a large ziploc bag. Melt the butter or margarine in a shallow dish. You can cut the chicken breasts into strips if you want to do this as chicken fingers. Moisten the chicken pieces in the butter or margarine, then seal them in the ziploc bag, and shake to coat. Lay the chicken out on a baking sheet (I always cover the sheet with foil for easy cleanup). If you want to, you can cover the chicken with the leftover coating. Bake 40 minutes for whole breasts, 30 minutes for strips.

title: Kelly'S Cheese Potato Casserole
instructions: In large bowl combine well everything but the potatoes, crackers and butter.
Fold in potatoes well.
Pour into 13x9 glass baking dish.
Smooth top even and flat.
Mix crackers and butter and evenly sprinkle over the top.
Bake in 350° oven for 45 minutes.
Let set 5-10 minutes before serving.
text: Recipe: Kelly'S Cheese Potato Casserole. Ingredients: brown potatoes, cream of chicken soup, cheddar cheese soup, sour cream, cheddar cheese, celery, onion, garlic, rosemary, Chicken, butter. Instructions: In large bowl combine well everything but the potatoes, crackers and butter. Fold in potatoes well. Pour into 13x9 glass baking dish. Smooth top even and flat. Mix crackers and butter and evenly sprinkle over the top. Bake in 350° oven for 45 minutes. Let set 5-10 minutes before serving.

title: Tomato Basil Dip
instructions: Spread cream cheese onto bottom of 9 inch pie plate.
Mix tomatoes and dressing and spoon over cream cheese.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and basil.
CHILL.
Served best with TOWN HOUSE Bistro Multi Grain crackers.
text: Recipe: Tomato Basil Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, tomatoes, parmesan cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Spread cream cheese onto bottom of 9 inch pie plate. Mix tomatoes and dressing and spoon over cream cheese. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and basil. CHILL. Served best with TOWN HOUSE Bistro Multi Grain crackers.

title: Noodles Romanoff
instructions: Boil noodles in salted water until done. (Follow noodle package directions for time.).
Drain noodles and return them to the pot.
Add butter. Stir until melted on the noodles.
Add all remaining ingredients.
Serve hot.
If you have any leftovers, reheat them with a tablespoon or two of milk, as the cheese mixture soaks into the noodles.
text: Recipe: Noodles Romanoff. Ingredients: egg noodles, sour cream, butter, onion, garlic. Instructions: Boil noodles in salted water until done. (Follow noodle package directions for time.). Drain noodles and return them to the pot. Add butter. Stir until melted on the noodles. Add all remaining ingredients. Serve hot. If you have any leftovers, reheat them with a tablespoon or two of milk, as the cheese mixture soaks into the noodles.

title: Ranch Potatoes
instructions: Peel and cube potatoes.
Throw into a large ziploc bag.
Add olive oil and ranch dressing mix, and onion, if desired.
Toss to coat potatoes.
Pour into a baking dish and bake at 400 degrees for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Ranch Potatoes. Ingredients: red potatoes, olive oil, onion. Instructions: Peel and cube potatoes. Throw into a large ziploc bag. Add olive oil and ranch dressing mix, and onion, if desired. Toss to coat potatoes. Pour into a baking dish and bake at 400 degrees for 1 hour.

title: Sour Cream Chicken Enchilada Dip
instructions: Mix all ingredients in crockpot.
Heat thoroughly. Stir occasionally.
Serve over chips topped with cheeses.
text: Recipe: Sour Cream Chicken Enchilada Dip. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, sour cream, tomatoes, valley fresh chicken, cheddar cheese, cheese. Instructions: Mix all ingredients in crockpot. Heat thoroughly. Stir occasionally. Serve over chips topped with cheeses.

title: Tomato Mozzarella Basil Hors D' Oeuvres
instructions: Slice tomatoes.
Top w/ Mozzarella.
garnish with basil leaf.
Drizzle w/ garlic-infused olive oil.
text: Recipe: Tomato Mozzarella Basil Hors D' Oeuvres. Ingredients: tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, fresh basil, garlic. Instructions: Slice tomatoes. Top w/ Mozzarella. garnish with basil leaf. Drizzle w/ garlic-infused olive oil.

title: Easy Cheesy Breadsticks
instructions: Heat oven to 400 degrees F.
Line a baking sheet with nonstick foil.
Cut focaccia in half lengthwise with a long serrated knife.
Cut each half into 1-inch wide strips.
Place on baking sheet; coat with cooking spray.
Bake 12-14 minutes, turning once, until lightly toasted.
Remove from oven.
Push sticks together (it's easier to sprinkle them this way); sprinkle with cheese.
Bake 1-2 minutes, just until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Easy Cheesy Breadsticks. Ingredients: bread, olive oil, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 400 degrees F. Line a baking sheet with nonstick foil. Cut focaccia in half lengthwise with a long serrated knife. Cut each half into 1-inch wide strips. Place on baking sheet; coat with cooking spray. Bake 12-14 minutes, turning once, until lightly toasted. Remove from oven. Push sticks together (it's easier to sprinkle them this way); sprinkle with cheese. Bake 1-2 minutes, just until cheese melts.

title: Easy Eggplant Parmesan
instructions: Arrange a layer of eggplant slices in a colander. Sprinkle generously with salt. Continue layering and salting all eggplant slices. Let stand 30 minutes. Rinse and pat dry. Dip each eggplant slice in beaten egg, and dredge with breadcrumbs.
Heat oil in a heavy skillet. Over medium high heat fry eggplant in hot oil about 2 minutes per side until golden. Drain on absorbent paper.

Preheat oven to temperature 350°F Arrange half the eggplant slices in the bottom of baking dish sprayed lightly with nonstick spray. Spread half the sauce over top. Sprinkle with half the mozzarella and half the Parmesan. Repeat layers.
Bake 20-25 minutes or until mixture is bubbly.
text: Recipe: Easy Eggplant Parmesan. Ingredients: eggplant, eggs, bread crumbs, olive oil, spaghetti sauce, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Arrange a layer of eggplant slices in a colander. Sprinkle generously with salt. Continue layering and salting all eggplant slices. Let stand 30 minutes. Rinse and pat dry. Dip each eggplant slice in beaten egg, and dredge with breadcrumbs. Heat oil in a heavy skillet. Over medium high heat fry eggplant in hot oil about 2 minutes per side until golden. Drain on absorbent paper. Preheat oven to temperature 350°F Arrange half the eggplant slices in the bottom of baking dish sprayed lightly with nonstick spray. Spread half the sauce over top. Sprinkle with half the mozzarella and half the Parmesan. Repeat layers. Bake 20-25 minutes or until mixture is bubbly.

title: Shwartz Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F.
Thaw potatoes.
Mix together potatoes, sour cream, onion, mushroom soup and cheddar cheese.
Place ingredients in 9*13 baking dish.
Melt butter and pour over mixture, mix inches.
Bake for 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Shwartz Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, graded onion, cream of mushroom soup, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F. Thaw potatoes. Mix together potatoes, sour cream, onion, mushroom soup and cheddar cheese. Place ingredients in 9*13 baking dish. Melt butter and pour over mixture, mix inches. Bake for 1 1/2 hours.

title: Henny Penny Chicken
instructions: Mix soup, sour cream, and mozzerella cheeses together.
Place chicken in dish, pour soup and cheeses on top.
Bake covered for 1 hour at 350 or until chicken is done.
Serve over pasta, if desired.
I use this with my freezer cooking, and just make the sauce, add chicken, and freeze. It freezes very well!
text: Recipe: Henny Penny Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Mix soup, sour cream, and mozzerella cheeses together. Place chicken in dish, pour soup and cheeses on top. Bake covered for 1 hour at 350 or until chicken is done. Serve over pasta, if desired. I use this with my freezer cooking, and just make the sauce, add chicken, and freeze. It freezes very well!

title: Nuwave Deluxe Air Fried Chicken
instructions: 1. Place 4 thawed pieces of chicken in a Ziploc bag. Add one tablespoon of Ranch dressing mix(or other seasoning as desired) to bag and shake in order to coat chicken. Add 1/2 cup of low-fat buttermilk to Ziploc. Remove excess air and close bag. Let refrigerate overnight. (This step can be skipped if time is an issue. Skip to step 2.
2. When chicken is marinated, set up the dipping bowls.
1st Bowl-1 egg and one egg white (Whisked well).
2nd Bowl- 1/2 Cup Bread Crumbs mixed with 2 tablespoons of dry Ranch Dressing mix (or other seasoning) and 1/2 teaspoon of garlic salt.
Spray the 4" rack (3" if using Elite) generously with cooking spray. This prevents the coating from sticking to rack.
3. Let milk drip off pieces and beginning one at a time, roll them in the egg mix. Once covered, move piece to breading bowl.
4. Put one piece at a time in breading bowl and shake around until well-covered.

5. Place chicken on 4" rack (3" if using Elite) with the main skin sides down. Spray chicken generously with butter cooking spray. This will allow the chicken to crisp up and keep crumbs from flying around in the oven.

6. Set for 15 minutes at Power Level High (350 degrees for Elite) and start. When done, flip pieces over and set for another 15 minutes at Power Level High. If you desire crispier chicken, set the Elite for 375 degrees.
*It is important to remove the dome as soon as the timer beeps. This will keep the chicken from getting soggy from all of the steam.
text: Recipe: Nuwave Deluxe Air Fried Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, breadcrumbs, low-fat buttermilk, egg, egg white, garlic salt. Instructions: 1. Place 4 thawed pieces of chicken in a Ziploc bag. Add one tablespoon of Ranch dressing mix(or other seasoning as desired) to bag and shake in order to coat chicken. Add 1/2 cup of low-fat buttermilk to Ziploc. Remove excess air and close bag. Let refrigerate overnight. (This step can be skipped if time is an issue. Skip to step 2. 2. When chicken is marinated, set up the dipping bowls. 1st Bowl-1 egg and one egg white (Whisked well). 2nd Bowl- 1/2 Cup Bread Crumbs mixed with 2 tablespoons of dry Ranch Dressing mix (or other seasoning) and 1/2 teaspoon of garlic salt. Spray the 4" rack (3" if using Elite) generously with cooking spray. This prevents the coating from sticking to rack. 3. Let milk drip off pieces and beginning one at a time, roll them in the egg mix. Once covered, move piece to breading bowl. 4. Put one piece at a time in breading bowl and shake around until well-covered. 5. Place chicken on 4" rack (3" if using Elite) with the main skin sides down. Spray chicken generously with butter cooking spray. This will allow the chicken to crisp up and keep crumbs from flying around in the oven. 6. Set for 15 minutes at Power Level High (350 degrees for Elite) and start. When done, flip pieces over and set for another 15 minutes at Power Level High. If you desire crispier chicken, set the Elite for 375 degrees. *It is important to remove the dome as soon as the timer beeps. This will keep the chicken from getting soggy from all of the steam.

title: Cherry Popper  Shot
instructions: Pour irish cream and tequila rose into a shot glass in equal parts and serve.
text: Recipe: Cherry Popper  Shot. Ingredients: irish cream, strawberry cream. Instructions: Pour irish cream and tequila rose into a shot glass in equal parts and serve.

title: Spinach Casserole (Creamed)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix all ingredients together and pour into a 2-quart baking dish.
Bake for 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Spinach Casserole (Creamed). Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, garlic salt, milk, eggs, butter, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Mix all ingredients together and pour into a 2-quart baking dish. Bake for 45 minutes.

title: Beach Bread
instructions: Slice the bread in half lengthwise.
Butter lightly and put under broiler (If watching calories skip the butter) toast lightly.
Spread the blue cheese dressing equally over both halves.
Top with grated cheese and diced tomatoes.
Place under broiler until cheese melted.
(Optional Ingredients: Garlic powder, diced onion, mushrooms, chicken, pepperoni or mix cheeses to taste. Original is great, so give it a try first).
text: Recipe: Beach Bread. Ingredients: bread, butter, blue cheese dressing, mozzarella cheese, tomatoes. Instructions: Slice the bread in half lengthwise. Butter lightly and put under broiler (If watching calories skip the butter) toast lightly. Spread the blue cheese dressing equally over both halves. Top with grated cheese and diced tomatoes. Place under broiler until cheese melted. (Optional Ingredients: Garlic powder, diced onion, mushrooms, chicken, pepperoni or mix cheeses to taste. Original is great, so give it a try first).

title: Corned Beef And Egg Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Grease 2-quart casserole dish or 9-inch square glass baking dish.
Melt 2 tablespoons butter in small skillet, saute onions until tender; set aside.
Place potatoes in bottom of greased casserole dish. Layer corned beef, eggs and sauteed onions.
In mixing bowl, combine mushroom soup, milk and grated cheese; pour over casserole.
Melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter in skillet, add bread crumbs and cook over low until crumbs are lightly browned. Sprinkle over top of casserole. Bake for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Corned Beef And Egg Casserole. Ingredients: butter, onion, potatoes, beef, eggs, cream of mushroom soup, milk, cheddar cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Grease 2-quart casserole dish or 9-inch square glass baking dish. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in small skillet, saute onions until tender; set aside. Place potatoes in bottom of greased casserole dish. Layer corned beef, eggs and sauteed onions. In mixing bowl, combine mushroom soup, milk and grated cheese; pour over casserole. Melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter in skillet, add bread crumbs and cook over low until crumbs are lightly browned. Sprinkle over top of casserole. Bake for 30 minutes.

title: Bite-Size Soup Meatballs
instructions: In large bowl combine all ingredients and mix well.
Shape into 3/4" balls.
You will have about 200 meatballs.
Place on foil lined cookie sheets.
Bake in a 350' oven for 20 minutes.
Keep meatballs on baking sheet and when they are slightly cooled, place sheets in freezer.
When meatballs are frozen solid, place in large freezer bag.
They will be individually frozen so you can take out and use as much or as little as you need.
text: Recipe: Bite-Size Soup Meatballs. Ingredients: ground beef, ground chicken, eggs, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, basil, onion, garlic. Instructions: In large bowl combine all ingredients and mix well. Shape into 3/4" balls. You will have about 200 meatballs. Place on foil lined cookie sheets. Bake in a 350' oven for 20 minutes. Keep meatballs on baking sheet and when they are slightly cooled, place sheets in freezer. When meatballs are frozen solid, place in large freezer bag. They will be individually frozen so you can take out and use as much or as little as you need.

title: Risotto Cakes With Mozzarella And Marinara
instructions: For the risotto, bring broth to a simmer in a saucepan. In a large deep skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of the oil over medium heat. Add the rice and cook and stir until the rice is lightly toasted.

Ladle 1 cup of the broth into the skillet, stir and simmer until broth is absorbed into the rice, about 5 minutes. Ladle in another cup of broth and stir and simmer for another 5 minutes or until broth is absorbed. Repeat with the last cup of broth and stir and simmer until rice is just tender and creamy.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the parmesan cheese, butter and 2 tablespoons of the basil. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Spread the risotto onto a large sheet pan and place it into the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to let it cool completely. (Or make it a day ahead and refrigerate until needed!).

Preheat the oven to 350. Form the risotto into 8 evenly sized balls and place a mozzarella chunk into the middle of each ball carefully enclosing the cheese in the rice. Slightly flatten to balls into thick patties.

Place the flour in a shallow dish and season with salt and pepper to taste. Beat the eggs into a shallow bowl. Place each patty in the flour, shaking off excess, then dip in the egg and dip again in flour to coat.
In a large nonstick skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil, and cook the patties in it until golden brown on both sides.
Transfer the patties to a baking sheet and bake for 5-10 minutes or until heated through. Serve with marinara and garnish with the remaining 2 tablespoons of basil.
text: Recipe: Risotto Cakes With Mozzarella And Marinara. Ingredients: chicken broth, olive oil, arborio rice, parmesan cheese, unsalted butter, fresh basil, mozzarella cheese, flour, eggs, marinara sauce. Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the parmesan cheese, butter and 2 tablespoons of the basil. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Spread the risotto onto a large sheet pan and place it into the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to let it cool completely. (Or make it a day ahead and refrigerate until needed!). Preheat the oven to 350. Form the risotto into 8 evenly sized balls and place a mozzarella chunk into the middle of each ball carefully enclosing the cheese in the rice. Slightly flatten to balls into thick patties. Place the flour in a shallow dish and season with salt and pepper to taste. Beat the eggs into a shallow bowl. In a large nonstick skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil, and cook the patties in it until golden brown on both sides. title: Grilled Mozzarella And Sun-Dried Tomato Skewers
instructions: On each skewer, alternately thread sun-dried tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil leaves. Brush the cheese with some of the sundried tomato packing oil, then grill or broil the skewers until the cheese just begins to melt, turning once. Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Grilled Mozzarella And Sun-Dried Tomato Skewers. Ingredients: mozzarella cheese, tomatoes, basil. Instructions: On each skewer, alternately thread sun-dried tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil leaves. Brush the cheese with some of the sundried tomato packing oil, then grill or broil the skewers until the cheese just begins to melt, turning once. Serve immediately.

title: Cheap Hamburger Potato Casserole
instructions: Brown ground beef in a medium-sized skillet. (You could add a little chopped onion to the beef if you'd like).
Meanwhile, boil egg noodles in pot.
Drain excess grease from meat.
Drain egg noodles, return to pot.
Add hamburger to egg noodles and empty both cans of potato soup into the pot.
Stir.
Serve hot.
text: Recipe: Cheap Hamburger Potato Casserole. Ingredients: lean ground beef, egg noodles, campbell's cream. Instructions: Brown ground beef in a medium-sized skillet. (You could add a little chopped onion to the beef if you'd like). Meanwhile, boil egg noodles in pot. Drain excess grease from meat. Drain egg noodles, return to pot. Add hamburger to egg noodles and empty both cans of potato soup into the pot. Stir. Serve hot.

title: Tomato Bisque Soup
instructions: Cut up tomatoes from can.
Heat all ingredients slowly so half and half will not curdle.
Lastly put in potato flakes to thicken.
text: Recipe: Tomato Bisque Soup. Ingredients: tomatoes, tomato sauce, basil, potato flakes. Instructions: Cut up tomatoes from can. Heat all ingredients slowly so half and half will not curdle. Lastly put in potato flakes to thicken.

title: Slippery Nipple Pudding Shot
instructions: Combine cold milk to pudding & mix with an electric mixer.
Blend in the liquors.
Fold in the Cool Whip until thoroughly blended.
Fill cups & chill.
text: Recipe: Slippery Nipple Pudding Shot. Ingredients: milk, irish cream, butterscotch. Instructions: Combine cold milk to pudding & mix with an electric mixer. Blend in the liquors. Fold in the Cool Whip until thoroughly blended. Fill cups & chill.

title: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole
instructions: Half fill large saucepan with water - (enough to cover the chicken) and bring to boil.

Place chicken in boiling water, reduce heat slightly and cook for at least 30 minutes Drain, and cool chicken until easy to handle. Pull chicken pieces apart to form small strips (like pulled pork). Set aside.
Preheat stove to 350°F.
Prepare stuffing per directions on box - remember you are making 2 boxes, so make sure you double your water, butter etc. Once prepared, allow to cool slightly.
Mix soup and sour cream in a separate bowl, set aside.
Lightly grease a 9x13 casserole dish, and use just under half of the stuffing to make a base. Cover the whole bottom of dish, and press lightly.
Spread chicken over the base.
Pour the soup/cream mixture over chicken and spread evenly.
sprinkle the remaining stuffing over the top of the mixture.
Place in stove for 25 minutes or until the top starts browning.
Serve and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, chicken, condensed cream, sour cream. Instructions: Half fill large saucepan with water - (enough to cover the chicken) and bring to boil. Place chicken in boiling water, reduce heat slightly and cook for at least 30 minutes Drain, and cool chicken until easy to handle. Pull chicken pieces apart to form small strips (like pulled pork). Set aside. Preheat stove to 350°F. Prepare stuffing per directions on box - remember you are making 2 boxes, so make sure you double your water, butter etc. Once prepared, allow to cool slightly. Spread chicken over the base. Pour the soup/cream mixture over chicken and spread evenly. sprinkle the remaining stuffing over the top of the mixture. Place in stove for 25 minutes or until the top starts browning. Serve and enjoy!

title: Cheesy Bolognese Pasta Bake, 653Cals Per Serve
instructions: Cook pasta according to packet instructions.
Preheat oven to 180c.
Brown mince in a non stick pan over medium heat with oil.
Add bolognese sauce to mince once browned and simmer for 4 minutes.
Combine pasta and mince mixture and spoon into ovenproof dish.
Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat, adding flour and stirring for 1 minute.
Remove from heat and stir in milk to thicken.
Return to heat, adding egg and cheese, heating for 6 minutes.
Spoon cheese mixture over mince and pasta in dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until golden.
Serve with salad leaves and torn basil.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Bolognese Pasta Bake, 653Cals Per Serve. Ingredients: pasta sauce, ground beef, olive oil, penne pasta, butter, flour, milk, egg, tasty cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Cook pasta according to packet instructions. Preheat oven to 180c. Brown mince in a non stick pan over medium heat with oil. Add bolognese sauce to mince once browned and simmer for 4 minutes. Combine pasta and mince mixture and spoon into ovenproof dish. Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat, adding flour and stirring for 1 minute. Remove from heat and stir in milk to thicken. Return to heat, adding egg and cheese, heating for 6 minutes. Spoon cheese mixture over mince and pasta in dish. Bake for 35 minutes or until golden. Serve with salad leaves and torn basil.

title: Grill Baked Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Prepare grill.
Wrap sweet potato in foil. Pierce potato several times through foil with a fork.
Place sweet potato on grill 4-6 inches from coals. Grill, turning, until potato is soft, about 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Grill Baked Sweet Potatoes. Ingredients: sweet potato, butter. Instructions: Prepare grill. Wrap sweet potato in foil. Pierce potato several times through foil with a fork. Place sweet potato on grill 4-6 inches from coals. Grill, turning, until potato is soft, about 45 minutes.

title: Onion Seasoning Mix
instructions: Mix all ingredients together until just blended.
The mix can be used immediately or made in advance and stored in individual foil packets for up to 6 months.
text: Recipe: Onion Seasoning Mix. Ingredients: beef bouillon granules, onion flakes, onion powder, celery salt. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together until just blended. The mix can be used immediately or made in advance and stored in individual foil packets for up to 6 months.

title: Italian Sausage On Pasta With Parma Rosa Sauce
instructions: Remove case from the sausages before cooking so to make smaller pieces.
Brown sausages et drain liquid.
Add all other ingredients.
Prepare Parma Rosa sauce and add sausages.
Serve on pasta or rice.
text: Recipe: Italian Sausage On Pasta With Parma Rosa Sauce. Ingredients: Italian sausages, garlic, basil, tomato paste, olive oil. Instructions: Remove case from the sausages before cooking so to make smaller pieces. Brown sausages et drain liquid. Add all other ingredients. Prepare Parma Rosa sauce and add sausages. Serve on pasta or rice.

title: Buffalo Chicken Soup
instructions: Saute onions and celery in butter until tender.
Stir in flour until smooth.
Slowly add milk and broth.
Add remaining ingredients and simmer, stirring occasionally, until cheese has melted.
text: Recipe: Buffalo Chicken Soup. Ingredients: green onions, stalks celery, butter, flour, milk, chicken broth, chicken, chicken wing sauce, Velveeta cheese, cayenne, celery salt, garlic salt. Instructions: Saute onions and celery in butter until tender. Stir in flour until smooth. Slowly add milk and broth. Add remaining ingredients and simmer, stirring occasionally, until cheese has melted.

title: 5 Cheese Grilled Cheese
instructions: Spread whipped butter on sourdough bread.
Pat the butter side in the grated parmesan cheese.
Place both bread pieces (Parmesan side down) in a skillet or on a griddle.
Put 1 slice of swiss and provolone on 1 slice of bread and 1 slice of mozzarella and cheddar on the other.
Cook until parmesan it toasted.
Place sandwich slices together and enjoy!
text: Recipe: 5 Cheese Grilled Cheese. Ingredients: bread, butter, parmesan cheese, swiss cheese, provolone cheese, mozzarella cheese, cheddar cheese. Put 1 slice of swiss and provolone on 1 slice of bread and 1 slice of mozzarella and cheddar on the other. Cook until parmesan it toasted. Place sandwich slices together and enjoy!

title: Cheesy Alfredo Chicken Bake
instructions: Serve warm and enjoy!
In a pot, heat oil and add chicken.
Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Add garlic, then brown the chicken.
Add broth, heavy cream, and pasta, and bring to a boil.
Cover and reduce the heat to a simmer for 15-20 minute.
Turn off heat and stir in 1 1/2 cups of parmesan cheese.
Pour half of the pasta into a greased 11x7 inch or 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle evenly with 1 cup of mozzarella cheese.
Layer the remaining half of the pasta evenly on top. Sprinkle evenly with 1 cup of mozzarella and 1/2 cup of parmesan.
Broil 10 - 15 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown. Remove and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
Serve warm and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Cheesy Alfredo Chicken Bake. Ingredients: olive oil, chicken breasts, salt, garlic, chicken broth, heavy cream, penne pasta, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, handful fresh parsley. Pour half of the pasta into a greased 11x7 inch or 9x13 inch baking dish. Sprinkle evenly with 1 cup of mozzarella cheese. Layer the remaining half of the pasta evenly on top. Sprinkle evenly with 1 cup of mozzarella and 1/2 cup of parmesan. Broil 10 - 15 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown. Remove and sprinkle with fresh parsley. Serve warm and enjoy!

title: Ro*Tel Famous Queso Dip
instructions: Combine undrained tomatoes and cheese in medium saucepan.
Cook over medium heat 5 minutes or until cheese is completely melted and mixture is well blended, stirring frequently.
Serve warm as a dip with tortilla chips, crackers or cut-up fresh vegetables.

COOK'S TIPS: To make in microwave, combine undrained tomatoes and cheese in 1-1/2-quart microwave-safe dish; cover. Microwave on HIGH 5 minutes or just until cheese melts, stirring after 3 minutes. Remove from microwave; stir until mixture is well blended. CAUTION: Dish will be hot; use hot pads.
text: Recipe: Ro*Tel Famous Queso Dip. Ingredients: Tomatoes. Instructions: Combine undrained tomatoes and cheese in medium saucepan.
