However, I put all the vegetables and a little broth in a blender and blended it until the vegetables were pureed. (This was incredible this way!). Stir in Velveeta; cook 5 minute or until Velveeta is melted and soup is heated through, stirring frequently.

title: Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto And Feta Stuffed Chicken Breasts
instructions: Pre-Heat oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Slice breasts and open out, using a meat mallet pound breasts, until of approximate even thickness.
Spread pesto down center of each breast, place sliced sun-dried tomato down the center, top with feta, roll chicken breasts up and secure with prosciutto slices.
Place breasts in an oven proof dish, drizzle olive oil over breasts and bake for about 30-35 Min's or until cooked through.
text: Recipe: Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto And Feta Stuffed Chicken Breasts. Ingredients: chicken breasts, tomatoes, tomato pesto, feta cheese, chicken. Instructions: Pre-Heat oven to 180 degrees Celsius. Slice breasts and open out, using a meat mallet pound breasts, until of approximate even thickness. Spread pesto down center of each breast, place sliced sun-dried tomato down the center, top with feta, roll chicken breasts up and secure with prosciutto slices. Place breasts in an oven proof dish, drizzle olive oil over breasts and bake for about 30-35 Min's or until cooked through.

title: Pasta In Tomato Cream Sauce
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and keep warm.
Meanwhile, in skillet, cook tomatoes over medium high heat until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low; wait a few minutes and then add basil and cream.
Heat through.
DO NOT BOIL.
Toss with pasta and and cheese.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Pasta In Tomato Cream Sauce. Ingredients: penne, tomatoes, fresh basil, whipping cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and keep warm. Meanwhile, in skillet, cook tomatoes over medium high heat until thickened, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low; wait a few minutes and then add basil and cream. Heat through. DO NOT BOIL. Toss with pasta and and cheese. Serve immediately.

title: Hash Brown Potato Casserole
instructions: Mix first 4 ingredients together and place in a lightly greased 9x13 pan. Sprinkle cheese on top and bake for 45 minutes at 350 degrees.
text: Recipe: Hash Brown Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, green onions, sour cream, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix first 4 ingredients together and place in a lightly greased 9x13 pan. Sprinkle cheese on top and bake for 45 minutes at 350 degrees.

title: Simple Roasted Garlic Pesto
instructions: Cut off the top of a whole head of garlic so most of the cloves show through the top.
Wrap in foil and bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes.
In a food processor add the roasted garlic, basil (crush in fingers as you add it), cheese and about 2 tbs oil.
Pulse and check consistency. If its too thick add more oil.
Enjoy over pasta!
text: Recipe: Simple Roasted Garlic Pesto. Ingredients: garlic, parmescan cheese, olive oil. Instructions: Cut off the top of a whole head of garlic so most of the cloves show through the top. Wrap in foil and bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes. In a food processor add the roasted garlic, basil (crush in fingers as you add it), cheese and about 2 tbs oil. Pulse and check consistency. If its too thick add more oil. Enjoy over pasta!

title: Jamie Oliver'S Pasta Dough
instructions: Place the flour on a clean surface.
Make a well in the centre and add the eggs and yolks.
Use a fork to break up the eggs, then start bringing in the flour.
Stir with the fork until you have a dough which is easily workable with your hands.
Knead well until it becomes smooth, silky and elastic and the surface is clean.
Wrap the dough in cling film and let it rest in the fridge for a while.
When you are ready to shape the pasta, break the dough into four pieces.
Take one ball at a time, flatten it with your hand and run it through the thickest setting on your pasta machine.
Fold in half and repeat this several times.
Start narrowing down the settings, dusting the dough with flour each time you run it through, stopping when the sheet is 1-2mm thick.
You can also use a rolling pin but it will take longer than if you have a pasta machine.
When you have a thin sheet, shape as desired.
To cook, drop the pasta into boiling water and cook just until al dente-- no more than five minutes and perhaps as little as two minutes, depending on the thickness of the pasta.
Store any extra in the fridge for up to half a day or you can dry it and store in airtight containers.
text: Recipe: Jamie Oliver'S Pasta Dough. Ingredients: range eggs, egg yolks. Instructions: Place the flour on a clean surface. Make a well in the centre and add the eggs and yolks. Use a fork to break up the eggs, then start bringing in the flour. Stir with the fork until you have a dough which is easily workable with your hands. Knead well until it becomes smooth, silky and elastic and the surface is clean. Wrap the dough in cling film and let it rest in the fridge for a while. When you are ready to shape the pasta, break the dough into four pieces. Take one ball at a time, flatten it with your hand and run it through the thickest setting on your pasta machine. Fold in half and repeat this several times. Start narrowing down the settings, dusting the dough with flour each time you run it through, stopping when the sheet is 1-2mm thick. You can also use a rolling pin but it will take longer than if you have a pasta machine. When you have a thin sheet, shape as desired. To cook, drop the pasta into boiling water and cook just until al dente-- no more than five minutes and perhaps as little as two minutes, depending on the thickness of the pasta. Store any extra in the fridge for up to half a day or you can dry it and store in airtight containers.

title: Hot Ranch Sausage Dip
instructions: Brown sausage with 1 pkg of ranch mix. Drain if needed.
Add cream cheese, rotel, and second pkg of ranch mix. Heat and stir until combined.
Serve warm with chips. I usually put it in a crock pot to keep it warm.
Cooking time and servings are estimated.
text: Recipe: Hot Ranch Sausage Dip. Ingredients: sausage, Tomatoes, cream cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage with 1 pkg of ranch mix. Drain if needed. Add cream cheese, rotel, and second pkg of ranch mix. Heat and stir until combined. Serve warm with chips. I usually put it in a crock pot to keep it warm. Cooking time and servings are estimated.

title: Sausage And Potato Soup
instructions: Fry sausage and onion together, do not drain.
Put the sausage and onion in a large sauce pan.
Add all of the other ingredients and simmer for 15-20 minutes, until potatoes are tender as you would like.
Add 1 tablespoons of black pepper and simmer for 5 more minutes.
Thin with milk.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Potato Soup. Ingredients: sausage, sausage, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup, yellow onion, potatoes, milk. Instructions: Fry sausage and onion together, do not drain. Put the sausage and onion in a large sauce pan. Add all of the other ingredients and simmer for 15-20 minutes, until potatoes are tender as you would like. Add 1 tablespoons of black pepper and simmer for 5 more minutes. Thin with milk.

title: Chicken And Stuffing Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Prepare stuffing according to package directions, but do not let stand.
Spoon stuffing across the center of a 2 quart shallow baking dish.
Arrange 3 chicken breast halves on each side of the stuffing, overlapping if necessary.
Combine soup, milk and parsley.
Pour over chicken.
Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes.
Uncover and bake 10 minutes longer or until the chicken is no longer pink.
You may need to lift some pieces of chicken so that you can check all of it.
Stir sauce before serving.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Stuffing Bake. Ingredients: chicken flavor, chicken, cream of mushroom soup, milk, parsley. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Prepare stuffing according to package directions, but do not let stand. Spoon stuffing across the center of a 2 quart shallow baking dish. Arrange 3 chicken breast halves on each side of the stuffing, overlapping if necessary. Combine soup, milk and parsley. Pour over chicken. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes. Uncover and bake 10 minutes longer or until the chicken is no longer pink. You may need to lift some pieces of chicken so that you can check all of it. Stir sauce before serving.

title: Fried Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Add the onion to the mashed potatoes.
Form into hamburger shape.
Dip patties in flour on both sides.
Fry in some hot grease until golden brown on each side.
text: Recipe: Fried Mashed Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion. Instructions: Add the onion to the mashed potatoes. Form into hamburger shape. Dip patties in flour on both sides. Fry in some hot grease until golden brown on each side.

title: Turkey Meatballs
instructions: mix all ingredients together
roll into 2 inch meatballs.
bake at 350 degrees for 1 half hour.
simmer in your favorite sauce and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Turkey Meatballs. Ingredients: eggs, onion soup, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs. Instructions: mix all ingredients together roll into 2 inch meatballs. bake at 350 degrees for 1 half hour. simmer in your favorite sauce and enjoy.

title: Baked Cheesy Chicken Spaghetti
instructions: Preheat Oven to 350 Degrees.
Boil Spaghetti in pan until its flexable.
Melt Velveeta cheese, cream of chicken, cream of mushroom, and broth in medium size sauce pan.
Place boiled and drained spaghetti in a 13x9 baking dish, pour cheese/soup mixture on top.
Bake for 45 minutes, remove and sprinkle on Parmesan cheese, bake another 10-15 minutes until slightly browns on edges.
Let cool for about 5-10 minutes & serve.
text: Recipe: Baked Cheesy Chicken Spaghetti. Ingredients: chicken broth, onion, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, white meat chicken, Velveeta cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat Oven to 350 Degrees. Boil Spaghetti in pan until its flexable. Melt Velveeta cheese, cream of chicken, cream of mushroom, and broth in medium size sauce pan. Place boiled and drained spaghetti in a 13x9 baking dish, pour cheese/soup mixture on top. Bake for 45 minutes, remove and sprinkle on Parmesan cheese, bake another 10-15 minutes until slightly browns on edges. Let cool for about 5-10 minutes & serve.

title: Rotel Hamburger-Sausage Cheese Dip
instructions: Brown hamburger meat with chopped onion.
Brown breakfast sausage.
Place hamburger and sausage in crock pot.
Place rest of ingredients in crock pot.
Turn on high until cheese is melted.
Turn back to low and serve.
Be sure to stir occasionally.
I estimated the cook time two hours.
text: Recipe: Rotel Hamburger-Sausage Cheese Dip. Ingredients: hamburger, sausage, onion, Velveeta cheese, cream of mushroom soup, Tomatoes. Instructions: Brown hamburger meat with chopped onion. Brown breakfast sausage. Place hamburger and sausage in crock pot. Place rest of ingredients in crock pot. Turn on high until cheese is melted. Turn back to low and serve. Be sure to stir occasionally. I estimated the cook time two hours.

title: Hollywood Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Brown and drain ground beef.
Stir in flour.
Slowly stir in milk.
Let simmer for about 20 minutes.
Add chicken noodle soup.
Pour into 2-quart casserole dish.
Top with crushed potato chips (I use Ruffles original or Lays original).
Bake in oven for about 1 hour.
When the chips turn brown, the casserole is done.
text: Recipe: Hollywood Chicken. Ingredients: ground beef, flour, milk, chicken noodle, potato chips. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Brown and drain ground beef. Stir in flour. Slowly stir in milk. Let simmer for about 20 minutes. Add chicken noodle soup. Pour into 2-quart casserole dish. Top with crushed potato chips (I use Ruffles original or Lays original). Bake in oven for about 1 hour. When the chips turn brown, the casserole is done.

title: Easy King Ranch Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Put chopped chicken, cream of mushroom soup, Ro-tel tomatoes, and chunks of Velveeta into a bowl; stir them together.
Spray baking pan with Pam, and then cover the bottom of the pan with half of the tortilla triangles.
Pour half of the mixture in your bowl on top of the tortillas and spread it around so that it covers all of the tortillas.
Put remaining half of tortillas on top of the mixture.
Pour the rest of the mixture from your bowl on top of the second layer of tortillas and once again spread it around onto all of the tortillas.
Cover top of baking pan with foil and let the casserole cook for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Easy King Ranch Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, flour tortillas, cream of mushroom soup, Ro-Tel tomatoes, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Put chopped chicken, cream of mushroom soup, Ro-tel tomatoes, and chunks of Velveeta into a bowl; stir them together. Spray baking pan with Pam, and then cover the bottom of the pan with half of the tortilla triangles. Pour half of the mixture in your bowl on top of the tortillas and spread it around so that it covers all of the tortillas. Put remaining half of tortillas on top of the mixture. Pour the rest of the mixture from your bowl on top of the second layer of tortillas and once again spread it around onto all of the tortillas. Cover top of baking pan with foil and let the casserole cook for 30 minutes.

title: Spaghetti With Smoked Sausage
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to pkg. directions.
Meanwhile, heat sauce with sausage.
Drain spaghetti.
Serve spaghetti with sauce and Parmesan cheese.
text: Recipe: Spaghetti With Smoked Sausage. Ingredients: spaghetti sauce, sausage, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to pkg. directions. Meanwhile, heat sauce with sausage. Drain spaghetti. Serve spaghetti with sauce and Parmesan cheese.

title: Broiled Halibut With Goat Cheese Crust
instructions: In a small bowl, stir goat cheese. Pat this evenly over the tops of the halibut steaks.
Press fish, cheese-side down, into a bowl of breadcrumbs. Place the steaks on a baking sheet. Spray lightly with PAM.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes at 400 degrees. You will know they are done when the topping is browned and the fish can be flaked with a fork.
text: Recipe: Broiled Halibut With Goat Cheese Crust. Ingredients: goat cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: In a small bowl, stir goat cheese. Pat this evenly over the tops of the halibut steaks. Press fish, cheese-side down, into a bowl of breadcrumbs. Place the steaks on a baking sheet. Spray lightly with PAM. Bake for about 15-20 minutes at 400 degrees. You will know they are done when the topping is browned and the fish can be flaked with a fork.

title: Crock Pot Baked Potatoes
instructions: Using a fork, prick potatoes.
Rub the butter or margarine over the potatoes and place in slow cooker.
Cover.
Cook on High 3-5 hours or Low 6-10 hours.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter. Instructions: Using a fork, prick potatoes. Rub the butter or margarine over the potatoes and place in slow cooker. Cover. Cook on High 3-5 hours or Low 6-10 hours.

title: Mix 'N' Match Builder Lunch
instructions: The kids can put together their sandwich, and have carrot sticks, celery sticks, and grape tomatoes on the side, now how exciting is that for a great lunchtime meal?
text: Recipe: Mix 'N' Match Builder Lunch. Ingredients: grain bread, ham, cheddar cheese, carrots, celery, grape tomatoes. Instructions: The kids can put together their sandwich, and have carrot sticks, celery sticks, and grape tomatoes on the side, now how exciting is that for a great lunchtime meal?

title: Homemade Creme Fraiche
instructions: Combine heavy cream and buttermilk in glass jar and mix well. Cover and let stand at room temperature (about 70F) for 8-24 hours or until mixture thickens. Stir well to combine and then store in fridge. Will keep for up to 10 days.
Tips:
1. Use as a thickener for soups or sauces.
2. Spoon over fresh fruits, puddings or warm cobblers.
3. Can be used in boiled recipes as it will not curdle.
text: Recipe: Homemade Creme Fraiche. Ingredients: heavy cream, buttermilk. Instructions: Combine heavy cream and buttermilk in glass jar and mix well. Cover and let stand at room temperature (about 70F) for 8-24 hours or until mixture thickens. Stir well to combine and then store in fridge. Will keep for up to 10 days. Tips: 1. Use as a thickener for soups or sauces. 2. Spoon over fresh fruits, puddings or warm cobblers. 3. Can be used in boiled recipes as it will not curdle.

title: Fabulous Grilled Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Spread one side of each bread slice with the butter. On a clean work surface, place 4 slices buttered-side down. Divide the cheese and ham among those 4 slices. Place the remaining 4 slices of bread on top, buttered-side up.

Heat a grill pan or a 12-inch skillet with a lid over medium heat until warm. Place the sandwiches in the skillet (in batches if necessary) and cook, covered, 3 to 5 minutes on each side, or until cheese melts and bread is golden brown.
Cut each sandwich in half; slide in 1 or 2 tomato slices and serve hot.
text: Recipe: Fabulous Grilled Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: bread, butter, gruyere cheese, ham. Instructions: Spread one side of each bread slice with the butter. On a clean work surface, place 4 slices buttered-side down. Divide the cheese and ham among those 4 slices. Place the remaining 4 slices of bread on top, buttered-side up. Heat a grill pan or a 12-inch skillet with a lid over medium heat until warm. Place the sandwiches in the skillet (in batches if necessary) and cook, covered, 3 to 5 minutes on each side, or until cheese melts and bread is golden brown. Cut each sandwich in half; slide in 1 or 2 tomato slices and serve hot.

title: Eggs Aurora
instructions: cut the eggs in half and take out the yolk.
mash the yolk with some bechamel sauce and tomato sauce.
fill up the egg white with this.
place the eggs in an ovenproof dish, add some butter and brown in the oven.
remove from oven, add more bechamel sauce and the grated cheese and return to oven and brown.
text: Recipe: Eggs Aurora. Ingredients: eggs, bechamel sauce, tomato sauce, butter, grated cheese. Instructions: cut the eggs in half and take out the yolk. mash the yolk with some bechamel sauce and tomato sauce. fill up the egg white with this. place the eggs in an ovenproof dish, add some butter and brown in the oven. remove from oven, add more bechamel sauce and the grated cheese and return to oven and brown.

title: Carnation'S Baked Potato Soup
instructions: Melt butter in large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion; cook, stirring occasionally, for 1 to 2 minutes or until tender.
Stir in flour.
Gradually stir in broth and evaporated milk.
Scoop potato pulp from 1 potato (reserving the skin); mash.
Add pulp to broth mixture.
Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until mixture comes just to a boil.
Dice remaining potato skin and potato; add to soup; heat through.
Spoon into bowls.
Sprinkle each with your desired toppings.
text: Recipe: Carnation'S Baked Potato Soup. Ingredients: butter, onion, flour, chicken broth, milk, baking potatoes. Instructions: Melt butter in large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion; cook, stirring occasionally, for 1 to 2 minutes or until tender. Stir in flour. Gradually stir in broth and evaporated milk. Scoop potato pulp from 1 potato (reserving the skin); mash. Add pulp to broth mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until mixture comes just to a boil. Dice remaining potato skin and potato; add to soup; heat through. Spoon into bowls. Sprinkle each with your desired toppings.

title: Onion Baked Pork Chops
instructions: Preheat oven to 400.
In small bowl, combine soup mix and bread crumbs.
Dip chops in egg, then bread crumb mixture until evenly coated.
Arrange in lightly greased 13 x 9 pan.
Bake uncovered 20 minutes or until done, turning once.
text: Recipe: Onion Baked Pork Chops. Ingredients: pork chops, egg, breadcrumbs, onion soup. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400. In small bowl, combine soup mix and bread crumbs. Dip chops in egg, then bread crumb mixture until evenly coated. Arrange in lightly greased 13 x 9 pan. Bake uncovered 20 minutes or until done, turning once.

title: Garlic Ranch Potatoes
instructions: Peel and Cube your potatoes, add to bowl. Cut your onions to your liking. I just diced mine. I like to taste bigger pieces of onions. Add onions, garlic and drizzle olive oil over those. Then add whole package of Ranch dip. Stir until all is mixed well. Put in microwave for 12-15 minutes until almost done and then put in oven set at 350 on cookie sheet for 10 minutes just to finish cooking and give them a crispness. Take out and add cheeses. Then return to oven just to melt cheese. Take out once again and either spread sour cream on top of whole thing or just in case everyone doesn't like it add it to your individual serving. I had to add a little salt and pepper to mine and it tasted wonderful! Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Garlic Ranch Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, garlic, olive oil, cheddar cheese, mozzarella cheese, sour cream. Instructions: Peel and Cube your potatoes, add to bowl. Cut your onions to your liking. I just diced mine. I like to taste bigger pieces of onions. Add onions, garlic and drizzle olive oil over those. Then add whole package of Ranch dip. Stir until all is mixed well. Put in microwave for 12-15 minutes until almost done and then put in oven set at 350 on cookie sheet for 10 minutes just to finish cooking and give them a crispness. Take out and add cheeses. Then return to oven just to melt cheese. Take out once again and either spread sour cream on top of whole thing or just in case everyone doesn't like it add it to your individual serving. I had to add a little salt and pepper to mine and it tasted wonderful! Enjoy.

title: Easy Sausage & Provolone Balls
instructions: Heat oven to 375F.
Line 15x10x1 inch baking pan with foil.
Spray foil with nonstick cooking spray.
In food processor bowl with metal blade, combine sausage, pancake mix, and basil; process just until combined.
Add cheese and onions; process with on/off pulses to blend.
Shape into 1-inch balls; place in spray foil lined pan.
Bake at 375 F.
for 10 to 15 minutes or until meatballs are no longer pink in center.
Serve warm with cocktail toothpicks.
text: Recipe: Easy Sausage & Provolone Balls. Ingredients: Italian sausage, hungry jack buttermilk, basil, provolone cheese, green onion. Instructions: 1. Heat oven to 375F. Line 15x10x1 inch baking pan with foil. Spray foil with nonstick cooking spray. 2. In food processor bowl with metal blade, combine sausage, pancake mix, and basil; process just until combined. Add cheese and onions; process with on/off pulses to blend. Shape into 1-inch balls; place in spray foil lined pan. 3. Bake at 375 F. for 10 to 15 minutes or until meatballs are no longer pink in center. Serve warm with cocktail toothpicks.

title: Croque Madame
instructions: Spread butter on the two sides of the slices of bread.
Put the slice of ham and cheese between the bread, making a sandwich.
You can either bake or grill the sandwich.
Top the sandwich with a fried egg and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Croque Madame. Ingredients: bread, ham, swiss cheese, egg, butter. Instructions: Spread butter on the two sides of the slices of bread. Put the slice of ham and cheese between the bread, making a sandwich. You can either bake or grill the sandwich. Top the sandwich with a fried egg and enjoy!

title: Peek A Boo Eggs
instructions: Using your favorite cookie cutter, cut a shape out of the center of the bread.
Break each egg into a separate bowl.
Melt the butter in a frying pan. Fry the bread on one side until it is golden brown, then flip it
Pour 1 egg into the center of the bread, cover the pan and cook over low heat until each egg is done.
text: Recipe: Peek A Boo Eggs. Ingredients: bread, eggs, butter. Instructions: Using your favorite cookie cutter, cut a shape out of the center of the bread. Break each egg into a separate bowl. Melt the butter in a frying pan. Fry the bread on one side until it is golden brown, then flip it Pour 1 egg into the center of the bread, cover the pan and cook over low heat until each egg is done.

title: Garlic Clove Bread
instructions: Cut or snip off pieces of dough about the size of an English walnut.
Place into a greased 10" bundt pan.
Combine the melted butter, basil, chopped parsley, onions and minced garlic and pour over dough.
Cover and let rise until double in size (about 1 1/2 hours).
Bake in 375 degree oven until golden brown aprox. 30-35 minutes.
Cool in pan for 10 minutes and then remove from pan and serve.
text: Recipe: Garlic Clove Bread. Ingredients: bread, butter, basil, parsley, onion, garlic. Instructions: Cut or snip off pieces of dough about the size of an English walnut. Place into a greased 10" bundt pan. Combine the melted butter, basil, chopped parsley, onions and minced garlic and pour over dough. Cover and let rise until double in size (about 1 1/2 hours). Bake in 375 degree oven until golden brown aprox. 30-35 minutes. Cool in pan for 10 minutes and then remove from pan and serve.

title: Renewal Egg Casserole
instructions: Grease a 9 x 13 pan (I use cooking spray).
Mix bread, cooked sausage and cheese together.
Pat into bottom of pan.
Beat eggs and milk together and pour over the bread mixture.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
In the morning, bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes until eggs are set.
text: Recipe: Renewal Egg Casserole. Ingredients: bread, pork sausage, cheddar cheese, eggs, milk. Instructions: Grease a 9 x 13 pan (I use cooking spray). Mix bread, cooked sausage and cheese together. Pat into bottom of pan. Beat eggs and milk together and pour over the bread mixture. Cover and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes until eggs are set.

title: Sinful Mac N Cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cook noodles according to directions until al dente. Mix cheeses, sour cream and butter into noodles. After cheeses are mixed in completely, add canned milk and the 2 eggs. Mix again. Pour into a baking dish and top with remaining cup of cheese, cover with foil and bake 35 minutes. Uncover and bake another 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Sinful Mac N Cheese. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, mozzarella cheese, cheese, parmesan cheese, cottage cheese, cream cheese, sour cream, milk, butter, eggs, macaroni noodles, mixed cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cook noodles according to directions until al dente. Mix cheeses, sour cream and butter into noodles. After cheeses are mixed in completely, add canned milk and the 2 eggs. Mix again. Pour into a baking dish and top with remaining cup of cheese, cover with foil and bake 35 minutes. Uncover and bake another 10 minutes.

title: Dutch Baked Chicken
instructions: In 9"x13" pyrex pan place chicken pieces and top with slices of cheese.
Pour mixed soups and milk ingredients over the cheese.
Sprinkle top with crushed stuffing mixture.
Dot with butter.
Bake@ 325 degrees F for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
Important!
text: Recipe: Dutch Baked Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, swiss cheese, cream of celery soup, cream of chicken soup, milk, chicken flavor. Instructions: In 9"x13" pyrex pan place chicken pieces and top with slices of cheese. Pour mixed soups and milk ingredients over the cheese. Sprinkle top with crushed stuffing mixture. Dot with butter. Bake@ 325 degrees F for 1 1/2 to 2 hours. Important!

title: Creamy Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Mix together soup, green chilies, sour cream and 1 1/2 cups of cheese.
Put 1/3rd of this mixture in separate bowl.
Add chicken to remaining 2/3rds.
Place heaping spoonful of chicken and soup mixture on each tortilla shell and place seam side down in greased 9x13 pan.
Top with remaining soup mixture and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 20, 25 minutes or until heated through.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken Enchiladas. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, tomatoes, sour cream, shredded cheese, flour tortillas, chicken. Instructions: Mix together soup, green chilies, sour cream and 1 1/2 cups of cheese. Put 1/3rd of this mixture in separate bowl. Add chicken to remaining 2/3rds. Place heaping spoonful of chicken and soup mixture on each tortilla shell and place seam side down in greased 9x13 pan. Top with remaining soup mixture and sprinkle with remaining cheese. Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 20, 25 minutes or until heated through.

title: Sweetened Condensed Milk Sweet Cream Base
instructions: Whisk the light cream and the sweetened condensed milk together in a mixing bowl until blended.
text: Recipe: Sweetened Condensed Milk Sweet Cream Base. Ingredients: light cream, condensed milk. Instructions: Whisk the light cream and the sweetened condensed milk together in a mixing bowl until blended.

title: Italian Chicken Delight
instructions: Dip chicken into beaten egg, coating well, then roll in bread crumbs.
Brown in olive oil.
Drain chicken and place in casserole dish in a single layer.
Using olive oil left in skillet, add tomato sauce, salt, pepper, butter, basil, and garlic powder.
Simmer and pour over chicken.
Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Cover with aluminum foil.
Bake at 350 for 30 minutes, uncover, top with triangles of mozzarella cheese and return to oven for 10 minutes.
Serve.
text: Recipe: Italian Chicken Delight. Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg, Italian breadcrumbs, salt, garlic, olive oil, tomato sauce, butter, basil, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Dip chicken into beaten egg, coating well, then roll in bread crumbs. Brown in olive oil. Drain chicken and place in casserole dish in a single layer. Using olive oil left in skillet, add tomato sauce, salt, pepper, butter, basil, and garlic powder. Simmer and pour over chicken. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese. Cover with aluminum foil. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes, uncover, top with triangles of mozzarella cheese and return to oven for 10 minutes. Serve.

title: White Pesto Pizza
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F.
Mix parsley, basil, garlic, broth, oil and 1 Tbs parmesan until combined.
Spread pizza dough with pesto.
In medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, mozzarella, milk and remaining 1 Tbs Parmesan.
Spread cheese mixture evenly over pesto; arrange tomato slices over cheese.
Bake 20-25 minutes, until crust is golden.
text: Recipe: White Pesto Pizza. Ingredients: parsley, basil, garlic, olive oil, parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, milk, tomatoes, beef broth. Instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F. Mix parsley, basil, garlic, broth, oil and 1 Tbs parmesan until combined. Spread pizza dough with pesto. In medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, mozzarella, milk and remaining 1 Tbs Parmesan. Spread cheese mixture evenly over pesto; arrange tomato slices over cheese. Bake 20-25 minutes, until crust is golden.

title: Egg Whites Scrambled With Egg Sustitute
instructions: Using a liquid measuring cup, pour 1/4 cup of egg substitute.
One at a time, seperate the whites from the yolks and place the whites into the same cup. Using a fork, gently stir to combine.
Spray a pan with cooking spray and heat over med-high heat.
Add the mixture to the pan and allow to set before you begin to scramble.
Scramble to your desired doneness.
text: Recipe: Egg Whites Scrambled With Egg Sustitute. Ingredients: egg whites, egg substitute. Instructions: Using a liquid measuring cup, pour 1/4 cup of egg substitute. One at a time, seperate the whites from the yolks and place the whites into the same cup. Using a fork, gently stir to combine. Spray a pan with cooking spray and heat over med-high heat. Add the mixture to the pan and allow to set before you begin to scramble. Scramble to your desired doneness.

title: Chicken Lever Paste -For Dogs-
instructions: Cut off the fat of the liver.
And cut open the liver, carefully wash to take a lump of blood.
Put into the boiling water, And securely heating.
Put the heated liver and cottage cheese in a bowl and mix well while crushing the liver.
text: Recipe: Chicken Lever Paste -For Dogs-. Ingredients: chicken, cottage cheese. Instructions: Cut off the fat of the liver. And cut open the liver, carefully wash to take a lump of blood. Put into the boiling water, And securely heating. Put the heated liver and cottage cheese in a bowl and mix well while crushing the liver.

title: Pepsi Pork Roast
instructions: Place roast in crock pot.
Mix soup mix with soup.
Add cola to soup mixture and pour over roast.
Cook on high for 4-5 hours.
When done, remove roast and thicken juices with cornstarch for wonderful gravy.
text: Recipe: Pepsi Pork Roast. Ingredients: pork shoulder butt, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup. Instructions: Place roast in crock pot. Mix soup mix with soup. Add cola to soup mixture and pour over roast. Cook on high for 4-5 hours. When done, remove roast and thicken juices with cornstarch for wonderful gravy.

title: Quick & Easy Chicken Dip
instructions: Put the cream cheese, sour cream, canned chicken, and garlic powder into a food processor and process until smooth.
Coat a ceramic or glass baking dish with cooking spray and pour mixture into the baking dish.
Top with parmeasan cheese.
Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
Serve hot with Ritz crackers.
text: Recipe: Quick & Easy Chicken Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, sour cream, chicken, garlic, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Put the cream cheese, sour cream, canned chicken, and garlic powder into a food processor and process until smooth. Coat a ceramic or glass baking dish with cooking spray and pour mixture into the baking dish. Top with parmeasan cheese. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees. Serve hot with Ritz crackers.

title: Roasted Pickled Pork
instructions: Preheat your fan forced oven to 180 degrees celsius.
Cover the top of the pork with the olive oil and massage in well.

Place the pork into your oven and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes. I baked it for the first hour at 180 degrees celsius and then the last 15 minutes at 200 degrees celsius to obtain a crust on the roast.
text: Recipe: Roasted Pickled Pork. Ingredients: pork, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat your fan forced oven to 180 degrees celsius. Cover the top of the pork with the olive oil and massage in well. Place the pork into your oven and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes. I baked it for the first hour at 180 degrees celsius and then the last 15 minutes at 200 degrees celsius to obtain a crust on the roast.

title: Simple 3 Step Slow Cooker Tangy Chicken With Heinz 57 Sauce
instructions: Wash, and dry chicken quarters with paper towels and place in large slow cooker.
In a large saucepan, combine butter, 57 sauce, and stewed tomatoes. Heat just until butter melts, and ingredients mix well. Pour over chicken.
Cover aand cook on low for 5-6 hours.
text: Recipe: Simple 3 Step Slow Cooker Tangy Chicken With Heinz 57 Sauce. Ingredients: roasting chicken, butter, tomatoes. Instructions: Wash, and dry chicken quarters with paper towels and place in large slow cooker. In a large saucepan, combine butter, 57 sauce, and stewed tomatoes. Heat just until butter melts, and ingredients mix well. Pour over chicken. Cover aand cook on low for 5-6 hours.

title: Creamy, Rich Ranch Potatoes With Cheese
instructions: In large bowl, blend soups and cream cheese.
Microwave til creamy and cheese is melted, stirring occasionally.
Stir in well, the dressing mix, then fold in 1 cup (half) the shredded cheese, then the potatoes.
Fold well til all potatoes are coated.
Pour/spoon into lightly greased 13x9 glass baking dish, mashing down a little, and spreading in pan evenly.
Sprinkle top with rest of shredded cheese.
COVER and bake at 350° for 50-55 minutes.
Uncover, top with onions.
Bake UNCOVERED for another 5 minutes or til onions are lightly browned.
*Nice additions:
1 cup diced, fully-cooked ham.
Cooked, crumbled bacon (4-6 slices).
Saute'd onions.
Saute'd mushrooms.
text: Recipe: Creamy, Rich Ranch Potatoes With Cheese. Ingredients: potatoes, cream cheese, cream of potato soup, cream of chicken soup, four-cheese, durkee fried onions. Instructions: In large bowl, blend soups and cream cheese. Microwave til creamy and cheese is melted, stirring occasionally. Stir in well, the dressing mix, then fold in 1 cup (half) the shredded cheese, then the potatoes. Fold well til all potatoes are coated. Pour/spoon into lightly greased 13x9 glass baking dish, mashing down a little, and spreading in pan evenly. Sprinkle top with rest of shredded cheese. COVER and bake at 350° for 50-55 minutes. Uncover, top with onions. Bake UNCOVERED for another 5 minutes or til onions are lightly browned. *Nice additions: 1 cup diced, fully-cooked ham. Cooked, crumbled bacon (4-6 slices). Saute'd onions. Saute'd mushrooms.

title: Cream Cheese Block
instructions: On med heat add a little of the sun dried oil to a skillet and saute the garlic for 1 min, then add the sun dried tomatoes and simmer for 5 minutes. Pour over cream cheese and serve with crackers.
text: Recipe: Cream Cheese Block. Ingredients: tomato, garlic, cream cheese. Instructions: On med heat add a little of the sun dried oil to a skillet and saute the garlic for 1 min, then add the sun dried tomatoes and simmer for 5 minutes. Pour over cream cheese and serve with crackers.

title: Velveeta Meat Dip
instructions: Brown meat and transfer to pot.
Add cheese, cut in cubes and the jar of picante sauce.
Turn to low and let simmer until all cheese melts, stirring occasionally.
Serve with tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Velveeta Meat Dip. Ingredients: hamburger, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Brown meat and transfer to pot. Add cheese, cut in cubes and the jar of picante sauce. Turn to low and let simmer until all cheese melts, stirring occasionally. Serve with tortilla chips.

title: Chicken Dinner In The Crock Pot
instructions: Place potatoes and carrots in crock pot and top with chicken.
Combine the soups and garlic salt and pour over chicken.
Cover an cook on low for 6 hours.
To thicken gravy, stir potato flakes into the gravy and cook 30 minutes longer.
text: Recipe: Chicken Dinner In The Crock Pot. Ingredients: red potatoes, carrots, chicken, condensed cream, condensed cream, garlic salt. Instructions: Place potatoes and carrots in crock pot and top with chicken. Combine the soups and garlic salt and pour over chicken. Cover an cook on low for 6 hours. To thicken gravy, stir potato flakes into the gravy and cook 30 minutes longer.

title: Garlic Chicken Breasts
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
Warm garlic and olive oil to blend the flavors.
In a separate dish, combine the bread crumbs and cheese.
Sprinkle salt and pepper lightly onto chicken breasts.
Dip chicken in olive oil/garlic mixture, then into bread crumb mix.
Place chicken in a greased baking dish.
Bake for 30 minutes or until done.
text: Recipe: Garlic Chicken Breasts. Ingredients: garlic, olive oil, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, chicken. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees. Warm garlic and olive oil to blend the flavors. In a separate dish, combine the bread crumbs and cheese. Sprinkle salt and pepper lightly onto chicken breasts. Dip chicken in olive oil/garlic mixture, then into bread crumb mix. Place chicken in a greased baking dish. Bake for 30 minutes or until done.

title: Chicken Cutlets
instructions: Filet the chicken breasts and pound into cutlets. Sprinkle the chicken cutlets lightly on both sides with some of the seasoning mix.
Set up three deep containers; one with the eggs, one with the flour and one with the panko breadcrumbs. Add some of the seasoning to each container.
Dip the meat into the flour, then into the egg, then into the breadcrumbs. Set on paper towels, letting the meat rest for 10 minutes.
Heat enough oil to completely cover the meat when frying. When hot fry for 3 - 5 minutes on each side, or until desired browning is reached.
Drain on paper towels.

SEASONING MIX: Combine all of the ingredients together in a jar. 1/2 cup salt, 2 teaspoons each of onion powder, Lawry's seasoning salt, black pepper, garlic powder & celery salt. This recipe makes enough seasoning to last a year.
*Seasoning Mix will last for quite a while and can be used to season anything.*.
text: Recipe: Chicken Cutlets. Ingredients: chicken breasts, eggs, flour, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Filet the chicken breasts and pound into cutlets. Sprinkle the chicken cutlets lightly on both sides with some of the seasoning mix. Set up three deep containers; one with the eggs, one with the flour and one with the panko breadcrumbs. Add some of the seasoning to each container. Dip the meat into the flour, then into the egg, then into the breadcrumbs. Set on paper towels, letting the meat rest for 10 minutes. Heat enough oil to completely cover the meat when frying. When hot fry for 3 - 5 minutes on each side, or until desired browning is reached. Drain on paper towels. SEASONING MIX: Combine all of the ingredients together in a jar. 1/2 cup salt, 2 teaspoons each of onion powder, Lawry's seasoning salt, black pepper, garlic powder & celery salt. This recipe makes enough seasoning to last a year. *Seasoning Mix will last for quite a while and can be used to season anything.*.

title: Mince Chicken Balls, Saucy Spaghetti Pasta - Seriously Delicious
instructions: Add rice to a saucepan of boiling water and cook for 15-20 minutes, or as per rice packet instructions. Drain and rinse with cold running water.

In a bowl, combine the minced chicken, 1 chopped onion, parmesan, breadcrumbs, cooked rice and basil. Roll rounded tablespoons of the mixture into balls and place on a tray. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Coat a large frypan with the oil spray, add the extra 2 chopped onions and 1/4 cup of the chicken stock, stirring until the onions are soft.
Add the chicken balls to the pan, and cook - covered - for 10 minutes.
While the chicken balls are cooking, add the pasta to a large pot of boiling water and boil uncovered until 'al dente' (just tender) - or as per the pasta packet instructions. Drain and set aside.
Add the remaining stock and pasta sauce to the cooking chicken balls and simmer - covered - for a further 5 minutes.
Add the chopped parsley to the pan and simmer - uncovered - for another 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken balls and sauce over the pasta, and sprinkle with extra parmesan and parsley, if desired.
text: Recipe: Mince Chicken Balls, Saucy Spaghetti Pasta - Seriously Delicious. Ingredients: rice, chicken breast fillet, onion, parmesan cheese, stale breadcrumbs, fresh basil, olive cooking spray, onions, chicken stock, pasta sauce, parsley. Instructions: Add rice to a saucepan of boiling water and cook for 15-20 minutes, or as per rice packet instructions. Drain and rinse with cold running water. In a bowl, combine the minced chicken, 1 chopped onion, parmesan, breadcrumbs, cooked rice and basil. Roll rounded tablespoons of the mixture into balls and place on a tray. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour. Coat a large frypan with the oil spray, add the extra 2 chopped onions and 1/4 cup of the chicken stock, stirring until the onions are soft. Add the chicken balls to the pan, and cook - covered - for 10 minutes. While the chicken balls are cooking, add the pasta to a large pot of boiling water and boil uncovered until 'al dente' (just tender) - or as per the pasta packet instructions. Drain and set aside. Add the remaining stock and pasta sauce to the cooking chicken balls and simmer - covered - for a further 5 minutes. Add the chopped parsley to the pan and simmer - uncovered - for another 10 minutes. Serve the chicken balls and sauce over the pasta, and sprinkle with extra parmesan and parsley, if desired.

title: No-Cream Alfredo Sauce
instructions: Shake together powdered and evaporated milks; set aside.
Melt butter in medium saucepan; stir in flour to make a roux; cook until bubbly.
Gradually whisk evaporated milk into the roux; cook sauce over medium heat, stirring, until bubbly.
Reduce heat; add parmesan cheese and garlic salt; stir until melted.
Thin sauce to desired consistency by stirring in up to one half cup milk.
Add optional mushrooms and/or chicken pieces; heat through and serve over hot pasta.
text: Recipe: No-Cream Alfredo Sauce. Ingredients: milk, powdered milk, butter, flour, fresh grated parmesan cheese, garlic salt, milk, mushroom, chicken, hot pasta. Instructions: Shake together powdered and evaporated milks; set aside. Melt butter in medium saucepan; stir in flour to make a roux; cook until bubbly. Gradually whisk evaporated milk into the roux; cook sauce over medium heat, stirring, until bubbly. Reduce heat; add parmesan cheese and garlic salt; stir until melted. Thin sauce to desired consistency by stirring in up to one half cup milk. Add optional mushrooms and/or chicken pieces; heat through and serve over hot pasta.

title: Homemade Whipped Butter
instructions: Beat milk and butter together until light and fluffy.
This expands the volume by a third and makes it easier to spread.
text: Recipe: Homemade Whipped Butter. Ingredients: milk, butter. Instructions: Beat milk and butter together until light and fluffy. This expands the volume by a third and makes it easier to spread.

title: Chicken Fettuccine With Creamy Tomato & Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Spray large skillet with cooking spray. Cook Chicken breasts until browned on both sides, and no longer pink. About 8-10 minutes. Remove from skillet: keep warm.
Stir together spaghetti sauce and tomatoes in skillet. Add pasta. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat: simmer over low heat 10 minutes or until pasta is tender.
Add cream and stir until blended. To serve, portion pasta onto individual serving plates, Slice each chicken breast into strips, place on top of pasta. Sprinkle with cheese.
text: Recipe: Chicken Fettuccine With Creamy Tomato & Mushroom Sauce. Ingredients: olive oil, chicken breast, pasta sauce, tomatoes, pasta, heavy cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Spray large skillet with cooking spray. Cook Chicken breasts until browned on both sides, and no longer pink. About 8-10 minutes. Remove from skillet: keep warm. Stir together spaghetti sauce and tomatoes in skillet. Add pasta. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat: simmer over low heat 10 minutes or until pasta is tender. Add cream and stir until blended. To serve, portion pasta onto individual serving plates, Slice each chicken breast into strips, place on top of pasta. Sprinkle with cheese.

title: Simply Baked Chicken Parmesan
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Dip each chicken piece into eggs; coat with bread crumbs.
Place into casserole dish (sprayed with nonstick spray).
Bake uncovered for 30 minutes.
Remove chicken and pour marinara sauce into bottom of dish.
Lay chicken over the sauce and sprinkle the two cheeses on the pieces of chicken.
Bake an additional 20 minutes until cooked through.
text: Recipe: Simply Baked Chicken Parmesan. Ingredients: chicken breasts, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, eggs, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Dip each chicken piece into eggs; coat with bread crumbs. Place into casserole dish (sprayed with nonstick spray). Bake uncovered for 30 minutes. Remove chicken and pour marinara sauce into bottom of dish. Lay chicken over the sauce and sprinkle the two cheeses on the pieces of chicken. Bake an additional 20 minutes until cooked through.

title: Super Grilled Cheese Sandwiches - Taste Of Home
instructions: On two slices of bread, layer the cheeses; top with remaining bread. Butter the outsides of sandwiches; sprinkle with garlic salt.
Cook on an indoor grill or panini maker for 1-2 minutes or until bread is browned and cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Super Grilled Cheese Sandwiches - Taste Of Home. Ingredients: Italian bread, muenster cheese, swiss cheese, American cheese, mozzarella cheese, butter, garlic. Instructions: On two slices of bread, layer the cheeses; top with remaining bread. Butter the outsides of sandwiches; sprinkle with garlic salt. Cook on an indoor grill or panini maker for 1-2 minutes or until bread is browned and cheese is melted.

title: Awesome Creamy Coconut Dip
instructions: Mix cream cheese and cream of coconut in large bowl with wire whisk until well blended.
Add Cool Whip.
Stir gently until well blended.
Refrigerate at least 2 hrs or until well chilled.
Note: Can garnish with toasted flake coconut just before serving.
text: Recipe: Awesome Creamy Coconut Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, cream of coconut. Instructions: Mix cream cheese and cream of coconut in large bowl with wire whisk until well blended. Add Cool Whip. Stir gently until well blended. Refrigerate at least 2 hrs or until well chilled. Note: Can garnish with toasted flake coconut just before serving.

title: Awesome Sausage Dip
instructions: Brown onion and sausage together and drain. add cheese & rotel tomatoes and stir until melted. let cool. serve with tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Awesome Sausage Dip. Ingredients: onion, tomatoes, sausage, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Brown onion and sausage together and drain. add cheese & rotel tomatoes and stir until melted. let cool. serve with tortilla chips.

title: Beefy Noodles With Gravy
instructions: In frying pan brown beef.
Cook noodles. Drain and set aside.
In saucepan, cook gravy according to package directions. Top warm noodles with beef and gravy.
text: Recipe: Beefy Noodles With Gravy. Ingredients: beef, beef ramen noodles, beef gravy. Instructions: In frying pan brown beef. Cook noodles. Drain and set aside. In saucepan, cook gravy according to package directions. Top warm noodles with beef and gravy.

title: Crunchy Onion Chicken & Noodles Casserole
instructions: STIR soup, milk, 1 cup French Fried Onions, vegetables, chicken, noodles and 1/2 cup cheese in a 2-qt. baking dish.
BAKE at 350°F for 30 minute or until hot. Stir.
TOP with remaining cheese and French Fried Onions. Bake 5 minute until onions are golden.
text: Recipe: Crunchy Onion Chicken & Noodles Casserole. Ingredients: cream of chicken soup, milk, onions, carrots, chicken, curly egg noodles, cheddar cheese. Instructions: STIR soup, milk, 1 cup French Fried Onions, vegetables, chicken, noodles and 1/2 cup cheese in a 2-qt. baking dish. BAKE at 350°F for 30 minute or until hot. Stir. TOP with remaining cheese and French Fried Onions. Bake 5 minute until onions are golden.

title: C&O Railroad Jelly Omelette
instructions: Mix eggs& milk with a fork until blended.
In a non-stick omelette pan melt 1 tablespoon butter over medium-high heat, when butter stops foaming pour in eggs, swirling around pan to distribute evenly.
Cook, lifting sides of omelette to let uncooked egg flow underneath, until almost set (about 1 minute), spread jelly or jam of choice over half of omelet.
Fold plain side of omelette over jelly and cook for an additional 20 seconds.
Serve at once.
Salt& pepper to taste.
text: Recipe: C&O Railroad Jelly Omelette. Ingredients: eggs, milk, butter. Instructions: Mix eggs& milk with a fork until blended. In a non-stick omelette pan melt 1 tablespoon butter over medium-high heat, when butter stops foaming pour in eggs, swirling around pan to distribute evenly. Cook, lifting sides of omelette to let uncooked egg flow underneath, until almost set (about 1 minute), spread jelly or jam of choice over half of omelet. Fold plain side of omelette over jelly and cook for an additional 20 seconds. Serve at once. Salt& pepper to taste.

title: Nacho Cheese Sauce
instructions: Melt butter.
Saute onions until caramelized.
Add flour and cook for 2-3 minutes on medium heat.
Add milk and cheese and stir frequently until melted, about 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Nacho Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: butter, onion, flour, milk, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Melt butter. Saute onions until caramelized. Add flour and cook for 2-3 minutes on medium heat. Add milk and cheese and stir frequently until melted, about 15 minutes.

title: French Onion Potato Casserole #5Fix
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Spray non stick cooking spray on bottom and sides of large casserole dish or casserole pan.
Empty and mix all ingredients ( except potato chips ) directly into the casserole dish/pan and spread evenly.
Cover with foil and bake 30 minutes until dish starts to bubble at sides.
Remove foil and cover casserole with small smashed bits of potato chips.
Resume cooking uncovered for 15 minutes more.
text: Recipe: French Onion Potato Casserole #5Fix. Ingredients: Potatoes, cream of chicken soup, onion, cheddar cheese, potato chips. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray non stick cooking spray on bottom and sides of large casserole dish or casserole pan. Empty and mix all ingredients ( except potato chips ) directly into the casserole dish/pan and spread evenly. Cover with foil and bake 30 minutes until dish starts to bubble at sides. Remove foil and cover casserole with small smashed bits of potato chips. Resume cooking uncovered for 15 minutes more.

title: Stove Top And Chicken
instructions: Prepare Stove Top with 1 cup Water.
In small mixing bowl mix soup and sour cream.
Place chicken breast on bottom of 9X13 baking pan.
Pour Soup Mix over top.
Spoon Stuffing on top.
Bake covered for 30 minutes.
Uncover bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Stove Top And Chicken. Ingredients: chicken flavor, cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, chicken breast. Instructions: Prepare Stove Top with 1 cup Water. In small mixing bowl mix soup and sour cream. Place chicken breast on bottom of 9X13 baking pan. Pour Soup Mix over top. Spoon Stuffing on top. Bake covered for 30 minutes. Uncover bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes.

title: Glorious Garlic Moose Roast
instructions: Add moose roast to crock-pot, sprinkle with onion soup mix and Glorious Garlic or Peppercorn Ranch Seasoning available at www.starlaseasonings.com.
Pour coke all around base of roast.
Cover and cook on low for about 7 or 8 hours.
Remove, and let stand before slicing.
*Also works great with beef, pork, bear, venison and chicken! - See more at: http://www.ilovedip.com/main-courses.html#sthash.D30mlfbe.dpuf.
text: Recipe: Glorious Garlic Moose Roast. Ingredients: onion soup, garlic. Instructions: Add moose roast to crock-pot, sprinkle with onion soup mix and Glorious Garlic or Peppercorn Ranch Seasoning available at www.starlaseasonings.com. Pour coke all around base of roast. Cover and cook on low for about 7 or 8 hours. Remove, and let stand before slicing. *Also works great with beef, pork, bear, venison and chicken! - See more at: http://www.ilovedip.com/main-courses.html#sthash.D30mlfbe.dpuf.

title: Potatoes With Raclette Cheese And Garlic
instructions: Wrap potatoes and whole garlic individually in foil. Place in a disposable baking dish.
Cook in covered BBQ, using indirect heat, following manufacturer's instructions, 30 min's or until garlic is tender, remove garlic from dish.
Cook potatoes for a further 20-30 min's until tender.
Cut garlic in half, squeeze out pulp into a small bowl, stir in butter and combine well.
Partially unwrap potatoes, cut length ways down the centre, being careful not to cut all the way through potato or foil.
Open out potatoes and cup foil around them.
Divide butter mixture among the potatoes, top with cheese.
Place in baking dish and return to the BBQ, cook covered, using indiect heat again, for a further 15-20 min's or until cheese mealts and bubbles.
text: Recipe: Potatoes With Raclette Cheese And Garlic. Ingredients: baking potatoes, garlic, butter, raclette cheese. Instructions: Wrap potatoes and whole garlic individually in foil. Place in a disposable baking dish. Cook in covered BBQ, using indirect heat, following manufacturer's instructions, 30 min's or until garlic is tender, remove garlic from dish. Cook potatoes for a further 20-30 min's until tender. Cut garlic in half, squeeze out pulp into a small bowl, stir in butter and combine well. Partially unwrap potatoes, cut length ways down the centre, being careful not to cut all the way through potato or foil. Open out potatoes and cup foil around them. Divide butter mixture among the potatoes, top with cheese. Place in baking dish and return to the BBQ, cook covered, using indiect heat again, for a further 15-20 min's or until cheese mealts and bubbles.

title: Liver Slivers
instructions: Boil noodles as pakage directs, then drain. While noodles cook, prepare liver slivers: Dredge liver thoroughly in flour, melt butter in skillet over medium heat and brown liver. When juice beads begin to appear on the surface of the meat, turn to brown the other side. Do'nt overcook!

Remove meat to a dish. Saute onion in remaining butter in pan.until golden and soft. Remove and add to dish with liver. By now the noodles are done, so fry them in remaining butter until some are crisp. Turn off heat, add meat and onions, toss, and season to taste and serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Liver Slivers. Ingredients: beef, flour, onion, egg noodles, butter. Instructions: Boil noodles as pakage directs, then drain. While noodles cook, prepare liver slivers: Dredge liver thoroughly in flour, melt butter in skillet over medium heat and brown liver. When juice beads begin to appear on the surface of the meat, turn to brown the other side. Do'nt overcook! Remove meat to a dish. Saute onion in remaining butter in pan.until golden and soft. Remove and add to dish with liver. By now the noodles are done, so fry them in remaining butter until some are crisp. Turn off heat, add meat and onions, toss, and season to taste and serve immediately.

title: Do-Ahead Sausage Ravioli Casserole
instructions: Cook the sausage in a 10-inch skillet until no longer pink.
Drain the grease.
Spread 1/2 cup of pasta sauce in an ungreased 13x9x2" baking pan.
In the pan, arrange a single layer of the ravioli over the sauce.
Evenly pour another 1 cup of sauce over the ravioli.
Sprinkle 1 1/2 cups of the sausage over this, then 1 cup of the mozzarella on top of the sausage.
Repeat layers with remaining ravioli, sauce and sausage.
Cover pan tightly with aluminum foil and refrigerate at least 8 hours, but no longer than 24 hours.
When ready to bake, preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake covered for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and sprinkle with remaining 1 1/2 cups mozarella and the parmesan cheese.
Bake for another 15 minutes until cheese is melted.
Let stand 10 minutes before cutting and serving.
text: Recipe: Do-Ahead Sausage Ravioli Casserole. Ingredients: Italian sausage, pasta sauce, frozen cheese, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook the sausage in a 10-inch skillet until no longer pink. Drain the grease. Spread 1/2 cup of pasta sauce in an ungreased 13x9x2" baking pan. In the pan, arrange a single layer of the ravioli over the sauce. Evenly pour another 1 cup of sauce over the ravioli. Sprinkle 1 1/2 cups of the sausage over this, then 1 cup of the mozzarella on top of the sausage. Repeat layers with remaining ravioli, sauce and sausage. Cover pan tightly with aluminum foil and refrigerate at least 8 hours, but no longer than 24 hours. When ready to bake, preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake covered for 45 minutes. Remove the foil and sprinkle with remaining 1 1/2 cups mozarella and the parmesan cheese. Bake for another 15 minutes until cheese is melted. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting and serving.

title: Eggs Baked In Tomatoes With Prosciutto & Basil
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350.
Remove the tomato tops with a sharp knife. Scoop out the seeds with a teaspoon and discard, them place the tomatoes upside-down on paper towel for about 15 minutes to drain.

Smash the basil with a pinch of salt with a mortar and pestle until it becomes a paste, then add a little extra virgin olive oil to loosen it. Season with black pepper and smear the oil inside the tomatoes.
Wrap a slice of prosciutto or pancetta around each tomato and secure with a toothpick.

Place the tomatoes on a greased baking tray or in an ovenproof fry pan and cook in the oven for 15 minutes until the tomatoes soften slightly and the prosciutto is beginning to crisp around the edges.
Remove the tomatoes from the oven and carefully break an egg into each one. Bake for about 5 minutes or until the eggs are cooked but the yolks are still runny.
Scatter with extra basil and serve immediately with toast soldiers.
text: Recipe: Eggs Baked In Tomatoes With Prosciutto & Basil. Ingredients: tomatoes, basil, extra virgin olive oil, eggs. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350. Remove the tomato tops with a sharp knife. Scoop out the seeds with a teaspoon and discard, them place the tomatoes upside-down on paper towel for about 15 minutes to drain. Smash the basil with a pinch of salt with a mortar and pestle until it becomes a paste, then add a little extra virgin olive oil to loosen it. Season with black pepper and smear the oil inside the tomatoes. Wrap a slice of prosciutto or pancetta around each tomato and secure with a toothpick. Place the tomatoes on a greased baking tray or in an ovenproof fry pan and cook in the oven for 15 minutes until the tomatoes soften slightly and the prosciutto is beginning to crisp around the edges. Remove the tomatoes from the oven and carefully break an egg into each one. Bake for about 5 minutes or until the eggs are cooked but the yolks are still runny. Scatter with extra basil and serve immediately with toast soldiers.

title: Potato Chip Chicken Casserole
instructions: Mix celery and chicken together.
Place 1/2 of this mixture in an ungreased baking dish.
Spoon 1/2 can of mushroom soup and 1/4 cup milk over the chicken mixture.
Sprinkle 1 1/2 cups crushed potato chips over all.
Repeat layers one more time. If using grated cheese, sprinkle on top.
Bake 30 minutes at 350 degrees F.
text: Recipe: Potato Chip Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: celery, chicken, cream of mushroom soup, milk, potato chips, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix celery and chicken together. Place 1/2 of this mixture in an ungreased baking dish. Spoon 1/2 can of mushroom soup and 1/4 cup milk over the chicken mixture. Sprinkle 1 1/2 cups crushed potato chips over all. Repeat layers one more time. If using grated cheese, sprinkle on top. Bake 30 minutes at 350 degrees F.

title: Grandma Sloop'S Simple And Smooth Marinara Sauce
instructions: Pour tomato juice into small stockpot.
Add garlic.
Bring sauce to a boil.
turn down to medium, and simmer for about 1 hour, stirring occosionally.
Add can of tomato paste and continue cooking until paste is blended in with sauce and sauce has thickened.
Serve over spaghetti, enjoy!
Optional: add 1 1/2 lb. browned ground beef or meatballs.
recipe can be doubled or tripled and frozen.
text: Recipe: Grandma Sloop'S Simple And Smooth Marinara Sauce. Ingredients: tomato juice, garlic, tomato paste. Instructions: Pour tomato juice into small stockpot. Add garlic. Bring sauce to a boil. turn down to medium, and simmer for about 1 hour, stirring occosionally. Add can of tomato paste and continue cooking until paste is blended in with sauce and sauce has thickened. Serve over spaghetti, enjoy! Optional: add 1 1/2 lb. browned ground beef or meatballs. recipe can be doubled or tripled and frozen.

title: Rhodes Soup Bowls ----Bread Soup Bowls Made Easy
instructions: Cut loaf into thirds. Form each third into a ball. If using rolls combine 4 rolls to make a ball. Repeat with remaining rolls. Place on a large sprayed baking sheet. Brush with egg. Cover with sprayed plastic wrap. Let rise until double in size. Remove wrap and bake at 350°F 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool and slice off top. Hollow out bread and fill with favorite dip, chili or soup.
For larger bowls cut loaf in half or use 6 dinner rolls.
text: Recipe: Rhodes Soup Bowls ----Bread Soup Bowls Made Easy. Ingredients: bread, egg. Instructions: Cut loaf into thirds. Form each third into a ball. If using rolls combine 4 rolls to make a ball. Repeat with remaining rolls. Place on a large sprayed baking sheet. Brush with egg. Cover with sprayed plastic wrap. Let rise until double in size. Remove wrap and bake at 350°F 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool and slice off top. Hollow out bread and fill with favorite dip, chili or soup. For larger bowls cut loaf in half or use 6 dinner rolls.

title: Easy Homestyle Low Fat Chicken And Noodles
instructions: In large dutch oven, cook bow-tie pasta according to package directions.
Drain and return to dutch oven.
Gently stir in soups, broth and chicken.
Cook over low heat until hot.
text: Recipe: Easy Homestyle Low Fat Chicken And Noodles. Ingredients: pasta, low-fat cream of chicken soup, low-fat cream of mushroom soup, chicken broth, chicken. Instructions: In large dutch oven, cook bow-tie pasta according to package directions. Drain and return to dutch oven. Gently stir in soups, broth and chicken. Cook over low heat until hot.

title: Garlic Oil And Roasted Garlic Cloves
instructions: Into a small, tall, glass or ceramic oven bowl, place a cup or more of peeled garlic cloves. Cut off the little 'button' stem end of the clove.
Cover garlic with a mild olive oil. Cover bowl with foil and poke several vent holes.
Put in 350 degree oven for 30 minutes or til cloves are slightly golden and can be pierced with a fork but not mushy.
Remove from oven and when cool enough to handle, pour the oil into a carafe (strain if desired); and save the cloves in a glass jar with a lid. I use a cleaned-out clam juice bottle for the oil.
text: Recipe: Garlic Oil And Roasted Garlic Cloves. Ingredients: garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Into a small, tall, glass or ceramic oven bowl, place a cup or more of peeled garlic cloves. Cut off the little 'button' stem end of the clove. Cover garlic with a mild olive oil. Cover bowl with foil and poke several vent holes. Put in 350 degree oven for 30 minutes or til cloves are slightly golden and can be pierced with a fork but not mushy. Remove from oven and when cool enough to handle, pour the oil into a carafe (strain if desired); and save the cloves in a glass jar with a lid. I use a cleaned-out clam juice bottle for the oil.

title: Nigel Slater'S Potatoes
instructions: Set oven to 325F.
Peel the potatoes and slice them thinly (1/8 in, thick).
If the garlic is really juicy, cut the cloves in half and rub them all around an earthware or cast iron dish.
A 9-by-13 Inch pan works well if you are using 2 1/2 to 3 lbs of potatoes; a 10-inch skillet will work for 2 lbs, pressing down to release the juices.
Otherwise it might be better to slice the garlic thinly and tuck the slices between the potatoes.
Smear the dish generously with butter.
Please don't be stingy- you are only cheating yourself.
Lay the potatoes in the dish,orderly or positively hugger-mugger, it matters not, seasoning with salt and black pepper as you go along.
Pour the cream over the potatoes-it should just come to the top of the slices.
Bake 1 to 1-1/2 hours until the potatoes are virtually melting into the cream.
Enough for 6 as a side dish.
text: Recipe: Nigel Slater'S Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, garlic, butter, heavy cream. Instructions: Set oven to 325F. Peel the potatoes and slice them thinly (1/8 in, thick). If the garlic is really juicy, cut the cloves in half and rub them all around an earthware or cast iron dish. A 9-by-13 Inch pan works well if you are using 2 1/2 to 3 lbs of potatoes; a 10-inch skillet will work for 2 lbs, pressing down to release the juices. Otherwise it might be better to slice the garlic thinly and tuck the slices between the potatoes. Smear the dish generously with butter. Please don't be stingy- you are only cheating yourself. Lay the potatoes in the dish,orderly or positively hugger-mugger, it matters not, seasoning with salt and black pepper as you go along. Pour the cream over the potatoes-it should just come to the top of the slices. Bake 1 to 1-1/2 hours until the potatoes are virtually melting into the cream. Enough for 6 as a side dish.

title: Easy Chicken Cordon Blue
instructions: Cut a pocket in each chicken breast.
Wrap a slice of ham around each cube of cheese, insert into chicken and secure with a tooth pick or two.
Liberally season panko and milk (separately) with salt and pepper.
Place chicken in to milk bath, then roll in panko to coat.
Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minute.
text: Recipe: Easy Chicken Cordon Blue. Ingredients: chicken breasts, swiss cheese, ham, breadcrumbs, milk. Instructions: Cut a pocket in each chicken breast. Wrap a slice of ham around each cube of cheese, insert into chicken and secure with a tooth pick or two. Liberally season panko and milk (separately) with salt and pepper. Place chicken in to milk bath, then roll in panko to coat. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minute.

title: Eggplant (Aubergine) Parmesan (Easy!)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Spray or lightly oil a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Spread 1/2 c sauce in pan.
Peel eggplant and slice 1/2" thick.
Arrange 1/2 the slices in the baking pan.
Top with 1/2 c sauce, 1/2 the mozzarella, the remainder of the eggplant slices, and the remainder of the sauce.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake 45 to 55 minutes.
Top with the remainder of the mozzarella and the parmesan and return to oven, uncovered, under the broiler, until the cheese is lightly browned and bubbly.
text: Recipe: Eggplant (Aubergine) Parmesan (Easy!). Ingredients: pasta sauce, eggplant, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Spray or lightly oil a 9 x 13-inch pan. Spread 1/2 c sauce in pan. Peel eggplant and slice 1/2" thick. Arrange 1/2 the slices in the baking pan. Top with 1/2 c sauce, 1/2 the mozzarella, the remainder of the eggplant slices, and the remainder of the sauce. Cover with aluminum foil and bake 45 to 55 minutes. Top with the remainder of the mozzarella and the parmesan and return to oven, uncovered, under the broiler, until the cheese is lightly browned and bubbly.

title: Mock Devonshire Cream Substitute Ii
instructions: Mash cheese and heat in the cream.
Beat until smooth.
Serve with hot scones and raspberry jam or on fresh or stewed fruit. Anything you like Enjoy Ken.
text: Recipe: Mock Devonshire Cream Substitute Ii. Ingredients: cream cheese, heavy cream. Instructions: Mash cheese and heat in the cream. Beat until smooth. Serve with hot scones and raspberry jam or on fresh or stewed fruit. Anything you like Enjoy Ken.

title: Breaded Pork Chops
instructions: In a shallow bowl, beat the egg. Place the bread crumbs in another shallow bowl. Dip pork chops into egg, then coat with crumbs. Place in a greased 15-in x 10-in x 1-in. baking pan. Bake, uncovered, at 350F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a meat thermometer reads 160 degrees.
In a small saucepan, combine the cream cheese, broth and milk. Cook and stir over medium heat for 5 minutes or until smooth and blended. Serve with the pork chops.
text: Recipe: Breaded Pork Chops. Ingredients: egg, bread crumbs, pork loin chops with bone, onion cream cheese, chicken broth, milk. Instructions: In a shallow bowl, beat the egg. Place the bread crumbs in another shallow bowl. Dip pork chops into egg, then coat with crumbs. Place in a greased 15-in x 10-in x 1-in. baking pan. Bake, uncovered, at 350F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a meat thermometer reads 160 degrees. In a small saucepan, combine the cream cheese, broth and milk. Cook and stir over medium heat for 5 minutes or until smooth and blended. Serve with the pork chops.

title: Ranch Chicken
instructions: Dip chicken into ranch dressing then into bread crumbs.
Place in a 9x13 baking dish.
Bake at 400 degrees for 30 to 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Ranch Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Dip chicken into ranch dressing then into bread crumbs. Place in a 9x13 baking dish. Bake at 400 degrees for 30 to 45 minutes.

title: Chicken Spaghetti Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Cook spaghetti and chicken separately - set aside.
Mix broth, mushroom soup and tomatoes.
Grease casserole dish with cooking spray.
Layer ingredients - spaghetti, kraft singles, chichen, ricotta, tomatoe mixture. Make two layers.
Bake 35 minutes.
text: Recipe: Chicken Spaghetti Bake. Ingredients: chicken breasts, American cheese, ricotta cheese, chicken broth, low-fat cream of mushroom soup, tomatoes. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cook spaghetti and chicken separately - set aside. Mix broth, mushroom soup and tomatoes. Grease casserole dish with cooking spray. Layer ingredients - spaghetti, kraft singles, chichen, ricotta, tomatoe mixture. Make two layers. Bake 35 minutes.

title: Smothered Pork Chops And Rice
instructions: Brown pork chops in non-stick frying pan over medium heat until browned on both sides.
Remove from pan, reserving brown bits and pan juices.
Add cream of mushroom soup, stirring to blend.
Add small amount of water to can to rinse and add to pan.
Add minced parsley.
When heated through, return pork chops to pan and cook on low-medium low until done, about 30 minutes.
Serve with cooked rice and smother chops and rice with mushroom gravy.
text: Recipe: Smothered Pork Chops And Rice. Ingredients: pork loin chops, cream of mushroom soup, parsley, rice. Instructions: Brown pork chops in non-stick frying pan over medium heat until browned on both sides. Remove from pan, reserving brown bits and pan juices. Add cream of mushroom soup, stirring to blend. Add small amount of water to can to rinse and add to pan. Add minced parsley. When heated through, return pork chops to pan and cook on low-medium low until done, about 30 minutes. Serve with cooked rice and smother chops and rice with mushroom gravy.

title: Ham & Cheese Noodle Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Cook noodles in accordance with package and drain.
In a medium mixing bowl, combine melted soup and milk and stir until well blended.
In 13 x 9 baking dish, combine ham, cooked noodles, liquid soup mixture and half of the cheese.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle remaining cheese over top of casserole. Dot with butter.
Bake for additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
text: Recipe: Ham & Cheese Noodle Casserole. Ingredients: ham, egg noodles, cheddar cheese, cream of chicken soup, butter, milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Cook noodles in accordance with package and drain. In a medium mixing bowl, combine melted soup and milk and stir until well blended. In 13 x 9 baking dish, combine ham, cooked noodles, liquid soup mixture and half of the cheese. Bake for 20 minutes. Sprinkle remaining cheese over top of casserole. Dot with butter. Bake for additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.

title: Chicken Baked  Ricotta Manicotti
instructions: Cut chicken into small cubes.
Chop garlic very fine.
Cook chicken and garlic with olive oil and garlic salt. When done set aside.
Preheat oven to 325°F.
Boil water and cook manicotti according to box directions.
Mix ricotta,cottage cheese, 1/2 cup parmesan mix and salt to taste.
Add cooked chicken.
Take manicotti pasta and stuff with mixture.
Set in non-stick bake pan in rows (it should fill bottom of pan).
If there is any stuffing left over, layer it on top.

Pour heavy cream over until all is covered (do not have to use all of it). Then top with cheese and remaining parmesan mix cheese and bake for 25 minutes then raise heat to 375°F for 8-15 more minutes depending on how brown and bubbly you like the top.
Enjoy with garlic bread, salad or your favorite side items.
text: Recipe: Chicken Baked  Ricotta Manicotti. Ingredients: chicken, manicotti, ricotta cheese, cottage cheese, parmesan-romano cheese mix, garlic, garlic salt, Italian cheese blend, heavy cream, olive oil. Instructions: Cut chicken into small cubes. Chop garlic very fine. Cook chicken and garlic with olive oil and garlic salt. When done set aside. Preheat oven to 325°F. Boil water and cook manicotti according to box directions. Mix ricotta,cottage cheese, 1/2 cup parmesan mix and salt to taste. Add cooked chicken. Take manicotti pasta and stuff with mixture. Set in non-stick bake pan in rows (it should fill bottom of pan). If there is any stuffing left over, layer it on top. Pour heavy cream over until all is covered (do not have to use all of it). Then top with cheese and remaining parmesan mix cheese and bake for 25 minutes then raise heat to 375°F for 8-15 more minutes depending on how brown and bubbly you like the top. Enjoy with garlic bread, salad or your favorite side items.

title: Homemade Panko Bread Crumbs
instructions: Push chunks of white bread through the shredding disk of a food processor to make coarse crumbs.

Spread the crumbs on a baking sheet and bake at 300 F degrees until the crumbs are dry but not toasted, about 6 to 8 minutes. Shake the sheet twice during baking. Be careful not to let the crumbs brown!
Immediately remove bread crumbs from oven and allow them to cool.
Once cooled, crumbs may be stored in the freezer, in a resealable plastic bag for as long as several months.
text: Recipe: Homemade Panko Bread Crumbs. Ingredients: white bread, white bread. Instructions: Push chunks of white bread through the shredding disk of a food processor to make coarse crumbs. Spread the crumbs on a baking sheet and bake at 300 F degrees until the crumbs are dry but not toasted, about 6 to 8 minutes. Shake the sheet twice during baking. Be careful not to let the crumbs brown! Immediately remove bread crumbs from oven and allow them to cool. Once cooled, crumbs may be stored in the freezer, in a resealable plastic bag for as long as several months.

title: Sour Cream And Stuffing Crusted Chicken
instructions: Wash chicken and pat dry.
Smother sour cream on both sides of the chicken.
Sour cream needs to be slathered on thick.
Dump stuffing mix out onto a flat plate.
Press sour cream coated chicken into stuffing so that you cover both sides of chicken with as much stuffing as possible.
Heat 1/2 stick of butter in the bottom of a large casserole baking dish until melted.
Add chicken to the dish and bake at 350 for 30 minutes.
Remove from oven and put another 1/2 stick of butter into dish.
Flip chicken over and bake for another 30-45 minutes (cook time may vary depending on how thick the chicken you use is).
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Sour Cream And Stuffing Crusted Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, sour cream, butter. Instructions: Wash chicken and pat dry. Smother sour cream on both sides of the chicken. Sour cream needs to be slathered on thick. Dump stuffing mix out onto a flat plate. Press sour cream coated chicken into stuffing so that you cover both sides of chicken with as much stuffing as possible. Heat 1/2 stick of butter in the bottom of a large casserole baking dish until melted. Add chicken to the dish and bake at 350 for 30 minutes. Remove from oven and put another 1/2 stick of butter into dish. Flip chicken over and bake for another 30-45 minutes (cook time may vary depending on how thick the chicken you use is). Enjoy!

title: Healthier Pasta Quiche Crust
instructions: Place the orzo, Parmesan cheese, and egg substitute in a medium-sized bowl.
Stir to mix well.
Coat a 9-inch deep pie pan with nonstick cooking spray, and place the mixture in the pan.
