In a small pyrex dish combine 1 cup of milk with cream of chicken soup and mix until even. Lay the rolls of chicken in the pyrex and spoon some mixture on top of each.
Place pyrex in preheated oven and bake at 375 for 25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Val'S Chicken Cordon-Bleu Rolls. Ingredients: thin chicken cutlets, ham, American cheese, breadcrumbs, flour, milk, egg, cream of chicken soup, toothpicks, butter. Instructions: Lay down cutlet of chicken and put a slice of ham and a slice of cheese on top and roll it up, sealing it with 2 toothpicks. Dip it in milk bath and then roll it in flour. Then dip it in a beaten egg bath and roll it in bread crumbs. Brown it in frying pan with melted butter. Repeat with other cutlets. In a small pyrex dish combine 1 cup of milk with cream of chicken soup and mix until even. Lay the rolls of chicken in the pyrex and spoon some mixture on top of each. Place pyrex in preheated oven and bake at 375 for 25 minutes.

title: Chicken And Italian Sausage Bake
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet. Saute celery and onion until soft, about 5-7 minutes. Add sausage to skillet and continue cooking until sausage is cooked through.
Add cream of mushroom soup and stir and cook for another 3 to 5 minutes.
Place the chicken in a casserole dish evenly. Next, layer the sausage mixture over it. Then top with the wild rice.
Bake in a 375 degree oven for 15 minutes.
Sprinkle the parmesan on top and continue baking for the final 5 minutes. Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Chicken And Italian Sausage Bake. Ingredients: olive oil, celery, onion, Italian sausages, cream of mushroom soup, chicken breasts, wild rice, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet. Saute celery and onion until soft, about 5-7 minutes. Add sausage to skillet and continue cooking until sausage is cooked through. Add cream of mushroom soup and stir and cook for another 3 to 5 minutes. Place the chicken in a casserole dish evenly. Next, layer the sausage mixture over it. Then top with the wild rice. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 15 minutes. Sprinkle the parmesan on top and continue baking for the final 5 minutes. Enjoy!

title: Easy And Delicious Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix cream cheese, sour cream, and chicken broth in a large bowl until well blended.
Add potatoes, ham, green onions, and most of the cheese. Stir to coat all ingredients.
Spoon into a greased 9" square baking dish and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Bake about 1 hour, or until potatoes are tender.
text: Recipe: Easy And Delicious Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: light cream cheese, light sour cream, chicken broth, deli ham, cheddar cheese, green onion. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix cream cheese, sour cream, and chicken broth in a large bowl until well blended. Add potatoes, ham, green onions, and most of the cheese. Stir to coat all ingredients. Spoon into a greased 9" square baking dish and sprinkle with remaining cheese. Bake about 1 hour, or until potatoes are tender.

title: Easy Ravioli Bake
instructions: Heat oven to 350°.
Spray bottom and sides of a 9x13-inch pan with Pam.
Spread 3/4 cups pasta sauce in the baking dish.
Arrange 1/2 the frozen ravioli in a single layer over the sauce; top with 1/2 the remaining pasta sauce and 1 cup mozzarella cheese.
Repeat these layers starting with the ravioli.
Sprinkle with parmesan.
Cover with foil and bake 40 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake uncovered 15-20 minutes more until bubbly and hot in the center.
Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.
text: Recipe: Easy Ravioli Bake. Ingredients: pasta sauce, mozzarella cheese, frozen cheese ravioli, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 350°. Spray bottom and sides of a 9x13-inch pan with Pam. Spread 3/4 cups pasta sauce in the baking dish. Arrange 1/2 the frozen ravioli in a single layer over the sauce; top with 1/2 the remaining pasta sauce and 1 cup mozzarella cheese. Repeat these layers starting with the ravioli. Sprinkle with parmesan. Cover with foil and bake 40 minutes. Remove the foil and bake uncovered 15-20 minutes more until bubbly and hot in the center. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.

title: Pasta Dumplings
instructions: Bring butter, broth and soup to a boil.
Add the noodles and cover with lid.
Remove from heat and let stand for 15 minutes and stir.
text: Recipe: Pasta Dumplings. Ingredients: egg noodles, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, butter. Instructions: Bring butter, broth and soup to a boil. Add the noodles and cover with lid. Remove from heat and let stand for 15 minutes and stir.

title: Portsmouth Old City Jail Hot Dogs
instructions: Boil the hot dogs in 2 quarts of water for 15 minutes.
Allow them to drain and lay a hot dog on a piece of bread. No condiments are necessary.
Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Portsmouth Old City Jail Hot Dogs. Ingredients: bread. Instructions: Boil the hot dogs in 2 quarts of water for 15 minutes. Allow them to drain and lay a hot dog on a piece of bread. No condiments are necessary. Enjoy!

title: Cheesy Chicken And Biscuit Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F
Melt the butter in a frying pan over medium heat and add the chopped onion. Saute until tender.
Add milk, sour cream, and soup. Heat through.
Add 1/2 cup cheese and spoon into an 8x8 inch baking dish.
Lay biscuits side by side on top of the mixture. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
Bake for 20 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Chicken And Biscuit Casserole. Ingredients: onion, butter, chicken, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, milk, cheddar cheese, buttermilk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F Melt the butter in a frying pan over medium heat and add the chopped onion. Saute until tender. Add milk, sour cream, and soup. Heat through. Add 1/2 cup cheese and spoon into an 8x8 inch baking dish. Lay biscuits side by side on top of the mixture. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top. Bake for 20 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.

title: Crostini With Fig Jam And Prosciutto
instructions: Cut bread into very thin slices.
Toast bread till crispy.
Slather with fig jam.
Top with prosicutto.
text: Recipe: Crostini With Fig Jam And Prosciutto. Ingredients: Italian bread. Instructions: Cut bread into very thin slices. Toast bread till crispy. Slather with fig jam. Top with prosicutto.

title: Crock Pot Chicken And Potato Chowder
instructions: Pour the soup mix, milk and garlic powder into the crock pot and whisk together.
Add the chopped chicken breast and diced potatoes and stir to mix.
Cook for 8 hours on low setting of crock pot or 4 hours on high.
Serve with bread.
As a variation you can stir in a can of creamed corn towards the end of cooking time.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken And Potato Chowder. Ingredients: chicken, cream of chicken soup, milk, garlic, potatoes. Instructions: Pour the soup mix, milk and garlic powder into the crock pot and whisk together. Add the chopped chicken breast and diced potatoes and stir to mix. Cook for 8 hours on low setting of crock pot or 4 hours on high. Serve with bread. As a variation you can stir in a can of creamed corn towards the end of cooking time.

title: Lighter Alfredo Sauce
instructions: on med-low heat sautee garlic in butter until softened and fragrant.
turn down the heat and slowly add milk and half and half.
stir in cheeses and flour.
stir frequently to combine.
when fully mixed turn up the heat a bit and continue stirring until sauce thickens.
remove from heat and serve with pasta and your choice of anything else!
text: Recipe: Lighter Alfredo Sauce. Ingredients: low-fat milk, butter, garlic, parmesan cheese, romano cheese, flour. Instructions: on med-low heat sautee garlic in butter until softened and fragrant. turn down the heat and slowly add milk and half and half. stir in cheeses and flour. stir frequently to combine. when fully mixed turn up the heat a bit and continue stirring until sauce thickens. remove from heat and serve with pasta and your choice of anything else!

title: Hot Cheese Hors D'Oeuvres
instructions: Trim crust and cut bread into 1-inch cubes.
Melt cheeses and butter in top of double boiler. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and add the egg whites.
With a fork, dip each bread cube in cheese mixture until well coated. Place on baking sheet, chill overnight or freeze.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes until light brown and puffed.
Serve hot.
text: Recipe: Hot Cheese Hors D'Oeuvres. Ingredients: white bread, cheddar cheese, cream cheese, butter, egg whites. Instructions: Trim crust and cut bread into 1-inch cubes. Melt cheeses and butter in top of double boiler. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and add the egg whites. With a fork, dip each bread cube in cheese mixture until well coated. Place on baking sheet, chill overnight or freeze. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes until light brown and puffed. Serve hot.

title: Tuscan Bruschetta Dip
instructions: Combine sour cream, cream cheese, garlic and half the basil in a food processor; pulse until well smooth. Scoop mixture into bottom of a bowl.
Top with tomatoes and sliced basil.
text: Recipe: Tuscan Bruschetta Dip. Ingredients: garlic, sour cream, cream cheese, fresh basil, tomatoes. Instructions: Combine sour cream, cream cheese, garlic and half the basil in a food processor; pulse until well smooth. Scoop mixture into bottom of a bowl. Top with tomatoes and sliced basil.

title: Baked Chicken Stuffed With Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto, Goat Cheese,
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F
Trim all visible fat and tendons from chicken breasts. Pound chicken until 1/4 inch thick.
Put pesto, goat cheese, and chopped basil in food processor and buzz a few times until mixture is combined but not completely blended.
Spread 1/6 of pesto/basil/goat cheese mixture on each chicken breast. Roll up chicken, starting with smallest end, tucking in loose pieces (you can secure with tootpicks if necessary).
Put parmesan cheese in flat dish, and roll each rolled up chicken breast in the cheese, patting on so you get as much cheese sticking on as you can.
Spray glass casserole dish with nonstick spray and arrange chicken so pieces are not touching. Bake 30-40 minutes, or until chicken is slightly browned and firm, but not hard to the touch.
Serve hot and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Baked Chicken Stuffed With Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto, Goat Cheese,. Ingredients: chicken breasts, goat cheese, tomato pesto, fresh basil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F Trim all visible fat and tendons from chicken breasts. Pound chicken until 1/4 inch thick. Put pesto, goat cheese, and chopped basil in food processor and buzz a few times until mixture is combined but not completely blended. Spread 1/6 of pesto/basil/goat cheese mixture on each chicken breast. Roll up chicken, starting with smallest end, tucking in loose pieces (you can secure with tootpicks if necessary). Put parmesan cheese in flat dish, and roll each rolled up chicken breast in the cheese, patting on so you get as much cheese sticking on as you can. Spray glass casserole dish with nonstick spray and arrange chicken so pieces are not touching. Bake 30-40 minutes, or until chicken is slightly browned and firm, but not hard to the touch. Serve hot and enjoy!

title: Crock Pot Sausage And Peppers
instructions: Place onions and peppers, then sausage in crock pot. Pour the stewed tomatoes on top of the sausage, then the spaghetti sauce. Sometimes I add a touch of water to make more sauce.
Cook in crock pot for 6-8 hours on low, 3-4 hours on high.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Sausage And Peppers. Ingredients: Italian sausage, tomatoes, onion. Instructions: Place onions and peppers, then sausage in crock pot. Pour the stewed tomatoes on top of the sausage, then the spaghetti sauce. Sometimes I add a touch of water to make more sauce. Cook in crock pot for 6-8 hours on low, 3-4 hours on high.

title: Hamburger Casserole
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a frying pan with the chopped onion.
In large pot boil the egg noodles until tender, drain.
Combine the ground beef mixture, noodles, soups and cheddar cheese.
Place mixture in a 9x13 baking dish sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
Top with parmesan and mozzarella cheeses.
Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly.
text: Recipe: Hamburger Casserole. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, cheddar cheese, tomato soup, cream of mushroom soup, egg noodles, parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Brown the ground beef in a frying pan with the chopped onion. In large pot boil the egg noodles until tender, drain. Combine the ground beef mixture, noodles, soups and cheddar cheese. Place mixture in a 9x13 baking dish sprayed with nonstick cooking spray. Top with parmesan and mozzarella cheeses. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly.

title: Meatloaf
instructions: Grease an oven proof dish and preheat oven to moderate.
Mix chicken noodle soup with 1/2 cup water and bring to boil.
Mix soup with the mince in a large bowl and mix well.
Place mince in oven proof dish and sprinkle grated cheese over top.
Cook in moderate oven until well browned, roughly 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Meatloaf. Ingredients: cheese. Instructions: Grease an oven proof dish and preheat oven to moderate. Mix chicken noodle soup with 1/2 cup water and bring to boil. Mix soup with the mince in a large bowl and mix well. Place mince in oven proof dish and sprinkle grated cheese over top. Cook in moderate oven until well browned, roughly 30 minutes.

title: Pizza Eggs
instructions: Cut the pizza into small, bite-size pieces.
Break and scramble the eggs into a large bowl, beating well.
Add the pizza bits, stirring to make sure all the pizza is covered.
Let sit for 10-15 minutes.
After sitting, stir again and scramble in a large frying pan that has been sprayed with Pam.
Top with Parmesan or mozzarella cheese.
This also works well with a leftover spaghetti, too.
text: Recipe: Pizza Eggs. Ingredients: eggs, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cut the pizza into small, bite-size pieces. Break and scramble the eggs into a large bowl, beating well. Add the pizza bits, stirring to make sure all the pizza is covered. Let sit for 10-15 minutes. After sitting, stir again and scramble in a large frying pan that has been sprayed with Pam. Top with Parmesan or mozzarella cheese. This also works well with a leftover spaghetti, too.

title: Rice Lasagna
instructions: Add eggs and 1/4 cup parmesan cheese to rice. Set aside.
Combine 1/4 cup parmesan cheese and cottage cheese. Set aside.
Add sauce to meat mixture, heat.
Spoon 1 cup rice mix into pammed glass pan, cover with 1/2 of cottage cheese mix, 1/3 sauce and 1/2 ricotta. Repeat, topping with sauce and 2 tablespoons grated parmesan.
Cook 20 minutes at 375 degrees. Cook longer if it is in a dense pan.
If desired, you can freeze and bake at a later date.
text: Recipe: Rice Lasagna. Ingredients: cold cooked rice, parmesan cheese, parmesan cheese, eggs, cottage cheese, low-fat ricotta cheese, spaghetti sauce, ground beef. Instructions: Add eggs and 1/4 cup parmesan cheese to rice. Set aside. Combine 1/4 cup parmesan cheese and cottage cheese. Set aside. Add sauce to meat mixture, heat. Spoon 1 cup rice mix into pammed glass pan, cover with 1/2 of cottage cheese mix, 1/3 sauce and 1/2 ricotta. Repeat, topping with sauce and 2 tablespoons grated parmesan. Cook 20 minutes at 375 degrees. Cook longer if it is in a dense pan. If desired, you can freeze and bake at a later date.

title: Crock Pot Chicken Cordon Bleu
instructions: Place one slice of cheese and ham on each chicken breast.
Roll up and secure with toothpick, place in bottom of crock pot.
Mix soup and milk.
Pour over chicken.
Stir seasonings into breadcrumbs.
Sprinkle chicken with breadcrumbs.
Cook on low for 6-7 hours.
Serve over your favorite pasta or rice.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken Cordon Bleu. Ingredients: chicken breasts, swiss cheese, ham, cream of chicken soup, milk, Italian seasoned breadcrumbs, garlic, onion powder. Instructions: Place one slice of cheese and ham on each chicken breast. Roll up and secure with toothpick, place in bottom of crock pot. Mix soup and milk. Pour over chicken. Stir seasonings into breadcrumbs. Sprinkle chicken with breadcrumbs. Cook on low for 6-7 hours. Serve over your favorite pasta or rice.

title: Chicken Casserole Supreme
instructions: Stew the chicken breasts until meat is falling off bones. Discard bones and chop chicken into bite size pieces.
Combine prepared chicken with sour cream and soup. Spread into the bottom of a 2 quart casserole dish.
Mix together stuffing mix, broth and melted butter. Spread on top of chicken. (If you want to freeze this ,stop here and freeze).
Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until bubbly.
Serve warm.
You can also refrigerate this a day ahead before baking.
When frozen bake directly from freezer ( do not allow to thaw) at 350 about an hour and 15 minutes, checking for doneness throughout cooking.
text: Recipe: Chicken Casserole Supreme. Ingredients: chicken breasts, sour cream, condensed cream, chicken broth, butter. Instructions: Stew the chicken breasts until meat is falling off bones. Discard bones and chop chicken into bite size pieces. Combine prepared chicken with sour cream and soup. Spread into the bottom of a 2 quart casserole dish. Mix together stuffing mix, broth and melted butter. Spread on top of chicken. (If you want to freeze this ,stop here and freeze). Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until bubbly. Serve warm. You can also refrigerate this a day ahead before baking. When frozen bake directly from freezer ( do not allow to thaw) at 350 about an hour and 15 minutes, checking for doneness throughout cooking.

title: Eggs & Chicken Soup
instructions: In a large bowl, combine eggs and soup.
Whip mixture until thoroughly smooth.
Pour into heated and greased skillet.
Heat until firm and fluffy, constantly folding egg and soup mixture.
Serve and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Eggs & Chicken Soup. Ingredients: eggs, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: In a large bowl, combine eggs and soup. Whip mixture until thoroughly smooth. Pour into heated and greased skillet. Heat until firm and fluffy, constantly folding egg and soup mixture. Serve and enjoy!

title: Cheat'S Macaroni And Cheese
instructions: Bring plenty of water to the boil and salt generously. Boil your pasta 2 minutes short of the time stated on the package.

While the pasta is boiling, scald milk in a small pot and add the garlic granules, if using, all the cheese and the butter. Turn off heat and just allow the cheese to sit there and melt while your pasta is cooking. When pasta is nearly done, whisk melted cheese into milk to blend.

Drain cooked pasta and immediately return to pot. Add hot milk/cheese mixture and stir pasta to coat. Cover pasta and allow to sit in this mixture for 10 minutes. Stir again to coat (most of sauce will have been absorbed by the pasta, leaving a thick, creamy sauce in the pot) and serve.
text: Recipe: Cheat'S Macaroni And Cheese. Ingredients: pasta, milk, garlic, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Bring plenty of water to the boil and salt generously. Boil your pasta 2 minutes short of the time stated on the package. While the pasta is boiling, scald milk in a small pot and add the garlic granules, if using, all the cheese and the butter. Turn off heat and just allow the cheese to sit there and melt while your pasta is cooking. When pasta is nearly done, whisk melted cheese into milk to blend. Drain cooked pasta and immediately return to pot. Add hot milk/cheese mixture and stir pasta to coat. Cover pasta and allow to sit in this mixture for 10 minutes. Stir again to coat (most of sauce will have been absorbed by the pasta, leaving a thick, creamy sauce in the pot) and serve.

title: Artichoke Chicken
instructions: Drain tomatoes, reserving juice, and coarsely chop.
Melt butter in heavy skillet over medium heat.
Add artichokes and saute 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes and garlic.
Cook 1 minute.
Add tomato liquid.
Increase heat and boil until liquid is reduced by half, stirring occcasionally, about 5 minutes.
Keep warm.
Sauce can be made a day before.
Reheat before continuing.
Rub chicken on both sides with pepper.
Add chicken to sauce and cook about 10 minutes per side until done.
Spoon sauce over chicken and serve.
text: Recipe: Artichoke Chicken. Ingredients: butter, tomatoes, garlic, tomato juice, chicken breasts. Instructions: Drain tomatoes, reserving juice, and coarsely chop. Melt butter in heavy skillet over medium heat. Add artichokes and saute 2 minutes. Add tomatoes and garlic. Cook 1 minute. Add tomato liquid. Increase heat and boil until liquid is reduced by half, stirring occcasionally, about 5 minutes. Keep warm. Sauce can be made a day before. Reheat before continuing. Rub chicken on both sides with pepper. Add chicken to sauce and cook about 10 minutes per side until done. Spoon sauce over chicken and serve.

title: Creamy Cheese Fondue
instructions: In 1 1/2 quart saucepan, stir soup in Swiss cheese.
Heat over low heat until cheese is melted, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat; stir in sour cream.
Serve in fondue pot with bread chunks.
text: Recipe: Creamy Cheese Fondue. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, swiss cheese, sour cream, bread. Instructions: In 1 1/2 quart saucepan, stir soup in Swiss cheese. Heat over low heat until cheese is melted, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream. Serve in fondue pot with bread chunks.

title: Olive Garden Fettuccini Alfredo (Copycat
instructions: Depending on how thick or thin of a sauce you like will depend on how much heavy cream you use add garlic to YOUR taste I love garlic so I use 2 heaping tablespoons.
Over medium heat in a saucepan melt 1 stick of butter and add the entire container of Parmesan cheese and begin to whisk.
Add garlic slowly.

Add heavy cream, again whisking until no longer lumpy. At this temp it should come to a boil on its own. When it does, slowly add more heavy cream until the consistency YOU desire, and then remove from heat.
Immediately pour over pasta and enjoy !
text: Recipe: Olive Garden Fettuccini Alfredo (Copycat. Ingredients: parmesan cheese, butter, garlic. Instructions: Depending on how thick or thin of a sauce you like will depend on how much heavy cream you use add garlic to YOUR taste I love garlic so I use 2 heaping tablespoons. Over medium heat in a saucepan melt 1 stick of butter and add the entire container of Parmesan cheese and begin to whisk. Add garlic slowly. Add heavy cream, again whisking until no longer lumpy. At this temp it should come to a boil on its own. When it does, slowly add more heavy cream until the consistency YOU desire, and then remove from heat. Immediately pour over pasta and enjoy !

title: Simple Tomato Basil Mozzarella Sandwich
instructions: Cut tomato into 6 slices. Place mozzarella on bread and then tomato. Put the basil on top (whole leaves) and close the sandwich. Cut diagonally for two triangles.
text: Recipe: Simple Tomato Basil Mozzarella Sandwich. Ingredients: tomatoes, fresh basil, mozzarella cheese, white bread. Instructions: Cut tomato into 6 slices. Place mozzarella on bread and then tomato. Put the basil on top (whole leaves) and close the sandwich. Cut diagonally for two triangles.

title: Clam Chowder
instructions: Peel and dice potatoes into 1/4 to 1/2-inch cubes.
Add just enough water to over top of potatoes, add butter and cooked until potatoes are tender. Remove from heat. Do Not drain potatoes.
Meanwhile, mix in a separate bowl the soup, creamer and undrained clams. Add salt and pepper (optional)to taste.
Add clam mixture to the cooked potatoes and butter, stirring to mix well. Return saucepan to heat and warm soup thoroughly.
Note: I don't add salt because the salt in the margarine, soup and clams is enough for my taste.
text: Recipe: Clam Chowder. Ingredients: potatoes, butter, cream of celery soup, non-dairy powdered coffee creamer. Instructions: Peel and dice potatoes into 1/4 to 1/2-inch cubes. Add just enough water to over top of potatoes, add butter and cooked until potatoes are tender. Remove from heat. Do Not drain potatoes. Meanwhile, mix in a separate bowl the soup, creamer and undrained clams. Add salt and pepper (optional)to taste. Add clam mixture to the cooked potatoes and butter, stirring to mix well. Return saucepan to heat and warm soup thoroughly. Note: I don't add salt because the salt in the margarine, soup and clams is enough for my taste.

title: Jaylin'S Gnocchi With Marinara And Italian Sausage #5Fix
instructions: Combine pasta sauce and 1 land o lakes garlic and herb saute express square in a medium pot and cook on medium heat for 10 minutes stirring occasionally. Turn heat down and continue to cook while preparing pasta.

In a large bowl or on counter top add potatoes and make a small well in the center of the potatoes. Set 1/4 cup of flour to the side for rolling the gnocchi. Add 1 3/4 cup of the flour and beaten egg to the well while folding the potatoes into the egg and flour well with both hands until dough forms.

After mixture is incorporated knead for 2 minutes and dust counter with flour. Turn dough out onto counter and knead for another minute or two. Roll gnocchi out on counter into long strips and cut into 1/2 inch pieces. Drop pasta into boiling water for about 3-4 minutes or until pasta begins to float atop water.

Once pasta is ready add remaining land o lakes squares to a medium saute pan or skillet and heat for 1 minute Add cooked pasta and cook for 1 minute then add sauce or and cook for 5 minutes. You can also add the sauce to the pasta after plating.
text: Recipe: Jaylin'S Gnocchi With Marinara And Italian Sausage #5Fix. Ingredients: Potatoes, flour, egg, garlic. Instructions: Combine pasta sauce and 1 land o lakes garlic and herb saute express square in a medium pot and cook on medium heat for 10 minutes stirring occasionally. Turn heat down and continue to cook while preparing pasta. In a large bowl or on counter top add potatoes and make a small well in the center of the potatoes. Set 1/4 cup of flour to the side for rolling the gnocchi. Add 1 3/4 cup of the flour and beaten egg to the well while folding the potatoes into the egg and flour well with both hands until dough forms. After mixture is incorporated knead for 2 minutes and dust counter with flour. Turn dough out onto counter and knead for another minute or two. Roll gnocchi out on counter into long strips and cut into 1/2 inch pieces. Drop pasta into boiling water for about 3-4 minutes or until pasta begins to float atop water. Once pasta is ready add remaining land o lakes squares to a medium saute pan or skillet and heat for 1 minute Add cooked pasta and cook for 1 minute then add sauce or and cook for 5 minutes. You can also add the sauce to the pasta after plating.

title: Seasoned Baked Potatoes
instructions: Scrub potatoes and cut in half lengthwise; place cut side up on an ungreased baking sheet.
Brush with oil.
Sprinkle with basil, onion salt and garlic powder.
Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until tender.
text: Recipe: Seasoned Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, olive oil, basil, onion salt, garlic powder. Instructions: Scrub potatoes and cut in half lengthwise; place cut side up on an ungreased baking sheet. Brush with oil. Sprinkle with basil, onion salt and garlic powder. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until tender.

title: Polpette Napoletane (Neapolitan Meatballs)
instructions: In a small bowl, place the bread; cover with milk and leave to soak.
Chop parsley and garlic together.
Squeeze milk out of the bread and add to meat along with parsley and garlic in a large mixing bowl.
Mix ingredients together, then add eggs and mix again.
Add Parmesan cheese and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Shape meatballs, make a hole in the top and insert a small piece of mozarella.
Cover over mozzarella, then roll meatballs in bread crumbs.
Fry in heated olive oil for 5 minutes, then turn over.
When golden brown and crusty on both sides, remove from pan and drain on paper towels.
Add meatballs to your favorite tomato sauce and cook very slowly for 45 minutes on low heat.
text: Recipe: Polpette Napoletane (Neapolitan Meatballs). Ingredients: white bread, milk, parsley, garlic, ground beef, ground pork, eggs, parmesan cheese, salt, mozzarella, breadcrumbs, extra virgin olive oil. Instructions: In a small bowl, place the bread; cover with milk and leave to soak. Chop parsley and garlic together. Squeeze milk out of the bread and add to meat along with parsley and garlic in a large mixing bowl. Mix ingredients together, then add eggs and mix again. Add Parmesan cheese and season with salt and pepper to taste. Shape meatballs, make a hole in the top and insert a small piece of mozarella. Cover over mozzarella, then roll meatballs in bread crumbs. Fry in heated olive oil for 5 minutes, then turn over. When golden brown and crusty on both sides, remove from pan and drain on paper towels. Add meatballs to your favorite tomato sauce and cook very slowly for 45 minutes on low heat.

title: Low Fat Chip Dip (Lipton Onion Soup Dip)
instructions: Mix above ingredients together, chill for 20 minutes.
Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Low Fat Chip Dip (Lipton Onion Soup Dip). Ingredients: Onion Soup Mix. Instructions: Mix above ingredients together, chill for 20 minutes. Enjoy.

title: Cream Cheese Sauce
instructions: Melt together cream cheese and butter in a saucepan over low heat until smooth and creamy, about 10 minutes. Stir in milk and garlic.
Simmer over low heat, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
Serve over pasta or chicken.
text: Recipe: Cream Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: cream cheese, butter, milk, garlic. Instructions: Melt together cream cheese and butter in a saucepan over low heat until smooth and creamy, about 10 minutes. Stir in milk and garlic. Simmer over low heat, stirring constantly for 3 minutes. Serve over pasta or chicken.

title: Homemade Pasta
instructions: On a work surface (a tray this can get messy) make a mound with the flour.
Then add the egg. Mix with hands until well blended.
Once the dough has come together, then knead the dough for about 5 minutes. The more kneading the better. When the dough is ready it should be soft and silky. There should be no clumps of flour.

First, flour the dough lightly.Then, either using a rolling pin or a pasta machine, flatten out the dough. Make the dough very thin. Finally, using a knife or the pasta machine, cut the dough to the desired shape.
To cook boil water with salt, and a little bit of olive oil. Add the pasta. Cook until it floats to the top. Bon Appetite.
text: Recipe: Homemade Pasta. Ingredients: flour, egg. Instructions: On a work surface (a tray this can get messy) make a mound with the flour. Then add the egg. Mix with hands until well blended. Once the dough has come together, then knead the dough for about 5 minutes. The more kneading the better. When the dough is ready it should be soft and silky. There should be no clumps of flour. First, flour the dough lightly.Then, either using a rolling pin or a pasta machine, flatten out the dough. Make the dough very thin. Finally, using a knife or the pasta machine, cut the dough to the desired shape. To cook boil water with salt, and a little bit of olive oil. Add the pasta. Cook until it floats to the top. Bon Appetite.

title: Large Recipe Potatoes Au Gratin
instructions: Combine soup and sour cream.
Spoon enough to barely cover bottom of two 9x13 pans.
Place potatoes over sauce mix.
Top with cheese sauce (put into plastic bag, cut hole in corner and squeeze out onto potatoes).
Add veggie(s) of choice.
Cover with remaining sauce. Don't worry about covering completely.
Sprinkle shredded cheese all over and/or top with crushed potato chips.
Bake 375 for 30-40 minute.
text: Recipe: Large Recipe Potatoes Au Gratin. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, onion, cheese sauce, shredded cheese. Instructions: Combine soup and sour cream. Spoon enough to barely cover bottom of two 9x13 pans. Place potatoes over sauce mix. Top with cheese sauce (put into plastic bag, cut hole in corner and squeeze out onto potatoes). Add veggie(s) of choice. Cover with remaining sauce. Don't worry about covering completely. Sprinkle shredded cheese all over and/or top with crushed potato chips. Bake 375 for 30-40 minute.

title: Noodle Rice Pilaf
instructions: In a saucepan, melt the butter. Add the rice and noodles; cook and stir until light and browned, about 3 minutes. Stir in broth; bring to a boil. reduce heat; cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until broth is absorbed and rice is tender. Stir in parsley.
text: Recipe: Noodle Rice Pilaf. Ingredients: butter, long grain rice, egg noodles, chicken broth, fesh parsley. Instructions: In a saucepan, melt the butter. Add the rice and noodles; cook and stir until light and browned, about 3 minutes. Stir in broth; bring to a boil. reduce heat; cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until broth is absorbed and rice is tender. Stir in parsley.

title: Super Easy: Baking Sausage
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
Line a 10"x15" jelly roll pan with parchment paper for cooking/baking.
Place one package of sausage links in the jelly roll pan flat on top of the parchment paper in a single layer.
When the oven comes up to temperature, place the pan with the sausage on the middle shelf of the oven and bake for 15 minutes.
When the time goes off remove the sausage from the oven and rotate them to the other side.
Place them back in the oven for another 10 minutes or until sausage is thoroughly cooked through.
Remove finished sausage to paper towels or brown paper and blot excess grease off of the links with paper towels.
Repeat process until entire 3-pounds of sausage is cooked.
Freeze in portion sized bags.
Afterward, clean-up is a breeze. Wait for grease to cool and then throw away parchment paper.
text: Recipe: Super Easy: Baking Sausage. Ingredients: sausage links, sausage links, sausage links. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Line a 10"x15" jelly roll pan with parchment paper for cooking/baking. Place one package of sausage links in the jelly roll pan flat on top of the parchment paper in a single layer. When the oven comes up to temperature, place the pan with the sausage on the middle shelf of the oven and bake for 15 minutes. When the time goes off remove the sausage from the oven and rotate them to the other side. Place them back in the oven for another 10 minutes or until sausage is thoroughly cooked through. Remove finished sausage to paper towels or brown paper and blot excess grease off of the links with paper towels. Repeat process until entire 3-pounds of sausage is cooked. Freeze in portion sized bags. Afterward, clean-up is a breeze. Wait for grease to cool and then throw away parchment paper.

title: Clarified Butter (Slow Cooker)
instructions: Place butter in the slow cooker, cover and cook on Low for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, until the butter is melted and the milk solids surface.
Skim the milk solids from the surface until the butter is clear.
Strain the butter through the cheesecloth into clean containers. Store the clarified butter in the refrigerator for several weeks or freeze for up to a year.
text: Recipe: Clarified Butter (Slow Cooker). Ingredients: butter, cheesecloth. Instructions: Place butter in the slow cooker, cover and cook on Low for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, until the butter is melted and the milk solids surface. Skim the milk solids from the surface until the butter is clear. Strain the butter through the cheesecloth into clean containers. Store the clarified butter in the refrigerator for several weeks or freeze for up to a year.

title: Fresh Tomato Tart
instructions: Press rolls into pie plate.
Brush with 1 T olive oil.
Layer 1/2 cheese & basil.
Place tomatoes in single layer.
Cover tomatoes with remaining cheese & basil.
Drizzle 1 T olive oil over top.
Season with salt & pepper.
Bake 350 for 30 minutes or until crust is browned.
text: Recipe: Fresh Tomato Tart. Ingredients: fresh basil, olive oil, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Press rolls into pie plate. Brush with 1 T olive oil. Layer 1/2 cheese & basil. Place tomatoes in single layer. Cover tomatoes with remaining cheese & basil. Drizzle 1 T olive oil over top. Season with salt & pepper. Bake 350 for 30 minutes or until crust is browned.

title: Caramelized Garlic And Garlic Oil
instructions: Arrange the garlic cloves in a frying pan large enough to accomodate them in a single layer.
Pour in the olive oil to cover the cloves, about 1 inch of oil.
Place over medium heat and cook for 10 to 15 minute Stir from time to time.
Garlic is done when it turns a beautiful golden brown.
Remove the pan from the heat.
Using a slotted spoon, place the cloves in a bowl to cool. Return any oil that collects at the bottom to the frying pan.
Once the garlic and oil have cooled, package the cloves in snack size freezer bags of 20 to 25 cloves.
Freeze any bags that won't be used in 3 days.
Transfer the garlic oil to a plastic container, cover and refrigerate. It will keep for several months.
Makes 150 cloves and 1 cup oil.
NOTE: You can make a smaller batch by simply adding the desired garlic to a frying pan and covering it with 1 inch oil.
text: Recipe: Caramelized Garlic And Garlic Oil. Ingredients: garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Arrange the garlic cloves in a frying pan large enough to accomodate them in a single layer. Pour in the olive oil to cover the cloves, about 1 inch of oil. Place over medium heat and cook for 10 to 15 minute Stir from time to time. Garlic is done when it turns a beautiful golden brown. Remove the pan from the heat. Using a slotted spoon, place the cloves in a bowl to cool. Return any oil that collects at the bottom to the frying pan. Once the garlic and oil have cooled, package the cloves in snack size freezer bags of 20 to 25 cloves. Freeze any bags that won't be used in 3 days. Transfer the garlic oil to a plastic container, cover and refrigerate. It will keep for several months. Makes 150 cloves and 1 cup oil. NOTE: You can make a smaller batch by simply adding the desired garlic to a frying pan and covering it with 1 inch oil.

title: Chorizo & Chicken Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F.
Heat frying pan over med-high heat.
Brown and crumble Chorizo.
Drain.
Set aside.
Brown Chicken.
Set aside.
Saute (stir fry) Onion, Bell Pepper, and Celery'til Onions are translucent.
Combine Rotini, Chorizo, Chicken, Onion mixture, Sour Cream/Yogurt Cheese, Cream of Chicken Soup, and Milk-Egg mixture.
Mix well.
Spoon into un-greased casserole dish.
Bake for 25 minutes.
(If you wish to freeze for later use, cool, divide into serving sized portions in sandwich size ziplock freezer bags at this time. To serve, thaw, add Parmesan, heat).
To serve immediately, cover with Parmesan.
Bake another 10 minutes.
Let rest 20 minutes before serving.
text: Recipe: Chorizo & Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: rotini pasta, chorizo sausages, chicken, yellow onions, green bell pepper, stalks celery, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, milk, egg, freshly grated parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Heat frying pan over med-high heat. Brown and crumble Chorizo. Drain. Set aside. Brown Chicken. Set aside. Saute (stir fry) Onion, Bell Pepper, and Celery'til Onions are translucent. Combine Rotini, Chorizo, Chicken, Onion mixture, Sour Cream/Yogurt Cheese, Cream of Chicken Soup, and Milk-Egg mixture. Mix well. Spoon into un-greased casserole dish. Bake for 25 minutes. (If you wish to freeze for later use, cool, divide into serving sized portions in sandwich size ziplock freezer bags at this time. To serve, thaw, add Parmesan, heat). To serve immediately, cover with Parmesan. Bake another 10 minutes. Let rest 20 minutes before serving.

title: Creme Fraiche
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the cream and buttermilk.
Cover the bowl with a towel and let stand in a warm place until thickened, about 12 hours.
When thickened, cover bowl tightly and refrigerate until well chilled, 2 to 3 hours.
The Creme Fraiche can be refrgerated, tightly covered for up to 2 weeks.
text: Recipe: Creme Fraiche. Ingredients: heavy cream, buttermilk. Instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the cream and buttermilk. Cover the bowl with a towel and let stand in a warm place until thickened, about 12 hours. When thickened, cover bowl tightly and refrigerate until well chilled, 2 to 3 hours. The Creme Fraiche can be refrgerated, tightly covered for up to 2 weeks.

title: Rakott Krumpli (Hungarian Layered Potatoes)
instructions: Boil peeled potatoes until fork inserted tells you it's cooked.
Boil eggs until hardboiled.
Slice potatoes to form medallions.
Slice eggs.
In casserole dish, layer butter, sour cream, potatoes and eggs until used up.
Sour cream should be top layer.
Cover, put in 350 degree oven for about 1 hour or until brown.
Add salt to taste and enjoy.
Best if eaten fresh.
text: Recipe: Rakott Krumpli (Hungarian Layered Potatoes). Ingredients: potatoes, eggs, butter, sour cream. Instructions: Boil peeled potatoes until fork inserted tells you it's cooked. Boil eggs until hardboiled. Slice potatoes to form medallions. Slice eggs. In casserole dish, layer butter, sour cream, potatoes and eggs until used up. Sour cream should be top layer. Cover, put in 350 degree oven for about 1 hour or until brown. Add salt to taste and enjoy. Best if eaten fresh.

title: The Realtor'S Garlicky Potatoes Au Gratin
instructions: Heat oven to 350*.
In casserole, melt 1/4 cup butter, stir in flour, salt and minced garlic.
Add milk and cook until mixture boils and thickens, whisking constantly.
Stir in cheeses until sauce is smooth.
Add potatoes,stir until thoroughly combined.
Mix the breadcrumbs with the melted 1 tablespoons butter and sprinkle evenly over the top.
Bake uncovered 1 1/2 to 2 hours until bubbly on top.
text: Recipe: The Realtor'S Garlicky Potatoes Au Gratin. Ingredients: butter, flour, salt, garlic, milk, cheddar cheese, romano cheese, potatoes, breadcrumbs, butter. Instructions: Heat oven to 350*. In casserole, melt 1/4 cup butter, stir in flour, salt and minced garlic. Add milk and cook until mixture boils and thickens, whisking constantly. Stir in cheeses until sauce is smooth. Add potatoes,stir until thoroughly combined. Mix the breadcrumbs with the melted 1 tablespoons butter and sprinkle evenly over the top. Bake uncovered 1 1/2 to 2 hours until bubbly on top.

title: Hot Ham And Cheese Wraps
instructions: Warm tortillas as directed on package.
Top each warm tortilla evenly with ham and 1 cheese slive.
Roll up each tortilla; wrap each in microwave-safe plastic wrap.
Microwave each roll on HIGH for 30-40 seconds or until warm.
text: Recipe: Hot Ham And Cheese Wraps. Ingredients: flour tortillas, American cheese. Instructions: Warm tortillas as directed on package. Top each warm tortilla evenly with ham and 1 cheese slive. Roll up each tortilla; wrap each in microwave-safe plastic wrap. Microwave each roll on HIGH for 30-40 seconds or until warm.

title: Chicken Breasts Smothered In Tomatoes And Mozzarella
instructions: Preheat broiler.
Pound chicken with flat side of mallet to 1/4" thickness.
Heat 2 tablespoons oil in ovenproof skillet over medium heat.
Add chicken and cook turning once until no longer pink in center.
Transfer to plate, cover and keep warm.
Heat remaining oil in same skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, cook and stir 5 minute.
Add tomatoes: bring to a simmer.
Return chicken to skillet, spooning onion and tomato mixture over chicken.
Sprinkle cheese over top.
Broil 4 to 5 inches from heat until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Chicken Breasts Smothered In Tomatoes And Mozzarella. Ingredients: chicken breasts, olive oil, onion, garlic, Italian stewed tomatoes, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat broiler. Pound chicken with flat side of mallet to 1/4" thickness. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in ovenproof skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and cook turning once until no longer pink in center. Transfer to plate, cover and keep warm. Heat remaining oil in same skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, cook and stir 5 minute. Add tomatoes: bring to a simmer. Return chicken to skillet, spooning onion and tomato mixture over chicken. Sprinkle cheese over top. Broil 4 to 5 inches from heat until cheese is melted.

title: Fried Potato Patties
instructions: In medium size bowl mix together all ingredients.
Heat skillet with enough oil for frying.
(make sure oil is HOT before you start frying patties).
Drop by tablespoon into hot oil and fry until crispy and golden brown.
text: Recipe: Fried Potato Patties. Ingredients: potatoes, flour, egg, onion salt. Instructions: In medium size bowl mix together all ingredients. Heat skillet with enough oil for frying. (make sure oil is HOT before you start frying patties). Drop by tablespoon into hot oil and fry until crispy and golden brown.

title: Creamy Chicken And Pumpkin Pasta (Ww)
instructions: Preheat oven to 220C or 200C fan forced.

Line a baking tray with baking paper and place pumpkin on prepared tray and lightly spray with oil and then bake for 20 minutes and then add tomatoes and bake for a further 10 minutes or until pumpkin is lightly browned and tomatoes softened.
Meanwhile cook the pasta in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water, following packet instructions, or until just tender and then drain.
Heat oil in a non stick frying pan over medium-high heat and add the chicken and cook stirring for 5 minutes or until lightly browned and then transfer to a plate.
Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring for 5 minutes or until softened and then return chicken to the pan.

Blend cornflour and a little evaporated milk in a jug and stir in remaining milk and then add this milk mixture to the pan and bring to the boil, reduce heat to low and simmer stirring occasionally for 3 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Add the cooked pasta, olives and roasted pumpkin and tomatoes to the sauce and toss gently to combine and serve pasta sprinkled with cheese.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken And Pumpkin Pasta (Ww). Ingredients: butternut pumpkin, cherry tomatoes, penne pasta, olive oil, chicken breast, red onion, garlic, cornflour, milk, green olives, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 220C or 200C fan forced. Line a baking tray with baking paper and place pumpkin on prepared tray and lightly spray with oil and then bake for 20 minutes and then add tomatoes and bake for a further 10 minutes or until pumpkin is lightly browned and tomatoes softened. Meanwhile cook the pasta in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water, following packet instructions, or until just tender and then drain. Heat oil in a non stick frying pan over medium-high heat and add the chicken and cook stirring for 5 minutes or until lightly browned and then transfer to a plate. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring for 5 minutes or until softened and then return chicken to the pan. Blend cornflour and a little evaporated milk in a jug and stir in remaining milk and then add this milk mixture to the pan and bring to the boil, reduce heat to low and simmer stirring occasionally for 3 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly. Add the cooked pasta, olives and roasted pumpkin and tomatoes to the sauce and toss gently to combine and serve pasta sprinkled with cheese.

title: Miso Egg Custard
instructions: Break egg.
Beat.
Add miso and only a little bit of water to help stir the miso through.
Too much water will change it to"egg custard with miso soup".
Steam.
text: Recipe: Miso Egg Custard. Ingredients: egg. Instructions: Break egg. Beat. Add miso and only a little bit of water to help stir the miso through. Too much water will change it to"egg custard with miso soup". Steam.

title: Turkish Tomatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C (or 350F).
Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the pulp, reserving the pulp.
Heat the oil in a pan and saute onions until lightly browned.
Add tomato pulp and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in eggplant and simmer for 5 minutes until tender.
Add breadcrumbs, parsley and season to taste.
Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes.
Remove pan from heat and beat in cheese.
Stir in eggs and mix thoroughly.
Spoon mixture into each tomato shell and arrange in a greased, ovenproof dish.
Bake for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Turkish Tomatoes. Ingredients: tomatoes, olive oil, onions, eggplants, fresh breadcrumbs, parsley, tasty cheese, eggs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 180C (or 350F). Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the pulp, reserving the pulp. Heat the oil in a pan and saute onions until lightly browned. Add tomato pulp and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in eggplant and simmer for 5 minutes until tender. Add breadcrumbs, parsley and season to taste. Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat and beat in cheese. Stir in eggs and mix thoroughly. Spoon mixture into each tomato shell and arrange in a greased, ovenproof dish. Bake for 30 minutes.

title: Magical Meatloaf
instructions: Mix all ingredients together (except cheese) and place into a loaf pan. If you choose to use the cheese, place in the middle of the meat mixture.
Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Ten minutes before the times goes off, mix together 1 part ketchup with one part Ott's dressing and pour on top.
text: Recipe: Magical Meatloaf. Ingredients: ground beef, milk, eggs, Onion Soup mix, onion, bread, tomato salad dressing, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together (except cheese) and place into a loaf pan. If you choose to use the cheese, place in the middle of the meat mixture. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes. Ten minutes before the times goes off, mix together 1 part ketchup with one part Ott's dressing and pour on top.

title: Easy-To-Stuff Manicotti
instructions: Cook manicotti according to package directions.
Meanwhile, in large skillet, cook beef and onion over medium heat until meat is no longer pink; drain.
Stir in the spaghetti sauce.
Spread half the meat sauce into a greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
Drain manicotti; stuff each shell with a piece of string cheese.
Place over meat sauce; top with remaining sauce.
Cover and bake at 350 for 25-30 minutes.
Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
Bake, uncovered, for 5-10 minutes until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Easy-To-Stuff Manicotti. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, garlic, mozzarella string cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Cook manicotti according to package directions. Meanwhile, in large skillet, cook beef and onion over medium heat until meat is no longer pink; drain. Stir in the spaghetti sauce. Spread half the meat sauce into a greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish. Drain manicotti; stuff each shell with a piece of string cheese. Place over meat sauce; top with remaining sauce. Cover and bake at 350 for 25-30 minutes. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Bake, uncovered, for 5-10 minutes until cheese is melted.

title: Potluck Potatoes - Slow Cooker
instructions: Brown the ground beef and onions on a skillet while making the mashed potatoes as you normally would.

In a slow cooker mix the chicken soup and sour cream. Mix in the mashed potatoes, stir. Add the ground beef and onions, stir. Add the melted butter, stir and let sit in the slow cooker for about 15 minutes. Once hot, add the grated cheese and stir. You can add as much as you like. Let melt and put the slow cooker on low. Enjoy.
text: Recipe: Potluck Potatoes - Slow Cooker. Ingredients: ground beef, potatoes, onion, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, butter, cheese. Instructions: Brown the ground beef and onions on a skillet while making the mashed potatoes as you normally would. In a slow cooker mix the chicken soup and sour cream. Mix in the mashed potatoes, stir. Add the ground beef and onions, stir. Add the melted butter, stir and let sit in the slow cooker for about 15 minutes. Once hot, add the grated cheese and stir. You can add as much as you like. Let melt and put the slow cooker on low. Enjoy.

title: Easiest Caramel Apple Martini
instructions: Shake schnapps with ice and strain into chilled martini glass.
text: Recipe: Easiest Caramel Apple Martini. Ingredients: butterscotch. Instructions: Shake schnapps with ice and strain into chilled martini glass.

title: Quick Smoked Sausage & Rice
instructions: Cook sausage over medium heat, stirring frequently, until nicely browned.
Run tomatoes thru food processor or chopper until as smooth as desired, and drain with fine-mesh strainer.
Add rice and tomatoes to sausage.
Heat, stirring, until heated through.
Top with shredded cheese and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Quick Smoked Sausage & Rice. Ingredients: brown rice, sausage, tomatoes, cheese. Instructions: Cook sausage over medium heat, stirring frequently, until nicely browned. Run tomatoes thru food processor or chopper until as smooth as desired, and drain with fine-mesh strainer. Add rice and tomatoes to sausage. Heat, stirring, until heated through. Top with shredded cheese and enjoy!

title: Mizithra Browned Buttered Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of salted water until al dente.
When pasta is almost done, slowly melt the butter over medium heat until golden.
Skim butter solids off top.
Drain pasta and toss with butter.
Sprinkle with cheese to taste.
text: Recipe: Mizithra Browned Buttered Pasta. Ingredients: butter, mizithra cheese. Instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of salted water until al dente. When pasta is almost done, slowly melt the butter over medium heat until golden. Skim butter solids off top. Drain pasta and toss with butter. Sprinkle with cheese to taste.

title: Double Cream
instructions: In a jar with a lid, combine cream with buttermilk and shake, covered tightly, for 1 minute.
Let mixture stand, wrapped in a thick towel, at room temperature for 12 hours, or until it is very thick, but still liquid.
Serve with scones and strawberry or raspberry preserves.
text: Recipe: Double Cream. Ingredients: heavy cream, buttermilk. Instructions: In a jar with a lid, combine cream with buttermilk and shake, covered tightly, for 1 minute. Let mixture stand, wrapped in a thick towel, at room temperature for 12 hours, or until it is very thick, but still liquid. Serve with scones and strawberry or raspberry preserves.

title: Creamy Crock Pot Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes in bottom of slow cooker.
Beat cream cheese, soup and salad dressing, mix.
Stir into potatoes.
Cover and cook on low for 8 hours.
text: Recipe: Creamy Crock Pot Potatoes. Ingredients: red potatoes, cream cheese, cream of potato soup, buttermilk. Instructions: Place potatoes in bottom of slow cooker. Beat cream cheese, soup and salad dressing, mix. Stir into potatoes. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours.

title: Extra Cheesy Grilled Cheese
instructions: Stir together butter and parmesan cheese in a small bowl.
Spread 1 1/2 teaspoons butter mixture on 1 side of each bread slice.
Place 4 bread slices, buttered sides down, on wax paper. Top with provolone and mozzarella cheeses; top with remaining bread slices, buttered sides up.
Cook sandwiches, in batches, on a hot griddle or in a nonstick skillet over medium heat, gently pressing with a spatula, 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Extra Cheesy Grilled Cheese. Ingredients: butter, parmesan cheese, Italian bread, provolone cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Stir together butter and parmesan cheese in a small bowl. Spread 1 1/2 teaspoons butter mixture on 1 side of each bread slice. Place 4 bread slices, buttered sides down, on wax paper. Top with provolone and mozzarella cheeses; top with remaining bread slices, buttered sides up. Cook sandwiches, in batches, on a hot griddle or in a nonstick skillet over medium heat, gently pressing with a spatula, 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cheese is melted.

title: Fresh Pork Lard
instructions: Preheat oven to 275 deg F.
Spread the cubes out in a deep baking dish, place in oven.
Stir every once in a while as the fat renders into a clear liquid.

When the baking dish contains only clear liquid and browned bits (about 2 hours), carefully remove the dish from the oven (letting the cracklings color richly gives the lard a fuller, roastier flavor).
Let the lard cool to lukewarm, then strain.
Store the lard in a tightly sealed jar in the refrigerator (freeze if you won't use it all within a month).
text: Recipe: Fresh Pork Lard. Ingredients: pork fat, pork fat. Instructions: Preheat oven to 275 deg F. Spread the cubes out in a deep baking dish, place in oven. Stir every once in a while as the fat renders into a clear liquid. When the baking dish contains only clear liquid and browned bits (about 2 hours), carefully remove the dish from the oven (letting the cracklings color richly gives the lard a fuller, roastier flavor). Let the lard cool to lukewarm, then strain. Store the lard in a tightly sealed jar in the refrigerator (freeze if you won't use it all within a month).

title: Baked Brie In Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
With sharp knife, cut just inside outer edge of bread leaving a shell.
Do not cut through bottom.
Gently remove insides of bread creating cavity for the cheese and cut into pieces for dipping.
Mix garlic and butter.
Paint inside of shell with mixture.
Reserve remaining mixture.
Trim cheese to fit inside shell, leaving rind on if desired.
Place loaf on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Spread remaining butter mixture on bread pieces.
Place on baking sheet and toast for 10-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
Use to dip in the cheese.
Serve with sliced fruit - grapes, apples and pears can also be used for dipping.
text: Recipe: Baked Brie In Bread. Ingredients: whole wheat bread, garlic, butter, brie cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. With sharp knife, cut just inside outer edge of bread leaving a shell. Do not cut through bottom. Gently remove insides of bread creating cavity for the cheese and cut into pieces for dipping. Mix garlic and butter. Paint inside of shell with mixture. Reserve remaining mixture. Trim cheese to fit inside shell, leaving rind on if desired. Place loaf on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until cheese is melted. Spread remaining butter mixture on bread pieces. Place on baking sheet and toast for 10-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Use to dip in the cheese. Serve with sliced fruit - grapes, apples and pears can also be used for dipping.

title: French Onion Pork Chops (Paula Deen)
instructions: preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
Beat eggs in shallow dish.
In another dish, combine breadcrumbs and soup mix.
Coat pork chops with with egg then with breadcrumb mixture taking care to coat both sides well.
Place on baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes flipping over halfway through.
text: Recipe: French Onion Pork Chops (Paula Deen). Ingredients: pork chops, onion soup, breadcrumbs, eggs. Instructions: preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Beat eggs in shallow dish. In another dish, combine breadcrumbs and soup mix. Coat pork chops with with egg then with breadcrumb mixture taking care to coat both sides well. Place on baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes flipping over halfway through.

title: Self-Rising Garlic Sticks
instructions: Preheat your oven to 450°F As the oven is preheating, place the 8 tablespoons butter in a 9" x 13" pan, and put the pan in the oven to melt the butter. When the butter is melted, remove the pan, and sprinkle in the minced garlic, stirring gently to distribute.
Stir together the flour and milk to make a soft dough. Gather the dough into a ball, and gently fold it over three or four times.
Place the dough on a well-floured surface, and roll/pat it into a 10" x 8" rectangle; it'll be fairly thin.
Cut the dough in half crosswise, into two 8" x 5" rectangles. Cut each rectangle into 16 sticks, about 5" x 1/2" each.
Lay the sticks close together in the pan, turning them to coat with the butter; you'll need to snug them right up against one another.

Bake the sticks for 15 to 20 minutes, until they're a light golden brown. Remove them from the oven, and as soon as you can handle them, gently pull them apart and place on a plate or in a basket. Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Self-Rising Garlic Sticks. Ingredients: butter, garlic, flour, milk. Instructions: Preheat your oven to 450°F As the oven is preheating, place the 8 tablespoons butter in a 9" x 13" pan, and put the pan in the oven to melt the butter. When the butter is melted, remove the pan, and sprinkle in the minced garlic, stirring gently to distribute. Stir together the flour and milk to make a soft dough. Gather the dough into a ball, and gently fold it over three or four times. Place the dough on a well-floured surface, and roll/pat it into a 10" x 8" rectangle; it'll be fairly thin. Cut the dough in half crosswise, into two 8" x 5" rectangles. Cut each rectangle into 16 sticks, about 5" x 1/2" each. Lay the sticks close together in the pan, turning them to coat with the butter; you'll need to snug them right up against one another. Bake the sticks for 15 to 20 minutes, until they're a light golden brown. Remove them from the oven, and as soon as you can handle them, gently pull them apart and place on a plate or in a basket. Serve warm.

title: Golden Baked Pork Chops
instructions: Heat oven to 375'. Spray 15x10x1 baking pan with nonstick cooking spray. In a shallow bowl, combine bread crumbs and margarine; mix well. In another shallow bowl, beat egg with a fork.
Dip pork into egg; coat evenly with bread crumb mixture. Place in sprayed pan.
Bake at 375' for 25 to 30 minutes or until pork is no longer pink, turning once halfway through baking.
text: Recipe: Golden Baked Pork Chops. Ingredients: progresso garlic, butter, egg, pork chops. Instructions: Heat oven to 375'. Spray 15x10x1 baking pan with nonstick cooking spray. In a shallow bowl, combine bread crumbs and margarine; mix well. In another shallow bowl, beat egg with a fork. Dip pork into egg; coat evenly with bread crumb mixture. Place in sprayed pan. Bake at 375' for 25 to 30 minutes or until pork is no longer pink, turning once halfway through baking.

title: Joshua'S Cheesy Eggs
instructions: Using wire whip, beat eggs until full and fluffy.
Pour into a hot skillet which you have sprayed with Pam or to which you have added a pat of butter.
Cook until eggs are done.
Add cheese and cook until cheese is melted.
Shake on the Cavendish's Greek seasonings and serve.
Add a sprig of parsley or cilantro to garnish.
You may also wish to add a little spice by spooning on some of Jack's Salsa Fresca.
Serve with toast or biscuits and jam.
Option: Substitute instead of Valveeta: Use 8 heaping tablespoons of cottage cheese or 8 (1/4 inch) slices Pepper Jack cheese.
text: Recipe: Joshua'S Cheesy Eggs. Ingredients: eggs, Velveeta cheese, parsley. Instructions: Using wire whip, beat eggs until full and fluffy. Pour into a hot skillet which you have sprayed with Pam or to which you have added a pat of butter. Cook until eggs are done. Add cheese and cook until cheese is melted. Shake on the Cavendish's Greek seasonings and serve. Add a sprig of parsley or cilantro to garnish. You may also wish to add a little spice by spooning on some of Jack's Salsa Fresca. Serve with toast or biscuits and jam. Option: Substitute instead of Valveeta: Use 8 heaping tablespoons of cottage cheese or 8 (1/4 inch) slices Pepper Jack cheese.

title: 14Th Century Roast Cheese!
instructions: take the whole cheese divide it into 4 parts & put it in front of the fire & roast before the fire,always turning the spit,or you can do the same thing without dividing the cheeses for the 4 small cheeses.
when roasted serve with toast.
text: Recipe: 14Th Century Roast Cheese!. Ingredients: swiss cheese. Instructions: take the whole cheese divide it into 4 parts & put it in front of the fire & roast before the fire,always turning the spit,or you can do the same thing without dividing the cheeses for the 4 small cheeses. when roasted serve with toast.

title: Grilled Cheddar And Apple Butter Sandwich
instructions: The sandwich is assembled in a cold, non stick skillet.
Butter one side of first slice of bread and place butter-side-down in skillet.
Place one slice of cheese on bread, then 1 Tablespoon apple butter in the center of the cheese.
Top apple butter with second slice of cheese.
Butter one side of second piece of bread and place butter-side-up on last slice of cheese.
Turn on heat to medium/low heat.
Toast each side*s l o w l y* and carefully to achieve a gooey inside and toasty-golden outside.
Eat and repeat!
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheddar And Apple Butter Sandwich. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, apple butter, butter. Instructions: The sandwich is assembled in a cold, non stick skillet. Butter one side of first slice of bread and place butter-side-down in skillet. Place one slice of cheese on bread, then 1 Tablespoon apple butter in the center of the cheese. Top apple butter with second slice of cheese. Butter one side of second piece of bread and place butter-side-up on last slice of cheese. Turn on heat to medium/low heat. Toast each side*s l o w l y* and carefully to achieve a gooey inside and toasty-golden outside. Eat and repeat!

title: Eggs In A Cloud
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Lightly toast bread slices and place on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil for easy clean up.
Top each slice of bread with a slice of ham; top ham with a slice of cheese.
Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites in a mixing bowl until fluffy and stiff peaks have formed.
Mound egg whites attractively atop each slice of bread, forming a well in the center. Slide an egg yolk into the center of each egg white well.
Place cookie sheet in the center of oven and bake for 10-15 minutes, or until the egg whites are lightly golden and egg yolks are just set (egg yolks will be over-easy to over-medium in doneness).
Remove cookie sheet from oven. Plate immediately and serve warm.
text: Recipe: Eggs In A Cloud. Ingredients: bread, ham, swiss cheese, eggs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Lightly toast bread slices and place on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil for easy clean up. Top each slice of bread with a slice of ham; top ham with a slice of cheese. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites in a mixing bowl until fluffy and stiff peaks have formed. Mound egg whites attractively atop each slice of bread, forming a well in the center. Slide an egg yolk into the center of each egg white well. Place cookie sheet in the center of oven and bake for 10-15 minutes, or until the egg whites are lightly golden and egg yolks are just set (egg yolks will be over-easy to over-medium in doneness). Remove cookie sheet from oven. Plate immediately and serve warm.

title: Ravioli In A Dish
instructions: Boil the ravioli according to package directions.
Drain ravioli and pour back into the pot you cooked them inches.
Gently stir the alfredo sauce into the ravioli.
Pour the ravioli into ungreased 7x11 inch casserole dish.
Pour the spaghetti sauce on top of the ravioli and spread around the top with a spoon (do not mix it).
Top the casserole with the parmesan cheese and bake in 375°F oven for 10-15 minutes until hot and bubbly and the cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Ravioli In A Dish. Ingredients: cheese ravioli, garlic, spaghetti sauce, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Boil the ravioli according to package directions. Drain ravioli and pour back into the pot you cooked them inches. Gently stir the alfredo sauce into the ravioli. Pour the ravioli into ungreased 7x11 inch casserole dish. Pour the spaghetti sauce on top of the ravioli and spread around the top with a spoon (do not mix it). Top the casserole with the parmesan cheese and bake in 375°F oven for 10-15 minutes until hot and bubbly and the cheese is melted.

title: Basic Cheese Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in saucepan.
Stir in flour until blended.
Stir in milk slowly.
When the sauce has thickened, reduce heat and stir in cheese.
Wonderful on steamed broccoli, cauliflower, asparagus or any veggie you want your child to try.
text: Recipe: Basic Cheese Sauce. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, grated cheese. Instructions: Melt butter in saucepan. Stir in flour until blended. Stir in milk slowly. When the sauce has thickened, reduce heat and stir in cheese. Wonderful on steamed broccoli, cauliflower, asparagus or any veggie you want your child to try.

title: Hasselback Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.

Put a chopstick or pencil along each long side of the potato so you don't cut through to the counter. Using a sharp knife, cut potatoes almost through cross-wise in 1/8" thick slices. Place in ice water to prevent darkening.
Drain well and put in shallow baking pan. Brush with butter (or drizzle).
Bake until tender- about 1-1/2 hours, basting occasionally with cream and pan drippings. Sprinkle with cheese in last few minutes.
text: Recipe: Hasselback Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter, whipping cream, swiss cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees. Put a chopstick or pencil along each long side of the potato so you don't cut through to the counter. Using a sharp knife, cut potatoes almost through cross-wise in 1/8" thick slices. Place in ice water to prevent darkening. Drain well and put in shallow baking pan. Brush with butter (or drizzle). Bake until tender- about 1-1/2 hours, basting occasionally with cream and pan drippings. Sprinkle with cheese in last few minutes.

title: French Onion Dip
instructions: Pour reduced cream into bowl.
Add soup mix and mix together.
Put in fridge for about 2 hours.
Serve with crackers and chips.
text: Recipe: French Onion Dip. Ingredients: cream, onion soup. Instructions: Pour reduced cream into bowl. Add soup mix and mix together. Put in fridge for about 2 hours. Serve with crackers and chips.

title: Cheese Sauce - Quick And Easy
instructions: Melt butter in pan and add the flour with some of the milk, so that its a paste. Add the remainder of the milk and all of the grated cheese, return to the heat and gradually bring to the boil, stirring constantly.
A non stick saucepan is good - or you can actually microwave it on medium or less, still stirring as much as possible to stop lumps . add a little salt if needed.
you can reheat in the microwave if necessary.
text: Recipe: Cheese Sauce - Quick And Easy. Ingredients: butter, milk, flour, cheese. Instructions: Melt butter in pan and add the flour with some of the milk, so that its a paste. Add the remainder of the milk and all of the grated cheese, return to the heat and gradually bring to the boil, stirring constantly. A non stick saucepan is good - or you can actually microwave it on medium or less, still stirring as much as possible to stop lumps . add a little salt if needed. you can reheat in the microwave if necessary.

title: Baked Creamy Chicken And Cornbread
instructions: Mix together soup and milk in a saucepan and add in the chicken and vegetables.
Heat until bubbly.
Turn into an 8x8" baking pan.
Prepare cornbread by blending together corn muffin mix, egg and milk.
Spread batter over chicken mixture carefully to cover all the way to the sides of the pan.
Bake at 425° for about 20 minutes or until browned on top.
text: Recipe: Baked Creamy Chicken And Cornbread. Ingredients: chicken, cream of chicken soup, milk, carrots, egg, milk. Instructions: Mix together soup and milk in a saucepan and add in the chicken and vegetables. Heat until bubbly. Turn into an 8x8" baking pan. Prepare cornbread by blending together corn muffin mix, egg and milk. Spread batter over chicken mixture carefully to cover all the way to the sides of the pan. Bake at 425° for about 20 minutes or until browned on top.

title: Bruschetta Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Mix undrained tomatoes with stuffing mix and garlic and set aside.
Place cubed chicken in a greased 11x7 baking dish, sprinkle with the basil and the cheese.
Top with stuffing mixture and bake for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Bruschetta Chicken. Ingredients: tomatoes, garlic, chicken flavor, chicken breasts, basil, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Mix undrained tomatoes with stuffing mix and garlic and set aside. Place cubed chicken in a greased 11x7 baking dish, sprinkle with the basil and the cheese. Top with stuffing mixture and bake for 30 minutes.

title: Quick & Easy Mini Meat Pies  #5Fix
instructions: Divide the mashed potatoes in half, returning one half to the bag to refreeze, thaw the remaining half and set aside.
Thaw and drain 1/2 bag (about 8 oz.) of the peas and carrots, and place in a medium bowl.

Over medium heat cook the sausage (the meat having been removed from the casing) and the onion in a nonstick skillet, stirring, until the sausage is browned and the onions are translucent, about 8 minutes. Drain off the grease and pour the meat-onion mix into a large bowl, set aside.
In the same pan, with any residual grease left in the pan, cook the peas and carrots for another 2 minutes.
Pour the peas and carrots into the meat mixture, then fold in the thawed (10 ounces portion) of the mashed potatoes.
With a rolling pin, roll out the biscuit dough and cut into 12 (3-inch) rounds.
Preheat oven to 350F degrees.
Put a generous tablespoonful of the filling in the center of each round, brush the edges with water, and fold in half. Seal the edges with a fork. Cut 2 small slits in the top of each meat pie.
Put the mini-pies on an un-greased baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes until they are golden brown. Remove, let cool slightly, and serve.
text: Recipe: Quick & Easy Mini Meat Pies  #5Fix. Ingredients: Potatoes, chicken-apple sausage, carrots, onion. Instructions: Divide the mashed potatoes in half, returning one half to the bag to refreeze, thaw the remaining half and set aside. Thaw and drain 1/2 bag (about 8 oz.) of the peas and carrots, and place in a medium bowl. Over medium heat cook the sausage (the meat having been removed from the casing) and the onion in a nonstick skillet, stirring, until the sausage is browned and the onions are translucent, about 8 minutes. Drain off the grease and pour the meat-onion mix into a large bowl, set aside. In the same pan, with any residual grease left in the pan, cook the peas and carrots for another 2 minutes. Pour the peas and carrots into the meat mixture, then fold in the thawed (10 ounces portion) of the mashed potatoes. With a rolling pin, roll out the biscuit dough and cut into 12 (3-inch) rounds. Preheat oven to 350F degrees. Put a generous tablespoonful of the filling in the center of each round, brush the edges with water, and fold in half. Seal the edges with a fork. Cut 2 small slits in the top of each meat pie. Put the mini-pies on an un-greased baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes until they are golden brown. Remove, let cool slightly, and serve.

title: Slow Cooker Beef-Tortellini Soup
instructions: In 3 1/2 to 4-quart slow cooker,add beef, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, sugar, tomatoes, and beef consomme in order listed.
Cover; cook on LOW heat setting 8 to 9 hours.
About 25 mins before serving, stir in basil, frozen tortellini and green beans.
Increase heat setting to HIGH. Cover;cook about 25 minutes or until beans are tender.
text: Recipe: Slow Cooker Beef-Tortellini Soup. Ingredients: beef stew meat, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, sugar, tomatoes, condensed beef, basil, frozen cheese tortellini. Instructions: In 3 1/2 to 4-quart slow cooker,add beef, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, sugar, tomatoes, and beef consomme in order listed. Cover; cook on LOW heat setting 8 to 9 hours. About 25 mins before serving, stir in basil, frozen tortellini and green beans. Increase heat setting to HIGH. Cover;cook about 25 minutes or until beans are tender.

title: Rice Krispies Treat Cereal
instructions: In a large bowl, add marshmallow fluff and melted butter. Stir to combine. Then add rice krispies cereal. Stir to incorporate and combine.
Pour this mixture onto a half sheet pan covered with parchment paper and sprayed with cooking spray. Press it down into the pan evenly and let cool.
Once cool, remove from the sheet pan and place on a cutting board. Cut into bite-sized pieces, then transfer the pieces to a cereal bowl.
Pour milk over cereal treat bites and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Rice Krispies Treat Cereal. Ingredients: marshmallow cream, butter, rice krispies. Instructions: In a large bowl, add marshmallow fluff and melted butter. Stir to combine. Then add rice krispies cereal. Stir to incorporate and combine. Pour this mixture onto a half sheet pan covered with parchment paper and sprayed with cooking spray. Press it down into the pan evenly and let cool. Once cool, remove from the sheet pan and place on a cutting board. Cut into bite-sized pieces, then transfer the pieces to a cereal bowl. Pour milk over cereal treat bites and enjoy.

title: Sand Pasta--Just For Kids
instructions: Cook the spaghetti and while cooking prepare the rest.
Put the olive oil in a fry pan.
Add the bread crumbs and rest of ingredients.
Mix well; should look like wet sand--if not add a little more of whatever you think you need to make it look like that.
Toss the warm sand with the pasta.
Sprinkle with cheese.
text: Recipe: Sand Pasta--Just For Kids. Ingredients: Italian breadcrumbs, basil, parsley, garlic salt, olive oil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook the spaghetti and while cooking prepare the rest. Put the olive oil in a fry pan. Add the bread crumbs and rest of ingredients. Mix well; should look like wet sand--if not add a little more of whatever you think you need to make it look like that. Toss the warm sand with the pasta. Sprinkle with cheese.

title: Inside-Out Manicotti
instructions: Beat egg and split (you will use only 1/2 an egg for an 8x8 pan).
Mix Ricotta cheese and 1 cup of mozzarella cheese.
Spread a thin layer of sauce on the bottom of your pan.
Layer 2 cups of pasta, then layer 1/2 of cheese mixture and a layer of sauce.
Repeat layers.
Add 1/2 cup of plain mozzarella cheese on top of last layer.
Cover and cook at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or freeze.
Defrost completely prior to cooking.
text: Recipe: Inside-Out Manicotti. Ingredients: ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, egg, pasta. Instructions: Beat egg and split (you will use only 1/2 an egg for an 8x8 pan). Mix Ricotta cheese and 1 cup of mozzarella cheese. Spread a thin layer of sauce on the bottom of your pan. Layer 2 cups of pasta, then layer 1/2 of cheese mixture and a layer of sauce. Repeat layers. Add 1/2 cup of plain mozzarella cheese on top of last layer. Cover and cook at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or freeze. Defrost completely prior to cooking.

title: Dorm Room Chicken Parmesan
instructions: Cook chicken as package directs, stopping just short, maybe about 1-2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, microwave the spaghetti sauce until hot.
Place the chicken patties on a serving plate.
Spread spaghetti sauce over chicken and sprinkle with the cheese.
Microwave until cheese melts and chicken is heated through.
text: Recipe: Dorm Room Chicken Parmesan. Ingredients: chicken patties, tomato, mozzarella. Instructions: Cook chicken as package directs, stopping just short, maybe about 1-2 minutes. In a separate bowl, microwave the spaghetti sauce until hot. Place the chicken patties on a serving plate. Spread spaghetti sauce over chicken and sprinkle with the cheese.
