Place one slice of bread on dinner plate, then sliced pork. Ladle a little gravy over pork, then top with second slice of bread. Spoon mashed potatoes on the side. Ladle rest of gravy over both, or just on top of the sandwich. Enjoy! Note: I used the leftover pork roast stock, milk, flour, butter, salt and pepper to make the gravy. There is no recipe for the gravy.

title: Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff
instructions: Place frozen chicken breasts on the bottom of the crock pot.
Mix the other ingredients together and pour over chicken breats.
Cook on Low for about 7-8 hours, or until chicken is no longer pink in the center.
Stir sauce before cooking and if you would like to thicken sauce, add flour or cornstarch.
Serve over rice or noodles.
text: Recipe: Crock Pot Chicken Stroganoff. Ingredients: chicken, cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, onion soup. Instructions: Place frozen chicken breasts on the bottom of the crock pot. Mix the other ingredients together and pour over chicken breats. Cook on Low for about 7-8 hours, or until chicken is no longer pink in the center. Stir sauce before cooking and if you would like to thicken sauce, add flour or cornstarch. Serve over rice or noodles.

title: Solo Sweet Onion Rice
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a small sauce pan that has a tight fitting cover.
Add garlic and onion, and stir until the onion becomes transparent, but stop before the garlic starts to turn brown.
Add rice and continue to sir until all the grains are coated in the olive oil.
Add the chicken stock, lower the heat to barely on, and cover with a tight fitting lid.
Keep pan over the low heat for exactly 15 minutes.
Remove from the heat but Do NOT peek, and let the pan sit for another 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Solo Sweet Onion Rice. Ingredients: olive oil, clove garlic, onion, rice, chicken stock. Instructions: Heat the olive oil in a small sauce pan that has a tight fitting cover. Add garlic and onion, and stir until the onion becomes transparent, but stop before the garlic starts to turn brown. Add rice and continue to sir until all the grains are coated in the olive oil. Add the chicken stock, lower the heat to barely on, and cover with a tight fitting lid. Keep pan over the low heat for exactly 15 minutes. Remove from the heat but Do NOT peek, and let the pan sit for another 10 minutes.

title: Grilled Creamy Cream Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Butter two slices of bread. Place one slice buttered side down on a piece of waxed paper. Cut slices of cream cheese approximately 1/2 inch thick to cover surface of bread. Put the other slice of bread on top, buttered side up.

Preheat a frying pan on the stove. Using a spatula, place your sandwich in the pan. Fry it uncovered until the bottom turns golden brown. (You can test it by lifting it up just a bit with the spatula.) Flip the sandwich over and fry the other side until it's golden brown. Remove the sandwich from the frying pan, cut it into four pieces with a sharp knife, arrange it on a place and serve it immediately.
text: Recipe: Grilled Creamy Cream Cheese Sandwiches. Ingredients: eggs, cream cheese, butter. Instructions: Butter two slices of bread. Place one slice buttered side down on a piece of waxed paper. Cut slices of cream cheese approximately 1/2 inch thick to cover surface of bread. Put the other slice of bread on top, buttered side up. Preheat a frying pan on the stove. Using a spatula, place your sandwich in the pan. Fry it uncovered until the bottom turns golden brown. (You can test it by lifting it up just a bit with the spatula.) Flip the sandwich over and fry the other side until it's golden brown. Remove the sandwich from the frying pan, cut it into four pieces with a sharp knife, arrange it on a place and serve it immediately.

title: Sun Dried Tomato And Goat Cheese Pasta
instructions: Cook the bowtie past per box directions.
Chop the sun dried tomatoes into small pieces (you can use more or less than 2-3).
Combine the goat cheese, chopped tomatoes and minced garlic in a separate bowl with a little olive oil (if desired) and a little of the water from the boiling noodles to create a paste like sauce.
Drain the noodles.
Add the goat cheese mixture to the noodles and stir.
Top with parmesan.
text: Recipe: Sun Dried Tomato And Goat Cheese Pasta. Ingredients: pasta, goat cheese, tomatoes, garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Cook the bowtie past per box directions. Chop the sun dried tomatoes into small pieces (you can use more or less than 2-3). Combine the goat cheese, chopped tomatoes and minced garlic in a separate bowl with a little olive oil (if desired) and a little of the water from the boiling noodles to create a paste like sauce. Drain the noodles. Add the goat cheese mixture to the noodles and stir. Top with parmesan.

title: Low-Fat Heavy Cream Substitute
instructions: Combine and in a blender.
puree for 5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Low-Fat Heavy Cream Substitute. Ingredients: cottage cheese, non-fat powdered milk. Instructions: Combine and in a blender. puree for 5 minutes.

title: Cheese Dip For Vegetables
instructions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients.
With electric mixer, mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until needed.
Serve with fresh vegetables for dipping.
text: Recipe: Cheese Dip For Vegetables. Ingredients: cheddar cheese, cream cheese, milk, garlic. Instructions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients. With electric mixer, mix well until all ingredients are combined. Serve immediately or refrigerate until needed. Serve with fresh vegetables for dipping.

title: Easy Creamy Garlic And Parmesan Rice
instructions: Heat the oven to 350°F or 180°C.
Put the rice, stock, cream, garlic and parmesan into an ovenproof casserole dish.
Cover with foil and put in the oven to cook for 40-45 minutes.
Check on the rice at 35 minutes- stir it gently and lay knobs of butter over the top. Re-cover and put back in the oven to finish cooking.
When the rice is done- stir, serve immediately and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Easy Creamy Garlic And Parmesan Rice. Ingredients: long grain rice, chicken, heavy cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, butter. Instructions: Heat the oven to 350°F or 180°C. Put the rice, stock, cream, garlic and parmesan into an ovenproof casserole dish. Cover with foil and put in the oven to cook for 40-45 minutes. Check on the rice at 35 minutes- stir it gently and lay knobs of butter over the top. Re-cover and put back in the oven to finish cooking. When the rice is done- stir, serve immediately and enjoy!

title: Mom'S Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400 degrees.
Coat a large glass baking dish (the size of a lasagna pan) in butter to prevent the potatoes from sticking.
In a bowl, mix the cream of mushroom, cream of chicken soup and milk and whisk to combine.
Start layering the soup mix, potatoes, onions and cheese ending in cheese (make sure the top layer is double the cheese as the layers of cheese in between).
Dot the top of the potatoes with butter and cover the pan with foil.
Bake the potatoes covered for an hour and a half or until somewhat fork tender. Take the cover off and cook them for an additional 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Mom'S Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: red potatoes, yellow onion, cheddar cheese, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, butter, milk. Instructions: Preheat your oven to 400 degrees. Coat a large glass baking dish (the size of a lasagna pan) in butter to prevent the potatoes from sticking. In a bowl, mix the cream of mushroom, cream of chicken soup and milk and whisk to combine. Start layering the soup mix, potatoes, onions and cheese ending in cheese (make sure the top layer is double the cheese as the layers of cheese in between). Dot the top of the potatoes with butter and cover the pan with foil. Bake the potatoes covered for an hour and a half or until somewhat fork tender. Take the cover off and cook them for an additional 30 minutes.

title: Magic Bullet Cream Cheese Schmears
instructions: Place the cheese, milk and any additions in the tall cup.
Fit the cross blade and blend until smooth.
Serve as a dip, celery filling, sandwich filling or jacket potato filling.
text: Recipe: Magic Bullet Cream Cheese Schmears. Ingredients: cream cheese, milk. Instructions: Place the cheese, milk and any additions in the tall cup. Fit the cross blade and blend until smooth. Serve as a dip, celery filling, sandwich filling or jacket potato filling.

title: Eggs Benedict
instructions: Fold ham slices in half; set side by side in a 9x13 pan.
Fold Swiss slices in half, layering on top of the ham to form a "nest".
Break eggs over the Swiss.
I usually break the yoke after it's in the pan so there's not a large clump of yoke.
Pour cream over the eggs.
Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Bake uncovered for 20-25 minutes at 375°F or until eggs reach desired doneness.
Let stand for 5 minutes.
Is usually served with English muffins but we're watching our carbs!
text: Recipe: Eggs Benedict. Ingredients: ham, swiss cheese, eggs, heavy whipping cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Fold ham slices in half; set side by side in a 9x13 pan. Fold Swiss slices in half, layering on top of the ham to form a "nest". Break eggs over the Swiss. I usually break the yoke after it's in the pan so there's not a large clump of yoke. Pour cream over the eggs. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese. Bake uncovered for 20-25 minutes at 375°F or until eggs reach desired doneness. Let stand for 5 minutes. Is usually served with English muffins but we're watching our carbs!

title: Perfect Basic Rice
instructions: In a saucepan with a good fitting lid bring chicken broth and butter to a boil.
Add rice and stir.
Cover and reduce heat to medium low. Cook for 20 minutes. DO NOT LIFT LID!
Remove from heat and fluff with fork. Serve!
text: Recipe: Perfect Basic Rice. Ingredients: long grain rice, chicken broth, butter. Instructions: In a saucepan with a good fitting lid bring chicken broth and butter to a boil. Add rice and stir. Cover and reduce heat to medium low. Cook for 20 minutes. DO NOT LIFT LID! Remove from heat and fluff with fork. Serve!

title: Creme Fraiche
instructions: Shake buttermilk and cream in a sterilized jar.
Let stand, loosely covered, in warm place, until thickened, 12-14 hours.
Stir well.
Refrigerate, covered, up to 10 days.
text: Recipe: Creme Fraiche. Ingredients: active culture buttermilk, heavy cream. Instructions: Shake buttermilk and cream in a sterilized jar. Let stand, loosely covered, in warm place, until thickened, 12-14 hours. Stir well. Refrigerate, covered, up to 10 days.

title: Creamy Chicken And Wild Rice Soup (Crock Pot)
instructions: Place chicken in 3 1/2- to 4-quart slow cooker. In large bowl, mix wild rice, onions, soup, broth and carrots; pour over chicken.
Cover; cook on Low heat setting 7 to 8 hours.
Stir in half-and-half. Increase heat setting to High.
Cover; cook 15 to 30 minutes longer or until hot.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken And Wild Rice Soup (Crock Pot). Ingredients: chicken thighs, wild rice, onion, condensed cream, chicken broth, garlic, carrots. Instructions: Place chicken in 3 1/2- to 4-quart slow cooker. In large bowl, mix wild rice, onions, soup, broth and carrots; pour over chicken. Cover; cook on Low heat setting 7 to 8 hours. Stir in half-and-half. Increase heat setting to High. Cover; cook 15 to 30 minutes longer or until hot.

title: Hot Dippity Dogs
instructions: Melt cheese.
Slice hot dogs into bite size pieces.
Put one piece of hot dog on each toothpick.
Let children dip hot dogs in cheese.
HOT DIPPITY DOG!
text: Recipe: Hot Dippity Dogs. Ingredients: Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Melt cheese. Slice hot dogs into bite size pieces. Put one piece of hot dog on each toothpick. Let children dip hot dogs in cheese. HOT DIPPITY DOG!

title: Baked Ham With Sweet And Baked Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Wash and dry potatoes.
Prick each potato with a fork on front and back of potato.
Place ham in the middle of roasting pan (without rack), or on large baking or cookie sheet.
Surround ham with lightly buttered potatoes.
Bake for 2 hours (this is an estimate; I usually follow the directions on the ham for cooking time).
Carve ham, serve with potatoes, and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Baked Ham With Sweet And Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: ham, baking potatoes, sweet potatoes, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Wash and dry potatoes. Prick each potato with a fork on front and back of potato. Place ham in the middle of roasting pan (without rack), or on large baking or cookie sheet. Surround ham with lightly buttered potatoes. Bake for 2 hours (this is an estimate; I usually follow the directions on the ham for cooking time). Carve ham, serve with potatoes, and enjoy.

title: Eggplant Meatballs
instructions: Wash, peel, and cube eggplant.
In a large pot, bring water to a full boil, add salt and the eggplant cubes.
Cook for about 4 minutes at full boil.
Drain the eggplant using a fine mesh colander.
Discard the liquid and let cool.
Place all the eggplant pulp in a cheese-cloth and remove as much excess water as possible.
Place in a large bowl.
Add grated stale Italian bread, 1 egg, 3 tablespoons Pecorino-Romano cheese, garlic and parsley.
Mix everything together with a wooden spoon at first.
Form eggplant mixture into little balls about the size of a golf ball.
Poke hole in center.
Fill with a cube of Caciocavallo cheese.
Press mixture over the filling.
Roll the ball lightly in the bread crumbs.
Place into hot oil and fry until brown on all sides and eggplant is cooked all the way through.
Place on paper towels to drain.
Serve with (spicy) tomato sauce on the side for dipping.
That's it!
text: Recipe: Eggplant Meatballs. Ingredients: eggplants, bread, eggs, pecorino-romano cheese, clove garlic, Italian parsley, bread, caciocavallo cheese, tomato sauce, extra-virgin olive oil. Instructions: Wash, peel, and cube eggplant. In a large pot, bring water to a full boil, add salt and the eggplant cubes. Cook for about 4 minutes at full boil. Drain the eggplant using a fine mesh colander. Discard the liquid and let cool. Place all the eggplant pulp in a cheese-cloth and remove as much excess water as possible. Place in a large bowl. Add grated stale Italian bread, 1 egg, 3 tablespoons Pecorino-Romano cheese, garlic and parsley. Mix everything together with a wooden spoon at first. Form eggplant mixture into little balls about the size of a golf ball. Poke hole in center. Fill with a cube of Caciocavallo cheese. Press mixture over the filling. Roll the ball lightly in the bread crumbs. Place into hot oil and fry until brown on all sides and eggplant is cooked all the way through. Place on paper towels to drain. Serve with (spicy) tomato sauce on the side for dipping. That's it!

title: Stupendous Slow Baked Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Place rack in center of oven. Preheat to 350 degrees.
Scrub sweet potatoes to remove any dirt. Place sweet potatoes on a foil-lined baking sheet or an oven-proof stone. Bake for one hour.
Remove sweet potatoes from oven, flip them to the other side, and bake another hour.
Once the second hour has passed, turn OFF the oven and keep the potatoes in the oven for another hour.
This long baking time produces a very sweet sweet potato that is very easy to peel. They are almost carmelized. (Take a bite before you add the butter, it really doesn't need it).
text: Recipe: Stupendous Slow Baked Sweet Potatoes. Ingredients: sweet potatoes, butter. Instructions: Place rack in center of oven. Preheat to 350 degrees. Scrub sweet potatoes to remove any dirt. Place sweet potatoes on a foil-lined baking sheet or an oven-proof stone. Bake for one hour. Remove sweet potatoes from oven, flip them to the other side, and bake another hour. Once the second hour has passed, turn OFF the oven and keep the potatoes in the oven for another hour. This long baking time produces a very sweet sweet potato that is very easy to peel. They are almost carmelized. (Take a bite before you add the butter, it really doesn't need it).

title: Spicy Cheeseburger Soup
instructions: In a 3 quart saucepan, brown beef; drain and set aside.
In the same saucepan, saute onion, carrots, celery, basil and parsley in 1 tablespoon butter until vegetables are tender about 10 minutes.
Add broth, tomatoes, potatoes and beef; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Meanwhile, in a small skillet, melt remaining butter.
Add flour; cook and stir for 3-5 minutes or until bubbly.
Add to soup; bring to a boil.
Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to low.
Add cheese, milk, salt and pepper; cook and stir until cheese melts.
Remove from the heat; blend in sour cream.
(makes 2 1/4 quarts).
text: Recipe: Spicy Cheeseburger Soup. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, shredded carrot, celery, basil, parsley flakes, butter, chicken broth, potatoes, flour, American cheese, milk, salt, Tomatoes, sour cream. Instructions: In a 3 quart saucepan, brown beef; drain and set aside. In the same saucepan, saute onion, carrots, celery, basil and parsley in 1 tablespoon butter until vegetables are tender about 10 minutes. Add broth, tomatoes, potatoes and beef; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Meanwhile, in a small skillet, melt remaining butter. Add flour; cook and stir for 3-5 minutes or until bubbly. Add to soup; bring to a boil. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Reduce heat to low. Add cheese, milk, salt and pepper; cook and stir until cheese melts. Remove from the heat; blend in sour cream. (makes 2 1/4 quarts).

title: Sour Cream Drizzle
instructions: In a small bowl, stir together. Transfer into a small resealable plastic bag. Snip off one corner of bag and squeeze onto tacos, potatoes, etc.
text: Recipe: Sour Cream Drizzle. Ingredients: light sour cream, milk. Instructions: In a small bowl, stir together. Transfer into a small resealable plastic bag. Snip off one corner of bag and squeeze onto tacos, potatoes, etc.

title: Hearty Sausage And Hash Browns Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 400.
CRUST:
Mix the beef base into the melted butter.
In medium bowl, combine potatoes, butter and bouillon.
Spoon potato mixture into 2 lightly greased 10 inch pie plate; press on bottom and up side to rim to form crust. Bake 25 minutes.
Reduce oven temperature to 350.
SAUSAGE:
In large skillet, cook sausage and onion; pour off fat.
FILLING:
In a bowl mix eggs, and cottage cheese. Stir in drained sausage and onion. Pour into prepared crusts. Top with shredded cheese or American cheese.
Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Let stand 5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Hearty Sausage And Hash Browns Pie. Ingredients: butter, beef bouillon granules, country sausage, onion, eggs, cottage cheese, American cheese, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400. CRUST: Mix the beef base into the melted butter. In medium bowl, combine potatoes, butter and bouillon. Spoon potato mixture into 2 lightly greased 10 inch pie plate; press on bottom and up side to rim to form crust. Bake 25 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350. SAUSAGE: In large skillet, cook sausage and onion; pour off fat. FILLING: In a bowl mix eggs, and cottage cheese. Stir in drained sausage and onion. Pour into prepared crusts. Top with shredded cheese or American cheese. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Let stand 5 minutes.

title: Old Fashioned Sicilian Succo
instructions: In a large pot mix together garlic, tomato sauce, tomato paste, parsley and basil. Bring sauce to a boil and then turn down the heat and simmer.
In a large bowl mix together the ground beef, ground pork, bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, garlic powder and parsley. Shape into large balls. In a skillet, fry meat balls in olive oil until brown.
Add to sauce mixture. Simmer over low heat for 4 hours.
text: Recipe: Old Fashioned Sicilian Succo. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, tomato sauce, tomato paste, fresh parsley, fresh basil, ground beef, ground pork, breadcrumbs, breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, parmesan cheese, garlic powder, fresh parsley. Instructions: In a large pot mix together garlic, tomato sauce, tomato paste, parsley and basil. Bring sauce to a boil and then turn down the heat and simmer. In a large bowl mix together the ground beef, ground pork, bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, garlic powder and parsley. Shape into large balls. In a skillet, fry meat balls in olive oil until brown. Add to sauce mixture. Simmer over low heat for 4 hours.

title: My Dad'S Sausage And Noodles
instructions: Brown sausage in a skillet, just like you would ground beef. Add onion and garlic to sausage as it cooks. When cooked, drain off fat. Set aside.
At the same time, cook egg noodles according to package instructions.
After draining noodles, return them to the pot and add the sausage, onion, garlic combination. Stir and mix well.
Serve, topping with parmesan cheese and seasoning with salt and pepper to taste (I like red pepper flakes).
text: Recipe: My Dad'S Sausage And Noodles. Ingredients: chub of country breakfast sausage, egg noodles, onion, garlic, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage in a skillet, just like you would ground beef. Add onion and garlic to sausage as it cooks. When cooked, drain off fat. Set aside. At the same time, cook egg noodles according to package instructions. After draining noodles, return them to the pot and add the sausage, onion, garlic combination. Stir and mix well. Serve, topping with parmesan cheese and seasoning with salt and pepper to taste (I like red pepper flakes).

title: Greek Diced Potatoes For Bbq
instructions: Mix everything in a bowl.

Grease a good quality of foil paper. Add the mixture of potatoes in it and seal it well. Cook about 20 minutes at medium heat on the bbq until potatoes are tender. The time is approximative. It can be 25 minutes. It's always my boyfriend who does it and he said 20-25 minutes. He doesn't really count the time.
text: Recipe: Greek Diced Potatoes For Bbq. Ingredients: potatoes, extra virgin olive oil. Instructions: Mix everything in a bowl. Grease a good quality of foil paper. Add the mixture of potatoes in it and seal it well. Cook about 20 minutes at medium heat on the bbq until potatoes are tender. The time is approximative. It can be 25 minutes. It's always my boyfriend who does it and he said 20-25 minutes. He doesn't really count the time.

title: Sunday Lunch Corned Beef Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350; butter a casserole pan.
Mix soup and milk, stirring to blend well.
Add beef and cheese to soup-milk; mix well.
Dump into casserole dish.
Sprinkle top with crushed potato chips or French-fried onions.
Bake for 30 minutes until bubbly.
text: Recipe: Sunday Lunch Corned Beef Casserole. Ingredients: pasta, cream of mushroom soup, milk, corned beef, cheddar cheese, potato chips, onions. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350; butter a casserole pan. Mix soup and milk, stirring to blend well. Add beef and cheese to soup-milk; mix well. Dump into casserole dish. Sprinkle top with crushed potato chips or French-fried onions. Bake for 30 minutes until bubbly.

title: Pesto Oil
instructions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees. In a oven safe bowl or dish combine all ingredients.
Set the dish on a baking sheet and cook in lower third of oven for one hour. Cool on a rack for 30 minutes.
Line a small strainer with several layers of cheesecloth and strain oil into a glass jar.
Covered loosely and refrigerated at all times, flavored oil keeps for one month.
text: Recipe: Pesto Oil. Ingredients: basil leaf, garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 300 degrees. In a oven safe bowl or dish combine all ingredients. Set the dish on a baking sheet and cook in lower third of oven for one hour. Cool on a rack for 30 minutes. Line a small strainer with several layers of cheesecloth and strain oil into a glass jar. Covered loosely and refrigerated at all times, flavored oil keeps for one month.

title: Penne Alla Napolitana
instructions: Fry onion and garlic for 2 minutes in the olive oil. Add the carrot and celery and fry another 2 minutes.
Add the tomatoes (with juice) and tomato paste. Simmer 1 hour.
Cook pasta according to directions. Drain.
Serve with sauce poured over the pasta. Garnish with basil and parmesan.
text: Recipe: Penne Alla Napolitana. Ingredients: olive oil, onion, garlic, carrot, celery, tomatoes, tomato paste, penne, fresh basil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Fry onion and garlic for 2 minutes in the olive oil. Add the carrot and celery and fry another 2 minutes. Add the tomatoes (with juice) and tomato paste. Simmer 1 hour. Cook pasta according to directions. Drain. Serve with sauce poured over the pasta. Garnish with basil and parmesan.

title: Buffet Eggs
instructions: In a large skillet or electric fry pan, blend together soup and milk.
Bring mixture to a simmer.
Gently drop 12 eggs in hot soup mixture.
Cover and cook 10 minutes on Low heat. DO NOT OVERCOOK.
Spoon eggs and sauce on toast.
Serve with home fries and ham.
Tips:.
Break eggs in a saucer before adding to soup mixture.
Cook as many eggs as needed.
Try with cream of mushroom soup.
text: Recipe: Buffet Eggs. Ingredients: eggs, cream of chicken soup, milk. Instructions: In a large skillet or electric fry pan, blend together soup and milk. Bring mixture to a simmer. Gently drop 12 eggs in hot soup mixture. Cover and cook 10 minutes on Low heat. DO NOT OVERCOOK. Spoon eggs and sauce on toast. Serve with home fries and ham. Tips:. Break eggs in a saucer before adding to soup mixture. Cook as many eggs as needed. Try with cream of mushroom soup.

title: Cream Of Chicken & Leek Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add leek, celery & carrot and cook for 6-7 minutes or until soft then remove to plate.
Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat until foaming, stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in cream and stock.
Return to heat and stir until mixture comes to the boil.
Return vegetables to saucepan.
Using a stick blender process until thick and creamy - or use a food processor.
Return to heat and add chicken and parsley heat through and serve.
text: Recipe: Cream Of Chicken & Leek Soup. Ingredients: olive oil, stalks celery, carrots, butter, flour, milk, chicken stock, chicken, flat leaf parsley. Instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add leek, celery & carrot and cook for 6-7 minutes or until soft then remove to plate. Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat until foaming, stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in cream and stock. Return to heat and stir until mixture comes to the boil. Return vegetables to saucepan. Using a stick blender process until thick and creamy - or use a food processor. Return to heat and add chicken and parsley heat through and serve.

title: Easy Bread Bowls
instructions: Thaw the bread, but don't let it start to rise.
Lightly grease the outside of six 10-ounce custard cups with shortening (do NOT use cooking spray); place cups upside down on cookie sheet.
Divide dough into 6 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball; pat into rounds.
Place rounds over the custard cups and brush dough with oil.
Sprinkle with basil and garlic salt.
Cover and let rise in warm place for about 20 minutes.
Bake in a 350 degree oven for 16-20 minutes or till golden brown.
Cool 5 minutes and remove from cups and place on a rack (inside of the bowl may be slightly moist).
To serve, place warm or cool bowls in shallow soup or pasta bowls and spoon your soup (or whatever you made) into them.
text: Recipe: Easy Bread Bowls. Ingredients: bread, olive oil, basil, garlic salt. Instructions: Thaw the bread, but don't let it start to rise. Lightly grease the outside of six 10-ounce custard cups with shortening (do NOT use cooking spray); place cups upside down on cookie sheet. Divide dough into 6 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball; pat into rounds. Place rounds over the custard cups and brush dough with oil. Sprinkle with basil and garlic salt. Cover and let rise in warm place for about 20 minutes. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 16-20 minutes or till golden brown. Cool 5 minutes and remove from cups and place on a rack (inside of the bowl may be slightly moist). To serve, place warm or cool bowls in shallow soup or pasta bowls and spoon your soup (or whatever you made) into them.

title: Pigs In A Blanket
instructions: Heat oven to 375.
Separate dough into 8 triangles.
Cut each triangle lengthwise into thirds.
Place sausage on shortest side and roll to opposite points.
Bake at 375 on ungreased cookie sheet until golden brown.
Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Pigs In A Blanket. Ingredients: sausage. Instructions: Heat oven to 375. Separate dough into 8 triangles. Cut each triangle lengthwise into thirds. Place sausage on shortest side and roll to opposite points. Bake at 375 on ungreased cookie sheet until golden brown. Serve warm.

title: How To Make Bread From Frozen Bread Dough
instructions: Regular method:
1. Coat loaf pan with non stick coating cooking spray, Place frozen bread loaf in pan and cover with plastic wrap coated sprayed with non stick cooking spray.
2. Let rise until double until loaf is 1" above pan approximately 4-7 hours . Carefully remove wrap.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Bake 20-25 minutes until bread is golden brown.
4 Remove from oven and place on wire rack to cool.
5. Brush top of loaf with melted butter or oleo, optional.
6. Let bread cool. Place bread on side for easier slicing.
Easy overnight method:
1. See #1 above.

2. Place in refrigerator 6-12 hours. Remove from refrigerator and let rise 2-3 hours, wrapped in plastic wrap that has been sprayed with non stick cooking spray until 1 " above pan and let rise 2-3 hrs until 1 " above pan. Remove wrap carefully.
3. See #3 through #6.
text: Recipe: How To Make Bread From Frozen Bread Dough. Ingredients: bread, butter. Instructions: Regular method: 1. Coat loaf pan with non stick coating cooking spray, Place frozen bread loaf in pan and cover with plastic wrap coated sprayed with non stick cooking spray. 2. Let rise until double until loaf is 1" above pan approximately 4-7 hours . Carefully remove wrap. 3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Bake 20-25 minutes until bread is golden brown. 4 Remove from oven and place on wire rack to cool. 5. Brush top of loaf with melted butter or oleo, optional. 6. Let bread cool. Place bread on side for easier slicing. Easy overnight method: 1. See #1 above. 2. Place in refrigerator 6-12 hours. Remove from refrigerator and let rise 2-3 hours, wrapped in plastic wrap that has been sprayed with non stick cooking spray until 1 " above pan and let rise 2-3 hrs until 1 " above pan. Remove wrap carefully. 3. See #3 through #6.

title: Ham, Cheese, And Onion Baked Potato Topping
instructions: Combine oil, ham, and onion in microwave-safe dish and microwave on high 1 minute.
Sprinkle cheese over hot split baked potato and microwave 30 seconds.
Spoon ham mixture over cheese and sprinkle with parsley.
text: Recipe: Ham, Cheese, And Onion Baked Potato Topping. Ingredients: olive oil, ham, onions, cheddar cheese, parsley. Instructions: Combine oil, ham, and onion in microwave-safe dish and microwave on high 1 minute. Sprinkle cheese over hot split baked potato and microwave 30 seconds. Spoon ham mixture over cheese and sprinkle with parsley.

title: Joyce'S Easy Dinner Party Parmesan Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 425.
Throw oil and butter into a glass baking dish and put in oven to melt. I usually use a little more butter and 'cut' it with drizzles of olive oil.
Rinse potatoes and pat dry.
Put potatoes into butter/olive oil mixture and turn to coat.
Liberally sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
As potatoes are baking (about 1/2 hour) keep turning and sprinkling with more parmesan until well coated.
Bake, sprinkle and turn 30 - 40 minutes until potatoes are crispy & golden brown.
text: Recipe: Joyce'S Easy Dinner Party Parmesan Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, olive oil, butter, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425. Throw oil and butter into a glass baking dish and put in oven to melt. I usually use a little more butter and 'cut' it with drizzles of olive oil. Rinse potatoes and pat dry. Put potatoes into butter/olive oil mixture and turn to coat. Liberally sprinkle with parmesan cheese. As potatoes are baking (about 1/2 hour) keep turning and sprinkling with more parmesan until well coated. Bake, sprinkle and turn 30 - 40 minutes until potatoes are crispy & golden brown.

title: Sausage Ring
instructions: Cook sausage and eggs together and set aside. Flatten each biscuit into 3 inch circles. Grease the bottom and up the sides of a tube pan. Put half of the biscuits on the bottom and 2 inches up the sides of the pan. Spoon sausage and eggs evenly on top of biscuits in the pan, then sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over sausage and eggs. Top with remaining biscuits.
Cook in oven at 350°F for 45 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before inverting pan onto a serving plate. Serve with sausage gravy.
text: Recipe: Sausage Ring. Ingredients: pork sausage, buttermilk, cheese, eggs. Instructions: Cook sausage and eggs together and set aside. Flatten each biscuit into 3 inch circles. Grease the bottom and up the sides of a tube pan. Put half of the biscuits on the bottom and 2 inches up the sides of the pan. Spoon sausage and eggs evenly on top of biscuits in the pan, then sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over sausage and eggs. Top with remaining biscuits. Cook in oven at 350°F for 45 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown. Let cool for 10 minutes before inverting pan onto a serving plate. Serve with sausage gravy.

title: Swedish Cream Cookies
instructions: mix all ingredients chill for 1-2 hours divide in 1/3's and roll out in 1/8 inch thick on a floured board, cut with a 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 cookie cutter or small glass (I use a shots glass).
I sprinkle with a mix of cinnamon and sugar mixture. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet after pricking each wafer with a fork 3-4 times.Bake at 350 for 6-8 minutes.
FILLING.
1/4 cup real butter.
1 egg yolk.
3/4 cup powder sugar.
1 teaspoons vanilla.
folor coloring of your chose.
text: Recipe: Swedish Cream Cookies. Ingredients: butter, flour, whipping cream. Instructions: mix all ingredients chill for 1-2 hours divide in 1/3's and roll out in 1/8 inch thick on a floured board, cut with a 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 cookie cutter or small glass (I use a shots glass). I sprinkle with a mix of cinnamon and sugar mixture. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet after pricking each wafer with a fork 3-4 times.Bake at 350 for 6-8 minutes. FILLING. 1/4 cup real butter. 1 egg yolk. 3/4 cup powder sugar. 1 teaspoons vanilla. folor coloring of your chose.

title: Swiss Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Spray a 9X13 pan with non stick spray. Line the bottom of the pan with half of the package of sliced of dried beef.
Layer chicken on top of dried beef.
Layer swiss cheese on top of chicken.
Layer with remaining dried beef.
Spread 16 ounce container of sour cream over the dried beef. I normally put dollops all around and then spread it carefully as though I were icing a cake.
Place in oven uncovered and bake for approximately 70 minutes. Depending on your oven, it may take a bit more time. The chicken will be fork tender.
text: Recipe: Swiss Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, beef, sour cream, swiss cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Spray a 9X13 pan with non stick spray. Line the bottom of the pan with half of the package of sliced of dried beef. Layer chicken on top of dried beef. Layer swiss cheese on top of chicken. Layer with remaining dried beef. Spread 16 ounce container of sour cream over the dried beef. I normally put dollops all around and then spread it carefully as though I were icing a cake. Place in oven uncovered and bake for approximately 70 minutes. Depending on your oven, it may take a bit more time. The chicken will be fork tender.

title: Akrotiri: Fried Halloumi
instructions: Slice the cheese about 3/8th inch thick, brush with olive oil on both sides and sear in a hot pan.
The cheese should be a golden color on each side. If you pan is hot enough, it should only take one to two minutes per side.
text: Recipe: Akrotiri: Fried Halloumi. Ingredients: halloumi cheese, olive oil. Instructions: Slice the cheese about 3/8th inch thick, brush with olive oil on both sides and sear in a hot pan. The cheese should be a golden color on each side. If you pan is hot enough, it should only take one to two minutes per side.

title: Garlic Spaghetti Sauce
instructions: To make spaghetti sauce, cook garlic in butter and olive oil over medium low heat just until the garlic is soft but not browned.
Stir in the parsley or basil and cook for 2 minutes (stirring constantly) until the herbs are limp but still green.
Pour sauce hot over cooked spaghetti, toss lightly to coat and top with parmesan cheese.
Serve with french bread and extra Parmasan cheese at the table.
This garlic sauce will cover 3/4-1 pound of spaghetti or other pasta.
text: Recipe: Garlic Spaghetti Sauce. Ingredients: garlic, butter, extra virgin olive oil, basil, parmesan cheese. Instructions: To make spaghetti sauce, cook garlic in butter and olive oil over medium low heat just until the garlic is soft but not browned. Stir in the parsley or basil and cook for 2 minutes (stirring constantly) until the herbs are limp but still green. Pour sauce hot over cooked spaghetti, toss lightly to coat and top with parmesan cheese. Serve with french bread and extra Parmasan cheese at the table. This garlic sauce will cover 3/4-1 pound of spaghetti or other pasta.

title: Three Ingredient Tomato Sauce
instructions: Pour both large cans of tomatoes into the pot.
Add the whole stick of butter.
Skin both onions, cut off the ends, and cut in half and put in the pot.
Stir with a long wooden spoon, bring to a boil, then set the heat on low and leave on for 1 1/2 hours.
Pour over your favorite pasta and top with fresh-grated Parmesan cheese.
text: Recipe: Three Ingredient Tomato Sauce. Ingredients: tomatoes, onions, butter, fresh-grated parmesan cheese. Instructions: Pour both large cans of tomatoes into the pot. Add the whole stick of butter. Skin both onions, cut off the ends, and cut in half and put in the pot. Stir with a long wooden spoon, bring to a boil, then set the heat on low and leave on for 1 1/2 hours. Pour over your favorite pasta and top with fresh-grated Parmesan cheese.

title: 2 Ingredient No Knead Beer Bread
instructions: Heat oven to 375°F You'll need a 9 x 5 x 3-in. loaf pan, lightly greased.
Put flour in a medium bowl. Add beer and stir with a rubber spatula just until flour is moistened completely. Scrape into prepared pan.
Bake 50 to 55 minutes until top is lightly browned, the sides pull away from the pan and pick inserted near center comes out clean.
Cool in pan on a wire rack 5 minutes, then turn out on rack to cool. Cut in 1/2-in. slices to serve. Makes great toast.
Cheddar-Scallion Variation Mix flour with 1 cup shredded sharp Cheddar, 1/2 cup thinly sliced scallions and 11/2 tsp poultry seasoning.
text: Recipe: 2 Ingredient No Knead Beer Bread. Ingredients: flour. Instructions: Heat oven to 375°F You'll need a 9 x 5 x 3-in. loaf pan, lightly greased. Put flour in a medium bowl. Add beer and stir with a rubber spatula just until flour is moistened completely. Scrape into prepared pan. Bake 50 to 55 minutes until top is lightly browned, the sides pull away from the pan and pick inserted near center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a wire rack 5 minutes, then turn out on rack to cool. Cut in 1/2-in. slices to serve. Makes great toast. Cheddar-Scallion Variation Mix flour with 1 cup shredded sharp Cheddar, 1/2 cup thinly sliced scallions and 11/2 tsp poultry seasoning.

title: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole
instructions: Bake chicken at 350 for 1-1 1/2 hours.
Cook dressing and spread in bollom of 13x9 inch pan.
Dice cooked chicken then spread over dressing.
Thin soup with milk and pour over chicken and dressing.
Bake at 350 for 30 minute.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, milk. Instructions: Bake chicken at 350 for 1-1 1/2 hours. Cook dressing and spread in bollom of 13x9 inch pan. Dice cooked chicken then spread over dressing. Thin soup with milk and pour over chicken and dressing. Bake at 350 for 30 minute.

title: Chicken Combo
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Boil the chicken 20-30 Shred then set aside.
While Chicken is boiling prepare both boxes of Rice-a Roni Chicken as directed on the box.
Transfer Rice-Roni to a large bowl.
Add Chicken.
Add Cream of Chicken.
Mix Well with a wooden spoon.
Place in a well greased 13 x 9 Baking pan.
Bake for 45 minutes at 400 degrees.
Take out of oven and add French's Onions on top and place back into Oven for 5 Minutes(watch carefully because French's onions will burn fast)or until Golden brown.
Let cool for 5 Minutes before serving.
text: Recipe: Chicken Combo. Ingredients: chicken, chicken rice, onions, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Boil the chicken 20-30 Shred then set aside. While Chicken is boiling prepare both boxes of Rice-a Roni Chicken as directed on the box. Transfer Rice-Roni to a large bowl. Add Chicken. Add Cream of Chicken. Mix Well with a wooden spoon. Place in a well greased 13 x 9 Baking pan. Bake for 45 minutes at 400 degrees. Take out of oven and add French's Onions on top and place back into Oven for 5 Minutes(watch carefully because French's onions will burn fast)or until Golden brown. Let cool for 5 Minutes before serving.

title: Parsley Buttered Carrots For The Microwave
instructions: Place butter in a small casserole.
Cook in a microwave at HIGH for 30 seconds, or until melted.
Add carrots and parsley flakes, stir and mix well.
Cook at HIGH for 6 to 8 minutes, or until tender.
text: Recipe: Parsley Buttered Carrots For The Microwave. Ingredients: butter, carrots, parsley flakes. Instructions: Place butter in a small casserole. Cook in a microwave at HIGH for 30 seconds, or until melted. Add carrots and parsley flakes, stir and mix well. Cook at HIGH for 6 to 8 minutes, or until tender.

title: Cheese Dip - Spicy
instructions: Cube the cheese and place into a microwave safe bowl.
Add the tomatoes and sausage.
Microwave for three minutes.
Stir then if needed microwave two more minutes.
Serve with tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Cheese Dip - Spicy. Ingredients: Velveeta cheese, Tomatoes, sausage. Instructions: Cube the cheese and place into a microwave safe bowl. Add the tomatoes and sausage. Microwave for three minutes. Stir then if needed microwave two more minutes. Serve with tortilla chips.

title: Sloppy George'S
instructions: cook beef and onion together in skillet until done and onions are to your liking.
add shredded cheese until melted.
toast bread or buns.
top with meat and gravy.
****french fries or tattor totts go great with this*****.
text: Recipe: Sloppy George'S. Ingredients: ground beef, onion, cheese, beef gravy, bread. Instructions: cook beef and onion together in skillet until done and onions are to your liking. add shredded cheese until melted. toast bread or buns. top with meat and gravy. ****french fries or tattor totts go great with this*****.

title: Fancy Chicken Tenderloins
instructions: Pound chicken tenderloin with a meat mallet(flat side)until thin.
Sprinkle each tenderloin with garlic powder.
Whip eggs with fork until fluffy.
Place chicken in egg mix.
Coat each tenderloin with bread crumbs.
Heat pan over med/high heat and add butter and olive oil.
When pan is heated fry each chicken tenderloin until golden brown.
Note: chicken will cook faster than usual due to it being tenderized to a thin piece.
Note: I like to pour my bread crumbs on a plate to coat, just so that I know all areas of tenderloin is covered with bread crumbs.
text: Recipe: Fancy Chicken Tenderloins. Ingredients: chicken, garlic, eggs, breadcrumbs, butter, olive oil. Instructions: Pound chicken tenderloin with a meat mallet(flat side)until thin. Sprinkle each tenderloin with garlic powder. Whip eggs with fork until fluffy. Place chicken in egg mix. Coat each tenderloin with bread crumbs. Heat pan over med/high heat and add butter and olive oil. When pan is heated fry each chicken tenderloin until golden brown. Note: chicken will cook faster than usual due to it being tenderized to a thin piece. Note: I like to pour my bread crumbs on a plate to coat, just so that I know all areas of tenderloin is covered with bread crumbs.

title: Easy Roasted Garlic
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F.
Remove the loose, outer layers of papery skin from the garlic bulb.
Slice off the top of the bulb, about 1/4 - 1/2. Cut enough to expose the top of the cloves but still leave the bulb intact.
Tear off a 12-inch square piece of foil, place the garlic bulb in the center and drizzle it with a Tablespoon of olive oil.
Bring the edges of foil up and around garlic, wrapping tightly, and bake in the oven at 325° F for 35 minutes.
Remove packet and carefully unwrap garlic.
Squeeze each clove of garlic out of it's skin and use as needed or store in a zip-top baggie in fridge or freezer for later use.
text: Recipe: Easy Roasted Garlic. Ingredients: head of garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Remove the loose, outer layers of papery skin from the garlic bulb. Slice off the top of the bulb, about 1/4 - 1/2. Cut enough to expose the top of the cloves but still leave the bulb intact. Tear off a 12-inch square piece of foil, place the garlic bulb in the center and drizzle it with a Tablespoon of olive oil. Bring the edges of foil up and around garlic, wrapping tightly, and bake in the oven at 325° F for 35 minutes. Remove packet and carefully unwrap garlic. Squeeze each clove of garlic out of it's skin and use as needed or store in a zip-top baggie in fridge or freezer for later use.

title: Head Cheese
instructions: Clean pork head, removing bristles, ears and eyes, jaws and bones of nose.
Cook with hocks, tongue, heart and beef.
Cook rinds in a sepatate container.
When well done, remove meat from bones and grind all through a fine plate.
Mis very well and add some salt and pepper with meat juice to make a good mix.
Place the ground results in a cheesecloth bag and top with a heavy weight to press out the "extra" fat.

When cold, cut in large slices, and make a mix of 2 cups of water and one cup vinegar, bring to a boil, then cool and pour over meat, letting stand in a crock pot for 5 days or until fully soaked through.
Serve with raw onion and vinegar for dinner, or herat and serve with fried potato -- .
text: Recipe: Head Cheese. Ingredients: pork, pork hock, pork, pork heart, extra pork rind, ground beef. Instructions: Clean pork head, removing bristles, ears and eyes, jaws and bones of nose. Cook with hocks, tongue, heart and beef. Cook rinds in a sepatate container. When well done, remove meat from bones and grind all through a fine plate. Mis very well and add some salt and pepper with meat juice to make a good mix. Place the ground results in a cheesecloth bag and top with a heavy weight to press out the "extra" fat. When cold, cut in large slices, and make a mix of 2 cups of water and one cup vinegar, bring to a boil, then cool and pour over meat, letting stand in a crock pot for 5 days or until fully soaked through. Serve with raw onion and vinegar for dinner, or herat and serve with fried potato -- .

title: True Believer Tomato Sauce
instructions: In a large pot, pour both cans of tomatoes and heat.
Add the whole stick of butter.
As the butter starts to melt, add the onions.
Stir and bring to a boil then set the heat to low.
Cook for 1 1/2 hours.
Serving suggestion: Pour over linguini and top with fresh grated Parmesan cheese.
text: Recipe: True Believer Tomato Sauce. Ingredients: onions, tomatoes, butter. Instructions: In a large pot, pour both cans of tomatoes and heat. Add the whole stick of butter. As the butter starts to melt, add the onions. Stir and bring to a boil then set the heat to low. Cook for 1 1/2 hours. Serving suggestion: Pour over linguini and top with fresh grated Parmesan cheese.

title: Beef Pesto Panini
instructions: Spread 1 side of each slice of bread with butter.
Place 4 slices of bread butter side down on 12-inch skillet.
Top bread with beef, pesto and cheese.
Top with remaining bread slice butter side up.
Cook sandwiches on skillet or grill over medium heat 4-5 minutes, turning once, until bread is crisp and cheese has melted.
Serve with spaghetti sauce if desired.
text: Recipe: Beef Pesto Panini. Ingredients: Italian bread, butter, basil pesto, deli roast beef, mozzarella cheese, spaghetti sauce. Instructions: Spread 1 side of each slice of bread with butter. Place 4 slices of bread butter side down on 12-inch skillet. Top bread with beef, pesto and cheese. Top with remaining bread slice butter side up. Cook sandwiches on skillet or grill over medium heat 4-5 minutes, turning once, until bread is crisp and cheese has melted. Serve with spaghetti sauce if desired.

title: Roasted Garlic Oil
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°F.

Place garlic in a deep casserole dish and cover with oil. Add extra if needed to cover all the garlic. don't use as much as called for if it won't all fit in your dish. This is not an exact recipe here. The main thing is that all the garlic is covered with oil.
Cook in the oven until the garlic is soft and squishy.
Remove from oven and let it cool a bit.
Remove garlic from the oil and set aside. Let the garlic cool completely in the fridge before you cover it.
Pour oil through a coffee filter and into a shallow pan and let it cool in the fridge before you bottle it.
Keep refrigerated and use the oil soon.
The garlic can be frozen if you want to hold on to it for awhile, but it will break down when it's thawed. I like to puree it into a smooth past and use it that way.
BE ADVISED! SOME LOCAL HEATH DEPARTMENTS CLAIM THAT THERE IS A RISK WHEN MAKING HOMEMADE FLAVORED OILS.
To help avoid any risk of illness I suggest that you treat this entire procedure like you are doing home canning. SANITIZE EVERYTHING THAT WILL COME IN CONTACT WITH FOOD!

I can't stress this enough. Botulism is nothing to mess around with. I have never had a problem with my flavored oils. Always smell them before you use them. If there is any doubt about the quality, TOSS IT! You can't be too careful.
Be careful and enjoy.

title: Perfect Crepes
instructions: Mix ingredients together with a whisk or in a blender. Cover and let stand for at least 1 hour. (If it is to stand longer, refrigerate.) Batter should be very light. It is OK to add up to 1/3 cup more milk just before cooking if it seems a bit thick.

In a 6-8 inch skillet, melt a little butter and then wipe gently to leave just a thin film. Pour 3-4 tablespoons of batter into the pan and quickly swirl to spread the batter all over the bottom of the pan. Cook crepe until it it just lightly brown around the edges and it becomes loose from the pan. Flip crepe and cook for a few seconds. Remove from pan and stack on a plate with each crepe seperated by a piece of waxed paper. You may need to rebutter the pan after a few crepes.

To fill, place a crepe browned side down, run filling down the center and roll the crepe over enchilada-like. Arrange with the seam side down in a casserole dish and bake according to whatever recipe you are using.
text: Recipe: Perfect Crepes. Ingredients: flour, milk, eggs, butter. Instructions: Mix ingredients together with a whisk or in a blender. Cover and let stand for at least 1 hour. (If it is to stand longer, refrigerate.) Batter should be very light. It is OK to add up to 1/3 cup more milk just before cooking if it seems a bit thick. Pour 3-4 tablespoons of batter into the pan and quickly swirl to spread the batter all over the bottom of the pan. Remove from pan and stack on a plate with each crepe seperated by a piece of waxed paper. You may need to rebutter the pan after a few crepes. To fill, place a crepe browned side down, run filling down the center and roll the crepe over enchilada-like. Arrange with the seam side down in a casserole dish and bake according to whatever recipe you are using.

title: Cream Cheese Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Peel and cook potatoes.
Mash potatoes with next 5 ingredients.
Spoon into 13x9 lightly greased baking dish.
Bake covered at 325 for 50 minutes.
(You can make ahead and refrigerate. Let dish come to room temperature for 30 minutes and then bake as directed.).
text: Recipe: Cream Cheese Mashed Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, cream cheese, sour cream, butter, milk, onion salt. Instructions: Peel and cook potatoes. Mash potatoes with next 5 ingredients. Spoon into 13x9 lightly greased baking dish. Bake covered at 325 for 50 minutes. (You can make ahead and refrigerate. Let dish come to room temperature for 30 minutes and then bake as directed.).

title: Grilled Blue Cheese-Crusted Tomatoes
instructions: Prepare 1 side of barbecue on high heat, leaving opposite side unlit if gas grill or without coals if charcoal grill. Mix breadcrumbs and olive oil in small bowl, mashing to coat. Cut top 1/4 inch from each tomato. Sprinkle tomatoes with salt and pepper. Top each with 1 Tablespoon blue cheese. Sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture.
Arrange tomatoes (topping side up) on unlit side of grill. Cover grill and cook tomatoes until slightly soft and cheese melts, about 13 minutes. Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Grilled Blue Cheese-Crusted Tomatoes. Ingredients: breadcrumb, olive oil, tomatoes, blue cheese. Instructions: Prepare 1 side of barbecue on high heat, leaving opposite side unlit if gas grill or without coals if charcoal grill. Mix breadcrumbs and olive oil in small bowl, mashing to coat. Cut top 1/4 inch from each tomato. Sprinkle tomatoes with salt and pepper. Top each with 1 Tablespoon blue cheese. Sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture. Arrange tomatoes (topping side up) on unlit side of grill. Cover grill and cook tomatoes until slightly soft and cheese melts, about 13 minutes. Serve immediately.

title: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Melt butter in a 13x9 pan.
Sprinkle with 3/4 of the package of dry stuffing mix.
Evenly sprinkle chicken over stuffing.
Mix sour cream, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup and the seasonings from stuffing mix.
Pour evenly over chicken.
Sprinkle with remaining dry stuffing mix.
Bake for 1 hour, uncovered.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole. Ingredients: butter, sour cream, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup, chicken breasts. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Melt butter in a 13x9 pan. Sprinkle with 3/4 of the package of dry stuffing mix. Evenly sprinkle chicken over stuffing. Mix sour cream, chicken broth, cream of chicken soup and the seasonings from stuffing mix. Pour evenly over chicken. Sprinkle with remaining dry stuffing mix. Bake for 1 hour, uncovered.

title: Baked Swiss Chicken And Stuffing
instructions: Heat oven to 400°F Prepare stuffing mix as directed on package; set aside.
Place chicken in 13x9 inch baking dish; top with cheese, soup and stuffing.
Bake 30 minutes or until chicken is done (internal temperature of 170F).
text: Recipe: Baked Swiss Chicken And Stuffing. Ingredients: chicken flavor, chicken, swiss cheese, cream of chicken soup. Instructions: Heat oven to 400°F Prepare stuffing mix as directed on package; set aside. Place chicken in 13x9 inch baking dish; top with cheese, soup and stuffing. Bake 30 minutes or until chicken is done (internal temperature of 170F).

title: Easy Sausage And Eggs
instructions: Heat a big, non stick skillet and sautee the sausages until brown.
Throw in the eggs and scramble them up.
When the eggs are cooked, top with cheese and tent with foil.
Serve.
text: Recipe: Easy Sausage And Eggs. Ingredients: sausage, eggs, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Heat a big, non stick skillet and sautee the sausages until brown. Throw in the eggs and scramble them up. When the eggs are cooked, top with cheese and tent with foil. Serve.

title: Easter White Cheese, Farmers Cheese
instructions: Make a cheesecloth bag that's 4 layers thick, and about 12" long by 6 1/2 " wide. The bottom 8" or so should taper to a point.
Place the cottage cheese into a colander, over a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and place a weight on top. Let it drain for 2 - 3 hours.
Using an electric mixer, mix all the ingredients until they're well blended.

Place the cheesecloth bag in a large bowl, with the seems facing out. Pack the mixture in the bag, to about 4" from the top of the cheesecloth. Twist the top, and tie it being careful not to get it so tight that you're forcing the cheese out of the pores of the bag.

Cover a sheet pan with plastic, then place the filled cheese bag on top. Place the bag so that the seem is in the center of the back, and front, it should almost look like a heart. One end of this sheet pan should be elevated to permit the cheese to drain. You can use either a bowl , or 2 coffee cups to do this. Place a bowl underneath the bottom of the cheese, to catch the liquid that will drain out.

Cover the cheese with another piece of plastic wrap, and set another sheet pan on top. Carefully place a weight on top of the top pan. But, be careful because the cheese is real soft and the top pan will want to slide off once the weight is on it.

Store in a cool place, or in your refrigerator for 3 days, being sure to check it so that the weight doesn't fall off. My Mom used to let this rest in the basement, because it was nice and cool, and she used a Belgian Brick that we would have to check now and then to insure that it didn't fall off.

When the cheese has dried out, cut off the cheesecloth bag with scissors, carefully so as not to break up the cheese. The cheese should be real firm to the touch. Place it flat on a platter, and store in your refrigerator until Easter morning.
If you haven't gotten enough moisture out of the cheese, you will have a cheese that won't stay together.
You can start this process a full week before Easter.

title: Sweet & Salty Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Spread a THIN coat of butter or mayonnaise on one side of each slice of bread.
On unbuttered side, layer cheese and dates.
Cover with the second slice, buttered side out.
Preheat a frying pan on med-high heat.
Place sandwich in pan.
Cook 2-3 minutes until golden and cheese has melted enough that you can flip it without everything slipping out.
Flip over, flatten with spatula if desired.
Cook another 2-3 minutes until golden.
text: Recipe: Sweet & Salty Grilled Cheese Sandwich. Ingredients: bread, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Spread a THIN coat of butter or mayonnaise on one side of each slice of bread. On unbuttered side, layer cheese and dates. Cover with the second slice, buttered side out. Preheat a frying pan on med-high heat. Place sandwich in pan. Cook 2-3 minutes until golden and cheese has melted enough that you can flip it without everything slipping out. Flip over, flatten with spatula if desired. Cook another 2-3 minutes until golden.

title: Savory Monkey Bread
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine butter and garlic powder with parsley; mix well. Separate biscuits and dip each into butter to coat.

In tube pan, place on layer of dipped biscuits in bottom, slightly overlapping each biscuit. Arrange remaining biscuits in zip-zag fashion, some towards center and some towards outside edge of pan. Use all biscuits in as many layers as needed.
Pour half of remaining butter over biscuits.
Bake, uncovered, in 375 degree oven 15-20 minutes.
Invert onto serving platter and pour remaining butter over bread. Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Savory Monkey Bread. Ingredients: butter, garlic, buttermilk. Instructions: In a medium bowl, combine butter and garlic powder with parsley; mix well. Separate biscuits and dip each into butter to coat. In tube pan, place on layer of dipped biscuits in bottom, slightly overlapping each biscuit. Arrange remaining biscuits in zip-zag fashion, some towards center and some towards outside edge of pan. Use all biscuits in as many layers as needed. Pour half of remaining butter over biscuits. Bake, uncovered, in 375 degree oven 15-20 minutes. Invert onto serving platter and pour remaining butter over bread. Serve warm.

title: Ice Cream Bread
instructions: Stir together ice cream and flour, stirring just until flour is moistened. Spoon batter into a greased and floured 8x4 inches loaf pan.
Bake at 350F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in center of bread comes out clean. Remove from pan, and cool on wire rack.
text: Recipe: Ice Cream Bread. Ingredients: cream, flour. Instructions: Stir together ice cream and flour, stirring just until flour is moistened. Spoon batter into a greased and floured 8x4 inches loaf pan. Bake at 350F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in center of bread comes out clean. Remove from pan, and cool on wire rack.

title: Buffalo Chicken Wing Dip
instructions: Mix all ingredients EXCEPT the shredded cheddar.
Put in a greased caserole dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake at 350 for 20 minute.
Serve with tortilla chips or any dipper you like.
text: Recipe: Buffalo Chicken Wing Dip. Ingredients: chicken, cream cheese, sour cream, chicken wing sauce, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix all ingredients EXCEPT the shredded cheddar. Put in a greased caserole dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese. Bake at 350 for 20 minute. Serve with tortilla chips or any dipper you like.

title: Irish Cheddar Potato Gratin
instructions: Coat a gratin/ovenproof dish with some butter. Layer the dish with sliced potatoes, finely chopped onions and grated Cheddar cheese. Build up layers until dish is full or you run out of potatoes. Finish off with a layer of cheese and a few dabs of butter.
Prepare a beef/chicken stock cube in 3/4 cup boiling water and pour over dish. Season with salt and pepper and bake in at 350 to 375 degrees F until finished, about 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
text: Recipe: Irish Cheddar Potato Gratin. Ingredients: potatoes, beef, spring onion, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Coat a gratin/ovenproof dish with some butter. Layer the dish with sliced potatoes, finely chopped onions and grated Cheddar cheese. Build up layers until dish is full or you run out of potatoes. Finish off with a layer of cheese and a few dabs of butter. Prepare a beef/chicken stock cube in 3/4 cup boiling water and pour over dish. Season with salt and pepper and bake in at 350 to 375 degrees F until finished, about 1 to 1 1/4 hours.

title: Too Tired, & Broke, Yellow Rice And Chicken
instructions: Follow package directions on rice, using liquid from chicken can (mixed with water) to comprise overall liquid measurement required for rice preparation.
Add chicken to water first, (if canned, break it apart in water) then continue to cook according to directions on rice package, on your stove top.
Serve, relax & enjoy.
text: Recipe: Too Tired, & Broke, Yellow Rice And Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, yellow rice. Instructions: Follow package directions on rice, using liquid from chicken can (mixed with water) to comprise overall liquid measurement required for rice preparation. Add chicken to water first, (if canned, break it apart in water) then continue to cook according to directions on rice package, on your stove top. Serve, relax & enjoy.

title: Blue Cheese French Bread
instructions: Mix butter, blue cheese and Parmesan cheese thoroughly.
Cut bread loaf into 1-inch slices.
Spread butter mixture on cut sides of bread.
Reassemble loaf.
Wrap in piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil; seal securely.
Heat on grill about 4-inches from medium coals for 15-20 minutes, or heat in 350 oven for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Blue Cheese French Bread. Ingredients: butter, blue cheese, parmesan cheese, bread. Instructions: Mix butter, blue cheese and Parmesan cheese thoroughly. Cut bread loaf into 1-inch slices. Spread butter mixture on cut sides of bread. Reassemble loaf. Wrap in piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil; seal securely. Heat on grill about 4-inches from medium coals for 15-20 minutes, or heat in 350 oven for 20 minutes.

title: Savory Spinach Rice
ingredients: cream of chicken and mushroom soup
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until cheese melts. Stir before serving.
text: Recipe: Savory Spinach Rice. Ingredients: cream of chicken and mushroom soup, cheddar cheese, green onion, rice. Instructions: Combine all ingredients in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until cheese melts. Stir before serving.

title: Ravioli Lasagna
instructions: Heat oven to 375 degrees.
Coat a 9-inch square baking dish and a sheet of foil with non-stick spray.
Put pasta sauce in bowl; stir in 1/2 cup water.
Spread 1 cup sauce in dish.
Top with 20 ravioli, flat sides up and just touching each other.
Spread with 3/4 cup sauce; sprinkle with 1/2 cup cheese.
REPEAT layers once.
Top with remaining ravioli, sauce and cheese.
(you should have 3 layers) Cover tightly with foil sprayed side down or use Release foil.
Bake on a sheet of foil (to catch any drips) 1 hour or until bubbly around edges.
Uncover and bake 5 minutes until cheese is barely golden.
To Freeze: Place in rigid container and freeze.
To Heat: Microwave on medium power until heated through.
Note: More sauce maybe needed when reheating.
text: Recipe: Ravioli Lasagna. Ingredients: pasta sauce, Italian cheese. Instructions: Heat oven to 375 degrees. Coat a 9-inch square baking dish and a sheet of foil with non-stick spray. Put pasta sauce in bowl; stir in 1/2 cup water. Spread 1 cup sauce in dish. Top with 20 ravioli, flat sides up and just touching each other. Spread with 3/4 cup sauce; sprinkle with 1/2 cup cheese. REPEAT layers once. Top with remaining ravioli, sauce and cheese. (you should have 3 layers) Cover tightly with foil sprayed side down or use Release foil. Bake on a sheet of foil (to catch any drips) 1 hour or until bubbly around edges. Uncover and bake 5 minutes until cheese is barely golden. To Freeze: Place in rigid container and freeze. To Heat: Microwave on medium power until heated through. Note: More sauce maybe needed when reheating.

title: Cream Cheese Pasta Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Cook pasta according to directions on the box, set aside.
Brown the ground beef, onion, and garlic until cooked through.
In a bowl, combine 8 ounces softened cream cheese, 1 cup sour cream, and one egg. Blend thoroughly.
Add spaghetti sauce to the cheese mixture. Blend thoroughly.
Add one cup shredded Italian cheese. Mix together.
In a casserole dish, combine 13.25 oz (one box) whole wheat rotini, ground beef mixture, and sauce blend.
Top with remaining 1/2 cup Italian Cheese.
Bake uncovered for 25-35 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly.
text: Recipe: Cream Cheese Pasta Bake. Ingredients: ground beef, whole wheat pasta, low-fat sour cream, cream cheese, egg, spaghetti sauce, onion, garlic, Italian cheese blend. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Cook pasta according to directions on the box, set aside. Brown the ground beef, onion, and garlic until cooked through. In a bowl, combine 8 ounces softened cream cheese, 1 cup sour cream, and one egg. Blend thoroughly. Add spaghetti sauce to the cheese mixture. Blend thoroughly. Add one cup shredded Italian cheese. Mix together. In a casserole dish, combine 13.25 oz (one box) whole wheat rotini, ground beef mixture, and sauce blend. Top with remaining 1/2 cup Italian Cheese. Bake uncovered for 25-35 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly.

title: London Broil
instructions: Mix the soups together and pour over the meat in a baking dish.
Cover and bake for 2 1/2- 3 hours at 325 degrees or until well done at 170 degrees.
text: Recipe: London Broil. Ingredients: beef, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup. Instructions: Mix the soups together and pour over the meat in a baking dish. Cover and bake for 2 1/2- 3 hours at 325 degrees or until well done at 170 degrees.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches For Many
instructions: Butter each side of the bread slices with 1 t butter or margarine, and place on a baking sheet.
Place cheese on each slice of bread.
Top with remaining bread.
Bake in preheated oven for 6 to 8 minutes at 450.
Flip the sandwiches, and bake an additional 6 to 8 minutes, or until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches For Many. Ingredients: bread, cheddar cheese, butter. Instructions: Butter each side of the bread slices with 1 t butter or margarine, and place on a baking sheet. Place cheese on each slice of bread. Top with remaining bread. Bake in preheated oven for 6 to 8 minutes at 450. Flip the sandwiches, and bake an additional 6 to 8 minutes, or until golden brown.

title: Easy Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350.
Layer potatoes and onions in a greased casserole dish.
Mix soups and milk, pour over potato/onion layers.
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or till tender.
text: Recipe: Easy Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, condensed cream, condensed cream, milk. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350. Layer potatoes and onions in a greased casserole dish. Mix soups and milk, pour over potato/onion layers. Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or till tender.

title: Basil Oil
instructions: Wash Basil.
Let basil dry thoroughly and then pat it with kitchen paper to dry it more (very important).
Put basil in bottles with a GOOD seal (I use german beer bottles with a porcelain, rubber and metal top) and cover with oil.
Leave for at least 2 weeks.
Use to flavour pasta, salads, potatoes, etc.
text: Recipe: Basil Oil. Ingredients: virgin olive oil, fresh basil. Instructions: Wash Basil. Let basil dry thoroughly and then pat it with kitchen paper to dry it more (very important). Put basil in bottles with a GOOD seal (I use german beer bottles with a porcelain, rubber and metal top) and cover with oil. Leave for at least 2 weeks. Use to flavour pasta, salads, potatoes, etc.

title: Chinese Chicken And Corn Soup
instructions: Saute or poach chicken breasts, cool, chop, set aside.
Saute in same pan, celery and onion in 1 Tbl. butter til tender.
In large pot add chicken, sauted vegetables, broth, bouillon, and parsley.
Bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer 5 minutes.
Drizzle in beaten eggs, stirring briskly, til it shreds.
Stir in corn, heat through.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
text: Recipe: Chinese Chicken And Corn Soup. Ingredients: chicken breasts, celery, onion, butter, chicken broth, chicken bouillon, fresh parsley, cream-style, eggs, salt. Instructions: Saute or poach chicken breasts, cool, chop, set aside. Saute in same pan, celery and onion in 1 Tbl. butter til tender. In large pot add chicken, sauted vegetables, broth, bouillon, and parsley. Bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer 5 minutes. Drizzle in beaten eggs, stirring briskly, til it shreds. Stir in corn, heat through. Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Four Cheese Stuffed Chicken Breasts
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine cheeses, parsley and crumbs.
Rinse and pat chicken breasts dry.
Bone breasts without removing skins; halve breasts carefully.
Separate skin from flesh of each breast, leaving one side attached.
Spoon cheese mixture between skin and flesh of each breast.
Tuck skin edges under the breast; secure with wooden picks.
Place breasts, skin side up, in a shallow baking dish, brush with melted butter.
Bake uncovered in a 350°F.
oven 40 to 45 minutes, basting occasionally with juices.
text: Recipe: Four Cheese Stuffed Chicken Breasts. Ingredients: ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, provolone cheese, parmesan cheese, parsley, breadcrumbs, chicken breasts, butter. Instructions: In a medium bowl, combine cheeses, parsley and crumbs. Rinse and pat chicken breasts dry. Bone breasts without removing skins; halve breasts carefully. Separate skin from flesh of each breast, leaving one side attached. Spoon cheese mixture between skin and flesh of each breast. Tuck skin edges under the breast; secure with wooden picks. Place breasts, skin side up, in a shallow baking dish, brush with melted butter. Bake uncovered in a 350°F. oven 40 to 45 minutes, basting occasionally with juices.

title: Light Cream Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 500 degrees F.
Mix flour with half-and-half until combined. The mixture will be sticky, which is normal.
Turn out dough onto a heavily-floured surface. Fold dough over on itself, dusting with flour as needed to keep it from sticking. Knead several times in this manner.
Roll dough out into a 1/2 inch thick sheet. Use 3 inch ring mold to cut circles out of the dough. Place on baking sheet covered with non-stick cooking spray.
Bake for 8 minutes or until golden brown. Serve while hot with butter or honey.
text: Recipe: Light Cream Biscuits. Ingredients: flour. Instructions: Preheat oven to 500 degrees F. Mix flour with half-and-half until combined. The mixture will be sticky, which is normal. Turn out dough onto a heavily-floured surface. Fold dough over on itself, dusting with flour as needed to keep it from sticking. Knead several times in this manner. Roll dough out into a 1/2 inch thick sheet. Use 3 inch ring mold to cut circles out of the dough. Place on baking sheet covered with non-stick cooking spray. Bake for 8 minutes or until golden brown. Serve while hot with butter or honey.

title: Breakfast Queso--Not Just For Breakfast!
instructions: Brown the sausage chopping it into tiny pieces as it cooks. While the sausage is cooking, cut the cheese bricks into cubes.
Once the sausage is browned and crumbly, toss in the cheese, and pour in the rotel.
Cook and stir until cheese is melted and mixture is bubbly. Serve warm with flour tortillas and/or tostada chips!
*Reduce the fat/calories by using less sausage and reduced or fat free cream cheese.
text: Recipe: Breakfast Queso--Not Just For Breakfast!. Ingredients: sausage, cream cheese, tomatoes. Instructions: Brown the sausage chopping it into tiny pieces as it cooks. While the sausage is cooking, cut the cheese bricks into cubes. Once the sausage is browned and crumbly, toss in the cheese, and pour in the rotel. Cook and stir until cheese is melted and mixture is bubbly. Serve warm with flour tortillas and/or tostada chips! *Reduce the fat/calories by using less sausage and reduced or fat free cream cheese.

title: Alfredo Sauce (Pasta Factory)
instructions: Melt the cream cheese and butter over medium heat.
Remove from heat and add the flour and the whipping cream. Mix well.
Stir in 1 1/2 cups whole milk and whisk until smooth.
Return to medium heat and add parmesan cheese and 1 cup whole milk.
Stir until warm and serve over pasta.
text: Recipe: Alfredo Sauce (Pasta Factory). Ingredients: butter, cream cheese, flour, heavy whipping cream, milk, parmesan cheese, milk. Instructions: Melt the cream cheese and butter over medium heat. Remove from heat and add the flour and the whipping cream. Mix well. Stir in 1 1/2 cups whole milk and whisk until smooth. Return to medium heat and add parmesan cheese and 1 cup whole milk. Stir until warm and serve over pasta.

title: Healthy Creamy Parmesan Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Add broth; cover. Bring to a boil on high heat; simmer on medium heat 15 minutes, stirring after 8 minutes. Uncover; stir potatoes. Simmer, uncovered for 5 to 6 minutes or until potatoes are tender and most of broth is absorbed.
Add cream cheese spread. Reduce heat to low. Mash potatoes slightly until cream cheese is melted. Add sour cream and Parmesan; mash until potatoes are smooth and heated through.
text: Recipe: Healthy Creamy Parmesan Mashed Potatoes. Ingredients: red potatoes, chicken broth, light cream cheese spread, nonfat sour cream, parmesan cheese. Instructions: Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Add broth; cover. Bring to a boil on high heat; simmer on medium heat 15 minutes, stirring after 8 minutes. Uncover; stir potatoes. Simmer, uncovered for 5 to 6 minutes or until potatoes are tender and most of broth is absorbed. Add cream cheese spread. Reduce heat to low. Mash potatoes slightly until cream cheese is melted. Add sour cream and Parmesan; mash until potatoes are smooth and heated through.

title: Cheesy Crock Pot Au Gratin Potatoes
instructions: Spray the bottom of crock pot with non-stick spray. I use Pam when I have it on hand or I use one of the new crock pot cooking liners for quick cleanup.
Spread the potatoes on the bottom of crock pot.
Simmer all remaining ingredients just until cheese is melted and well incorporated. Do not bring to a boil.
Pour cheese mixture over top of potatoes.
Cover and cook on low setting for 7-9 hours or on high setting for 3-4 hours. Cooking time may vary depending on individual crock pots.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Crock Pot Au Gratin Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, Velveeta cheese, Campbell's Cream, cream, butter, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Spray the bottom of crock pot with non-stick spray. I use Pam when I have it on hand or I use one of the new crock pot cooking liners for quick cleanup. Spread the potatoes on the bottom of crock pot. Simmer all remaining ingredients just until cheese is melted and well incorporated. Do not bring to a boil. Pour cheese mixture over top of potatoes. Cover and cook on low setting for 7-9 hours or on high setting for 3-4 hours. Cooking time may vary depending on individual crock pots.

title: Pasta Omelette
instructions: Heat the oil in a small frying pan and fry the garlic and pasta for 2-3 mins until heated through.
Beat together the eggs, milk, parsley and a little seasoning. Pour over the pasta and cook gently for 3-4 mins until the egg is almost set on top.
Sprinkle the cheese over and place under a hot grill for 2-3 mins until golden and bubbly.
text: Recipe: Pasta Omelette. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, pasta, eggs, milk, parsley, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Heat the oil in a small frying pan and fry the garlic and pasta for 2-3 mins until heated through. Beat together the eggs, milk, parsley and a little seasoning. Pour over the pasta and cook gently for 3-4 mins until the egg is almost set on top. Sprinkle the cheese over and place under a hot grill for 2-3 mins until golden and bubbly.

title: Carrot Rice Casserole
instructions: Melt butter.
Add grated carrots and onions; saute for 3-4 minutes.
Stir in cheese, cooked rice and eggs.
Pour the mixture into a greased 11x13 baking dish.
Bake @ 350 for 20 minutes.
text: Recipe: Carrot Rice Casserole. Ingredients: butter, carrot, onion, mozzarella cheese, rice, eggs. Instructions: Melt butter. Add grated carrots and onions; saute for 3-4 minutes. Stir in cheese, cooked rice and eggs. Pour the mixture into a greased 11x13 baking dish. Bake @ 350 for 20 minutes.

title: Philly Sauce Supreme
instructions: Heat milk and cream cheese over low heat stirring.
until smooth. Blend in remaining ingredients. Serve over.
hot vegetables or baked potatoes.
text: Recipe: Philly Sauce Supreme. Ingredients: milk, cream cheese, parmesan cheese, onion salt. Instructions: Heat milk and cream cheese over low heat stirring. until smooth. Blend in remaining ingredients. Serve over. hot vegetables or baked potatoes.

title: Rice Penguins
