Sift the flour into a large bowl, then add the butter and rub in lightly using fingertips until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture. Combine the milk and 1/2 cup water. Reserve one tbsp of the mixture and pour the remainder into the well in the flour. Using a butter knife, mix quickly to a soft, sticky dough. Do not over-mix. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead lightly. Press or roll out to form a circle, about 3/4 inch thick. Cut into rounds using a floured pastry cutter. Place the scones close together on the prepared baking sheet. Brush with the reserved milk mixture, then bake for 10-12 mins, until the scones sound hollow when tapped. Allow to cool on a wire rack. Serve with butter and jam.

title: Chicken Parmigiana
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Heat olive oil and butter in a large skillet on medium heat. Cook chicken for 2-3 mins each side, until golden. Drain on paper towels. Transfer to a shallow ovenproof dish.
Sprinkle with half the mozzarella. Spoon pasta sauce over chicken. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella.
Bake for 8-10 mins, until bubbly and golden. Garnish with basil.
text: Recipe: Chicken Parmigiana. Ingredients: olive oil, butter, chicken cutlets, mozzarella cheese, pasta sauce, Fresh basil. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Heat olive oil and butter in a large skillet on medium heat. Cook chicken for 2-3 mins each side, until golden. Drain on paper towels. Transfer to a shallow ovenproof dish. Sprinkle with half the mozzarella. Spoon pasta sauce over chicken. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella. Bake for 8-10 mins, until bubbly and golden. Garnish with basil.

title: Tuna And Chili Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling, salted water according to package directions. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup of the cooking liquid.
Meanwhile, drain the tuna, reserving 2 tbsp of the oil. Heat the oil in a medium saucepan on medium heat. Cook the garlic and chili pepper, stirring, until fragrant.
Add the undrained tomatoes, tuna and reserved cooking liquid to the pan; simmer until the liquid has reduced slightly. Combine the pasta and sauce in large bowl and serve.
text: Recipe: Tuna And Chili Pasta. Ingredients: pasta, garlic, tomatoes. Instructions: Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling, salted water according to package directions. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup of the cooking liquid. Meanwhile, drain the tuna, reserving 2 tbsp of the oil. Heat the oil in a medium saucepan on medium heat. Cook the garlic and chili pepper, stirring, until fragrant. Add the undrained tomatoes, tuna and reserved cooking liquid to the pan; simmer until the liquid has reduced slightly. Combine the pasta and sauce in large bowl and serve.

title: Sausage And Tomato Omelettes
instructions: Heat an 8-inch nonstick frying pan on medium. For each omelette, heat 1 tsp oil, swirling to coat base of pan. Add 1/4 of sausage, tomato and potato. Saute 2-3 mins.

In a medium bowl, whisk 2 eggs and season. Pour into pan with sausage mixture and cook a few seconds, until just beginning to set. Move cooked egg towards the center of the pan with a heatproof spatula, tilting pan to allow uncooked egg to run to edges. Repeat until omelette is set, 1-2 mins. Sprinkle with 1/4 of cheese and parsley and cook a few more seconds, then fold omelette to cover filling. Slide onto a plate.
To serve, sprinkle omelettes with extra parsley and accompany with hot buttered toast.
text: Recipe: Sausage And Tomato Omelettes. Ingredients: olive oil, tomatoes, potatoes, eggs, Cheddar cheese, parsley, crusty bread, butter. Instructions: Heat an 8-inch nonstick frying pan on medium. For each omelette, heat 1 tsp oil, swirling to coat base of pan. Add 1/4 of sausage, tomato and potato. Saute 2-3 mins. In a medium bowl, whisk 2 eggs and season. Pour into pan with sausage mixture and cook a few seconds, until just beginning to set. Move cooked egg towards the center of the pan with a heatproof spatula, tilting pan to allow uncooked egg to run to edges. Repeat until omelette is set, 1-2 mins. Sprinkle with 1/4 of cheese and parsley and cook a few more seconds, then fold omelette to cover filling. Slide onto a plate. To serve, sprinkle omelettes with extra parsley and accompany with hot buttered toast.

title: Asparagus, Tomato, Ricotta And Basil Frittata
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F.
Whisk the eggs, milk and cheese in a large bowl and season.

Heat an oiled 9-inch ovenproof skillet on medium heat. Add the egg mixture to the pan, scraping the edges inward for about 3 mins. Top with basil, ricotta, asparagus and tomatoes. Cook the frittata for about 2 mins or until the bottom and edges are set.

Transfer the pan to the oven and bake the frittata, uncovered, for about 15 mins, or until set and lightly browned. Let stand for 5 mins. Slide the frittata onto a serving plate and cut into 8 pieces.
text: Recipe: Asparagus, Tomato, Ricotta And Basil Frittata. Ingredients: eggs, milk, Cheddar cheese, fresh basil, ricotta cheese, grape tomatoes. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F. Whisk the eggs, milk and cheese in a large bowl and season. Heat an oiled 9-inch ovenproof skillet on medium heat. Add the egg mixture to the pan, scraping the edges inward for about 3 mins. Top with basil, ricotta, asparagus and tomatoes. Cook the frittata for about 2 mins or until the bottom and edges are set. Transfer the pan to the oven and bake the frittata, uncovered, for about 15 mins, or until set and lightly browned. Let stand for 5 mins. Slide the frittata onto a serving plate and cut into 8 pieces.

title: Roasted Eggplant, Ham And Chorizo Bagel Sandwich
instructions: Place the eggplant slices in a colander and sprinkle them with salt. Leave for 30 mins to draw out the excess juices. Rinse in cold water and pat dry.
Heat a grill pan until it's smoking hot. Brush the eggplant with oil and cook in batches for 4 mins each side until tender. Allow to cool.
Split the bagels and thickly spread the bases with cream cheese. Top with eggplant slices, ham, chorizo, tomatoes and basil. Season to taste and top with the other half of the bagels.
text: Recipe: Roasted Eggplant, Ham And Chorizo Bagel Sandwich. Ingredients: eggplant, olive oil, onion, cream cheese, ham, sausage, tomatoes, basil. Instructions: Place the eggplant slices in a colander and sprinkle them with salt. Leave for 30 mins to draw out the excess juices. Rinse in cold water and pat dry. Heat a grill pan until it's smoking hot. Brush the eggplant with oil and cook in batches for 4 mins each side until tender. Allow to cool. Split the bagels and thickly spread the bases with cream cheese. Top with eggplant slices, ham, chorizo, tomatoes and basil. Season to taste and top with the other half of the bagels.

title: Ravioli
instructions: Combine flour and 1/2 tsp salt in a large bowl. Add eggs and olive oil and mix until combined. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 10 mins, until smooth and elastic. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour.

Cut pasta dough in 1/2. Roll out each 1/2 into a 12x24 inch rectangle. Keep 1 sheet covered with a clean damp tea towel to prevent it from drying out. Place teaspoonfuls of filling across uncovered sheet of dough, around 1 1/2 inches apart. Using a pastry brush, carefully brush around filling with cold water.

Carefully lay reserved sheet of dough over top. Working from the middle outwards, press down firmly around each mound of dough with the side of your hand, making sure there are no trapped pockets of air inside. Cut into raviolis, ensuring edges are sealed. Separate then place in a single layer on a wire cooling rack and let dry for 30 mins in a cool, dry place.

To cook, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add ravioli and 1-2 tsp oil. Simmer for 4-5 mins. Drain. Divide between 4 warm serving plates. Season with black pepper. Drizzle a little olive oil over each ravioli and sprinkle with Parmesan and basil.
text: Recipe: Ravioli. Ingredients: pasta, PASTA DOUGH, eggs, olive oil, Parmesan cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Combine flour and 1/2 tsp salt in a large bowl. Add eggs and olive oil and mix until combined. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 10 mins, until smooth and elastic. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour. Cut pasta dough in 1/2. Roll out each 1/2 into a 12x24 inch rectangle. Keep 1 sheet covered with a clean damp tea towel to prevent it from drying out. Place teaspoonfuls of filling across uncovered sheet of dough, around 1 1/2 inches apart. Using a pastry brush, carefully brush around filling with cold water. Carefully lay reserved sheet of dough over top. Working from the middle outwards, press down firmly around each mound of dough with the side of your hand, making sure there are no trapped pockets of air inside. Cut into raviolis, ensuring edges are sealed. Separate then place in a single layer on a wire cooling rack and let dry for 30 mins in a cool, dry place. To cook, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add ravioli and 1-2 tsp oil. Simmer for 4-5 mins. Drain. Divide between 4 warm serving plates. Season with black pepper. Drizzle a little olive oil over each ravioli and sprinkle with Parmesan and basil.

title: Tomato Passata
instructions: In a large, heavy-based saucepan, cook tomatoes, covered, on medium heat 10 minutes. Pass mixture through a coarse sieve, discarding skins and seeds.

Heat 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil in a large saucepan on medium. Cook onion for 10 minutes, stirring, until softened. Add tomato puree and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Season to taste.
Pour into warm sterilized bottles or jars and seal.
text: Recipe: Tomato Passata. Ingredients: tomatoes, extra virgin olive oil, onion. Instructions: In a large, heavy-based saucepan, cook tomatoes, covered, on medium heat 10 minutes. Pass mixture through a coarse sieve, discarding skins and seeds. Heat 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil in a large saucepan on medium. Cook onion for 10 minutes, stirring, until softened. Add tomato puree and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Season to taste. Pour into warm sterilized bottles or jars and seal.

title: Fruity Loaf
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Line a baking pan with parchment paper. Place the flour and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Rub in the butter to make crumbs. Stir in the muesli mix.
Add the milk to the flour mixture. Using a spatula, mix until the dough just comes together, adding a little extra milk if too dry.

Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently for 1-2 mins or until smooth. Shape into a 9-inch round, then place on the prepared pan. Using a sharp knife that has been dipped in flour, mark 6 wedges on top of the round. Sprinkle top a little extra flour.
Bake for 30 mins or until the loaf sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom Cool for 5-10 mins. Serve the loaf with butter.
text: Recipe: Fruity Loaf. Ingredients: flour, cold butter, milk, Butter. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Line a baking pan with parchment paper. Place the flour and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Rub in the butter to make crumbs. Stir in the muesli mix. Add the milk to the flour mixture. Using a spatula, mix until the dough just comes together, adding a little extra milk if too dry. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently for 1-2 mins or until smooth. Shape into a 9-inch round, then place on the prepared pan. Using a sharp knife that has been dipped in flour, mark 6 wedges on top of the round. Sprinkle top a little extra flour. Bake for 30 mins or until the loaf sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom Cool for 5-10 mins. Serve the loaf with butter.

title: Romano Bread Knots
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Line a sheet pan with parchment paper.

Cut dough into 12 equal strips. Sprinkle 1/2 the cheese over a clean work surface. Place dough strips on cheese, brush with butter and sprinkle with remaining cheese. Form into knots and place on prepared pan. Brush with egg white and bake for 12-15 mins, or until golden brown. Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Romano Bread Knots. Ingredients: Romano cheese, butter, egg white. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Line a sheet pan with parchment paper. Cut dough into 12 equal strips. Sprinkle 1/2 the cheese over a clean work surface. Place dough strips on cheese, brush with butter and sprinkle with remaining cheese. Form into knots and place on prepared pan. Brush with egg white and bake for 12-15 mins, or until golden brown. Serve warm.

title: Baked Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Oil a 3-quart baking dish.
Combine the beef, eggs, breadcrumbs, 1/2 cup of the Parmesan cheese and parsley in a large bowl; season to taste. Using wet hands, roll rounded tablespoons of mixture into balls.
Heat half the oil in a large skillet on high heat. Cook the meatballs, in batches, until browned all over. Transfer to the prepared dish.

Heat the remaining oil in the same pan. Cook the onion and garlic, stirring, for 3 mins or until the onion softens. Remove from the heat. Stir in the pasta sauce, tomatoes, peas and basil. Season to taste. Pour the tomato mixture over the meatballs. Top with ricotta and remaining 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese.
Bake, uncovered, for 40 mins or until meatballs are cooked through. Serve with pasta and/or a green salad.
text: Recipe: Baked Meatballs. Ingredients: ground beef, eggs, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, parsley, olive oil, onion, garlic, tomato pasta sauce, tomatoes, frozen peas, fresh basil, ricotta cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Oil a 3-quart baking dish. Combine the beef, eggs, breadcrumbs, 1/2 cup of the Parmesan cheese and parsley in a large bowl; season to taste. Using wet hands, roll rounded tablespoons of mixture into balls. Heat half the oil in a large skillet on high heat. Cook the meatballs, in batches, until browned all over. Transfer to the prepared dish. Heat the remaining oil in the same pan. Cook the onion and garlic, stirring, for 3 mins or until the onion softens. Remove from the heat. Stir in the pasta sauce, tomatoes, peas and basil. Season to taste. Pour the tomato mixture over the meatballs. Top with ricotta and remaining 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese. Bake, uncovered, for 40 mins or until meatballs are cooked through. Serve with pasta and/or a green salad.

title: Chicken With New Potatoes, Asparagus And Cream Cheese
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper. Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a frying pan and fry the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side until cooked through. Drain to a plate.

Add the remaining oil to the pan and fry the potatoes for about 10 minutes, turning frequently until golden. Add the onions and cook for 3 minutes. Add the asparagus and stock and bring to the boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.

Return the chicken to the pan and heat through for 5 minutes. Spoon the cream cheese and cream into the stock and scatter the tomatoes on top. Season lightly and cook gently for a further 5 minutes until the tomatoes have softened. Serve scattered with parsley.
text: Recipe: Chicken With New Potatoes, Asparagus And Cream Cheese. Ingredients: chicken breasts, olive oil, potatoes, onions, chicken, cream cheese, cream, cherry tomatoes, parsley. Instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper. Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a frying pan and fry the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side until cooked through. Drain to a plate. Add the remaining oil to the pan and fry the potatoes for about 10 minutes, turning frequently until golden. Add the onions and cook for 3 minutes. Add the asparagus and stock and bring to the boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Return the chicken to the pan and heat through for 5 minutes. Spoon the cream cheese and cream into the stock and scatter the tomatoes on top. Season lightly and cook gently for a further 5 minutes until the tomatoes have softened. Serve scattered with parsley.

title: Chicken With Roasted Cherry Tomato And Basil Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Place tomatoes in large shallow baking pan; spray with no stick cooking spray. Roast, uncovered, about 20 mins or until tomatoes soften.
Meanwhile, cook chicken in heated oiled large skillet until cooked through. Cover; let stand 5 mins.
Blend or process half the tomatoes until smooth. Place in medium saucepan with basil and cream. Cook, stirring, on low heat, until heated through. Season to taste.
Serve chicken topped with sauce and remaining tomatoes. Garnish with additional basil leaves.
text: Recipe: Chicken With Roasted Cherry Tomato And Basil Sauce. Ingredients: tomatoes, chicken breasts, fresh basil, light cream. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Place tomatoes in large shallow baking pan; spray with no stick cooking spray. Roast, uncovered, about 20 mins or until tomatoes soften. Meanwhile, cook chicken in heated oiled large skillet until cooked through. Cover; let stand 5 mins. Blend or process half the tomatoes until smooth. Place in medium saucepan with basil and cream. Cook, stirring, on low heat, until heated through. Season to taste. Serve chicken topped with sauce and remaining tomatoes. Garnish with additional basil leaves.

title: Spanish Baked Eggs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Lightly grease a 2-quart shallow baking dish.
Heat oil in a large skillet on high heat. Fry potatoes in a single layer, 3-4 mins each side, until cooked through. Add sausage to pan halfway through cooking, turning. Remove from skillet.
Saute onion and garlic in same pan, 1-2 mins, until tender. Add chicken and cook, 2-3 mins, until browned. Stir in tomatoes, stock and 1 tsp of the thyme. Simmer 4-5 mins.

Pour tomato mixture into prepared dish. Top with potatoes and sausage. Using the back of a spoon, press 6 indentations into mixture. Crack eggs one at a time and carefully slide into indentations. Sprinkle with remaining thyme.
Bake 15-20 mins, until egg whites set but yolks remain runny.
text: Recipe: Spanish Baked Eggs. Ingredients: olive oil, potatoes, chorizo sausage, red onion, garlic, chicken thighs, tomatoes, chicken stock, thyme, eggs. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Lightly grease a 2-quart shallow baking dish. Heat oil in a large skillet on high heat. Fry potatoes in a single layer, 3-4 mins each side, until cooked through. Add sausage to pan halfway through cooking, turning. Remove from skillet. Saute onion and garlic in same pan, 1-2 mins, until tender. Add chicken and cook, 2-3 mins, until browned. Stir in tomatoes, stock and 1 tsp of the thyme. Simmer 4-5 mins. Pour tomato mixture into prepared dish. Top with potatoes and sausage. Using the back of a spoon, press 6 indentations into mixture. Crack eggs one at a time and carefully slide into indentations. Sprinkle with remaining thyme. Bake 15-20 mins, until egg whites set but yolks remain runny.

title: Farfalle With Eggplant And Tomatoes
instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain well.
Meanwhile, heat 1/4 cup of the oil in a large skillet on high heat. Add the eggplant and cook for 8 mins, stirring occasionally, until tender. Remove from skillet.

Heat the remaining oil in the skillet on medium heat. Add the garlic and tomato and cook for 3-5 mins, until the tomato is tender. Stir in the basil and season to taste. Add pasta and eggplant; toss on low heat until combined. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and additional basil to serve.
text: Recipe: Farfalle With Eggplant And Tomatoes. Ingredients: pasta, olive oil, eggplant, clove garlic, tomatoes, basil, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain well. Meanwhile, heat 1/4 cup of the oil in a large skillet on high heat. Add the eggplant and cook for 8 mins, stirring occasionally, until tender. Remove from skillet. Heat the remaining oil in the skillet on medium heat. Add the garlic and tomato and cook for 3-5 mins, until the tomato is tender. Stir in the basil and season to taste. Add pasta and eggplant; toss on low heat until combined. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and additional basil to serve.

title: Chicken Cordon Bleu
instructions: Steam potatoes in a saucepan of simmering water 15-20 mins, until tender. Toss in 1 tbsp of the olive oil. Sprinkle with sea salt to taste. Set aside and keep warm.

Meanwhile, cut each chicken breast horizontally into 2 thin halves. Flatten each piece between 2 sheets of plastic wrap. Place a slice each of ham and cheese on bottom half of each breast and top with remaining half, pressing down firmly. Coat with seasoned flour, brushing off excess. Dip each stuffed breast in egg, and coat with breadcrumbs.

Heat remaining 3 tbsp oil and butter in a large skillet on medium-high heat. Cook chicken 3 mins each side, until cooked through and golden brown. Place on 4 heated plates. Drizzle with butter from pan, if desired. Serve with steamed potatoes and lemon wedges.
text: Recipe: Chicken Cordon Bleu. Ingredients: gold potatoes, olive oil, chicken breasts, thin slices ham, thin slices Swiss cheese, flour, eggs, fresh breadcrumbs, butter, Lemon wedges. Instructions: Steam potatoes in a saucepan of simmering water 15-20 mins, until tender. Toss in 1 tbsp of the olive oil. Sprinkle with sea salt to taste. Set aside and keep warm. Meanwhile, cut each chicken breast horizontally into 2 thin halves. Flatten each piece between 2 sheets of plastic wrap. Place a slice each of ham and cheese on bottom half of each breast and top with remaining half, pressing down firmly. Coat with seasoned flour, brushing off excess. Dip each stuffed breast in egg, and coat with breadcrumbs. Heat remaining 3 tbsp oil and butter in a large skillet on medium-high heat. Cook chicken 3 mins each side, until cooked through and golden brown. Place on 4 heated plates. Drizzle with butter from pan, if desired. Serve with steamed potatoes and lemon wedges.

title: Baked Macaroni And Cheese With Meat
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Heat the oil in a frying pan and saute the onions until softened. Add the ground meat and cook until browned. Stir in the tomato puree, tomatoes and their juice. Season with salt and black pepper and add the parsley. Bring to a boil, cover and simmer for 20 mins. Allow to cool.
Meanwhile, cook the macaroni in boiling salted water for 10 mins. Drain and refresh with cold water. In a saucepan, melt 2 oz of butter and stir in 4 oz of cheese. Stir into the macaroni.

In a saucepan, melt the rest of the butter. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 mins. Gradually add the milk, still stirring constantly. Bring to a boil and simmer over medium heat for 5 mins, stirring occasionally. Season with salt, black pepper and nutmeg and remove from the heat.
In a bowl, beat 3 eggs and 1/4 cup of cold water. Stir into the bechamel sauce. In a separate bowl, beat 1 egg and stir in 1 oz of cheese. Stir into the ground meat mixture.

Grease a lasagna dish and spoon in half the macaroni. Next spoon over the meat mixture. Top with the remaining macaroni and spread over the bechamel sauce. Sprinkle the rest of the cheese over. Bake for 40 mins. Garnish with parsley.
text: Recipe: Baked Macaroni And Cheese With Meat. Ingredients: olive oil, onions, beef, tomato, tomatoes, parsley, butter, Parmesan, flour, nutmeg, eggs. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Heat the oil in a frying pan and saute the onions until softened. Add the ground meat and cook until browned. Stir in the tomato puree, tomatoes and their juice. Season with salt and black pepper and add the parsley. Bring to a boil, cover and simmer for 20 mins. Allow to cool. Meanwhile, cook the macaroni in boiling salted water for 10 mins. Drain and refresh with cold water. In a saucepan, melt 2 oz of butter and stir in 4 oz of cheese. Stir into the macaroni. In a saucepan, melt the rest of the butter. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 mins. Gradually add the milk, still stirring constantly. Bring to a boil and simmer over medium heat for 5 mins, stirring occasionally. Season with salt, black pepper and nutmeg and remove from the heat. In a bowl, beat 3 eggs and 1/4 cup of cold water. Stir into the bechamel sauce. In a separate bowl, beat 1 egg and stir in 1 oz of cheese. Stir into the ground meat mixture. Grease a lasagna dish and spoon in half the macaroni. Next spoon over the meat mixture. Top with the remaining macaroni and spread over the bechamel sauce. Sprinkle the rest of the cheese over. Bake for 40 mins. Garnish with parsley.

title: Crispy Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F.

Boil, steam or microwave the potatoes until tender. Place them in a bowl or pan, add the butter and hot milk, and mash until smooth. Spoon the mashed potatoes into six individual ovenproof dishes, then bake for 15 mins, until golden and lightly crisp. Serve.
text: Recipe: Crispy Mashed Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, butter, milk. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Boil, steam or microwave the potatoes until tender. Place them in a bowl or pan, add the butter and hot milk, and mash until smooth. Spoon the mashed potatoes into six individual ovenproof dishes, then bake for 15 mins, until golden and lightly crisp. Serve.

title: Onion And Potato Frittata
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease an 8 inch shallow baking dish.

Combine onion, butter and 1/4 tsp salt in a small, heavy-bottomed frying pan. Place over low heat, cover and cook for 10 mins. Remove lid and increase heat to medium-low. Cook for another 10 mins, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft. Set aside to cool.

In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and milk with flour and mashed garlic. Add onion, potatoes, cheese and greens. Mix gently with a spatula until well combined then spread out evenly in prepared dish. Sprinkle with Parmesan and bake for 30 mins.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
text: Recipe: Onion And Potato Frittata. Ingredients: onion, butter, eggs, milk, flour, garlic, potatoes, Cheddar cheese, herbs, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease an 8 inch shallow baking dish. Combine onion, butter and 1/4 tsp salt in a small, heavy-bottomed frying pan. Place over low heat, cover and cook for 10 mins. Remove lid and increase heat to medium-low. Cook for another 10 mins, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft. Set aside to cool. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and milk with flour and mashed garlic. Add onion, potatoes, cheese and greens. Mix gently with a spatula until well combined then spread out evenly in prepared dish. Sprinkle with Parmesan and bake for 30 mins. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Tomato And Mozzarella Baked Rice
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a large baking dish.
Bring stock to a boil. Add rice and simmer for 10 mins.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Cook onion for 3 mins, or until softened. Drain rice and stir into onion mixture. Cook for 5 mins. Add 1/2 the tomato puree, 1/2 the Parmesan and all of the herbs. Season to taste. Transfer 1/2 the rice mixture to prepared dish and top with mozzarella and remaining tomato puree. Spread remaining rice mixture over top, sprinkle with remaining Parmesan and bake for 30 mins. Let stand for 10 mins before serving.
text: Recipe: Tomato And Mozzarella Baked Rice. Ingredients: chicken stock, rice, extra virgin olive oil, onion, tomato purée, Parmesan cheese, basil, parsley, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a large baking dish. Bring stock to a boil. Add rice and simmer for 10 mins. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Cook onion for 3 mins, or until softened. Drain rice and stir into onion mixture. Cook for 5 mins. Add 1/2 the tomato puree, 1/2 the Parmesan and all of the herbs. Season to taste. Transfer 1/2 the rice mixture to prepared dish and top with mozzarella and remaining tomato puree. Spread remaining rice mixture over top, sprinkle with remaining Parmesan and bake for 30 mins. Let stand for 10 mins before serving.

title: Deluxe Baked Potatoes
instructions: Prick potatoes with a knife and bake in the oven at 350°F for 1 hour or until done. Slice off the top quarter of each potato. Scoop out potato flesh and mash with garlic and herb cheese, butter and milk. Season to taste with salt and ground black pepper, if desired. Divide among potato skins and garnish.
text: Recipe: Deluxe Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, garlic, butter, milk. Instructions: Prick potatoes with a knife and bake in the oven at 350°F for 1 hour or until done. Slice off the top quarter of each potato. Scoop out potato flesh and mash with garlic and herb cheese, butter and milk. Season to taste with salt and ground black pepper, if desired. Divide among potato skins and garnish.

title: Mozzarella And Prosciutto Potato Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Grease an 8-inch springform pan and sprinkle bottom with 1/3 of the breadcrumbs.
Cook potatoes in a saucepan of boiling salted water for 15 mins, until tender. Drain, return to pan and cook over low heat for 1 min, until dry.
Mash potatoes, adding milk and 2 tbsp of the butter. Stir in Parmesan cheese, egg and egg yolk. Season.

Spread prepared pan with 1/2 of the potato mixture. Cover with mozzarella cheese and prosciutto; top with remaining potato mixture. Dot with remaining 2 tbsp butter. Sprinkle with remaining breadcrumbs.
Bake for 30 mins, until golden. Let stand for 10 mins before serving.
text: Recipe: Mozzarella And Prosciutto Potato Cake. Ingredients: fresh breadcrumbs, potatoes, hot milk, butter, Parmesan cheese, eggs, egg yolk, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Grease an 8-inch springform pan and sprinkle bottom with 1/3 of the breadcrumbs. Cook potatoes in a saucepan of boiling salted water for 15 mins, until tender. Drain, return to pan and cook over low heat for 1 min, until dry. Mash potatoes, adding milk and 2 tbsp of the butter. Stir in Parmesan cheese, egg and egg yolk. Season. Spread prepared pan with 1/2 of the potato mixture. Cover with mozzarella cheese and prosciutto; top with remaining potato mixture. Dot with remaining 2 tbsp butter. Sprinkle with remaining breadcrumbs. Bake for 30 mins, until golden. Let stand for 10 mins before serving.

title: Buttered Noodles
instructions: Cook noodles until al dente. Drain, reserving a little cooking liquid. Melt butter and toss with noodles. If necessary, add 2-3 tbsp cooking water, to moisten. Season with ground black pepper and serve.
text: Recipe: Buttered Noodles. Ingredients: egg noodles, butter. Instructions: Cook noodles until al dente. Drain, reserving a little cooking liquid. Melt butter and toss with noodles. If necessary, add 2-3 tbsp cooking water, to moisten. Season with ground black pepper and serve.

title: Baked Italian Meatballs
instructions: Place ground pork, breadcrumbs, eggs and parsley in a large bowl. Using hands, mix well to combine. Shape mixture into 12 balls. Refrigerate for 15 mins.

Preheat the oven to 425°F. Heat a large nonstick skillet on medium-high heat. Add meatballs; cook, turning, for 5-6 mins or until browned all over. Place pasta sauce in a small saucepan on medium heat. Bring to a boil. Transfer meatballs in a 6-cup baking dish. Pour sauce over meatballs; sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 15 mins or until melted and bubbly.
text: Recipe:  Baked Italian Meatballs. Ingredients: ground pork, breadcrumbs, eggs, parsley, tomato pasta sauce, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Place ground pork, breadcrumbs, eggs and parsley in a large bowl. Using hands, mix well to combine. Shape mixture into 12 balls. Refrigerate for 15 mins. Preheat the oven to 425°F. Heat a large nonstick skillet on medium-high heat. Add meatballs; cook, turning, for 5-6 mins or until browned all over. Place pasta sauce in a small saucepan on medium heat. Bring to a boil. Transfer meatballs in a 6-cup baking dish. Pour sauce over meatballs; sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Bake for 15 mins or until melted and bubbly.

title: Garlic And Herb Potato Wedges
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F. Grease a baking tray.
In a large microwave-safe bowl, toss potatoes, seasoning and oil together. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 5 mins.
Place wedges in a single layer on prepared tray. Bake for 20 mins, or until crisp.
text: Recipe: Garlic And Herb Potato Wedges. Ingredients: potatoes, garlic, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F. Grease a baking tray. In a large microwave-safe bowl, toss potatoes, seasoning and oil together. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 5 mins. Place wedges in a single layer on prepared tray. Bake for 20 mins, or until crisp.

title: Apricot Chicken Drumettes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a large baking tray. Combine soup mix, cream and apricots in a large bowl. Add chicken and toss to coat. Transfer to prepared tray and bake for 45 mins, or until golden brown. Serve sprinkled with spring onion.
text: Recipe: Apricot Chicken Drumettes. Ingredients: onion soup mix, sour cream, chicken, spring onions. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a large baking tray. Combine soup mix, cream and apricots in a large bowl. Add chicken and toss to coat. Transfer to prepared tray and bake for 45 mins, or until golden brown. Serve sprinkled with spring onion.

title: Roast Potato And Squash Frittata
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 1 1/2-quart baking dish. Heat oil in a small skillet on medium heat. Saute onion 2-3 mins.
Place potatoes and winter squash in prepared dish. Sprinkle with onions. Whisk eggs and cream in a medium bowl. Pour over vegetables. Season to taste. Sprinkle with cheese.
Bake 40-45 mins, until center is set.
text: Recipe: Roast Potato And Squash Frittata. Ingredients: olive oil, red onion, potatoes, eggs, heavy cream, feta cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 1 1/2-quart baking dish. Heat oil in a small skillet on medium heat. Saute onion 2-3 mins. Place potatoes and winter squash in prepared dish. Sprinkle with onions. Whisk eggs and cream in a medium bowl. Pour over vegetables. Season to taste. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake 40-45 mins, until center is set.

title: Creamy Tomato Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a medium heavy-bottomed saucepan on medium heat. Saute celery, onion and garlic 4-5 mins, until tender.
Stir in tomatoes and stock. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer 10 mins. Stir in basil. Cool slightly. Using an immersion blender, puree mixture until smooth.

For the white sauce, melt butter in a small saucepan on medium heat. Add flour and cook, stirring, 1 min. Remove from heat. Gradually stir in milk, until smooth. Return to heat. Cook, stirring, until mixture boils and thickens. Simmer 3 mins, stirring. Season to taste.

Gradually add white sauce to tomato mixture, stirring constantly until smooth. Bring to a boil on medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer 1-2 mins. Serve topped with additional basil leaves, a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and black pepper.
text: Recipe: Creamy Tomato Soup. Ingredients: olive oil, celery stalks, onion, garlic, tomatoes, chicken stock, basil, butter, flour, milk, Extra virgin olive oil. Instructions: Heat oil in a medium heavy-bottomed saucepan on medium heat. Saute celery, onion and garlic 4-5 mins, until tender. Stir in tomatoes and stock. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer 10 mins. Stir in basil. Cool slightly. Using an immersion blender, puree mixture until smooth. For the white sauce, melt butter in a small saucepan on medium heat. Add flour and cook, stirring, 1 min. Remove from heat. Gradually stir in milk, until smooth. Return to heat. Cook, stirring, until mixture boils and thickens. Simmer 3 mins, stirring. Season to taste. Gradually add white sauce to tomato mixture, stirring constantly until smooth. Bring to a boil on medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer 1-2 mins. Serve topped with additional basil leaves, a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and black pepper.

title: Macaroni With Chorizo And Tomato
instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan on medium heat. Stir in flour and cook, stirring, 1 min. Remove pan from heat and stir in milk until smooth. Return to heat and cook, stirring, until mixture boils and thickens. Simmer 3 mins. Stir in cheese and season to taste.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain well and return to pan. Stir in sauce.
Heat oil in a medium skillet on high heat. Saute chorizo 1-2 mins. Add tomatoes, cook 1 min to soften slightly. Transfer mixture to pasta. Add parsley and mix well. Serve with crusty bread.
text: Recipe: Macaroni With Chorizo And Tomato. Ingredients: butter, flour, milk, Cheddar cheese, macaroni, olive oil, chorizo sausages, cherry tomatoes, parsley, Crusty bread. Instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan on medium heat. Stir in flour and cook, stirring, 1 min. Remove pan from heat and stir in milk until smooth. Return to heat and cook, stirring, until mixture boils and thickens. Simmer 3 mins. Stir in cheese and season to taste. Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain well and return to pan. Stir in sauce. Heat oil in a medium skillet on high heat. Saute chorizo 1-2 mins. Add tomatoes, cook 1 min to soften slightly. Transfer mixture to pasta. Add parsley and mix well. Serve with crusty bread.

title: Ricotta Gnocchi With Tomato Sauce
instructions: For the tomato sauce, heat oil in a medium saucepan on medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 min, or until fragrant. Add tomato, basil and red pepper flakes; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 10 mins.

For the ricotta gnocchi, mix ricotta, Parmesan, egg, flour and 1 tsp salt in a large bowl. Add more flour, if necessary, to make a workable but soft dough. Don't overwork. Divide dough into quarters. Roll each into a 3/4-inch log. Cut into 3/4-inch slices; place gnocchi on a floured baking pan. Dust lightly with flour and indent each with the back of a fork. Refrigerate if not using immediately.

Cook gnocchi in a saucepan of simmering, lightly salted water for about 2 mins. When they float to the top, remove with a slotted spoon. Place in a bowl. Add tomato sauce and toss gently. Serve with additional Parmesan, basil and season with freshly ground pepper.
text: Recipe: Ricotta Gnocchi With Tomato Sauce. Ingredients: TOMATO SAUCE, olive oil, garlic, tomatoes, basil, red pepper, RICOTTA, ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, egg, flour. Instructions: For the tomato sauce, heat oil in a medium saucepan on medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 min, or until fragrant. Add tomato, basil and red pepper flakes; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 10 mins. For the ricotta gnocchi, mix ricotta, Parmesan, egg, flour and 1 tsp salt in a large bowl. Add more flour, if necessary, to make a workable but soft dough. Don't overwork. Divide dough into quarters. Roll each into a 3/4-inch log. Cut into 3/4-inch slices; place gnocchi on a floured baking pan. Dust lightly with flour and indent each with the back of a fork. Refrigerate if not using immediately. Cook gnocchi in a saucepan of simmering, lightly salted water for about 2 mins. When they float to the top, remove with a slotted spoon. Place in a bowl. Add tomato sauce and toss gently. Serve with additional Parmesan, basil and season with freshly ground pepper.

title: Ham Frittata
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Lightly oil an 8x12 inch rectangular pan.
Heat oil in a medium frying pan over medium heat. Cook onions and garlic, stirring, until onion softens. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool for 5 mins.
Add ham, eggs, cream, cheese and basil to onion mixture and stir to combine. Pour into prepared pan and bake for 30 mins, or until set.
text: Recipe: Ham Frittata. Ingredients: olive oil, Spanish onions, garlic, ham, eggs, heavy cream, Parmesan cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Lightly oil an 8x12 inch rectangular pan. Heat oil in a medium frying pan over medium heat. Cook onions and garlic, stirring, until onion softens. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool for 5 mins. Add ham, eggs, cream, cheese and basil to onion mixture and stir to combine. Pour into prepared pan and bake for 30 mins, or until set.

title: Tomato, Feta And Ham Frittatas
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a 6-cup muffin pan with paper liners. Fill with ham, cheeses and basil.
Whisk eggs and cream together in a bowl and season. Distribute between muffin recesses then top with cherry tomatoes. Bake for 25 mins. Let cool in pan for 5 mins before serving.
text: Recipe: Tomato, Feta And Ham Frittatas. Ingredients: ham, feta cheese, Parmesan cheese, fresh basil, eggs, heavy cream, cherry tomatoes. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a 6-cup muffin pan with paper liners. Fill with ham, cheeses and basil. Whisk eggs and cream together in a bowl and season. Distribute between muffin recesses then top with cherry tomatoes. Bake for 25 mins. Let cool in pan for 5 mins before serving.

title: Pesto And Ricotta Gnocchi
instructions: Place potato in a large microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic food wrap and microwave on high in 2-min bursts until tender.
Stand for 5 mins. Mash until smooth. Stir in egg, egg yolk. ricotta and pesto. Using hands, mix in flour.

Turn potato mixture onto a floured surface and knead lightly for 2 mins or until smooth. Divide potato mixture into 4 portions. Roll each portion into a 1/2 inch thick log, then cut into 1/2 inch pieces.
Cook gnocchi in a large pot of boiling salted water for 3 mins or until gnocchi floats to the surface. Using a slotted spoon, remove gnocchi from pan.
Meanwhile, combine tomato sauce and garlic in a large saucepan over moderate heat. Cook and stir for 5 mins or until heated.
Add cream and spinach and cook and stir for 1 min or until spinach wilts. Add warm gnocchi to tomato sauce, stirring to coat. Spoon into shallow serving bowls. Serve.
text: Recipe: Pesto And Ricotta Gnocchi. Ingredients: potatoes, egg, egg yolk, ricotta, basil pesto, flour, tomato sauce, clove garlic, cream, baby spinach. Instructions: Place potato in a large microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic food wrap and microwave on high in 2-min bursts until tender. Stand for 5 mins. Mash until smooth. Stir in egg, egg yolk. ricotta and pesto. Using hands, mix in flour. Turn potato mixture onto a floured surface and knead lightly for 2 mins or until smooth. Divide potato mixture into 4 portions. Roll each portion into a 1/2 inch thick log, then cut into 1/2 inch pieces. Cook gnocchi in a large pot of boiling salted water for 3 mins or until gnocchi floats to the surface. Using a slotted spoon, remove gnocchi from pan. Meanwhile, combine tomato sauce and garlic in a large saucepan over moderate heat. Cook and stir for 5 mins or until heated. Add cream and spinach and cook and stir for 1 min or until spinach wilts. Add warm gnocchi to tomato sauce, stirring to coat. Spoon into shallow serving bowls. Serve.

title: Cheesy Sweet Corn Soup
instructions: Gently heat creamed corn, onion, milk and cheese over low heat for 5-10 mins, stirring, until the cheese melts.
Ladle into serving bowls. Sprinkle with blue cheese and parsley. Serve with thick bread slices.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Sweet Corn Soup. Ingredients: creamed sweet corn, spring onion, milk, Cheddar cheese, blue cheese, parsley, bread. Instructions: Gently heat creamed corn, onion, milk and cheese over low heat for 5-10 mins, stirring, until the cheese melts. Ladle into serving bowls. Sprinkle with blue cheese and parsley. Serve with thick bread slices.

title: Mars Bars Rice Krispie Treats
instructions: Grease an 8 x 12 inch baking pan. Combine Mars Bars and butter in large saucepan. Stir constantly over low heat without boiling until mixture is smooth, then stir in Rice Krispies. Press mixture evenly into prepared pan.
To make topping, melt chocolate and butter in bowl over hot water and stir until smooth. Spread topping over mixture. Refrigerate until set before slicing.
text: Recipe: Mars Bars Rice Krispie Treats. Ingredients: butter, Rice Krispies, milk chocolate, butter. Instructions: Grease an 8 x 12 inch baking pan. Combine Mars Bars and butter in large saucepan. Stir constantly over low heat without boiling until mixture is smooth, then stir in Rice Krispies. Press mixture evenly into prepared pan. To make topping, melt chocolate and butter in bowl over hot water and stir until smooth. Spread topping over mixture. Refrigerate until set before slicing.

title: Homemade Gnocchi With Chicken And Lactose Free Cream Sauce
instructions: To make the gnocchi, wash the potatoes thoroughly and boil in their skins for 20 mins. Cool the potatoes under cold water, drain and remove the skins. Put the warm potatoes through a potato ricer or grate into a bowl, then season with salt, pepper and nutmeg. Put the fluffy potatoes on a floured work surface, add the flour and eggs a bit at a time and knead gently to form a smooth dough. Don't overwork it, or you will start to release the gluten in the flour and end up with chewy gnocchi. Roll out the dough to 3/4 inch thick, cut into small pieces and with floured hands, shape into balls. Press flat with a fork.

In a large pot of salted water, boil the gnocchi in batches so that they have room to cook evenly. When the gnocchi float to the surface, lift out with a slotted spoon and drain well. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet and fry the gnocchi, turning frequently for 4-5 minutes. Remove from the pan and keep warm.

Cut the chicken into strips and saute in 1 tbsp of heated oil for 4-5 mins, turning once or twice. Deglaze the sticky meat juices with 2/3 cup water and the cream, bring to a boil and stir in the cream cheese. Add the gnocchi and spring onions, bring to a boil, season with salt and pepper and serve.
text: Recipe: Homemade Gnocchi With Chicken And Lactose Free Cream Sauce. Ingredients: floury potatoes, flour, egg, olive oil, chicken breasts, spring onions, double cream, cream cheese. Instructions: To make the gnocchi, wash the potatoes thoroughly and boil in their skins for 20 mins. Cool the potatoes under cold water, drain and remove the skins. Put the warm potatoes through a potato ricer or grate into a bowl, then season with salt, pepper and nutmeg. Put the fluffy potatoes on a floured work surface, add the flour and eggs a bit at a time and knead gently to form a smooth dough. Don't overwork it, or you will start to release the gluten in the flour and end up with chewy gnocchi. Roll out the dough to 3/4 inch thick, cut into small pieces and with floured hands, shape into balls. Press flat with a fork. In a large pot of salted water, boil the gnocchi in batches so that they have room to cook evenly. When the gnocchi float to the surface, lift out with a slotted spoon and drain well. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet and fry the gnocchi, turning frequently for 4-5 minutes. Remove from the pan and keep warm. Cut the chicken into strips and saute in 1 tbsp of heated oil for 4-5 mins, turning once or twice. Deglaze the sticky meat juices with 2/3 cup water and the cream, bring to a boil and stir in the cream cheese. Add the gnocchi and spring onions, bring to a boil, season with salt and pepper and serve.

title: Quick And Easy Lasagna
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.

Heat oil in saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic, stirring, until onion is soft. Add beef and cook, stirring, until well browned. Stir in pasta sauce and cook until heated through. Remove from heat.

Line a shallow oiled 8x12 inch baking dish with a layer of pasta. Top with 1/3 of the bolognese. Combine ricotta cheese and milk then spread 1/3 over bolognese in pan. Sprinkle with 1/3 mozzarella cheese. Repeat layers, finishing with pasta. Pour cream over top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake for 40 mins, or until pasta is tender.
text: Recipe: Quick And Easy Lasagna. Ingredients: olive oil, Spanish onion, clove garlic, ground beef, pasta sauce, ricotta cheese, milk, mozzarella cheese, cream, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Heat oil in saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion and garlic, stirring, until onion is soft. Add beef and cook, stirring, until well browned. Stir in pasta sauce and cook until heated through. Remove from heat. Line a shallow oiled 8x12 inch baking dish with a layer of pasta. Top with 1/3 of the bolognese. Combine ricotta cheese and milk then spread 1/3 over bolognese in pan. Sprinkle with 1/3 mozzarella cheese. Repeat layers, finishing with pasta. Pour cream over top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake for 40 mins, or until pasta is tender.

title: Potato And Pastrami Spanish Tortilla
instructions: Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until just tender. Drain.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tbsp oil in a medium nonstick frying pan. Cook onion and pastrami until crisp. Drain on paper towels.
Whisk together eggs, heavy cream, green onions and cheese. Add potatoes and pastrami. Set aside.
Heat remaining oil in a medium nonstick frying pan. Add egg mixture, cover and cook over low heat for 10 mins, or until tortilla is just set.
Carefully invert tortilla onto a plate then slide back into pan. Cook, uncovered, for 5 mins, or until cooked through.
text: Recipe: Potato And Pastrami Spanish Tortilla. Ingredients: potatoes, olive oil, onion, ham, eggs, heavy cream, green onions, Parmesan cheese, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until just tender. Drain. Meanwhile, heat 1 tbsp oil in a medium nonstick frying pan. Cook onion and pastrami until crisp. Drain on paper towels. Whisk together eggs, heavy cream, green onions and cheese. Add potatoes and pastrami. Set aside. Heat remaining oil in a medium nonstick frying pan. Add egg mixture, cover and cook over low heat for 10 mins, or until tortilla is just set. Carefully invert tortilla onto a plate then slide back into pan. Cook, uncovered, for 5 mins, or until cooked through.

title: Perfect Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil. Boil for 15-20 mins, until tender. Drain.
Mash well then add cream and butter. Season. Beat with a wooden spoon until smooth and fluffy.
text: Recipe: Perfect Mashed Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, heavy cream, butter. Instructions: Place potatoes in a large saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil. Boil for 15-20 mins, until tender. Drain. Mash well then add cream and butter. Season. Beat with a wooden spoon until smooth and fluffy.

title: Cherry Tomato And Basil Pasta
instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to the package directions. Drain and place in a large serving bowl.
Add the tomatoes, oil and basil to the pasta; toss to coat well. Season to taste and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
text: Recipe: Cherry Tomato And Basil Pasta. Ingredients: shell pasta, cherry tomatoes, extra virgin olive oil, basil, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to the package directions. Drain and place in a large serving bowl. Add the tomatoes, oil and basil to the pasta; toss to coat well. Season to taste and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.

title: Eggplant Parmigiana Roll Ups
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Spread 1 cup tomato sauce inside a deep baking dish.

Place eggplant slices on a clean work surface. Top each with ham. Combine ricotta and Parmesan. Season then distribute between eggplants. Roll up firmly to enclose and arrange in a single layer in prepared dish. Top with remaining pasta sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella and bake for 25-30 mins, until golden and eggplant is tender.
text: Recipe: Eggplant Parmigiana Roll Ups. Ingredients: tomato sauce, eggplant, ham, ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spread 1 cup tomato sauce inside a deep baking dish. Place eggplant slices on a clean work surface. Top each with ham. Combine ricotta and Parmesan. Season then distribute between eggplants. Roll up firmly to enclose and arrange in a single layer in prepared dish. Top with remaining pasta sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella and bake for 25-30 mins, until golden and eggplant is tender.

title: Mini Ham, Cheese And Tomato Frittatas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325°F. Grease a 12-cup mini muffin pan.
Beat eggs, milk, cheese and ham in medium bowl. Season. Spoon mixture into muffin pan. Top with cherry tomatoes.
Bake 20 mins, or until just set. Let stand in pan 5 mins before serving. Serve warm or at room temperature.
text: Recipe: Mini Ham, Cheese And Tomato Frittatas. Ingredients: eggs, milk, Cheddar cheese, ham, cherry tomatoes. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 325°F. Grease a 12-cup mini muffin pan. Beat eggs, milk, cheese and ham in medium bowl. Season. Spoon mixture into muffin pan. Top with cherry tomatoes. Bake 20 mins, or until just set. Let stand in pan 5 mins before serving. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Cheese And Ham Logs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking pan with parchment paper.

Combine the cream cheese and soup mix to make a smooth paste. Spread the bread generously with the cream cheese mixture. Top each slice with a ham slice. Roll up from the long side to form a log. Place the logs on the prepared pan. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with grated cheese.
Bake for 8-10 mins until golden.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Ham Logs. Ingredients: cream cheese, onion soup mix, bread, ham, butter, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking pan with parchment paper. Combine the cream cheese and soup mix to make a smooth paste. Spread the bread generously with the cream cheese mixture. Top each slice with a ham slice. Roll up from the long side to form a log. Place the logs on the prepared pan. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with grated cheese. Bake for 8-10 mins until golden.

title: Beef And Rice Rissoles
instructions: Combine beef, rice, tomato paste and egg in a medium bowl. Season then shape into 8 rissoles. Cook in a heated, oiled frying pan until browned all over and cooked through.
text: Recipe: Beef And Rice Rissoles. Ingredients: ground beef, cold cooked white rice, tomato, egg. Instructions: Combine beef, rice, tomato paste and egg in a medium bowl. Season then shape into 8 rissoles. Cook in a heated, oiled frying pan until browned all over and cooked through.

title: Quattro Formaggi Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in medium skillet on medium heat. Add cream; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, for 5 mins or until mixture reduces by half.
Remove pan from heat. Gradually add cheeses, stirring until sauce is almost smooth. Serve sauce with gnocchi or pasta.
text: Recipe: Quattro Formaggi Sauce. Ingredients: butter, heavy cream, Gorgonzola cheese, pecorino cheese, cheese, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Melt butter in medium skillet on medium heat. Add cream; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, for 5 mins or until mixture reduces by half. Remove pan from heat. Gradually add cheeses, stirring until sauce is almost smooth. Serve sauce with gnocchi or pasta.

title: Grilled Ham Caprese Panini
instructions: Using a serrated knife, remove crusts from bread. Cut bread horizontally into 4 equal slices.

For each panini, brush a slice of bread with 2 tsp oil. Place bread, oil side down, on a flat surface. Layer with 1/2 each of the mozzarella, ham, basil and tomato. Top with a slice of the remaining bread. Brush top of bread with 2 tsp oil. Repeat to make another panini.

Preheat a grill pan on medium heat. Brush with remaining oil. Pan grill the sandwiches, in batches, pressing down slightly with a spatula, 3 mins on each side, or until golden and heated through. Cut each panini into 3 pieces.
text: Recipe: Grilled Ham Caprese Panini. Ingredients: white bread, garlic, mozzarella cheese, ham, basil, tomatoes. Instructions: Using a serrated knife, remove crusts from bread. Cut bread horizontally into 4 equal slices. For each panini, brush a slice of bread with 2 tsp oil. Place bread, oil side down, on a flat surface. Layer with 1/2 each of the mozzarella, ham, basil and tomato. Top with a slice of the remaining bread. Brush top of bread with 2 tsp oil. Repeat to make another panini. Preheat a grill pan on medium heat. Brush with remaining oil. Pan grill the sandwiches, in batches, pressing down slightly with a spatula, 3 mins on each side, or until golden and heated through. Cut each panini into 3 pieces.

title: Ground Meat Sauce
instructions: Oil a large saucepan and place over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring, until softened. Add beef and cook, stirring, until browned. Add tomato paste and tomatoes. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for about 20 mins, or until thick. Season to taste. Serve.
text: Recipe: Ground Meat Sauce. Ingredients: Spanish onion, ground beef, tomato paste, tomatoes. Instructions: Oil a large saucepan and place over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring, until softened. Add beef and cook, stirring, until browned. Add tomato paste and tomatoes. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for about 20 mins, or until thick. Season to taste. Serve.

title: Perfect Mashed Potato
instructions: Place potatoes in medium saucepan; cover with water and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil on high heat. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, partially covered, 15-20 mins, until tender. Drain.
Return potatoes to the pan and shake over a medium heat to dry them out. Remove from heat and mash well. Beat in butter and enough milk or cream for a smooth consistency. Season to taste.
text: Recipe: Perfect Mashed Potato. Ingredients: potatoes, butter, hot milk. Instructions: Place potatoes in medium saucepan; cover with water and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil on high heat. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, partially covered, 15-20 mins, until tender. Drain. Return potatoes to the pan and shake over a medium heat to dry them out. Remove from heat and mash well. Beat in butter and enough milk or cream for a smooth consistency. Season to taste.

title: Baked Eggs With Ham And Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease four 1/2-cup ramekins. Place on a baking pan.
Divide ham and onions among ramekins. Break an egg into each and sprinkle evenly with cheese.
Bake for 8-10 mins, until egg yolk is just set. Serve with tomato chutney.
text: Recipe: Baked Eggs With Ham And Cheese. Ingredients: ham, green onions, eggs, Cheddar cheese, Tomato chutney. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease four 1/2-cup ramekins. Place on a baking pan. Divide ham and onions among ramekins. Break an egg into each and sprinkle evenly with cheese. Bake for 8-10 mins, until egg yolk is just set. Serve with tomato chutney.

title: Italian Sausage Calzones
instructions: Preheat oven to hot, 400°F. Line two baking sheets with parchment.
Heat oil in a large skillet on high. Saute onion and garlic 2-3 minutes.
Add sausage; saute an additional 4-5 minutes, until golden. Stir in tomato and basil; cook a further 2 minutes. Season to taste.
Place one sheet of pie dough on a clean surface. Cut into a round shape by trimming corners.
Spoon one-quarter sausage mixture into center of pastry. Top with one-quarter mozzarella. Brush edges with egg.
Fold over into a semicircle, pressing edges together with a fork to seal. Transfer to tray. Repeat with remaining pastry and filling.
Brush calzones with remaining egg. Bake 15-20 minutes, until golden brown.
text: Recipe: Italian Sausage Calzones. Ingredients: olive oil, onion, clove garlic, Italian sausages, tomato, basil, mozzarella, egg. Instructions: Preheat oven to hot, 400°F. Line two baking sheets with parchment. Heat oil in a large skillet on high. Saute onion and garlic 2-3 minutes. Add sausage; saute an additional 4-5 minutes, until golden. Stir in tomato and basil; cook a further 2 minutes. Season to taste. Place one sheet of pie dough on a clean surface. Cut into a round shape by trimming corners. Spoon one-quarter sausage mixture into center of pastry. Top with one-quarter mozzarella. Brush edges with egg. Fold over into a semicircle, pressing edges together with a fork to seal. Transfer to tray. Repeat with remaining pastry and filling. Brush calzones with remaining egg. Bake 15-20 minutes, until golden brown.

title: Bacon, Potato And Chicken Chowder
instructions: Place the potato cubes into a medium bowl and add enough cold water so the potato is covered.

Cook the bacon in a large saucepan on medium heat for about 5 mins or until browned. Add the white parts of the green onion and the garlic; cook for about 3 mins or until the onion is soft. Transfer the bacon mixture to a medium bowl.

Melt the butter in the same saucepan on medium heat. Add the flour and stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture becomes a smooth paste. Gradually whisk in the milk until smooth. Stir in the stock. Cook the mixture until it boils and thickens.

Drain the potato, then add to the pan. Reduce heat to low; simmer, covered, for about 10 mins or until the potato is tender. Stir the soup a few times to make sure it is not sticking to the bottom of the pan.
Stir the chicken and bacon into the potato mixture. Simmer, uncovered, for about 2 mins or until the chicken is heated through. Season to taste.
Using a ladle, divide the soup into four serving bowls. Sprinkle the soup with the remaining green onion and serve with bread.
text: Recipe: Bacon, Potato And Chicken Chowder. Ingredients: potatoes, green onions, garlic, bacon, butter, flour, milk, chicken stock, chicken, Crusty bread. Instructions: Place the potato cubes into a medium bowl and add enough cold water so the potato is covered. Cook the bacon in a large saucepan on medium heat for about 5 mins or until browned. Add the white parts of the green onion and the garlic; cook for about 3 mins or until the onion is soft. Transfer the bacon mixture to a medium bowl. Melt the butter in the same saucepan on medium heat. Add the flour and stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture becomes a smooth paste. Gradually whisk in the milk until smooth. Stir in the stock. Cook the mixture until it boils and thickens. Drain the potato, then add to the pan. Reduce heat to low; simmer, covered, for about 10 mins or until the potato is tender. Stir the soup a few times to make sure it is not sticking to the bottom of the pan. Stir the chicken and bacon into the potato mixture. Simmer, uncovered, for about 2 mins or until the chicken is heated through. Season to taste. Using a ladle, divide the soup into four serving bowls. Sprinkle the soup with the remaining green onion and serve with bread.

title: Basic Ham And Cheese Quiche
instructions: Lightly grease a 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom. Place on a baking pan.

Sift flour into a large bowl. Add butter. Rub in using fingertips, until mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Add yolk and enough ice-cold water (about 1 tbsp) to make a firm, but pliable dough. Knead lightly into a ball. Wrap in plastic wrap. Refrigerate 30 mins.

Preheat the oven to 400°F. Roll pastry between 2 sheets of parchment paper until large enough to fit prepared pan. Press into pan; trim edges. Refrigerate 15 mins. Line crust with parchment paper and fill with baking beans. Bake 15 mins. Remove paper and filling. Bake further 10 mins, until lightly golden. Cool. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
Heat oil and butter in a large skillet on medium heat. Saute onion 4-5 mins, until it begins to caramelize. Cool slightly. Sprinkle onion, ham and cheese evenly over crust.
Whisk cream, milk and eggs in a large bowl. Season to taste. Carefully pour into crust.
Bake 35-40 mins until set. Serve quiche hot or at room temperature with salad, if desired.
text: Recipe: Basic Ham And Cheese Quiche. Ingredients: flour, cold butter, egg yolk, FILLING, olive oil, butter, onion, ham, Cheddar cheese, light cream, milk, eggs. Instructions: Lightly grease a 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom. Place on a baking pan. Sift flour into a large bowl. Add butter. Rub in using fingertips, until mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Add yolk and enough ice-cold water (about 1 tbsp) to make a firm, but pliable dough. Knead lightly into a ball. Wrap in plastic wrap. Refrigerate 30 mins. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Roll pastry between 2 sheets of parchment paper until large enough to fit prepared pan. Press into pan; trim edges. Refrigerate 15 mins. Line crust with parchment paper and fill with baking beans. Bake 15 mins. Remove paper and filling. Bake further 10 mins, until lightly golden. Cool. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet on medium heat. Saute onion 4-5 mins, until it begins to caramelize. Cool slightly. Sprinkle onion, ham and cheese evenly over crust. Whisk cream, milk and eggs in a large bowl. Season to taste. Carefully pour into crust. Bake 35-40 mins until set. Serve quiche hot or at room temperature with salad, if desired.

title: Sauteed Potatoes
instructions: Place whole potatoes in a large saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil on high heat. Boil for 10-12 mins, until just tender. Drain well. Slice thinly.
Heat oil and butter in a large skillet on high heat. Saute potatoes for 6-8 mins, turning occasionally, until golden and crisp. Season to taste. Sprinkle with parsley to serve.
text: Recipe: Sauteed Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, olive oil, butter, parsley. Instructions: Place whole potatoes in a large saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil on high heat. Boil for 10-12 mins, until just tender. Drain well. Slice thinly. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet on high heat. Saute potatoes for 6-8 mins, turning occasionally, until golden and crisp. Season to taste. Sprinkle with parsley to serve.

title: Sesame Chicken Schnitzel
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a baking tray with parchment paper.

Combine breadcrumbs, sesame seeds, Parmesan and parsley in a shallow dish. Dust each chicken breast with flour, dip into egg then coat in breadcrumb mixture. Place on prepared tray, cover and chill for 20 mins.
Bake chicken for 30-35 mins, until golden and cooked through.

Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Cook potatoes for 3-5 mins, until starting to brown. Add red onion and cook for another 3-5 mins, until potatoes are golden and onion is soft. Season to taste. Serve with chicken schnitzel.
text: Recipe: Sesame Chicken Schnitzel. Ingredients: chicken, fresh breadcrumbs, sesame seeds, Parmesan cheese, parsley, all-purpose flour, eggs, olive oil, potatoes, red onion. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a baking tray with parchment paper. Combine breadcrumbs, sesame seeds, Parmesan and parsley in a shallow dish. Dust each chicken breast with flour, dip into egg then coat in breadcrumb mixture. Place on prepared tray, cover and chill for 20 mins. Bake chicken for 30-35 mins, until golden and cooked through. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Cook potatoes for 3-5 mins, until starting to brown. Add red onion and cook for another 3-5 mins, until potatoes are golden and onion is soft. Season to taste. Serve with chicken schnitzel.

title: Fresh Pasta Dough
instructions: Combine flour and 1/2 tsp salt in a food processor. With motor running, add eggs, 1 at a time. Process until dough is elastic and firm, about 2 mins. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead lightly. Wrap in plastic wrap and let rest for 30 mins.
On a lightly floured work surface, cut dough in 1/2 then roll out each section to 1/8 inch thick. Dust with flour then fold in 1/2 and cut into 1/4 inch wide strips.
Cook pasta in boiling, salted water for about 2-3 mins, until al dente. Drain and toss with olive oil, Parmesan and herbs. Serve.
text: Recipe: Fresh Pasta Dough. Ingredients: flour, eggs, olive oil, Parmesan cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Combine flour and 1/2 tsp salt in a food processor. With motor running, add eggs, 1 at a time. Process until dough is elastic and firm, about 2 mins. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead lightly. Wrap in plastic wrap and let rest for 30 mins. On a lightly floured work surface, cut dough in 1/2 then roll out each section to 1/8 inch thick. Dust with flour then fold in 1/2 and cut into 1/4 inch wide strips. Cook pasta in boiling, salted water for about 2-3 mins, until al dente. Drain and toss with olive oil, Parmesan and herbs. Serve.

title: Eggplant Parmigiana
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Pour enough oil into a large skillet to cover the bottom. Heat on medium heat. Cook eggplant in 2 batches 2-3 mins each side, until golden. Drain on paper towels.
Spread half the pasta sauce in bottom of a large shallow baking dish. Arrange eggplant on top. Season to taste. Top with remaining pasta sauce and shredded cheese.
Bake 10-15 mins until cheese melts. Serve topped with basil leaves, if desired, and accompany with a salad and crusty bread.
text: Recipe: Eggplant Parmigiana. Ingredients: eggplant, pasta sauce, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Pour enough oil into a large skillet to cover the bottom. Heat on medium heat. Cook eggplant in 2 batches 2-3 mins each side, until golden. Drain on paper towels. Spread half the pasta sauce in bottom of a large shallow baking dish. Arrange eggplant on top. Season to taste. Top with remaining pasta sauce and shredded cheese. Bake 10-15 mins until cheese melts. Serve topped with basil leaves, if desired, and accompany with a salad and crusty bread.

title: Boiled Egg With Toast Strips
instructions: Place the eggs in a medium saucepan; add enough cold water to cover the eggs. Cook on high heat, stirring water constantly a wooden spoon until it boils. This will ensure that yolks are in the center of the eggs when they are cooked.

Continue boiling, without a lid, until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness. As a guide, 3 mins will give you set egg white and soft yolk. After 5 mins, the yolk will be set as well (hard-boiled eggs).
Meanwhile, toast the bread, then spread with softened butter. Using a bread knife, cut crusts off the toast, then cut into four strips.

Pour off the hot water, being careful not to crack the eggs. Add cold running water for about 1 min or until the eggs are cool enough to hold. This will stop a dark ring forming around the yolks. Serve the eggs in egg cups with toast strips.
text: Recipe: Boiled Egg With Toast Strips. Ingredients: eggs, white bread, butter. Instructions: Place the eggs in a medium saucepan; add enough cold water to cover the eggs. Cook on high heat, stirring water constantly a wooden spoon until it boils. This will ensure that yolks are in the center of the eggs when they are cooked. Continue boiling, without a lid, until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness. As a guide, 3 mins will give you set egg white and soft yolk. After 5 mins, the yolk will be set as well (hard-boiled eggs). Meanwhile, toast the bread, then spread with softened butter. Using a bread knife, cut crusts off the toast, then cut into four strips. Pour off the hot water, being careful not to crack the eggs. Add cold running water for about 1 min or until the eggs are cool enough to hold. This will stop a dark ring forming around the yolks. Serve the eggs in egg cups with toast strips.

title: Tomato With Mozzarella, Burrata, Basil And Olive Oil
instructions: Mix all of the ingredients in a bowl. Season to taste and serve.
text: Recipe: Tomato With Mozzarella, Burrata, Basil And Olive Oil. Ingredients: tomatoes, green tomatoes, buffalo mozzarella, mozzarella with cream filling, basil, olive oil. Instructions: Mix all of the ingredients in a bowl. Season to taste and serve.

title: Sautéed Gnocchi With Chicken And Cream Sauce
instructions: For gnocchi, cook potatoes in boiling salted water for 20 mins. Drain. Once cool enough to handle, peel then pass warm potatoes through a potato ricer. Season and add nutmeg. Transfer to a floured work surface, add flour and egg and knead gently to form a smooth dough. Be careful not to overwork. Roll out into a 2/3 inch thick cylinder then cut into small pieces and shape into balls. Press flat with a fork.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and add gnocchi, in batches. When gnocchi float, remove with a slotted spoon and drain. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet and saute gnocchi, turning frequently for 4-5 mins. Remove from pan and keep warm.
Add chicken to pan and cook for 4-5 mins, turning occasionally. Deglaze with stock and cream, bring to a boil and add cream cheese. Add gnocchi and spring onions, bring to a boil, season and serve.
text: Recipe: Sautéed Gnocchi With Chicken And Cream Sauce. Ingredients: baking potatoes, nutmeg, flour, egg, olive oil, chicken breasts, chicken stock, heavy cream, cream cheese, spring onions. Instructions: For gnocchi, cook potatoes in boiling salted water for 20 mins. Drain. Once cool enough to handle, peel then pass warm potatoes through a potato ricer. Season and add nutmeg. Transfer to a floured work surface, add flour and egg and knead gently to form a smooth dough. Be careful not to overwork. Roll out into a 2/3 inch thick cylinder then cut into small pieces and shape into balls. Press flat with a fork. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and add gnocchi, in batches. When gnocchi float, remove with a slotted spoon and drain. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet and saute gnocchi, turning frequently for 4-5 mins. Remove from pan and keep warm. Add chicken to pan and cook for 4-5 mins, turning occasionally. Deglaze with stock and cream, bring to a boil and add cream cheese. Add gnocchi and spring onions, bring to a boil, season and serve.

title: Hot Dog Sliders
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°. Lightly grease and line a baking sheet. Cut the rolls open through the top, without cutting all of the way through. Place a hot dog into each roll and sprinkle with cheese. Bake for 5-10 mins or until the cheese melts and hot dogs are hot. Serve with the ketchup.
text: Recipe: Hot Dog Sliders. Ingredients: bread rolls, cocktail sausages, cheese, tomato ketchup. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°. Lightly grease and line a baking sheet. Cut the rolls open through the top, without cutting all of the way through. Place a hot dog into each roll and sprinkle with cheese. Bake for 5-10 mins or until the cheese melts and hot dogs are hot. Serve with the ketchup.

title: Roast Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Lightly oil a roasting pan.
Boil, steam or microwave potatoes for 5 mins; drain. Pat dry with paper towels. Cool for 10 mins.
Gently rake rounded sides of potatoes with tines of fork. Pace potatoes in a single layer, cut-side down, in prepared pan. Brush with oil.
Roast for 50 mins, or until potatoes are browned and crisp.
text: Recipe: Roast Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Lightly oil a roasting pan. Boil, steam or microwave potatoes for 5 mins; drain. Pat dry with paper towels. Cool for 10 mins. Gently rake rounded sides of potatoes with tines of fork. Pace potatoes in a single layer, cut-side down, in prepared pan. Brush with oil. Roast for 50 mins, or until potatoes are browned and crisp.

title: Tomato And Spring Onion Omelette
instructions: Heat the butter and oil in a large skillet and fry the bacon until crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels. Saute the white part of the onions and the garlic in the hot pan. Add 1/2 the tomatoes and cook briefly. Whisk together the eggs, cream and Parmesan cheese and season to taste. Pour into the skillet, cover and cook over low heat for 10-15 mins.
Serve the omelette sprinkled with the remaining tomato pieces, the green parts of the spring onions, herbs and bacon.
text: Recipe: Tomato And Spring Onion Omelette. Ingredients: butter, olive oil, bacon, spring onions, clove garlic, tomatoes, eggs, heavy cream, Parmesan cheese, parsley, fresh basil. Instructions: Heat the butter and oil in a large skillet and fry the bacon until crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels. Saute the white part of the onions and the garlic in the hot pan. Add 1/2 the tomatoes and cook briefly. Whisk together the eggs, cream and Parmesan cheese and season to taste. Pour into the skillet, cover and cook over low heat for 10-15 mins. Serve the omelette sprinkled with the remaining tomato pieces, the green parts of the spring onions, herbs and bacon.

title: Curried Sausages
instructions: Oil a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Working in batches, cook sausages until cooked through then cut into thirds.

Add butter to pan. Cook onion, stirring, until soft. Add curry powder and flour. Cook, stirring, for 2 mins. Add vegetables and stock. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 15 mins, or until vegetables are tender. Remove lid and add sausages. Simmer, uncovered, until sauce thickens slightly. Stir in parsley.
text: Recipe: Curried Sausages. Ingredients: beef sausages, butter, Spanish onion, curry powder, flour, carrots, stalks celery, baby new potatoes, beef stock, parsley. Instructions: Oil a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Working in batches, cook sausages until cooked through then cut into thirds. Add butter to pan. Cook onion, stirring, until soft. Add curry powder and flour. Cook, stirring, for 2 mins. Add vegetables and stock. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 15 mins, or until vegetables are tender. Remove lid and add sausages. Simmer, uncovered, until sauce thickens slightly. Stir in parsley.

title: Chicken Meatball Pasta
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground chicken, onion, garlic and basil. Season. Roll into walnut-sized meatballs and arrange on a baking tray. Chill for 15 mins.
Heat oil in a large frying pan over high heat. Cook meatballs for 4-5 mins, until browned on all sides. Drain on paper towels.
Combine pasta sauce and 1 cup water in a large frying pan. Bring to a boil then add meatballs. Reduce heat and simmer for 8-10 mins, until meatballs are cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and toss with sauce. Serve topped with basil and Parmesan.
text: Recipe: Chicken Meatball Pasta. Ingredients: ground chicken, onion, garlic, fresh basil, olive oil, pasta sauce, pasta, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground chicken, onion, garlic and basil. Season. Roll into walnut-sized meatballs and arrange on a baking tray. Chill for 15 mins. Heat oil in a large frying pan over high heat. Cook meatballs for 4-5 mins, until browned on all sides. Drain on paper towels. Combine pasta sauce and 1 cup water in a large frying pan. Bring to a boil then add meatballs. Reduce heat and simmer for 8-10 mins, until meatballs are cooked through. Meanwhile, cook pasta in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and toss with sauce. Serve topped with basil and Parmesan.

title: Perfect Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes in a medium saucepan and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil and cook over medium heat for 15 mins, or until tender. Drain.
Using the back of a wooden spoon, push potatoes through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl. Use spoon to stir in butter and hot milk, folding gently until mashed potatoes are smooth and fluffy.
