title: Momofuku Slow-Poached Eggs
instructions: Take a giant pot of water and put on the stove.
Put a steamer rack in it so the eggs aren't close to the element.
Bring the water up to 140 F and hold it there. Drop the eggs in their bath and let them soak for about 40-45 minutes.
*Turning the heat on for 30-45 seconds every 10 minutes or so is enough to keep the temperature in the proper range.
text: Recipe: Momofuku Slow-Poached Eggs . Ingredients: Eggs. Instructions: Take a giant pot of water and put on the stove. Put a steamer rack in it so the eggs aren't close to the element. Bring the water up to 140 F and hold it there. Drop the eggs in their bath and let them soak for about 40-45 minutes. *Turning the heat on for 30-45 seconds every 10 minutes or so is enough to keep the temperature in the proper range.

title: Fig Bars With Goat Cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Place 1 sheet of pie dough in a 9x13 inch baking dish and trim any excess edges to cover only the bottom of the pan.
Spread the fig jam evenly over the sheet of pie dough.
Mix the Chavrie(R) Goat Cheese with the egg and pour mixture over the fig jam.
Bake 8-12 minutes, until set.
Cool in refrigerator at least 3 hours, or overnight.
Remove from the refrigerator when completely chilled and cut into 1x 3 inch bars.
Arrange on a serving platter and garnish with sliced figs and grapes.
Drizzle each bar with honey before serving.
text: Recipe: Fig Bars With Goat Cheese . Ingredients: egg. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place 1 sheet of pie dough in a 9x13 inch baking dish and trim any excess edges to cover only the bottom of the pan. Spread the fig jam evenly over the sheet of pie dough. Mix the Chavrie(R) Goat Cheese with the egg and pour mixture over the fig jam. Bake 8-12 minutes, until set. Cool in refrigerator at least 3 hours, or overnight. Remove from the refrigerator when completely chilled and cut into 1x 3 inch bars. Arrange on a serving platter and garnish with sliced figs and grapes. Drizzle each bar with honey before serving.

title: Fantastic Parmesan Garlic Bread
instructions: Cut slices down the length of the bread loaf at 1" intervals, without cutting all the way through. Combine butter, garlic, parsley and Parmesan in a small bowl. Spread the butter mixture between the bread slices and on top of the loaf. Wrap bread in foil, leaving the top partially uncovered. Bake until heated through, about 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Fantastic Parmesan Garlic Bread . Ingredients: bread, butter, garlic, fresh parsley, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cut slices down the length of the bread loaf at 1" intervals, without cutting all the way through. Combine butter, garlic, parsley and Parmesan in a small bowl. Spread the butter mixture between the bread slices and on top of the loaf. Wrap bread in foil, leaving the top partially uncovered. Bake until heated through, about 15 minutes.

title: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Combine the potatoes and the garlic and put into a 4 qt sauce pan with enough water to cover the potatoes. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer and until they can be easily pierced with a fork. Drain potatoes and return them to the same sauce pan. Using a potato masher, mash the potatoes and then add no fat half and half, until the mixture is smooth. Add salt and pepper to taste.
text: Recipe: Garlic Mashed Potatoes . Ingredients: potatoes, garlic. Instructions: Combine the potatoes and the garlic and put into a 4 qt sauce pan with enough water to cover the potatoes. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer and until they can be easily pierced with a fork. Drain potatoes and return them to the same sauce pan. Using a potato masher, mash the potatoes and then add no fat half and half, until the mixture is smooth. Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: My Mother’S Chicken And Potatoes
instructions: 1. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat dry with paper towels. Trim off excess skin and all visible fat. Cut the drumsticks from the thighs. If using breast halves, cut into 2 small pieces.

2. Make the bacon roll-ups: cut the bacon slices in half crosswise and roll each strip into a neat, tight cylinder. Stick a toothpickthrough the roll to secure it; cut or break the toothpick so only a tiny bit sticks out (allowing the bacon to roll around and cook evenly)

3. Pour the canola oil into the skillet and set over high heat. Sprinkle the chicken with 1/4 teaspoon salt on all sides. When the oil is very hot, lay the pieces skin side down, an inch or so apart-watch out for oil spatters. Don't crowd the chicken: if necessary fry it in batches, similar pieces (like drumsticks) together.

4. Drop the bacon roll-ups into the oil around the chicken, turning and shifting them often. Let the chicken fry in place for several minutes to brown on the underside, then turn and continue frying until they are golden brown on all sides, 7 to 10 minutes or more. Fry breast pieces, only for 5 or so minutes, taking them out of the oil with tongs as soon as they are golden. Let the bacon roll-ups cook and get lightly crisp, but not dark, taking them out as they are done cooking. Adjust the heat to maintain steady sizzling and coloring.
Meanwhile, rinse and dry the potatoes. Slice each one through the middle on the axis that gives the largest cut surface, then toss them with the olive oil and 1/4 teaspoon salt.

6.When all the chicken and bacon is cooked and out of the skillet, pour off the frying oil. Return the skillet to medium heat and put in all the potatoes cut side down in a single layer into the hot pan. With a spatula, scrape all the oil out of the mixing bowl into the skillet; drizzle over a bit more oil if the pan seems dry. Fry and crisp the potatoes for about 4 minutes to form a crust, then move them around the pan, still cut side down, until they are all brown and crisp, 7 minutes or more. Turn them over and fry another 2 minutes to cook and crisp on their rounded skin sides.

7. Still over medium heat, add the onion wedges and rosemary branches to the pan with the potatoes and toss the ingredients around the pan. If using cherry peppers (either hot or sweet), cut the seeded halves into 1/2-inch wide pieces and scatter them in the pan too.

8. Return the chicken pieces-except breast pieces-to the pan, along with the bacon roll-ups; pour in any chicken juices that have accumulated. Raise the heat slightly, and carefully turn and tumble the chicken, potatoes, and onion (and bacon and/or pepper pieces), so they are heating and getting coated with pan juices-but take care not to break the potato pieces. Spread everything out in the pan-potatoes on the bottom as much as possible to keep crisping up-and cover.

9. Lower the heat to medium and cook for about 7 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally, then uncover and toss all the ingredients again. Cover and cook another 7 minutes or so, adding the breast pieces at this point. Give everything another toss. Cook covered for 10 minutes more.

title: Cucumber - Whiting - Shrimp Soup
instructions: Poach the whiting or haddock in hot simmering water. Remove the skin and bones. Cut the fish in small pieces (1/2 inch). Skin the cucumber, cut it lenghtwise in fourth, remove the seeds and cut the cucumber in small pieces (1/2 inch).
Bring the stock to just simmer. Add the cucumber and cook 5 minutes. Add the fish, let everything warm up. Take the pan from the heat, add the shrimps and cream. Stir and serve.
text: Recipe: Cucumber - Whiting - Shrimp Soup . Ingredients: chicken. Instructions: Poach the whiting or haddock in hot simmering water. Remove the skin and bones. Cut the fish in small pieces (1/2 inch). Skin the cucumber, cut it lenghtwise in fourth, remove the seeds and cut the cucumber in small pieces (1/2 inch). Bring the stock to just simmer. Add the cucumber and cook 5 minutes. Add the fish, let everything warm up. Take the pan from the heat, add the shrimps and cream. Stir and serve.

title: Baked Lemon Chicken With Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (205 degrees C).

Pour olive oil in an 8x8-inch glass baking dish. Place the chicken breasts in the dish, coating each side with oil. Squeeze the juice of 1/2 lemon over each chicken breast. Slice the rest of the lemon and place a lemon slice on top of each chicken piece.

Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 30 to 40 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 165 degrees F (74 degrees C).

Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat; add mushrooms. Cook and stir until mushrooms are brown and liquid is evaporated, about 6 minutes. Sprinkle flour over mushrooms and stir until coated. Add chicken broth, stirring to make a medium-thick sauce. Allow sauce to reduce, adjusting with a little more broth to make a creamy sauce. Add fresh parsley at the last minute. Spoon the sauce over the baked chicken breasts.

instructions: Mix all salad ingredients, including strained pinto beans. Sprinkle with taco seasoning to taste. Just before serving, add Fritos (to keep them from getting soggy). Serve and enjoy. A great favorite with my children.

title: Mustard Baked Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 175 degrees celcius.

Pour cream over just before serving. Use the cream and breadcrums mixture left in the dish as a sauce.

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the first three ingredients. Bring to boil and keep at a low boil 30 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in basil. Return to medium-low heat, add butter and cream and heat thoroughly. Serve immediately.

title: Farm Potatoes
instructions: Slice potatoes very thinly. In a lightly greased aluminum foil bag, or tin, combine potatoes, and desired amounts of onion and minced garlic, and 1 T of butter. Cover with aluminum foil. Cook over meduim heat, for approximately 30 - 45 minutes, until potatoes are tender. Peel back foil lid, and add sour cream. Top with shredded cheese. Close foil lid to allow cheese to melt. Stir and serve!

title: Egg In The Middle
instructions: First stamp a circle from the center of each slice of bread with a 2-inch cookie cutter and reserve.
Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a frying pan or skillet over medium heat, add the bread and reserved rounds ('hats') and fry until the undersides are lightly golden.
Turn the bread over, adding more oil if necessary.
Carefully break the eggs and ease them into the holes. (Sometimes I drain off a little of the white, but this is not a rule.)
Reduce the heat and cook until the whites are set and the yolks are beginning to set, but are still soft.
Using a spatula, transfer the slices of bread and eggs to a plate, with their hats over the yolks, and serve.

Using a spatula, transfer the slices of bread and eggs to a plate, with their hats over the yolks, and serve.

title: Onion Strips
instructions: Preheat oven to 425
Add onions to fry pan and cook stirring, till translucent, Cover and let cook till softened, about 5 min
Spread pizza crust dough over bottom of 13x9 pan, spread onions over dough and top with cheese.
Bake till dough is golden and cheese is melted about 15 min
transfer pan to wire rack and let cool
cut dough in half lenghtwise, cut each half into 10 strips

title: Creamy Caprese Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Boil water and cook pasta according to directions.

While pasta is cooking, heat tomato sauce over low heat in a large saucepan. Once warm, stir in heavy cream and grated parmesan. Once pasta is done cooking, drain and dump into the sauce, mixing to coat and turning off heat. Fold in mozzarella cubes and tomatoes, then chop 3-4 fresh basil leaves and add them in too. Once combined, spray a baking dish with non-stick spray and pour the entire pasta mixture into the dish. Top with fresh mozzarella rounds. Bake for 25 minutes, or until cheese is golden and bubbly.
Top with additional fresh basil and grated cheese. Serve with garlic bread.
text: Recipe: Creamy Caprese Pasta . Ingredients: whole wheat pasta, tomato sauce, heavy cream, freshly grated parmesan cheese +, mozzarella, grape tomatoes, basil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Boil water and cook pasta according to directions.  While pasta is cooking, heat tomato sauce over low heat in a large saucepan. Once warm, stir in heavy cream and grated parmesan. Once pasta is done cooking, drain and dump into the sauce, mixing to coat and turning off heat. Fold in mozzarella cubes and tomatoes, then chop 3-4 fresh basil leaves and add them in too. Once combined, spray a baking dish with non-stick spray and pour the entire pasta mixture into the dish. Top with fresh mozzarella rounds. Bake for 25 minutes, or until cheese is golden and bubbly.  Top with additional fresh basil and grated cheese. Serve with garlic bread.

title: Zuchini, Sweetcorn And Basil Soup
instructions: Heat the olive oil and butter in a large saucepan.
Add onions and potatoes with a good pinch of salt.
Cover and cook 10 mins.
Stirring occasionally.
Add zucchini, corn, cumin, and garlic.
Cook 2 mins.
Add stock, season and bring to the boil.
Reduce heat and simmer 10 mins or until the potatoes and corn are tender.
Set aside to cool a little.
Transfer one third of the soup and all of the basil to a food processor.
Blend until smooth.
Return to saucepan with other soup.
To serve:
Reheat soup and season if necessary.
Ladle into warm bowls.
Top with a spoonful of yoghurt extra basil and a drizzle of olive oil.

title: Best Pork Chops Ever
instructions: BEST PORK CHOPS EVER!! I KNOW because I have made this recipe a dozen or more times!!
In crock pot layer pork chops, add a can of cream of chicken soup, then sprinkle dry Ranch dressing all over.
Cover and cook on high for 4 hours OR Low for 6 hours.
The pork chops come out very tender and the flavor is amazing! You also get a good gravy for mashed potatoes
DO NOT ADD ANY WATER!!
SHARE this one it is AWESOME, & SOoo EASY!!

title: Deviled Eggs With Cucumber, Lemon And Herbs
instructions: Kathy's Note: Deviled eggs are such fun picnic food. The trick is making them ahead of time and figuring out a safe, secure way to transport them. You can pack them tightly in a covered shallow plastic container (use paper towels rolled into cigar shapes to create a buffer if there's room in the container and they are going to move around) These deviled eggs have a little makeover. I stuff the bottom of the cooked whites with a few surprises: cucumber, fresh herbs, and lemon. Then I top the fillings with a creamy egg mixture, so that each bite reveals a burst of flavor inside. Place the eggs on top of a bed of arugula, baby watercress or pea greens. Once you get the hang of these devilled egg surprises, you can create your own flavors; see below for some ideas to get you started. [sidebar title="Egg Tips: Hard Boiled and Cracking Secrets"] Place the eggs in a single layer in a large saucepan. Add cold water to cover the eggs by about an inch, and bring the water to a boil over high heat. When the water boils, cover the pan tightly, reduce the heat to low and cook 4 minutes. Remove the pan off the heat. Let the eggs sit for 10 minutes. Drain the water you cooked the eggs in out of the saucepan, keeping the eggs in the pan. Shake the pan back and forth and up and down a few times, so that the egg shells crack just a little. Then fill the pan with cold water; the water will seep into the cracks in the shells and separate the eggs from the shells, making them easier to peel once they've cooled.[/sidebar] Serves 8 to 12. Ingredients: 12 hard-boiled eggs (see below), peeled 1/4 cup mayonnaise 1 teaspoon Dijon-style mustard Salt and freshly ground pepper 1 cup cucumber, peeled and finely chopped 1 tablespoon lemon juice 1 tablespoon finely chopped scallions 1 tablespoon fresh minced chives Instructions: Using a small, sharp knife, cut each egg in half lengthwise. Carefully remove the yolks and place in a small bowl. Mash the yolks with a fork, and add the mayonnaise, mustard, and salt and pepper to taste. Place a tiny bit of the cucumber, lemon juice, scallions and chives into the bottom of the egg whites. Add the remaining cucumber, lemon juice, scallions and chives into the egg yolk mixture and gently stir. Fill each egg half with a spoonful of the yolk mixture. Favorite Variations: Substitute 1 cup of any of the following for the cucumber-lemon-scallion-chive mixture above and proceed with the recipe: Thin slices of pitted green and/or black olives Chopped roasted red pepper Crumbled blue cheese or goat cheese with scallions Cooked crumbled bacon and scallions Chopped smoked salmon (or bluefish) with fresh dill and grated lemon zest

title: Carrot & Cabbage Noodles
instructions: bring 2 cups water to boil - turn off heat & immerse noodles in hot water for 3-5 mins until noodles are soft but firm - rinse c cold water for 30 secs - drain well & set aside

heat oil in lg skillet over med high heast & add garlic - stir-fry for 1 min - add onion & br sugar & stir-fry 2-3 mins until onion is soft - add carrots, cabbage, chili sauce & soy sauce & stir-fry 5 mins - add noodles, mix well & stir-fry for 3-5 mins.
text: Recipe: Carrot & Cabbage Noodles . Ingredients: thai rice noodles. Instructions: bring 2 cups water to boil - turn off heat & immerse noodles in hot water for 3-5 mins until noodles are soft but firm - rinse c cold water for 30 secs - drain well & set aside heat oil in lg skillet over med high heast & add garlic - stir-fry for 1 min - add onion & br sugar & stir-fry 2-3 mins until onion is soft - add carrots, cabbage, chili sauce & soy sauce & stir-fry 5 mins - add noodles, mix well & stir-fry for 3-5 mins.

title: The Best Sausage Dip Ever!
instructions: Start with by cooking the sausage completely. Then in large bowl pour the sausage, including the sausage grease, in the bowl along with the cream cheese.
Add one packet at a time and mix well.
Then add the can of tomatoes and chilies.
Chill for at lease 15 minutes before serving.
Eat with chips.

title: Squash Macaroni And Cheese
instructions: In a medium saucepan over medium-high, add butternut squash, stock, milk and garlic. Bring to a boil and then reduce to a simmer until the squash is tender (about 20 minutes).

Remove from heat and add to the base of a blender. Add in the Greek yogurt and season with salt and pepper. Blend starting on low and slowly increase the speed, being careful to avoid splatters. Blend until smooth and then add in the Gruyere and Parmigiano-Reggiano. Blend again until combined and cheese is melted.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the cavatappi according to the package instructions.
Meanwhile, heat butter in a medium saute pan over medium heat. Add panko and cook until golden brown, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and set aside.
When pasta is done, drain and add it directly to the cheesy squash mixture.
Serve with the toasted panko sprinkled on top. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Tips
- Make the cheese-squash sauce ahead of time and warm before use.
- Buy pre-cut squash for easier preparation or steam/microwave a whole squash to easily cut and peel.
text: Recipe: Squash Macaroni And Cheese . Ingredients: cubed butternut squash, chicken stock, milk, garlic, yogurt, Gruyere cheese, pasta, butter, Italian seasoned panko breadcrumbs, parsley. Instructions: In a medium saucepan over medium-high, add butternut squash, stock, milk and garlic. Bring to a boil and then reduce to a simmer until the squash is tender (about 20 minutes). Remove from heat and add to the base of a blender. Add in the Greek yogurt and season with salt and pepper. Blend starting on low and slowly increase the speed, being careful to avoid splatters. Blend until smooth and then add in the Gruyere and Parmigiano-Reggiano. Blend again until combined and cheese is melted. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the cavatappi according to the package instructions. Meanwhile, heat butter in a medium saute pan over medium heat. Add panko and cook until golden brown, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and set aside. When pasta is done, drain and add it directly to the cheesy squash mixture. Serve with the toasted panko sprinkled on top. Garnish with chopped parsley.  Tips - Make the cheese-squash sauce ahead of time and warm before use. - Buy pre-cut squash for easier preparation or steam/microwave a whole squash to easily cut and peel.

title: Tomato Pie From Genie
instructions: Over caramelized onions & horseradish, add 1 layer of cheeses and tomato slices that have been salt & peppered. Then sprinkle that layer w/fresh chopped basil leaves and Italian seasoning.
Then add another layer of cheeses and tomato slices.
Bake @ 400 degrees on middle shelf for 30-35 minutes.
When taken out of oven, top with 4 whole basil leaves and serve.

title: Traditional Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook pasta in boiling salted water.
Dice the pancetta. Cook in large pan until done. While pancetta is cooking, slice green onions and set aside.
Beat eggs until all one color. Stir cheese into eggs and mix well and set aside.
When pancetta is done -DO NOT DRAIN-
Add in drained pasta, mixing to coat. Turn off heat.
Add onion and egg mixture stirring until just cooked.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Traditional Spaghetti Carbonara . Ingredients: green onions, eggs, mixed Italian cheeses. Instructions: Cook pasta in boiling salted water.  Dice the pancetta. Cook in large pan until done. While pancetta is cooking, slice green onions and set aside.  Beat eggs until all one color. Stir cheese into eggs and mix well and set aside.  When pancetta is done -DO NOT DRAIN-  Add in drained pasta, mixing to coat. Turn off heat.  Add onion and egg mixture stirring until just cooked.  Serve immediately.

title: Mom'S Czech Plum Dumplings
instructions: 1)Bake potatoes and rice on a board that has been lightly floured. Cover riced potatoes with clean cloth until cooled.
2)Sprinkle cooled potatoes with cr of wheat, flour and beaten egg.
3)Combine and knead till blended.
4)Roll dough into a fairly med to lg roll and slice off pieces.
5)Insert a plum into the center and completely seal.
6)Roll dumpling in flour and set aside intil water boils.
7)Drop dumplings into boiling water, simmer until dumplings float to the top, approx. 15-20 mins.
To serve: Cut open dumpling and drizzle with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
text: Recipe: Mom'S Czech Plum Dumplings . Ingredients: potatoes, flour, egg, Cream of wheat. Instructions: 1)Bake potatoes and rice on a board that has been lightly floured. To serve: Cut open dumpling and drizzle with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Ragin' Cajun Jambalaya
instructions: 1.Cook sausage and chicken in large saucepan over medium-high heat until chicken is no longer pink, stirring frequently. Remove from saucepan; cover to keep warm. Add onion and garlic to same saucepan; cook 3 minutes or until onion is crisp-tender, stirring frequently. Remove from saucepan and add to meat.

2.Add rice to same saucepan; cook 5 minutes or until light golden brown, stirring frequently. Return sausage and onion mixture to saucepan; mix well. Stir in undrained tomatoes, broth and tomato sauce; bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat to low and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender. Stir before serving.

title: Mama'S Rice Pudding
instructions: in large 6-8 qt pot slowly bring milk to boil.stirring,do not let scald.lower temperature add rice,sugar,vanilla and cinnamon.let cook till rice softens about 1 hour.stir often.when soft reserve some warm milk, about 3/4cup.remove cinnamon stick.depending on how thick you prefer,add egg yolk to milk also add 1 tablespoon flour.mix .you do not have to add flour at all,it helps to thicken pudding.slowly add egg and flour to pudding.let cook slowly on low until it thickens.add cinnamon on top.eat warm or cold.

title: Quite Edible Chicken Rice
instructions: In a large frypan that has a lid, add 3 cups of stock and the rice, over high heat. Stir to evenly distribute.
Nestle the chicken thighs into the top of the rice, smooth side up.
Tuck the garlic pieces in amongst the chicken.
Put the lid on, and turn the heat as low as possible.
Check after 20 minutes, and if required, gently pour over the rest of the stock. Give it another 5-10 minutes with the lid on if needed.
For first meal, serve a chicken thigh with lots of rice and spring onion sprinkled over the top.

For leftovers, remove the chicken thighs and slice up. Mash the garlic gloves into a paste and mix them, the cut up chicken and the rest of the spring onions until everything is reasonably evenly distributed. Freeze in containers or sandwich bags until required.
text: Recipe: Quite Edible Chicken Rice . Ingredients: chicken stock, long grain rice, garlic, chicken, spring onions. Instructions: In a large frypan that has a lid, add 3 cups of stock and the rice, over high heat. Stir to evenly distribute.  Nestle the chicken thighs into the top of the rice, smooth side up.  Tuck the garlic pieces in amongst the chicken.  Put the lid on, and turn the heat as low as possible.  Check after 20 minutes, and if required, gently pour over the rest of the stock. Give it another 5-10 minutes with the lid on if needed.  For first meal, serve a chicken thigh with lots of rice and spring onion sprinkled over the top.  For leftovers, remove the chicken thighs and slice up. Mash the garlic gloves into a paste and mix them, the cut up chicken and the rest of the spring onions until everything is reasonably evenly distributed. Freeze in containers or sandwich bags until required.

title: Chavrie Fresh Goat Cheese Souffle
instructions: Pre heat oven 400° F.
Butter and Flour a 8 oz. souffle ramekin and refrigerate until ready to use.
Melt the butter in a 1 qt. heavy gauge saucepan over medium heat add the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Add milk and simmer on low heat for 3-5 minutes stirring frequently.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the Chavrie, Parmesan cheese and dry mustard.
Season to taste with salt and white pepper.
Temper in the egg yolks mixing well and transfer the mixture to a stainless steel mixing bowl, cover with plastic wrap, set aside and keep warm.
Whip the egg whites in a mixer to a soft peak.
Gently fold 1/2 the whipped egg whites into the Chavrie mixture mixing well then repeat with the remaining half of the whipped egg whites.
Transfer into the butter floured ramekin and bake in the preheated oven for 15 - 20 minutes until the souffle rises and is golden brown.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Chavrie Fresh Goat Cheese Souffle . Ingredients: Butter, flour, Chavrie goat cheese, Butter, flour, Milk, Parmesan cheese, Egg yolks, mustard, Egg whites. Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the Chavrie, Parmesan cheese and dry mustard. Season to taste with salt and white pepper. Gently fold 1/2 the whipped egg whites into the Chavrie mixture mixing well then repeat with the remaining half of the whipped egg whites. Transfer into the butter floured ramekin and bake in the preheated oven for 15 - 20 minutes until the souffle rises and is golden brown. Serve immediately.

title: Judy'S Chopped Liver
instructions: Dry the livers with paper towels after cleaning them. Put livers and 1 of the onions in a heated no-stick frying pan with a small amount of oil. Saute until browned. Season with salt and pepper. Put the three hard boiled eggs in the food processor and remove after chopping. Place the raw onion in the food processor and chop. Then add the cooked livers and onion. Process the mixture together. Add the chopped egg and process to mix all the ingredients but not too much or it will become too much like a paste. After removing from the processor, adjust the seasoning to taste (salt and pepper). Refrigerate. Cannot be frozen because of the eggs.

After removing from the processor, adjust the seasoning to taste (salt and pepper). Refrigerate. Cannot be frozen because of the eggs.

title: Crushed Tomatoes
instructions: Start with the best canned plum or pear tomatoes you can find. I recommend Valoroso or DiNapoli brands. Whether you start with canned or cooked fresh tomatoes, you'll want to rinse your hands frequently as you work, so set up your station near the sink or have a bowl of cold water nearby.

Put a strainer over a bowl. Working over a second bowl, lift a tomato, pinch off the head (stem end) and any unripe areas, and let those pieces drop into the bowl. Some tomatoes may not be deep red. I prefer not to use those, but it's your call. Open up the tomato, remove any skins, seeds, or tough sections and add them to your discard bowl. Break the cleaned tomato into small pieces or strips and put them in the strainer. Keep in mind that these will not be blended, so if they look too coarse for your taste, run them through your fingers to make smaller pieces.

Continue cleaning and crushing tomatoes until you have the amount called for in your recipe. Press gently on the tomatoes to strain as much liquid as possible. Discard the contents of the discard bowl and the bowl below the strainer. One 28-ounce can of tomatoes should yield 1 generous cup (250 grams) crushed tomatoes. The glaze can be stored in a covered container at room temperature for several months.

title: Penne Pasta Quattro Formaggi & Butternut Squash
instructions: Toss squash with olive oil, sage and S&P and spread in a single layer on a baking sheet to roast for 15-20 min till tender. Remove and set aside.
Cook penne in salted water till al dente. Drain in colander under cold water. Drizzle with a little olive oil.
Make the cheese sauce: Bechemel and cook for 15 min until reduced by 1/3. Remove from heat and add cheeses.

Cut crusts from bread and cube slices. Make soft crumbs in food processor. Transfer to a bowl and added oil, melted butter and S&P, parmigiano and sage. Preheat to 400. Mix cheese sauce and squash to pasta and stir to mix well. Transfer to 9x13 baking dish and scatter crumbs over top. bake 10-12 min until heated through - cheese bubbly, top brown.

title: Spinach, Sausage And Cheese Bake
instructions: 1. Brown sausage in skillet over medium heat. Remove to drain fat, cook onion in drippings, then stir in tomato sauce. Set mixture aside.
2. Preheat Oven to 350 degrees F
3. Parboil greens in boiling water, let cool, drain water and chop
4. In large bowl, combine egg, ricotta, Parmesan and chopped greens. Spread over bottom of 9x13 in baking dish. Spoon sausage mixture over spinach mixture, then top with mozzarella cheese.
5. Bank in oven for 40 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly and brown.
text: Recipe: Spinach, Sausage And Cheese Bake . Ingredients: Italian Sausage, onion, tomato sauce, ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, egg, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: 1. Brown sausage in skillet over medium heat. Remove to drain fat, cook onion in drippings, then stir in tomato sauce. Set mixture aside. 2. Preheat Oven to 350 degrees F 3. Parboil greens in boiling water, let cool, drain water and chop 4. In large bowl, combine egg, ricotta, Parmesan and chopped greens. Spread over bottom of 9x13 in baking dish. Spoon sausage mixture over spinach mixture, then top with mozzarella cheese. 5. Bank in oven for 40 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly and brown.

title: Eggplant Parmesan
instructions: -Slice eggplant thin, put in egg and bread (sometimes twice), and fry in pan
-Layer with sauce and cheese in a glass pan & bake
text: Recipe: Eggplant Parmesan . Ingredients: Eggplant, Cheese, Bread Crumbs, Tomato Sauce, Egg. Instructions: -Slice eggplant thin, put in egg and bread (sometimes twice), and fry in pan -Layer with sauce and cheese in a glass pan & bake

title: Grilled Clams
instructions: Grill 4 pounds clams (such as littlenecks) over medium-high heat, covered, until they pop open, about 4 minutes; discard closed clams. Toss with
and top with celery leaves.
text: Recipe: Grilled Clams . Ingredients: Celery. Instructions: Grill 4 pounds clams (such as littlenecks) over medium-high heat, covered, until they pop open, about 4 minutes; discard closed clams. Toss with and top with celery leaves.

title: Korean Chicken Tteokbokki W Gaednip (Spicy Rice Cakes W Perilla Leaves)
instructions: If time permits, soak the tteok (rice cakes) in water for about 30 minutes or defrost at room temperature.
Saute the chicken pieces in a large pot with 1 tbsp of olive oil and soy sauce. Cook until pink is absent and add the minced garlic for 2, 3 minutes.
Pour 2 cups water into the pot and boil for a few minutes. Turn the heat down to medium and simmer.
Add the remaining ingredients (minus the perilla leaves & sesame seeds) to the pot and cook for 10 minutes. Continue cooking until rice cakes are soft and the sauce thickens up.
Lastly add the shredded perilla leaves.
Serve hot with rice or eat by itself.

*Some Koreans like to make a deeper, flavorful broth by boiling kelp, various vegetables, and dried anchovies (myulchi) and using it for the tteokbokki sauce. I have tried both ways (the short and long methods) and there really is not much difference in taste simply because the gochujang (red pepper paste) simply overpowers all other ingredients. However, if you're a traditionalist and like taking the longer route, then most likely I will be done eating by the time your broth settles into a suitable sauce.

title: Amarula Brown Elephant
instructions: Shake Amarula Cream and milk with ice and strain.
Add Coca Cola and mix gently.
Pour into a tall cocktail glass.
text: Recipe: Amarula Brown Elephant . Ingredients: Cream, milk. Instructions: Shake Amarula Cream and milk with ice and strain. Add Coca Cola and mix gently. Pour into a tall cocktail glass.

title: Cold Leek/Potatoe Cravmeat Soup
instructions: Saute green onions and boiled chopped leeks in butter. Pureee in blender. Return to pot and add soup mix along with cream and half and half. When throughtly mixed add crabmeat and remove from stove. Salt , Pepper . Black and Cayenne. Garnish with Cilantro or parsley after chilled. Serve cold.
text: Recipe: Cold Leek/Potatoe Cravmeat Soup . Ingredients: Ipint cream, green onions, butter. Instructions: Saute green onions and boiled chopped leeks in butter. Pureee in blender. Return to pot and add soup mix along with cream and half and half. When throughtly mixed add crabmeat and remove from stove. Salt , Pepper . Black and Cayenne. Garnish with Cilantro or parsley after chilled. Serve cold.

title: Terry'S Poached Chicken
instructions: Cook the chicken in 3/4" of water in a frying pan. The water should come up to the bone. Put the breasts on the bone with the skin side up. Boil covered for approximately 30 minutes. Remove from pan. Put in foil wrapped up like a piece of candy with the ends twisted. let it sit at room temp on a dish the put in the fridge when it's cooled off. Slice up the chicken the next day. You can put herbs in the water when boiling such as thume or dill. .

title: MarkS Roasted Garlic Rosemary Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F.
Using garlic press, squeeze garlic into large bowl. Whisk in oil and herbs. Add potatoes; toss to coat.
Spread potatoes in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Roast until tender and brown, stirring occasionally, about 1 hour 15 minutes.
Place potatoes in bowl; top with parsley.
text: Recipe: MarkS Roasted Garlic Rosemary Potatoes . Ingredients: garlic, olive oil, fresh Italian parsley. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Using garlic press, squeeze garlic into large bowl. Whisk in oil and herbs. Add potatoes; toss to coat. Spread potatoes in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Roast until tender and brown, stirring occasionally, about 1 hour 15 minutes. Place potatoes in bowl; top with parsley.

title: Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F with rack in middle.
Mince and mash garlic to a paste with a rounded 1/4 teaspoon salt using a heavy knife.
Stir together butter, oil, and garlic paste in a bowl until combined well; stir in parsley.
Halve loaf horizontally and divide butter mixture between halves, spreading it evenly.
Divide cheese between halves and spread it in an even layer.
Put halves, cheese side up, on a large baking sheet. Cover the bread with a large piece of foil, tenting it slightly on the top and tucking it under the bread.
Bake 15 minutes.
Remove foil and turn oven to broil. Broil bread until golden, 1-3 minutes.
text: Recipe: Garlic Bread . Ingredients: garlic, unsalted butter, extra-virgin olive oil, flat-leaf parsley, Italian bread, Parmesan. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F with rack in middle. Mince and mash garlic to a paste with a rounded 1/4 teaspoon salt using a heavy knife. Stir together butter, oil, and garlic paste in a bowl until combined well; stir in parsley. Halve loaf horizontally and divide butter mixture between halves, spreading it evenly. Divide cheese between halves and spread it in an even layer. Put halves, cheese side up, on a large baking sheet. Cover the bread with a large piece of foil, tenting it slightly on the top and tucking it under the bread. Bake 15 minutes. Remove foil and turn oven to broil. Broil bread until golden, 1-3 minutes.

title: Roasted Garlic
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees.

Using a double sheet of aluminum foil place 6 peeled garlic cloves in center. Pour 1/2 tsp. Extra Virgin Olive Oil over cloves and fold loosely over garlic. Place on a baking sheet and roast for 30 to 40 min. until very soft and slightly browned.
Allow to cool.
text: Recipe: Roasted Garlic . Ingredients: garlic. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Using a double sheet of aluminum foil place 6 peeled garlic cloves in center. Pour 1/2 tsp. Extra Virgin Olive Oil over cloves and fold loosely over garlic. Place on a baking sheet and roast for 30 to 40 min. until very soft and slightly browned. Allow to cool.

title: Noodles Bolognese
instructions: Boil noodles until tender and remove from water, retaining water in which noodles were cooked. Cook celery, onion, and carrot in oil in bottom of stew pot until tender over medium heat. Add Italian sausage; break into crumbled meat in the pan as it cooks, and cook until done. Add chicken broth and tomato sauce and heat all ingredients to temperature. Add cooked noodles and toss in sauce. Result should have a consistency like pasta in a thin sauce. Conduct final seasoning with basil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to taste. You can dilute the sauce/flavor by adding some of the retained pasta water. Serve in a bowl.
text: Recipe: Noodles Bolognese . Ingredients: egg noodles, onion, celery, carrot, chicken, tomato sauce, links of sweet Italian sausage, Olive oil, basil. title: Chili'S Southwestern Egg Rolls
instructions: 1. Preheat barbecue grillto high heat. 2. Rub the chicken breast with some veg. oil, then grill ir on the barbecue for 4 to 5 minutes per side till done.Lightly salt and pepper each side of the chicken while it cooks. Set chicken aside until it cools.3. Preheat one tbs of veg. oil in medium size skillet over medium high heat.4. Add red pepper and onion to pan and saute' till tender.5. Dice chicken into small cubes and add to pan. add corn,black beans,spinach,jalapeno peppers,parsley,cumin,chili powder,salt and cayenne pepper to the pan. cook for another 4 min. Stir well so that the spinach seperates and is incorporated into the mixture.6. remove pan from heat and add cheese.Stir until cheese is melted.7. wrap the tortillas in a moist cloth and microwave on high for one and a half minutes or untill hot.8. spoon approx. one fifth of the mixture into the center of the tortilla. Fold in the ends and then roll tortilla over the mixture. roll tortilla very tight,then pierce with a tooth pick to hold together. Repeat process to make five egg rolls Arrange egg rolls on a plate,cover the plate with plastic wrap and freeze for at least 4 hours, overnight is best.9. Preheat 4-6 cups oil to 375 degrees. 10. Deep fry egg rolls until golden brown. Remove to papertowels or on a rack to drain.11. You can garnish with the Avocada-ranch dipping sauce. It is one fourth cup smashed fresh avocado(about half of an avocado. one fourth cup of mayonnaise.one fourth cup sour cream. one tbs of buttermilk. one and a half tbs of white vinegar.One eighth tbs of salt.one eighth tbs of dried parsley. one eighth tbs of onion powder. Dash of dried dill weed. Dash of garlic powder and pepper.Combine all ingredients in small bowl. Happy eating

title: Baked Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Peel and cut in chunks. Boil to fork poke. Drain. Spray baking dish. Chunk up half stick of butter. Sprinkle brown sugar and drizzle with syrup. Bake 350 for 20-30 min.

title: Chicken Kebabs
instructions: Put the onion and garlic in a processor and blend to a pulp (this can also be done with a fine greater).
Put the pulp, Cumin, Cayenne pepper and oil into a large glass bowl and mix well.
Chop your chicken into 3mm cubes and add to the bowl; mix well, cover with clingfilm and marinade in the fridge for 1/2 hour or even over night if time allows.
Thread the chicken onto skewers and grill on a medium heat until cooked through, around 10 minutes.
Serve with warm pita and a tomato and cucumber salad.

title: Simple Fried Egg
instructions: over high heat use a small frying pan to get nice and hot. squirt some oil in the pan. crack your egg in to the pan and lower the heat as not to burn. then do the TV chef flip move to cook the other side, while still runny (the only way to eat it) slide egg onto a plate, finish with salt and pepper and get some bread. Enjoy

title: Slow-Roasted Tomatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°F with racks in upper and lower thirds.

Put tomatoes, cut side up, in 2 large 4-sided sheet pans. Combine garlic and oil and spoon over tomatoes. Season tomatoes with salt and pepper and roast in oven 6 to 8 hours (tomatoes will be greatly reduced in size but still moist). Cool.
text: Recipe: Slow-Roasted Tomatoes . Ingredients: tomatoes, garlic, extra-virgin olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 200°F with racks in upper and lower thirds. Put tomatoes, cut side up, in 2 large 4-sided sheet pans. Combine garlic and oil and spoon over tomatoes. Season tomatoes with salt and pepper and roast in oven 6 to 8 hours (tomatoes will be greatly reduced in size but still moist). Cool.

title: Homemade Spaghetti-O'S With Meatballs
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the ground chicken, pesto, breadcrumbs, 1/8 teaspoon salt and a pinch of black pepper. Use your hands to gently mix until well combined. Form the mixture into small meatballs (each about 3/4-inch round) using a heaping teaspoon measure. You'll get about 28 meatballs - set them on a plate, cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.

Set a large Dutch oven over medium heat and add the olive oil. When it shimmers, add the onion, carrot and celery. Cook for about 5 minutes, or until the onion is softened. Add the garlic and cook just until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Mix in the chicken broth and tomatoes (with their juice), scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and reduce the heat to medium-low. Continue cooking for 15-20 minutes, or until the carrot is softened.
Turn off the heat under the pot and puree the soup with an immersion blender until very smooth (or, if you don't have one, in a traditional blender - you'll probably want to do it in 2 batches).

Set the soup back over medium heat and return to a simmer. Add the pasta and meatballs and continue simmering for 12-15 minutes, or until the pasta and meatballs are cooked. Season to taste with salt and pepper before serving.
text: Recipe: Homemade Spaghetti-O'S With Meatballs . Ingredients: ground chicken, pesto, breadcrumbs, olive oil, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, chicken broth, tomatoes, pasta. Set a large Dutch oven over medium heat and add the olive oil. When it shimmers, add the onion, carrot and celery. Cook for about 5 minutes, or until the onion is softened. Add the garlic and cook just until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Mix in the chicken broth and tomatoes (with their juice), scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and reduce the heat to medium-low. Continue cooking for 15-20 minutes, or until the carrot is softened.  Turn off the heat under the pot and puree the soup with an immersion blender until very smooth (or, if you don't have one, in a traditional blender - you'll probably want to do it in 2 batches).  Set the soup back over medium heat and return to a simmer. Add the pasta and meatballs and continue simmering for 12-15 minutes, or until the pasta and meatballs are cooked. Season to taste with salt and pepper before serving.

title: Mom'S Spagetti And Meatballs
instructions: Sauce: In food processor, grind 1 1//2 -2 sweet onions and carrots until finely ground. Put in large dutch oven with olive oil, salt and pepper and cook over med. heat til soft. Process 1 1/2 heads of garlic until finely ground(save 1/2 head for meatballs). Add 1-2 T. tomato paste to pan, toast. Add 1 head finely ground garlic to pan. Cook 1 min. Add red wine, cook down for 5 min. Add tomatoes, sauce, 2t.each oregano and thyme, 1 T. each onion powder and garlic powder. Let this cook slowly to come together while making meatballs.

Meatballs: Place meat in bowl and season with following: 2 eggs, 1/2-1 c. fresh bread crumbs, 2 T. each garlic and on ion powder, 2 t. each dried thyme, oregano and basil, 1/4c. worcestershire sauce, 2 T. tomato paste, 1/2-3/4 finely ground onion, 2 finely ground carrots, rest of finely ground cloves garlic, salt and pepper. Add milk if mix is dry. Mix gently with hands until well mixed but don't mash the meat. With sauce gently bubbling, form into balls and add directly to sauce. Do not stir for at least 5 min. so you don't break apart meatballs and then gently stir(I use a chop stick) to make sure they are not sticking on the bottom. Let this cook several hours on low. To finish, taste for seasoning, add fresh basil and top with parmesan.
text: Recipe: Mom'S Spagetti And Meatballs . Ingredients: ground beef. Instructions: Sauce: In food processor, grind 1 1//2 -2 sweet onions and carrots until finely ground. Put in large dutch oven with olive oil, salt and pepper and cook over med. heat til soft. Process 1 1/2 heads of garlic until finely ground(save 1/2 head for meatballs). Add milk if mix is dry. Mix gently with hands until well mixed but don't mash the meat. With sauce gently bubbling, form into balls and add directly to sauce. Do not stir for at least 5 min. so you don't break apart meatballs and then gently stir(I use a chop stick) to make sure they are not sticking on the bottom. Let this cook several hours on low. To finish, taste for seasoning, add fresh basil and top with parmesan.

title: Cheesburger Soup
instructions: Saute the ground beef and chopped onion in a large skillet/pan over a medium heat. Mix the beef to prevent it sticking to the pan, cook until its browned all over. Drain and set aside, we will use the same skillet next.

Saute the chopped celery, chopped carrots, parsley and basil in 2 tablespoon of the butter in the skillet. When the carrots are tender, add the chicken stock and bring to the boil. Now add the diced potatoes and cooked beef and simmer gently for 10-12 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.

In a separate small skillet melt the remaining butter, stir in the flour and cook through until it combines. Whisk in the milk and cook until the whole mixture thickens and becomes smooth. Add this to the soup and bring to the boil one more time.
Reduce the heat and mix in the cheese and season. When the cheese has melted remove the pot from the heat.
Original Cheeseburger Soup: serve with a spoonful of sour cream in each bowl.
text: Recipe: Cheesburger Soup . Ingredients: ground beef, potatoes, carrot, onion, celery stalk, chicken stock, basil, parsley, butter, American cheese /, milk, flour, salt. Instructions: Saute the ground beef and chopped onion in a large skillet/pan over a medium heat. Mix the beef to prevent it sticking to the pan, cook until its browned all over. When the carrots are tender, add the chicken stock and bring to the boil. Now add the diced potatoes and cooked beef and simmer gently for 10-12 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender. In a separate small skillet melt the remaining butter, stir in the flour and cook through until it combines. Whisk in the milk and cook until the whole mixture thickens and becomes smooth. Add this to the soup and bring to the boil one more time. Reduce the heat and mix in the cheese and season. When the cheese has melted remove the pot from the heat. Original Cheeseburger Soup: serve with a spoonful of sour cream in each bowl.

title: French Onion Meatloaf
instructions: 1. Heat oven 350 degrees.
2. Reserve 1/4 c. cheese from Fresh Take pkg. Mix remaining cheese with bread crumbs, meat yellow onions, green onions, eggs and half the fried onions just until blended.
3. Shape into 10x6 in. loaf in 13x9 in. pan sprayed with cooking spray.
4. Bake 1 hour. Top with remaining fried onions and reserved cheese; bake 15 min. or until cheese is melted and meatloaf is done.
text: Recipe: French Onion Meatloaf . Ingredients: four cheese, lean ground beef, yellow onions, green onions, eggs, onions. Instructions: 1. Heat oven 350 degrees. 2. Reserve 1/4 c. cheese from Fresh Take pkg. Mix remaining cheese with bread crumbs, meat yellow onions, green onions, eggs and half the fried onions just until blended. 3. Shape into 10x6 in. loaf in 13x9 in. pan sprayed with cooking spray. 4. Bake 1 hour. Top with remaining fried onions and reserved cheese; bake 15 min. or until cheese is melted and meatloaf is done.

title: Mushroom Chicken
instructions: Grease pan with olive oil
Place chicken in pan
Pour soup over chicken
text: Recipe: Mushroom Chicken . Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, olive oil, chicken breasts. Instructions: Grease pan with olive oil Place chicken in pan Pour soup over chicken

title: Asparagus Soup
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy medium saucepan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until tender, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes. Add flour and stir 2 minutes. Gradually mix in canned chicken broth. Bring mixture to boil. Add asparagus pieces and summer savory and simmer until asparagus is very tender, about 25 minutes. Cool slightly.

Drain asparagus, reserving cooking liquid. Puree asparagus in food processor. With machine running, Gradually add 1/2 cup cooking liquid. Return mixture to saucepan. Season with salt and pepper. (Soup can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.) Bring soup to simmer. Ladle into bowls. Top with dollops of sour cream or yogurt, if desired.
text: Recipe: Asparagus Soup . Ingredients: butter, onion, flour, chicken broth, Sour cream. Instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy medium saucepan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until tender, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes. Add flour and stir 2 minutes. Gradually mix in canned chicken broth. Bring mixture to boil. Add asparagus pieces and summer savory and simmer until asparagus is very tender, about 25 minutes. Cool slightly. Drain asparagus, reserving cooking liquid. Puree asparagus in food processor. With machine running, Gradually add 1/2 cup cooking liquid. Return mixture to saucepan. Season with salt and pepper. (Soup can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.) Bring soup to simmer. Ladle into bowls. Top with dollops of sour cream or yogurt, if desired.

title: Chicken Wing King
instructions: Wash chicken wings and allow to partly dry. You can break the chicken wings down into drumette, wingette and wing tips if desired, I like them as they are.
In a bowl mix flours and spice. Line a baking tray with baking paper

Grab an old shopping bag and add the dry mix and chicken wings. Seal the bag with your hand or a tie and then shake, shake, shake. Open bag and check but you should have a bag of perfectly coated chicken wings.
Lay chicken wings onto the baking paper tray and allow to sit letting the chicken juices absorb into the flour. This will give you a great finish.
Heat oven to 200 degrees C and cook Chicken wings for 30-40 minutes, turn wings over half way.
When cooked serve on large trays to the waiting crowds with sauces and dips to your liking.

title: Sicilian Eggplant
instructions: Saute garlic 2 minutes add tomatoes, cook until thickened (30min) add basil

over med heat, brush nonstick pan with olive oil add eggplant, cook until eggplant starts to color on bottom, flip and cook until soft. stack eggplant on cutting board. mix bread crumbs, parsley, garlic cheeses, and egg. Cut skin off eggplant. Place a big spoonful of mixture in each eggplant slice and roll eggplant around mixture. Place in pan. Pour sauce over eggplant. bake at 375 for 35-40 minutes.

title: Scallion Pancakes
instructions: in sm saucepan, bring 1/2 cup water to boil - in med bowl combine flour c 1/2 tsp salt - slowly stir in the boiling water c a fork until a sticky ball forms - wrap dough in oiled plastic wrap & let rest for 45 mins or overnight in refrig -
on floured surface roll out dough into a thin rectangle about 8 x 10" - brush c sesame oil, sprinle c scallions & season c salt & pepper

roll up dough from long side, jelly-roll style - cut crosswise into 4 equal pieces - roll out 1 piece into thin rectangular pancake c floured rolling pin - fold in 1/2 & flatten into pancake - repeat folding & flattening a few more times - dust c flour if necessary to prevent sticking - repeat c remaining pieces of dough to form 4 rectangular 1/8 " thick pancakes - scraping the sticky dough fr rolling pin & work surface & adding a light sprinkle of flour btwn ea turn
in lg skillet heat 1 - 2 tbl oil over med heat - fry pancakes 2 @ a time until edges are golden brown, about 4 mins per side - remove - cut into wedges & sprinkle c salt
text: Recipe: Scallion Pancakes . Ingredients: flour +. Instructions: in sm saucepan, bring 1/2 cup water to boil - in med bowl combine flour c 1/2 tsp salt - slowly stir in the boiling water c a fork until a sticky ball forms - wrap dough in oiled plastic wrap & let rest for 45 mins or overnight in refrig - on floured surface roll out dough into a thin rectangle about 8 x 10" - brush c sesame oil, sprinle c scallions & season c salt & pepper roll up dough from long side, jelly-roll style - cut crosswise into 4 equal pieces - roll out 1 piece into thin rectangular pancake c floured rolling pin - fold in 1/2 & flatten into pancake - repeat folding & flattening a few more times - dust c flour if necessary to prevent sticking - repeat c remaining pieces of dough to form 4 rectangular 1/8 " thick pancakes - scraping the sticky dough fr rolling pin & work surface & adding a light sprinkle of flour btwn ea turn in lg skillet heat 1 - 2 tbl oil over med heat - fry pancakes 2 @ a time until edges are golden brown, about 4 mins per side - remove - cut into wedges & sprinkle c salt

title: Rick Bayless' Pork Carnitas
instructions: 1. Place in deep baking dish with 1-2 C water. Bake, covered, at 350 1 hour.

3. Remove fat and cut pork into chunks
4. Optional: Brown a bit more in pork fat
5. Serve hot with tortillas and mexican condiments

title: Earlene'S White Chicken Chili
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium-low heat. Saute the onions until tender. Stir in the garlic, jalapeno, green chile peppers, cumin, oregano and cayenne. Continue to cook and stir the mixture until tender, about 3 minutes. Carefully stir in the chicken broth, chicken and white beans. Simmer on low 45 minutes, stirring often.Remove the mixture from heat. Chili keeps well in a crockpot. Top with cheese, chips, avocado, sour cream and a lime wedge. Serve warm.

title: Mommy'S Lasagna
instructions: 1. Cook one pound ground beef, 1/2 cup chopped onion, and 1 glove chopped garlic till meat is browned. Drain off fat.
2. Stir in undrained 16-ounce can tomatoes (cut up), 1 8-ounce can tomato sauce, 1 6-ounce can tomato paste, and 2 teaspoons dried basil. Cover and simmer 15 minutes, stirring often.
3. Meanwhile, cook 8 ounces lasagna noodels til tender in boiling salted water. Drain.
4. Beat 2 eggs. Add 2.5 cups ricotta cheese, 1/2 cup parmesan cheese, 2 teaspoons dried parsley, salt, and pepper.
5. Layer half of the noodles in a 13x9x2 inch baking dish; spread with half of the ricotta filling. Add half of the tomato sauce and meat sauce. Repeat layers. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup parmesan cheese.
6. Bake in 375 degree oven for 35 minutes or till heated through. Let stand 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Mommy'S Lasagna . Ingredients: ground beef, onion, tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, basil, noodels, eggs, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, parsley. Instructions: 1. Cook one pound ground beef, 1/2 cup chopped onion, and 1 glove chopped garlic till meat is browned. Drain off fat.  2. Stir in undrained 16-ounce can tomatoes (cut up), 1 8-ounce can tomato sauce, 1 6-ounce can tomato paste, and 2 teaspoons dried basil. Cover and simmer 15 minutes, stirring often.  3. Meanwhile, cook 8 ounces lasagna noodels til tender in boiling salted water. Drain. 4. Beat 2 eggs. Add 2.5 cups ricotta cheese, 1/2 cup parmesan cheese, 2 teaspoons dried parsley, salt, and pepper. 5. Layer half of the noodles in a 13x9x2 inch baking dish; spread with half of the ricotta filling. Add half of the tomato sauce and meat sauce. Repeat layers. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup parmesan cheese. 6. Bake in 375 degree oven for 35 minutes or till heated through. Let stand 10 minutes.

title: Italian Sausage/Spinich Pasta
instructions: Heat a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat and add the sausage. Once the sausage has begun to release oil, after about 2 minutes, add the onion and cook, stirring, until the sausage is cooked through, about 5 more minutes. Spoon or drain off fat, then add 5 cups of chicken broth and bring to a boil (use more if needed). Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes. Add the spinach and cover to wilt, about 3 minutes (do this in batches if the pot is too small). Stir in the half-and-half and Parmesan cheese, then continue to stir until the sauce thickens, about 5 minutes. Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Italian Sausage/Spinich Pasta . Ingredients: ITALIAN SAUSAGE, Italian sausage, onion, chicken broth, thin spaghetti, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Heat a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat and add the sausage. Once the sausage has begun to release oil, after about 2 minutes, add the onion and cook, stirring, until the sausage is cooked through, about 5 more minutes. Spoon or drain off fat, then add 5 cups of chicken broth and bring to a boil (use more if needed). Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes. Add the spinach and cover to wilt, about 3 minutes (do this in batches if the pot is too small). Stir in the half-and-half and Parmesan cheese, then continue to stir until the sauce thickens, about 5 minutes. Serve immediately.

title: Scalloped Potatoes With Pork Chops
instructions: * In a saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour, salt and pepper. Add chicken broth; cook and stir constantly until mixture boils. Cook for 1 minute; remove from the heat and mix in sour cream. Set aside.
In a skillet, brown pork chops in oil; season to taste with additional salt and pepper if desired.

* Place pork chops on bottom of a greased 13-in. x 9-in. baking dish. Layer potatoes and onion. Pour the broth mixture over. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour; uncover and bake 30 minute longer or until potatoes are tender. If desired, sprinkle with paprika and parsley. Yield: 6 servings.

title: Asian Pot Roast
instructions: Roll our enough foil to be able to wrap the roast. Place roast on foil and wrap up sides to make a "bowl". Pour sauces over the roast ... use as little or as much as you want. Finish wrapping the roast in the foil and place on a cookie sheet (to catch any wandering drippings.) Roast in 350 degree oven for 1 1/2 or 2 hours, reducing heat to 225 degrees for 1 - 2 hours, depending on the size of your roast. Bring heat up to 425 degrees for last 10 minutes. Serve. We like to serve it over rice.

title: Garlic Potatoes
instructions: Simmer whole potatoes in salted water until tender. Drain and cool for one hour or longer.
Peel potatoes, or leave skins on. Cut into 1/4" slices.
Combine sour cream, garlic, flour, salt, and white pepper to taste.
Lightly butter 8"x11" casserole. spread 1/4 of the cream mixture in the bottom. Top with half the potatoes. Spread 1/2 the remaining cream and then with 1/2 the Gruyere cheese.
Repeat with potatoes, cream, Gruyere.
Bake at 300' F. for 45 minutes. Broil 1-2 minutes to brown before serving.
text: Recipe: Garlic Potatoes . Ingredients: all-purpose potatoes, sour cream, flour, garlic, Gruyere cheese. Instructions: Simmer whole potatoes in salted water until tender. Lightly butter 8"x11" casserole. spread 1/4 of the cream mixture in the bottom. Top with half the potatoes. Spread 1/2 the remaining cream and then with 1/2 the Gruyere cheese. Repeat with potatoes, cream, Gruyere. Bake at 300' F. for 45 minutes. Broil 1-2 minutes to brown before serving.

title: Quark (Sour Fresh Cheese)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 150°F/65°C. Pour the buttermilk into a baking dish and cover tightly with aluminum foil or a lid.

Place the baking dish in the oven and bake for 8 to 12 hours. When the buttermilk is ready to drain, the solids will have separated from the whey, either in soft clumps or in one lightly set uniform mass.

title: Buttermilk Quark
instructions: Preheat the oven to 150 degrees F. Pour the buttermilk into a large overnproof baking dish or Dutch oven with lid. Cover and place in the oven 8 to 12 hours.

Line a colander with a double layer of butter muslin and set over a large bowl. Pour the buttermilk into the cloth and cover with the ends of the butter muslin. Let the buttermilk drain at room temperature for about 6 hours (after about 1 hour, weight the buttermilk by placing a plate on top to encourage the whey to drip through the muslin).
The curds in the cloth are the cheese (quark). Transfer to a medium bowl and cover and store the quark for 1 week in the refrigerator.
text: Recipe: Buttermilk Quark . Ingredients: buttermilk. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 150 degrees F. Pour the buttermilk into a large overnproof baking dish or Dutch oven with lid. The curds in the cloth are the cheese (quark). Transfer to a medium bowl and cover and store the quark for 1 week in the refrigerator.

title: Pasta With Lentil Bolognese
instructions: 1. In a large pot over medium heat, warm the olive oil. Add the onion, carrot, celery, and garlic and cook slowly until the vegetables soften and turn golden, about 20 minutes.

2. Increase heat to medium-high and add the tomato paste. Cook until the mixture dries out a bit, about 3 minutes. Pour in the reserved juice from the tomatoes and cook, scraping the browned bits from the bottom of the pan, until the liquid has reduced by half, 1 to 2 minutes.

3. Stir in the lentils, tomatoes, and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Season with the salt and pepper and simmer until the lentils are tender, 30 minutes to 1 hour, depending on the lentils. (If the sauce begins to dry out, add additional water as needed.) Reduce heat to low and keep warm.
4. Cook the pasta according to the package directions; drain. Serve with the lentil sauce, sprinkle with the pecorino, and garnish with the basil, if desired.
text: Recipe: Pasta With Lentil Bolognese . Ingredients: extra-virgin olive oil, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, tomato paste, tomatoes, salt, pasta, Pecorino cheese, Fresh basil. Instructions: 1. In a large pot over medium heat, warm the olive oil. Add the onion, carrot, celery, and garlic and cook slowly until the vegetables soften and turn golden, about 20 minutes. 2. Increase heat to medium-high and add the tomato paste. Cook until the mixture dries out a bit, about 3 minutes. Pour in the reserved juice from the tomatoes and cook, scraping the browned bits from the bottom of the pan, until the liquid has reduced by half, 1 to 2 minutes. 3. Stir in the lentils, tomatoes, and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Season with the salt and pepper and simmer until the lentils are tender, 30 minutes to 1 hour, depending on the lentils. (If the sauce begins to dry out, add additional water as needed.) Reduce heat to low and keep warm. 4. Cook the pasta according to the package directions; drain. Serve with the lentil sauce, sprinkle with the pecorino, and garnish with the basil, if desired.

title: No-Brainer Pancakes
instructions: Place 2 1/2 cups BA Biscuit Mix in a large bowl and set aside. Separate 3 large eggs, placing yolks in a medium bowl and whites in a large bowl. Add 1 1/4 cups whole milk to the yolks; whisk to combine. Whisk egg whites until medium peaks form. Working quickly, stir milk mixture into dry ingredients until just combined. Fold in egg whites. Cook in batches in a buttered skillet or on a griddle.
text: Recipe: No-Brainer Pancakes . Ingredients: eggs, milk. Instructions: Place 2 1/2 cups BA Biscuit Mix in a large bowl and set aside. Separate 3 large eggs, placing yolks in a medium bowl and whites in a large bowl. Add 1 1/4 cups whole milk to the yolks; whisk to combine. Whisk egg whites until medium peaks form. Working quickly, stir milk mixture into dry ingredients until just combined. Fold in egg whites. Cook in batches in a buttered skillet or on a griddle.

title: Sherry- Blue Cheese Chicken With Fried Baby Eggplant
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Coat the pan with the oil. Lay the chicken on the pan and brown on each side, about 3 minutes per side. Add the sherry and bring to boil. Reduce the heat to medium-high and whisk in the blue cheese. Cover and cook for 6 more minutes, turning once. Place two pieces of pancetta on each piece of chicken. Cover and remove from the heat.

While the chicken is cooking, heat the oil for the eggplant in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Test the temperature of the oil by carefully dripping water into the oil. If it spits, it is ready for cooking. In a shallow dish whisk together the eggs and pour the breadcrumbs into another shallow dish. Coat the eggplant pieces with the egg followed by the bread crumbs. Use your fingers to gently push down on the breadcrumbs so they stay put will cooking. Carefully place the eggplant in the oil with a slotted spoon. Cook for 1-2 minutes per side. Remove with the slotted spoon and drain on a paper towels.
Next, carefully lower the basil into the oil with the slotted spoon. Cook for 30 seconds, remove and drain on a paper towel. Be certain to blot off excess oil from both the eggplant and the basil.

To arrange, plate one piece of eggplant. Place the chicken on top (pancetta side facing up), then another piece of eggplant and then a few fried basil leaves. Top with a spoonful of the sherry-blue cheese sauce. Enjoy!

title: Blue'S Cheesey Italian Dipping Sauce
instructions: Place cheese in the center of a baking dish - a casserole dish or crock that will handle liquid as well. Top with tomato, season with Oregano, Basil or other seasonings to taste. Bake at 350 for 15 minutes, or until cheese has melted and sauce is bubbly. Stir so the cheese is evenly distributed through the tomato sauce.
Serve with crackers or bread and vegetables as an appetizer.

title: The Ultimate, Prime Rib
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 500.
2. When purchasing a roast, purchase about 3/4 pound per person. I don't usually serve it with the bone (it takes up too much room on the plate.

3. Prepare Roast by inserting slivers of Garlic all around, oil, and rub Lots of Salt, Pepper, and Blacken into the meat, place meat on a rack in baking dish. Place meat thermometer in the thickest part.
Prime Rib

4. Place the meat in for 15 minutes then turn down to 275 deg., without opening the door. Cook an additional 1 3/4 hours or until the meat thermometer reads 110 - 120 deg., 110 = rare, and 120 deg. = med. rare. If you'll like well done meat, don't waste your money on a prime rib.
This timing works good for a roast that is 6" - 7" in diameter.
5. Don't cook it rare because it'll be quite tough.

6. Take out of the oven and let rest for 20-30 minutes loosely covered with alum. foil; this permits the meat to finish cooking and the juices to stop being too runny. Don't worry about letting it rest too long because there isn't such a thing with Prime Rib (it's usually served at room temperature). Letting it rest, covered, lets it finish cooking, If you leave the thermometer in, you'll notice that it will actually go up about 10 degrees. If you wish to make gravy (sauce), you can set the meat on a separate platter, cover with aluminum foil, and use the pan drippings for the base of a sauce. If you leave the meat thermometer in, you will notice that it gets a little hotter while its resting.

7. If you don't have a rack to place the meat on, you can use rough cut carrots and onions. Make sure you spray some Pam on the pan prior to putting the vegetables in. Later, you can place these vegetables into the pot you're making the gravy in, and grind them up with an immersion blender ton become part of the gravy.

title: Buttermilk Biscuits
instructions: Cream together with pastry cutter until combined and well mixed. Do not overmix. Form into a ball, and roll out to a flat pancake, somewhat thick. cut out biscuits. Bake at 425 for 22 minutes.

title: Creamy Chicken And Wild Rice Soup
instructions: In a large Dutch oven heat oil over medium heat.
Add carrots, celery, onion, garlic and salt and pepper to taste; cook and stir 6 to 8 minutes or until softened.
Add butter; cook until melted. Sprinkle vegetables with flour; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes.
Gradually add broth, stirring to loosen up any browned bits.
Add chicken and rice blend. Bring to boiling. Reduce heat to a simmer, and cook 15 to 20 minutes or until rice is al dente. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add half and half and Parmesan; stir until soup is creamy and cheese melts.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Creamy Chicken And Wild Rice Soup . Ingredients: olive oil, carrots, celery, onion, garlic, butter, chicken broth, chicken breasts, quick cooking wild rice blend, freshly grated Parmesan. Instructions: In a large Dutch oven heat oil over medium heat.  Add carrots, celery, onion, garlic and salt and pepper to taste; cook and stir 6 to 8 minutes or until softened.  Add butter; cook until melted. Sprinkle vegetables with flour; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes.  Gradually add broth, stirring to loosen up any browned bits.  Add chicken and rice blend. Bring to boiling. Reduce heat to a simmer, and cook 15 to 20 minutes or until rice is al dente. Season with salt and pepper to taste.  Add half and half and Parmesan; stir until soup is creamy and cheese melts.  Serve immediately.

title: Tater Tot Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease or spray casserole dish. Mix soup and sour cream and then mix that with tots, onions, and half of the grated cheese. Place in casserole dish and sprinkle rest of cheese on top. Bake for 1 hour or until bubbly in 350 degree oven.

Mix soup and sour cream and then mix that with tots, onions, and half of the grated cheese. Place in casserole dish and sprinkle rest of cheese on top. Bake for 1 hour or until bubbly in 350 degree oven.

title: Panfried Smashed Potatoes
instructions: Generously cover potatoes with cold water in a 3-to 4-quart pot and add 1 tablespoon salt. Boil until almost tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain potatoes. Transfer to a baking sheet and lightly crush to about 3/4 inch thick with a potato masher, keeping potatoes intact as much as possible.

Heat oil in a 12-inch heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it shimmers. Transfer potatoes with a spatula to skillet, then lower heat to medium-low and cook, turning once, until golden brown, about 20 minutes total. Serve sprinkled with cheese. Season generously with pepper.
text: Recipe: Panfried Smashed Potatoes . Ingredients: red potatoes, extra-virgin olive oil. Instructions: Generously cover potatoes with cold water in a 3-to 4-quart pot and add 1 tablespoon salt. Boil until almost tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain potatoes. Transfer to a baking sheet and lightly crush to about 3/4 inch thick with a potato masher, keeping potatoes intact as much as possible. Heat oil in a 12-inch heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it shimmers. Transfer potatoes with a spatula to skillet, then lower heat to medium-low and cook, turning once, until golden brown, about 20 minutes total. Serve sprinkled with cheese. Season generously with pepper.

2. Butter 9x13 pan.
3. Mix whipping cream & cheese together.
4. Wash & slice potatoes thinly
5. Place 1/2 diced potatoes in pan. Salt & pepper.
6. Pour whipping cream & cheese mixture over potatoes. Place remaining potatoes over.
7. Bake 1 hour

title: Grilled Peanut Butter & Jam
instructions: Slice cooled loaf.
Spread peanut butter and jam on one slice.
Top with another slice of bread.
Spread the top of the sandwich with butter.
Heat skillet to medium and place sandwich in the skillet, buttered side down.
While sandwich is cooking, spread remaining side with butter.
When the sandwich is toasted to a golden brown, turn over and toast the other side.
Repeat to make as many sandwiches as desired.
Remove from skillet and serve warm.

title: Creamy Mac And Cheese
instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente according to the package directions. Drain and set aside.

In the same pan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add the flour and mix with a wooden spoon, stirring continuously for about 5 minutes, or until you have a lightly browned paste (this is the roux).

Add 1 cup of the almond milk and whisk well, breaking up any lumps. Stir in the remaining 2 cups almond milk and increase the heat to medium-high. Cook, stirring continuously and occasionally scraping the bottom of the pan with the wooden spoon, until the mixture has thickened and coats the spoon with little to no transparency. Turn off the heat.
Stir in the pasta until it's covered in the sauce. Add the cheese and mix until it has melted and is evenly distributed.
Serve with a crunchy green salad.
text: Recipe: Creamy Mac And Cheese . Ingredients: whole wheat elbow pasta, unsalted butter, flour, unsweetened almond milk, cheddar cheese. Instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente according to the package directions. Drain and set aside. In the same pan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add the flour and mix with a wooden spoon, stirring continuously for about 5 minutes, or until you have a lightly browned paste (this is the roux). Add 1 cup of the almond milk and whisk well, breaking up any lumps. Stir in the remaining 2 cups almond milk and increase the heat to medium-high. Cook, stirring continuously and occasionally scraping the bottom of the pan with the wooden spoon, until the mixture has thickened and coats the spoon with little to no transparency. Turn off the heat. Stir in the pasta until it's covered in the sauce. Add the cheese and mix until it has melted and is evenly distributed. Serve with a crunchy green salad.
