Add milk mixture to pan; bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat to medium. Stir in cheeses, onion powder, and garlic salt; cook 3 minutes or until cheeses melt, stirring constantly. Stir in pasta. Garnish with parsley, if desired. Serve immediately.

title: Spicy Tomato Macaroni And Cheese
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions, draining well.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; add onion, and saute 3 to 5 minutes or until tender. Add cheese, and cook, stirring constantly, 5 minutes or until cheese melts. Stir in sour cream, blending well. Stir in tomatoes and green chiles and pasta; cook, stirring constantly, 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
text: Recipe: Spicy Tomato Macaroni And Cheese. Ingredients: penne pasta, butter, sweet onion, cheese, sour cream, tomatoes. Instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions, draining well. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; add onion, and saute 3 to 5 minutes or until tender. Add cheese, and cook, stirring constantly, 5 minutes or until cheese melts. Stir in sour cream, blending well. Stir in tomatoes and green chiles and pasta; cook, stirring constantly, 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated.

title: Quick Marinara Sauce
instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic, and cook, stirring constantly, about 1 minute or until pale golden. Add tomato paste, and cook, stirring constantly, 1 minute. Add crushed tomato, and simmer 10 minutes. Stir in basil.
text: Recipe: Quick Marinara Sauce. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, tomato paste, tomatoes, fresh basil. Instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic, and cook, stirring constantly, about 1 minute or until pale golden. Add tomato paste, and cook, stirring constantly, 1 minute. Add crushed tomato, and simmer 10 minutes. Stir in basil.

title: Garlic Bread In A Bag
instructions: Preheat the oven to 450°. In a small bowl, blend the garlic with the butter. Spread each bread half with 1 tablespoon of the garlic butter and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of the Parmesan. Sandwich the bread halves together and put the loaf in a paper bag. Fold the top closed and bake in the center of the oven for about 8 minutes, or until the bag darkens slightly and the bread feels crisp when pressed through the bag.
text: Recipe: Garlic Bread In A Bag. Ingredients: garlic, butter, Italian bread, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 450°. In a small bowl, blend the garlic with the butter. Fold the top closed and bake in the center of the oven for about 8 minutes, or until the bag darkens slightly and the bread feels crisp when pressed through the bag.

title: Caramelized Onion Bliss
instructions: Place blue cheese, caramelized onions, and sauteed pears on brioche or challah bread. Spread outside of sandwiches with butter. Cook in a pre-heated panini press 2 to 3 minutes or until golden.

Wine Suggestion: "The intense complexity of ingredients calls for a wine of equal complexity, but one that will complement, not compete. Leitz' Dragonstone Riesling ($16) would be a great choice, but any good-quality Spatlese or even Auslese-level Riesling would be wonderful as well. A village-level red Burgundy or an Oregon Pinot Noir such as Stoller ($21) would be fine choices for red." --Richard Robinson, Wine Director, The Wine Shop at Western Supermarket, Mountain Brook, Alabama

instructions: Shake with ice and strain.
Garnish with apple slice and caramel drizzle.

title: Drawn Butter
instructions: Melt butter over low heat in a 1-quart saucepan without stirring. When completely melted, remove from heat; let stand so that the butter separates, allowing the milk solids to settle to the bottom.
Skim butter fat from the top, and reserve for another use. Place several layers of cheesecloth in a strainer, and strain the clear yellow liquid into a dish.
text: Recipe: Drawn Butter. Ingredients: butter. Instructions: Melt butter over low heat in a 1-quart saucepan without stirring. When completely melted, remove from heat; let stand so that the butter separates, allowing the milk solids to settle to the bottom. Skim butter fat from the top, and reserve for another use. Place several layers of cheesecloth in a strainer, and strain the clear yellow liquid into a dish.

title: Grilled French Bread
instructions: Preheat grill to high heat. Place French bread slices on grill; grill 1 minute on each side or until grill marks appear. Brush each slice with 1/2 teaspoon olive oil; rub slices with cut side of halved garlic clove.
text: Recipe: Grilled French Bread. Ingredients: bread, olive oil, garlic. Instructions: Preheat grill to high heat. Place French bread slices on grill; grill 1 minute on each side or until grill marks appear. Brush each slice with 1/2 teaspoon olive oil; rub slices with cut side of halved garlic clove.

title: Mozzarella And Basil Pizza
instructions: Place Pizza Dough on a large sheet of parchment paper. Cover with a damp towel; let rise in a warm place (85°), free from drafts, 45 minutes.
Preheat oven to 500°.

Roll dough into a 12-inch circle on parchment paper. Crimp edges of dough to form a 1/2-inch border. Slide dough and parchment paper onto a large baking sheet. Place on bottom rack in oven. Bake at 500° for 5 minutes.

Spread Pizza Sauce evenly onto crust, leaving a 1/2-inch border. Top with cheese slices. Bake an additional 10 minutes or until crust is golden and cheese melts. Remove from oven; let stand 5 minutes. Top with basil leaves; cut into wedges.
Note: If using refrigerated Pizza Dough, let dough rise as directed in step 1 for 1 hour. Proceed as directed in recipe.
text: Recipe: Mozzarella And Basil Pizza. Ingredients: mozzarella cheese, basil. Instructions: Place Pizza Dough on a large sheet of parchment paper. Crimp edges of dough to form a 1/2-inch border. Slide dough and parchment paper onto a large baking sheet. Place on bottom rack in oven. Bake at 500° for 5 minutes. Spread Pizza Sauce evenly onto crust, leaving a 1/2-inch border. Top with cheese slices. Bake an additional 10 minutes or until crust is golden and cheese melts. Remove from oven; let stand 5 minutes. Top with basil leaves; cut into wedges. Note: If using refrigerated Pizza Dough, let dough rise as directed in step 1 for 1 hour. Proceed as directed in recipe.

title: Velveeta® Quick Chicken Pot Pie Minis [Ad]
instructions: Heat oven to 375°F.
Combine first 4 ingredients.
Separate biscuits. Press 1 biscuit onto bottom and up side of each of 10 muffin pan cups sprayed with cooking spray; fill with chicken mixture.
Bake 20 to 22 min. or until biscuits are golden brown. Cool in pan 5 min. before removing from pan to serve.
text: Recipe: Velveeta® Quick Chicken Pot Pie Minis [Ad]. Ingredients: chicken, carrots, condensed cream. Instructions: Heat oven to 375°F. Combine first 4 ingredients. Separate biscuits. Press 1 biscuit onto bottom and up side of each of 10 muffin pan cups sprayed with cooking spray; fill with chicken mixture. Bake 20 to 22 min. or until biscuits are golden brown. Cool in pan 5 min. before removing from pan to serve.

title: Grilled Parmesan-Garlic Bread
instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat; add garlic, and cook 2 minutes. Remove and discard garlic. Brush cut sides of bread evenly with butter mixture, and sprinkle cut sides evenly with Parmesan cheese and parsley. Place cut sides together.
Grill, covered with grill lid, over medium heat (300° to 350°) 5 minutes on each side or to desired degree of doneness.
Note: To prepare bread in the oven, wrap loaf in aluminum foil, place on a baking sheet, and bake at 350° for 15 minutes or until hot.
text: Recipe: Grilled Parmesan-Garlic Bread. Ingredients: butter, garlic, bread, Parmesan cheese, parsley. Instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat; add garlic, and cook 2 minutes. Remove and discard garlic. Brush cut sides of bread evenly with butter mixture, and sprinkle cut sides evenly with Parmesan cheese and parsley. Place cut sides together. Grill, covered with grill lid, over medium heat (300° to 350°) 5 minutes on each side or to desired degree of doneness. Note: To prepare bread in the oven, wrap loaf in aluminum foil, place on a baking sheet, and bake at 350° for 15 minutes or until hot.

title: Baked Whole Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Wash 6 sweet potatoes, and remove any blemishes or dark spots; wrap each potato in aluminum foil. Bake, folded side of foil up, at 350° for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until a fork easily presses into the center. If desired, serve with butter, pepper, and salt.
Mark Sohn, Pikeville, Kentucky, adapted from Mountain Country Cooking
text: Recipe: Baked Whole Sweet Potatoes. Ingredients: sweet potatoes. Instructions: Wash 6 sweet potatoes, and remove any blemishes or dark spots; wrap each potato in aluminum foil. Bake, folded side of foil up, at 350° for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until a fork easily presses into the center. If desired, serve with butter, pepper, and salt. Mark Sohn, Pikeville, Kentucky, adapted from Mountain Country Cooking

title: Smoked Ribs With Huckleberry Bbq Sauce
instructions: On bony side of ribs, loosen edge of membrane with a table knife. Pull off membrane, using a towel. Cut racks in half. Smear all over with rub. Chill airtight at least 4 hours or overnight; let stand at room temperature for last hour.

Meanwhile, soak 2 cups applewood chips in water 30 minutes. Scrunch 6 sheets (1 1/2 ft. long) of foil into logs 9 in. long. For gas, set a drip pan on center burner (the indirect heat area), fill it halfway with very hot water, then heat the other burners to low (275° to 300°). For charcoal, ignite 50 briquets in a chimney. Bank evenly on opposite sides of firegrate, leaving a cleared area in center for drip pan; fill pan halfway with very hot water. Let coals burn to low. Add 5 briquets to each mound of coals every 30 minutes, starting when ribs go on grill; if fire gets too hot, partially close vents on lid.

Set racks upright over drip pan facing one another and wedge foil logs into tops of racks (in between bones) to bridge them and hold them in place. For gas, drain half the wood chips and put in a smoker box, if grill has one; or seal chips in foil, poke quarter-size holes all over it, and set over direct heat (in foil, chips may take awhile to start smoking). For charcoal, drain half the wood chips and sprinkle evenly over coals.
Grill ribs, covered, 1 hour. Drain remaining wood chips and add as before. Cook until meat is tender when pierced and shrinks 1/2 in. from bone tips, 2 to 3 hours.

Pour 1 cup sauce into a bowl. Remove foil from ribs and set ribs flat, bony side up, over indirect heat. Brush with 1/2 cup sauce. Cook until sauce sets, 5 minutes. Turn, brush again, and cook 3 minutes more.
Let ribs sit on a board, tented with foil, 10 minutes. Serve with remaining sauce. Chill extra sauce 1 week, or freeze.
*Ask a butcher to trim ribs, or do it yourself:
On bony side, trim flap of meat from center, flush with bones. Cut rack lengthwise between wide rib section and chewy, narrow rib tips. Save trimmings for soup.
Note: Nutritional analysis is per serving with half the sauce.

title: Fine White Breadcrumbs From Daniel
instructions: Line a baking sheet with a rack. With a serrated knife, remove the crust from the bread and cut it into 1-inch chunks. Arrange in a single layer on the rack and leave for about 24 hours in a dry location, until crispy throughout.

Pulse the bread in a dry blender or food processor to fine crumbs. Shake the crumbs through a coarse sieve. Transfer any large pieces back to the blender, pulse, and pass through the sieve. Store the crumbs in an airtight container for up to 1 week.
text: Recipe: Fine White Breadcrumbs From Daniel. Ingredients: bread. Instructions: Line a baking sheet with a rack. With a serrated knife, remove the crust from the bread and cut it into 1-inch chunks. Arrange in a single layer on the rack and leave for about 24 hours in a dry location, until crispy throughout. Pulse the bread in a dry blender or food processor to fine crumbs. Shake the crumbs through a coarse sieve. Transfer any large pieces back to the blender, pulse, and pass through the sieve. Store the crumbs in an airtight container for up to 1 week.

title: Sweet Cultured Butter And True Buttermilk From 'The Nourished Kitchen'
instructions: Stir the cream and buttermilk together in a large bowl. Cover the bowl loosely with a kitchen towel and tuck it away in a warm spot on your countertop. Let it stand, undisturbed, at room temperature for 18 to 24 hours, or until it tastes pleasantly sour.
Transfer the bowl to the refrigerator and let the cream chill for about 2 hours.

Whip the cream vigorously for 8 to 10 minutes in a stand mixer using the paddle attachment, until it moves past soft and firm peaks to its breaking point, when bits of coagulated butter separate from the thin, watery buttermilk. Continue beating until those bits of butter form larger clumps, another 3 to 6 minutes.

Line a fine-mesh sieve with a double layer of cheesecloth or a single layer of butter muslin and place it over a bowl. Pour the clumpy bits of butter and the cloudy buttermilk into the sieve to strain it. Pour the buttermilk into a jar, cover, and refrigerate. It should keep for about a month.
Remove the butter from the sieve and put it into the bowl that previously held the buttermilk. Add 2 cups cold water, transfer to the refrigerator, and let the butter harden for 5 to 10 minutes.

Remove the butter from the fridge and drain off the water. Working the butter with the back of a wooden spoon or with a butter paddle, knead the butter repeatedly to remove any residual water or buttermilk. When the butter becomes smooth and waxy and yields no more water when pressed, wrap it tightly in parchment paper and then in foil to seal it and prevent oxidation. Place the butter in the refrigerator. It should keep for up to 2 months, or if frozen, for up to a year.
text: Recipe: Sweet Cultured Butter And True Buttermilk From 'The Nourished Kitchen'. Ingredients: heavy cream, buttermilk. Instructions: Stir the cream and buttermilk together in a large bowl. Cover the bowl loosely with a kitchen towel and tuck it away in a warm spot on your countertop. Let it stand, undisturbed, at room temperature for 18 to 24 hours, or until it tastes pleasantly sour. Transfer the bowl to the refrigerator and let the cream chill for about 2 hours. Whip the cream vigorously for 8 to 10 minutes in a stand mixer using the paddle attachment, until it moves past soft and firm peaks to its breaking point, when bits of coagulated butter separate from the thin, watery buttermilk. Continue beating until those bits of butter form larger clumps, another 3 to 6 minutes. Line a fine-mesh sieve with a double layer of cheesecloth or a single layer of butter muslin and place it over a bowl. Pour the clumpy bits of butter and the cloudy buttermilk into the sieve to strain it. Pour the buttermilk into a jar, cover, and refrigerate. It should keep for about a month. Remove the butter from the sieve and put it into the bowl that previously held the buttermilk. Add 2 cups cold water, transfer to the refrigerator, and let the butter harden for 5 to 10 minutes. Remove the butter from the fridge and drain off the water. Working the butter with the back of a wooden spoon or with a butter paddle, knead the butter repeatedly to remove any residual water or buttermilk. When the butter becomes smooth and waxy and yields no more water when pressed, wrap it tightly in parchment paper and then in foil to seal it and prevent oxidation. Place the butter in the refrigerator. It should keep for up to 2 months, or if frozen, for up to a year.

title: Naomi Duguid'S Toasted Chickpea Flour
instructions: Place a cast-iron or other heavy skillet over medium-high heat, add the flour, and use a wooden spoon to stir it frequently as it heats and starts to toast. Lower the heat to medium if it starts to brown quickly, and keep stirring to expose all the flour to the heat. After about 6 or 7 minutes, it will start to change color. Lower the heat a little and continue to stir as it gets a little more color, then remove from the heat and continue to stir for another minute as the pan starts to cool. The whole process takes about 10 to 12 minutes.
Transfer to a wide bowl and let cool to room temperature. Store in a clean, dry glass jar, well sealed.
text: Recipe: Naomi Duguid'S Toasted Chickpea Flour. Ingredients: chickpea flour. Instructions: Place a cast-iron or other heavy skillet over medium-high heat, add the flour, and use a wooden spoon to stir it frequently as it heats and starts to toast. The whole process takes about 10 to 12 minutes. Transfer to a wide bowl and let cool to room temperature. Store in a clean, dry glass jar, well sealed.

title: French’S Crunchy Onion Chicken
instructions: In a resealable plastic bag, combine onions and flour. Lightly crush with hands or a rolling pin. Transfer to pie plate or waxed paper.
Dip chicken into egg; then coat with onion mixture. Place on a lightly greased
. Bake, uncovered, at 400° for 20 minutes or until juices run clear.
text: Recipe: French’S Crunchy Onion Chicken. Ingredients: flour, chicken breast halves. Instructions: In a resealable plastic bag, combine onions and flour. Lightly crush with hands or a rolling pin. Transfer to pie plate or waxed paper. Dip chicken into egg; then coat with onion mixture. Place on a lightly greased . Bake, uncovered, at 400° for 20 minutes or until juices run clear.

title: Marvelous Shells ‘N’ Cheese
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, combine process cheese and milk; cook and stir over low heat until melted. Remove from the heat. Stir in cottage cheese and soup.
Drain pasta and add to cheese sauce; stir until coated. Transfer to a greased 13x9-in. baking dish. Sprinkle with Mexican cheese blend. Toss bread crumbs with butter; sprinkle over the top.
Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until heated through. Serve immediately.

Do not prepare bread crumbs until later. Cool unbaked casserole; cover and freeze. To use, partially thaw in refrigerator overnight. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking. Prepare bread crumbs as directed; sprinkle over top. Bake casserole as directed, increasing time as necessary to heat through and for a thermometer inserted in center to read 165°.
text: Recipe: Marvelous Shells ‘N’ Cheese. Ingredients: pasta shells, process cheese, milk, cottage cheese, condensed cream, bread crumbs, butter. Instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, combine process cheese and milk; cook and stir over low heat until melted. Remove from the heat. Stir in cottage cheese and soup. Drain pasta and add to cheese sauce; stir until coated. Transfer to a greased 13x9-in. baking dish. Sprinkle with Mexican cheese blend. Toss bread crumbs with butter; sprinkle over the top. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until heated through. Serve immediately. Do not prepare bread crumbs until later. Cool unbaked casserole; cover and freeze. To use, partially thaw in refrigerator overnight. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking. Prepare bread crumbs as directed; sprinkle over top. Bake casserole as directed, increasing time as necessary to heat through and for a thermometer inserted in center to read 165°.

title: Hot Cheese Puffs
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine cheese and butter or margarine. Cook and stir over low heat.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form (tips stand straight).
Fold cheese mixture into egg whites.
text: Recipe: Hot Cheese Puffs. Ingredients: shredded Monterey Jack cheese, cream cheese, butter, egg whites, bread. Instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine cheese and butter or margarine. Cook and stir over low heat. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form (tips stand straight). Fold cheese mixture into egg whites.

title: Tomato-Cheese Soup
instructions: Turn soup into a large saucepan; gradually blend in milk. Stir until hot and blended.
Mix in cheese and, if desired, basil.
text: Recipe: Tomato-Cheese Soup. Ingredients: tomato soup, milk, Colby cheese, basil. Instructions: Turn soup into a large saucepan; gradually blend in milk. Stir until hot and blended. Mix in cheese and, if desired, basil.

title: Holiday Cheese Ball
instructions: Blend all ingredients together by hand and form ball.
Let set overnight.
Serve with crackers.
Makes a festive cheese ball as Christmas as it is green and red.
text: Recipe: Holiday Cheese Ball. Ingredients: beef, cream cheese, green onions. Instructions: Blend all ingredients together by hand and form ball. Let set overnight. Serve with crackers. Makes a festive cheese ball as Christmas as it is green and red.

title: Creamy Mashed Potato Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Combine mashed potatoes, sour cream, milk and garlic powder in large bowl; mix well.
Spoon half the mixture into 2-quart baking dish.
Sprinkle with 2/3 cup French fried onions and 1/2 cup cheese.
Bake 30 minutes until hot.
Top with remaining onions and cheese.
Bake 5 minutes until onions are golden.
Serves 6.
text: Recipe: Creamy Mashed Potato Bake. Ingredients: onions, hot mashed potatoes, sour cream, milk, garlic powder, onion powder, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Combine mashed potatoes, sour cream, milk and garlic powder in large bowl; mix well. Spoon half the mixture into 2-quart baking dish. Sprinkle with 2/3 cup French fried onions and 1/2 cup cheese. Bake 30 minutes until hot. Top with remaining onions and cheese. Bake 5 minutes until onions are golden. Serves 6.

title: Ham Roll-Ups
instructions: Generously spread softened cream cheese on sliced ham.
Place 1 pickle spear at the end of the slice and roll up.
Slice into bite-size pieces and chill.
text: Recipe: Ham Roll-Ups. Ingredients: ham slices, cream cheese. Instructions: Generously spread softened cream cheese on sliced ham. Place 1 pickle spear at the end of the slice and roll up. Slice into bite-size pieces and chill.

title: Eclair Cake
instructions: Grease bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Mix pudding with milk. Beat 2 minutes at medium speed.
Blend in Cool Whip.
Put 1 layer of crackers in bottom of pan. Cover with half of the pudding mix. Add another layer of crackers and the remaining pudding.
Add another layer of crackers.
Refrigerate 2 hours. Add topping. Keep refrigerated.
text: Recipe: Eclair Cake. Ingredients: graham crackers, milk. Instructions: Grease bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. Mix pudding with milk. Beat 2 minutes at medium speed. Blend in Cool Whip. Put 1 layer of crackers in bottom of pan. Cover with half of the pudding mix. Add another layer of crackers and the remaining pudding. Add another layer of crackers. Refrigerate 2 hours. Add topping. Keep refrigerated.

title: Coconut Cake
instructions: Follow directions on box, substituting milk for water.
Make two layers and split layers with thread.
Put together with filling while cake is warm.
text: Recipe: Coconut Cake. Ingredients: butter, milk. Instructions: Follow directions on box, substituting milk for water. Make two layers and split layers with thread. Put together with filling while cake is warm.

title: Easy Fruit Dip
instructions: Blend cream cheese with marshmallow cream in a bowl until smooth and creamy. (May chill overnight.) Serve with your favorite fresh fruit (apples, bananas, grapes, pineapple, oranges, etc.).
text: Recipe: Easy Fruit Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, marshmallow cream. Instructions: Blend cream cheese with marshmallow cream in a bowl until smooth and creamy. (May chill overnight.) Serve with your favorite fresh fruit (apples, bananas, grapes, pineapple, oranges, etc.).

title: Chicken And Rice
instructions: Brown chicken.
Place in casserole.
Prepare onion soup mix and pour over chicken.
Add rice.
Cover and bake at 350° for about 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Rice. Ingredients: chicken, onion soup, rice. Instructions: Brown chicken. Place in casserole. Prepare onion soup mix and pour over chicken. Add rice. Cover and bake at 350° for about 1 hour.

title: Meat Loaf Sauce
instructions: Mix the soup and the puree.
Heat until well blended.
Serve over meat loaf to make it more spicy and attractive.
text: Recipe: Meat Loaf Sauce. Ingredients: tomato soup, tomato puree. Instructions: Mix the soup and the puree. Heat until well blended. Serve over meat loaf to make it more spicy and attractive.

title: Quick Chicken And Rice
instructions: Spray baking dish with Pam. Mix all ingredients and pour in dish. Place chicken pieces on top. Brush chicken with oil. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Quick Chicken And Rice. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, cream of celery soup, milk, rice. Instructions: Spray baking dish with Pam. Mix all ingredients and pour in dish. Place chicken pieces on top. Brush chicken with oil. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 hours.

title: Cheese Biscuits(Like Red Lobster'S)
instructions: Mix all ingredients with a wooden spoon until soft dough forms.
Beat with a wooden spoon for 30 seconds.
Drop dough on ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake 8 to 10 minutes until golden brown in 450° preheated oven.
Combine melted butter and garlic powder; brush over warm biscuits before removing from cookie sheet.
Makes 10 to 12 biscuits.
Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Cheese Biscuits(Like Red Lobster'S)  . Ingredients: buttermilk baking mix, milk, Cheddar cheese, butter, garlic powder. Bake 8 to 10 minutes until golden brown in 450° preheated oven. Combine melted butter and garlic powder; brush over warm biscuits before removing from cookie sheet. Makes 10 to 12 biscuits. Serve warm.

title: Parmesan Chicken
instructions: Scramble eggs with a small amount of water in a bowl; wash chicken then dip in eggs then in bread crumbs mixed with Parmesan cheese.
Place in shallow baking dish.
Drizzle with melted butter or margarine.
Bake in 350° oven for 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Chicken. Ingredients: eggs, chicken breast halves, Italian bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, butter. Instructions: Scramble eggs with a small amount of water in a bowl; wash chicken then dip in eggs then in bread crumbs mixed with Parmesan cheese. Place in shallow baking dish. Drizzle with melted butter or margarine. Bake in 350° oven for 30 minutes.

title: Condensed Tomato Soup
instructions: Simmer tomatoes and chicken broth for 30 minutes.
Add the whipping cream or half & half until it's a pretty pink.
Serve in a bowl.
You may want to add 1 - 2 tsp. sugar.
text: Recipe: Condensed Tomato Soup. Ingredients: tomatoes, chicken broth, heavy cream. Instructions: Simmer tomatoes and chicken broth for 30 minutes. Add the whipping cream or half & half until it's a pretty pink. Serve in a bowl. You may want to add 1 - 2 tsp. sugar.

title: Poor Man'S Pierogies(Potato Stuffed Shells)
instructions: Cook pasta shells according to package directions.
Prepare 12 servings of instant potatoes as directed, except cut back about 1/4 to 1/2 cup of milk and add a piece of Velveeta cheese to the water when you boil it.
Use as much or as little cheese as you want.
Let cool.
While shells and potatoes are cooling, saute onion in butter.
Pour 1/2 in bottom of cake pan.
text: Recipe: Poor Man'S Pierogies(Potato Stuffed Shells)  . Ingredients: pasta shells, Velveeta cheese, potatoes, onion, butter. Instructions: Cook pasta shells according to package directions. Prepare 12 servings of instant potatoes as directed, except cut back about 1/4 to 1/2 cup of milk and add a piece of Velveeta cheese to the water when you boil it. Use as much or as little cheese as you want. Let cool. While shells and potatoes are cooling, saute onion in butter. Pour 1/2 in bottom of cake pan.

title: Potato Soup
instructions: Boil potatoes until tender. Drain potatoes. Add celery and onion. Add milk and bring to a boil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
text: Recipe: Potato Soup. Ingredients: potatoes, stalks celery, onion, sweet milk. Instructions: Boil potatoes until tender. Drain potatoes. Add celery and onion. Add milk and bring to a boil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

title: Chicken Tetrazzini
instructions: In a saucepan, blend soup, 1/2 cup water and cheese.
Heat slowly until cheese melts. Blend in remaining ingredients.
Serves 4.
Has approximately 6 grams fat per serving.
text: Recipe: Chicken Tetrazzini. Ingredients: low-fat cream of chicken soup, cheese, chicken, garlic, parsley. Instructions: In a saucepan, blend soup, 1/2 cup water and cheese. Heat slowly until cheese melts. Blend in remaining ingredients. Serves 4. Has approximately 6 grams fat per serving.

title: Onion Bake
instructions: Saute 3 thinly sliced Spanish onions in butter.
Lay in bottom of greased casserole.
Sprinkle Swiss cheese over onions.
Pour 2 cans cream of chicken soup over onions.
Place 1/2-inch slices French bread on top of onion mixture.
Put pat of butter on each round of bread.
Bake, covered, for 25 minutes at 350°.
Remove cover.
With slotted spoon, press down on each bread slice until juices almost reach top of each slice.
Bake an additional 10 minutes.
text: Recipe: Onion Bake. Ingredients: Spanish onions, butter, Swiss cheese, cream of chicken soup, bread. Instructions: Saute 3 thinly sliced Spanish onions in butter. Lay in bottom of greased casserole. Sprinkle Swiss cheese over onions. Pour 2 cans cream of chicken soup over onions. Place 1/2-inch slices French bread on top of onion mixture. Put pat of butter on each round of bread. Bake, covered, for 25 minutes at 350°. Remove cover. With slotted spoon, press down on each bread slice until juices almost reach top of each slice. title: Burning Dip(Student Favorite)
instructions: Combine all ingredients; stir briskly with wire whip until all lumps are gone.
Serve with Fritos "scoops" or dip chips.

title: Potato Casserole
instructions: Mix and put in greased casserole.

text: Recipe: Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, garlic salt, Cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Mix and put in greased casserole. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and bake, uncovered, 1 hour at 350°, if potatoes are thawed, or longer if frozen.

title: Sante Fe Chicken
instructions: Season chicken as desired.
Grill chicken.
During last few minutes of grilling time, sprinkle cheese over chicken.
Let cheese melt.
Remove from grill.
Cover chicken with chopped onions and tomatoes.
text: Recipe: Sante Fe Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, green onions, Cheddar cheese, tomatoes. Instructions: Season chicken as desired. Grill chicken. During last few minutes of grilling time, sprinkle cheese over chicken. Let cheese melt. Remove from grill. Cover chicken with chopped onions and tomatoes.

title: Onion Celeste
instructions: Cook onions in butter for 5 minutes.
Do not brown.
Put in casserole dish.
Add milk and soup.
Put cheese on top and stir lightly.
Arrange bread on top and bake at 350° until bubbly and brown.
text: Recipe: Onion Celeste. Ingredients: sweet onions, cream of chicken soup, Swiss cheese, butter, bread, milk. Instructions: Cook onions in butter for 5 minutes. Do not brown. Put in casserole dish. Add milk and soup. Put cheese on top and stir lightly. Arrange bread on top and bake at 350° until bubbly and brown.

instructions: Line
dish
with
deboned
chicken.

broth
over chicken.

cream of chicken soup over the chicken.
Cut boiled eggs and put on top of chicken mixture.
Mix flour with milk, then pour over the mixture.
Dot butter on top.
Bake at 350° until brown.
Do not stir.

Spread cream of chicken soup over the chicken. Cut boiled eggs and put on top of chicken mixture. Mix flour with milk, then pour over the mixture. Dot butter on top. Bake at 350° until brown. Do not stir.

title: Chicken Casserole(Usa)
instructions: Cook chicken and cool.
Break into pieces and put into baking pan.
Pour on heated soup.
Make Stove Top as directed and put on top of chicken and soup.
Bake at 350° for 30 minutes.

title: Bean Hash
instructions: Brown ground beef. Drain grease. Add pork and beans, diced tomatoes and onion. Simmer for 10 minutes and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Bean Hash. Ingredients: ground beef, pork, tomatoes, onion. Instructions: Brown ground beef. Drain grease. Add pork and beans, diced tomatoes and onion. Simmer for 10 minutes and enjoy.

title: Whipping Cream Biscuits
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees. Combine the flour and whipping cream.
Mix well. Turn onto a lightly floured surface. Knead gently about 6 times. Roll out and cut with a 2-inch biscuit cutter.
Dip each biscuit in melted butter.
Place on cookie sheet. Bake for about 10 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes about 10 biscuits.
text: Recipe: Whipping Cream Biscuits. Ingredients: flour, whipping cream, butter. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees. Combine the flour and whipping cream. Mix well. Turn onto a lightly floured surface. Knead gently about 6 times. Roll out and cut with a 2-inch biscuit cutter. Dip each biscuit in melted butter. Place on cookie sheet. Bake for about 10 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes about 10 biscuits.

title: Spicy Rice Mix
instructions: Combine rice, bouillon and soup mix in bowl; mix well.
Store in airtight container.
Makes 6 cups.
text: Recipe: Spicy Rice Mix. Ingredients: rice, instant chicken bouillon, onion soup. Instructions: Combine rice, bouillon and soup mix in bowl; mix well. Store in airtight container. Makes 6 cups.

title: Chicken Parmesan
instructions: Beat egg.
Coat chicken in egg, then into bread crumbs.
Brown on both sides.
Pour 1/3 Chicken Tonight into baking dish.
Add chicken.
Pour remaining Chicken Tonight over chicken.
Top with cheese.
Bake at 425° for 25 minutes.
Cook noodles according to package directions.
Serve chicken over noodles.
text: Recipe: Chicken Parmesan. Ingredients: egg, Italian bread crumbs, chicken breasts, Chicken, Mozzarella cheese, egg noodles. Instructions: Beat egg. Coat chicken in egg, then into bread crumbs. Brown on both sides. Pour 1/3 Chicken Tonight into baking dish. Add chicken. Pour remaining Chicken Tonight over chicken. Top with cheese. Bake at 425° for 25 minutes. Cook noodles according to package directions. Serve chicken over noodles.

title: Soft Serve Chocolate Ice Cream
instructions: Mix all ingredients; place into ice cream maker.
Make as usual, but will not usually stop ice cream maker.
Ready in about 45 minutes.
This recipe will be soft and will refreeze well.
text: Recipe: Soft Serve Chocolate Ice Cream. Ingredients: milk, chocolate milk. Instructions: Mix all ingredients; place into ice cream maker. Make as usual, but will not usually stop ice cream maker. Ready in about 45 minutes. This recipe will be soft and will refreeze well.

title: Beef And Rice
instructions: Cook beef and soup very slowly, about 2 to
3 hours; when done, add cooked rice and simmer 5 minutes.
text: Recipe: Beef And Rice. Ingredients: stewing beef, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup, rice. Instructions: Cook beef and soup very slowly, about 2 to 3 hours; when done, add cooked rice and simmer 5 minutes.

title: Quick Meal
instructions: Place hamburg and onion in pan.
Add a little water and cook until meat is done.
Place spaghetti in casserole dish.
Add meat mixture and bake in hot oven until hot.
Very quick and very good.
text: Recipe: Quick Meal. Ingredients: hamburg, onion. Instructions: Place hamburg and onion in pan. Add a little water and cook until meat is done. Place spaghetti in casserole dish. Add meat mixture and bake in hot oven until hot. Very quick and very good.

title: Tender Pot Roast
instructions: Moisten both sides of the roast with water and sprinkle generously with Microshake.
Pierce meat with fork at 1/2-inch intervals.
Place meat in a cooking bag.
Microwave 5 minutes on 100% power.
Microwave 30 minutes on 50% power.
Turn meat over and arrange vegetables around meat.
Microwave 45 minutes on 30% power or until meat and vegetables are fork-tender.
Allow meat and vegetables to stand, covered 5 to 10 minutes.
Serves 5 to 6.
text: Recipe: Tender Pot Roast. Ingredients: beef, onion, carrots, potato, onion. Instructions: Moisten both sides of the roast with water and sprinkle generously with Microshake. Pierce meat with fork at 1/2-inch intervals. Place meat in a cooking bag. Microwave 5 minutes on 100% power. Microwave 30 minutes on 50% power. Turn meat over and arrange vegetables around meat. Microwave 45 minutes on 30% power or until meat and vegetables are fork-tender. Allow meat and vegetables to stand, covered 5 to 10 minutes. Serves 5 to 6.

title: Rissoles(English Potatoes)
instructions: Boil potatoes and drain.
Add milk and grated corned beef; mash.
Fry in patties.
text: Recipe: Rissoles(English Potatoes)  . Ingredients: potatoes, milk, beef. Instructions: Boil potatoes and drain. Add milk and grated corned beef; mash. Fry in patties.

title: Sausage Bread
instructions: Fry sausage (taken out of casings) and add garlic and Italian seasonings, if desired.
Drain well.
Mix the beaten egg with parsley and then add the shredded Mozzarella cheese.
Roll out the dough, length longer than width, in a rectangle shape.
Mix the sausage in with cheese and egg mixture.
Put in the middle of the dough and spread it out, leaving about 1/2-inch around the edges. Roll the dough up and put in a bread pan (greased).
Bake at 325° for 1 hour.
Good luck!
text: Recipe: Sausage Bread. Ingredients: sweet sausage, Mozzarella cheese, egg, parsley, bread dough. Instructions: Fry sausage (taken out of casings) and add garlic and Italian seasonings, if desired. Drain well. Mix the beaten egg with parsley and then add the shredded Mozzarella cheese. Roll out the dough, length longer than width, in a rectangle shape. Mix the sausage in with cheese and egg mixture. Put in the middle of the dough and spread it out, leaving about 1/2-inch around the edges. Roll the dough up and put in a bread pan (greased). Bake at 325° for 1 hour. Good luck!

title: Cheese Dip
instructions: Melt cheese in double boiler.
Add slightly drained tomatoes with melted cheese into blender.
text: Recipe: Cheese Dip. Ingredients: Velveeta cheese, Ro-Tel tomatoes. Instructions: Melt cheese in double boiler. Add slightly drained tomatoes with melted cheese into blender.

title: Infallible Rice
instructions: Saute onion until transparent.
Add rice and hot broth.
Bring to a boil on top of range.
Cover and place in 325° oven for 20 minutes.
Serve and listen to compliments.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Infallible Rice. Ingredients: onion, butter, grain rice, chicken broth, parsley. Instructions: Saute onion until transparent. Add rice and hot broth. Bring to a boil on top of range. Cover and place in 325° oven for 20 minutes. Serve and listen to compliments. Makes 4 to 6 servings.

title: Chicken Rice Bake
instructions: Brown rice.
Mix broth, soup and dry soup and add rice.
Place in 13 x 9-inch pan (glass).
Place chicken pieces on top.
Bake at least 1 hour at 375°.
text: Recipe: Chicken Rice Bake. Ingredients: rice, cream of chicken soup, chicken bouillon, onion soup, chicken. Instructions: Brown rice. Mix broth, soup and dry soup and add rice. Place in 13 x 9-inch pan (glass). Place chicken pieces on top. Bake at least 1 hour at 375°.

title: Ham And Onion Roll
instructions: Spread cream cheese on slice of ham.
Place 1 green onion stem inside and roll up.
Slice in small slices and hold with toothpicks.
Serve on Ritz crackers.
text: Recipe: Ham And Onion Roll. Ingredients: ham, green onions, cream cheese. Instructions: Spread cream cheese on slice of ham. Place 1 green onion stem inside and roll up. Slice in small slices and hold with toothpicks. Serve on Ritz crackers.

title: Taco Cheese Dip
instructions: Combine in double boiler until melted. If too runny, add more cheese.
text: Recipe: Taco Cheese Dip. Ingredients: Ro-Tel tomatoes, Velveeta cheese, milk. Instructions: Combine in double boiler until melted. If too runny, add more cheese.

title: Chicken And Rice Bake
instructions: Combine soup mixes and milk.
Save half to pour over chicken. Put rice and other half of mixture in the bottom of casserole or shallow pan; place chicken on top.
Pour half of soup mix on top. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Rice Bake. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, milk, cream of chicken soup, chicken, onion soup mix, rice. Instructions: Combine soup mixes and milk. Save half to pour over chicken. Put rice and other half of mixture in the bottom of casserole or shallow pan; place chicken on top. Pour half of soup mix on top. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Saucey Chicken
instructions: Cook chicken in a little water until done. Season with salt and garlic.
Add sauce; simmer a minute or two. Cut off heat and top with cheese.
text: Recipe: Saucey Chicken. Ingredients: spaghetti sauce, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Cook chicken in a little water until done. Season with salt and garlic. Add sauce; simmer a minute or two. Cut off heat and top with cheese.

title: Crock-Pot Stuffed Pasta Shells
instructions: In large kettle, boil the pasta shells in salted water until tender (not mushy).
Drain and set aside.
In a skillet or saucepan, brown ground beef and drain off fat.
Add onion and garlic.
Cook until vegetables are tender.
Stir in Mozzarella cheese, bread crumbs, parsley and egg.
Stuff this mixture into pasta shells.
Pour 1 jar of sauce into slow cooker.
Arrange the stuffed shells on top.
Top shells with remaining sauce and Parmesan cheese.
Cover and cook on low for 5 to 7 houors.
Yields 8 servings.
text: Recipe: Crock-Pot Stuffed Pasta Shells. Ingredients: lean ground beef, onion, garlic, Mozzarella cheese, bread crumbs, egg, parsley flakes, spaghetti sauce, Parmesan cheese, pasta shells. Instructions: In large kettle, boil the pasta shells in salted water until tender (not mushy). Drain and set aside. In a skillet or saucepan, brown ground beef and drain off fat. Add onion and garlic. Cook until vegetables are tender. Stir in Mozzarella cheese, bread crumbs, parsley and egg. Stuff this mixture into pasta shells. Pour 1 jar of sauce into slow cooker. Arrange the stuffed shells on top. Top shells with remaining sauce and Parmesan cheese. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 7 houors. Yields 8 servings.

title: Potato Soup
instructions: Put carrots, onion and celery into kettle; just cover with water (or chicken broth).
Add potatoes and simmer until vegetables are tender.
text: Recipe: Potato Soup. Ingredients: carrots, onion, celery, potatoes. Instructions: Put carrots, onion and celery into kettle; just cover with water (or chicken broth). Add potatoes and simmer until vegetables are tender.

title: Oven Fried Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°.
Roll chicken in egg, then in bread crumbs.
Place skin down in a foil lined pan.
Cover with foil. Bake 30 minutes.
Uncover; turn down to 350°.
Bake, uncovered, until tender and brown.
(Great with pork chops.)
text: Recipe: Oven Fried Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, eggs, Italian bread crumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Roll chicken in egg, then in bread crumbs. Place skin down in a foil lined pan. Cover with foil. Bake 30 minutes. Uncover; turn down to 350°. Bake, uncovered, until tender and brown. (Great with pork chops.)

title: Celery Pinwheels
instructions: Cut base from celery bunch.
Separate, wash and dry stalks. Fill each stalk with tangy cheese spread.
Press stalks together in shape of original bunch and tie with strings.
Chill. To serve, cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch slices.
text: Recipe: Celery Pinwheels. Ingredients: celery, tangy cheese. Instructions: Cut base from celery bunch. Separate, wash and dry stalks. Fill each stalk with tangy cheese spread. Press stalks together in shape of original bunch and tie with strings. Chill. To serve, cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch slices.

title: Aunt Bessie Wilson'S Chicken And Dumplings
instructions: Brown chicken.
Cover with hot water and bring to a boil. Lower temperature to low boil stage until chicken is tender. Remove chicken and debone.
Mix flour, egg, chicken fat and enough water until dough does not cling to bowl.
Roll out on wax paper with plenty of flour.
Add to boiling broth, then add chicken. Don't peek until ready to serve.
text: Recipe: Aunt Bessie Wilson'S Chicken And Dumplings. Ingredients: flour, egg, chicken fat, chicken. Instructions: Brown chicken. Cover with hot water and bring to a boil. Lower temperature to low boil stage until chicken is tender. Remove chicken and debone. Mix flour, egg, chicken fat and enough water until dough does not cling to bowl. Roll out on wax paper with plenty of flour. Add to boiling broth, then add chicken. Don't peek until ready to serve.

title: Onioned Potatoes
instructions: Scrub potatoes.
Cut each in 3 or 4 lengthwise slices.
Blend butter and soup mix.
Spread on slices.
Put on squares of foil and wrap tightly.
Bake until done, turning once, on the grill or right on top of coals, 45 to 60 minutes.
text: Recipe: Onioned Potatoes. Ingredients: baking potatoes, butter, onion soup. Instructions: Scrub potatoes. Cut each in 3 or 4 lengthwise slices. Blend butter and soup mix. Spread on slices. Put on squares of foil and wrap tightly. Bake until done, turning once, on the grill or right on top of coals, 45 to 60 minutes.

title: Parmesan Cutlets
instructions: Brown pork chops or cutlets on both sides.
Place meat in a baking pan and cover with tomato sauce.
Sprinkle with cheese. Cover and bake 30 to 45 minutes in 325° oven.
text: Recipe: Parmesan Cutlets. Ingredients: pork chops, Parmesan cheese, tomato sauce. Instructions: Brown pork chops or cutlets on both sides. Place meat in a baking pan and cover with tomato sauce. Sprinkle with cheese. Cover and bake 30 to 45 minutes in 325° oven.

title: Cheese Cookies
instructions: Mix flour and butter; add shredded cheese.
Roll out 1/4 inch thickness.
Brush with beaten egg.
As soon as they are taken out of the oven, sprinkle with salt.
Preheat oven to 425° and bake for 12 minutes.
text: Recipe: Cheese Cookies. Ingredients: egg, sharp cheese, butter, flour. Instructions: Mix flour and butter; add shredded cheese. Roll out 1/4 inch thickness. Brush with beaten egg. As soon as they are taken out of the oven, sprinkle with salt. Preheat oven to 425° and bake for 12 minutes.

title: French Onion Soup
instructions: Melt butter; add onions and cook 30 minutes or until golden on medium.
Stir in flour.
Gradually stir in chicken broth.
Bring to boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Preheat broiler. Pour soup in 6 ovenproof bowls.
Place on baking sheet.
Add 2 tablespoons shredded cheese, 2 slices bread and 2 slices cheese to each bowl.
Place under broiler for 3 minutes or until cheese is golden and bubbly.
text: Recipe: French Onion Soup. Ingredients: butter, onions, flour, chicken broth, Swiss cheese, Italian bread, Swiss cheese. Instructions: Melt butter; add onions and cook 30 minutes or until golden on medium. Stir in flour. Gradually stir in chicken broth. Bring to boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Preheat broiler. Pour soup in 6 ovenproof bowls. Place on baking sheet. Add 2 tablespoons shredded cheese, 2 slices bread and 2 slices cheese to each bowl. Place under broiler for 3 minutes or until cheese is golden and bubbly.

title: Buffet Potatoes
instructions: Thaw potatoes; combine with butter and other ingredients.
Put bread crumbs on top.
Bake 1 1/2 hours at 350°.
text: Recipe: Buffet Potatoes. Ingredients: hash brown potatoes, butter, frozen onions, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, Cheddar cheese, bread crumbs. Instructions: Thaw potatoes; combine with butter and other ingredients. Put bread crumbs on top. Bake 1 1/2 hours at 350°.

title: Chicken Manicotti
instructions: Cook
manicotti according to package directions.
Saute onion and
garlic
in
olive
oil.
In
a large bowl, combine chicken, onion,
garlic,
Ricotta
cheese,
parsley and 1 cup Mozzarella cheese.
Mix thoroughly (you may even want to blend in
a
food processor).
Stuff chicken mixture into manicotti pasta using a small spoon.
Place in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish and pour spaghetti sauce over the manicotti.
Top with remaining Mozzarella and Parmesan cheese.
Cover with foil and bake at 350° for
minutes.
Remove foil and bake 10 minutes to slightly brown top.
text: Recipe: Chicken Manicotti. Ingredients: chicken, onion, Ricotta cheese, parsley, garlic, pasta, spaghetti sauce, Mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, olive oil. Instructions: Cook manicotti according to package directions. Saute onion and garlic in olive oil. In a large bowl, combine chicken, onion, garlic, Ricotta cheese, parsley and 1 cup Mozzarella cheese. Mix thoroughly (you may even want to blend in a food processor). Stuff chicken mixture into manicotti pasta using a small spoon. Place in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish and pour spaghetti sauce over the manicotti. Top with remaining Mozzarella and Parmesan cheese. Cover with foil and bake at 350° for 40 minutes. Remove foil and bake 10 minutes to slightly brown top.

title: Hobo Dinner On The Outdoor Grill
instructions: Mix onion soup mix and hamburger thoroughly.
Form into 4 patties.
Cut aluminum foil in squares big enough to hold 1 patty, sliced carrot and potatoes (and 1 large slice onion, if desired).
text: Recipe: Hobo Dinner On The Outdoor Grill. Ingredients: hamburger, carrots, onion soup, potatoes, onion. Instructions: Mix onion soup mix and hamburger thoroughly. Form into 4 patties. Cut aluminum foil in squares big enough to hold 1 patty, sliced carrot and potatoes (and 1 large slice onion, if desired).

title: Ma Ma'S Chicken Dressing
instructions: Boil chicken (reserve broth); saute onion and celery.
Cook cornbread and crumble.
Mix ingredients thoroughly.
Add approximately 1 cup chicken broth (enough to make ingredients easy to stir).
Salt and pepper to taste.
Bake at 350° about 45 minutes.
text: Recipe: Ma Ma'S Chicken Dressing. Ingredients: chicken, onion, stalks celery, white bread, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, eggs. Instructions: Boil chicken (reserve broth); saute onion and celery. Cook cornbread and crumble. Mix ingredients thoroughly. Add approximately 1 cup chicken broth (enough to make ingredients easy to stir). Salt and pepper to taste. Bake at 350° about 45 minutes.

title: Baked Mashed Potato Balls
instructions: Add egg yolks and parsley to mashed potatoes.
Beat egg white until stiff and fold into potato mixture.
Shape into balls.
Bake in lightly greased muffin tins or drop on a greased sheet.
Bake at 350° until crisp.
Turn to brown evenly.
text: Recipe: Baked Mashed Potato Balls. Ingredients: potatoes, parsley, egg yolks, egg whites. Instructions: Add egg yolks and parsley to mashed potatoes. Beat egg white until stiff and fold into potato mixture. Shape into balls. Bake in lightly greased muffin tins or drop on a greased sheet. Bake at 350° until crisp. Turn to brown evenly.

title: Southwestern Chicken
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine tomatoes, salsa, onions and garlic. Set aside.
Coat chicken with flour.
In a 10-inch skillet with cover, heat oil over medium heat; saute chicken for 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Pour sauce over chicken. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes or until chicken is tender.
Serve over rice.
Makes 4 servings.
text: Recipe: Southwestern Chicken. Ingredients: tomatoes, onion, clove garlic, chicken, flour, olive oil. Instructions: In a medium bowl, combine tomatoes, salsa, onions and garlic. Set aside. Coat chicken with flour. In a 10-inch skillet with cover, heat oil over medium heat; saute chicken for 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Pour sauce over chicken. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes or until chicken is tender. Serve over rice. Makes 4 servings.

title: Chicken Livers With Herbed Rice
instructions: Halfway through cooking rice, stir in chicken livers.
Cover and cook, stirring twice, until rice is cooked and livers are done.
text: Recipe: Chicken Livers With Herbed Rice. Ingredients: rice, chicken livers. Instructions: Halfway through cooking rice, stir in chicken livers. Cover and cook, stirring twice, until rice is cooked and livers are done.

title: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole(Great When You Want The Taste Of Chicken And Dressing)
instructions: Cook chicken until done.
Remove from broth and save 2 2/3 cups of broth.
Bone chicken and cut into bite-size pieces.
Set aside. Combine 1/2 of the broth with the chicken soup.
Set aside. Combine remaining 1/2 of the broth with the mushroom soup.
Set aside.
Melt the butter and pour over the stuffing and toss until all of it is moist with butter.
Set aside 1/4 cup for topping (garnish).
text: Recipe: Chicken And Stuffing Casserole(Great When You Want The Taste Of Chicken And Dressing)  . Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, butter. Instructions: Cook chicken until done. Remove from broth and save 2 2/3 cups of broth. Bone chicken and cut into bite-size pieces. Set aside. Combine 1/2 of the broth with the chicken soup. Set aside. Combine remaining 1/2 of the broth with the mushroom soup. Set aside. Melt the butter and pour over the stuffing and toss until all of it is moist with butter. Set aside 1/4 cup for topping (garnish).

title: Sausage Breakfast Roll
instructions: Prepare cookie sheet with nonstick spray.
Brown sausage; drain.
Scramble eggs.
Carefully unroll the Pillsbury Pipin' Hot loaf on the cookie sheet.
Spoon the sausage, eggs and cheese onto the loaf.
Roll the loaf back up, carefully sealing the top seam as well as the ends of the loaf.
Bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes or until brown.
text: Recipe: Sausage Breakfast Roll. Ingredients: sausage, eggs, grated cheese. Instructions: Prepare cookie sheet with nonstick spray. Brown sausage; drain. Scramble eggs. Carefully unroll the Pillsbury Pipin' Hot loaf on the cookie sheet. Spoon the sausage, eggs and cheese onto the loaf. Roll the loaf back up, carefully sealing the top seam as well as the ends of the loaf. Bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes or until brown.

title: Bessie Weir'S Yummy Soup
instructions: Cook all vegetables and rice with a small amount of water until done.
Then add the soup.
The water in the cooked vegetables plus the undiluted soup will make sufficient liquid. Very good for a cold winter's day!
text: Recipe: Bessie Weir'S Yummy Soup. Ingredients: carrots, stalks celery, onion, rice, potato, cream of celery. Instructions: Cook all vegetables and rice with a small amount of water until done. Then add the soup. The water in the cooked vegetables plus the undiluted soup will make sufficient liquid. Very good for a cold winter's day!

title: Best Ever Meat Loaf
instructions: *May use one slice of bread, with crusts removed, and broken into small pieces.
text: Recipe: Best Ever Meat Loaf. Ingredients: onion soup, sour cream, eggs, hamburger, bread crumbs. Instructions: *May use one slice of bread, with crusts removed, and broken into small pieces.

title: Steak And Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Put round steak in 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
Put sliced onion on top of steak. Pour cream of mushroom soup over that.
Cover pan with foil.
Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
text: Recipe: Steak And Mushroom Sauce. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, onion. Instructions: Put round steak in 9 x 13-inch baking pan. Put sliced onion on top of steak. Pour cream of mushroom soup over that. Cover pan with foil. Bake at 350° for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.

title: Microwave Chili Con Queso
instructions: Using a microwave-safe container, combine Ro-Tel tomatoes and one pound Velveeta cheese, cut into 1-inch squares.
Melt on High for 2 minutes.
Extra time may be necessary on some microwaves. Stir at the end of 2 minutes and remember that the food still cooks after the microwave stops.
text: Recipe: Microwave Chili Con Queso. Ingredients: Velveeta cheese, Ro-Tel tomatoes. Instructions: Using a microwave-safe container, combine Ro-Tel tomatoes and one pound Velveeta cheese, cut into 1-inch squares. Melt on High for 2 minutes. Extra time may be necessary on some microwaves. Stir at the end of 2 minutes and remember that the food still cooks after the microwave stops.

title: Bean Dip
instructions: Mix together.
Keep warm in crock-pot.
Serve with tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Bean Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese. Instructions: Mix together. Keep warm in crock-pot. Serve with tortilla chips.

title: Rotel Dip
instructions: Brown sausage and hamburger meat and drain well.
Put into crock-pot.
Add soup (undiluted), tomatoes and cheese, cut up into small chunks.
Mix all together good and turn on high until cheese melts good and then turn on low until ready to serve.
Serve with tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: Rotel Dip. Ingredients: sausage, hamburger, cream of mushroom soup, Ro-Tel tomatoes, Velveeta cheese. Instructions: Brown sausage and hamburger meat and drain well. Put into crock-pot. Add soup (undiluted), tomatoes and cheese, cut up into small chunks. Mix all together good and turn on high until cheese melts good and then turn on low until ready to serve. Serve with tortilla chips.

title: Easy Chicken Dinner
instructions: In 13 x 9-inch pan, place chicken.
Cover with vegies.
Pour dressing over all.
Bake, uncovered, at 325° for 1 hour.
Serve over rice or pasta.
Easy, low-fat and delicious!
text: Recipe: Easy Chicken Dinner. Ingredients: chicken, onion, rice. Instructions: In 13 x 9-inch pan, place chicken. Cover with vegies. Pour dressing over all. Bake, uncovered, at 325° for 1 hour. Serve over rice or pasta. Easy, low-fat and delicious!

title: Chicken And Rice
instructions: In 13 x 9-inch baking dish, layer rice and chicken.
Then top with soups.
Bake at 350° for one hour.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Rice. Ingredients: chicken cutlets, white rice, onion soup, beef broth soup. Instructions: In 13 x 9-inch baking dish, layer rice and chicken. Then top with soups. Bake at 350° for one hour.

title: Ham Loaf
instructions: Mix the ingredients together.
Beat egg whites until stiff. Fold in meat mixture.
Bake 1 hour at 350°.
Remove grease.
text: Recipe: Ham Loaf. Ingredients: fresh pork, ham, eggs, graham cracker crumbs, milk. Instructions: Mix the ingredients together. Beat egg whites until stiff. Fold in meat mixture. Bake 1 hour at 350°. Remove grease.

title: Rice Soup
instructions: Combine broth and tomato sauce in a large pan.
Bring to a slow boil. Add rice. Cook until rice is done, then add cheese.
text: Recipe: Rice Soup. Ingredients: chicken broth, tomato sauce, rice, grating cheese. Instructions: Combine broth and tomato sauce in a large pan. Bring to a slow boil. Add rice. Cook until rice is done, then add cheese.

title: Pork Chop Casserole
instructions: Spray bottom of deep pan with Pam.
Spread pork chops on bottom, then pour in potatoes.
Pour in all the soup, then 1/4 cup water.
Season to taste.
Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour or longer if pork chops are thick.
text: Recipe: Pork Chop Casserole. Ingredients: pork chops, Campbell's tomato soup, potatoes. Instructions: Spray bottom of deep pan with Pam. Spread pork chops on bottom, then pour in potatoes. Pour in all the soup, then 1/4 cup water. Season to taste. Cover and bake at 350° for 1 hour or longer if pork chops are thick.

title: Sunday Chicken
instructions: Mix first four ingredients together and put in greased 9 x 13-inch Pyrex cake pan.
Lay chicken pieces on top of rice mixture. Sprinkle with dry onion soup mix.
Cover with foil and bake at 350° for 2 to 2 1/2 hours.
Do not peek.
text: Recipe: Sunday Chicken. Ingredients: cream of mushroom soup, cream of celery soup, milk, rice, onion soup mix, chicken. Instructions: Mix first four ingredients together and put in greased 9 x 13-inch Pyrex cake pan. Lay chicken pieces on top of rice mixture. Sprinkle with dry onion soup mix. Cover with foil and bake at 350° for 2 to 2 1/2 hours. Do not peek.

title: Blue Cheese Dressing(Low-Fat)
instructions: Add buttermilk to Blue cheese until mixture is thick.
Add sour cream.
Add more buttermilk until desired thickness.
text: Recipe: Blue Cheese Dressing(Low-Fat)  . Ingredients: cheese, buttermilk, low-fat sour cream. Instructions: Add buttermilk to Blue cheese until mixture is thick. Add sour cream. Add more buttermilk until desired thickness.

title: Quick French Onion Soup
instructions: Prepare soup per package directions.
Slowly add grated cheese, stirring to melt cheese.
Add the egg slowly, stirring well.
Remove from heat and pour into 4 soup bowls.
Top with slice of cheese and bread.
Place under broiler until browned and cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Quick French Onion Soup. Ingredients: onion soup, Swiss cheese, egg, Swiss cheese, bread. Instructions: Prepare soup per package directions. Slowly add grated cheese, stirring to melt cheese. Add the egg slowly, stirring well. Remove from heat and pour into 4 soup bowls. Top with slice of cheese and bread. Place under broiler until browned and cheese is melted.

title: Mom'S Potato Casserole
instructions: Prepare potatoes as directed on box.
Soak onion and parsley in water.
Combine potatoes, sour cream, cream cheese, onion, parsley flakes and garlic powder.
Melt butter to put on top. Sprinkle chives and paprika on top.
Bake 30 minutes at 350°.
text: Recipe: Mom'S Potato Casserole. Ingredients: potatoes, cream cheese, sour cream, garlic, butter, onion, parsley. Instructions: Prepare potatoes as directed on box. Soak onion and parsley in water. Combine potatoes, sour cream, cream cheese, onion, parsley flakes and garlic powder. Melt butter to put on top. Sprinkle chives and paprika on top. Bake 30 minutes at 350°.

title: Swiss Chicken(Light And Real Easy)
instructions: *Can use two slices of low-fat toast, ground up in a food processor.
text: Recipe: Swiss Chicken(Light And Real Easy)  . Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg, Swiss cheese, bread crumbs. Instructions: *Can use two slices of low-fat toast, ground up in a food processor.

title: Potato Cheese Soup
instructions: Saute celery, carrots and onions in butter until tender. Add soup, broth, parsley
and
hot
pepper
sauce.
Simmer
20 minutes.
Add milk; heat.
Just before serving, stir in cheese. Do not boil.
Yield:
4 to 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Potato Cheese Soup. Ingredients: celery, carrots, onion, butter, condensed cream, chicken broth, parsley, drops, milk, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Saute celery, carrots and onions in butter until tender. Add soup, broth, parsley and hot pepper sauce. Simmer 20 minutes. Add milk; heat. Just before serving, stir in cheese. Do not boil. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.

title: Fruit Dip
instructions: Have cream cheese at room temperature. Mix marshmallow cream together with cream cheese. Mix well. Serve with fresh fruit.
text: Recipe: Fruit Dip. Ingredients: marshmallow cream, cream cheese. Instructions: Have cream cheese at room temperature. Mix marshmallow cream together with cream cheese. Mix well. Serve with fresh fruit.

title: Vegetable And Chicken Hot Dish
instructions: Place cooked chicken in a greased casserole.
Boil vegetables 5 or 6 minutes.
Strain and set aside.
Heat cream of chicken and cream of celery soup (no water added) with Cheez Whiz until smooth.
Mix well with vegetables.
Pour over chicken and bake 1/2 hour at 350°.
Sprinkle Durkee onions over top, the last 15 minutes.
text: Recipe: Vegetable And Chicken Hot Dish. Ingredients: chicken breasts, carrots, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup, onions. Instructions: Place cooked chicken in a greased casserole. Boil vegetables 5 or 6 minutes. Strain and set aside. Heat cream of chicken and cream of celery soup (no water added) with Cheez Whiz until smooth. Mix well with vegetables. Pour over chicken and bake 1/2 hour at 350°. Sprinkle Durkee onions over top, the last 15 minutes.

title: Chicken Legs
instructions: Kill chicken.
Cut off its head.
Shave chicken's feathers off.
Cut off chicken's legs.
Put legs in oven for 5 minutes at 279°.
text: Recipe: Chicken Legs. Ingredients: chicken. Instructions: Kill chicken. Cut off its head. Shave chicken's feathers off. Cut off chicken's legs. Put legs in oven for 5 minutes at 279°.

title: Corned Beef Dip
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl, cover, and chill for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Corned Beef Dip. Ingredients: corned beef, onion soup, sour cream. Instructions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl, cover, and chill for 1 hour.

title: Super Simple Biscuits
instructions: Preheat an oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Stir the flour, butter, and sour cream together in a bowl until blended. Scoop the batter into ungreased cupcake tins.
Bake in the preheated oven until puffed and golden brown, 20 to 30 minutes.
text: Recipe: Super Simple Biscuits. Ingredients: flour, butter, sour cream. Instructions: Preheat an oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Stir the flour, butter, and sour cream together in a bowl until blended. Scoop the batter into ungreased cupcake tins. Bake in the preheated oven until puffed and golden brown, 20 to 30 minutes.

title: Biscuits With Blue Cheese Butter
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Separate biscuits and cut into quarters; place biscuit pieces into prepared baking dish. Mix unsalted butter and blue cheese together in a bowl until thoroughly combined and brush the butter mixture over the biscuits.
Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits are golden brown, 10 to 15 minutes. Pull apart to serve.
text: Recipe: Biscuits With Blue Cheese Butter. Ingredients: unsalted butter, blue cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish. Separate biscuits and cut into quarters; place biscuit pieces into prepared baking dish. Mix unsalted butter and blue cheese together in a bowl until thoroughly combined and brush the butter mixture over the biscuits. Bake in the preheated oven until biscuits are golden brown, 10 to 15 minutes. Pull apart to serve.

title: Pesto Chips
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
Arrange potato chips in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet; top with 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, dried basil, and garlic.

Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and chips are just starting to brown around the edges, about 4 minutes. Top chips with remaining Parmesan cheese and fresh basil. Drizzle olive oil over cheese layer. Cool and transfer to a serving bowl.
text: Recipe: Pesto Chips. Ingredients: potato chips, Parmesan cheese, basil, garlic, fresh basil, olive oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C). Arrange potato chips in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet; top with 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, dried basil, and garlic. Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and chips are just starting to brown around the edges, about 4 minutes. Top chips with remaining Parmesan cheese and fresh basil. Drizzle olive oil over cheese layer. Cool and transfer to a serving bowl.

title: Even Better Cheesy Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Melt 6 tablespoons butter in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir onion and garlic until onion is slightly softened, 5 to 10 minutes.
Mix potatoes, Mexican cheese blend, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, and onion mixture together in a bowl; pour into a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Mix corn flakes, melted butter, and garlic salt together in a bowl; sprinkle over potato mixture. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Remove foil and continue baking until corn flake topping is lightly browned, about 30 minutes more.
text: Recipe: Even Better Cheesy Potatoes. Ingredients: Potatoes, butter, onion, garlic, brown potatoes, sour cream, condensed cream, corn flakes, butter, garlic salt. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Melt 6 tablespoons butter in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir onion and garlic until onion is slightly softened, 5 to 10 minutes. Mix potatoes, Mexican cheese blend, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, and onion mixture together in a bowl; pour into a 9x13-inch baking dish. Mix corn flakes, melted butter, and garlic salt together in a bowl; sprinkle over potato mixture. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Remove foil and continue baking until corn flake topping is lightly browned, about 30 minutes more.

title: Onion Rice Pilaf
instructions: Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat. Stir in the onion, and cook until soft and translucent.

In a small saucepan, combine the rice, onions, and broth. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer 30 minutes. Remove from heat, let cool for several minutes, then fluff with a fork.
text: Recipe: Onion Rice Pilaf. Ingredients: onion, butter, calrose rice, chicken broth. Instructions: Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat. Stir in the onion, and cook until soft and translucent. In a small saucepan, combine the rice, onions, and broth. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer 30 minutes. Remove from heat, let cool for several minutes, then fluff with a fork.

title: Crostini With Mozzarella And Tomato
instructions: Preheat the oven's broiler. Brush the slices of bread lightly with olive oil, and place on a baking sheet. Toast under the broiler for about 3 minutes. Watch carefully. Rub each crostini with a garlic clove for flavor.
Place the tomatoes into a medium bowl, and drizzle with olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
Place the crostini on a serving tray. Top each one with a slice of mozzarella cheese, cover with a spoonful of tomatoes, and garnish with fresh basil.
text: Recipe: Crostini With Mozzarella And Tomato. Ingredients: extra virgin olive oil, garlic, tomatoes, fresh basil, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat the oven's broiler. Brush the slices of bread lightly with olive oil, and place on a baking sheet. Toast under the broiler for about 3 minutes. Watch carefully. Rub each crostini with a garlic clove for flavor. Place the tomatoes into a medium bowl, and drizzle with olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Place the crostini on a serving tray. Top each one with a slice of mozzarella cheese, cover with a spoonful of tomatoes, and garnish with fresh basil.

title: Stuffed Italian Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Mix melted butter, parsley, olive oil, and garlic together in a bowl.
Slice bread diagonally without cutting all the way through; do the same on the opposite diagonal to create cube-shaped sections still attached to the bottom crust.
Spoon butter mixture carefully between sections; stuff in shredded Italian cheese blend. Wrap loaf in aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes; unwrap and bake until cheese is melted, about 10 minutes more.
text: Recipe: Stuffed Italian Bread. Ingredients: butter, parsley, olive oil, garlic, Italian bread, Italian cheese blend. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Mix melted butter, parsley, olive oil, and garlic together in a bowl. Slice bread diagonally without cutting all the way through; do the same on the opposite diagonal to create cube-shaped sections still attached to the bottom crust. Spoon butter mixture carefully between sections; stuff in shredded Italian cheese blend. Wrap loaf in aluminum foil. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes; unwrap and bake until cheese is melted, about 10 minutes more.

title: Onion Skin Colored Eggs
instructions: Remove the colored skins from the outsides of the yellow and red onions. Save the rest of the onion for other uses. Cut cheesecloth into 5 inch squares. Place a couple of pieces of onion skin onto a square of cheesecloth and set an egg on top. Gather the cheesecloth around the egg so that it is covered with onion skin. Secure with a rubber band. Repeat with remaining eggs and onion skins.

Fill a large pot with cold water and add the wrapped eggs. Cover and bring to a boil, then remove from the heat and let stand for 10 to 15 minutes. Afterwards, rinse the eggs under cold water and snip off the rubber bands to remove the cheesecloth. Rinse and dry the eggs.
text: Recipe: Onion Skin Colored Eggs. Ingredients: yellow onions, red onions, eggs. Instructions: Remove the colored skins from the outsides of the yellow and red onions. Save the rest of the onion for other uses. Cut cheesecloth into 5 inch squares. Place a couple of pieces of onion skin onto a square of cheesecloth and set an egg on top. Gather the cheesecloth around the egg so that it is covered with onion skin. Secure with a rubber band. Repeat with remaining eggs and onion skins. Fill a large pot with cold water and add the wrapped eggs. Cover and bring to a boil, then remove from the heat and let stand for 10 to 15 minutes. Afterwards, rinse the eggs under cold water and snip off the rubber bands to remove the cheesecloth. Rinse and dry the eggs.

title: Mrs. Prophet'S Roasted Garlic French Bread
instructions: Mix the dry package of Idahoan Roasted Garlic Potatoes with the butter until blended.
Slice the French bread length wise and generously spread with the roasted garlic mixture.
Toast under the broiler until butter spread is melted and toasted on top.
text: Recipe: Mrs. Prophet'S Roasted Garlic French Bread. Ingredients: Garlic, butter, bread. Instructions: Mix the dry package of Idahoan Roasted Garlic Potatoes with the butter until blended. Slice the French bread length wise and generously spread with the roasted garlic mixture. Toast under the broiler until butter spread is melted and toasted on top.

title: Pumpkin Apple Cobbler
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).

In a medium bowl, stir together the apples and pumpkin butter. Spread evenly in a 8 or 9 inch square baking dish. Pour the pumpkin bread mix into a bowl, and cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Sprinkle over the top of the apples.
Bake for 45 minutes in the preheated oven, or until the apples are tender enough to insert a fork. Serve warm with whipped cream.
text: Recipe: Pumpkin Apple Cobbler. Ingredients: pumpkin butter, bread mix, butter, whipped cream. Instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). In a medium bowl, stir together the apples and pumpkin butter. Spread evenly in a 8 or 9 inch square baking dish. Pour the pumpkin bread mix into a bowl, and cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Sprinkle over the top of the apples. Bake for 45 minutes in the preheated oven, or until the apples are tender enough to insert a fork. Serve warm with whipped cream.

title: Spinach And Artichoke Tortilla Pizza
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking sheet.
Spread spinach-artichoke dip evenly over tortillas. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, and onion over dip. Arrange tortillas on prepared baking sheet.
Bake in preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbly, about 10 minutes. Top pizzas with tomato before slicing and serving.
text: Recipe: Spinach And Artichoke Tortilla Pizza. Ingredients: flour tortillas, mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, red onion, tomato. Instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking sheet. Spread spinach-artichoke dip evenly over tortillas. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, and onion over dip. Arrange tortillas on prepared baking sheet. Bake in preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbly, about 10 minutes. Top pizzas with tomato before slicing and serving.

title: Dad'S Beef And Chive Dip
instructions: Mix the sour cream and chive dip, sour cream, and cream cheese together in a large bowl.
Fold the green onion, dried beef, and Cheddar cheese into the cream cheese mixture.
Cover dip with plastic wrap and refrigerate until set, at least 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Dad'S Beef And Chive Dip. Ingredients: sour cream, sour cream, cream cheese, green onion, beef, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix the sour cream and chive dip, sour cream, and cream cheese together in a large bowl. Fold the green onion, dried beef, and Cheddar cheese into the cream cheese mixture. Cover dip with plastic wrap and refrigerate until set, at least 1 hour.

title: Pappa Al Pomodoro Alla Jamie Oliver
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350°F.
Prick cherry tomatoes, toss with one sliced clove of garlic and a quarter of the basil leaves.
Drizzle with oil, sprinkle with salt and pepper, put in a roasting tray and cook for 20 minutes.
Heat more olive oil in a large pot, add remaining garlic and basil stalks, stir and gently fry for a minute until softened.
Add tinned tomatoes, fill tin with water, add that.
Break tomatoes up with spoon, boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
Tear the bread into thumb sized pieces and add to pot, mix well, season to taste.
Tear in the basil leaves and let soup sit on low heat for ten minutes.
Remove roasted romatoes from tray and pour them into soup with their juices, basil, and oil from the tray.
Stir soup, it should be a thick, silky, porridge-like texture (adjust with water if necessary.
Remove from heat, add 6-7 tbsp olive oil.
Serve with a little extra basil torn over the top.
text: Recipe: Pappa Al Pomodoro Alla Jamie Oliver. Ingredients: garlic, basil, extra virgin olive oil, tomatoes. Instructions: Preheat oven to 180C/350°F. Prick cherry tomatoes, toss with one sliced clove of garlic and a quarter of the basil leaves. Drizzle with oil, sprinkle with salt and pepper, put in a roasting tray and cook for 20 minutes. Heat more olive oil in a large pot, add remaining garlic and basil stalks, stir and gently fry for a minute until softened. Add tinned tomatoes, fill tin with water, add that. Break tomatoes up with spoon, boil, then simmer for 15 minutes. Tear the bread into thumb sized pieces and add to pot, mix well, season to taste. Tear in the basil leaves and let soup sit on low heat for ten minutes. Remove roasted romatoes from tray and pour them into soup with their juices, basil, and oil from the tray. Stir soup, it should be a thick, silky, porridge-like texture (adjust with water if necessary. Remove from heat, add 6-7 tbsp olive oil. Serve with a little extra basil torn over the top.

title: Creamy Cauliflower And Butter Bean Soup
instructions: Heat oil in large pot.
Add garlic and onion and celery, cook 5 minutes.
Add stock, cauliflower and butter beans.
Bring to the boil, cover and simmer 15 minutes.
Cool slightly then puree, season to taste.
Reheat and serve with a swirl of cream.
text: Recipe: Creamy Cauliflower And Butter Bean Soup. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, onion, celery, chicken stock, butter beans, cream. Instructions: Heat oil in large pot. Add garlic and onion and celery, cook 5 minutes. Add stock, cauliflower and butter beans. Bring to the boil, cover and simmer 15 minutes. Cool slightly then puree, season to taste. Reheat and serve with a swirl of cream.

title: Presbyterian Chicken
instructions: First Layer: Place fine cut chicken in bottom of greased 9x13 baking dish.
Second Layer: Place celery soup and sour cream together.
Third Layer: Prepare stovetop stuffing as instructed except change water to 2 cups of broth.
Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
text: Recipe: Presbyterian Chicken. Ingredients: chicken, cornbread stuffing mix, butter, chicken broth, sour cream, cream of celery soup. Instructions: First Layer: Place fine cut chicken in bottom of greased 9x13 baking dish. Second Layer: Place celery soup and sour cream together.
