Third Layer: Prepare stovetop stuffing as instructed except change water to 2 cups of broth. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Cherry Tomato And Zucchini Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C.
Fry the onion slices and garlic in frypan until soft.
Lightly grease a 5-cup ovenproof dish.
Combine zucchini, tomatoes, paste, basil and 1 tbsp oil in the dish.
Sprinkle cooked onion and garlic over the top of zucchini and tomato.
Top with cheese and breadcrumbs, then drizzle with remaining oil.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until golden, bubbly and cooked through.
text: Recipe: Cherry Tomato And Zucchini Bake. Ingredients: zucchini, cherry tomatoes, tomatoes, olive oil, tomato paste, onion, garlic, basil, tasty cheese, breadcrumbs. Instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C. Fry the onion slices and garlic in frypan until soft. Lightly grease a 5-cup ovenproof dish. Combine zucchini, tomatoes, paste, basil and 1 tbsp oil in the dish. Sprinkle cooked onion and garlic over the top of zucchini and tomato. Top with cheese and breadcrumbs, then drizzle with remaining oil. Bake for 45 minutes, or until golden, bubbly and cooked through.

title: Onion Pan-Fried Pork Chops
instructions: With your hands and onion soup mix still in sealed packet crush onions up some what, but you do not want to make them into a powder you just want to break them up.
Mix flour and onion soup mix in a shallow bowl.
Add enough oil to bottom of a pan that would cover about half way up your pork chop.
Heat on medium heat until when you add flour mix to pan it sizzles.
Coat each pork chop with flour mixture.
Add to pan, about 30 seconds after adding the chops turn over, and cook until done (about 4-5 minute per side for 1/2 to 3/4 inch pork chop).
text: Recipe: Onion Pan-Fried Pork Chops. Ingredients: pork chops, flour, onion soup, olive oil. Instructions: With your hands and onion soup mix still in sealed packet crush onions up some what, but you do not want to make them into a powder you just want to break them up. Mix flour and onion soup mix in a shallow bowl. Add enough oil to bottom of a pan that would cover about half way up your pork chop. Heat on medium heat until when you add flour mix to pan it sizzles. Coat each pork chop with flour mixture. Add to pan, about 30 seconds after adding the chops turn over, and cook until done (about 4-5 minute per side for 1/2 to 3/4 inch pork chop).

title: No Fry Eggplant Parm
instructions: Preheat oven to 425.
Spray cookie sheet with cooking spray, arrange eggplant slices in a single layer.
Spray the top of eggplant slices.
Bake on center rack for 25 minutes
In a 9x9 inch dish, layer eggplant slices, topped with sauce, topped with cheese. Repeat.
You will probably get about 3 layers. End with cheese topping.
At this point, you can cover and refrigerate until you are ready to bake, OR:
Bake at 350 for 30 minutes.
Serve with salad and crusty bread, or over pasta, or use as sandwich filling.
text: Recipe: No Fry Eggplant Parm. Ingredients: eggplants, your favorite pasta sauce, mozzarella cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425. Spray cookie sheet with cooking spray, arrange eggplant slices in a single layer. Spray the top of eggplant slices. Bake on center rack for 25 minutes In a 9x9 inch dish, layer eggplant slices, topped with sauce, topped with cheese. Repeat. You will probably get about 3 layers. End with cheese topping. At this point, you can cover and refrigerate until you are ready to bake, OR: Bake at 350 for 30 minutes. Serve with salad and crusty bread, or over pasta, or use as sandwich filling.

title: Tomato Bruschetta
instructions: Brush each slice of bread with oil, a sprinkle of garlic and place on a baking sheet.
Place under the broiler until just golden.
Add a slice of tomato and sprinkle with mozzarella and basil.
Broil until it begins to turn brown.
Serve and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Tomato Bruschetta. Ingredients: Italian bread, olive oil, garlic, roma tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, fresh basil. Instructions: Brush each slice of bread with oil, a sprinkle of garlic and place on a baking sheet. Place under the broiler until just golden. Add a slice of tomato and sprinkle with mozzarella and basil. Broil until it begins to turn brown. Serve and enjoy!

title: Simple Garlic Bread
instructions: First cut the french bread in half, long ways. Next mix the butter, parmesan cheese, and the garlic powder all together. Now spread the butter mixture onto both sides of the french bread. Spread as much and thick as to your liking. Next put both pieces heads up on a baking sheet and place them in the broiler on 350 until brown. Keep watch on it so it don't burn easily.
text: Recipe: Simple Garlic Bread. Ingredients: bread, butter, garlic, parmesan cheese. Instructions: First cut the french bread in half, long ways. Next mix the butter, parmesan cheese, and the garlic powder all together. Now spread the butter mixture onto both sides of the french bread. Spread as much and thick as to your liking. Next put both pieces heads up on a baking sheet and place them in the broiler on 350 until brown. Keep watch on it so it don't burn easily.

title: Sweet And Sour Meat Balls
instructions: Mix all ingredients together and shape into 1-inch balls.
text: Recipe: Sweet And Sour Meat Balls. Ingredients: ground beef, bread crumbs, egg, onion. Instructions: Mix all ingredients together and shape into 1-inch balls.

title: Cheese-Smothered Chicken
instructions: In skillet, slowly brown chicken in butter, about 30 minutes. Add remaining ingredients.
Cover and simmer 15 minutes or until well done.
Stir occasionally.
Makes 4 servings.
text: Recipe: Cheese-Smothered Chicken. Ingredients: chicken parts, butter, Campbell's Cheddar cheese soup, tomatoes, onion, basil. Instructions: In skillet, slowly brown chicken in butter, about 30 minutes. Add remaining ingredients. Cover and simmer 15 minutes or until well done. Stir occasionally. Makes 4 servings.

title: Exotic Chicken Casserole
instructions: Mix rice and three kinds of soup together; place in large roaster pan.
Pour melted butter on top.
Place chicken pieces, skin side up, on top.
Bake, uncovered, for 3 hours at 275°.
text: Recipe: Exotic Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: rice, cream of chicken soup, cream of celery soup, cream of mushroom soup, chicken, butter. Instructions: Mix rice and three kinds of soup together; place in large roaster pan. Pour melted butter on top. Place chicken pieces, skin side up, on top. Bake, uncovered, for 3 hours at 275°.

title: Chicken Rice Casserole
instructions: Sprinkle dry soup in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Place, uncooked rice, over soup, then arrange chicken over rice.
Pour soup mixture over chicken.
Cover with foil.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
Remove foil and cook 30 minutes longer.
text: Recipe: Chicken Rice Casserole. Ingredients: rice, onion soup, cream of chicken, chicken. Instructions: Sprinkle dry soup in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. Place, uncooked rice, over soup, then arrange chicken over rice. Pour soup mixture over chicken. Cover with foil. Bake at 350° for 1 hour. Remove foil and cook 30 minutes longer.

title: Chicken And Rice Casserole
instructions: Combine cream of mushroom soup, dry onion soup mix, milk and rice.
Put in oblong pan.
Add chicken and bake at 350° for approximately 1 1/2 hours.
text: Recipe: Chicken And Rice Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup, milk, rice. Instructions: Combine cream of mushroom soup, dry onion soup mix, milk and rice. Put in oblong pan. Add chicken and bake at 350° for approximately 1 1/2 hours.

title: Twice Baked Potatoes
instructions: Mix all ingredients with the mashed potatoes.
Put in buttered 9 x 13-inch pan.
Top with 1/2 to 1 cup grated cheese.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
text: Recipe: Twice Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, cream cheese, sour cream, butter, garlic salt, Cheddar cheese. Instructions: Mix all ingredients with the mashed potatoes. Put in buttered 9 x 13-inch pan. Top with 1/2 to 1 cup grated cheese. Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

title: Monkey Bread
instructions: Thaw dough and pull apart.
Roll into a half dollar size. Place a little bit of cheese and a piece of beef in each piece. Seal up tight into a half moon shape.
Dip in melted butter and place in a tube pan.
Continue with the rest of the bread, cheese and beef.
Let rise until double in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Bake at 350° for 25 minutes.
Turn out onto a plate and invert it to another.
Pull apart and enjoy.
Nice fill in with soup and salad dinner.
text: Recipe: Monkey Bread. Ingredients: bread, Cheddar cheese, beef, butter. Instructions: Thaw dough and pull apart. Roll into a half dollar size. Place a little bit of cheese and a piece of beef in each piece. Seal up tight into a half moon shape. Dip in melted butter and place in a tube pan. Continue with the rest of the bread, cheese and beef. Let rise until double in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour. Bake at 350° for 25 minutes. Turn out onto a plate and invert it to another. Pull apart and enjoy. Nice fill in with soup and salad dinner.

title: Easy Fruit Dip
instructions: Blend together well.
Enjoy with apple slices, strawberries or any fruit.
text: Recipe: Easy Fruit Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, marshmallow cream. Instructions: Blend together well. Enjoy with apple slices, strawberries or any fruit.

title: Midnight Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Heat cream cheese with butter and milk in skillet.
Stir in deviled ham and eggs.
Stir to a soft scramble.
Serves 4.
text: Recipe: Midnight Scrambled Eggs. Ingredients: cream cheese, butter, milk, ham, eggs. Instructions: Heat cream cheese with butter and milk in skillet. Stir in deviled ham and eggs. Stir to a soft scramble. Serves 4.

title: Infallible Rice
instructions: Saute onion in butter until transparent.
Combine onion, rice and hot broth.
Bring to a boil on top of range.
Cover casserole dish and place in a 325° oven for 25 minutes.
Serves 4 hungry or 6 polite people.
text: Recipe: Infallible Rice. Ingredients: onion, butter, long-grain raw white rice, chicken broth. Instructions: Saute onion in butter until transparent. Combine onion, rice and hot broth. Bring to a boil on top of range. Cover casserole dish and place in a 325° oven for 25 minutes. Serves 4 hungry or 6 polite people.

title: Elegant Eggnog
instructions: Soften ice cream; put in serving container.
Pour eggnog over. Pour 7-Up in against the side of the bowl.
Have a shaker of nutmeg ready.
text: Recipe: Elegant Eggnog. Ingredients: vanilla ice cream, eggnog. Instructions: Soften ice cream; put in serving container. Pour eggnog over. Pour 7-Up in against the side of the bowl. Have a shaker of nutmeg ready.

title: Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Cook onion in butter or margarine until tender, not brown. Stir in flour, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
Add milk.
Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
Cook and stir 1 to 2 minutes more.
Remove from heat.
Place half of the sliced potatoes in a greased 2-quart casserole.
Cover with half of the sauce.
Repeat layers.
Bake, covered, in a 350° oven for 45 minutes, stirring once.
Uncover; bake about 30 minutes more or until potatoes are done.
text: Recipe: Scalloped Potatoes. Ingredients: onion, butter, flour, milk, potatoes, American cheese. Instructions: Cook onion in butter or margarine until tender, not brown. Stir in flour, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper. Add milk. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir 1 to 2 minutes more. Remove from heat. Place half of the sliced potatoes in a greased 2-quart casserole. Cover with half of the sauce. Repeat layers. Bake, covered, in a 350° oven for 45 minutes, stirring once. Uncover; bake about 30 minutes more or until potatoes are done.

title: Chicken Casserole
instructions: Boil
eggs, dice and
set
aside.
Boil
chicken
until done, cool.
Cut chicken into small strips or pieces.
In a 13 x 9-inch casserole dish, mix
chicken, cream of celery soup, 1 can water and eggs.
Stir
thoroughly.
Using
biscuit
mix of your choice, place biscuits side
by
side
on
top of chicken mixture.	Bake at 375° until biscuits are done.
text: Recipe: Chicken Casserole. Ingredients: chicken, cream of celery soup, eggs. Instructions: Boil eggs, dice and set aside. Boil chicken until done, cool. Cut chicken into small strips or pieces. In a 13 x 9-inch casserole dish, mix chicken, cream of celery soup, 1 can water and eggs. Stir thoroughly. Using biscuit mix of your choice, place biscuits side by side on top of chicken mixture.	Bake at 375° until biscuits are done.

title: French Onion Dip
instructions: Cream the cream cheese and thin down with milk.
Add beef base and dehydrated onions according to how you want it to taste.
text: Recipe: French Onion Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, beef base, onion, milk. Instructions: Cream the cream cheese and thin down with milk. Add beef base and dehydrated onions according to how you want it to taste.

title: Turkey Stuffing
instructions: Tear bread; place in grocery bag and leave open overnight. Saute onions and celery in butter until soft. Wet bread with water. Squeeze water out and add to onions and celery until brown. Stuff into turkey and place remainder in pan and bake until top is crisp.
text: Recipe: Turkey Stuffing. Ingredients: onions, celery, breads, butter. Instructions: Tear bread; place in grocery bag and leave open overnight. Saute onions and celery in butter until soft. Wet bread with water. Squeeze water out and add to onions and celery until brown. Stuff into turkey and place remainder in pan and bake until top is crisp.

title: Fruit Dip
instructions: Mix cream cheese and marshmallow cream together until smooth. Place in a bowl in center of a platter and arrange fruit around it. Strawberries, grapes and cantaloupe work best.
Very simple and extremely delicious.
Dip fruit in bowl and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Fruit Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, marshmallow cream topping. Instructions: Mix cream cheese and marshmallow cream together until smooth. Place in a bowl in center of a platter and arrange fruit around it. Strawberries, grapes and cantaloupe work best. Very simple and extremely delicious. Dip fruit in bowl and enjoy.

title: Hamburger Sausage Party Treats
instructions: In a large frying pan, break up hamburger and sausage; cook until well done.
Drain well in colander and return drained meat to pan; spread sliced cheese over top.
Cover and allow cheese to melt through meat.
Spread on rye bread and refrigerate or freeze until ready to use.
Cook on cookie sheet at 375° for 10 minutes or until brown on top.
Makes 36.
text: Recipe: Hamburger Sausage Party Treats. Ingredients: lean ground hamburger, sweet Italian sausage, Velveeta cheese, party rye bread. Instructions: In a large frying pan, break up hamburger and sausage; cook until well done. Drain well in colander and return drained meat to pan; spread sliced cheese over top. Cover and allow cheese to melt through meat. Spread on rye bread and refrigerate or freeze until ready to use. Cook on cookie sheet at 375° for 10 minutes or until brown on top. Makes 36.

title: Pork Chop Casserole
instructions: Use as many pork chops as wanted. Place in skillet and brown. Peel the potatoes and slice as thin as you can without breaking and place in casserole dish that has been sprayed. Put enough milk in to cover potatoes and place browned meat on top of potatoes. Season to taste. Bake until done. Be sure to cover.
text: Recipe: Pork Chop Casserole. Ingredients: pork chops, potatoes, milk. Instructions: Use as many pork chops as wanted. Place in skillet and brown. Peel the potatoes and slice as thin as you can without breaking and place in casserole dish that has been sprayed. Put enough milk in to cover potatoes and place browned meat on top of potatoes. Season to taste. Bake until done. Be sure to cover.

title: Easy Pastry
instructions: Soften butter and cream cheese with fork; work in as much flour as you can. Knead as much as you like, the dough will always roll out thin and not break. Fill with your favorite fruits or fillings. Bake just a few minutes at 350 until done. This always turns out flaky & tender.
text: Recipe: Easy Pastry. Ingredients: Butter, Cream Cheese, Flour. Instructions: Soften butter and cream cheese with fork; work in as much flour as you can. Knead as much as you like, the dough will always roll out thin and not break. Fill with your favorite fruits or fillings. Bake just a few minutes at 350 until done. This always turns out flaky & tender.

title: Hamburger And Kraut Casserole
instructions: Brown the hamburger with onion.
Add kraut.
Add cooked rice and tomato soup.
Dot with brown sugar and butter.
Bake 1 hour at 350°.
text: Recipe: Hamburger And Kraut Casserole. Ingredients: hamburger, onion, rice, tomato soup. Instructions: Brown the hamburger with onion. Add kraut. Add cooked rice and tomato soup. Dot with brown sugar and butter. Bake 1 hour at 350°.

title: Pork Chops Supreme
instructions: Fry pork chops until brown.
Place in a large baking pan.
Add the other 3 ingredients and 2 1/2 cups water; stir with a spoon until soup and water are mixed.
Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake at 300° for 1 hour.
Check occasionally to see that chops do not stick to bottom of pan.
text: Recipe: Pork Chops Supreme. Ingredients: pork chops, cream of celery soup, cream of mushroom soup, onion soup. Instructions: Fry pork chops until brown. Place in a large baking pan. Add the other 3 ingredients and 2 1/2 cups water; stir with a spoon until soup and water are mixed. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake at 300° for 1 hour. Check occasionally to see that chops do not stick to bottom of pan.

title: Chicken Spinach Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Dip chicken in soup broth; coat with bread crumbs.
Set aside.
Combine sour cream, egg, garlic and flour and stir until smooth.
Stir in soup pieces, onion, spinach and half cheese.
Spread in casserole; top with chicken and remaining bread crumbs.
Bake 35 minutes.
Add rest of cheese on top and bake 10 to 15 more minutes.
text: Recipe: Chicken Spinach Bake. Ingredients: chicken breasts, Progresso chicken, Italian bread crumbs, sour cream, egg, clove garlic, flour, onion, frozen spinach, Swiss cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Dip chicken in soup broth; coat with bread crumbs. Set aside. Combine sour cream, egg, garlic and flour and stir until smooth. Stir in soup pieces, onion, spinach and half cheese. Spread in casserole; top with chicken and remaining bread crumbs. Bake 35 minutes. Add rest of cheese on top and bake 10 to 15 more minutes.

title: Wild Onions And Eggs
instructions: Wash the onions.
Chop whole onion (the green tops also) into small pieces.
Boil in water to cover adding 1 tbsp. bacon grease. Boil about 20 minutes or until tender and liquid is absorbed. Break eggs into this mixture.
Stir and cook about 5 more minutes.
text: Recipe: Wild Onions And Eggs. Ingredients: onions, eggs. Instructions: Wash the onions. Chop whole onion (the green tops also) into small pieces. Boil in water to cover adding 1 tbsp. bacon grease. Boil about 20 minutes or until tender and liquid is absorbed. Break eggs into this mixture. Stir and cook about 5 more minutes.

title: Cheese Cake
instructions: In a mixing bowl combine cream cheese and milk.
Blend well, then add lemon mix.
It will become thick. Pour into cooled crust and refrigerate.
text: Recipe: Cheese Cake. Ingredients: cream cheese, milk. Instructions: In a mixing bowl combine cream cheese and milk. Blend well, then add lemon mix. It will become thick. Pour into cooled crust and refrigerate.

title: Ranch Twice Baked Potatoes
instructions: Slice baked potatoes lengthwise. Scoop flesh of potatoes into a large bowl. Place the skins on a baking sheet. Add the butter to the potatoes and mix well. Add the Ranch flavor mix to potatoes and mix well. Spoon equal amounts of potato mix back into the skins and bake for 10 minutes at 375°.
text: Recipe: Ranch Twice Baked Potatoes. Ingredients: potatoes, butter. Instructions: Slice baked potatoes lengthwise. Scoop flesh of potatoes into a large bowl. Place the skins on a baking sheet. Add the butter to the potatoes and mix well. Add the Ranch flavor mix to potatoes and mix well. Spoon equal amounts of potato mix back into the skins and bake for 10 minutes at 375°.

title: Rotel Chicken
instructions: Saute onion until clear.
Mix together all ingredients except chips.
Pour in casserole dish and layer with cheese and chips (crushed).
Bake at 350° until cheese melts.
text: Recipe: Rotel Chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, Ro-Tel tomatoes, Velveeta cheese, onion, nacho cheese Doritos. Instructions: Saute onion until clear. Mix together all ingredients except chips. Pour in casserole dish and layer with cheese and chips (crushed). Bake at 350° until cheese melts.

title: Brown Rice
instructions: Stir all ingredients together.
Bake at 300° for 40 minutes.
text: Recipe: Brown Rice. Ingredients: rice, butter, consomme beef soup, onion soup. Instructions: Stir all ingredients together. Bake at 300° for 40 minutes.

title: Easy Potato Soup
instructions: Make medium white sauce using Watkins cream soup; set aside. Simmer potatoes, onion and celery in 1 1/2 cups water in a covered 2-quart saucepan.
Do not drain.
Add 1/4 teaspoon Watkins dry mustard and a dash of Watkins black pepper to the medium white sauce; add to vegetables.
Bring to a full boil, stirring constantly.
Makes 6 servings.
text: Recipe: Easy Potato Soup. Ingredients: potatoes, onion, celery. Instructions: Make medium white sauce using Watkins cream soup; set aside. Simmer potatoes, onion and celery in 1 1/2 cups water in a covered 2-quart saucepan. Do not drain. Add 1/4 teaspoon Watkins dry mustard and a dash of Watkins black pepper to the medium white sauce; add to vegetables. Bring to a full boil, stirring constantly. Makes 6 servings.

title: Cream Chicken Roast
instructions: Coat chicken with flour, salt and pepper.
Place in roaster. Dot with butter, then pour milk over it.
Bake until tender. Makes delicious gravy.
text: Recipe: Cream Chicken Roast. Ingredients: chicken, butter, sweet milk. Instructions: Coat chicken with flour, salt and pepper. Place in roaster. Dot with butter, then pour milk over it. Bake until tender. Makes delicious gravy.

title: Inside-Out Stuffed Chicken
instructions: In a large bowl, combine stuffing mix and melted butter or margarine; toss well.
In a medium bowl, stir together soup and milk.
Dip chicken into soup mixture and then into stuffing, pressing with hands to coat.
Place on an ungreased 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan.
Bake in a 375° oven for 1 hour.
Serves 3 or 4.
text: Recipe: Inside-Out Stuffed Chicken. Ingredients: corn bread stuffing mix, butter, cream of chicken soup, milk, chicken. Instructions: In a large bowl, combine stuffing mix and melted butter or margarine; toss well. In a medium bowl, stir together soup and milk. Dip chicken into soup mixture and then into stuffing, pressing with hands to coat. Place on an ungreased 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan. Bake in a 375° oven for 1 hour. Serves 3 or 4.

title: Peanut Butter Treats
instructions: Combine butterscotch chips and peanut butter in large saucepan.
Stir over low heat until smooth.
Remove from heat. Add Rice Krispies.
Stir until well coated.
Press mixture evenly into buttered 13 x 9-inch pan.
Chill until firm.
Cut into 2-inch squares.
text: Recipe: Peanut Butter Treats. Ingredients: butterscotch chips, peanut butter, Rice Krispies. Instructions: Combine butterscotch chips and peanut butter in large saucepan. Stir over low heat until smooth. Remove from heat. Add Rice Krispies. Stir until well coated. Press mixture evenly into buttered 13 x 9-inch pan. Chill until firm. Cut into 2-inch squares.

title: Chicken-Rice Casserole
instructions: Mix together all ingredients but chicken.
Pour in large casserole dish.
Place chicken on top.
Bake at 250°, uncovered, for 3 hours.
text: Recipe: Chicken-Rice Casserole. Ingredients: rice, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, milk, chicken, onion soup. Instructions: Mix together all ingredients but chicken. Pour in large casserole dish. Place chicken on top. Bake at 250°, uncovered, for 3 hours.

title: Cheese Potatoes
instructions: Bake 1 1/2 to 2 hours at 350° or can be made in a crock-pot.
text: Recipe: Cheese Potatoes. Ingredients: frozen hash brown potatoes, sour cream, cream of Cheddar cheese soup, cream of potato soup, cream of mushroom soup, onions. Instructions: Bake 1 1/2 to 2 hours at 350° or can be made in a crock-pot.

title: Dottie'S Homemade Biscuits
instructions: Combine flour with Crisco (I use a fork to mix).
Pour in buttermilk until dough is sticky, but not too moist to work with your hands.
Put handful of flour on surface.
Knead lightly 6 or 7 times.
Pat out dough to about 1/2-inch thickness.
Cut out with floured cutter.
Place biscuits close together for soft sided biscuits or 1-inch apart for crusty sides.
Bake at 450° for 10 to 15 minutes, until brown.
text: Recipe: Dottie'S Homemade Biscuits. Ingredients: flour, buttermilk. Instructions: Combine flour with Crisco (I use a fork to mix). Pour in buttermilk until dough is sticky, but not too moist to work with your hands. Put handful of flour on surface. Knead lightly 6 or 7 times. Pat out dough to about 1/2-inch thickness. Cut out with floured cutter. Place biscuits close together for soft sided biscuits or 1-inch apart for crusty sides. Bake at 450° for 10 to 15 minutes, until brown.

title: Sweet Potato Dip
instructions: Mix all ingredients.
Serve with fresh vegetables or favorite chips.
text: Recipe: Sweet Potato Dip. Ingredients: potatoes, sour cream, onion soup mix. Instructions: Mix all ingredients. Serve with fresh vegetables or favorite chips.

title: Pumpkin Cheese Cake
instructions: Mix and put crust in refrigerator.
text: Recipe: Pumpkin Cheese Cake. Ingredients: graham crackers, butter. Instructions: Mix and put crust in refrigerator.

title: Easy Chicken Pie
instructions: Put chicken, soup and broth in casserole dish.
Mix flour, butter and milk.
Pour over chicken.
Bake at 350° for about 1 hour or until brown.
text: Recipe: Easy Chicken Pie. Ingredients: chicken breasts, chicken soup, chicken broth, flour, butter, sweet milk. Instructions: Put chicken, soup and broth in casserole dish. Mix flour, butter and milk. Pour over chicken. Bake at 350° for about 1 hour or until brown.

title: Fruit Dip
instructions: Combine and mix well.
Serve as dip for fresh fruit.
text: Recipe: Fruit Dip. Ingredients: cream cheese, marshmallow cream. Instructions: Combine and mix well. Serve as dip for fresh fruit.

title: Caesar Chicken
instructions: *Important:
Make with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
text: Recipe: Caesar Chicken. Ingredients: chicken cutlets, egg, bread crumbs, olive oil. Instructions: *Important: Make with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.

title: Sausage Pie
instructions: Brown sausage and drain.
Mix all ingredients together and pour in 2 unbaked pie shells.
Bake at 350° for 20 minutes or until brown.
text: Recipe: Sausage Pie. Ingredients: sausage, grated cheese, eggs, milk. Instructions: Brown sausage and drain. Mix all ingredients together and pour in 2 unbaked pie shells. Bake at 350° for 20 minutes or until brown.

title: Cheese And Potato Casserole
instructions: In a bowl, combine potatoes, sour cream, milk and garlic powder; mix well. Spoon half into a greased 1-qt. baking dish. Layer with half of the onions and cheese. Repeat layers. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Cheese And Potato Casserole. Ingredients: hot mashed potatoes, sour cream, milk, garlic, onions, cheddar cheese. Instructions: In a bowl, combine potatoes, sour cream, milk and garlic powder; mix well. Spoon half into a greased 1-qt. baking dish. Layer with half of the onions and cheese. Repeat layers. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until the cheese is melted.

title: Garlic Bread Mini Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, garlic powder and onion powder until blended. In another bowl, toss Colby-Monterey Jack cheese with Italian cheese blend.
On a lightly floured surface, unroll breadstick dough; press perforations to seal. Roll dough to a 12x8-in. rectangle; cut dough lengthwise in half.

Spread each 12x4-in. rectangle with half of the cream cheese mixture to within 1/4-in. of edges. Sprinkle each with half of the combined cheeses; roll up jelly-roll style, starting with a long side. Pinch seam to seal. Cut rolls into 1-in. slices.
Place beaten egg and Parmesan cheese in separate shallow bowls. Dip a cut side of each slice in egg, then in Parmesan cheese; place in greased mini-muffin cups, cheese side up.
Bake until golden brown, 17-20 minutes. Serve warm.
text: Recipe: Garlic Bread Mini Muffins. Ingredients: cream cheese, garlic, onion powder, cheese, Italian cheese, breadsticks, egg, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, garlic powder and onion powder until blended. In another bowl, toss Colby-Monterey Jack cheese with Italian cheese blend. On a lightly floured surface, unroll breadstick dough; press perforations to seal. Roll dough to a 12x8-in. rectangle; cut dough lengthwise in half. Spread each 12x4-in. rectangle with half of the cream cheese mixture to within 1/4-in. of edges. Sprinkle each with half of the combined cheeses; roll up jelly-roll style, starting with a long side. Pinch seam to seal. Cut rolls into 1-in. slices. Place beaten egg and Parmesan cheese in separate shallow bowls. Dip a cut side of each slice in egg, then in Parmesan cheese; place in greased mini-muffin cups, cheese side up. Bake until golden brown, 17-20 minutes. Serve warm.

title: Tomato Alfredo Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, bring the tomatoes to a boil. Cook until most of the liquid is evaporated, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat.
Stir in the cream and basil; heat through (do not boil). Drain pasta. Add pasta and Parmesan cheese to sauce; toss to coat.
text: Recipe: Tomato Alfredo Pasta. Ingredients: pasta, Italian stewed tomatoes, heavy whipping cream, fresh basil, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, bring the tomatoes to a boil. Cook until most of the liquid is evaporated, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat. Stir in the cream and basil; heat through (do not boil). Drain pasta. Add pasta and Parmesan cheese to sauce; toss to coat.

title: Prime Rib And Potatoes
instructions: Combine the oil and garlic; rub evenly over roast. Place roast, fat side up, in a small roasting pan. Place a potato on each side of roast. Bake, uncovered, at 325° for 2 to 2-1/2 hours until meat reaches desired doneness (for medium-rare, a thermometer should read 145°; medium, 160°; well done, 170°). Let stand for 10 minutes before carving.
text: Recipe: Prime Rib And Potatoes. Ingredients: olive oil, garlic, baking potatoes. Instructions: Combine the oil and garlic; rub evenly over roast. Place roast, fat side up, in a small roasting pan. Place a potato on each side of roast. Bake, uncovered, at 325° for 2 to 2-1/2 hours until meat reaches desired doneness (for medium-rare, a thermometer should read 145°; medium, 160°; well done, 170°). Let stand for 10 minutes before carving.

title: Creamy Cheese Potatoes
instructions: In a 3-qt. slow cooker coated with cooking spray, combine the soups and butter. Stir in potatoes.
Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours or until potatoes are tender. Stir in cheese and sour cream. Cover and cook 15-30 minutes longer or until heated through.
text: Recipe: Creamy Cheese Potatoes. Ingredients: condensed cream, condensed cream, butter, potatoes, cheddar cheese, sour cream. Instructions: In a 3-qt. slow cooker coated with cooking spray, combine the soups and butter. Stir in potatoes. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours or until potatoes are tender. Stir in cheese and sour cream. Cover and cook 15-30 minutes longer or until heated through.

title: Grilled Cheese Loaf
instructions: In a small bowl, beat cream cheese and butter. Add cheese, onions and garlic salt; mix well. Cut bread, leaving slices attached at the bottom; spread slices with cream cheese mixture.
Wrap loaf in a large piece of heavy-duty foil (about 28x18 in.); seal tightly. Grill, covered, over medium heat for 8-10 minutes, turning once. Carefully open foil; grill bread 5 minutes longer.
text: Recipe: Grilled Cheese Loaf. Ingredients: cream cheese, butter, mozzarella cheese, green onions, garlic salt, bread. Instructions: In a small bowl, beat cream cheese and butter. Add cheese, onions and garlic salt; mix well. Cut bread, leaving slices attached at the bottom; spread slices with cream cheese mixture. Wrap loaf in a large piece of heavy-duty foil (about 28x18 in.); seal tightly. Grill, covered, over medium heat for 8-10 minutes, turning once. Carefully open foil; grill bread 5 minutes longer.

title: Beef Onion Soup
instructions: Prepare soup according to package directions; add beef. Ladle into two 2-cup ovenproof bowls. Top each with a French bread slice. Sprinkle with Monterey Jack cheese and Parmesan cheese if desired. Broil 4-6 in. from the heat until cheese is melted.
text: Recipe: Beef Onion Soup. Ingredients: onion soup, beef, bread, shredded Monterey Jack cheese, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Prepare soup according to package directions; add beef. Ladle into two 2-cup ovenproof bowls. Top each with a French bread slice. Sprinkle with Monterey Jack cheese and Parmesan cheese if desired. Broil 4-6 in. from the heat until cheese is melted.

title: Cheesy Sausage Penne
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the sausage over medium heat until meat is no longer pink. Add garlic; cook 1 minute longer. Drain. Stir in spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
Cook pasta according to package directions; drain. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the cream cheese, sour cream and onions.
In a greased shallow 3-qt. baking dish, layer half of the pasta and sausage mixture. Dollop with half the cream cheese mixture; sprinkle with half the cheddar cheese. Repeat layers.
Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly.
text: Recipe: Cheesy Sausage Penne. Ingredients: Italian sausage, garlic, spaghetti sauce, penne pasta, cream cheese, sour cream, green onions, cheddar cheese. Instructions: In a large skillet, cook the sausage over medium heat until meat is no longer pink. Add garlic; cook 1 minute longer. Drain. Stir in spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the cream cheese, sour cream and onions. In a greased shallow 3-qt. baking dish, layer half of the pasta and sausage mixture. Dollop with half the cream cheese mixture; sprinkle with half the cheddar cheese. Repeat layers. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly.

title: Bird’S Nest Breakfast
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Place shredded potato on top of the butter (arranging with a hole in the middle, like a nest) and cook for 4-5 minutes. Place egg inside the hole and cook for another 3-5 minutes. Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon butter on the skillet, and flip the nest over on top. Cook for another 5 minutes or until egg is set and potatoes are cooked through.
Dig in!
text: Recipe: Bird’S Nest Breakfast. Ingredients: Butter, Egg. Instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Place shredded potato on top of the butter (arranging with a hole in the middle, like a nest) and cook for 4-5 minutes. Place egg inside the hole and cook for another 3-5 minutes. Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon butter on the skillet, and flip the nest over on top. Cook for another 5 minutes or until egg is set and potatoes are cooked through. Dig in!

title: Asparagus With Sun Dried Tomatoes
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. After snapping the asparagus, chunk them, and add to the pan. Saute while cutting up the sundried tomatoes (you can use dried OR the ones packed in oil). Add to the pan, and saute the asparagus and tomatoes for about five minutes, or until the asparagus is as tender as you like. I prefer it to be a bit crunchy. At the last minute or so, I add a heaping tablespoon of minced garlic. Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Asparagus With Sun Dried Tomatoes. Ingredients: Garlic, Tomatoes, Olive Oil. Instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. After snapping the asparagus, chunk them, and add to the pan. Saute while cutting up the sundried tomatoes (you can use dried OR the ones packed in oil). Add to the pan, and saute the asparagus and tomatoes for about five minutes, or until the asparagus is as tender as you like. I prefer it to be a bit crunchy. At the last minute or so, I add a heaping tablespoon of minced garlic. Enjoy!

title: Tomato Tortellini Soup
instructions: In a soup pot, whisk together the tomato soup with chicken broth, milk and cream. Add tomatoes, onion, garlic salt, basil and half of the parmesan cheese. Heat over medium-low heat until very warm.
Meanwhile, cook cheese tortellini according to package directions. Drain and add in to soup at any point.
When ready to serve, top with remaining parmesan cheese. Pairs with with a nice crusty bread! Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Tomato Tortellini Soup. Ingredients: Tomato Soup, Chicken Broth, Milk, Heavy Cream, Tomatoes, Onion, Garlic, ¼, GratedParmesan Cheese, weight Cheese. Instructions: In a soup pot, whisk together the tomato soup with chicken broth, milk and cream. Add tomatoes, onion, garlic salt, basil and half of the parmesan cheese. Heat over medium-low heat until very warm. Meanwhile, cook cheese tortellini according to package directions. Drain and add in to soup at any point. When ready to serve, top with remaining parmesan cheese. Pairs with with a nice crusty bread! Enjoy!

title: Slow Cooker Apple Dip
instructions: You will also need six 4-ounce size canning jars with lids and rings.
Open the cans of condensed milk and pour them evenly into the jars. One can will fill three 4 ounce canning jars perfectly. Leave a little room for expansion. Seal the jars.
Put the jars into the crock of your slow cooker. Add water to cover the jars by at least an inch.
Cook on low for 10 hours, or until the caramel is the color you want it to be. Carefully remove the jars from the crockpot and let them cool completely before opening. Serve with sliced apples.
text: Recipe: Slow Cooker Apple Dip. Ingredients: Milk. Instructions: You will also need six 4-ounce size canning jars with lids and rings. Open the cans of condensed milk and pour them evenly into the jars. One can will fill three 4 ounce canning jars perfectly. Leave a little room for expansion. Seal the jars. Put the jars into the crock of your slow cooker. Add water to cover the jars by at least an inch. Cook on low for 10 hours, or until the caramel is the color you want it to be. Carefully remove the jars from the crockpot and let them cool completely before opening. Serve with sliced apples.

title: Dirty Rice
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350 degrees.
Spray a medium-sized casserole dish with cooking spray. Add the butter and put in the oven for about 5 minutes, allowing the butter to melt completely.
Once butter has melted, add beef consomme, French onion soup, and rice. Stir to blend.
Cook for 45 minutes - 1 hour until rice has absorbed liquid and is cooked through. The onions from the soup will rise to the top, giving you a nice topping.
This recipe is the perfect complement to a nice piece of red meat.
text: Recipe: Dirty Rice. Ingredients: Butter, Campbell's Beef, Onion, Rice. Instructions: Preheat your oven to 350 degrees. Spray a medium-sized casserole dish with cooking spray. Add the butter and put in the oven for about 5 minutes, allowing the butter to melt completely. Once butter has melted, add beef consomme, French onion soup, and rice. Stir to blend. Cook for 45 minutes - 1 hour until rice has absorbed liquid and is cooked through. The onions from the soup will rise to the top, giving you a nice topping. This recipe is the perfect complement to a nice piece of red meat.

title: Roasted Herbes De Provence Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F.
Rinse potatoes well, dry on paper towels and cut into quarters. Transfer to a large mixing bowl. Add melted butter, olive oil, and herbes de Provence. Stir well to coat potatoes.
Place in a single layer on a rimmed nonstick baking sheet pan on the middle rack of the oven. Bake for 20 minutes. They will be flavorful, crispy and delicious! Serve immediately. Enjoy!
text: Recipe: Roasted Herbes De Provence Potatoes. Ingredients: Red New Potatoes, Butter, Olive Oil. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Rinse potatoes well, dry on paper towels and cut into quarters. Transfer to a large mixing bowl. Add melted butter, olive oil, and herbes de Provence. Stir well to coat potatoes. Place in a single layer on a rimmed nonstick baking sheet pan on the middle rack of the oven. Bake for 20 minutes. They will be flavorful, crispy and delicious! Serve immediately. Enjoy!

title: Baked Sweet Potato
instructions: Pierce the whole sweet potato with a fork. Place on a baking tray. Bake at 400F for 45-50 minutes. Serve with a mixture of sour cream and chipotle chili powder.
text: Recipe: Baked Sweet Potato. Ingredients: Sour Cream. Instructions: Pierce the whole sweet potato with a fork. Place on a baking tray. Bake at 400F for 45-50 minutes. Serve with a mixture of sour cream and chipotle chili powder.

title: Cookies N Cream Shake
instructions: Put your ingredients in a blender and blend it up.
text: Recipe: Cookies N Cream Shake. Ingredients: Cream, Milk. Instructions: Put your ingredients in a blender and blend it up.

title: Roasted G Bread
instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F. Slice the top off each head of garlic so the cloves are exposed. Put them in a small oven safe dish and drizzle with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil. Roast the garlic for about 1 hour. Check them at around 45 minutes. If they look too brown, drizzle them with a bit more olive oil and/or cover with tin foil.
Meanwhile, slice bread into 1-inch slices but do not slice all the way through. Leave a bit of bread attached on the bottom so you can rip them apart later.

Test the garlic after 1 hour with a fork. You should be able to pierce the cloves easily, the fork should slide right in and the garlic should be very soft. Once garlic is finished, remove it from the oven but do not turn your oven off. Allow the garlic to cool for a few minutes so you can handle it without burning your fingers. Once cooled, squeeze each clove of garlic out of its casing into a bowl, making sure you don't miss any of the smaller cloves. Add your spread and Parmesan cheese. Smash the cloves with a fork and mix well.

Spread the garlic mixture onto each slice of your bread, using all of the garlic mixture. Wrap the bread in tin foil and place in the oven for about 10 minutes. If you want your bread a little crispier, uncover from the foil and put back in the oven for an additional 3-5 minutes. Once removed, keep it wrapped up in the foil so it stays hot and serve!
text: Recipe: Roasted G Bread. Ingredients: Garlic, Olive Oil, Bread, Favorite Butter, Parmesan Cheese. Instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F. Slice the top off each head of garlic so the cloves are exposed. Put them in a small oven safe dish and drizzle with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil. Roast the garlic for about 1 hour. Check them at around 45 minutes. If they look too brown, drizzle them with a bit more olive oil and/or cover with tin foil. Meanwhile, slice bread into 1-inch slices but do not slice all the way through. Leave a bit of bread attached on the bottom so you can rip them apart later. Test the garlic after 1 hour with a fork. You should be able to pierce the cloves easily, the fork should slide right in and the garlic should be very soft. Once garlic is finished, remove it from the oven but do not turn your oven off. Allow the garlic to cool for a few minutes so you can handle it without burning your fingers. Once cooled, squeeze each clove of garlic out of its casing into a bowl, making sure you don't miss any of the smaller cloves. Add your spread and Parmesan cheese. Smash the cloves with a fork and mix well. Spread the garlic mixture onto each slice of your bread, using all of the garlic mixture. Wrap the bread in tin foil and place in the oven for about 10 minutes. If you want your bread a little crispier, uncover from the foil and put back in the oven for an additional 3-5 minutes. Once removed, keep it wrapped up in the foil so it stays hot and serve!

title: Budget Chicken Soup
instructions: Cut the chicken into pieces and boil in a large pot filled with water. I usually use the cheapest pieces of a chicken for this soup. I buy a whole chicken and roast the breast, legs and wings and use the back of the chicken for the soup. Works with rotisserie chicken, too.

After about 30 minutes of boiling, the meat should be easy to remove from the bones. Take the chicken out, de-bone and add it back to the pot. Add the thinly juliened carrots, parsnip and onion. Continue boiling for about 10 minutes, until the carrots are completely cooked.

Add the quick cooking pasta (noodles) to the pot of soup and then remove the pot from the heat. Cover and let it cool down a bit. Although the pot is not on the heat, the boiling liquid will still cook the pasta.
At the end, add salt and pepper to taste. This soup is especially good for people who need to watch their sodium intake, as it contains no canned broth or stock.
text: Recipe: Budget Chicken Soup. Ingredients: Chicken, Carrots, Onion, Pasta. Instructions: Cut the chicken into pieces and boil in a large pot filled with water. I usually use the cheapest pieces of a chicken for this soup. I buy a whole chicken and roast the breast, legs and wings and use the back of the chicken for the soup. Works with rotisserie chicken, too. After about 30 minutes of boiling, the meat should be easy to remove from the bones. Take the chicken out, de-bone and add it back to the pot. Add the thinly juliened carrots, parsnip and onion. Continue boiling for about 10 minutes, until the carrots are completely cooked. Add the quick cooking pasta (noodles) to the pot of soup and then remove the pot from the heat. Cover and let it cool down a bit. Although the pot is not on the heat, the boiling liquid will still cook the pasta. At the end, add salt and pepper to taste. This soup is especially good for people who need to watch their sodium intake, as it contains no canned broth or stock.

title: Pasta With Prosciutto, Asparagus And Crumb Topping
instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to the package directions. Drain well, then return to the pan.

Meanwhile, heat the oil in a large skillet on medium heat. Saute the onion and garlic for 2-3 mins, until the onion is soft and translucent. Add the asparagus and prosciutto and cook for 1-2 mins more, stirring, until the asparagus turns bright green. Pour in the wine and simmer until reduced by half.
For the crumb topping, heat the oil in a medium skillet on high heat. Saute the breadcrumbs for 1-2 mins, until crisp and golden. Add the Parmesan cheese and season to taste.
Mix the sour cream and eggs in a small bowl. Add to the pasta with the asparagus mixture. Toss over a high heat for 1-2 mins to heat through. Serve the pasta sprinkled with the crumb topping.
text: Recipe: Pasta With Prosciutto, Asparagus And Crumb Topping. Ingredients: pasta, olive oil, red onion, garlic, white wine, sour cream, eggs, olive oil, fresh breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese. Instructions: Cook the pasta in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to the package directions. Drain well, then return to the pan. Meanwhile, heat the oil in a large skillet on medium heat. Saute the onion and garlic for 2-3 mins, until the onion is soft and translucent. Add the asparagus and prosciutto and cook for 1-2 mins more, stirring, until the asparagus turns bright green. Pour in the wine and simmer until reduced by half. For the crumb topping, heat the oil in a medium skillet on high heat. Saute the breadcrumbs for 1-2 mins, until crisp and golden. Add the Parmesan cheese and season to taste. Mix the sour cream and eggs in a small bowl. Add to the pasta with the asparagus mixture. Toss over a high heat for 1-2 mins to heat through. Serve the pasta sprinkled with the crumb topping.

title: Mini Meat Pies
instructions: 1. In a med. bowl, combine all of the ingredients except the pie crust mix; Mix well...

2. Prepare the pie crust mix as package directs, and divide dough in half. Then on a floured surface, roll out the dough to 10" x 13" rectangle, 1/8" thick; then cut into 20 2 " squares. Spoon 1 heaping teaspoon of meat mixture into center of each square and fold as desired...
Repeat step # 2) with the remaining dough and meat mixture...
4. Place all of the pies on an ungreased cookie sheet 1" apart and bake 12 to 15 min. or `til lightly browned...
5. Serve hot and refrigerate the leftovers...
text: Recipe: Mini Meat Pies. Ingredients: ground beef, eggs, parsley [chopped], beef bouillon WYLERS. Instructions: 1. In a med. bowl, combine all of the ingredients except the pie crust mix; Mix well... 2. Prepare the pie crust mix as package directs, and divide dough in half. Then on a floured surface, roll out the dough to 10" x 13" rectangle, 1/8" thick; then cut into 20 2 " squares. Spoon 1 heaping teaspoon of meat mixture into center of each square and fold as desired... Repeat step # 2) with the remaining dough and meat mixture... 4. Place all of the pies on an ungreased cookie sheet 1" apart and bake 12 to 15 min. or `til lightly browned... 5. Serve hot and refrigerate the leftovers...

title: Cream Of Pork Chops
instructions: Brown pork chops in a pan
Once browned, add the can of cream of chicken soup + the 1 can of water

Simmer 30-60mins 
(the longer you simmer the more tender the pork chops will be)
(feel free to add extra water to keep the "gravy"/soup from burning/evaporating too much)
When ready to eat, make instant rice and serve under the pork chops with the "gravy"/soup
text:
Recipe: Cream Of Pork Chops. Ingredients: pork chops, cream of chicken soup, instant white rice. Instructions: Brown pork chops in a pan Once browned, add the can of cream of chicken soup + the 1 can of water Simmer 30-60mins 
(the longer you simmer the more tender the pork chops will be)
(feel free to add extra water to keep the "gravy"/soup from burning/evaporating too much) When ready to eat, make instant rice and serve under the pork chops with the "gravy"/soup

title: Roasted Sweet Potato Chips
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Spray 2 baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.

Toss potatoes with I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!(R) Spread in large bowl; arrange potatoes in single layer on prepared baking sheets. Bake, turning once, 25 minutes or until chips are crisp. Sprinkle lightly with salt, if desired.
text: Recipe: Roasted Sweet Potato Chips. Ingredients: sweet potatoes, butter. Instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Spray 2 baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray; set aside. Toss potatoes with I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!(R) Spread in large bowl; arrange potatoes in single layer on prepared baking sheets. Bake, turning once, 25 minutes or until chips are crisp. Sprinkle lightly with salt, if desired.

instructions: Cook rice upto 90%
Add choice of your veggie.
Feel into capsicum with cheese
Bake in oven 5-7 min.
Ready to eat!!

title: Buffalo Chicken & Rice Dinner
instructions: Prepare Knorr(R) Rice SidesTM - Buffalo Chicken according to package directions. Stir in 1 cup celery.
Arrange Rice on serving platter, then top with chicken.
Sprinkle with blue cheese and remaining 1 cup celery.

title: Baked Eggs With Ham And Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease four 1/2-cup ramekins. Place on a baking pan.
Divide ham and onions among ramekins. Break an egg into each and sprinkle evenly with cheese.
Bake for 8-10 mins, until egg yolk is just set. Serve with tomato chutney.

Lightly grease four 1/2-cup ramekins. Place on a baking pan. Divide ham and onions among ramekins. Break an egg into each and sprinkle evenly with cheese. Bake for 8-10 mins, until egg yolk is just set. Serve with tomato chutney.

title: Chicken & Swiss Cheese
instructions: Place chicken in casserole dish and put 1 piece of cheese on each piece of chicken.
Pour on soup.
Sprinkle on Pepperidge Farm mix.
Cut up butter and sprinkle it on top of mix.
Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
Serves 6.

Pour on soup. Sprinkle on Pepperidge Farm mix. Cut up butter and sprinkle it on top of mix. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. Serves 6.

title: No Frying Eggplant Parmesan  (18 Servings)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Combine bread crumbs with 1 cup Parmesan cheese in large shallow casserole. Dip eggplant slices in egg mixture, then bread crumb mixture. Arrange eggplant slices in single layer on lightly oiled baking sheets. Spray eggplant, if desired, with nonstick cooking spray. Bake 25 minutes or until eggplant is golden.

Evenly spread 1 cup Pasta Sauce in 4-quart (15 x 10 x 2-inch) baking dish. Layer 1/2 of the baked eggplant slices, then 1-1/2 cups Sauce, and 1/2 of the mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses; repeat, reserving the mozzarella and using all of the remaining Sauce.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake 45 minutes. Remove foil, then sprinkle with remaining mozzarella cheese. Bake uncovered an additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted.

title: Bolognese Sauce
instructions: Heat oil in large saucepan on medium-high heat. Cook pancetta, stirring, until crisp. Add onion, carrot and celery; cook, stirring, until vegetables have softened.

Add ground beef and liver to pan; cook, stirring, until ground beef is browned all over. Stir in milk, butter, stock, wine, tomato puree and paste. Transfer mixture in a 4.5-quart slow cooker. Cook, covered, on low, for 8 hours.
Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain.
Add parsley to sauce; stir. Serve sauce on pasta and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese
text: Recipe: Bolognese Sauce. Ingredients: olive oil, onion, carrot, celery, ground beef, chicken livers, milk, butter, beef stock, red wine, tomato puree, tomato paste, spaghetti, flat leaf parsley, Parmesan cheese. Add ground beef and liver to pan; cook, stirring, until ground beef is browned all over. Stir in milk, butter, stock, wine, tomato puree and paste. Transfer mixture in a 4.5-quart slow cooker. Cook, covered, on low, for 8 hours. Cook pasta in large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain. Add parsley to sauce; stir. Serve sauce on pasta and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese

3. Pour rice over chicken cutlets and serve with a vegetable.

instructions: Heat oven to 375 degrees F.
Combine bread crumbs and cheeses; sprinkle 1/2 cup onto bottom of 13x9-inch baking dish sprayed with cooking spray.
Top with chicken.
Spoon tomatoes around chicken; sprinkle with remaining crumb mixture.
Bake 30 to 32 min.
or until chicken is done (165 degrees F).

title: Clarified butter
instructions: Melt 8oz butter gently in a saucepan or in the oven.
Allow to stand for a few minutes, then spoon the crusty white layer of salt particles off the top.
Underneath is the clear liquid known as clarified butter.
The milky liquid at the bottom can be discarded or used in a white sauce.
Cover and refrigerate.

title: 20 Minute Chicken Parmesan Recipe
instructions: Using palm of hand flatten chicken to even thickness.
Dip chicken into egg then into crumbs to coat.
In skillet over medium heat, in warm margarine, brown chicken on both sides.
Add in Prego sauce.
Reduce heat.
Cover; simmer 10 min.
Sprinkle with cheeses and parsley.
Cover; simmer 5 min or possibly till cheese melts.
4 servings.
Suggested Wine: Chianti, Chardonnay

title: Potato Casserole With Feta and Egg
instructions: Spray casserole with vegetable oil or butter well.
Boil potatoes until soft and then pare and cut into thin slices.
Put a layer of potato slices in the bottom of the casserole.
Sprinkle generously with bits of feta cheese.
Put half the hard boiled eggs over layers.
Put tiny slices of butter in between layers.
Repeat layers until casserole is full and the last layer should be potatoes.
Sprinkle the parmesan cheese on top of the last potato layer.
Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for about 30 minutes.
Serve immediately.

Cook all day.
Cook rice.
Serve over rice.
Noodles are good also.
text: Recipe: Beef Over Rice Recipe. Ingredients: beef stew, cream of mushroom soup, rice. Instructions: In crock pot place stew meat in mushroom soup. Cook all day. Cook rice. Serve over rice. Noodles are good also.

title: Cheesy Meaty Lasagna
instructions: Chop onion and mix in with hamburger meat.
Season hamburger with season salt, garlic salt and pepper.
Brown hamburger.
Drain both cans of tomatoes and add tomatoes in after burger is browned and drained.
Add in pasta sauce and let simmer for a few mins.
Layer bottom of pan with sauce and add noodles.
Layer noodles with sauce
Add ricotta cheese over top of the sauce...
I like to mix my cheese in with the sauce.
Layer again with noodles and sauce
After your lasagna has been layered on top add your mozzarella cheese(both packs) and sprinkle with parmesean cheese.
Preheat oven to 375F and bake for an hour.
Cover with foil.
After hour is up remove foil and let bake another 10-15 mins.
Then eat up!
Enjoy!

Cover with foil. After hour is up remove foil and let bake another 10-15 mins. Then eat up! Enjoy!

title: Lasagna Like
instructions: Cook the noodles to just aldente in a huge stock pot.
Brown the hamburger and sausage together.
drain both then put all the ingredients except the mozzarella back into the large into the stock pot.
stir well.
if you want to add any extra seasoning, now would be the time.
I have 2 large casserole pans but if you don't you can use 2 2-1/2 inch deep foil casserole pans.
put a layer of the noodle/meat mix.
then a layer of cheese.
not a thick layer of cheese, just enough to cover the noodles.
then repeat.
Bake it at 350F till all bubbly and gooey.
let it sit for about 10 mins to cool and set.
serve and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Lasagna Like. Ingredients: lean hamburger, sausage, bags of egg noodles, mozzarella cheese, cottage cheese, spaghetti sauce. Brown the hamburger and sausage together. drain both then put all the ingredients except the mozzarella back into the large into the stock pot. stir well. if you want to add any extra seasoning, now would be the time. I have 2 large casserole pans but if you don't you can use 2 2-1/2 inch deep foil casserole pans. put a layer of the noodle/meat mix. then a layer of cheese. not a thick layer of cheese, just enough to cover the noodles. then repeat. Bake it at 350F till all bubbly and gooey. let it sit for about 10 mins to cool and set. serve and enjoy.

title: Buttered Carrots
instructions: Place carrots in a saucepan and just barely cover with salted water.
Cover and cook over low to medium heat until tender, 10-20 minutes.
Drain carrots in a colander.
Melt butter in the same saucepan.
Stir in parsley and drained carrots.
Remove pan from heat and stir until carrots are covered with butter.
Serve immediately.
text: Recipe: Buttered Carrots. Ingredients: carrots, butter, parsley. Instructions: Place carrots in a saucepan and just barely cover with salted water. Cover and cook over low to medium heat until tender, 10-20 minutes. Drain carrots in a colander. Melt butter in the same saucepan. Stir in parsley and drained carrots. Remove pan from heat and stir until carrots are covered with butter. Serve immediately.

title: Homemade Rice Flour from Polished Rice
instructions: Grind up the rice in the mixer without washing the rice first.
To get an even flour, try pulsing the mixer, 3 seconds on, 3 seconds off.
It's done.
If you're worried about the coarseness of the flour after blending, or if you don't have a blender, you can use a mortar and pestle.
You can sift the flour and re-grind what remains to get a fine flour.
Here's a potato salad and corn mayo pizza made from rice flour.
You get an irresistible chewy texture when you use the rice flour.
Rice Noodles

title: Sliced Baked Potatoes With Parsley Butter
instructions: Prick the potatoes a few times with a fork and bake them in the middle of a preheated 400 degree oven for 1 hour.
In a small saucepan melt the butter and stir in the parsley and salt and pepper to taste.
Cut the warm baked potatoes crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick slices, arrange the slices, overlapping them, on plates, and drizzle each serving with some of the parsley butter.

In a small saucepan melt the butter and stir in the parsley and salt and pepper to taste. Cut the warm baked potatoes crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick slices, arrange the slices, overlapping them, on plates, and drizzle each serving with some of the parsley butter.

title: Huff-a-lumps, kiddie treat
instructions: Spread peanut butter on one graham cracker.
Spread marshmallow cream on the other graham cracker.
Then smush together.
Eat and enjoy.
text: Recipe: Huff-a-lumps, kiddie treat. Ingredients: graham cracker squares, peanut butter, marshmallow cream. Instructions: Spread peanut butter on one graham cracker. Spread marshmallow cream on the other graham cracker. Then smush together. Eat and enjoy.

title: Ham Rolls
instructions: Set out your cream cheese to soften (low-fat cream cheese will work as well).
Keep ham refrigerated until ready to assemble.
Trim the bulbs off your onions and just enough of the greens to get rid of any dry, mushy ends.
Rinse green onion, peeling a layer off the white ends and removing the transparent film.
Dry the onions well.
Open your package of ham and set on a cutting board.
Keep ham slices in a stack.
Have paper towels handy.
Blot the first slice of ham with the paper towel.
Spread cream cheese, covering the first slice.
Use the cake frosting application of applying thickly at first and then spreading thin as you cover the entire slice.
The colder your ham and the softer your cream cheese, the better.
Once the slice is spread with cream cheese, lay an onion across the ham slice (the short side).
Trim the green of the onion as necessary.
Set aside.
Roll from the short end tightly.
Lay the entire roll on a plate, or in a casserole dish.
Continue with each slice.
Be sure to blot before you spread the cream cheese.
When you run out of whole onions, you can start to use the discarded greens.
Double or triple up on the thinner greens depending on your preference for onion flavor.
When youve finished the entire package of ham, refrigerate your tray of ham rolls for 2 hours.
After chilling, slice each roll into bite-sized pieces, usually about 6.
Chill for up to 2 days covered.
We have found in our family that there are never enough.
Onion lovers usually eat all the rolls with the white onion, those less thrilled eat the rolls with greens in them, and the kids push out the onion and just eat the ham/cream cheese.
Ive heard that people make these with pickles instead of onions, but I love them as they are.
text: Recipe: Ham Rolls. Ingredients: Onions, weight Cream Cheese, weight Ham. Instructions: 1. Set out your cream cheese to soften (low-fat cream cheese will work as well). 2. Keep ham refrigerated until ready to assemble. 3. Trim the bulbs off your onions and just enough of the greens to get rid of any dry, mushy ends. 4. Rinse green onion, peeling a layer off the white ends and removing the transparent film. 5. Dry the onions well. 6. Open your package of ham and set on a cutting board. Keep ham slices in a stack. 7. Have paper towels handy. 8. Blot the first slice of ham with the paper towel. 9. Spread cream cheese, covering the first slice. Use the cake frosting application of applying thickly at first and then spreading thin as you cover the entire slice. The colder your ham and the softer your cream cheese, the better. 10. Once the slice is spread with cream cheese, lay an onion across the ham slice (the short side). Trim the green of the onion as necessary. Set aside. 11. Roll from the short end tightly. Lay the entire roll on a plate, or in a casserole dish. 12. Continue with each slice. Be sure to blot before you spread the cream cheese. 13. When you run out of whole onions, you can start to use the discarded greens. Double or triple up on the thinner greens depending on your preference for onion flavor. 14. When youve finished the entire package of ham, refrigerate your tray of ham rolls for 2 hours. 15. After chilling, slice each roll into bite-sized pieces, usually about 6. 16. Chill for up to 2 days covered. We have found in our family that there are never enough. Onion lovers usually eat all the rolls with the white onion, those less thrilled eat the rolls with greens in them, and the kids push out the onion and just eat the ham/cream cheese. Ive heard that people make these with pickles instead of onions, but I love them as they are.

title: Schirripa's Eggplant Parmigiana
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Start by cutting the top and bottom off the eggplant.
Cut it into 1/8-inch slices.
Whisk 2 eggs with 1/4 cup milk.
Lay out 3 cups of bread crumbs on paper towel.
In a large skillet, heat 1/2 cup oil.
Take each piece of eggplant and dip in the egg wash, then in bread crumbs and make sure to completely cover each piece with bread crumbs, and then fry in hot oil.
Brown each slice of eggplant.
Occasionally change the oil; you don't want to continue cooking eggplant slices with burnt loose bread crumbs.
Place fried eggplant on paper towel to absorb some of the oil.
Slice the fresh mozzarella.
Line the bottom of an 11 by 9 inch glass pan with a layer of sauce.
Place a layer of eggplant, followed by slice of mozzarella, a heaping layer of sauce, then sprinkle with a layer of Pecorino Romano cheese.
Repeat, and stack about 3 to 4 eggplants high.
Bake in the oven for 20-30 minutes.
You know it's ready when the sauce bubbles and the cheese is melted.
3 tablespoons olive oil
1 garlic clove, minced
1 teaspoon water
1 (28-ounce) can tomatoes with their juices, diced
2 tablespoons chopped fresh basil leaves or 1/2 teaspoon dried
1/4 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon sugar
1 tablespoon olive oil
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a saucepan over medium heat until it becomes fragrant.
Mix the garlic with 1 teaspoon water and carefully add this to the warm oil.
Saute the garlic and cook without browning it.
Add the tomatoes, bring it to a boil, and then reduce the heat.
Simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the basil, salt and sugar, and simmer 5 more minutes.
Just before serving, blend in the last tablespoon of olive oil.

Take each piece of eggplant and dip in the egg wash, then in bread crumbs and make sure to completely cover each piece with bread crumbs, and then fry in hot oil. Brown each slice of eggplant. Occasionally change the oil; you don't want to continue cooking eggplant slices with burnt loose bread crumbs. Place fried eggplant on paper towel to absorb some of the oil. Slice the fresh mozzarella. Line the bottom of an 11 by 9 inch glass pan with a layer of sauce. Place a layer of eggplant, followed by slice of mozzarella, a heaping layer of sauce, then sprinkle with a layer of Pecorino Romano cheese. Repeat, and stack about 3 to 4 eggplants high. Bake in the oven for 20-30 minutes. Simmer for 10 minutes. Add the basil, salt and sugar, and simmer 5 more minutes. Just before serving, blend in the last tablespoon of olive oil.

title: Basic Bread And Dough Recipe (Sourdough) Recipe
instructions: For the dough I used:(more or possibly less on the quantities)
1 c. white flour2 c. whole wheat1 tsp.
yeast1 c. sour dough1 Tbsp.
honey1 c. water and then watch it if you need more water or possibly more flour
By the way I use these same things and quantities to make my bread.
In the bread I add in various things, for instance caraway seeds, or possibly garlic, or possibly raisins, whatever I feel likeThe bread always comes out good.
So this is my always recipe for bread or possibly dough.

Instructions: For the dough I used:(more or possibly less on the quantities) 1 c. white flour2 c. whole wheat1 tsp. yeast1 c. sour dough1 Tbsp. honey1 c. water and then watch it if you need more water or possibly more flour By the way I use these same things and quantities to make my bread. In the bread I add in various things, for instance caraway seeds, or possibly garlic, or possibly raisins, whatever I feel likeThe bread always comes out good. So this is my always recipe for bread or possibly dough.

title: White Cheese Dip
instructions: layer cheese in the bottom of a microwaveable bowl.
mix milk and sour cream together and pour over cheeses.
cook on High for 4 min.
Then pour in blender or use a emulsifyer wand.
to blend and break down butter fats until smooth.
Serve with corn tortilla chips.
text: Recipe: White Cheese Dip. Ingredients: cheese, pepper cheese, milk, sour cream. Instructions: layer cheese in the bottom of a microwaveable bowl. mix milk and sour cream together and pour over cheeses. cook on High for 4 min. Then pour in blender or use a emulsifyer wand. to blend and break down butter fats until smooth. Serve with corn tortilla chips.

title: Basil Cheese Toast
instructions: Spread the basil sauce on the bread, top with the cheese slice, and put in the toaster.
Toast until the cheese is done.
text: Recipe: Basil Cheese Toast. Ingredients: bread, melt cheese. Instructions: Spread the basil sauce on the bread, top with the cheese slice, and put in the toaster. Toast until the cheese is done.

title: Best Eggplant Parmesan Ever!
instructions: First slice the eggplant into discs about 1/4-1/2 inch think (or 1cm which is .39 inches).
Then crack the eggs into a bowl, add a splash of milk, and beat them.
Line up two more bowls: one with flour and one with breadcrumbs.
Then take the eggplant slices, drop them into the bowl of flour until covered, then into the bowl of egg, and finally into the breadcumbs.
I do this whole process for each slice individually with a fork because it will make your hands really messy otherwise.
Once you have breaded the eggplant, heat olive oil in a pan (cover the whole bottom) to medium heat.
Once you can flick water on the pan and hear it sizzle, its hot enough.
Then fry the eggplant briefly until the breading is slightly browned.
Put the finished ones on a paper towel to dry them.
Add more olive oil as needed to keep the pan covered.
Once the eggplant is finished, put a bit of the sauce into a large baking dish (I use the biggest one I have, about 13), and spread it around to cover the bottom.
Then layer the eggplant slices on top of each other in the pan.
Pour the rest of the pasta sauce on top and spread around evenly.
Then sprinkle cheese on top.
Bake in the oven for 35 minutes at 350 degrees, and enjoy!
text: Recipe: Best Eggplant Parmesan Ever!. Ingredients: Eggs, Eggplant, Breadcrumbs, Milk, Olive Oil, Pasta Sauce, Shredded Cheese, Flour. Instructions: First slice the eggplant into discs about 1/4-1/2 inch think (or 1cm which is .39 inches). Then crack the eggs into a bowl, add a splash of milk, and beat them. Line up two more bowls: one with flour and one with breadcrumbs. Then take the eggplant slices, drop them into the bowl of flour until covered, then into the bowl of egg, and finally into the breadcumbs. I do this whole process for each slice individually with a fork because it will make your hands really messy otherwise. Once you have breaded the eggplant, heat olive oil in a pan (cover the whole bottom) to medium heat. Once you can flick water on the pan and hear it sizzle, its hot enough. Then fry the eggplant briefly until the breading is slightly browned. Put the finished ones on a paper towel to dry them. Add more olive oil as needed to keep the pan covered. Once the eggplant is finished, put a bit of the sauce into a large baking dish (I use the biggest one I have, about 13), and spread it around to cover the bottom. Then layer the eggplant slices on top of each other in the pan. Pour the rest of the pasta sauce on top and spread around evenly. Then sprinkle cheese on top. Bake in the oven for 35 minutes at 350 degrees, and enjoy!

title: Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F.
Mince and mash garlic to a paste with a rounded 1/4 teaspoon salt using a heavy knife.
Stir together butter, oil, and garlic paste in a bowl until smooth, then stir in parsley.
Without cutting completely through bottom, cut bread diagonally into 1-inch-thick slices with a serrated knife, then spread garlic butter between slices.
Wrap loaf in foil and bake in middle of oven 15 minutes.
Open foil and bake 5 minutes more.
text: Recipe: Garlic Bread. Ingredients: garlic, unsalted butter, extra-virgin olive oil, parsley, Italian bread. Instructions: Preheat oven to 350F. Mince and mash garlic to a paste with a rounded 1/4 teaspoon salt using a heavy knife. Stir together butter, oil, and garlic paste in a bowl until smooth, then stir in parsley. Without cutting completely through bottom, cut bread diagonally into 1-inch-thick slices with a serrated knife, then spread garlic butter between slices. Wrap loaf in foil and bake in middle of oven 15 minutes. Open foil and bake 5 minutes more.

title: JalapeAao popper stuffed chicken
instructions: Pound out chicken flat with a meat hammer
In a food processor add jalapeAaos when its a paste add creamcheese
Beat egg and milk together
Stuff chicken by adding a spoonful of jalapeAao mixture on the chicken then tuck and rolling it.
Once chicken is stuffed dip in egg mix then breadcrumbs
Bake at 350A for about 45 minutes or ad needed
I spread the remaining jalapeAao cheese mix on top as an added bonus!
text: Recipe: JalapeAao popper stuffed chicken. Ingredients: chicken breasts, egg, milk, bread crumbs, creamcheese. title: Chicken Cordon Bleu
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Melt butter in glass baking dish.
Lightly flatten chicken breasts between plastic wrap with mallet.
Lay 1 slice of ham and 1 piece of cheese on flattened breast, fold in half and seal close with toothpicks.
Repeat process for remaining chicken breasts.
Coat each piece with flour, then eggs and then bread crumbs.
Place chicken pieces in glass baking dish.
Turn to coat with butter.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve with parselyed rice and steamed broccoli
text: Recipe: Chicken Cordon Bleu. Ingredients: butter, flour, chicken, eggs, ham, bread crumbs, swiss cheese. Instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Melt butter in glass baking dish. Lightly flatten chicken breasts between plastic wrap with mallet. Lay 1 slice of ham and 1 piece of cheese on flattened breast, fold in half and seal close with toothpicks. Repeat process for remaining chicken breasts. Coat each piece with flour, then eggs and then bread crumbs. Place chicken pieces in glass baking dish. Turn to coat with butter. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with parselyed rice and steamed broccoli

title: Fabulous PHILLY Potatoes
instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees F. Add potatoes to boiling water in saucepan; cook until tender.
Drain.
Mash potatoes.
Add cream cheese and sour cream; mash until fluffy.
Spoon into greased 1.4-L casserole dish; cover.
Bake 30 min.
or until heated through.
Top with onions.
text: Recipe: Fabulous PHILLY Potatoes. Ingredients: Cream Cheese, sour cream, green onions. Instructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees F. Add potatoes to boiling water in saucepan; cook until tender. Drain. Mash potatoes. Add cream cheese and sour cream; mash until fluffy. Spoon into greased 1.4-L casserole dish; cover. Bake 30 min. or until heated through. Top with onions.

title: Pressed Rice Logs
instructions: Following the directions in Long-Grain Rice Basics (page 238), cook the rice so the grains are on the soft side, rather than dry or firm.
You may have to use extra water.
This is the one time when mushy rice is good.
Wet a lint-free, nonterry dish towel, wring it out, and spread it out on a work surface.
Fluff the hot rice and then place half of it on the center of the towel.
Gather up the towel and start vigorously kneading the rice as if it were a ball of bread dough.
When the rice is compact and malleable, 1 to 2 minutes later, open up the towel and shape the rice into a log 2 inches in diameter.
Wrap the log in the dish towel and roll it back and forth to smooth the surface.
Put the log on a plate and repeat with the remaining rice.
Allow the logs to cool until they are dry to the touch, about 1 hour.
Rotate the logs after 30 minutes, so the wetter underside dries out, too.
To serve, use a knife to slice the logs into 1/4- to 1/2-inch-thick pieces, dipping the blade in cold water before each cut.
When making rice logs in advance, loosely cover them with plastic wrap and keep at room temperature.
They are best when eaten within 2 hours.
To make sesame salt (muoi me), toast 3 tablespoons sesame seeds (page 332) and transfer to a mortar.
Add 1/2 teaspoon kosher or sea salt and crush with a pestle to a fine, sandy texture.
Alternatively, use an electric mini-chopper and process for 12 to 15 seconds.
text: Recipe: Pressed Rice Logs. Ingredients: long-grain rice. Instructions: Following the directions in Long-Grain Rice Basics (page 238), cook the rice so the grains are on the soft side, rather than dry or firm. You may have to use extra water. This is the one time when mushy rice is good. Wet a lint-free, nonterry dish towel, wring it out, and spread it out on a work surface. Fluff the hot rice and then place half of it on the center of the towel. Gather up the towel and start vigorously kneading the rice as if it were a ball of bread dough. When the rice is compact and malleable, 1 to 2 minutes later, open up the towel and shape the rice into a log 2 inches in diameter. Wrap the log in the dish towel and roll it back and forth to smooth the surface. Put the log on a plate and repeat with the remaining rice. Allow the logs to cool until they are dry to the touch, about 1 hour. Rotate the logs after 30 minutes, so the wetter underside dries out, too. To serve, use a knife to slice the logs into 1/4- to 1/2-inch-thick pieces, dipping the blade in cold water before each cut. When making rice logs in advance, loosely cover them with plastic wrap and keep at room temperature. They are best when eaten within 2 hours. To make sesame salt (muoi me), toast 3 tablespoons sesame seeds (page 332) and transfer to a mortar. Add 1/2 teaspoon kosher or sea salt and crush with a pestle to a fine, sandy texture. Alternatively, use an electric mini-chopper and process for 12 to 15 seconds.

title: Delicious Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 275 degrees.
Line bottom of baking dish with dried chipped beef.
Place chicken on top of dried beef.
Mix sour cream, undiluted cream of mushroom soup, onion and garlic powders.
Pour over the chicken, and spread it around.
Cook, uncovered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Sprinkle with paprika.
